Matthew1:1 Mukanda wa bankambua ba Yesu Kilisto, muana wa Bayidi, muana wa Abalahama." 
Matthew1:2 Abalahama wakalela Isaka; Isaka wakalela Yakoba; Yakoba wakalela Yuda ne bana babo; 
Matthew1:3 Yuda ne mukashi wandi Tamâ bakalela Pelese ne Zela; Pelese wakalela Heselona; Heselona wakalela Lama; 
Matthew1:4 Lama wakalela Aminadaba; Aminadaba wakalela Nashona; Nashona wakalela Salamona; 
Matthew1:5 Salamona ne mukashi wandi Lahaba bakalela Boaza; Boaza ne Luta bakalela Obeda; Obeda wakalela Yishai; 
Matthew1:6 Yishai wakalela mukelenge Davidi. Davidi ne mukashi wakadi kudi Uliya bakalela Solomo; 
Matthew1:7 Solomo wakalela Lehabama; Lehabama wakalela Abiya; Abiya wakalela Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa wakalela Yehoshafata; Yehoshafata wakalela Yolama; Yolama wakalela Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 Uziya wakalela Yotama; Yotama wakalela Ahaza; Ahaza wakalela Hizikiya; 
Matthew1:10 Hizikiya wakalela Manashe; Manashe wakalela Amona; Amona wakalela Yoshiya; 
Matthew1:11 Yoshiya wakalela Yekonya ne bana babo ku tshikondo tshiakayabo nʼabo ku Babulona. 
Matthew1:12 Hakayabo nʼabo ku Babulona, Yekonya wakalela Shalatiele; Shalatiele wakalela Zelubabela;" 
Matthew1:13 Zelubabela wakalela Abihuda; Abihuda wakalela Eleyakima; Eleyakima wakalela. Azô; 
Matthew1:14 Azô wakalela Sadoka; Sadoka wakalela Akimi; Akimi wakalela Eliyuda; 
Matthew1:15 Eliyuda wakalela Eleazâ; Eleazâ wakalela Matana; Matana wakalela Yakoba; 
Matthew1:16 Yakoba wakalela Yosefe bayandi wa Malia muledi wa Yesu, udibo babikila ne, Kilisto." 
Matthew1:17 Nunku bikondo bionso ku Abalahama tô ne ku Davidi bidi dikumi ne binai; ku Bayidi tô ne hakayabo nʼabo ku Babulona bidi dikumi ne binai; bakayabo nʼabo ku Babulona tô ne ku Kilisto bidi dikumi ne binai. 
Matthew1:18 Kuledibua kua Yesu Kilisto kuakadi nunku: Hakadi baba wandi Malia mubangila kudi Yosefe, diambedi kaba! banze kulua hohamue, bakamusangana muimitshisha difu kudi Nyuma Muimpe." 
Matthew1:19 Yosefe, bayandi, wakadi muntu muakane, yeye kakasua kumulesha kudi bantu, wakamba kumulekela mu musokoko." 
Matthew1:20 Hakadiye welangana meshi a malu â, muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakamueneka kudiye mu tshilota tshiandi, wakamba ne, Yosefe, muana wa Bayidi, kutshinyi mua kuangata mukashi webe Malia, bualu bua udi muimita munda muandi ngua Nyuma Muimpe." 
Matthew1:21 Yeye nealele muana mulume, umuidike ne, Yesu, bualu bua yeye neasungile bantu handi ku mibi yabo." 
Matthew1:22 Malu â onso akalua bua kushikisha dî dia Mukelenge diakambabo kudi muprofete ne," 
Matthew1:23 Mukashi utshidi kamama neimite difu, nealele muana mulume, Nebamuidike dina ne, Imanuele, kuandamuna kua muaku ne, Nzambi udi nʼetu." 
Matthew1:24 Yosefe wakabika ku tulu, wakenza bu muakamuambila muanjelo wa Mukelenge, wakangata mukashi wandi;" 
Matthew1:25 yeye kakamumanya tô ne hakaleleye muana mulume: wakamuidika ne, Yesu." 
Matthew2:1 Hakalelabo Yesu mu Beteleheme wa mu Yudaya mu matuku a mukelenge Helode, Bena Meshi ba ku esete bakalua ku Yelushalema, bakonka ne," 
Matthew2:2 Udi muledibue Mukelenge wa Bayuda udi kudi kunyi? Tuakutangila mutoto wandi ku esete, tuakuluila kumukukuila." 
Matthew2:3 Hakunvua mukelenge Helode bualu ebu, mutshima wandi wakahandika ne ya bantu bonso bakadi nʼandi mu Yelushalema." 
Matthew2:4 Wakasangisha bakuidi banene ba Nzambi bonso ne bafundi ba bantu, wakabakonka ne, Nebalele Kilisto kudi kunyi?" 
Matthew2:5 Bakamuambila ne, Mu Beteleheme wa mu Yudaya; bualu bua dî edi diakufundibua kudi muprofete ne," 
Matthew2:6 Wewe Beteleheme, buloba bua Yudaya, Kuena tshianana munkatshi mua banfumu ba mu Yudaya, Bualu bua ngovena nealuhuke munda muebe, Yeye neikale mulami wa Isalele, bantu banyi." 
Matthew2:7 Hashishe Helode wakabikila Bena Meshi mu musokoko, wakabakonka diba mene mene diakamueneka mutoto." 
Matthew2:8 Yeye wakabatuma ku Beteleheme, wakamba ne, Yai bienu, nulonde bualu bua muana bitulu bitulu; hanuamusangana, nulue kundi ne dî, nunku meme kabidi nendue kumukukuila." 
Matthew2:9 Hakunvabo dî dia mukelenge, bakaya biabo; mutoto wakamonabo ku esete wakaya ku mpala kuabo tô ne hakimanau ha buludi hakadi muana," 
Matthew2:10 Hakamonabo mutoto, bakatamba kusanka." 
Matthew2:11 Bakabuela mu nsubu, bakamona muana ne baba wandi Malia; bakatua binu hanshi, bakamukukuila; hakabululabo bibutshilu biabo, bakamusawila bintu, ngolo ne mananashi ne mula." 
Matthew2:12 Hakabadimusha Nzambi mu tshilota ne, Kanuhinganyi kudi Helode, bakaya kuabo mu munga nshila." 
Matthew2:13 Hakayabo, muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakamueneka kudi Yosefe mu tshilota, wakamuambila ne, Bika biebe, angata muana ne baba wandi, unyemena mu Ejipitu, ushaleku tô ne hanakuambila; bualu bua Helode neakebe muana bua kumushiha." 
Matthew2:14 Yeye wakabika, wakangata muana ne baba wandi butuku, wakaya mu Ejipitu;" 
Matthew2:15 wakashalamu tô ne hakafua Helode; bua dî dia Mukelenge diakambabo kudi muprofete dishikisha e ne, Nakubikila muana wanyi umuke mu Ejipitu." 
Matthew2:16 Hakamanya Helode ne, Bena Meshi badi banseka, wakadi ne tshishi tshikole, wakatuma bua kushihabo bana balume bonso ba mu Beteleheme ne ba ku matshika a musoko ba katataka tô ne ba bidimu bibidi, bu ba tshikondo tshiakumanyineye kudi Bena Meshi." 
Matthew2:17 Nunku bakashikisha dî diakambibua kudi muprofete Yelemiya ne," 
Matthew2:18 Bakunvua dî mu Lama, Madilu ne muadi mukole, Lakele udi udila bana bandi, Yeye udi uhidia bamusambe, bualu bua bana bandi kabenaku." 
Matthew2:19 Hakafua Helode, monai, Muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakamueneka kudi Yosefe mu tshilota mu Ejipitu, wakamuambila ne," 
Matthew2:20 Bika biebe, angata muana ne baba wandi, uya mu buloba bua Isalele; bua bakebi ba muoyo wa muana bakufua." 
Matthew2:21 Wakabika biandi, wakangata muana ne baba wandi, wakalua mu buloba bua Isalele." 
Matthew2:22 Kadi hakunvueye lumu ne, Âkelao wakuhingana mu bukelenge bua tatu wandi Helode, wakadi ukokesha Yudaya, wakatshina mua kuyaku! Nzambi wakamudimusha mu tshilota, wakayila mu luseke lua Galela," 
Matthew2:23 wakalua mu musoko dina diau Nazaleta, wakashikamamu, buala bua kushikisha dî diakamba baprofete ne, Nebamuidike ne, Muena Nazaleta." 
Matthew3:1 Mu matuku au Yone Mubanji wakalua wambila bantu mu tshihela tshia Yudaya ne," 
Matthew3:2 Kudimunai mitshima yenu; bualu bua bukelenge bua mu diulu budi hehi. 
Matthew3:3 Eu nguakadibo bamba kudi muprofete Yeshaya ne, Dî dia muntu udi wela lubila mu tshihela ne, Longololai nshila wa Mukelenge, Nululamishe nshila yandi." 
Matthew3:4 Yone wakadi biandi ne tshikowelu tshiandi tshia mioso ya kamelu, wakadi kabidi ne mukaba wa tshiseba mu tshimono tshiandi; bia kudia biandi biakadi mikumbi ne buitshi." 
Matthew3:5 Bena Yelushalema bakumuka, ne bantu ba mu luseke luonso lua Yudaya, ne ba mu luseke luonso lua hehi ne musula wa Yadene, bakaya kudiye;" 
Matthew3:6 bakabadibua kudiye mu musulu wa Yadene, batonda mibi yabo." 
Matthew3:7 Kadi hakamoneye Bafalese ba bungi ne Basadoke balua kubatijibua, yeye wakabakonka ne, Nuenu bana ba nyoka, wakunudimusha bua kunyema ku mulau ulualua nganyi?" 
Matthew3:8 Nukuame mamuma makane adi alesha dikudimuna dia mitshima yenu; 
Matthew3:9 kanuedianganyi meshi munda muenu ne, Tuetu iudi ne Abalahama tatu wetu; ndi nuambila ne, Nzambi udi mumanye mua kubisha mabue â alue bana ba Abalahama." 
Matthew3:10 Katataka tshisui tshidi tshiladika ha muji wa mutshi wonso; mutshi wonso udi kawi ukuama mamuma mimpe nebaushimbule, nebawele mu kahia." 
Matthew3:11 Bulelela, ndi nubatiza mu mai bualu bua nuenu nukudimune mitshima yenu; kadi udi ulua ku nyima kuanyi udi muntambe meme, tshiena ne buakane bua kutuala bisabata biandi; yeye neanubatize mu Nyuma Muimpe ne mu kahia;" 
Matthew3:12 tshihehudi tshiandi tshidi mu tshianza, yeye neatokeshe tshituilu tshiandi bimpe; yeye neasangishe mponda wandi mu mudiba, kadi yeye neoshe bisote mu kahia kadi kakai kajima tshiendelele." 
Matthew3:13 Hashishe Yesu wakumuka ku Galela, wakalua ku musulu wa Yadene kudi Yone bua Yone amubatize." 
Matthew3:14 Yone wakamba kubenga ne, Meme ndi ne bualu bua wewe kumbatiza meme, munyi muwakulua kundi?" 
Matthew3:15 Kadi Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Tuenze bietu musangu eu, bualu bua mbimpe tukumbashe buakane buonso nunku. Yone wakitabusha." 
Matthew3:16 Hakamubatizabo nunku, Yesu wakumuka mu mai; ne monai, diulu diakamubuikila, yeye wakatangila Nyuma wa Nzambi uhueka bu nyunyu wa nkutshi, umuikila;" 
Matthew3:17 ne unvuai, dî diakafuma mu diulu ne, Eu udi Muana wanyi munanga, yeye udi unsankisha bimpe." 
Matthew4:1 Hashishe Nyuma wa Nzambi wakalombola Yesu mu tshihela bua diabolo amuteye. 
Matthew4:2 Hakajileye bia kudia minya makumi anai ne mafuku makumi anai, wakadi ne nsala." 
Matthew4:3 Muteyi wakalua, wakamuambila ne, Biwikala Muana wa Nzambi, amba mabue â andamuke mitanda ya bidia." 
Matthew4:4 Kadi yeye wakamuandamuna ne, Bakafunda dî ne, Muntu kikadi biandi ne muoyo bualu bua bidia nkayabi, ikale hiandi nʼau bualu bua mei onso adi aluhuka mukana mua Nzambi." 
Matthew4:5 Hashishe diabolo wakaya nʼandi mu musoko wa tshijila; wakamushikika ha musonga wa ntempelo," 
Matthew4:6 wakamuambila ne, Biwikala Muana wa Nzambi, udiele hanshi, bualu bua bakufunda ne, Yeye neakufile mu bianza bia banjelo bandi; Nebakutuale mu bianza biabo Bua wewe kukumi dikasa diebe ku dibue." 
Matthew4:7 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bakufunda kabidi ne, Kuteyi Mukelenge Nzambi webe." 
Matthew4:8 Diabolo kabidi wakaya nʼandi ku mutu kua mukuna wakadi mule be, wakamulesha makelenge onso a ha buloba ne butumbi buau;" 
Matthew4:9 wakamuambila ne, Nenkuhe bintu ebi bionso, biwatua binu biebe hanshi, biwankukuila." 
Matthew4:10 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Satana, umuka; bualu bua bakuanda dî ne, Kukuila Mukelenge Nzambi webe, umuenzele yeye nkayandi mudimu." 
Matthew4:11 Hashishe diabolo wakamushîa; ne monai, banjelo bakalua, bakadi bamukuatshisha ne biakadiye nʼabi bualu." 
Matthew4:12 Hakunvueye lumu ne, Bakukuata Yone, wakaya biandi mu Galela;" 
Matthew4:13 wakumuka mu Nazaleta, wakalua kushikama mu Kapênuma, musoko eu udi hehi ne dishiba, udi ku mukalu wa Zebuluna ne Nafatale;" 
Matthew4:14 bua kushikisha dî diakambabo kudi muprofete Yeshaya ne," 
Matthew4:15 Buloba bua Zebuluna ne buloba bua Nafatale, Nshila wa hehi ne dishiba, dishia dia Yadene, Galela wa bisamba bia bende," 
Matthew4:16 Bantu bakadi bashikame mu midima Bakatangila dinkenka dinene, Munya wakatemena bantu bakadi bashikame mu muaba wa lufu Ne mu mundidimbi walu." 
Matthew4:17 Ku tshikondo atshi Yesu wakabanga kuambila bantu bualu bua Nzambi ne, Kudimunai mitshima yenu; bualu bua bukelenge bua mu diulu budi hehi." 
Matthew4:18 Hakadiye wenda hehi ne dishiba dia Galela, wakamona balume babidi, bana ba muntu umue, Simona, udibo babikila ne, Petelo, ne muanʼabo Andele, bakadi bela kahamba mu dishiha; bualu bua bobo bakadi bilembi." 
Matthew4:19 Yeye wakabambila ne, Luai ku nyima kuanyi, nenuvuishe bilembi bia bantu." 
Matthew4:20 Bakashîa tuhamba tuabo hanshi lukasa, bakumulonda." 
Matthew4:21 Hakadiye uya ku mpala, wakamona banga balume babidi, bana ba muntu umue, Yakobo muana wa Zebedayo, ne muanʼabo Yone, bakadi mu buatu ne tatu wabo Zebedayo, balukulula tuhamba tuabo; yeye wakababikila." 
Matthew4:22 Bakashîa buatu ne tatu wabo lukasa, bakamulonda." 
Matthew4:23 Yesu wakendakana mu luseke luonso lua Galela, uyisha bantu mu nsunagoga yabo, ubambila lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua mu diulu; ukolesha bantu bakadi ne mabedi ne matekete onso." 
Matthew4:24 Lumu luandi luakatangadika mu luseke luonso lua Sulia; bakalua kudiye ne bantu bonso bakadi basame, bakuabo bakadi bakuatshike mabedi a bungi ne didinyenga, bakuabo bakadi bakuatshike kudi bademon, bakuabo bakadi ne tshiseke, bakuabo bakadi ne tuneke; yeye wakashikisha masama abo." 
Matthew4:25 Bisumbu bia bantu bia bungi bia mu Galela biakamulonda, ne bia mu Dekapoli ne bia mu Yelushalema ne bia mu Yudaya ne bia dishia dia Yadene." 
Matthew5:1 Hakamona Yesu bisumbu bia bantu, wakabanda ku mukuna; hakashikameye, bayidi bandi bakatua kudiye;" 
Matthew5:2 yeye wakabulula mukana muandi, wakabayisha ne:" 
Matthew5:3 Badi bahele mu mitshima yabo badi ne disanka, bua bukelenge bua mu diulu budi buabo." 
Matthew5:4 Badi badila badi ne disanka, bua bobo nebasambibue." 
Matthew5:5 Badi ne mitshima mihuekela badi ne disanka, bua bobo nebahiane buloba." 
Matthew5:6 Badi ne nsala ne nyota ya buakane badi ne disanka bua bobo nebûkute. 
Matthew5:7 Badi ne luse badi ne disanka, bua bantu bakuabo nebabafue luse." 
Matthew5:8 Badi ne mitshima mitoke badi ne disanka, bua bobo nebamone Nzambi." 
Matthew5:9 Basungi ba bantu badi ne disanka, bua nebabidike ne, Bana ba Nzambi." 
Matthew5:10 Bakakengeshibua bua buakane buabo badi ne disanka, bua bukelenge bua mu diulu budi buabo." 
Matthew5:11 Hanuhendabo ne hanukengeshabo ne hanushiminyinabo mashimi onso, bua bualu buanyi, nenuikale ne disanka." 
Matthew5:12 Nusanke, nuikale ne disanka dingi, bualu bua difutu dienu didi mu diulu ndinene; bakakengesha baprofete nunku bakadi ku mpala kuenu." 
Matthew5:13 Nuenu nudi lueho lua buloba; hatshihala lueho kutua kualu, nebalutuishe kabidi ne tshinyi? Ludi tshianana, nebaluimashe, nebaludiate mu makasa." 
Matthew5:14 Nuenu nudi munya wa buloba. Kabena bamanye mua kusokoka musoko udi muasa ha mukuna. 
Matthew5:15 Bantu kabatu batemesha muinda bua kûbuesha munshi mua mushete, batu bauteka ha mesa a muinda, utemene bantu bonso mu nsubu." 
Matthew5:16 Nunku munya wenu uteme ku mesu kua bantu, bamone midimu yenu mimpe, batumbishe kabidi Tatu wenu udi mu diulu." 
Matthew5:17 Kanuedianganyi meshi ne, Nakuluila bua kushiha mikenshi ya Mose ne mei a baprofete; tshiakuluila bua kubishiha, nakuluila bua kubishikisha." 
Matthew5:18 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Tô ne hajimina diulu ne buloba, kaleta kamue kakese ka mikenshi ya Mose kakena kajimina ne katoba kamue kakese tô ne hashika malu onso akafundabo." 
Matthew5:19 Washiha mukenshi umue wa mu mikenshi ei idi mitambe butekete, ne wayisha bantu bakuabo nunku, nebamuidike ne, Mutambe bukese mu bukelenge bua mu diulu; kadi wayenza, ne wayisha bantu bakuabo nunku, nebamuidike ne, Munene mu bukelenge bua mu diulu." 
Matthew5:20 Ndi nuambila ne, Bikala buakane buenu kabui butambe bua bafundi ne bua Bafalese, kanuena nubuela mu bukelenge bua mu diulu." 
Matthew5:21 Nuenu nuakunvua dî diakane Habo bantu ba kale ne, Kushihi muntu mukuabo; washiha muntu mukuabo nebamubande ku tshilumbuluidi;" 
Matthew5:22 kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi ne muanʼabo tshishi nebamubande ku tshilumbuluidi; muntu yonso wamhila muanʼabo ne, Laka, nebamubande kudi balumbuludi banene; muntu yonso wambila munga muntu ne, Wewe udi muhote, udi mua kukengeshibua mu Ngena wa kahia." 
Matthew5:23 Hautshidi ufila kuha kuebe ku tshishihelu ne biwavuluka ne, Muanʼetu udi nʼanyi bualu," 
Matthew5:24 ushîe kuha kuebe ku mpala kua tshishihelu, uye biebe, ulengeshe nʼandi; hashishe ulue, ufile kuha kuebe." 
Matthew5:25 Ulengeshe ne udi nʼebe lukuna lukasa, hautshidi nʼandi mu nshila; biwikala kui wenza nunku, udi nʼebe lukuna neakufile mu bianza bia mulumbuludi, ne mulumbuludi neakufile mu bianza bia mpolushe, nebakuele mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Matthew5:26 Bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Kuena uluhukamu tô ne hawafuta dibanza dionso, nasha kakuta kakese kushala." 
Matthew5:27 Nuakunyua dî diakambabo ne, Kuendi masandi;" 
Matthew5:28 kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi utangila mukashi ne lukuka lua masandi wakumana kuenda nʼandi masandi mu mutshima wandi." 
Matthew5:29 Bikala disu diebe dia ku tshianza tshia balume dikulenduisha, wadiula, wadimasha; bualu bua kujimisha tshintu tshimue tshia mubidi webe kudi kutamba kuedibua kua mubidi webe wonso mu Ngena." 
Matthew5:30 Biakulenduisha tshianza tshiebe tshia balume, watshikosa, watshimasha, bualu bua kujimisha tshintu tshimue tshia mubidi webe kudi kutamba kuya kua mubidi wonso mu Ngena." 
Matthew5:31 Bakuamba kabidi ne, Biahidia mulume mukashi wandi, ahe mukashi makanda wa kushiha dibaka;" 
Matthew5:32 kadi meme udi nuambila ne, Biahidia mulume mukashi wandi, kabui bua masandi, neamuvuishe amena masandi; wabaka mukashi muhidia nunku neikale muena masandi." 
Matthew5:33 Kabidi, nuenu nuakunyua dî diakambilabo bantu ba kale ne, Kuditshihi tshianana, wenzele Nzambi mitshihu yebe;" 
Matthew5:34 kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Kanuditshihi; ne kudi diulu, bualu bua diulu didi nkuasa wa butumbi wa Nzambi;" 
Matthew5:35 ne kudi buloba, bualu bua buloba budi tshitekelu tshia makasa andi; ne kudi Yelushalema, bualu bua Yelushalema udi musoko wa Mukelenge Munene." 
Matthew5:36 Wewe kuditshihi kudi mutu webe, bualu bua wewe kuena mumanye mua kuvuisha lusuki lumue anyi lutoke anyi lufike." 
Matthew5:37 Nuikale ne dî ne, E, E, anyi Nasha, Nasha. Dî ditentekesha ha mutu didi difuma kudi bualu bubi." 
Matthew5:38 Nuakunyua dî diakambabo ne, Disu ku disu, dinu ku dinu." 
Matthew5:39 Kadi meme udi nuambila ne, Kanuluanganyi ne muntu mubi; biakukuma muntu dihi ku ditama dia ku tshianza tshia balume, umuandamuine dia ku bakashi kabidi." 
Matthew5:40 Biasua muntu kuya nʼebe ku tshilumbu bua kuangateye nshemise webe, angate ne kazaku kabidi." 
Matthew5:41 Biakuendesha muntu ntanta wa kilometa umue ku bukole, wende nʼandi ntanta wa kilometa ibidi." 
Matthew5:42 Udi ukulomba tshintu umuhetshi, udi musue kukusomba tshintu kumukomi nyima." 
Matthew5:43 Nuakunyua dî diakambabo ne, Sua mukuenu, ikala ne udi nʼebe lukuna tshishi;" 
Matthew5:44 kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Suai badi nʼenu lukuna, lombelai badi banukengesha Nzambi;" 
Matthew5:45 nunku nenuikale bana ba Tatu wenu udi mu diulu; bualu bua yeye utu wabandishila bantu babi ne bantu bimpe diba, yeye kabidi utu watumina bantu bakane ne bantu babi nvula." 
Matthew5:46 Binuasua badi banusue, nenuikale ne difutu kai? Basangishi ba mulambu mene kabatu benza nunku, anyi?" 
Matthew5:47 Binuakidila anu bana benu, nenuenze bualu budi butambe bua banga bantu kudi kunyi? Bantu ba bende kabatu benza nunku, anyi?" 
Matthew5:48 Nunku nuenu nenuikale bakane bu mudi Tatu wenu wa mu diulu muakane. 
Matthew6:1 Nudimuke, kanuenji buakane buenu ku mesu kua bantu ne, Bobo batumone; binuenza nunku, kanuena ne difutu kudi Tatu wenu udi mu diulu." 
Matthew6:2 Hawaha bantu bintu bia luse, kuedi mpungi ku mpala kuebe bu mutu bena lubombo benza mu nsunagoga ne mu misesu, bua bantu babatumbishe. Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bobo bakumana kuangata difutu diabo." 
Matthew6:3 Kadi wewe hawaha bantu bintu bia luse, tshianza tshiebe tshia bakashi katshimanyi tshidi tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshienza;" 
Matthew6:4 nunku uhe bantu bintu biebe bia luse mu musokoko, ne Tatu webe udi umona mu musokoko neakuhe." 
Matthew6:5 Hanuatendelela Nzambi, kanuikadi bu bena lubombo; bobo badi basue kutendelela Nzambi bimana mu nsunagoga ne mu masanga a nshila bua bantu babamone. Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bobo bakumana kuangata difutu diabo." 
Matthew6:6 Kadi wewe, hawatendelela Nzambi, ubuele mu kasubu kebe ka tshisokomenu, winshile tshibi, utendelele Tatu webe, udi biandi mu tshisokomenu, ne Tatu webe udi umona mu musokoko neakuhe." 
Matthew6:7 Hanuatendelela Nzambi, kanuakudi biakulakula bu mutu bantu ba bende benza; bobo batu belangana meshi ne, Nebatunvuile bua mei etu adi a bungi." 
Matthew6:8 Kanuikadi bu bobo; bualu bua Tatu wenu udi mumanye binudi nʼabi bualu diambedi kanui banze kumulomba. 
Matthew6:9 Nutendelele Nzambi nunku: Tatu wetu udi mu diulu, banemeke dina diebe." 
Matthew6:10 Bukelenge buebe bulue. Benze ha buloba mûdi musue bu mudibo benza mu diulu. 
Matthew6:11 Utuhe tshituha tshia bidia bietu bia buatshia-buatshia lelu. 
Matthew6:12 Ulekelele mabanza a malu mabi etu bu mutuakumana kulekela kabidi badi nʼetu mabanza a malu mabi. 
Matthew6:13 Kutufikishi hadi mateyi, kadi utusungile kudi bubi. [" 
Matthew6:14 ] Binuajimishila bantu mibi yabo, Tatu wenu udi mu diulu neanujimishile mitu yenu." 
Matthew6:15 Kadi binuikala kanui nujimishila bantu mibi yabo, Tatu wenu kena unujimishila mibi yenu." 
Matthew6:16 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, hanuajila bia kudia, kanuikadi babungame bu mudi bena lubombo benza, bobo badi balaba mishila ku mesu bua bantu babamone ne, Badi bajile bia kudia. Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bakumana kuangata difutu diabo." 
Matthew6:17 Kadi wewe, hawajila bia kudia, ulabe manyi ku mutu, wowe mai ku mesu;" 
Matthew6:18 nunku bantu kabakumonyi ne, Udi mujile bia kudia; kadi Tatu webe udi mu musokoko neakumone; ne Tatu webe udi umona mu musokoko neakuhe." 
Matthew6:19 Kanubutshidi bintu bienu hanshi ha buloba hadi bishi ne dimoma bibibihisha, ne hadi bibi babumbula nsubu, babiba;" 
Matthew6:20 di nuenu nubutshile bintu bienu nu diulu mudi kamui bishi ne dimoma bia kubibihisha, ne mudi kamui bibi ba kubumbula nsubu babiba;" 
Matthew6:21 mutshima webe kabidi udi kudi bintu bia mu tshibutshilu tshiebe. 
Matthew6:22 Disu didi muinda wa mubidi; bikala disu diebe dimona tshintu bimpe, mubidi webe wonso neutoke ne munya." 
Matthew6:23 Kadi bikala disu diebe dibi, mubidi webe wonso neufike ne midima. Nunku bikala munya wa munda muebe muikale mîdima, mîdima ei idi mitambe kufika." 
Matthew6:24 Muntu kena mumanye mua kukuatshila banfumu babidi mudimu diakamue; yeye neikale ne mukuabo lukuna ne mukuabo dinanga, anyi nealamate mukuabo neahidie mukuabo. Kanuena bamanye mua kukuatshila Nzambi mudimu ne Mamona diakamue." 
Matthew6:25 Ebu mbualu bundi nuambila ne, Kanutambi kuelangana meshi bua muoyo wenu ne, Netudie tshinyi? Netunue tshinyi? Kanutambi kuelangana meshi bua mibidi yenu ne, Netuluate tshinyi? Muoyo kawena utamba bidia, anyi? Mubidi kawena utamba bilulu, anyi?" 
Matthew6:26 Monai nyunyu ya mu diulu, kaitu yakuna maminu, kaitu yahuola, kaitu yasangisha bintu mu mayeba, kadi Tatu wenu udi mu diulu utu waidisha. Nuenu kanuena baitambe, anyi?" 
Matthew6:27 Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, bikaleye utamba kuelangana meshi, udi mumanye mua kubinga ku bule buandi nkubita umue?" 
Matthew6:28 Nudi nutamba kuelangana meshi a bilulu tshinyi? Monai bilongo bia mu mpata mudibi bileha; kabitu biakuata mudimu, kabitu biasala buanda;" 
Matthew6:29 kadi adi nuambila ne, Solomo wakadi ne butumbi buandi bunene, kadi kabakamuluatshisha bu tshilongo etshi!" 
Matthew6:30 Bisosa bia mu mpata bidiku lelu, makelela nebibueshibue mu matshua; nuenu bena ditabusha dikese, bialuatshisha Nzambi bisosa nunku, yeye kena utamba kunuluatshisha bienu, anyi?" 
Matthew6:31 Kanutambi kuelangana meshi ne, Netudie tshinyi? Netunue tshinyi? Netudiluatshishe tshinyi?" 
Matthew6:32 Bisamba bia bende bidi bikeba bintu ebi bionso; Tatu wenu udi mu diulu udi mumanye ne, Nudi ne bintu ebi bionso bualu." 
Matthew6:33 Kadi diambedi kebai bukelenge buandi ne buakane buandi, nunku nebanuhe bintu ebi bionso." 
Matthew6:34 Kanutambi kuelangana meshi a makelela, bualu bua makelela neadielelangane meshi. Lutatu lua ku dituku ne ku dituku ludi lukumbane." 
Matthew7:1 Kanulumbuludi malu adi munda mua bantu bakuabo, nunku bobo kabena balumbulula matu adi munda muenu." 
Matthew7:2 Nebalumbulule malu adi munda muenu bu munudi nulumbulula malu adi munda muabo; nebanuidikishile bintu ne luidi lunudi nuidikishila nʼalu kabidi. 
Matthew7:3 Udi utangidila kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanʼenu tshinyi, kui utangila mutshi munene udi mu disu diebe?" 
Matthew7:4 Munyi mûdi wambila muanʼenu ne, Nkumushe kasosa kadi mu disu diebe, kadi mutshi munene udi mu diebe disu?" 
Matthew7:5 Wewe udi muena lubombo, diambedi umushe mutshi munene udi mu disu diebe, nunku neumone bimpe mua kumusha kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanʼenu." 
Matthew7:6 Kanuhi mbua tshintu tshia tshijila; kanuedi mabue enu a mushinga mukole hanshi hadi ngulube yendela, kayadiatshi munshi mua bikono, kayandamuki bua kunutuanyakanya." 
Matthew7:7 Nulombe, nebanuhe; nukebe, nenumone; nukokole, nebanunzuluile." 
Matthew7:8 Bualu bua muntu yonso udi ulomba, neahete; udi ukeba, neamone; udi ukokola, nebamunzuluile." 
Matthew7:9 Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, biamulomba muanʼandi mutanda wa bidia, neamuhe dibue, anyi?" 
Matthew7:10 Biamulombeye munyinyi wa mu mai, neamuhe nyoka, anyi?" 
Matthew7:11 Nunku nuenu bantu babi, binuamanya mua kuha bana benu bintu bimpe, Tatu wenu udi mu diulu kena utamba kuha badi bamulomba bintu bimpe, anyi?" 
Matthew7:12 Nuenzele bantu malu onso anudi basue bamuenzele, bualu bua mikenshi ya Mose ne mei a baprofete bidi nunku." 
Matthew7:13 Nubuele ku mushiku wa mbelu mubumbakane; bualu bua mushiku wa mbelu udi munene, ne nshila wa kabutu udi munene, ne bantu ba bungi badi babuelamu." 
Matthew7:14 Mushiku wa mbelu udi mubumbakane, ne nshila wa ku muoyo udi mubumbakane, ne bantu banya-banya badi bamumona." 
Matthew7:15 Nuende badimuke kudi baprofete badi ne mashimi, batu balua kunudi baluate biseba bia mikoko, kadi munda muabo mudi nkashama idi ne luonji." 
Matthew7:16 Nenubajingulule ku mamuma abo. Bantu batu bahuola mamuma a nvinyo ku mionshi ya meba, anyi? Batu bahuola nfigi ku mingonge, anyi?" 
Matthew7:17 Nunku mitshi yonso idi mimpe itu yakuama mamuma mimpe; kadi mitshi mibi itu yakuama mamuma mabi. 
Matthew7:18 Mutshi muimpe kawena mumanye mua kukuama mamuma mahi, mutshi mubi kawena mumanye mua kukuama mamuma mimpe." 
Matthew7:19 Mutshi wonso udi kawi ukuama mamuma mimpe nebaushimbule, nebawele mu kahia." 
Matthew7:20 Nunku nenubajingulule ku mamuma abo. 
Matthew7:21 Bantu batu bambikila ne, Mukelenge, Mukelenge, kabena babuela bonso mu bukelenge bua mu diulu, anu yeye utu wenza bu mudi Tatu wanyi udi mu diulu musue." 
Matthew7:22 Dituku adi bantu ba bungi nebangambile ne, Mukelenge, Mukelenge, katuena bambile bantu bualu buebe mu dina diebe, anyi? Katuena bumushe bademon mu dina diebe, anyi? Katuena benze malu a kukema a bungi mu dina diebe, anyi?" 
Matthew7:23 Dituku adi nembambile ne, Tshiakunumanya; umukai kundi, nudi benji ba malu mabi." 
Matthew7:24 Muntu yonso udi munvue mei anyi â ne utu wâtumikila neikale bu muena meshi, wakibaka nsubu wandi ha mutu ha dibue;" 
Matthew7:25 nvula yakaloka, misulu yakûla, bihuhu biakalua, biakadina ku nsubu, kadi nsubu kakuhuka, hua yeye wakadi muibaka ha dibue." 
Matthew7:26 Muntu yonso Udi munsue mei anyi â, Itai watumikila, udi biandi bu muntu muhote, wakibaka nsubu wandi ha lusenga;" 
Matthew7:27 nvula yakaloka, misulu yakula, bihuhu biakalua, biakakuma ku nsubu, nsubu wakuhuka; kuhuka kuandi kuakadi kunene." 
Matthew7:28 Hakashikisha Yesu mei â, diyisha diandi diakakemesha bantu;" 
Matthew7:29 bualu bua yeye wakabayisha bu muena mei, kakabayisha bu bafundi." 
Matthew8:1 Hakahuekeye ha mukuna, bisumbu binene bia bantu biakamulonda." 
Matthew8:2 Muena nsudi wakalua kudiye, wakamukukuila, ne, Mukelenge, biwasua, udi mumanye mua kundengesha." 
Matthew8:3 Yesu wakolola tshianza tshiandi, wakamulenga ne, Ndi musue, wikale mulengeshibue. Nsudi yandi yakashika lukasa." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Kuambidi muntu bualu ebu, uye biebe, udileshe kudi muakuidi wa Nzambi, ufile tshiakamba Mose bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kua bantu." 
Matthew8:5 Hakabueleye mu Kapênuma, kapitene ka masalayi lukama wakalua kudiye, wakamutendekena ne," 
Matthew8:6 Mukelenge, muntu wanyi udi mulale mu nsubu, udi ne disama dia kaneke, udi ukenga bikole." 
Matthew8:7 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Nendue kushikisha disama diandi." 
Matthew8:8 Kapitene wakamuandamuna ne, Mukelenge, meme tshiena muntu mimene mua wewe kubuela mu nsubu muanyi; wewe wamba anu dî diebe, Buntu wanyi neasangale." 
Matthew8:9 Meme kabidi ndi ku nyima kua bakuabo, ndi ne masalayi ku nyima kuanyi; ntu ngambila edi disalayi ne, Ya, yeye waya; ntu ngambila dikuabo ne, Lua, yeye walua; ntu ngambila Buntu wanyi ne, Enza bualu ebu, yeye wenza." 
Matthew8:10 Hakunvua Yesu dî diandi, yeye wakakema, wakambila bakadi bamulonda ne, Bulelela, Udi nuambila ne, Munkatshi mua Bena Isalele mene mene tshiakusanganamu ditabusha dinene nunku." 
Matthew8:11 Ndi nuambila ne, Bantu ba bungi nebalue ku esete ne ku wesete, nebadie bidia ne Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba mu bukelenge bua mu diulu;" 
Matthew8:12 kadi nebimashe bana ba mu bukelenge ha bula mu mîdima; muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu. 
Matthew8:13 Yesu wakambila kapitene ka masalayi ne, Ya biebe; bualu bua wewe wakuitabusha, nebakuenzele tshiwakulomba. Muntu wandi wakasangala ha diba adi mene." 
Matthew8:14 Hakabuela Yesu mu nsubu wa Petelo, wakamonamu muku wandi mukashi mulale hanshi ne disama dia mubidi kahia." 
Matthew8:15 Yesu wakalenga ku tshianza tshia mukashi, kahia kakamulekela; yeye wakabika, wakamulongoluela bia kudia." 
Matthew8:16 Hakamba diba kuhueka, bakalua ne bantu ba bungi bakadi bakuatshike ne bademon kudiye; wakumusha nyuma mibi ne dî diandi, wakakolesha bena mabedi bonso;" 
Matthew8:17 bua kushikisha dî diakamba muprofete Yeshaya ne, Yeye wakuangata matekete etu, wakutuala mabedi etu." 
Matthew8:18 Hakatangila Yesu bisumbu bia bantu bamunguile, yeye wakamba ne, Tuyai dishia dia dishiba." 
Matthew8:19 Mufundi wakalua kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Muyishi nenkulonde kuonso kuwaya." 
Matthew8:20 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Mibuabua idi ne mena ai, nyunyu ya mulu idi ne masua ai; kadi Muana wa muntu kena ne ha kuladika mutu wandi." 
Matthew8:21 Muyidi wandi mukuabo wakambila Yesu ne, Mukelenge, witabusha bua meme nye diambedi bua kujikisha tatu wanyi." 
Matthew8:22 Kadi Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ndonda meme, shîa bafue bajike bafue babo." 
Matthew8:23 Hakabueleye mu buatu, bayidi bandi bakamulonda." 
Matthew8:24 Tshihuhu tshikole tshiakalua ha dishiba, mavuala akabuikila buatu; kadi Yesu wakadi mulale tulu." 
Matthew8:25 Bobo bakalua kudiye, bakamubisha ne, Mukelenge, utusungile, tudi tufua." 
Matthew8:26 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu bena ditabusha dikese, nudi nutshinyina tshinyi? Hashishe, yeye wakabika, wakabuikila luhehele ne mai a dishiba, muaba au wakatalala talalâ." 
Matthew8:27 Bantu bakakema ne, Eu udi muntu kai? Luhehele ne mai a dishiba bidi bimunvuila." 
Matthew8:28 Hakafikeye dishia mu luseke lua Bena Gadala, bantu babidi bakadi bakuatshike ne bademon bakalua kusangila ne Yesu, bakaluhuka mu majambu, bakadi bafuna bulobo, bantu kabakamanya mua kuhitshilaku." 
Matthew8:29 Bakela dî bikole ne, Wewe Muana wa Nzambi, tudi nʼebe bualu kai? Wewe wakulua kutukengesha diambedi dituku dia dikenga dietu kadî dianze kulua, anyi?" 
Matthew8:30 Tshisumbu tshia ngulube ya bungi tshiakadi kuakua, yakadi idia mashinde." 
Matthew8:31 Bademon bakamutendekena ne, Biwatumusha, ututuma mu tshisumbu tshia ngulube." 
Matthew8:32 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu. Bakaluhuka, bakabuela munda mua ngulube; tshisumbu tshionso tshiakanyemena lubilu ku tshibungubungu, yakahona mu dishiba, yakafila mu mai." 
Matthew8:33 Badishi ba ngulube bakanyema, bakaya ku musoko, bakamba malu onso ne bualu buakulua kudi badi bakuatshike ne bademon." 
Matthew8:34 Bantu bonso ba mu musoko bakalua kusangila ne Yesu; hakamumonabo, bakamutendekena ne, Umuka ku luseke luetu." 
Matthew9:1 Yesu wakabuela mu buatu, wakasabuka, wakalua mu musoko muandi." 
Matthew9:2 Bakalua ne muntu wakadi ne disama dia kaneke mulale ha bulalu; bakatangila Yesu ditabusha diabo, wakambila muena kaneke ne, Muanʼanyi, kolesha mutshima webe, mibi yebe idi mijimishibue." 
Matthew9:3 Bafundi bakuabo bakamba munda munda ne, Muntu eu udi uhenda Nzambi." 
Matthew9:4 Yesu wakamanya meshi abo, wakamba ne, Nudi nuelangana meshi a bualu bubi munda muenu bua tshinyi?" 
Matthew9:5 Tshidi tshitambe butekete ntshinyi, kuambila muena kaneke ne, Mibi yebe idi mijimishibue, anyi kumuambila ne, Bika, enda biebe?" 
Matthew9:6 Kadi bua nuenu mimanye ne, Muana wa muntu udi ne bukole, hatshidiye ha buloba bua kujimisheye mibi (yeye wakambila muena kaneke ne), Bika biebe, ambula bulalu buebe, uye ku nsubu kuebe." 
Matthew9:7 Yeye wakabika, wakaya ku nsubu kuandi." 
Matthew9:8 Kadi bakatangila bantu bualu ebu, bakatshina, bakatumbisha Nzambi, bualu bua yeye wakaha bantu bukole nunku." 
Matthew9:9 Hakadi Yesu umukaku, wakamona muntu, dina diandi Matayo, mushikame ku tshilambuidi, wakamuambila ne, Undonde; yeye wakabika, wakamulonda." 
Matthew9:10 Hakadiye ushikama udia bidia mu nsubu, basangishi ba mulamba bakalua, ne bantu babi kabidi, bakashikama ku mesa ne Yesu ne bayidi bandi." 
Matthew9:11 Hakamona Bafalese bualu ebu, bakambila bayidi bandi ne, Muyishi wenu udi udila ne basangishi ba mulambu ne bantu babi tshinyi?" 
Matthew9:12 Hakunvua Yesu dî diabo, yeye wakamba ne, Badi ne bukole kabena ne muondahi bualu, anu badi ne mabedi." 
Matthew9:13 Yai bienu nuyile dî edi ne, Ndi musue luse, tshiena nsua nyama minshihela; meme tshiakuluila bua kubikila badi bakane, nakuluila bua kubikila badi babi." 
Matthew9:14 Hashishe, bayidi ba Yone bakahia kudi Yesu ne, Tuetu ne Bafalese tutu tuajila bia kudia misangu ya bungi, kadi bayidi bebe kabatu bajila bia kudia bualu kai?" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu wakabambila ne, Balunda ba mubaki wa mukashi badi bamanye mua kudila muadi hatshidi mubaki wa mukashi nʼabo, anyi? Kadi matuku nealue abanyengabo mubaki wa mukashi, nebajile bia kudia matuku au." 
Matthew9:16 Bantu kabatu batelelula tshihesa tshia tshilulu tshidi katshi tshifuatalale ha tshivualu tshikulukulu; nunku tshihesa tshiakamba kubuikila disoso netshidibalulule, nunku netshidivundishe." 
Matthew9:17 Nunku kabidi bantu kabatu bela maluvu mahia-mahia mu milondo ya biseba bikulukulu; bienzabo nunku, biseba nebihandike, maluvu neaye hanshi, ne biseba nebifue; kadi bantu batu heta maluvu mahia-mahia mu biseba bihia-bihia, ne bubidi buabi nebishale." 
Matthew9:18 Hakadi Yesu ubambila mei â, mukelenge wa nsunagoga wakalua, wakamukukuila ne, Muanʼanyi mukashi ukadi mufue; kadi ulue biebe, umulenge tshianza tshiebe, neikale ne muoyo." 
Matthew9:19 Yesu wakabika, biandi, wakamulonda ne bayidi bandi." 
Matthew9:20 Monai, mukashi wakalua ku nyima kua Yesu, wakadi ne disama dia mashi ahatuka bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, wakalenga tshianza tshiandi ku mubangu wa tshivualu tshia Yesu;" 
Matthew9:21 mukashi wakadi wamba munda ne, Binalenga ku tshivualu tshiandi, nenkoleshibue." 
Matthew9:22 Yesu wakatshinguluka, wakamumona, wakamuambila ne, Muanʼanyi, kolesha mutshima webe, kuitabusha kuebe kuakukusungila. Ha diba adi mene mukashi au wakakoleshibua." 
Matthew9:23 Hakaya Yesu mu nsubu wa mukelenge, hakamoneye bena nshiba ne tshisumbu tshia bantu bateka mutoyi," 
Matthew9:24 yeye wakamba ne, Shiai mpunga, muana kena mufue, udi mulale tulu. Bakamuseka." 
Matthew9:25 Hakumushabo tshisumbu tshia bantu, Yesu wakabuela, wakamukuata ku tshianza, muana wakabi." 
Matthew9:26 Lumu lua bualu abu luakatangadika mu luseke alu luonso. 
Matthew9:27 Hakadi Yesu umukaku, bafofo babidi bakamulonda bela dî diabo ne, Wewe muana wa Davidi, utufue luse." 
Matthew9:28 Hakalueye mu nsubu, bafofo bakatua kudiye, Yesu wakabambila ne, Nudi nuitabusha ne, Meme udi mumanye mua kuenza bualu ebu, anyi? Bakamuandamuna ne, E, Mukelenge." 
Matthew9:29 Hashishe, wakabalenga ku mesu abo, wakamba ne, Bualu bunuenzekele bu mudi ditabusha dienu." 
Matthew9:30 Mesu abo akabuluka. Yesu wakabakandika ne, Muntu mukuabo kamanyi bualu ebu." 
Matthew9:31 Kadi bobo bakaluhuka, bakatangalasha lumu luandi mu luseke alu luonso." 
Matthew9:32 Hakadibo baluhuka, bakalua kudiye ne kamama kakuatshike ne demon." 
Matthew9:33 Hakumusheye demon, kamama kakakula; bantu bakakema ne, Diambedi kabakanza kutangila bualu nunku mu Isalele." 
Matthew9:34 Kadi Bafalese bakamba ne, Yeye udi umusha bademon ne bukole bua mukelenge wa bademon." 
Matthew9:35 Yesu wakendakana mu bimenga bionso ne mu misoko mikese, uyisha bantu mu nsunagoga yabo, ubambila bualu bua lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua mu diulu, ukolesha bantu bakadi ne mabedi ne matekete onso." 
Matthew9:36 Kadi hakatangileye bisumbu bia bantu, wakadi nʼabo luse, bualu bua bobo bakadi batata, bakadi bamuangalake bu mikoko idi kayi ne mulami." 
Matthew9:37 Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Bulelela, bintu bia kunowa bidi bia bungi, kadi bena mudimu badi banya-banya." 
Matthew9:38 Nunku, nulombe Mukelenge wa bintu bia kunowa, atume biandi bena mudimu mu kunowa kuandi." 
Matthew10:1 Yeye wakabikila bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi, wakabaha bukole bua kuhitabo nʼabu nyuma ya bukoya, ne bua kuyumushabo munda mua bantu, ne bua kukoleshabo nʼabu bantu bakadi ne masama ne matekete a mishindu yonso." 
Matthew10:2 Mena a bapostolo dikumi ne babidi adi nunku: Wa kumudilu Simona, udibo babikila ne, Petelo, ne muanʼabo Andele; Yakobo muana wa Zebedayo, ne muanʼabo Yone;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo, ne Bâtolomayo; Toma, ne Matayo wakadi musangishi wa mulambu; Yakobo muana wa Alafayo, ne Tadayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simona, Muena Kananayo, ne Yudasa Isakaliote, wakamutungila tshitungu." 
Matthew10:5 Yesu wakamuangalasha bantu aba dikumi ne babidi, wakalayangana nʼabo ne, Kanuyi mu nshila wa ku bisamba bia bende, kanubuedi mu musoko wa Bena Samalea;" 
Matthew10:6 kadi nuye kudi mikoko idi mijimine ya nsubu wa Isalele. 
Matthew10:7 Hanutshidi nuya, nubambile ne, Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi hehi." 
Matthew10:8 Nukoleshe badi ne mabedi, mibishe bafue, nulengeshe bena nsudi, numushe bademon; nuakuangata bualu ebu tshianana, nubahebu tshianana." 
Matthew10:9 Kanuditekedi ngolo ne tshiamu tshia argent ne tshiamu tshia mitaku mu mikaba yenu. 
Matthew10:10 Kanuangatshi tshibombo tshia kuya nʼatshi mu nshila, kanuangatshi bikowelu bibidi ne bisabata bikuabo ne tshihangu, bualu bua muena mudimu udi ne buakane bua kuheta bidia biandi." 
Matthew10:11 Hanuabuela mu tshimenga anyi mu musoko mukese, nukebe bantu bimpe badimu, nushikamemu tô ne hanumukamu." 
Matthew10:12 Hanutshidi nubuela mu nsubu, nuele bena nsubu muoyo." 
Matthew10:13 Bikala nsubu muimpe, ditalala dienu diluemu; kadi bikala nsubu kai muimpe, ditalala dienu dihingane kunudi." 
Matthew10:14 Muntu udi kai unuitabusha, udi kai unvua mei enu, hantshidi nuluhuka mu nsubu au anyi mu musoko au, nututule nsenga idi mu makasa enu." 
Matthew10:15 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Halua dituku dia kulumbulula, bujitu bua dikenga dia musoko au nebutambe bua buloba bua Sodoma ne Amola." 
Matthew10:16 Monai, ndi nutuma bu mikoko idi munkatshi mua nkashama; nuikale ne budimu bu bua nyoka ne bu nyunyu ya nkutshi idi kayi iluishangana." 
Matthew10:17 Nudimukile bantu; bualu bua bobo nebanuele kudi balumbuludi babo, nebanukume mu nsunagoga yabo;" 
Matthew10:18 bulelela, nebaye nʼenu ku mesu kua bangovena ne ku mesu kua banfumu bua bualu buanyi, nenuikale bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kuabo ne ku mesu kua bisamba bia bende." 
Matthew10:19 Kadi hanufilabo nunku, kanulambi kuelangana meshi ne, Netuambe munyi? Netuambe tshinyi? Nebanuhe buakuamba ha diba adi." 
Matthew10:20 Bualu bua nuenu kanuena nuamba, Nyuma wa Tatu wenu udi wamba munda muenu." 
Matthew10:21 Muanʼabo ne mutu neafile muanʼabo ku lufu, tatu neafile muanʼandi, bana nebatombokele batatuʼabo ne bamamuʼabo, nebabashiheshe." 
Matthew10:22 Bantu bonso nebikale nʼenu lukuna bua dina dianyi; kadi wananukila tô ne kunshikidilu neasungidibue. 
Matthew10:23 Kadi hanukengeshabo mu musoko eu, nunyemene ku mukuabo; bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muana wa mutu nealue diambedi kanui banze kuenda mu misoko yonso ya Isalele." 
Matthew10:24 Muyidi kena ku mpala kua muyishi wandi, muhika kena ku mpala kua nfumu wandi." 
Matthew10:25 Mbimpe bia muyidi ikale bu mudi muyishi wandi, ne muhika ikale bu mudi nfumu waudi. Bikalabo babikile muena nsubu ne, Belezebula, nebatambe kubikila ba mu nsubu muandi muomumue." 
Matthew10:26 Nunku kanubatshinyi; bualu bua bintu bionso bidi bibuikila nebibuluibue; bidi bisokoka nebisokoloke. 
Matthew10:27 Nuambe mu munya malu andi nuambila mu mîdima; nuambe ha mitu ha nsubu malu anudi nunvua mu matshu. 
Matthew10:28 Kanutshinyi badi bashiha mubidi, kadi kabena bamanye mua kushiha muoyo; kadi nutshine udi mumanye mua kujimisha muoyo ne mubidi kabidi mu Ngena." 
Matthew10:29 Kabatu bahana mishamisha ibidi ku dikuta dikese, anyi? Mushamusha umue kawena uhona hanshi, anu hitabusha Tatu wenu." 
Matthew10:30 Nsuki ya ku mitu yenu mene mene idi mibala yonso. 
Matthew10:31 Nunku kanutshinyi, mushinga wenu udi mutambe wa mishamisha ya bungi." 
Matthew10:32 Muntu yonso wangitabusha ku mesu kua bantu, meme nemuitabushe kabidi ku mesu kua Tatu wanyi udi mu diulu." 
Matthew10:33 Kadi muntu yonso wampidia ku mesu kua bantu, meme nennuhidie kabidi ku mesu kua Tatu wanyi udi mu diulu." 
Matthew10:34 Kanuedianganyi meshi ne, Meme nakuluila bua kutuma ditalala ha buloba, tshiakuluila bua kutuma ditalala, nakuluila bua kutuma muele wa nvita." 
Matthew10:35 Nakuluila bua kuelesha muntu ne tatu wandi mpata, ne muana mukashi ne mamuʼandi mpata, ne mukashi wa muanʼandi ne mamuʼandi-muenu mpata." 
Matthew10:36 Badi mu nsubu nebikale ne muena nsubu lukuna. 
Matthew10:37 Muntu udi ne tatu wandi anyi baba wandi dinanga ditambe didiye nʼadi kundi meme kena ukumbana bua kuikaleye muyidi wanyi; muntu udi ne muanʼandi mulume anyi muanʼandi mukashi dinanga ditambe didiye nʼadi kundi meme kena ukumbana bua kuikaleye muyidi wanyi. 
Matthew10:38 Muntu udi kai wangata mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, udi kai undonda meme, kena ukumbana bua kuikaleye muyidi wanyi." 
Matthew10:39 Muntu udi uheta muoyo wandi neaujimishe; muntu udi ujimisha muoyo wandi bua bualu buanyi neauhete. 
Matthew10:40 Wanuitabusha udi ungitabusha meme, wangitabusha meme udi witabusha wakuntuma." 
Matthew10:41 Witabusha muprofete mu dina dia muprofete, neahete difutu dia muprofete; witabusha muntu muakane mu dina dia muntu muakane neahete difutu dia muntu muakane." 
Matthew10:42 Muntu yonso wahesha umue wa mu bantu aba bahuekele nasha dikoho dia mai matalala a kunua mu dina dia muyidi, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye kena uhanga difutu diandi." 
Matthew11:1 Hakashikisha Yesu kuyisha bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi mikenshi yandi, yeye wakumukaku bualu bua kuyisheye bantu mu misoko yabo ne bua kubambileye bualu bua Nzambi." 
Matthew11:2 Hakunvua Yone mu nsubu wa lukanu lumu lua malu akadi Kilisto wenza, wakutuma bayidi bandi" 
Matthew11:3 bua kumukonka ne, Wewe nyeye ulualua, anyi tuindile mukuabo?" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Yai bienu, nuambile Yone malu anudi nunyua ne anudi numona;" 
Matthew11:5 bafofo badi batabala, balema badi benda, bena nsudi badi balengeshibue, bena mahaha badi bunvua, bafue badi babishibua ku lufu, badi bambila bahele lumu luimpe lua Nzambi," 
Matthew11:6 Muntu yonso udi kai ulenduka bua bualu buanyi udi ne disanka. 
Matthew11:7 Hakaya bayidi ba Yone, Yesu wakabanga kuambila bisumbu bia bantu bualu bua Yone ne, Nuakuyila mu tshihela bua kutangila tshintu kai? Bua kutangila disele didibo banyungisha kudi luhehele, anyi?" 
Matthew11:8 Nuakuyila bua kutangila tshintu kai? Bua kutangila muntu muluate bilulu binefuke, anyi? Badi baluata bilulu binefuke batu bikala mu nsubu ya banfumu." 
Matthew11:9 Kadi nuakuyila tshinyi? Bua kutangila muprofete, anyi? E, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye udi mutambe muprofete." 
Matthew11:10 Eu nyeye wakafundabo ne, Monai, ndi ntuma mukenshi wanyi ku mpala kuebe, Yeye nealongolole nshila webe ku mpala kuebe." 
Matthew11:11 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Munkatshi mua bakalelabo kudi bakashi kamuakubika mukuabo mutambe Yone Mubanji; kadi udi mutambe bonso bukese mu bukelenge bua mu diulu udi mumutambe yeye." 
Matthew11:12 Ku matuku a Yone Mubanji tô ne katataka bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bubuedibua ku bukole, banyengi badi babunyenga ku bukole." 
Matthew11:13 Baprofete ne mikenshi ya Mose biakamba malu adi kâi manze kulua tô ne hakalua Yone. 
Matthew11:14 Binuasua kumuitabusha, eu udi Eliya, ukadi ha kulua biandi." 
Matthew11:15 Udi ne matshu unvue biandi. 
Matthew11:16 Nenfuanyikishe bantu ba tshikondo etshi bu tshinyi? Badi bu bana bakese badi bashikama mu bisalu, badi babikila balunda babo ne," 
Matthew11:17 Tuakunuelela nshiba, kanuena baje, tuakudila, kamina badikume mu biadi." 
Matthew11:18 Yone wakalua kai udia bidia, kai unua matuvu; badi bamba ne, Udi ne demon munda." 
Matthew11:19 Muana wa muntu wakulua udia bidia, unua maluvu; badi bamba ne, Yeye udi muena mudi, udi mukuatshiki wa maluvu, udi mulunda wa basangishi ba mulambu ne wa bantu babi. Bienzedi bia lungenyi bidi bilujadika." 
Matthew11:20 Yesu wakabanga kuela misoko yakadiye wenza malu andi a bungi a kukema mulau, bualu bua bena misoko kabakukudimuna mitshima yabo." 
Matthew11:21 Wewe Kolazina, mulau ulualua kûdi! Wewe Bete-saïda, mulau ulualua kûdi! Bualu bua bu malu a kukema akenjibua munkatshi muenu, menjibue mu Tulo ne mu Sidona, bakadi kukudimuna mitshima yabo kale, baluate bilulu bikayabala, balale mu butue." 
Matthew11:22 Kadi ndi nuambila ne, Halua dituku dia kulumbulula, bujitu bua dikenga dienu nebutambe bua Tulo ne bua Sidona." 
Matthew11:23 Ne wewe Kapênuma, nebakubandishe mu diulu, anyi? Neuhueke biebe mu Muaba wa Bafue; bualu bua bu malu a kukema akenjibua munkatshi muebe, menjibue mu Sodoma, wakadi kushala tô ne katataka." 
Matthew11:24 Kadi ndi nuambila ne, Halua dituku dia kulumbulula, bujitu bua dikenga diebe nebutambe bua dikenga dia buloba bua Sodoma." 
Matthew11:25 Dituku adi Yesu wakandamuna dî, wakamba ne, Tatu Wanyi, Mukelenge wa diulu ne wa buloba, ndi nkusakidila bualu bua wewe wakusokoka bena meshi ne bena budimu malu â, wakuasokolola kudi bana bakese;" 
Matthew11:26 bulelela, Tatu, bua bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kuebe." 
Matthew11:27 Tatu wanyi wakafila bintu bionso mu bianza bianyi; kakuena muntu udi mumanye Muana, anu Tatu; kakuena muntu udi mumanye Tatu, anu Muana ne udi Muana musue kulesha Tatu." 
Matthew11:28 Luai kundi, bonso badi ne mu dimu mukole, badi ne bujitu bunene, meme nenuhe dikisha." 
Matthew11:29 Angatai mutshi wanyi wa tshikokedi ha nshingu yenu, nuyile malu kundi; bualu bua meme ndi ne kalolo ne kanemu mu mutshima wanyi; nunku nenusangane dikisha mu mitshima yenu." 
Matthew11:30 Bualu bua mutshi wanyi wa tshikokedi udi muakane ne bujitu buanyi budi buhehele. 
Matthew12:1 Mu matuku au Yesu wakadi uhitshila mu madimi a blé, dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda; bayidi bandi bakadi ne nsala, bakabanga kutshibula miehu yai, bakadia." 
Matthew12:2 Kadi Bafalese, hakatangilabo bualu ebu, bakamuambila ne, Tangila, bayidi bebe batshidi benza bualu budi bujila dituku dia Lumingu." 
Matthew12:3 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Kanuakubala bualu buakenza Davidi, hakadiye ne nsala, ne bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, anyi?" 
Matthew12:4 Bualu bua yeye wakabuela mu nsubu wa mbi, wakadia bidia bilesha biakadi tshijila kudiye ne kudi bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, anu bakuidi ba Nzambi bakadi babidia." 
Matthew12:5 Kanuakubala kabidi mu luseke lua mikenshi ya Mose, anyi, ne bakuidi ba Nzambi badi bashiha tshijila tshia dituku dia Lumingu mu ntempelo, kaba! ne dihila?" 
Matthew12:6 Kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Udi mutambe ntempelo udi aha." 
Matthew12:7 Bu nuenu bamanye dî edi ne, Ndi musue luse, tshiena nsua nyama minshihela, kanuakadi kuhisha badi kaba! ne dihila." 
Matthew12:8 Bualu bua Muana wa muntu udi mukelenge wa dituku dia Lumingu. 
Matthew12:9 Yeye wakumukaku, wakabuela mu nsunagoga wabo;" 
Matthew12:10 monai, muntu wakadi ne tshianza tshiume. Bakakonka Yesu ne, Kuondaha bantu dituku dia Lumingu kudi kushiha mukenshi, anyi? Bakasua kumubanda." 
Matthew12:11 Yeye wakabambila ne, Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, udi ne mukoko umue, biahonau mu dina dituku dia Lumingu, kena ûkuata bua kûhatula?" 
Matthew12:12 Mushinga wa muntu udi mutambe wa mukoko misangu bungi munyi? Nunku kuenza kua bualu buimpe dituku dia Lumingu kakuena kushiha mukenshi. 
Matthew12:13 Hashishe, yeye wakambila muntu ne, Olola tshianza tshiebe. Yeye wakatshiolola; tshiakadi tshiakane kabidi bu tshinga tshianza." 
Matthew12:14 Kadi Bafalese bakumuka, bakamuelela tshifufu bua kumushiha." 
Matthew12:15 Hakamanya Yesu bualu ebu, wakumukaku; bantu ba bungi bakamulonda; yeye wakabakolesha bonso," 
Matthew12:16 wakabambila bikole ne, Kanunmanyishi kudi bantu;" 
Matthew12:17 bua dî diakambabo kudi muprofete Yeshaya dishikishibue ne," 
Matthew12:18 Tangila, muntu wanyi unakusungula; Wanyi munanga udi usankisha mutshima wanyi; Nenteke Nyuma wanyi hamʼbidi handi; Yeye neambile bisamba bia bende malu mimpe." 
Matthew12:19 Yeye kena utanda, kena wela mbila, Muntu kena unvua dî diandi mu misesu." 
Matthew12:20 Yeye kena utshibula disele didi diamba kukoseka, Kena ujima kalulu ka muinda kadi kafuima muinshi Tô ne hatumeye malu andi mimpe bua kuhita malu mabi." 
Matthew12:21 Bisamba bia bende nebitekemene dina diandi. 
Matthew12:22 Bakalua kudi Yesu ne muntu mukuatshike ne demon, wakadi mufofo ne kamama kabidi; yeye wakamuondaha, nunku kamama kakadia, kakatabala." 
Matthew12:23 Bisumbu bionso biakakema, biakamba ne, Eu ke muana wa Davidi, anyi?" 
Matthew12:24 Kadi hakunvua Bafalese dî edi, bakamba ne, Muntu eu kena udiumushila bademon, anu mu dina dia Belezebula, mukelenge wa bademon." 
Matthew12:25 Yeye wakamanya meshi abo, wakabambila ne, Bukelenge buonso budi buhanduluke nebufue; musoko wonso ne nsubu yonso udi uhanduluka kabiena bijalama." 
Matthew12:26 Bikala Satana umusha Satana, yeye udi muhanduluke; bukelenge buandi budi bumanye mua kujalama munyi?" 
Matthew12:27 Bingikala ngumusha bademon mu dina dia Belezebula, bana benu badi babumusha mu dina dia nganyi? Nunku bobo nebikale balumbuludi benu," 
Matthew12:28 Kadi bingikala ngumu sha bademon mu dina dia Nyuma wa Nzambi, bukelenge bua Nzambi buakumana kulua kunudi." 
Matthew12:29 Muntu kai udi mumanye mua kubuela mu nsubu wa muena bukole bua kuhaula bintu biandi kai muanze kusuika muena bukole? Hashishe, neahaule bia mu nsubu wandi." 
Matthew12:30 Udi kai nʼanyi udi umpidia; udi kai usangisha nʼanyi bintu, udi ubitangalasha." 
Matthew12:31 Ebu budi bualu bundi nuambila ne, Nebajimishile bantu mibi yabo yonso ne bihendu biabo bidibo bahenda nʼabi Nzambi, kadi kabena babajimishila bihendu bidibo bahenda nʼabi Nyuma." 
Matthew12:32 Muntu yonso wahetula Muana wa muntu, nebamujimishile bubi buandi; kadi wahetula Nyuma Muimpe kabena bamujimishila bubi buandi nasha mu tshikondo etshi nasha mu tshikondo tshialua." 
Matthew12:33 Nasha nuamba ne mutshi udi muimpe ne mamuma au adi mimpe, nasha nuamba ne mutshi udi mubi ne mamuma au adi mabi; bua mamuma adi amanyisha mudi mutshi wau." 
Matthew12:34 Nuenu bana ba nyoka, nudi babi, nudi bamanye mua kuamba mei mimpe munyi? Bua mukana mudi muamba anu malu adi matambe kuvulangana mu mutshima." 
Matthew12:35 Muntu muimpe udi uhatula bintu bimpe mu tshibutshilu tshiandi tshimpe; muntu mubi udi uhatula bintu bibi mu tshibutshilu tshiandi tshibi. 
Matthew12:36 Ndi nuambila ne, Halua dituku dia kulumbulula, nebalumbuluishe bantu bua mei onso a tshianana akadibo bamba." 
Matthew12:37 Mei ebe neakubingishe, mei ebe kabidi neakuhishe." 
Matthew12:38 Bafundi bakuabo ne Bafalese bakamuandamuna ne, Muyishi, tudi basue kutangila tshimanyinu tshia bualu buebe." 
Matthew12:39 Kadi yeye wakabandamuna ne, Ba mu tshikondo tshibi ne tshia masandi, badi bakeba tshimanyinu; kabena babaha tshimanyinu tshikuabo anu tshia muprofete Yona." 
Matthew12:40 Bu muakadi Yona munda mua munyinyi mimene wa mu mai minya isatu ne mafuku asatu, nunku Muana wa muntu neikale munda mua buloba minya isatu ne mafuku asatu." 
Matthew12:41 Mu dituku dia kulumbulula, Bena Ninewe nebimane ne bantu ba tshikondo etshi, nebabahishe; bua bobo bakakudimuna mitshima yabo, hakuvuabo mei a Yona; monai, udi mutambe Yona udi aha." 
Matthew12:42 Mu dituku dia kulumbulula mukelenge mukashi wa ku sude neabike ne bantu ba tshikondo etshi, neabahishe; bua yeye wakalua biandi kunfudilu kua buloba bua kunvua lungenyi lua Solomo; monai, udi mutambe Solomo udi aha." 
Matthew12:43 Haluhuka nyuma wa bukoya munda mua muntu, nyuma udi wendakana mu miaba idi kayi mai, ukeba ha kuikisha, kena ubamona." 
Matthew12:44 Hashishe, yeye udi wamba munda munda ne, Nempingane mu nsubu wanyi unakuluhuka; halueye, udi usangana nsubu hatuhu, mukomba, mulengesha." 
Matthew12:45 Hashishe, yeye udi uya biandi, udi wangata minga nyuma mibi muanda mutekete idi mimutambe yeye bubi, idi ibuelamuidi ishikama; malu a muntu au a hashishe adi atamba a diambedi bubi. Bualu ebu nunku nebulue kudi bantu ba tshikondo tshibi etshi." 
Matthew12:46 Hakatshidiye wambila bisumbu bia bantu mei andi, mamuʼandi ne bana babo bakadi bimane ha mbelu, bakeba kumuambila dî." 
Matthew12:47 Muntu wakamuambila ne, Mamuʼebe ne bana benu badi bimane ku mbelu, bakeba kukuambila dî." 
Matthew12:48 Kadi yeye wakakonka wakumumanyisha ne, Mamu wanyi nganyi? Bana betu mbanganyi?" 
Matthew12:49 Wakoluela bayidi bandi tshianza, wakamba ne, Monai mamu wanyi ne bana betu!" 
Matthew12:50 Muntu yonso wenza bu mudi Tatu wanyi wa mu diulu musue yeye udi muanʼetu mulume ne muanʼetu mukashi ne mamu wanyi. 
Matthew13:1 Dituku adi Yesu wakaluhuka mu nsubu, wakashikama ku muelelu wa dishiba." 
Matthew13:2 Bisumbu binene bia bantu biakamunguila, nunku yeye wakabuela mu buatu, wakashikama; bantu bonso bakimana ku muelelu wa mai." 
Matthew13:3 Yeye wakabambila malu a bungi mu nsumuinu ne, Mumiaminyi wakaya bua kumiamina maminu;" 
Matthew13:4 hakadiye umiamina, maminu makuabo akamata kukala kua nshila, nyunyu yakalua, yakâzokola;" 
Matthew13:5 makuabo akamata ha buloba buakadi ha mutu ha mabue, kâkadihu ne buloba bua bungi; tshituha tshihi akatoloka bua kâkadi ne buloba bule;" 
Matthew13:6 hakabanda diba, akababuka, akafubidila bualu bua kâkadi ne miji." 
Matthew13:7 Makuabo akamata mu mionshi ya meba; mionshi yakadiunda, yakânye-ngela:" 
Matthew13:8 makuabo akamata ha buloba buimpe, akavudisha maminu; makuabo lukama lukama, makuabo makumi asambombo asambombo, makuabo makumi asatu asatu." 
Matthew13:9 Udi ne matshu unvue biandi. 
Matthew13:10 Bayidi bakalua, bakamukonka ne, Udi ubambidila malu mu nsumuinu tshinyi?" 
Matthew13:11 Yeye wakabandamuna ne, Bakanuha bienu lungenyi lua kumanya malu a bukelenge bua mu diulu adi masokoka, kadi kabakabahalu." 
Matthew13:12 Bualu bua muntu yonso udi ne bintu, nebamuhe binga, neikale ne bia bungi; kadi muntu yonso udi kai ne tshintu, nebamunyenge tshidiye nʼatshi." 
Matthew13:13 Ebu budi bualu bundi mbambila malu mu nsumuinu; bua kumona badi bamona kadi kabena bamona bimpe; kunvua badi bunvua kadi kabena bunvua bimpe, kabena bajingulula bualu." 
Matthew13:14 Bobo bakushikisha mayisha a muprofete Yeshaya akambeye ne, Kunyua nenunvue, kanuena bamanye; kumona nenumone, Kanuena numone bimpe;" 
Matthew13:15 Mitshima ya bantu aba yakulua manyi a bungi, Badi mpudi matshu, Bakubikila mesu abo; Nunku kabamonyi ne mesu abo, Kabunvu ne matshu abo, Kabamanyi mu mitshima yabo. Kabakudimunyi mitshima yabo Bua meme mbondahe." 
Matthew13:16 Kadi mesu enu adi ne disanka, bua adi amona; matshu enu adi ne disanka kabidi, bua adi unvua" 
Matthew13:17 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Baprofete ba bungi ne bantu bakane bakajinga kumona malu anudi numona, kabakâmona; bakajinga kunyua malu anudi nunyua, kabakaunvua." 
Matthew13:18 Nunku unvuai bualu bua lusumuinu lua mumiaminyi. 
Matthew13:19 Hunvua muntu dî dia bukelenge bua mu diulu kai mudijingile, hashishe, mubi udi ulua, udi unyenga bualu buakumiaminabo mu mutshima wandi. Kayeyʼeu wakumiaminabo kukala kua nshila." 
Matthew13:20 Yeye wakadi mumiamina ha buloba buakadi ha mutu ha mabue udi unvua dî dia Nzambi, udi uditabusha lubilu ne disanka;" 
Matthew13:21 kadi yeye kena ne muji munda muandi, udi ushala tshituha tshihi; halua dikenga anyi lutatu bualu bua dî dia Nzambi, yeye udi ulenduka lubilu." 
Matthew13:22 Yeye wakadi mumiamina mu mionshi ya meba udi unvua dî dia Nzambi, kadi meshi a malu a ha buloba ne mashimi a biuma bidi binyengela dî, yeye udi wikala kai ne maminu." 
Matthew13:23 Yeye wakadi mumiamina ha buloba buimpe udi unvua dî dia Nzambi, udi udijingulula; yeye mene udi uvudisha maminu; manga adi avulangana lukama lukama, manga makumi asambombo asambombo, manga makumi asatu asatu." 
Matthew13:24 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu lukuabo ne, Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu muntu wakela biandi maminu mimpe mu budimi buandi;" 
Matthew13:25 kadi hakadi bantu balale tulu, wakadi nʼandi lukuna wakalua, wakela ntete ya luhela muakamanabo kuela mponda, wakaya biandi." 
Matthew13:26 Kadi hakatolokabi, hakatoyabi, luhela luakamueneka." 
Matthew13:27 Bahika ba muena budimi bakalua, bakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe kuakuela maminu mimpe mu budimi buebe, anyi? Budi ne luhela munyi?" 
Matthew13:28 Yeye wakabambila ne, Muntu udi nʼanyi lukuna nguakuenza bualu ebu. Bahika bandi bakamukonka ne, Udi musue tuye kusunguila luhela, anyi?" 
Matthew13:29 Yeye wakamba ne, Nasha! Bualu bua hanuikala usungulula luhela, nenutule mponda hohamue." 
Matthew13:30 Bubidi buabi bidiunde hohamue tô ne halua dia kunowa; halua dia kunowa, nengambile banowi ne, Diambedi nusungulule luhela nulusuike mu bisumbu bua kuluosha; hadi nusangishe mponda mu diyeba dianyi." 
Matthew13:31 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu lukuabo ne, Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu lutete lua mutada luakangata muntu bua kukuna mu budimi buandi;" 
Matthew13:32 ludi lutamba ntete yonso bukese; kadi hadiundalu, ludi lutamba midioko yonso bunene, ludi ludiunda mutshi munene, nyunyu ya mulu idi ilua kuikila ha matamba au." 
Matthew13:33 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu lukuabo ne, Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu luevene luakangata mukashi, wakalusokoka mu bihikilu bisatu bia bukula tô ne hakenduluka luevene mu bukula buonso." 
Matthew13:34 Yesu wakambila bantu malu â onso mu nsumuinu, yeye kakabambila malu tshianana, anu mu nsumuinu;" 
Matthew13:35 bua dî diakambabo kudi muprofete dishikishibue ne, Hanabulula mukana muanyi, nengambe mei mu nsumuinu; Nengambe malu akadi masokoka ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba tô ne katataka." 
Matthew13:36 Hashishe, Yesu wakashîa bisumbu bia bantu ku nyima, wakabuela mu nsubu; bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye, bakamuambila ne, Utujinguluile lusumuinu lua luhela luakadi mu budimi." 
Matthew13:37 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Udi ukuna maminu mimpe udi Muana wa muntu;" 
Matthew13:38 budimi budi bantu ba ha buloba; maminu mimpe adi bana ba mu bukelenge bua Nzambi, ntete ya luhela idi bana ba mubi;" 
Matthew13:39 muena lukuna wakaikuna ndiabolo; dituku dia kunowa nkunshikidilu kua tshikondo etshi; banowi mbanjelo. 
Matthew13:40 Bu mudi bantu basangisha luhela bua kuluosha, bualu nebuikale nunku kunshikidilu kua tshikondo etshi." 
Matthew13:41 Muana wa muntu neatume banjelo bandi, nebasungule mu bukelenge buandi benji ba malu mabi ne bintu bionso bidi bilenduisha bantu," 
Matthew13:42 nebabiele mu tshikutu tshia kahia; muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu," 
Matthew13:43 Dituku diadia bantu bakane nebakenke bu diba mu bukelenge bua Tatu wabo. Udi ne matshu unvue biandi. 
Matthew13:44 Bukelenge bua mu diulu kabidi budi bu biuma biakadi bisokoka mu budimi; hakabisangana muntu, yeye wakabisokoka kabidi; mu disanka diandi, wakaya, wakahana bintu biandi bionso, wakasumba budimi abu." 
Matthew13:45 Bukelenge bua mu diulu kabidi budi bu muntu udi biandi muendi wa mushinga, udi ukeba mabue mimpe a mushinga mukole;" 
Matthew13:46 hakasanganeye dibue dia mushinga mutambe bukole, wakaya, wakahana bintu biandi bionso, wakadisumba." 
Matthew13:47 Bukelenge bua mu diulu kabidi budi bu kahamba kakadi kela mu dishiha, kakakungisha mishiha ya mishindu yonso;" 
Matthew13:48 hakûla kahamba tente, bakakakoka ku mpata; bakashikama, bakasangisha biakadi bimpe mu bihanza, bakimasha biakadi bibi." 
Matthew13:49 Bualu nebuikale nunku kunshikidilu kua tshikondo etshi; banjelo nebalue, nebumushe bantu babi bakadi munkatshi mua bantu bakane," 
Matthew13:50 nebabele mu tshikutu tshia kahia, muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu." 
Matthew13:51 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nuakunyua malu â onso, anyi? Bakamuitaba ne, E." 
Matthew13:52 Yeye wakabambila ne, Mufundi yonso wakuvui-shabo muyidi mu bukelenge bua mu diulu udi bu muena nsubu udi uhatula bintu bihia-bihia ne bikulukulu mu tshibutshilu tshiandi." 
Matthew13:53 Hakashikisha Yesu nsumuinu ei, wakumukaku." 
Matthew13:54 Hakayeye mu luseke luandi, wakayisha bantu mu nsunagoga wabo, nunku bakakema ne, Muntu eu wakangata lungenyi elu ne malu â a kukema kudi kunyi?" 
Matthew13:55 Yeye kena muana wa muena mabaya, anyi? Kabena babikila mamuʼandi ne, Malia, anyi? Bana babo ba balume Yakobo ne Yosefe ne Simona ne Yuda;" 
Matthew13:56 ne bana babo ba bakashi, kabena munkatshi muetu, buonso buabo, anyi? Nunku muntu eu wakangata malu â onso kudi kunyi?" 
Matthew13:57 Bakalenduka bua bualu buandi. Kadi Yesu wakabambila ne, Muprofete udi ne butumbi mu miaba yonso, kadi kena nʼabu ku luseke luabo ne mu nsubu wandi." 
Matthew13:58 Yeye kakenzamu malu a kukema a bungi bualu bua buhidia buabo. 
Matthew14:1 Mu matuku au muloho Helede wakunvua lumu lua Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 wakambila bantu bandi ne, Au nYone Mubanji, wakubika ku lufu, bua bualu ebu malu a kukema adi enjibua kudiye." 
Matthew14:3 Helode wakamana kukuata Yone, wakamusuika, wakamubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu bualu bua Helodia, mukashi wa muanʼabo Filipo." 
Matthew14:4 Bualu bua Yone wakamuambila ne, Kambiakane bua wewe wikale nʼandi." 
Matthew14:5 Hakasua Helode kumushiha, yeye wakatshina bantu, bualu bua bobo bakamubala bu muprofete." 
Matthew14:6 Kadi hakafikila dituku dia kuledibua kua Helode, muana mukashi wa Helodia wakadi uja maja ku mpala kuabo, wakasankisha mutshima wa Helode." 
Matthew14:7 Yeye wakaditshiha, wakamulaya ne, Nenkuhe tshionso tshiwalomba." 
Matthew14:8 Muana mukashi muenzesha kudi mamuʼandi wakambila Helode ne, Umpe mutu wa Yone Mubanji ha dilonga." 
Matthew14:9 Mutshima wa mukelenge wakanyingalala; kadi bualu bua mitshihu yandi ne bua bakadi badia nʼandi bidia yeye wakamba ne, Bamuheu." 
Matthew14:10 Yeye wakatuma dî, wakakosesha Yone mutu mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Matthew14:11 Bakalua ne mutu wandi ha dilonga, bakauha nsongakashi; ne yeye wakalua nʼau kudi mamuʼandi." 
Matthew14:12 Bayidi ba Yone bakalua bakambula tshitalu tshiandi, bakatshijika, bakaya kumanyisha Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Hakunvua Yesu bualu bua lufu lua Yone, wakumukaku mu buatu, wakaya mu tshihela mu muaba muhengame; hakunvua bisumbu bia bantu bualu abu, bakumuka mu misoko, bakamulonda ku makasa." 
Matthew14:14 Yeye wakumuka mu buatu, wakatangila tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, wakadi nʼabo luse, wakakolesha bahedi babo." 
Matthew14:15 Hakamba diba kuhueka, bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye, bakamba ne, Muaba eu udi tshihela, diba diakumana kuya, utume bisumbu bia bantu, baye mu misoko mikese bua kudisumbila bia kudia." 
Matthew14:16 Kadi Yesu wakabambila ne, Kabena ne bualu bua kuya, nuenu nubahe bia kudia." 
Matthew14:17 Bakamuambila ne, Tudi ne mitanda ya bidia anu itanu ne mishiha ibidi." 
Matthew14:18 Yeye wakamba ne, Nulue nʼabi kundi." 
Matthew14:19 Wakambila bisumbu bia bantu ne, Shikamai ha mashinde; wakamema mitanda itanu ne mishiha ibidi; hakatangileye mulu, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakabitshibiha, wakabifila mu bianza bia bayidi, bayidi bakaha bisumbu bia bantu." 
Matthew14:20 Buonso buabo bakadia, bakûkuta; bakangula bihesa bia bidia biakushala bisaka dikumi ne bibidi biule tente." 
Matthew14:21 Bantu bonso bakadia bakadi balume binunu bitanu, ne bakashi ne bana." 
Matthew14:22 Yesu wakabuesha bayidi bandi mu buatu lubilu, badianjile dishia ku mpala kuandi, yeye ashale kutuma bisumbu bia bantu kuabo." 
Matthew14:23 Hakatumeye bisumbu bia bantu kuabo, wakaya mu mukuna nkayandi bua kutendelela Nzambi; hakabuela diba yeye wakadimu nkayandi." 
Matthew14:24 Kadi buatu buakadi mu bunene bua dishiba, butatshisha kudi mavuala, bualu bua tshihehele tshiakadi tshibuhingisha." 
Matthew14:25 Hakadi diba bu ha inai hatshiatshia, Yesu wakalua kudibo, wenda ha mutu ha mai." 
Matthew14:26 Hakamumona bayidi bandi wenda ha mutu ha mai, bakatshina, bakamba ne, Mukishi; buowa buakabakuata, bakahandalala." 
Matthew14:27 Kadi Yesu wakabambila ne, Nukoleshe mitshima yenu; nmeme, kanutshinyi." 
Matthew14:28 Petelo wakamuebesha ne, Biwikala wewe, ungambile bua meme kulua kûdi ha mutu ha mai." 
Matthew14:29 Yeye wakamba ne, Lua. Petelo wakahatuka mu buatu, wakenda ha mutu ha mai bua kuya kudi Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kadi hakamoneye tshihehele, wakatshina; hakabangeye kudina mu mai, wakadila ne, Mukelenge, unsungile." 
Matthew14:31 Yesu wakolola tshianza lukasa, wakamukuata, wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi ne ditabusha dikese, wakuelela mpata munda tshinyi?" 
Matthew14:32 Hakabandabo mu buatu, tshihehele tshiakahatama." 
Matthew14:33 Bakadi mu buatu bakamukukuila, bakamba ne, Bulelela, wewe udi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Matthew14:34 Hakasabukabo, bakaya ha mpata, ku buloba bua Genesaleta." 
Matthew14:35 Hakamumanya bantu ba ku muaba au, bakatuma dî ku luseke alu luonso, bakahia ne bena mabedi bonso kudiye;" 
Matthew14:36 bakamutendekena bua kulengabo ku mubangu wa tshivualu tshiandi; bakalenga mbobo bakakoleshibua. 
Matthew15:1 Bafalese ne bafundi ba ku Yelushalema bakalua kudi Yesu, bakamuebesha ne," 
Matthew15:2 Bayidi bebe badi babengela kutumikila bilele bia bankambua betu tshinyi? Ha kudia kabena bowa bianza. 
Matthew15:3 Yeye wakabandamuna ne, Nuenu kabidi nudi nubengela kutumikila mukenshi wa Nzambi bualu bua bilele bienu tshinyi?" 
Matthew15:4 Nzambi wakamba ne, Unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe; yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Udi wamba mei mabi bua tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi afue biandi bulelela." 
Matthew15:5 Kadi nuenu nudi nuamba ne, Muntu yonso udi wambila tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi ne, Tshintu tshiwakadi kuangata tshidi tshiha Nzambi," 
Matthew15:6 kena unemeka tatuʼandi. Nuenu nuakuona dî dia Nzambi bualu bua bilele bienu," 
Matthew15:7 Nuenu bena lubombo, bulelela, Yeshaya wakamba bualu buenu ne," 
Matthew15:8 Bantu aba badi bannemeka ne mishiku yabo, Kadi mitshima yabo kayena kundi, idi kule." 
Matthew15:9 Badi bantendelela tshianana, Badi bayisha bantu diyisha dia mikenshi ya bantu." 
Matthew15:10 Yeye wakabikila tshisumbu tshia bantu kudiye, wakabambila ne, Unvuai, mimanye bimpe." 
Matthew15:11 Tshintu tshidi tshibuela mukana mua muntu katshiena tshimubihisha, tshidi tshiluhuka mukana muandi ntshidi tshimubihisha." 
Matthew15:12 Hashishe, bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye, bakamuebesha ne, Kuena mumanye biebe ne, Bafalese bakulenduka, hakunvuabo dî edi, anyi?" 
Matthew15:13 Kadi yeye wakandamuna ne, Nebajule mutshi wonso udi kawi mutentula kudi Tatu wanyi udi mu diulu." 
Matthew15:14 Nubalekele, badi balombodi bafofo, Bialombola mufofo munga mufofo, bubidi buabo nebahone mu dina." 
Matthew15:15 Petelo wakamuandamuna ne, Utujingulula lusumuinu elu." 
Matthew15:16 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nuenu kanuena bajingulule tô ne katataka, anyi?" 
Matthew15:17 Kanuena bamanye ne, Tshidi tshibuela mukana tshiyaya munda, nebatshiuhe, anyi?" 
Matthew15:18 Kadi bintu bidi bihatuka mukana biakufuma mu mutshima, mbiobi bidi bibihisha muntu." 
Matthew15:19 Bualu bua meshi mabi ne kushiha kua bantu ne masandi ne tshiendenda ne buibi ne mashimi ne kuhenda Nzambi bidi biluhuka mu mutshima; 
Matthew15:20 malu â adi abihisha muntu; kudi kudia bidia ne bianza bidi kabi biowa kakuena kubihisha muntu. 
Matthew15:21 Yesu wakumukaku, wakaya mu nseke ya Tulo ne Sidona." 
Matthew15:22 Monai, mukashi Muena Kanâna wakaluhuka mu luseke elu, wakela dî bikole ne, Mukelenge, muana wa Davidi, unfue luse, muana wanyi wa bakashi udi ukenga bikole bualu bua demon udi munda." 
Matthew15:23 Kadi Yesu kakamukudimuna dî. Bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye, bakamutendekena ne, Umuhingashe, bualu bua yeye udi utulonda wela dî diandi bikole." 
Matthew15:24 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Nakutumibua anu kudi mikoko mijimine ya nsubu wa Isalele." 
Matthew15:25 Kadi mukashi wakalua, wakamukukuila ne, Mukelenge unkuatshishe," 
Matthew15:26 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Kambimpe bia kuangata bidia bia bana kubielela mbua." 
Matthew15:27 Mukashi wakamba ne, Bulelela, Mukelenge, kadi mbua itu yadia nkototo idi imata munshi mua mesa a banfumu bai." 
Matthew15:28 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Wewe mukashi, ditabusha diebe didi dinene; nebakuenzele bualu bûdi musue. Ne muanʼandi wa bakashi wakakoleshibua ha diba adi mene." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu wakumukaku, wakalua hehi ne dishiba dia Galela, wakabanda ku mukuna, wakashikama." 
Matthew15:30 Bisumbu binene bia bantu biakalua kudiye, bakadi ne balema babo ne bafofo ne tumama ne batshibuke ne bakuabo ba bungi, bakabateka ku makasa andi, yeye wakabakolesha;" 
Matthew15:31 nunku bantu bakakema, hakamonabo tumama tuakula, ne batshibuke balulama, balema benda, ne bafofo batabala, bakatumbisha Nzambi wa Isalele." 
Matthew15:32 Yesu wakabikila bayidi bandi, wakabambila ne, Ndi ne bantu luse, bualu bua bobo bakusomba nʼanyi matuku asatu, kabena ne tshia kudia; tshiena musue kubatuma ne nsala, kabayi kuhanga mu nshila." 
Matthew15:33 Bayidi bandi bakamukonka ne, Mu muaba eu wa tshihela netuhete mitanda ya bidia ya bungi ya kûkutshisha bantu bungi nunku kudi kunyi?" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nudi ne mitanda bungi munyi? Bakamba ne, Idi muanda mutekete, ne tushiha tukese." 
Matthew15:35 Yeye wakambila bantu ne, Shikamai hanshi;" 
Matthew15:36 wakamema mitanda muanda mutekete ne mishiha; wakatendelela Nzambi, wakabitshibula, wakabifila mu bianza bia bayidi, bayidi bakaha bantu." 
Matthew15:37 Buonso buabo bakadia, bakûkuta; bakangula bihesa bia bidia biakashala bisaka muanda mutekete biule tente." 
Matthew15:38 Bantu bonso bakadia bakadi balume binunu binai, ne bakashi ne bana." 
Matthew15:39 Wakatuma bantu kuabo; wakabuela mu buatu, wakalua mu nseke ya Magadana." 
Matthew16:1 Bafalese ne Basadoke bakalua, bakamuteta munda, bakamuambila ne, Utuleshe tshimanyinu tshia mu diulu." 
Matthew16:2 Kadi yeye wakabandamuna ne, Mu dilolo nutu nuamba ne, Nvula kena ulua, bualu bua diulu didi dikunze;" 
Matthew16:3 mu dinda nutu nuamba ne, Lelu nvula nealue, bualu bua diulu didi dikunze kunzu, nvula udi mufinde. Nudi bamanye mua kujingulula mpala wa diulu, kadi kanuena bamanye mua kujingulula bimanyinu bia bikondo." 
Matthew16:4 Ba mu tshikondo tshibi ne tshia masandi badi bakeba tshimanyinu! kabena babaha tshimanyinu tshikuabo anu tshia Yona. Yeye wakahashîa, wakaya biandi." 
Matthew16:5 Bayidi ba Yesu bakalua dishia dia dishiba, muoyo wakabahua bua kuangata mitanda ya bidia." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu wakabambila ne, Tangilai bimpe, nudimukile luevene lua Bafalese ne lua Basadoke." 
Matthew16:7 Bobo bakambilangana ne, Buakuambileye nunku mbua tuetu katuakangata mitanda ya bidia." 
Matthew16:8 Hakamanya Yesu lungenyi luabo, wakamba ne, Nuenu nudi ne ditabusha dikese, nudi nuambidilangana ne, Katuena ne mitanda ya bidia, tshinyi?" 
Matthew16:9 Kanuena bamanye, kanuena bavuluke bua mitanda itanu ya bantu binunu bitanu ne bungi bua bisaka binuakuangula?" 
Matthew16:10 Kanuena bavuluke mitanda muanda mutekete ya bantu binunu binai ne bungi bua bisaka binuakuangula? 
Matthew16:11 Bualu kai nuenu kanuena bamanye ne, Tshiakunuambila bua mitanda ya bidia? Nakunuambila bua kudimukila luevene lua Bafalese ne lua Basadoke." 
Matthew16:12 Hashishe, bakajingulula ne, Yeye kakutuambila bua kudimukila luevene lua mitanda ya bidia, wakutuambila bua kudimukila diyisha dia Bafalese ne dia Basadoke." 
Matthew16:13 Hakalua Yesu mu luseke lua Kaisalia wa Filipoi, wakakonka bayidi bandi ne, Bantu badi bamba Muana wa muntu ne, Nganyi?" 
Matthew16:14 Bakamba ne, Bakuabo badi bamba ne, Yeye udi Yone Mubatiji, bakuabo ne, Yeye udi Eliya; bakuabo ne, Yeye udi Yelemiya anyi muprofete mukuabo." 
Matthew16:15 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Kadi nuenu nudi nungamba ne, Meme ndi nganyi?" 
Matthew16:16 Simona Petelo wakandamuna ne, Wewe udi Kilisto, Muana wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo." 
Matthew16:17 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Simona Bâ-yona, wewe udi ne disanka; bantu kabakukubuluila bualu ebu, anu Tatu wanyi wa mu diulu." 
Matthew16:18 Ndi nkuambila kabidi ne, Wewe udi Petelo, ha dibue edi nengibake ekelesia wanyi; bibi bia ku mbelu kua Muaba wa Bafue kabiena bimuhita bukole." 
Matthew16:19 Nenkuhe nvungula ya bukelenge bua mu diulu, mu diulu nebasuike tshiwasuika ha buloba; mu diulu nebasuike tshiwasulula ha buloba." 
Matthew16:20 Hashishe, yeye wakambila bayidi bandi bikole ne, Kanuambidi muntu ne, Yeye udi Kilisto." 
Matthew16:21 Ku tshikondo atshi Yesu wakabanga kulesha bayidi bandi ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kuya ku Yelushalema, ne bua kukengeshibua makenga a bungi kudi bakulu ne kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne kudi bafundi, ne bua kushihibua, ne bua kubishibua hahita matuku asatu." 
Matthew16:22 Petelo wakaya ne Yesu, wakabanga kumubela ne, Nzambi akufue luse, Mukelenge; bualu ebu kabuena bulua kûdi." 
Matthew16:23 Kadi yeye wakatshinguluka, wakambila Petelo ne, Satana, yila ku nyima kuanyi, wewe udi tshilenduishi tshianyi, bualu bua wewe kuena welangana meshi a malu a Nzambi, udi welangana meshi anu a malu a bantu." 
Matthew16:24 Yesu wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Biasua muntu kundonda, adihidie, ambule mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, alonde." 
Matthew16:25 Bua wasua kusungila muoyo wandi neaujimishe, wajimisha muoyo wandi bua bualu buanyi neauhete." 
Matthew16:26 Biasumba muntu buloba buonso ku muoyo wandi, mushinga wandi muimpe udi hanyi? Anyi, muntu udi ne tshintu kai tshia kushintakasheye bua kuangateye muoyo wandi kabidi?" 
Matthew16:27 Muana wa muntu nealue mu butumbi bua Tatu wandi ne banjelo bandi; dituku adi neafute muntu yonso bu muakenzenzeye. 
Matthew16:28 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bakuabo badi bimana aha kabena bafua tô ne hamonabo Muana wa muntu ulua mu bukelenge buandi." 
Matthew17:1 Hakahita matuku asambombo, Yesu wakangata Petelo ne Yakobo ne muanʼabo Yone, wakabanda nʼabo ku mukuna mule, bobo nkayabo." 
Matthew17:2 Yeye wakakudimuka ku mesu kuabo; mpala wandi wakaditemena bu diba, bilulu biandi biakatoka bu munya." 
Matthew17:3 Monai, Mose ne Eliya bakamueneka kudibo bayikila nʼandi." 
Matthew17:4 Petelo wakambila Yesu ne, Mukelenge, hatudi kunoko mbimpe; biwasua, nengase bitanda bisatu, tshikuabo ntshiebe, tshinga ntshia Mose, tshikuabo ntshia Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Hakatshidiye wamba nunku, monai, ditutu diengelela diakababuikila; dî diakaluhuka mu ditutu ne, Eu udi Muanʼanyi munanga, yeye udi unsankisha bimpe, munvuilai." 
Matthew17:6 Hakunvua bayidi dî adi, bakatua mpala hanshi, bakatamba kutshina." 
Matthew17:7 Yesu wakalua, wakabalenga tshianza, wakamba ne, Bikai, kanutshinyi." 
Matthew17:8 Hakabandulukabo, kabakamona muntu mukuabo, anu Yesu." 
Matthew17:9 Hakadibo bahueka ha mukuna, Yesu wakabambila ne, Kanuambidi muntu mukuabo bualu bunuakumona tô ne habika Muana wa muntu ku lufu." 
Matthew17:10 Bayidi bakamukonka ne, Bafundi batu bambila tshinyi ne, Budi Eliya nʼabu mbua kudianjileye kulua ku mpala?" 
Matthew17:11 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Bulelela, Eliya udi ulua, nealongolole bintu bionso bu muakadibi diambedi;" 
Matthew17:12 kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Eliya wakamana kulua, kabakamumanya, bakamuenzela bualu buakasuabo. Nunku nebakengeshe Muana wa muntu kabidi." 
Matthew17:13 Hashishe bayidi bakamanya ne, Yeye udi utuambila Yone Mubatiji." 
Matthew17:14 Hakafikabo hakadi tshisumbu tshia bantu, muntu wakalua kudiye, wakamutuila binu hanshi, wakamba ne," 
Matthew17:15 Mukelenge ufuile muanʼanyi wa balume luse, yeye udi ne tshiseke, udi ukenga bikole; misangu ya bungi yeye udi uhona mu kahia ne mu mai." 
Matthew17:16 Nakalua nʼandi kudi bayidi bebe, bobo kabakamanya mua kushikisha disama diandi." 
Matthew17:17 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Nuenu ba tshikondo etshi tshia buhidia ne tshitshu, nenshale nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Nentate nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Luai nʼandi kundi." 
Matthew17:18 Yesu wakabela demon, wakumuka munda mua muana; ha diba adi mene muana wakadi mukoleshibue." 
Matthew17:19 Hashishe, bayidi bakalua kudi Yesu nkayabo, bakamukonka ne, Munyi tuetu katuakamanya mua kumumusha?" 
Matthew17:20 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bualu bua ditabusha dienu diakadi dikese. Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Binuikala ne ditabusha bunene bua lutete lua mutada, nenuambile mukuna eu ne, Umukaku, ya kuakua, neumuke; kakuena bualu budi mua kunukolela. [" 
Matthew17:21 ]. 
Matthew17:22 Hakadibo badisangisha mu Galela, Yesu wakabambila ne, Nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu;" 
Matthew17:23 nebamushihe, neabishibue hahita matuku asatu. Mitshima yabo yakatamba kunyingalala." 
Matthew17:24 Hakaluabo ku Kapênuma, basangishi ba mulambu wa ntempelo bakalua kudi Petelo, bakamukonka ne, Muyishi wenu kena ufuta tshituha tshibidi tshia nshekela, anyi?" 
Matthew17:25 Yeye wakitaba ne, E, udi ufuta. Hakabueleye mu nsubu, Yesu wakadianjila kumukonka ne, Simona, udi welangana meshi munyi; banfumu ba ha buloba batu babalambula kudi bana babo balela, anyi kudi bantu ba bende?" 
Matthew17:26 Hakandamuneye ne, Kudi bantu ba bende, Yesu wakamuambila ne, Nunku bana balela badi badishikamine," 
Matthew17:27 Kadi katubalenduishi, uye biebe ku dishiba, wele ndoho mu mai, wangate mushiha wadianjila kulua; hawabuela mukana muau, neusangane nshekela; umuangate, ubaheye bua wanyi ne webe." 
Matthew18:1 Ha diba adi bayidi bakalua kudi Yesu, bakamuebesha ne, Mu bukelenge bua mu diulu udi mutambe bakuabo nganyi?" 
Matthew18:2 Yeye wakabikila muana mukese, wakamuteka munkatshi muabo," 
Matthew18:3 wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Binuikala kanui nukudimuna mitshima yenu, binuikala kanui nulua bu bana bakese, kanuena nubuela mu bukelenge bua mu diulu bulelela." 
Matthew18:4 Wadihuekesha bu muana eu mukese, yeye udi mutambe bakuabo mu bukelenge bua mu diulu." 
Matthew18:5 Witabusha muana mukese nunku mu dina dianyi udi ungitabusha meme; 
Matthew18:6 kadi bialenduisha muntu umue wabo wa mu bantu aba bahuekele badi bangitabusha, biakadi bimpe kumusuika dibue dinene dia kuhela nʼadi mu nshingu muandi, kumuina mu bunene bua mai manene." 
Matthew18:7 Dikenga dilualua kudi bantu bualu bua malu adi abalenduisha. Bushua, malu adi alenduisha bantu adi alua, kadi mulau neulue kudi mulenduishi." 
Matthew18:8 Biakulenduisha tshianza tshiebe, anyi dikasa diebe, watshikosa, watshimasha; bua wewe kubuela mu muoyo ne tshilema ne kuzobela kudi kutamba bua wewe kuimashibua mu kahia ka tshiendelele ne bianza bibidi ne makasa abidi." 
Matthew18:9 Biakulenduisha disu diebe, waditula, wadimasha; bua wewe kubuela mu muoyo ne disu dimue kudi kutamba bua wewe kuimashibua mu Ngena wa kahia ne mesu abidi." 
Matthew18:10 Nudimuke, kanulenguludi muana umue wa mu bana aba bakese; ndi nuambila ne, Mu diulu matuku onso banjelo babo batu batangila Tatu wanyi udi mu diulu ku mesu." 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 Nudi nuelangana meshi a tshinyi? Bikala muntu ne lukama lua mikoko, hajimina mukuabo, yeye kena ushîa minga makumi tshitema ne tshitema, kena uya mu mikuna bua kukebeye udi muhambuke, anyi?" 
Matthew18:13 Biaumoneye, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Disanka diandi kudi wakadi muhambuke neditambe disanka diandi kudi makumi tshitema ne tshitema yakadi kayi mihambuke." 
Matthew18:14 Nunku Tatu wenu wa mu diulu kena musue muana umue wa mu bana aba bakese afue. 
Matthew18:15 Bakuenzela muanʼenu bibi, uye biebe, umuleshe bubi buandi, wewe ne yeye nkayenu; bitabusheye dî diebe, wewe wakamuvuisha muanʼenu kabidi." 
Matthew18:16 Biahidieye kunvua dî diebe, uye ne muntu umue anyi bantu babidi, nunku mei onso neajalame kudi bamonyi babidi anyi basatu." 
Matthew18:17 Biahidieye kunvua mei abo, ambila bena ekelesia bualu ebu; biahidieye kunyua mei a bena ekelesia, ikale biandi ku mesu kuebe bu muntu wa bende anyi musangishi wa mulambu." 
Matthew18:18 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Mu diulu nebasuike tshinuasuika ha buloba, mu diulu nebasuike tshinuasulula ha buloba," 
Matthew18:19 Bualu bukuabo, ndi nuambila ne, Bikala babidi benu basangisha dî diabo bua tshintu tshionso tshialombabo Tatu wanyi wa mu diulu neabenzele mualombabo." 
Matthew18:20 Ndi bianyi munkatshi mua bantu babidi anyi basatu badi badisangisha mu dina dianyi. 
Matthew18:21 Hashishe, Petelo wakalua, wakakonka Yesu ne, Mukelenge, muanʼetu neangenzele bibi misangu bungi munyi inamulekela bubi buandi? Misangu muanda mutekete, anyi?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Tshiena nkuambila ne, Tô ne ku misangu muanda mutekete, ndi nkuambila ne, Tô ne ku makumi muanda mutekete misangu muanda mutekete." 
Matthew18:23 Ke mudi bukelenge bua mu diulu bufuana mukelenge mukuabo wakasua kubadika bintu biandi biakadi mu bianza bia bahika bandi. 
Matthew18:24 Hakabangeye kubala bintu, bakalua ne mukuabo wakadi ne dibanza dia lubombo lua ntalanta." 
Matthew18:25 Kadi bualu bua yeye kakadi ne bia kumana nʼabi dibanza, mukelenge wandi wakamba ne, Bamuhane ne mukashi wandi ne bana bandi ne bintu biandi bionso, bua kumana dibanza." 
Matthew18:26 Bua bualu ebu muhika wakadishinda mukudimane, wakamukukuila ne, Mukelenge, kungenzedi bualu lukasa, nenkufute dibanza dionso." 
Matthew18:27 Mukelenge wandi wakadi ne luse, wakamulekela, wakamulekelela dibanza."
