Matthew18:28 Kadi muhika au wakaluhuka mu nsubu, wakasangana muhika nʼandi wakadi nʼandi dibanza dia lukama lua ndenalio; wakamukuata, wakamufiekela mu nshingu ne, Futa dibanza dianyi katataka." 
Matthew18:29 Muhika nʼandi wakadishinda mukudimane, wakamusengelela ne, Kungenzedi bualu lukasa, nenkufute." 
Matthew18:30 Kadi yeye wakahidia, wakaya, wakamuela mu nsubu wa lukanu ne, Ashalemu tô ne hafuteye dibanza." 
Matthew18:31 Hakamona banga bahika nʼandi bualu buakenzeye, mitshima yabo yakanyingalala bikole, bakalua, bakamanyisha mukelenge wabo malu onso akenjibua." 
Matthew18:32 Hashishe, mukelenge wandi wakamubikila ne, Wewe udi muhika mubi, nakukulekela dibanza adi dionso, bualu bua wewe wakuntendekena;" 
Matthew18:33 munyi wewe kabidi kufu muhika nʼebe luse bu munakukufua wewe luse? 
Matthew18:34 Mukelenge wandi wakadi ne tshishi; wakamufila mu bianza bia bakengeshi ne, Ashalemu tô ne hafuteye dibanza dionso." 
Matthew18:35 Tatu wanyi wa mu diulu neanuenzele muomumue kabidi, binuikala kanui nulekelela mukuenu yonso mibi yandi mu mitshima yenu." 
Matthew19:1 Hakashikisha Yesu kuamba mei â, wakumuka mu Galela, wakalua mu luseke lua Yudaya ludi dishia dia Yadene;" 
Matthew19:2 bisumbu binene bia bantu biakamulonda, yeye wakabakolesha." 
Matthew19:3 Bafalese bakalua kudiye, bakamuteta munda ne, Biumusha muntu mukashi wandi bua malu onso, neashihe mukenshi, anyi?" 
Matthew19:4 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Nuenu kanuakubala ne, Ku tshibangidilu mufuki wakabafuka mulume ne mukashi," 
Matthew19:5 mufuki wakamba biandi ne, Bua bualu ebu mulume neashîe tatu wandi ne baba wandi, nealamate kudi mukashi wandi; bubidi buabo nebalue mubidi umue?" 
Matthew19:6 Nunku kabena bantu babidi kabidi, badi mubidi umue. Bua bualu ebu muntu kahanduludi tshidi tshibumbakanya kudi Nzambi." 
Matthew19:7 Bakamukonka kabidi ne, Bualu kai Mose wakamba ne, Bamuhe mukanda wa kushiha dibaka, bamumushe?" 
Matthew19:8 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bualu bua bukole bua mitshima yenu Mose wakitabusha bua nuenu numushe bakashi benu; kadi ku tshibangidilu kakuakadi nunku." 
Matthew19:9 Ndi nuambila kabidi ne, Wumusha mukashi wandi kabui bua masandi, habakeye mukashi mukuabo, yeye udi wenda masandi; biabaka mulume mukashi mumusha nunku, yeye udi wenda masandi." 
Matthew19:10 Bayidi bandi bakamuambila ne, Bikala bualu bua mulume ne mukashi wandi nunku, kubaka mukashi kakuena kuimpe." 
Matthew19:11 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Bantu bonso kabena bamanye mua kuitabusha dî adi, anu bantu badi bahebue bukole bua kuditabusha." 
Matthew19:12 Batungu bakuabo badiku, bamamuʼabo bakabalela nunku; batungula bakuabo badiku, bantu bakabatungula; batungula bakuabo badiku, bakaditungula bualu bua bukelenge bua mu diulu. Udi mumanye mua kuitabusha dî adi aditabushe." 
Matthew19:13 Bakalua ne bana bakese kudiye bua yeye kubalenga tshianza tshiandi ne bua kubalombeleye Nzambi; kadi bayidi bakabasamina. 
Matthew19:14 Yesu wakamba ne, Nuitabushe bua bana bakese kulua kundi, kanubakandi; bualu bua bukelenge bua mu diulu mbua badi bu bana." 
Matthew19:15 Yeye wakabalenga bianza; wakumukaku. 
Matthew19:16 Muntu wakalua kudiye, wakamba ne, Muyishi, nengenze bualu buimpe kai, mpete muoyo wa tshiendelele?" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udi unkonkela bua bualu buimpe tshinyi? Umue udiku udi muimpe; kadi biwasua kubuela mu muoyo, enza mikenshi ya Nzambi." 
Matthew19:18 Yeye wakakonka Yesu ne, Mikenshi kai? Yesu wakamba ne, Kushihi muntu, kuendi masandi, kuibi, kudingidi muntu," 
Matthew19:19 unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe, Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue." 
Matthew19:20 Nsongalume wakamuambila ne, Nakenzenza malu â onso; bualu kai budi hunshala?" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Biwasua kuikala muimpe, ya biebe, uhane biudi nʼabi, ubihe bantu bahele, newikale ne bintu mu tshibutshilu tshia mu diulu, ulue kundonda." 
Matthew19:22 Kadi hakunvua nsongalume dî edi, wakaya biandi mubungame, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne bintu bia bungi." 
Matthew19:23 Yesu wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Ha kubuela kua muntu mubanshi mu bukelenge bua mu diulu mbualu bukole." 
Matthew19:24 Ndi nuambila kabidi ne, Kubuela kua kamelu mu disu dia kashingi kudi kutamba kubuela kua muntu mubanshi mu bukelenge bua Nzambi butekete." 
Matthew19:25 Hakunvua bayidi dî edi, bakatamba kukema, bakamukonka ne, Ahu udi mumanye mua kusungidibua nganyi?" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu wakabajosha talalâ, wakabambila ne, Bantu kabena bamanye mua kuenza bualu ebu, kadi Nzambi udi mumanye mua kuenza malu onso." 
Matthew19:27 Petelo wakamuandamuna ne, Ahu tuetu, tuakushia malu etu onso, tuakukulonda, tuetu netuhete tshinyi?" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Mu dituku dialedibua bintu bionso tshiakabidi, hashikama Muana wa muntu mu nkuasa wa butumbi buandi, nuenu kabidi bakundonda, nenushikame mu nkuasa dikumi ne ibidi, nulumbuluisha bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia Isalele." 
Matthew19:29 Muntu yonso wakushia nsubu yandi, anyi bana babo balume anyi bana babo bakashi, anyi tatuʼandi, anyi baba wandi, anyi bana bandi, anyi madimi andi, bualu bua dina dianyi yeye neahete masanka misangu lukama matambe a diambedi, neahiane muoyo wa tshiendelele kabidi." 
Matthew19:30 Kadi ba bungi badi ku mpala katataka nebikale ku nyima, badi ku nyima katataka nebikale ku mpala." 
Matthew20:1 Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu muena budimi, wakaya dinda bua kukeba bena mudimu bua kumudimina budimi buandi bua mamuma a nvinyo." 
Matthew20:2 Yeye wakasangisha nʼabo dî bua kubafuta muntu ndenalio umue muntu ndenalio umue ku dituku ku dituku, wakabatuma mu budimi buandi." 
Matthew20:3 Yeye wakaya kabidi, hakafika diba ha tshitema, wakamona bakuabo bimane tshianana mu tshisalu;" 
Matthew20:4 yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu kabidi mu budimi, nenuhe tshidi tshiakane. Bakaya." 
Matthew20:5 Hakafika diba ha dikumi ne ibidi, wakaya kabidi; ne bakafika diba ha isatu, Wakenza muomumue." 
Matthew20:6 Hakafika diba ha itanu, wakaya biandi, wakasangana bantu bakuabo bimane; wakabakonka ne, Nuenu nudi nuimanyina aha diba dionso tshianana tshinyi?" 
Matthew20:7 Bakamuambila ne, Bualu bua muntu kena mutubueshe ku mudimu. Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu kabidi nuye mu budimi." 
Matthew20:8 Hakamba diba kubuela, muena budimi wakambila mulami wa bintu biandi ne, Bikila bena mudimu, ubahe difutu diabo, uhangile kudi ba kunshikidilu tô ne kudi ba diambedi." 
Matthew20:9 Hakalua bena diba ha itanu, bakangata ndenalio umue." 
Matthew20:10 Hakalua ba diambedi, bakelangana meshi ne, Tuetu netuangate bintu bikuabo ha mutu; kadi bobo kabidi bakangata ndenalio umue." 
Matthew20:11 Hakangatabo difutu diabo, bakajiana muena budimi ne," 
Matthew20:12 Aba ba kunshikidilu bakakuata mudimu anu tshituha tshimue tshia diba, wewe wakubenda muomumue nʼetu, tuetu bakusala mudimu dituku dijima mu munya mukole." 
Matthew20:13 Yeye wakandamuna umue wabo ne, Mulunda wanyi, tshiena nkuenzela bibi; wewe kuakusangisha nʼanyi dî bua ndenalio umue, anyi?" 
Matthew20:14 Angata tshidi tshiebe, uye biebe; mutshima wanyi udi musue kuha eu wa kunshikidilu bu mundi nkuha wewe." 
Matthew20:15 Tshiena mumanye mua kuenza ne bintu bianyi bu mundi musue, anyi? Disu diebe didi dibi bualu bua meme ndi muimpe, anyi?" 
Matthew20:16 Nunku ba kunshikidilu nebikale ba diambedi, ba diambedi nebikale ba kunshikidilu." 
Matthew20:17 Yesu wakadi ubanda ku Yelushalema, mu nshila yeye wakangata bayidi bandi nkayabo, wakabambila ne," 
Matthew20:18 Unvuai, tudi tubanda ku Yelushalema; nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bia bafundi; bobo nebamuhishe ne lufu," 
Matthew20:19 nebamufile mu bianza bia bantu ba mu bisamba bia bende, bamuseke, bamukume, bamushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane; kadi hahita matuku asatu yeye neabishibue." 
Matthew20:20 Hashishe, mamu wa bana ba Zebedayo wakalua ne bana bandi kudiye, wakamukukuila, wakamulomba bualu." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Udi musue tshinyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Wele mukenshi wa bana banyi aba babidi kushikamabo, mukuabo ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume, mukuabo ku tshianza tshiebe tshia bakashi, mu bukelenge buebe." 
Matthew20:22 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Kanuena bamanye tshinudi nulomba. Nudi bamanye mua kunua luhanza lunkadi ha kunua, anyi? Bakamuitaba ne, Tudi bamanye." 
Matthew20:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nenunue luhanza luanyi bulelela; kadi kushikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume ne ku tshianza tshianyi tshia bakashi kambualu buanyi bua kuha muntu; kushikama nunku kudi bualu bua bantu bakabulongoluelabo kudi Tatu wanyi." 
Matthew20:24 Hakunvua bayidi dikumi bualu ebu, bakadi ne bena kuabo babidi tshishi." 
Matthew20:25 Kadi Yesu wakababikila, wakabambila ne, Nudi bamanye ne, Banfumu ba bisamba bia bende badi babalongolola ne diambu, bantu babo badi banene badi babakokesha." 
Matthew20:26 Bualu buenu kabuena nunku; wasua kulua munene munkatshi muenu neikale muena mudimu wenu; 
Matthew20:27 wasua kuikala ha mutu henu neikale muhika wenu; 
Matthew20:28 nunku kabidi Muana wa muntu kakuluila bua bantu bamukuatshile mudimu, wakuluila bua kubakuatshila mudimu ne bua kufila muoyo wandi bua kuhikula nʼau bantu ba bungi." 
Matthew20:29 Hakadibo baluhuka mu Yeleko, bantu ba bungi bakamulonda." 
Matthew20:30 Balume babidi bafofo bakadi bashikame kukala kua nshila; hakunvuabo ne, Udi uhita nYesu, bakela mbila ne, Mukelenge, muana wa Davidi, utufue luse." 
Matthew20:31 Bantu bakabakanda ne, Huai; kadi bobo bakatamba kuela mbila ne, Mukelenge, muana wa Davidi, utufue luse." 
Matthew20:32 Yesu wakimana, wakababikila, wakabakonka ne, Nudi basue meme nuenzele tshinyi?" 
Matthew20:33 Bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, mesu etu atabale." 
Matthew20:34 Luse luakakuata Yesu, wakabalenga ha mesu abo; bakatabala lukasa, bakamulonda." 
Matthew21:1 Hakafikabo ha buihi ne Yelushalema ku Bete-fage, ku Mukuna wa Oleve, Yesu wakatuma bayidi bandi babidi," 
Matthew21:2 wakabambila ne, Yai mu musoko udi buludiludi bunudi batangile, nenumone nyama wa mpunda musuika ne muanʼandi. Nuisulule, nulue nʼai kunoko." 
Matthew21:3 Bianukonka muntu dî, numuambile ne, Mukelenge udi nʼai bualu; yeye neaitume lubilu." 
Matthew21:4 Bualu ebu buakulua bua kushikisha dî diakambabo kudi muprofete ne," 
Matthew21:5 Nuambile muana mukashi wa Siona ne, Monai, Mukelenge webe ulualua kûdi, Udi ne kalolo, udi wenda ha nyima ha nyama wa mpunda." 
Matthew21:6 Bayidi bakaya, bakenza bu muakabambila Yesu," 
Matthew21:7 bakalua ne nyama wa mpunda ne muana, bakateka bivualu biabo ha nyima hai; Yesu wakashikama ha mutu habi." 
Matthew21:8 Bantu ba bungi ba mu tshisumbu bakâdisha bivualu biabo mu nshila; bakuabo bakakosa bisala bia mitshi, bakabiadisha mu nshila." 
Matthew21:9 Bisumbu bia bantu bakadi baya ku mpala kuandi ne bakadi bamulonda ku nyima bakela mbila ne, Hosana ikale kudi muana wa Davidi; udi ulua mu dina dia Mukelenge atumbishibue; Hosana mu diulu." 
Matthew21:10 Hakabueleye mu Yelushalema, bantu bonso ba mu musoko bakakema, bakakonka ne, Eu nganyi?" 
Matthew21:11 Bantu ba mu bisumbu bakamba ne, Eu mmuprofete Yesu, wa ku Nazaleta wa Galela." 
Matthew21:12 Yesu wakabuela mu ntempelo wa Nzambi, wakihata bonso bakadi bahana bintu ne bakadi basumba bintu mu ntempelo, wakatonkola mesa a bashintakashi ba mpalata ne nkuasa ya basumbishi ba nyunyu ya nkutshi;" 
Matthew21:13 yeye wakabambila ne, Bakafunda ma Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Nebabikile nsubu wanyi ne, Nsubu wa kutendelelamu Nzambi, kadi nuenu nuakumuvuisha bu muaba wa banyengi." 
Matthew21:14 Bafofo ne balema bakalua kudiye mu ntempelo, yeye wakabakolesha." 
Matthew21:15 Kadi hakamona bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi malu a kukema akenzeye, hakamonabo kabidi bana bakadi bela mbila mu ntempelo ne, Hosana ikale kudi muana wa Davidi, bakadi ne tshishi," 
Matthew21:16 bakamukonka ne, Udi unvua mei adi bana aba bamba, anyi? Yesu wakabambila ne, E, udi ngunvua, kadi nuenu kanuakubala dî ne, Wewe wakajadika butumbi buebe mukana mua bana bakese ne mua badi bâmua mabele?" 
Matthew21:17 Yeye wakabashia, wakaluhuka mu musoko, wakaya ku Betania, wakalalaku." 
Matthew21:18 Hakadiye uhingana mu musoko dinda, wakadi ne nsala." 
Matthew21:19 Hakamoneye mutshi wa nfigi kukala kua nshila, wakaluaku, wakasangana mutshi mutuhu, anu mabeshi; yeye wakambila mutshi ne, Wewe kukuami mamuma tshiendelele. Mutshi wa nfigi wakafuba lukasa." 
Matthew21:20 Hakamona bayidi bandi bualu ebu, bakakema ne, Mutshi wa nfigi wakafuba lubilu nunku munyi?" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Binuikala ne ditabusha, kanui ne mpata, nenuenze bu muakuenzelabo mutshi wa nfigi; ne bualu bukuabo kabidi, binuambila mukuna eu ne, Ubishibue, wedibue mu mai manene, bualu nebulue bu munuakuamba." 
Matthew21:22 Binuitabusha, nenuangate bintu bionso binualomba mu kutendelela kuenu." 
Matthew21:23 Hakabuela Yesu mu ntempelo, bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bakulu ba bantu bakatua kudiye, hakadiye uyisha bantu, bakamukonka ne, Wewe udi wenza malu â ne bukokeshi kai? Wakukuha bukokeshi ebu nganyi?" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Meme kabidi nenukonke bualu bumue; binuangambila bualu ebu, nenuambile bualu bua bukokeshi bundi ngenza nʼabu malu â." 
Matthew21:25 Dibatiza dia Yone diakafuma kudi kunyi? Mu diulu, anyi kudi bantu? Bobo bakelangana meshi munda munda ne, Bituamba ne, Mu diulu, yeye neatuebeshe ne, Bualu kai kanuakamuitabusha?" 
Matthew21:26 Kadi bituamba ne, Kudi bantu, tudi tutshina bantu; bualu bua bantu bonso badi bitabusha Yone ne, Udi muprofete." 
Matthew21:27 Bakakudimuna Yesu di ne, Katuena bamanye. Yeye wakabambila ne, Meme kabidi tshiena nuambila bualu bua bukokeshi bundi ngenza nʼabu malu â." 
Matthew21:28 Nudi nuamba tshinyi? Muntu wakadi ne bana balume balela babidi; wakalua kudi wa kumudilu, wakamba ne, Muanʼanyi, ya biebe lelu wenze mudimu mu budimi bua mamuma a nvinyo." 
Matthew21:29 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Tshiena musue; kadi ku nyima yeye wakakudimuna mutshima wandi, wakaya." 
Matthew21:30 Tatu wabo wakalua kudi wa ku nyima, wakamuambila muomumue. Yeye wakandamuna ne, Nenye, tatu, kadi yeye kakaya." 
Matthew21:31 Bubidi buabo, muana kai wakenza bu muakamba tatu wandi? Bakandamuna ne, Wa kumudilu. Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Basangishi ba mulambu ne bakashi ba masandi badi badianjila kubuela mu bukelenge bua Nzambi ku mpala kuenu." 
Matthew21:32 Yone wakalua kunudi mu nshila wa buakane, kanuakamuitabusha; kadi basangishi ba mulambu ne bakashi ba masandi bakamuitabusha. Hanuakatangila bualu abu, kanuakakudimuna mitshima yenu ku nyima bualu bua kumuitabusha." 
Matthew21:33 Unvuai lusumuinu lukuabo: Muena budimi wakadiku, wakatentula mionshi ya mamuma a nvinyo mu budimi buandi, wakelela budimi luhangu lua mitshi idi isasa, wakimbamu dina dia kukamina mamuma, wakasa nsubu wa batentekedi mule, wakabushia mu bianza bia ba bidime, wakaya biandi ku luseke lukuabo kule." 
Matthew21:34 Hakalua tshidimu tshia mamuma ha buihi, yeye wakatuma bantu bandi kudi ba bidime bua kuangata mamuma andi." 
Matthew21:35 Kadi ba bidime bakakuata bantu bandi, bakakuma mukuabo, bakashiha mukuabo, munga bakakuma ne mabue." 
Matthew21:36 Wakatuma kabidi banga bantu bandi batambe ba diambedi; ba bidime bakabenzela muomumue. 
Matthew21:37 Hashishe, wakabatumina muanʼandi, wakamba ne, Nebanemeke muanʼanyi." 
Matthew21:38 Kadi ba bidime, hakamonabo muana, bakambilangana ne, Eu udi muhianyi; tuyai kumushiha, netuangate buhianyi buandi." 
Matthew21:39 Bakamukuata, bakamumusha mu budimi, bakamushiha." 
Matthew21:40 Halua umena budimi, nenzele ba bidime aba tshinyi?" 
Matthew21:41 Bobo bakamba ne, Yeye neashihe bantu aba babi, neashie budimi buandi mu bianza bia binga bidime, nebifile mamuma mu bianza biandi halua bidimu biau." 
Matthew21:42 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Kanuena banze kubala mu Mukanda wa Nzambi anyi, ne, Dibue diakahidiabo kudi bibaki ba nsubu Bakaditeka ku mutu kua ditumba; Eu mudimu wa Mukelenge, Udi bu bualu bua kukema ku mesu kuetu?" 
Matthew21:43 Ndi nuambila ne, Nebanunyenge bukelenge bua Nzambi, nebabuhe tshisamba tshidi tshikuama mamuma abu." 
Matthew21:44 Wahona ha dibue edi neatshibuke; biahonenadi muntu, nedimutangadishe bu luhuishi." 
Matthew21:45 Hakunvua bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafalese nsumuinu yandi, bakamanya ne, Yeye udi utuamba tuetu." 
Matthew21:46 Hakasuabo kumukuata, bakatshina bantu, bualu bua bobo bakamuitabusha ne, Udi muprofete." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu wakabandamuna, wakabelela nsumuinu kabidi, wakamba ne," 
Matthew22:2 Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu mukelenge wakalambishila muanʼandi bidia bia dibanji; 
Matthew22:3 wakatuma bantu bandi bua kubikila bakalayileye diambedi bua disanka dia dibanji; bakahidia kulua. 
Matthew22:4 Yeye wakatuma bantu bandi bakuabo kabidi ne, Nuambile bantu banakalayila diambedi ne, Nakulongolola bidia, ngombe yanyi idi mishiha ne bana ba ngombe ba manyi, bintu, bionso biakuhua, luai ku disanka dia dibanji." 
Matthew22:5 Kadi bobo bakalengulula di diandi, bakaya ku malu abo, mukuabo ku budimi buandi, mukuabo ku kuenda mushinga;" 
Matthew22:6 banga bakakuata bantu ba mukelenge, bakabenzela bibi, bakabashiha." 
Matthew22:7 Mukelenge wakadi ne tshishi, wakatuma masalayi andi, wakashiha batahianganyi aba, wakosha musoko wabo." 
Matthew22:8 Hashishe, yeye wakambila bantu bandi ne, Bintu bia dibanji bidi bilongolola, kadi bantu banakulayila kabena bimpe." 
Matthew22:9 Yai bienu mu masanga a misesu, nubikile banuamona ku disanka dia dibanji." 
Matthew22:10 Bantu bandi bakaya mu misesu, bakasangisha bantu bonso bakamonabo, babi ne bimpe; mu nsubu wa disanka dia dibanji muakadi benyi tente." 
Matthew22:11 Kadi hakabuela mukelenge bua kumona benyi, wakamonamu muntu wakadi kai ne tshilulu tshia dibanji." 
Matthew22:12 Mukelenge wakamukonka ne, Ka, mulunda, wakubuela munomo, kui ne tshilulu tshia dibanji? Muntu wakahua." 
Matthew22:13 Mukelenge wakambila bantu bandi ne, Numusuike ku bianza ne ku makasa, numuimashe ha bula mu midima. Muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu." 
Matthew22:14 Bualu bua bantu ba bungi badi babikidibua, kadi banya-banya badi basungudibua." 
Matthew22:15 Hashishe, Bafalese bakaya, bakasangisha mei abo ne, Netumukuate ku mei andi munyi?" 
Matthew22:16 Bakatuma bayidi babo kudiye ne Bena Helode, bakamuambila ne, Muyishi, tudi bamanye ne, Wewe udi muena bushua, udi uyisha bantu nshila wa Nzambi bulelela, wewe kuena utshina bantu, bualu bua kuena ne bualu ne muntu;" 
Matthew22:17 utuambile mûdi wamba munda muebe: Mbimpe kuha Kaisa mulambu, anyi?" 
Matthew22:18 Kadi Yesu wakamanya budimu buabo, wakabakonka ne, Nuenu bena lubombo, nudi nuntetshila munda tshinyi?" 
Matthew22:19 Nundeshe tshidibo balambula nʼatshi. Bakalua ne ndenalio. 
Matthew22:20 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Tshindidimbi etshi ne mei â adi mafundahu mbia nganyi?" 
Matthew22:21 Bakamuambila ne, Mbia Kaisa. Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuhe Kaisa bintu bia Kaisa, nuhe Nzambi bintu bia Nzambi." 
Matthew22:22 Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakakema, bakamushîa, bakaya." 
Matthew22:23 Dituku adi Basadoke bakalua kudi Yesu, badi bamba ne, Dibika dia ku lufu kadienaku; bakamukonka ne," 
Matthew22:24 Muyishi, Mose wakamba ne, Biafua mulume, kai ne bana, muanʼabo abake mukashi wandi, alelele muanʼabo wakufua bana." 
Matthew22:25 Munkatshi muetu muakadi balume muanda mutekete ba difu dimue; wa kumudilu wakabaka mukashi, wakafua biandi, kakadi ne bana, wakashîa mukashi wandi mu bianza bia muanʼabo;" 
Matthew22:26 muibidi wakadi nʼandi nunku, ne muisatu tô ne wa muanda mutekete." 
Matthew22:27 Hakafua buonso buabo, mukashi wakafua." 
Matthew22:28 Balume bakadi muanda mutekete; yeye neikale mukashi wa mulume kai, halua dibika dia ku lufu? Bualu bua bakadi nʼandi buonso buabo." 
Matthew22:29 Kadi Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nudi nuhambuka, kanuena bamanye Mukanda wa Nzambi ne bukole buandi." 
Matthew22:30 Halua dibika dia ku lufu, kabena babaka, kabena babakibua, badi bu banjelo ba mu diulu." 
Matthew22:31 Bualu bua dibika dia bafue ku lufu nuenu kanuakabala dî diakanuambila Nzambi, anyi, ne," 
Matthew22:32 Ndi bianyi Nzambi wa Abalahama, ne Nzambi wa Isaka, ne Nzambi wa Yakoba? Nzambi kena wa bafue, udi wa badi ne muoyo." 
Matthew22:33 Hakunvua bisumbu bia bantu dî edi, diyisha diandi diakabakemesha." 
Matthew22:34 Hakunvua Bafalese ne, Yesu wakahuisha Basadoke, bakadisangisha hamue." 
Matthew22:35 Munkatshi muabo muakadi mumanyi wa mikenshi, yeye wakakonka Yesu bua kumuteta munda ne," 
Matthew22:36 Muyishi, mukenshi kai udi mutambe mikuabo yonso?" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Sua Mukelenge Nzambi webe ne mutshima webe wonso ne muoyo webe wonso ne lungenyi luebe luonso." 
Matthew22:38 Ke mukenshi munene, udi wa kumudilu." 
Matthew22:39 Muibidi udi mufuanangane nʼau ne, Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue." 
Matthew22:40 Mikenshi yonso ya Mose ne mei a baprofete bidi bikudika ku mikenshi ei ibidi. 
Matthew22:41 Hakadi Bafalese badisangisha nunku, Yesu wakabakonka ne," 
Matthew22:42 Nudi nuamba munda muenu ne, Kilisto udi nganyi? Yeye udi muana wa nganyi? Bakamuambila ne, Yeye udi muana wa Davidi." 
Matthew22:43 Yesu wakabakonka kabidi ne, Davidi udi umubikila mu Nyuma Muimpe ne, Mukelenge, munyi? Wakamba ne," 
Matthew22:44 Mukelenge wakambila Mukelenge wanyi ne, Shikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume Tô ne hanateka badi nʼebe lukuna munshi mua makasa ebe." 
Matthew22:45 Biamubikila Davidi ne, Mukelenge, yeye udi muanʼandi munyi?" 
Matthew22:46 Kakuakadi muntu wakamanya mua kumukudimuna dî, dituku adi tô tshiendelele muntu kakadi ne bukitu bua kumukonka bualu." 
Matthew23:1 Hashishe, Yesu wakambila bisumbu bia bantu ne bayidi bandi ne," 
Matthew23:2 Bafundi ne Bafalese badi bashikama mu nkuasa wa Mose; 
Matthew23:3 nuenze, nutumikile malu onso adibo banuambila; kadi kanuenji malu adibo benza; bualu bua bobo batu bamba, kadi kabatu benza." 
Matthew23:4 Bulelela, badi basuika majitu manene, bâteka ha maha a bantu, kabena babakuatshisha ne munu umue." 
Matthew23:5 Badi benza malu abo onso anu bualu bua bantu babamone; badi badiundisha nfulakatelio yabo badi badiundisha mibanga ya bikowelu biabo," 
Matthew23:6 hayabo ku bidia bia disanka, badi basue muaba munene, badi basue nkuasa minene mu nsunagoga," 
Matthew23:7 badi basue bantu babasekelele mu bisalu, badi basue bantu bababikile ne, Labi." 
Matthew23:8 Kadi nuenu kanubikidibu ne, Labi, bualu bua nuenu nudi ne muyishi umue, buonso buenu nudi bana ba muntu umue." 
Matthew23:9 Kanubikidi muntu wa ha buloba ne, Tatu wetu, bualu bua nuenu nudi ne Tatu umue, yeye udi mu diulu." 
Matthew23:10 Kanubikidibu ne, Bakelenge, bualu bua mukelenge wenu udi umue, Kilisto mene." 
Matthew23:11 Udi mutambe bunene munkatshi muenu neikale muena mudimu wenu. 
Matthew23:12 Wadibandisha nebamuhuekeshe, wadihuekesha nebamubandishe." 
Matthew23:13 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo, mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu bua nuenu nudi nuinshidila bantu tshibi tshia bukelenge bua mu diulu; nuenu kanuena nubuelamu, kanuena nuitabusha bua bakuabo badi basue kubuela babuele!" 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo, mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu bua nuenu nudi nunyunguluka mai manene ne buloba bua kuitabushisha nasha muntu umue bualu buenu; kadi bitabusheye, nudi numuvuisha muana wa mu Ngena munutambe nuenu bubi misangu ibidi!" 
Matthew23:16 Nuenu balombodi bafofo, mulau ulualua kunudi! Nudi nuamba ne, Muntu udi uditshiha mutshihu ne, Ntempelo, kena musuika, kadi muntu udi uditshiha mutshihu ne, Ngolo wa mu ntempelo, udi musuikibue ku mutshihu wandi." 
Matthew23:17 Nuenu nudi bafofo bahote, tshintu kai tshidi tshitambe tshikuabo, ngolo anyi ntempelo ngudi uvuisha ngolo wa tshijila?" 
Matthew23:18 Biaditshiha muntu mutshihu ne, Tshishihelu, kambualu; kadi biaditshiha muntu mutshihu ne, Tshidi tshifila ha tshishihelu, udi musuikibue ku mutshihu wandi," 
Matthew23:19 Nuenu bafofo, tshintu kai tshidi tshitambe tshikuabo, tshidi tshifila anyi tshishihelu tshidi tshivuisha tshidi tshifila tshia tshijila?" 
Matthew23:20 Waditshiha mutshihu kudi tshishihelu udi uditshiha mutshihu kudi tshishihelu ne kudi bintu bionso bidihu. 
Matthew23:21 Waditshiha mutshihu kudi ntempelo udi uditshiha mutshihu kudi ntempelo ne kudi utu wikalamu. 
Matthew23:22 Waditshiha mutshihu kudi diulu udi uditshiha mutshihu kudi nkuasa wa Nzambi ne kudi utu washikamahu. 
Matthew23:23 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo! Mulau ulualua kunudi; bualu bua nuenu nutu nuafila tshia dikumi tshia luenyi, ne tshia tshidibiʼa luenyi, ne tshia tshikote, kadi nuakulekela kuenza malu makole a mikenshi ya Nzambi, bulelela ne luse ne ditabusha; biakadi bimpe bia nuenu kuenza malu â a ku nyima, kambimpe nulengulule mua kuenza malu au a ku mpala kabidi." 
Matthew23:24 Nuenu balombodi bafofo, nudi numusha kishi kakese mu maluvu, nudi numina kamelu!" 
Matthew23:25 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo! Mulau ulualua kunudi; bualu bua nuenu nutu nûvua ha nyima ha luhanza ne dilonga, kadi munda muabi mudi bunyengi ne mudi." 
Matthew23:26 Wewe Mufalese mufofo, diambedi uvua munda mua luhanza ne dilonga, nunku ha nyima hadi kabidi nehikale hatoke." 
Matthew23:27 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo, mulau ulualua kunudi! Nudi bu nkita mitokesha ha nyima, ha nyima hadi himpe ku mesu, kadi munda muai mudi mule tente ne mifuba ya bafue ne bukoya bua mishindu yonso." 
Matthew23:28 Nunku nuenu nudi bakane ku mesu kua bantu, kadi munda muenu mudi mûle tente ne lubombo ne tshishiku." 
Matthew23:29 Nuenu bafundi ne Bafalese, nudi bena lubombo! Mulau ulualua kunudi; bualu bua nuenu nutu mubaka nkita ya baprofete, nutu nulengesha nkita ya bantu bakane," 
Matthew23:30 nutu nuamba ne, Bu tuetu bikale mu matuku a bankambua betu, katuakadi kubuelakana nʼabo bua kushiha baprofete." 
Matthew23:31 Nudi nudituisha ne, Tudi bana ba bashihi ba baprofete." 
Matthew23:32 Ushai bienu tshihimu tshia bankambua benu ne malu mabi. 
Matthew23:33 Nuenu nyoka, ne bana ba nyoka, nudi bamanye mua kuhanduka dihila dia mu Ngena munyi?" 
Matthew23:34 Meme ndi nutumina baprofete ne bena meshi ne bafundi: nuenu nenushihe bakuabo tshianana, bakuabo ha mitshi mitshiamakane; nenukume bakuabo mu nsunagoga yenu, nenubalonde bua kubakengesha ku musoko ne ku musoko;" 
Matthew23:35 nunku mashi onso a bantu bakane akumata hanshi nealue ha bianza bienu, mashi a Ebele muntu muakane tô ne mashi a Zekâya, muana wa Balakia, unuakashihela hankatshi ha ntempelo ne tshishihelu." 
Matthew23:36 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Malu â onso nealue kudi bantu ba tshikondo etshi." 
Matthew23:37 Wewe Yelushalema, Yelushalema, udi ushiha baprofete, udi ukuma bakukutuminabo mabue! Misangu ya bungi nakasua kusangisha bana bebe bu mudi nsolo usangisha bana bandi mu mahuahua andi, kadi nuenu nuakuhidia." 
Matthew23:38 Nsubu wenu udi mushale hatuhu. 
Matthew23:39 Ndi nuambila ne, Kanuena nuntangila tô ne hanuamba ne, Udi ulua mu dina dia Mukelenge udi ne disanka." 
Matthew24:1 Yesu wakumuka mu ntempelo, wakadi uya mu nshila, bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye bualu bua kumulesha nsubu ya ntempelo." 
Matthew24:2 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Nudi nutangila bintu ebi bionso, anyi? Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Kabena bashîa dibue dimue ha mutu ha dikuabo, nebâsasule buonso buau." 
Matthew24:3 Hakadiye ushikama ku mukuna wa Oleve, bayidi bakalua kudiye nkayabo, bakamukonka ne, Utuambile dituku dialua malu â; utuambile tshimanyinu tshia hawalua tshiakabidi; ne tshia kunshikidilu kua tshikondo etshi." 
Matthew24:4 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nuende badimuke, muntu kanuhambuishi." 
Matthew24:5 Bualu bua ba bungi nebalue mu dina dianyi, bamba ne, Meme ndi Kilisto; nebahambuishe bantu ba bungi." 
Matthew24:6 Nenuamue bualu bua nvita ne ngumu ya nvita; dimukai, kanuhampakanyi: malu au nealue bulelela, kadi nshikidilu kena muanze kulua." 
Matthew24:7 Tshisamba tshikuabo netshiluangane ne tshinga, bukelenge bukuabo nebuluangane ne bunga biole nebikaleku ne buloba nebukanke ku nseke ne ku nseke." 
Matthew24:8 Kadi malu â adi tshibangidilu tshia kanyinganyinga. 
Matthew24:9 Nebanufile mu dikenga, nebanushihe; bisamba bionso nebikale nʼenu lukuna bua dina dianyi." 
Matthew24:10 Hashishe, ba bungi nebalenduke, nebafilangane ku bilumbu, nebikalangane ne lukuna." 
Matthew24:11 Baprofete badi ne mashimi ba bungi nebabike, nebahambuishe ba bungi," 
Matthew24:12 Dinanga dia ba bungi nedikehe, bualu bua tshishiku tshiakudiunda munda muabo." 
Matthew24:13 Kadi wananukila tô ne kunshikidilu neasungidibue. 
Matthew24:14 Nebambile bantu bonso ba ha buloba lumu luimpe elu lua bukelenge buanyi, neluikale tshimanyishilu ku bisamba bionso; hashishe, nshikidilu nealue." 
Matthew24:15 Nunku hanuamona tshinyanga tshia dibutuka, tshiakambabo kudi muprofete Danyele, tshimane mu muaba wa tshijila (udi ubala bualu ebu amanye biandi)," 
Matthew24:16 ku tshikondo atshi badi mu Yudaya banyemena ku mikuna; 
Matthew24:17 udi ha mutu ha nsubu katulukl bua kumusha bidi mu nsubu; 
Matthew24:18 udi mu budimi kahinganyi bua kuangata tshvualu tshiandi. 
Matthew24:19 Kadi dikenga dikole nedikale kudi badi ne mafu ne kudi badi bâmusha bana mabele mu matuku au. 
Matthew24:20 Nulombe Nzambi ne, Kunyema kuetu kakulu mu tshidimu tshia mashika ne mu dituku dia Lumingu;" 
Matthew24:21 hualu bua ku tshikondo etshi dikenga dinene nedilue; ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba tô ne katataka kakuakadi dikenga bu adi nunku, kadiena dilua kabidi tshiendelele." 
Matthew24:22 Bu matuku au kâi makeheshibue kudi Nzambi, nasha muntu wakadi kuhanduka; kadi Yeye neateheshe matuku au bualu bua badibo basungula kudi Nzambi." 
Matthew24:23 Bianuambila muntu ne, Kilisto udi aha, anyi, haha; kanumuitabushi." 
Matthew24:24 Bualu bua ba-Kilisto ba mashimi nebalue, ne baprofete ba mashimi, nebaleshe bantu bimanyinu binene ne malu a kukema bualu bua kuhambuisha badi basungula kadi Nzambi mene mene; biamanyabo mua kuenza nunku." 
Matthew24:25 Unvuai! nakunuambila diambedi. 
Matthew24:26 Bianuambilabo ne, Yeye udi mu tshihela, kanuyi; anyi ne, Yeye udi mu tusubu tua tshisokomenu, kanuitabushi." 
Matthew24:27 Bu muele wa nvula udi uhenya ku esete, ne udi umueneka ku wesete; kulua kua Muana wa muntu nekuikale nunku." 
Matthew24:28 Bikololo bitu biadisangisha hadi tshintu tshibole. 
Matthew24:29 Hashika dikenga dia matuku au, diba nedifikuluke, ngondo kena ukenka, mitoto neituke mûlu, neihone, nebanyukule bukole buakadi buendesha bintu ebi mu diulu;" 
Matthew24:30 hashishe, tshimanyinu tshia Muana wa muntu netshimueneke mu diulu; bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebidile, nebimone Muana wa muntu ulua ha matutu a mu diulu ne bukole buandi ne butumbi buandi bunene." 
Matthew24:31 Yeye neatume banjelo bandi ne mpungi wa dî dikole, nebasangishe bakusunguleye ba ku mpehele inai, kunfudilu kukuabo kua diulu tô ne kukuabo." 
Matthew24:32 Nuyile lusumuinu lua mutshi wa nfigi; hatoloka lutonga luau lutekete, hasampila mabeshi alu, nenumanye ne, Tshidimu tshia mayowa tshidi ha buihi;" 
Matthew24:33 nunku nuenu kabidi, hanuamona malu â onso, nenumanye ne, Yeye udi ha buihi, udi ku mbelu mene mene." 
Matthew24:34 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bantu ba tshikondo etshi kabena bashika tô ne hashika malu â onso." 
Matthew24:35 Diulu ne buloba nebijimine, kadi mei anyi kêna ajimina." 
Matthew24:36 Kadi bua dituku adi ne ha diba adi kakuena muntu udi mumanye, banjelo mene mene ba mu diulu kabena bamanye, Muana kena mumanye, anu Tatu udi mumanye." 
Matthew24:37 Kulua kua Muana wa muntu nekuikale bu muakadi ha matuku a Noa. 
Matthew24:38 Ha matuku au, nvula ya bungi kayi mianze kulua, bantu bakadi badia, bakadi banua, bakadi babaka, bakadi babakibua tô ne hakalua dituku diakabuela Noa mu buatu bunene," 
Matthew24:39 kabakamanya bualu tô ne hakalua nvula ya bungi kubabutula; kulua kua Muana wa muntu nekuikale nunku. 
Matthew24:40 Dituku adi balume babidi nebikale mu budimi; nebangate mukuabo, nebashie mukuabo;" 
Matthew24:41 bakashi babidi nebikale bahela, nebangate mukuabo, nebashîe mukuabo." 
Matthew24:42 Dimukai, bualu bua kanuena bamanye dituku dialua Mukelenge wenu." 
Matthew24:43 Nudi bamanye ne, Bu muena nsubu mumanye diba dialua muibi butuku, wakadi kutabala, nsubu wandi kakadi kutubuka disoso." 
Matthew24:44 Nunku nuenu kabidi nudilongolole, bualu bua Muana wa muntu nealue ha diba dinudi kanui belangane meshi." 
Matthew24:45 Muhika kai udi ulamata nfumu wandi, udi ne meshi? Nfumu wandi wakamuteka ha mutu ha bantu bandi bualu bua kubaha bia kudia halua dituku diabi." 
Matthew24:46 Muhika au neikale ne disanka, hahingana nfumu wandi, hamusanganeye wenza nunku." 
Matthew24:47 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye neamuteke ha mutu ha bintu biandi bionso." 
Matthew24:48 Kadi biamba muhika au mubi munda munda ne, Nfumu wanyi kena ulua katataka;" 
Matthew24:49 biabangeye kukuma bahika nʼandi, biadieye bidia, bianueye mitutu hohamue ne badi bakuatshike maluvu," 
Matthew24:50 nfumu wa muhika au nealue dituku didiye kai mutekemene ne ha diba didiye kai mumanye," 
Matthew24:51 neamukose hankatshi, neamuteke mu luseke lua bena lubombo; muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu." 
Matthew25:1 Dituku adi bukelenge bua mu diulu nebuikale bu mishikankunde dikumi, yakangata minda yai, yakaya kuakidila mubaki wa mukashi." 
Matthew25:2 Mishikankunde itanu yakadi mihote, minga itanu yakadi ne meshi." 
Matthew25:3 Hakangata mihote minda yai, kayakaya ne manyi makuabo;" 
Matthew25:4 yakadi ne meshi yakaya ne manyi mu mpanza, ne minda." 
Matthew25:5 Mubaki wa mukashi kakalua lubilu, mishikankunde yonso yakadi ibunga tulu, yakalala." 
Matthew25:6 Hakalua mundankulu, bakela mbila ne, Tangilai, mubaki wa mukashi! Luai kumuakidila." 
Matthew25:7 Mishikankunde ai yonso yakabika, yakalongolola minda." 
Matthew25:8 Mihote yakambila yakadi ne meshi ne, Nutuheku manyi bualu bua minda yetu ikadi ijima." 
Matthew25:9 Kadi yakadi ne meshi yakandamuna ne, Tudi tuela meshi ne, Manyi kêna akumbana bualu buetu ne buenu; nudi mua kuya kudi bahanyi, nudisumbile." 
Matthew25:10 Hakayai bua kusumba manyi, mubaki wa mukashi wakalua; yakadi ne bintu biai bilongolola yakabuela nʼandi ku disanka dia dibanji; bakinshila tshibi." 
Matthew25:11 Hashishe, mishikankunde mikuabo yakalua, yakamba ne, Mukelenge, Mukelenge, utunzuluile." 
Matthew25:12 Kadi yeye wakandamuna ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Tshiena munumanye." 
Matthew25:13 Dimukai, kanuena bamanye dituku ne ha diba." 
Matthew25:14 Bukelenge bua mu diulu budi bu muntu wakamba kuya ku luseke lukuabo, wakabikila bantu bandi, wakafila bintu biandi mu bianza biabo." 
Matthew25:15 Yeye wakaha mukuabo ntalanta itanu, mukuabo ntalanta ibidi, mukuabo ntalanta umue, muntu bu mu lungenyi luandi muntu bu mu lungenyi luandi; wakaya ku luendu." 
Matthew25:16 Wakadi ne ntalanta itanu wakaya lukasa, wakenda nʼai mushinga, wakaheta minga ntalanta itanu." 
Matthew25:17 Nunku wakadi ne ntalanta ibidi wakaheta minga ibidi. 
Matthew25:18 Kadi wakadi ne ntalanta umue wakaya biandi, wakimba dina mu buloba, wakasokoka ntalanta wa mukelenge wandi." 
Matthew25:19 Hakaleha musangu mule, mukelenge wa bantu aba wakalua, wakabala nʼabo bintu." 
Matthew25:20 Wakadi muangate ntalanta itanu wakalua, wakatuala ntalanta itanu mikuabo, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, wewe wakampa ntalanta itanu, mona, nakuheta minga itanu." 
Matthew25:21 Mukelenge wandi wakamuambila ne, Bimpe, muana wanyi muimpe ne muntumikidi, wewe wakadi untumikila hawakadi ha mutu ha bintu bikese, nenkuteke ha mutu ha bintu bia bungi, buela mu disanka dia mukelenge webe." 
Matthew25:22 Wakadi muangate ntalanta ibidi wakalua, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, wewe wakampa ntalanta ibidi, mona, nakuheta minga ibidi." 
Matthew25:23 Mukelenge wandi wakamuambila ne, Bimpe, muana wanyi muimpe ne muntumikidi, wewe wakadi untumina hawakadi ha mutu ha bintu bikese, nenkuteke ha mutu ha bintu bia bungi, buela mu disanka dia mukelenge webe." 
Matthew25:24 Wakadi muangate ntalanta umue wakalua, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, nakamanya ne, Wewe udi muena tshinyangu, utu wahuola biudi kui mukune, utu wasangisha biudi kui mutangadishe;" 
Matthew25:25 nakatshina, nakaya, nakasokoka ntalanta webe mu buloba, tshintu tshiebe katshitshi." 
Matthew25:26 Mukelenge wandi wakamuandamuna ne, Wewe udi muhika mubi, udi mufuba, wewe udi mumanye ne, Meme ntu ngahuola bindi tshi mukune, ntu ngasangisha bindi tshî mutangadishe;" 
Matthew25:27 biakadi bimpe bia wewe kufila mpalata wanyi mu bianza bia basombeshanganyi, nunku hanakulua, nakadi kuangata ntalanta wanyi ne tshia kasombela." 
Matthew25:28 Numunyenge ntalanta, nuhe udi ne ntalanta dikumi." 
Matthew25:29 Udi ne bintu nebamuhe binga bintu, neikale ne bia bungi; udi kai ne tshintu nebamunyenge tshidiye nʼatshi." 
Matthew25:30 Imashai muhika mulembakane mu mîdima, muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu." 
Matthew25:31 Halua Muana wa muntu mu butumbi buandi ne banjelo bonso, neashikame mu nkuasa wa butumbi buandi;" 
Matthew25:32 bisamba bionso nebisangakane ku mpala kuandi, yeye neabatahulule bu mudi mulami utahulula mikoko ne mbushi;" 
Matthew25:33 neateke mikoko ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ne mbushi ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi. 
Matthew25:34 Hashishe, Mukelenge neambile badi ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume ne, Luai, nudi nusankishibua kudi Tatu wanyi, nuhiane bukelenge buakunulongoluelabo ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba;" 
Matthew25:35 bualu bua nakadi ne nsala, nuakampa bia kudia; nakadi ne nyota, nuakampa bia kunua; nakadi bianyi muenyi, nuakambuesha mu nsubu;" 
Matthew25:36 nakadi butaka, nuakanduatshisha; nakadi nsama, nuakalua kunsombesha; nakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu, nuakalua kundi." 
Matthew25:37 Hashikisheye kubambila nunku, bantu bakane nebamukonke ne, Mukelenge, dituku kai dituakakutangila ne nsala, tuakudisha? Ne nyota, tuakunuisha?" 
Matthew25:38 Dituku kai dituakakutangila mulue muenyi, tuakubuesha mu nsubu? Ne butaka, tuakuluatshisha?" 
Matthew25:39 Dituku kai dituakakutangila usama ne mu nsubu wa lukanu, tualua kûdi?" 
Matthew25:40 Mukelenge neabambile ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bualu bua nuenu nuakenzela umue wa mu bana betu badi batambe kuhuekela nunku, nuakangenzela meme." 
Matthew25:41 Yeye neambile kabidi badi ku tshianza tshia bakashi ne, Umukai kundi, nudi ne mulau, nuye mu kahia ka tshiendelele kadi katemeshela diabolo ne banjelo bandi;" 
Matthew25:42 nakadi ne nsala, kanuakampa tshia kudia; nakadi ne nyota, kanuakampa tshia kunua;" 
Matthew25:43 nakadi bianyi muenyi, kanuakambuesha mu nsubu; nakadi butaka, kanuakanduatshisha; nakadi nsama, nakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu, kanuakalua kunsombesha." 
Matthew25:44 Bobo kabidi nebamukonke ne, Mukelenge, dituku kai dituakakutangila ne nsala ne nyota ne buenyi ne butaka ne disama ne mu nsubu wa lukanu, tuahanga kukukuatshisha?" 
Matthew25:45 Yeye neabambile ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bualu bua nuenu kanuakenzela umue wa mu bantu aba badi batambe kuhuekela nunku, kanuakangenzela meme." 
Matthew25:46 Bantu aba nebaye mu dikenga dia tshiendelele, kadi bantu bakane nebaye mu muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Matthew26:1 Hakashikisha Yesu kuamba mei â onso, wakambila bayidi bandi ne," 
Matthew26:2 Nudi bamanye ne, Hahita matuku abidi, Kuhita kua Yehowa nekulue, nebafile Muana wa muntu bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew26:3 Dituku adi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bakulu ba bantu bakadisangisha mu nsubu wa muakuidi munene, dina diandi Kayafa;" 
Matthew26:4 bakasangisha dî diabo bua kukuata Yesu mu busokoko, ne bua kumushiha." 
Matthew26:5 Kadi bakamba ne, Kabenji nunku mu matuku a disanka dia kuhita kua Yehowa, bua diyoyo kadijuki munkatshi mua bantu." 
Matthew26:6 Hakadi Yesu mu Betania, mu nsubu wa Simona muena nsudi," 
Matthew26:7 mukashi wakalua kudiye ne mulondo wa alabasta, mu mulondo muakadi mananashi a mushinga mutambe bukole, wakamuelau ha mutu handi, hakadiye mushikame udia bidia." 
Matthew26:8 Hakamona bayidi bualu ebu, bakadi ne tshishi, bakamba ne, Bakunyangila mananashi nunku bua tshinyi?" 
Matthew26:9 Bakadi kunjiana ku bintu bia bungi bia kuha bantu bahele. 
Matthew26:10 Hakamanya Yesu dî edi diakambabo, yeye wakabambila ne, Nudi nutatshishila mukashi tshinyi? Yeye wakungenzela bimpe." 
Matthew26:11 Nudi ne bahele matuku onso munkatshi muenu, kadi kanuena nʼanyi meme matuku onso." 
Matthew26:12 Yeye wakungela mananashi â hamʼbidi hanyi, Wakenza nunku bua kundongolola ha kunjikabo." 
Matthew26:13 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Mu miaba yonso ya ha buloba buonso yambabo lumu elu luimpe, nebambe kabidi bualu buakuenza mukashi eu, buikale tshivulukidi tshiandi." 
Matthew26:14 Mukuabo wa bayidi dikumi ne babidi, dina diandi Yudasa Isakaliote, wakaya kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi," 
Matthew26:15 wakamba ne, Nenumpe tshinyi, nmufile mu bianza bienu? Bakidikisha bujitu bua bituha bia mpalata makumi asatu, bakamuhabi." 
Matthew26:16 Ku dituku adi yeye wakakebakeba mua kumufila mu bianza biabo. 
Matthew26:17 Hakalua dituku dia kumudilu dia disanka dia bidia bidi kabi biela luevene, bayidi bakahia kudi Yesu, bakamukonka ne, Udi musue tulongolole ha wewe kudila Kuhita kua Yehowa kudi kunyi?" 
Matthew26:18 Yeye wakamba ne, Yai mu tshimenga kudi mulume unuasangila nʼandi, numuambile ne, Muyishi udi wamba ne, Dituku dianyi diakulua, nendile bidia bia Kuhita kua Yehowa mu nsubu muebe ne bayidi banyi." 
Matthew26:19 Bayidi bakenza bu muakabambila Yesu; bakalongolola Kuhita kua Yehowa. 
Matthew26:20 Hakabuela diba, Yesu wakadi mushikame udia bidia ne bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi;" 
Matthew26:21 hakadibo badia, yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muanʼenu mukuabo neantungile tshitungu!" 
Matthew26:22 Mitshima yabo yakatamba kunyingalala, bakabanga kumukonka ku muntu ku muntu ne, Mukelenge, mmeme, anyi?" 
Matthew26:23 Yeye wakandamuna ne, Wakutua nʼanyi bidia mu dilonga dimue neantungile tshitungu." 
Matthew26:24 Muana wa muntu udi uya bu muakamufundabo; kadi mulau neulue kudi udi utungila Muana wa muntu tshitungu; biakadi bimpe bu muntu eu kai muledibue. 
Matthew26:25 Yudasa, mumutungidi, wakamukonka ne, Labi, mmeme, anyi? Yesu wakamuambila ne, Nguewe wakuamba." 
Matthew26:26 Hakadibo badia, Yesu wakamema bidia, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakabitshibula, wakaha bayidi bandi, wakamba ne, Angatai, diai bienu; ebi bidi mubidi wanyi." 
Matthew26:27 Wakamena luhanza, wakasakidila Nzambi, wakabaha ne, Nuai buonso buenu;" 
Matthew26:28 bualu bua elu ludi mashi anyi a dihungila, akamatshila bantu ba bungi bualu bua kubajimishila mibi yabo." 
Matthew26:29 Ndi nuambila ne, Tshiena nua maluvu kabidi tô ne halua dituku dinanua nʼenu maluvu mahia-mahia mu bukelenge bua Tatu wanyi." 
Matthew26:30 Hakimbabo musambu, bakaluhuka, bakaya ku mukuna wa Oleve." 
Matthew26:31 Yesu wakabambila ne, Buonso buenu nenulenduke bua bualu buanyi butuku ebu: bua bakafunda ne, Nenshihe mulami wa mikoko, tshisumbu tshiai netshitangadike." 
Matthew26:32 Kadi hanabika, nenye ku mpala kuenu mu Galela." 
Matthew26:33 Petelo wakamuandamuna ne, Bialenduka bakuabo bonso, meme tshiena ndenduka tshiendelele," 
Matthew26:34 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Butuku ebu mene, tshitala katshi tshianze kusama, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu." 
Matthew26:35 Petelo wakamuambila ne, Bikala bualu bunkuata bua kufua nʼebe, tshiena nkuhidia. Bayidi bonso bakamba muomumue." 
Matthew26:36 Hashishe, Yesu wakalua nʼabo mu muaba wakadibo babikila ne, Getesemane, yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Shikamai aha, meme nenye eku bua kutendelela Nzambi." 
Matthew26:37 Wakaya biandi ne Petelo ne bana babidi ba Zebedayo, wakabanga kunyingalala mutshima, mutshima wandi wakatamba kunema." 
Matthew26:38 Yeye wakabambila ne, Mutshima wanyi udi utamba kunyingalala, lufu nduntonda; nushale aha, nuikale nʼanyi tshitabala." 
Matthew26:39 Wakaya biandi ku mpala tshituha, wakatua mpala hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakamba ne, Tatu wanyi, biwamanya mua kuenza nunku, luhanza elu lûmuke kundi; kadi bualu buenjibua bu mûdi musue, kabuenjibu bu mundi musue," 
Matthew26:40 Wakalua kudi bayidi, wakabasangana balale tulu, wakambila Petelo ne, Nuenu kanuakumanya mua kuikala nʼanyi tshitabala tshituha tshimue tshia diba bualu kai?" 
Matthew26:41 Nudimuke, nutendelela Nzambi; nunku kanuhonyi mu mateyi; mutshima udi musue nunku, kadi mubidi udi mutekete." 
Matthew26:42 Wakaya tshiakabidi, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakamba ne, Tatu wanyi, bikala luhanza elu kalui lumanya mua kumuka kundi, bikala bualu bunkuata bua kulunua, bualu buenjibue bu mûdi musue." 
Matthew26:43 Yeye wakalua kabidi, wakabasangana balale tulu, bualu bua mesu abo akadi maneme ne tulu." 
Matthew26:44 Yeye wakabashîa kabidi, wakaya, wakatendelela Nzambi tshiakasatu, wakadi wamba mei momumue." 
Matthew26:45 Hashishe, yeye wakalua kudi bayidi, wakabambila ne, Nudi nulala nuikisha! Diba diakufika, Muana wa muntu udi mufila mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Matthew26:46 Bikai, tuye; tangilai, muntungidi udiku." 
Matthew26:47 Hakatshidiye wamba nunku, Yudasa, mukuabo wa mu ba dikumi ne babidi, wakalua ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, bakadi ne miele ne bibonge, bafume kudi bakuidi banene ne bakulu ba bantu." 
Matthew26:48 Mutungidi wa Yesu wakabaha tshimanyinu ne, Unatuangana nʼandi mishiku, nyeye; numukuate." 
Matthew26:49 Yeye wakalua lukasa kudi Yesu, wakamuambila ne, Labi, muoyo; wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Mulunda wanyi, enza bualu buwakuluila. Hashishe, bakahia, bakalenga Yesu bianza, bakamukuata." 
Matthew26:51 Mukuabo wa bakadi ne Yesu wakolola tshianza, wakatula muele, wakataha muntu wa muakuidi munene, wakamukosa ditshu." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Hingasha muele webe mu muaba wau; bualu bua bonso badi bangata muele nebashihibue ku muele." 
Matthew26:53 Udi welangana meshi ne, Meme tshiena mumanye mua kulomba Tatu wanyi, yeye ampe banjelo batambe binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne bibidi, anyi?" 
Matthew26:54 Mei a mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Bualu ebu nebulue, ahu neashike bishi?" 
Matthew26:55 Hashishe, Yesu wakakonka tshisumbu tshia bantu ne, Nuakulua ne miele ne bibonge bua kunkuata bu mudibo bakuata munyengi munyi? Nakadi nshikama ku dituku ne ku dituku mu ntempelo, nyisha bantu, kanuakantuala." 
Matthew26:56 Kadi malu â onso akulua bua kushikisha mei akafunda baprofete mu Mukanda wandi. Hashishe, bayidi bandi bonso bakamushia, bakanyema." 
Matthew26:57 Bakuatshi ba Yesu bakaya nʼandi kua Kayafa, muakuidi wa Nzambi munene, bafundi ne bakulu ba bantu bakadi badisangisheku." 
Matthew26:58 Kadi Petelo wakamulonda ha bule ha bule tô ne ku luhangu lua muakuidi munene, wakabuelamu, wakashikama hamue ne tuhalai, bua kutangila hashikidila bualu." 
Matthew26:59 Bakuidi banene ne balumbuludi bonso bakakeba bamonyi ba mashimi, bua kubandabo Yesu bua kumushiha;" 
Matthew26:60 bamonyi ba bungi bakalua, kadi kabakasangana Yesu ne bualu. Kadi ku nyima babidi bakalua," 
Matthew26:61 bakamba ne, Muntu eu wakamba ne, Ndi mumanye mua kubumbula ntempelo wa Nzambi ne mua kumuihata kabidi matuku asatu." 
Matthew26:62 Muakuidi munene wakimana, wakambila Yesu ne, Wewe kuena wamba dî? Bualu ebu budi munyi budi bamonyi aba bakubanda?" 
Matthew26:63 Kadi Yesu wakahua. Muakuidi munene wakamuambila ne, Ndi nkutshihisha mu dina dia Nzambi udi ne muoyo, udi biebe Kilisto Muana wa Nzambi, anyi?" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Muomu; kadi ndi numanyisha ne, Ku dituku adi nenumone Muana wa muntu mushikame ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Bukole, ulua biandi ha matutu a mu diulu." 
Matthew26:65 Hashishe, muakuidi munene wakadihandila bilulu biandi, wakamba ne, Yeye wakuamba dî dia kuhenda Nzambi; ludi ne bualu bua bamanyi kabidi kudi kunyi? Nuakunvua tshihendu tshiandi;" 
Matthew26:66 nudi nuamba tshinyi? Bakandamuna ne, Mbimpe bamushihe." 
Matthew26:67 Hashishe, bakamutuila mate mu mesu, bakamukuma bisusu, bakuabo bakamukuma mikumu," 
Matthew26:68 bakamuebesha ne, Wewe Kilisto, utuambile wakukukuma nganyi?" 
Matthew26:69 Petelo wakadi mushikame ku bula mu luhangu; mukashi muenji wa mudimu wakalua kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Wewe kabidi wakadi ne Yesu, Muena Galela." 
Matthew26:70 Kadi yeye wakayila ku mesu kua buonso buabo ne, Tshiena mumanye tshiudi wamba." 
Matthew26:71 Hakayeye ku mbelu kua luhangu, mukashi mukuabo muenji wa mudimu wakamumona, wakambila bakadi bashikameku ne, Muntu eu wakadi ne Yesu wa mu Nazaleta." 
Matthew26:72 Yeye wakayila kabidi, wakaditshiha ne. Tshiena mumanye muntu eu." 
Matthew26:73 Hakahita tshituha tshihi, bakadi bimane ha buihi bakalua, bakambila Petelo ne, Bulelela, wewe udi wabo, bualu bua muaku webe udi ukusokolola." 
Matthew26:74 Yeye wakabanga kudiela milau ne kuditshiha ne, Tshiena mumanye muntu eu. Hakambeye dî edi, tshilala tshiakasama." 
Matthew26:75 Petelo wakavuluka di diakamba Yesu ne, Tshilala katshi tshianze kusama, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu. Yeye wakaluhuka, wakadila bikole." 
Matthew27:1 Hakatshia butuku, bakuidi banene bonso ne bakulu ba bantu bakasangisha dî diabo ne, Tushihai Yesu;" 
Matthew27:2 bakamusuika, bakaya nʼandi, bakamufila mu bianza bia ngovena Pilato." 
Matthew27:3 Hashishe, mutshima wa Yudasa, mumutungidi, wakatamba kunyingalala, hakamoneye ne, Bakumuhisha, wakahingana ne bituha bia mpalata makumi asatu kudi bakuidi banene ne kudi bakulu," 
Matthew27:4 wakamba ne, Nakuenza bibi bualu bua nakutungila muntu tshitungu udi kai ne bualu. Kadi bobo bakamuambila ne, Ebu mbualu buetu, anyi? Mbualu buebe." 
Matthew27:5 Wakimasha bituha bia mpalata hanshi mu ntempelo, wakumuka biandi, wakaya wakadiowa." 
Matthew27:6 Bakuidi banene bakangata bituha bia mpalata, bakamba ne, Kuteka bintu ebi mu tshibutshilu tshia Nzambi kudi kushiha mukenshi, bualu bua bidi mushinga wa mashi." 
Matthew27:7 Bakasangisha di diabo, bakasumba nʼabi muaba wakadi wa mufumbi wa bifuadi bualu bua kujikahu bantu ba bende." 
Matthew27:8 Ebu mbualu budibo babikila muaba au ne, Muaba wa mashi, tô ne katataka." 
Matthew27:9 Nunku bakashikisha dî diakambabo kudi muprofete Yelemiya ne, Bakangata bituha bia mpalata makumi asatu, muakatuabo mushinga wandi, bu mushinga wandi wakatuabo kudi Bena Isalele;" 
Matthew27:10 bakabifila bua kusumba muaba wakadi wa mufumbi wa bifuadi, bu muakadi dî dia Mukelenge." 
Matthew27:11 Yesu wakimana ku mpala kua ngovena Pilato; ngovena wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi? Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bûdi wamba mbulelela." 
Matthew27:12 Hakamubanda bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bakulu, yeye kakabandamuna dî." 
Matthew27:13 Pilato wakamukonka ne, Kuena unvua malu a bungi adibo bakubanda, anyi?" 
Matthew27:14 Yeye kakamuandamuna nasha di dimue; ngovena wakatamba kukema. 
Matthew27:15 Mu disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa ngovena wakadi ne tshilele tshia kulekelela bantu muena lukanu umue wakulombabo. 
Matthew27:16 Matuku au bakadi ne muena lukanu wa lumu lunene, dina diandi Balaba." 
Matthew27:17 Hakadisangishabo hohamue, Pilato wakabakonka ne, Nudi basue meme nulekelele nganyi? Balaba, anyi Yesu udibo babikila ne, Kilisto?" 
Matthew27:18 Yeye wakamanya ne, Bobo bakumufila bualu bua mukau." 
Matthew27:19 Hakadiye ushikama mu nkuasa wa bulumbuludi, mukashi wandi wakamutumina dî ne, Kubuedi mu bualu bua muntu muakane eu; lelu nakutamba kukenga mu tshilota bua bualu buandi." 
Matthew27:20 Bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bakulu bakenzesha bisumbu bia bantu ne, Nulombe Balaba, nushihe Yesu." 
Matthew27:21 Kadi ngovena wakabakonka ne, Badi babidi, nudi basue meme nulekelele nganyi? Bobo bakitaba ne, Balaba." 
Matthew27:22 Pilato wakabakonka ne, Ngenzele Yesu, udibo babikila ne, Kilisto, tshinyi? Bonso bakitaba ne, Bamushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew27:23 Wakabakonka ne, Kadi yeye wakuenza bualu bubi kai? Bakatamba kuela mbila ne, Bamushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew27:24 Hakatangila Pilato ne, Nakushikila, diyoyo dikadi ha kujuka, yeye wakangata mai, wakuha bianza ku mesu kua bantu bonso, wakamba ne, Tshiena ne mashi a muntu muakane eu bualu, mbualu buenu." 
Matthew27:25 Bantu bonso bakandamuna ne, Mashi andi ikale hamʼbidi hetu ne ha bana betu." 
Matthew27:26 Hashishe, yeye wakabalekela Balaba; kadi yeye wakakuma Yesu, wakamufila bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew27:27 Hashishe, masalayi a ngovena akaya ne Yesu mu nsubu munene wa ngovena, akadisangisha tshisumbu tshiau tshionso kuakadi Yesu." 
Matthew27:28 Akamuvula bilulu, akamuluatshisha tshikowelu tshikunze." 
Matthew27:29 Akaluka tshifulu tshia meba tshia bukelenge, akamuasatshi ku mutu, akateka mulangala mu tshianza tshiandi tshia balume; akatua binu hanshi ku mpala kuandi, akamuseka ne, Muoyo, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda." 
Matthew27:30 Akamutuila lute, akangata mulangala, akamukuma nʼau mu mutu wandi." 
Matthew27:31 Hakashikishau kuseka Yesu, akamuvula tshikowelu tshikunze, akamuluatshisha bilulu biandi, akaya nʼandi bua kumushiha ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew27:32 Hakaluhukau akasangana Muena Kule ne, dina diandi Simona, akamuenzesha ku bukole bua kutualeye mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Hakaluabo ku muaba, dina diau Gologota, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muaba wa Kabalubalu ka Mutu," 
Matthew27:34 bakamuha nvinyo musangisha ne bintu bia bululu ne, Unue; hakamulabuleye, wakahidia mua kunua." 
Matthew27:35 Hakamukuminabo milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bakabanyangana bilulu biandi, bela nʼabi nshobo;" 
Matthew27:36 bakashikama, bakamulamaku." 
Matthew27:37 Bakateka ha mutu handi bubandi buakamabandabo bufunda ne: Eu udi Yesu mukelenge wa Bena Yuda. 
Matthew27:38 Hashishe, bakakumina diakamue nʼandi banyengi babidi milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mitshi mitshiamakane, mukuabo ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume, munga ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi." 
Matthew27:39 Bahitshi ba mu nshila bakamuhenda, bakakuha mitu yabo," 
Matthew27:40 bakamba ne, Wewe muhudi wa ntempelo ne mumuibaki wa matuku asatu udisungile: biwikala Muana wa Nzambi, utuluke ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew27:41 Bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi ne bakulu bakamuseka nunku, bakamba ne," 
Matthew27:42 Yeye wakadi usungila bakuabo, kena mumanye mua kudisungila. Yeye udi Mukelenge wa Isalele; atuluke biandi ku mutshi mutshiamakane, netumuitabushe." 
Matthew27:43 Yeye udi weyemena Nzambi; Nzambi amusungile, bikaleye mumusue; hualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Ndi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Matthew27:44 Ne banyengi kabidi bakadi nʼandi ha mitshi mitshiamakane bakamuhenda nunku. 
Matthew27:45 Mîdima yakadi ha buloba buonso munda munya tô ne diba ha isatu. 
Matthew27:46 Hakafika diba ha isatu, Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakatani? Kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Nzambi wanyi, Nzambi wanyi, wakundekela tshinyi?" 
Matthew27:47 Bakuabo bakadi bimaneku, hakunvuabo dî edi, bakamba ne, Muntu eu udi Ubikila Eliya." 
Matthew27:48 Mukuabo wakaya lukasa, wakangata musukulampampa, wakaûisha tente ne nvinyo wakadi ne buanji, wakaubuesha ku mulangala, wakaha Yesu ne, Nua." 
Matthew27:49 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Lekela, tumone Eliya ne walua bua kumusungila." 
Matthew27:50 Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole kabidi, wakahuola muoyo wandi." 
Matthew27:51 Monai, tshilulu tshiakadi tshikudika mu ntempelo tshiakahandika bihesa bibidi ku mutu kuatshi tô ne kunshi, buloba buakakanka; mabue akahandika;" 
Matthew27:52 nkita yakabuluka; mibidi ya bungi ya bantu ba tshijila bakadi balale tulu mu lufu yakabishibua; 
Matthew27:53 hakabika Yesu bakaluhuka mu nkita, bakabuela mu musoko wa tshijila, bakamueneka kudi ba bungi." 
Matthew27:54 Kapitene ka masalayi lukama ne bakadi nʼandi balama Yesu, hakamonabo buloba bukanka ne malu makuabo akenjibua, bakatamba kutshina, bakamba ne, Bulelela, eu wakadi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Matthew27:55 Bakashi ba bungi bakadiku, bakadi batangidile ha bule, bobo bakadi Bena Galela, bakalua balonda Yesu bua kumukuatshisha;" 
Matthew27:56 munkatshi mua bakashi aba muakadi Maha wa ku Magadala, ne Malia mamu wa Yakobo ne Yose, ne mamu wa bana ba Zebedayo." 
Matthew27:57 Hakamba diba kuhueka, muntu mubanshi wa ku Alimataya, dina diandi Yosefe, wakalua, yeye kabidi wakadi muyidi wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Muntu eu wakaya kudi Pilato, wakalomba tshitalu tshia Yesu. Pilato wakamba dî diandi ne, Bamuhetshi." 
Matthew27:59 Yosefe wakangata tshitalu, wakatshinyengela ne tshilulu tshitoke tshia line," 
Matthew27:60 wakatshiladika mu lukita luandi luhia-luhia, luakadiye mumane kumbula mu dibue; wakabungulusha dibue dinene, wakaditeka ku mushiku wa mbelu wa lukita, wakaya biandi." 
Matthew27:61 Malia wa ku Magadala wakadiku, ne Malia mukuabo, bakadi bashikame batangile buludiludi bua lukita." 
Matthew27:62 Hakatshiabu, dituku dia ku mpala kua Dilongolola, bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne Bafalese bakadisangisha kudi Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 bakamba ne, Mukelenge, tudi bavuluke di dia muena mashimi au hakadiye ne muoyo ne, Hahita matuku asatu, nembike kabidi." 
Matthew27:64 Wewe amba di diebe ne, Balame lukita bimpe tô ne ku dituku disatu, nunku bayidi bandi kabalu kumuiba, bambila bantu ne, Yeye wakubika ku lufu; bienzabo nunku, dihanga dia ku mpala neditambe dia ku nyima bunene." 
Matthew27:65 Pilato wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudi ne balami, yai bienu, milulame ne lungenyi luonso lunudi nʼalu." 
Matthew27:66 Bakaya biabo, bakalama lukita bimpe, bakateka tshimanyishilu ku dibue, balami bakadi nʼabo." 
Matthew28:1 Dituku diabo dia kuikisha diakamba kushika; hakabanga butuku kutshia bua dituku dia kumudilu dia lumingu, Malia wa ku Magadala ne Malia mukuabo bakalua kutangila lukita." 
Matthew28:2 Monai, buloba buakakanka bikole; muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakahueka hanshi mufume mu diulu, wakalua, wakumusha dibue, wakashikamahu." 
Matthew28:3 Mpala wandi wakadi bu muele wa nvula, bilulu biandi biakadi bitoke tô bu neje;" 
Matthew28:4 balami bakamutshina, bakazakala, bakalua bu bantu bafue." 
Matthew28:5 Muanjelo wakandamuna bakashi ne, Kanuntshinyi; ndi mumanye ne, Nudi nukeba Yesu, wakashihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Matthew28:6 Yeye kena kunoko, wakubika bu muakambeye. Luai, numone muakadiye mulale." 
Matthew28:7 Yai bienu lubilu, nuambile bayidi bandi ne, Yeye wakubika ku lufu; monai, neadianjile ku mpala kuenu mu Galela, nenumumoneku; nakunuambila bualu ebu." 
Matthew28:8 Bakumuka lukasa ku lukita ne buowa ne disanka dinene, bakaya lubilu bua kumanyisha bayidi bandi." 
Matthew28:9 Yesu wakasangila nʼabo, wakabela muoyo. Bakalua kudiye, bakamukuata ku makasa, bakamukukuila." 
Matthew28:10 Hashishe, Yesu wakabambila ne, Kanutshinyi; yai bienu, nuambile bana betu ne, Yai mu Galela, nenunmoneku." 
Matthew28:11 Hakadibo baya, balami bakuabo bakalua mu musoko, bakambila bakuidi banene malu onso." 
Matthew28:12 Hakasangishabo ne bakulu, hakahungabo dî, bakaha masalayi mpalata ya bungi," 
Matthew28:13 bakambila ne, Nuambe ne, Hatuakadi balale tulu, bayidi bandi bakalua butuku, bakamuiba." 
Matthew28:14 Biunvua ngovena tshilumbu etshi, netumuitabushishe, neanusungile, kawena ne bualu." 
Matthew28:15 Masalayi akangata mpalata, akenza bu muakâmbilabo; lumu elu, bakalutangadisha munkatshi mua Bena Yuda tô ne katataka." 
Matthew28:16 Bayidi dikumi ne umue bakaya mu Galela, ku mukuna wakabambila Yesu." 
Matthew28:17 Hakamumonabo, bakaulukukuila; kadi bakuabo bakela mpata." 
Matthew28:18 Yesu wakalua kudibo, wakabambila ne, Bakumana kumpa bukokeshi buonso mu diulu ne ha buloba." 
Matthew28:19 Bualu bua meme ndi ne bukokeshi ebu, yai bienu, nuvuishe ba bisamba bionso bayidi, nubabatize mu dina dia Tatu ne mu dia Muana ne mu dia Nyuma Muimpe;" 
Matthew28:20 nubayishe mua kuenza malu onso anakanuambila; ne monai, ndi nʼenu matuku onso tô ne kunshikidilu kua tshikondo etshi." 
Mark1:1 Tshibangidilu tshia lumu luimpe lua Yesu Kilisto, Muana wa Nzambi." 
Mark1:2 Bu mudi muprofete Yeshaya mufunde ne, Ndi ntuma mukenshi wanyi ku mpala kuebe, Yeye nealongolole nshila webe;" 
Mark1:3 Di dia muntu udi wela lubila mu tshihela ne, Longololai nshila wa Mukelenge, Nululamishe nshila yandi;" 
Mark1:4 Yone wakalua, wakadi ubatiza mu tshihela wambila bantu bualu bua dibanza dia kukudimuna kua mitshima ne mibi yabo ijimishibue." 
Mark1:5 Bantu ba mu luseke luonso ma Yudaya ne bonso ba mu Yelushalema bakumuka, bakaya kudiye; bakabatijibua kudiye mu musulu wa Yadene, batonda mibi yabo." 
Mark1:6 Yone wakadi muluate tshilulu tshia mioso ya kamelu, wakadi ne mukaba wa tshiseba mu tshimono tshiandi, wakadi udia mikumbi ne buitshi." 
Mark1:7 Yeye wakamba bualu bua Nzambi ne, Udi ulua ku nyima kuanyi udi muntambe meme, tshiena ne buakane bua kuzonzama mua kusulula mionshi ya bisabata biandi." 
Mark1:8 Nakunubatiza mu mai, kadi yeye neanubatize mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
Mark1:9 Matuku au Yesu wakafuma ku Nazaleta wa Galela, wakabatijibua kudi Yone mu musulu wa Yadene." 
Mark1:10 Hakumukeye mu mai, wakamona diulu dibululuka, ne Nyuma bu nyunyu wa nkutshi umutulukila;" 
Mark1:11 dî diakafuma mu diulu ne, Wewe udi Muana wanyi munanga, wewe udi unsankisha bimpe." 
Mark1:12 Ha diba adi Nyuma wakamutuma mu tshihela. 
Mark1:13 Yeye wakadi mu tshihela matuku makumi anai, bamuteya kudi Satana; yeye wakadi ne nyama ya mu tshisuku; banjelo bakadi bamukuatshisha ne biakadiye nʼabi bualu." 
Mark1:14 Hakakuatabo Yone, Yesu wakalua mu Galela, wenda wambila bantu lumu luimpe lua Nzambi," 
Mark1:15 wakamba ne, Matuku akukumbana, bukelenge bua Nzambi budi hehi; kudimunai mitshima yenu, nuitabushe lumu luimpe." 
Mark1:16 Hakadi Yesu uhitshila ha buihi ne dishiba dia Galela, yeye wakamona Simona ne Andele muanʼabo ne Simona, bela kahamba mu mai, bualu bua bobo bakadi bilembi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu wakabambila ne, Luai ku nyima kuanyi, nenuvuishe bilembi bia bantu." 
Mark1:18 Bakashîa tuhamba hanshi lukasa, bakamulonda." 
Mark1:19 Hakayeye tshituha, wakamona Yakobo muana wa Zebedayo, ne muanʼabo Yone, bakadi mu buatu balukulula tuhamba tuabo." 
Mark1:20 Ha diba adi yeye wakababikila; bakashîa tatuʼabo Zebedayo mu buatu ne bena mu dimu; bakamulonda. 
Mark1:21 Bakaya mu Kapênuma; dituka dia Lumingu lua Bayuda yeye wakabuela mu nsunagoga, wakabayisha" 
Mark1:22 Diyisha diandi diakabakemesha, bualu bua yeye wakabayisha bu muena mei, kakadi bu bafundi." 
Mark1:23 Mu nsunagoga wabo muakadi muntu muikale ne nyuma wa bukoya munda; wakela dî dikole ne," 
Mark1:24 Wewe Yesu Muena Nazaleta, budi nʼebe bualu kai? Wewe wakulua bua kutushiha, anyi? Ndi mukumanye, wewe udi Wa Tshijila wa Nzambi." 
Mark1:25 Yesu wakamubela ne, Hua, Umuka munda muandi." 
Mark1:26 Nyuma wa bukoya wakamuhaluisha, wakela dî diandi bikole, wakahatuka munda muandi." 
Mark1:27 Bakakema bonso, bakakonkangana ne, Etshi ntshinyi? Diyisha dihia-dihia; yeye udi ne bukole bua kuela nyuma ya bukoya dî, imunvuile." 
Mark1:28 Lumu luandi luakaya mu luseke luonso lua Galela ne ku nyima kualu. 
Mark1:29 Hakaluhukabo mu nsunagoga, bakabuela mu nsubu wa Simona ne Andele; Yakobo ne Yone bakadi nʼabo." 
Mark1:30 Muku wa Simona mukashi wakadi mulale hanshi ne disama dia mubidi kahia; bakambila Yesu bualu buandi; 
Mark1:31 wakalua biandi, wakamukuata ku tshianza, wakamubisha; disama dia mubidi kahia diakamulekela, wakabalongoluela bia kudia." 
Mark1:32 Hakabuela diba, bakatua kudiye ne babedi bonso ne bakadi bakuatshike ne bademon." 
Mark1:33 Bantu bonso ba musoko bakunguila ku tshibi. 
Mark1:34 Wakashikisha masama a ba bungi bakadi ne mabedi mangi, wakumusha bademon ba bungi; yeye kakitabusha bademon bakule, bualu bua bobo bakamumanya." 
Mark1:35 Hatshiatshia, butuku kabui buanze kutshia, yeye wakabika, wakaluhuka, wakaya mu tshihela, wakatendelelaku Nzambi." 
Mark1:36 Simona ne bakuabo bakadi nʼandi bakamulonda ku nyima; 
Mark1:37 bakamusangana, bakamuambila ne, Bantu bonso badi bakukeba." 
Mark1:38 Yeye wakabambila ne, Tuyai bietu kukuabo mu minga misoko idi ha buihi, mbambileku bualu bua Nzambi; nakuluila bualu ebu." 
Mark1:39 Yeye wakaya mu nsunagoga yabo ya mu luseke luonso lua Galela, ubambila bualu bua Nzambi, umusha bademon." 
Mark1:40 Muena nsudi wakalua kudiye, wakamutendekena, wakamutuila binu, wakamuambila ne, Biwasua kuenza nunku, udi mumanye mua kundengesha." 
Mark1:41 Luse luakamukuata, wakolola tshianza, wakamulenga, wakamuambila ne, Ndi musue, wikale mulengeshibue." 
Mark1:42 Nsudi yakamulekela lukasa, wakalengeshibua." 
Mark1:43 Yesu wakamukandika, wakamuhatula lukasa," 
Mark1:44 wakamuambila ne, Kuambidi muntu bualu ebu; uye biebe, udileshe kudi muakuidi, ufile biakamba Mose bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kua bantu bualu bua kulengeshibua kuebe." 
Mark1:45 Kadi yeye wakaluhuka, wakabanga kumanyisha bantu, wakatangalasha bualu ebu; nunku Yesu kakamanya mua kubuela mu musoko bamumone kudi bantu, yeye wakadi anu mu bihela; bantu ba nseke yonso bakalua kudiye." 
Mark2:1 Hakahita matuku makese, yeye wakahingana ku Kapênuma; bakatangalasha lumu ne, Yeye udi mu nsubu." 
Mark2:2 Ba bungi bakunguila, kamuakadi muaba, ne ku mbelu kabidi kuakadi nunku; yeye wakabambila dî diandi." 
Mark2:3 Bakalua batuale muntu muikale ne disama dia kaneke kudiye, mutuala kudi bantu banai." 
Mark2:4 Hakahangabo mua kufika nʼandi ha buihi bualu bua tshisumbu tshia bantu, bakabulula tshimanu tshia musaka buludiludi buakadiye. Hakasthibululabo nunku, bakatekesha bulalu buakadi umena kaneke ulala." 
Mark2:5 Hakamona Yesu ditabusha diabo, yeye wakambila umena kaneke ne, Muanʼanyi, mibi yebe yakujimishibua." 
Mark2:6 Kadi bafundi bakuabo bakadi bashikamemu, bakadi badikonka munda munda ne," 
Mark2:7 Muntu eu udi wakuila nunku, tshinyi. Yeye udi uhenda Nzambi; muntu kai udi mumanye mua kujimisha mibi, anu Nzambi nkayandi?" 
Mark2:8 Hakamanya Yesu munda muandi ne, Badi badikonka munda nunku, yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi nudikonkela munda muenu nunku tshinyi?" 
Mark2:9 Tshidi tshitamba butekete ntshinyi, kuambila muena kaneke ne, Mibi yebe yakujimishibua, anyi kumuambila ne, Bika, ambula bulalu buebe, ya?" 
Mark2:10 Kadi bua nuenu mimanye ne, Muana wa muntu udi ne bukole hatshidiye ha buloba bua kujimisha mibi (yeye wakambila muena kaneke ne)," 
Mark2:11 Ndi nkuambila ne, Bika, ambula bulalu buebe, ya ku nsubu kuebe." 
Mark2:12 Yeye wakabika, wakambula bulalu buandi lukasa, wakumuka ku mpala kua bonso; bantu bonso bakakema bua bualu ebu, bakatumbisha Nzambi, bakamba ne, Katuena banze kumona bualu bu ebu diambedi." 
Mark2:13 Yesu wakaya kabidi ku muelelu wa dishiba; tshisumbu tshionso tshia bantu tshiakalua kudiye, yeye wakabayisha." 
Mark2:14 Hakadiye uhita, wakamona Lewi muana wa Alafayo mushikame ku tshilambuidi, wakamuambila ne, Undonde. Yeye wakabika, wakamulonda." 
Mark2:15 Yeye wakadi mushikame mu nsubu wa Lewi udia bidia; basangishi ba mulambu ba bungi ne bantu babi bakadi bashikame ne Yesu ne bayidi bandi, bakadi ba bungi, benda bamulonda." 
Mark2:16 Hakamumona bafundi ba Bafalese udia ne bantu babi ne basangishi ba mulambu nunku, bakakonka bayidi bandi ne, Munyi mudiye udia unua ne basangishi ba mulambu ne bantu babi?" 
Mark2:17 Hakunvua Yesu dî diabo, wakabambila ne, Badi ne bukole kabena ne muondahi bualu, anu badi ne mabedi meme tshiakuluila bua kubikila badi bakane, nakuluila bua kubikila badi babi." 
Mark2:18 Bayidi ba Yone ne Bafalese bakadi bajila bia kudia, bakahia kudi Yesu, bakamukonka ne, Bayidi ba Yone ne bayidi ba Bafalese batu bajila bia kudia, kadi bayidi bebe kabatu bajila bi kudia bualu kai?" 
Mark2:19 Yesu wakabambila ne, Balunda ba mubaki wa mukashi badi bamanye mua kujila bia kudia hatshidi mubaki wa mukashi nʼabo, anyi? Hatshidibo ne mubaki wa mukashi, kabena bamanye mua kujila bia kudia." 
Mark2:20 Kadi matuku nealue abanyengabo mubaki wa mukashi, nebajile bia kudia dituku adi." 
Mark2:21 Bantu kabatu batelelula tshihesa tua tshilulu tshidi katshi tshifuatalale ha tshmialu tshikulukulu, bualu bua tshihesa tshihia-tshihia netshîlamune tshikulukulu, nunku disoso nedivunde." 
Mark2:22 Nunku kabidi bantu kabatu bela maluvu mahia-mahia mu milondo ya biseba bikulukulu; bienzabo nunku, malulu neahande biseba, maluvu ne biseba nebibutuke; kadi bantu batu bela malulu mahia-mahia mu biseba bihia-bihia." 
Mark2:23 Yesu wakadi uhitshila mu madimi a blé dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda; hakadi bayidi bandi baya mu nshila, bakabanga kutshibula miehu yai." 
Mark2:24 Bafalese bakamukonka ne, Tangila, bayidi bebe badi benzela bualu budi bujila dituku dia Lumingu tshinyi?" 
Mark2:25 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nuenu kanuakubala bualu buakenza Davidi, hakadiye utata ne hakadiye ne nsala, yeye ne bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, anyi?" 
Mark2:26 Yeye wakabuela mu nsubu wa Nzambi hakadi Ebeyata muakuidi mimene, wakadia bidia bilesha, biakadi tshijila, anu bakuidi ba Nzambi mbakadi badia, yeye kabidi wakahaku bakadi nʼandi." 
Mark2:27 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bakenzela bantu dituku dia Lumingu, kabakenzela dituku dia Lumingu bantu;" 
Mark2:28 nunku Muana wa muntu udi mukelenge wa dituku dia Lumingu. 
Mark3:1 Yesu wakabuela kabidi mu nsunagoga; muntu wakadiku ne tshianza tshiandi tshiume. 
Mark3:2 Bakamutentekela ne, Neangondahe dituku dia Lumingu, anyi? Bakasua kumubanda." 
Mark3:3 Wakambila muntu wakadi ne tshianza tshiume ne, Bika, imana munkatshi muabo." 
Mark3:4 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Tshidi tshimpe ntshinyi, kuenza malu mimpe dituku dia Lumingu, anyi kuenza malu mabi; kusungila muoyo anyi kûshiha? Bobo bakahua." 
Mark3:5 Mutshima wandi wakanyingalala bualu bua mitshima yabo yakadi mikole; wakabatangila ne tshishi, wakambila muntu ne, Olola tshianza. Yeye wakatshiolola, tshianza tshiandi tshiakakana kabidi." 
Mark3:6 Bafalese bakaluhuka, bobo ne bena Helode bakamuelela tshifufu bua kumushiha." 
Mark3:7 Yesu wakaya ne bayidi bandi ku dishiba; bantu ba bungi ba mu Galela bakamulonda; bakuabo kabidi ba bungi ba mu Yudaya," 
Mark3:8 ne ba mu Yelushalema, ne ba mu Edome, ne ba dishia dia Yadene, ne ba mu luseke lua Tulo ne Sidona, hakunvuabo malu manene akadiye wenza, bakalua kudiye." 
Mark3:9 Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Buatu bukese bungindile, bua tshisumbu tshia bantu katshimusakidi;" 
Mark3:10 bualu bua yeye wakadi mumane kushikisha masama a ba bungi. Buonso buabo bakadi ne mabedi makole bakamûnguila bualu bua kubalengeye bianza. 
Mark3:11 Hakamumona nyuma ya bukoya, yakadishinda ku mpala kuandi, yakela dî bikole ne, Wewe udi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Mark3:12 Yeye wakabela ne, Kanunsokolodi." 
Mark3:13 Yesu wakabanda ku mukuna, wakabikila bakasueye; bakaya kudiye." 
Mark3:14 Yeye wakasungula dikumi ne babidi, bua kuikalabo nʼandi ne bua kubatumeye bua kuambila bantu bualu bua Nzambi," 
Mark3:15 ne bua kuikalabo ne bukole bua kumusha bademon. 
Mark3:16 Yeye wakidika Simona ne, Petelo;" 
Mark3:17 ne Yakobo muana wa Zebedayo ne Yone muanʼabo ne Yakobo, yeye wakabidika ne, Boanêge, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Bana ba mukungulu wa nvula;" 
Mark3:18 ne Andele, ne Filipo, ne Bâtolomayo, ne Matayo, ne Toma, ne Yakobo muana wa Alafayo, ne Tadaya, ne Simona Muena Kananayo," 
Mark3:19 ne Yudasa Isakaliote, wakamutungila tshitungu. Yeye wakabuela mu nsubu." 
Mark3:20 Bantu ba bungi bakunguila kabidi, kabakamanya mua kudia bidia." 
Mark3:21 Hakunvua balunda bandi bualu ebu, bakaya bua kumuangata, bakamba ne, Yeye udi mubale." 
Mark3:22 Bafalese bakadi bafume ku Yelushalema bakamba ne, Yeye udi ne Belezebula, udi umusha bademon mu dina dia mukelenge wa bademon." 
Mark3:23 Yeye wakababikila, wakabelela nsumuinu ne, Satana udi mumanye mua kumusha Satana munyi?" 
Mark3:24 Biahanduluka bukelenge, bukelenge abu kabuena bumanye mua kuikala." 
Mark3:25 Hahanduluka nsubu, nsubu au kena mumanye mua kuikala." 
Mark3:26 Biadiluilangana Satana, biahandulukeye, kena mumanye mua kuikala, bualu ouandi nebushikile." 
Mark3:27 Muntu kena mumanye mua kubuela mu nsubu wa muena bukole bua kuhaula bintu biandi, bikaleye kai musuike muena bukole diambedi; hamusuikeye, hashishe neahaule bia mu nsubu wandi." 
Mark3:28 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Mibi yonso ya bana ba bantu neijimishibue ne bihendu biahendabo nʼabi Nzambi," 
Mark3:29 kadi kabena bajimisha bubi bua muntu wahenda Nyuma Muimpe tshiendelele, yeye neikale ne bubi buandi tshiendelele." 
Mark3:30 Yeye wakabambila nunku, bualu bua bobo bakamba ne, Yeye udi ne nyuma wa bukoya munda." 
Mark3:31 Mamu wandi ne bana babo bakalua, bakadi bimane ku bula, bakamutumina dî, bakamubikila." 
Mark3:32 Bantu ba bungi bakadi bashikame bamunyunguluke; bakamuambila ne, Tangila, mamuʼebe ne bana benu badi ku bula bakukeba." 
Mark3:33 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Mamuʼanyi nganyi? Bana betu mbanganyi?" 
Mark3:34 Hakatangileye bakadi bashikame bamunyunguluke, wakamba ne, Mamuʼanyi ne bana betu kababa!" 
Mark3:35 Muntu yonso wenza bu mudi Nzambi musue udi muanʼetu mulume ne muanʼetu mukashi ne mamuʼanyi. 
Mark4:1 Yesu wakabanga kabidi kuyisha bantu ku muelelu wa dishiba. Bantu batambe bungi bakamunguila, nunku yeye wakabuela mu buatu buakadi mu mai, wakashikama; bantu bonso bakadi ku mpata ku muelelu wa mai." 
Mark4:2 Yeye wakabayisha malu a bungi mu nsumuinu, wakabambila mu diyisha diandi ne," 
Mark4:3 Unvuai, mumiaminyi wakaya kumiamina maminu;" 
Mark4:4 hakadiye umiamina, maminu makuabo akamata kukala kua nshila, nyunyu yakalua, yakâzokola." 
Mark4:5 Makuabo akamata ha buloba buakadi ha mutu ha mabue, kâkadihu ne buloba bua bungi; tshituha tshihi akatoloka bua kâkadi ne buloba bule;" 
Mark4:6 hakabanda diba, akababuka, akafubidila bualu bua kâkadi ne miji." 
Mark4:7 Makuabo akamata mu mionshi ya meba, mionshi yakadiunda, yakânyengela, kâkalua maminu." 
Mark4:8 Makuabo akamata ha buloba buimpe, akavudisha maminu, akaleha, akadiunda; makuabo akavudisha makumi asatu asatu, makuabo makumi asambombo asambombo, makuabo lukama lukama." 
Mark4:9 Yeye wakamba ne, Udi ne matshu unvue biandi." 
Mark4:10 Hakadiye nkayandi, bakadi ha buihi nʼandi ne ba dikumi ne babidi bakamukonka bualu bua nsumuinu." 
Mark4:11 Yeye wakabambila ne, Badi banuha nuenu malu a bukelenge bua Nzambi adi masokoka, kadi badi bambila bantu ba bende malu onso mu nsumuinu;" 
Mark4:12 kumona nebamone, kadi kabena bamanye; kunvua nebunvue, kadi kabena bajingulula; nunku kabakudimunyi mitshima yabo bua mibi yabo ijimishibue." 
Mark4:13 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Kanuena bamanye lusumuinu elu, anyi? Nenumanye nsumuinu yonso munyi?" 
Mark4:14 Mumiaminyi udi umiamina dî dia Nzambi. 
Mark4:15 Kabobo aba ba kukala kua nshila kuakumiaminabo dî; hakunvuabo dî, Satana ulualua lukasa, udi unyenga dî diakadi dimiamina munda muabo." 
Mark4:16 Kabobo aba kabidi bakadi bamiamina ha miaba ya mabue; hakunvuabo dî, badi baditabusha lukasa ne disanka;" 
Mark4:17 kadi bobo kabena ne miji munda muabo, badi bikala tshituha tshihi; hashishe, halua dikenga anyi lutatu bualu bua dî dia Nzambi, nebalenduke lubilu." 
Mark4:18 Bakuabo badi bantu bakadi bamiamina mu mionshi ya meba; bobo bakunvua dî," 
Mark4:19 kadi meshi a malu a ha buloba ne mashimi a biuma ne lukuka lua malu makuabo bidi bibuela munda, bidi binyengela dî, kadiena dimanye mua kuvuidisha maminu makuabo." 
Mark4:20 Kabobo aba bakadi bamiamina ha buloba buimpe; bobo badi bunvua dî, badi baditabusha, badi bavudisha maminu, bakuabo makumi asatu asatu, bakuabo makumi asambombo asambombo! bakuabo lukama lukama." 
Mark4:21 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Bantu batu balua ne muinda bua kûteka munshi mua mushete, anyi munshi mua bulalu, anyi? Batu bauteka ha mutu ha mesa a muinda, nasha?" 
Mark4:22 Kakuena bualu busokoka buahanga kusokolodibua; kakuena bualu bubuikila buahanga kubuluibua. 
Mark4:23 Bikala muntu ne matshu a kunyua, unvue biandi." 
Mark4:24 Yeye wakabambila ne, Dimukai bua bualu bunudi nunyua; nebanuidikishile bintu ne luidi lunudi nubidikishila nʼalu kabidi; nebanuhe binga bintu ba mutu." 
Mark4:25 Bualu bua muntu udi ne bintu nebamuhe binga; kadi muntu udi kai ne tshintu nebamunyenge tshidiye nʼatshi. 
Mark4:26 Yeye wakamba ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi budi bu mudi muntu mukune maminu mu buloba;" 
Mark4:27 udi ulala tulu, udi ubika butuku ne munya; maminu adi atoloka, adi aleha, kadi yeye kena mumanye mudiû adienzela." 
Mark4:28 Buloba budi budivuishila maminu nkayabu; diambedi mutoloko, ku nyima muehu, hashishe maminu manene ku muehu." 
Mark4:29 Kadi hûma maminu, yeye neatume bena miele, bualu bua matuku a kunowa akufika." 
Mark4:30 Yeye wakakonka ne, Netufuanyikishe bukelenge bua Nzambi munyi? Netubufuanyikishe ne lusumuinu kai?" 
Mark4:31 Budi bu lutete lua mutada, ludi lutambe ntete yonso ya ha buloba bukese; kadi halukunabo mu buloba," 
Mark4:32 ludi Bileha, ludi lutambe midioko yonso bunene, ludi bela matamba manene; nunku nyunyu ya mu diulu idi mimanye mua kuikila mu dileshi diau." 
Mark4:33 Nunku mu nsumuinu ya bungi yeye wakabambila dî dia Nzambi diakamanyabo mua kunyua; 
Mark4:34 yeye kakadi ubambila malu tshianana, anu mu nsumuinu; kadi wakajinguluila bayidi bandi malu au onso ha nkayabo." 
Mark4:35 Dituku adi mene, hakamba diba kuhueka, wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Tuyai dishia." 
Mark4:36 Bakashia bantu ba bungi, bakaya nʼandi mu buatu, anu bu muakadiye. Matu makuabo akadi nʼandi." 
Mark4:37 Tshihuhu tshikole tshiakaha, mavuala akabuela mu buatu, buatu buakadi bûla tente ne mai." 
Mark4:38 Yeye wakadi ku tshitaku tshia buatu, musame ha musamu, mulale tulu; bakamubisha, bakamukonka ne, Muyishi, udi witabusha tufue, anyi?" 
Mark4:39 Yeye wakabika, wakabuikila luhehele, wakambila dishiha ne, Hua, talala talalâ. Luhehele luakalekela, muaba au wakatalala talalâ." 
Mark4:40 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi nutshinyina tshinyi? Kanuena ne ditabusha tô ne katataka?" 
Mark4:41 Bakatamba kutshina, bakambilangana ne, Eu muntu kai? Luhehele ne mai a dishiha bidi bimunvuila." 
Mark5:1 Bakafika dishia dia dishiba mu luseke lua Bena Gelasa. 
Mark5:2 Hakumukeye mu buatu, katataka muntu mukuatshike ne nyuma wa bukoya, ulua mu majambu, wakasangila ne Yesu," 
Mark5:3 wakadi wikala mu majambu; kakuakadi muntu mumanye mua kumusuika ne tshintu, bintu bionso biakahanga, ne lukanu mene;" 
Mark5:4 bakamusuika misangu ya bungi ne nkata ne nkanu, yeye wakatshibula nkanu, wakatula nkata; kakuakadi muntu mumanye mua kumukokesha." 
Mark5:5 Matuku onso, butuku ne munya, mu majambu ne mu mikuna, yeye wakadi wela bila, wakadi uditaha ne mabue." 
Mark5:6 Hakatangileye Yesu kuakua, wakaya lubilu, wakamukukuila;" 
Mark5:7 wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Wewe, Yesu, Muana wa Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, ndi nʼebe bualu kai? Ndi nkutshihisha mu dina dia Nzambi ne, Kunkengeshi;" 
Mark5:8 bua Yesu wakamana kumuela dî ne, Hatuka munda mua muntu eu, wewe nyuma wa bukoya." 
Mark5:9 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Dina diebe nganyi? Wakamuambila ne, Dina dianyi didi Legona, bualu bua tudi ba bungi." 
Mark5:10 Yeye wakatendekena Yesu ne, Kutuihatshi mu luseke elu." 
Mark5:11 Tshisumbu tshinene tshia ngulube tshiakadi mu tshibandabanda tshia mukuna, yakadi idia mashinde." 
Mark5:12 Bakamutendekena ne, Ututume munda mua ngulube, tubuelemu." 
Mark5:13 Yeye wakitabusha. Nyuma ya bukoya yakaluhuka, yakabuela munda mua ngulube; tshisumbu tshiai tshiakanyemena lubilu ku tshibungubungu, tshiakahona mu dishiba; yakadi bu binunu bibidi; yakafua mu mai." 
Mark5:14 Badishi ba ngulube bakanyema, bakambila bantu ba mu musoko ne ba mu luseke alu bualu abu. Bakalua kutangila bualu buakenjibua nunku." 
Mark5:15 Bakalua kudi Yesu, bakamona muntu wakadi mukuatshike ne bademon mushikame, muluate bilulu, muikale ne lungenyi luimpe, yeye mene nguakadi ne legona; bakatshina." 
Mark5:16 Bamonyi ba bualu abu bakabamanyisha malu onso akalua kudi wakadi mukuatshike ne bademon, ne malu onso akalua kudi ngulube." 
Mark5:17 Bobo bakabanga kumutendekena ne, Umuka mu luseke luetu." 
Mark5:18 Hakadiye ubuela mu buatu, wakadi mukuatshike ne bademon wakamutendekena ne, Ndi musue kuikala nʼebe." 
Mark5:19 Kadi yeye kakitabusha, wakamuambila ne, Uye biebe kuebe kudi balunda bebe, ubamanyishe malu manene akukuenzela Mukelenge ne luse luakukufueye." 
Mark5:20 Yeye wakaya biandi, wakabanga kumanyisha bantu ba mu Dekapoli malu manene akamuenzela Yesu; bantu bonso bakakema." 
Mark5:21 Hakasabuka Yesu dishia kabidi, bantu ba bungi bakadisangisha kudiye, yeye wakadi ha buihi ne dishiba." 
Mark5:22 Mukelenge mukuabo wa nsunagoga wakalua, dina diandi Yailo; hakamoneye Yesu, wakadiela ku makasa andi," 
Mark5:23 wakamutendekena bikole ne, Muanʼanyi mukese wa bakashi ukadi ufua; ulue biebe, umulenge bianza, akoleshibue, ikale ne muoyo." 
Mark5:24 Yesu wakaya nʼandi; bantu ba bungi bakamulonda, bakamunguila." 
Mark5:25 Mukashi wakadiku, wakadi ne disama dia mashi ahatuka bidimu dikumi ne bibidi," 
Mark5:26 banganga buka ba bungi bakatamba kumukengesha, wakanyanga bintu biandi bionso, kakasangala, kadi disama diandi diakatamba;" 
Mark5:27 yeye wakunvua bualu bua Yesu, wakalua mu tshisumbu tshia bantu ku nyima kuandi, wakalenga ku tshmialu tshiandi." 
Mark5:28 Wakamba munda munda ne, Binalenga anu ku tshmialu tshiandi, nenkoleshibue." 
Mark5:29 Muaba wakadi mashi ahatuka wakakama katataka, yeye wakadiunvua mu mubidi wandi ne, Disama dianyi dikole diakuhua."
