Mark5:30 Yesu wakadiunvua munda munda ne, Bukole buanyi buakuhatuka, yeye wakatshinguluka munkatshi mua bantu, wakakonka ne, Wakundenga ku mmalu tshianyi nganyi?" 
Mark5:31 Bayidi bandi bakamuambila ne, Wewe udi utangila bantu ba bungi bakunguila, udi ukenkela nunku tshinyi ne, Wakundenga nganyi?" 
Mark5:32 Yeye wakakenzakana bua kumona wakenza bualu ebu. 
Mark5:33 Hakamanya mukashi bualu buakamuenzeleye, wakatshina, wakazakala, wakalua, wakatua binu ku mpala kuandi, wakamuambila malu onso bulelela." 
Mark5:34 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Muanʼanyi, ditabusha diebe diakukusungila; uye biebe talalâ, wikale musangale ku disama diebe." 
Mark5:35 Hakatshidiye wamba nunku, bakafuma kua mukelenge wa nsunagona, bakamba ne, Muanʼebe udi mufue; udi utatshishila Muyishi tô tshinyi?" 
Mark5:36 Hakunvua Yesu dî diakambabo, wakambila mukelenge wa nsunagoga ne, Kutshinyi, itabusha anu kuitabusha." 
Mark5:37 Yeye kakitabusha bua muntu mukuabo amulonde, anu Petelo ne Yakobo ne Yone muanʼabo ne Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Bakalua ku nsubu kua mukelenge wa nsunagoga; wakasangana mutoyi, ba bungi bakadi badila bashikunka." 
Mark5:39 Hakabueleye, wakabambila ne, Nudi nutekela mutoyi tshinyi? Nudi nudidila tshinyi? Muana kena mufue, yeye udi mulale tulu." 
Mark5:40 Bakamuseka. Hakabumusheye buonso buabo, wakangata tatu wa muana ne baba wandi ne bakalueye nʼabo, wakabuela muakadi muana." 
Mark5:41 Wakakuata ku tshianza tshia muana, wakamuambila ne, Talita kumi, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muanʼanyi mukashi, bika." 
Mark5:42 Muana wakabika lukasa, wakuenda; bualu bua yeye wakadi wa bidimu dikumi ne bibidi. Bantu bakatamba kukema." 
Mark5:43 Yeye wakabakanda ne, Muntu mukuabo kamanyi bualu ebu. Yeye wakamba ne, Muhai bia kudia." 
Mark6:1 Wakumuka aku, wakalua mu luseke luandi, bayidi bakamulonda." 
Mark6:2 Hakalua dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda, wakabanga kuyisha bantu mu nsunagoga; bantu ba bungi bakakema, hakunvuabo mei andi, bakakonka ne, Muntu eu wakuangata malu â kudi kunyi? Lungenyi kai luakuhabo muntu eu? Malu a kukema adiye wenza adi munyi?" 
Mark6:3 Yeye kena muena mabaya, anyi? Kena muana wa Malia, anyi? Kena muanʼabo ne Yakobo ne Yose ne Yuda ne Simona, anyi? Bana babo ba bakashi kabena munkatshi muetu, anyi? Bakalenduka bua bualu buandi." 
Mark6:4 Yesu wakabambila ne, Muprofete udi ne butumbi mu miaba yonso, kadi kena nʼabu ku luseke luabo ne munkatshi mua bana babo ne mu nsubu wandi." 
Mark6:5 Yeye kakamanya mua kuenzaku bualu bua kukema, wakakolesha anu bantu banya-banya bakadi ne mabedi bakalengeye bianza." 
Mark6:6 Wakakema bualu bua huhidia buabo. Yeye wakendakana mu misoko ubayisha. 
Mark6:7 Yeye wakabikila bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi, wakabanga kubatuma ku babidi ku babidi; wakabaha bukole bua kuhita nyuma ya bukoya;" 
Mark6:8 wakabambila bikole ne, Kanuangatshi tshintu tshia kuya nʼatshi mu luendu, anu bibangu; kanuyi ne bidia ne bibombo ne tshiamu tshia mitaku mu mikaba;" 
Mark6:9 nubueshe bisabata ku makasa; kanuluatshi bikowelu bibidi. 
Mark6:10 Yeye wakabambila ne, Hanuabuela mu nsubu, nuikalemu tô ne hanumukamu." 
Mark6:11 Luseke luonso luahidia kunuitabusha, kabai bunvua mei enu, hanumukamu, nututule nsenga idi mu makasa enu bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kuabo." 
Mark6:12 Bakaya, bakambila bantu bualu bua Nzambi ne, Kudimunai mitshima yenu." 
Mark6:13 Bakumusha bademon ba bungi, bakela manyi ha ba bungi bakadi ne mabedi, bakabakolesha." 
Mark6:14 Mukelenge Helode wakunvua lumu lua Yesu, bualu bua dina diandi diakamanyibua; wakamba biandi ne, Yone Mubatiji wakubika ku lufu, bua bualu ebu malu a kukema adi enjibua kudiye." 
Mark6:15 Kadi bakuabo bakamba ne, Yeye udi Eliya. Bakuabo bakamba ne, Yeye udi muprofete, anyi bu muprofete." 
Mark6:16 Kadî Helode, hakunvueye lumu luandi, wakamba ne, Yone unakukosa mutu wakubika ku lufu." 
Mark6:17 Bualu bua Helode nkayandi nguakadi mutume bantu bandi, mumukuate, wakamusuika mu nsubu wa lukanu bualu bua Helodia mukashi wa muanʼabo Filipo, wakadi Helode mubake." 
Mark6:18 Yone wakadi mumane kuambila Helode ne, Wewe kuena mumanye mua kuikala ne mukashi wa muanʼenu." 
Mark6:19 Helodia wakadi ne Yone lukuna, wakasua kumushiha, kadi yeye kakamanya mua kuenza nunku;" 
Mark6:20 bualu bua Helode wakadi Utshina Yone, wakamanya ne, Yeye udi muntu muakane ne wa tshijila, wakamulama bimpe. Hakunvua Helode mei a Yone, wakalubakana, wakunvua mei andi ne disanka." 
Mark6:21 Hakafikila dituku diakane, dia kuedibua kua Helode, yeye wakalambishila miloho yandi ne tumanda tuandi tua masalayi ne banfumu banene ba mu Galela bidia;" 
Mark6:22 hakabuela muana mukashi wa Helodia, yeye wakaja maja, wakasankisha mutshima wa Helode ne ya bakadi bashikame nʼandi ku mesa; mukelenge wakambila muana mukashi ne, Undombe tshintu tshionso tshiudi musue, nenkuhetshi." 
Mark6:23 Wakaditshiha kudiye ne, Tshintu tshionso tshiwandomba, nenkuhetshi, tô ne ku tshituha tshia hankatshi ha bukelenge buanyi." 
Mark6:24 Yeye wakumuka, wakakonka mamuʼandi ne, Nemulombe tshinyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Ulombe mutu wa Yone Mubatiji." 
Mark6:25 Wakabuela lubilu muakadi mukelenge, wakamulomba ne, Ndi musue umpe mutu wa Yone Mubatiji katataka ha dilonga." 
Mark6:26 Mutshima wa mukelenge wakatamba kunyingalala; kadi bualu bua mitshihu yandi ne bua bakadi badia nʼandi bidia, yeye kakasua kuhidia kumuha." 
Mark6:27 Mukelenge wakatuma disalayi diakadi sentedi, wakadiambila ne, Ulue ne mutu wandi; diakaya biadi, diakamukosa mutu mu nsubu wa lukanu," 
Mark6:28 diakalua ne mutu wandi ha dilonga, diakauha nsongakashi, nsongakashi wakauha mamuʼandi." 
Mark6:29 Hakunvua bayidi ba Yone bualu ebu, bakalua, bakangata tshitalu tshiandi, bakatshijika mu lukita." 
Mark6:30 Batangadiki ba Yesu bakadisangisha kudiye, bakamuambila malu onso akadibo benza ne malu onso akadibo bayisha bantu." 
Mark6:31 Yeye wakabambila ne, Luai bienu nkayenu mu muaba wa hatuhu, nuikishe tshituha. Kabakamanya mua kudia bidia talalâ, bualu bua bantu ba bungi bakadi bahitakana." 
Mark6:32 Bakaya nkayabo mu buatu ku muaba wa hatuhu. 
Mark6:33 Bantu bakabamona baya, ba bungi bakabamanya, bantu ba mu misoko yonso bakayaku lubilu ku makasa, bakadianjila kufika." 
Mark6:34 Hakumukeye mu buatu, wakatangila tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, wakadi nʼabo luse, bualu bua bobo bakadi bu mikoko yakadi kayi ne mulami; yeye wakabanga kubayisha malu a bungi." 
Mark6:35 Hakamba diba kubuela, bayidi bandi bakalua kudiye, bakamba ne, Muaba eu udi tshihela, diba diakumana kuya;" 
Mark6:36 ubatume, baye mu luseke elu ne mu misoko idi ha buihi, badisumbile bia kudia." 
Mark6:37 Yeye wakabandamuna ne, Nuenu nubahe bia kudia. Bakamukonka ne, Netuye kusumba bidia bia ndenalio nkama ibidi, tulue kubaha, badie, anyi?" 
Mark6:38 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi ne mitanda ya bidia bungi munyi? Yai nutangile. Hakamanyabo, bakamuambila ne, Mitanda itanu ne mishiha ibidi." 
Mark6:39 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bonso bashikame, ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu, mu mashinde." 
Mark6:40 Bakashikama mu milongo, bantu lukama lukama ne bantu makumi atanu makumi atanu." 
Mark6:41 Yeye wakamema mitanda itanu ne mishiha ibidi, wakatangila mulu, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakatshibula mitanda, wakaifila mu bianza bia bayidi bua kubitekabo ku mpala kua bantu; yeye wakababanyina buonso buabo mishiha ibidi." 
Mark6:42 Buonso buabo bakadia, bakukuta." 
Mark6:43 Bakangula bihesa bia bidia biakashala bisaka dikumi ne bibidi biule tente, ne bia mishiha kabidi." 
Mark6:44 Bakadia mitanda nunku bakadi balume binunu bitanu. 
Mark6:45 Yesu wakabuesha bayidi bandi mu buatu lubilu, badianjile dishia ku mpala kuandi mu Bete-saida, hakatumeye bantu kuabo." 
Mark6:46 Hakabalayeye, wakaya mu mukuna bua kutendelela Nzambi." 
Mark6:47 Hakalua butuku, buatu buakadi mu bunene bua dishiba, yeye wakadi mu mpata nkayandi." 
Mark6:48 Yesu wakabamona batata ne kuita, bualu bua tshihehele tshiakadi tshibahingisha; hakadi diba bu ha inai hatshiatshia, yeye wakalua kudibo, wenda ha mutu ha mai; yeye wakamba kubasesuka;" 
Mark6:49 kadi bobo, hakamumonabo wenda ha mutu ha mai, bakela meshi ne, Mukishi, bakahandalala ne mei makole," 
Mark6:50 buonso buabo bakamumona, bakatshina. Kadi yeye wakabela dî, wakamba ne, Nukoleshe mitshima yenu, mmeme, kanutshinyi." 
Mark6:51 Wakabuela mu buatu muakadibo, tshihehele tshiakabatama; bobo bakatamba kukema;" 
Mark6:52 bualu bua kabakajingulula bualu bua mitanda bimpe; mitshima yabo yakadi mikole. 
Mark6:53 Hakasabukabo, bakalua ku dilobo dia Genesaleta, bakasuika buatu." 
Mark6:54 Hakumukabo mu buatu, bantu bakamumanya lukasa," 
Mark6:55 bakendakana lubilu mu luseke alu luonso, bakatuala bena mabedi ha malalu abo, bakaya kuakunvuabo ne, Yeye udi eku." 
Mark6:56 Kuonso kuakayeye, mu misoko mikese ne mu bimenga ne mu mpata, bakateka bena mabedi mu bisalu bakamutendekena bua kulengabo ku mubangu wa tshivualu tshiandi; bakadi bamulenga mbobo bakakoleshibua." 
Mark7:1 Bafalese ne bafundi bakuabo, bafume ku Yelushalema, bakunguila kuakadi Yesu," 
Mark7:2 bakamona bayidi bandi badia bidia ne bianza kabi biowa mai. 
Mark7:3 Bualu bua Bafalese ne Bena Yuda bonso, bikalabo kabai buvue bianza ne mai bikole, kabena badia bidia, badi ne tshilele tshia bankambua babo nunku;" 
Mark7:4 hafumabo ku tshisalu, kabena badia, anu howabo; badi bitabusha kabidi bilele bikuabo bia bungi, bu kuvua kua mpanza ne ngesu ne bintu bidi bienjibua ne tshiamu tshia mitaku." 
Mark7:5 Bafalese ne bafundi bakamukonka ne, Bayidi bebe batu badia bidia ne bianza bidi ne manyanu munyi, bobo kabatu benda mu tshilele tshia bankambua betu munyi?" 
Mark7:6 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu bena lubombo, bulelela, Yeshaya wakamba bualu buenu, wakafunda dî ne, Bantu aba badi bannemeka ne mishiku yabo, Kadi mitshima yabo kayena kundi, idi kule." 
Mark7:7 Badi bantendelela tshianana, Badi bayisha bantu diyisha dia mikenshi ya bantu." 
Mark7:8 Nudi nulekela mukenshi wa Nzambi, nudi nulonda tshilele tshia bantu." 
Mark7:9 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bulelela, nuakuvuisha mukenshi wa Nzambi bu wa hatuhu, bualu bua nuenu kulonda tshilele tshienu." 
Mark7:10 Mose wakamba ne, Unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe; yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Udi uhetula tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi afue biandi bulelela." 
Mark7:11 Kadi nuenu nudi nuamba ne, Biambila muntu tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi ne, Tshintu tshiwakadi kuangata tshidi Kôbana, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Ntshidi tshiha Nzambi," 
Mark7:12 kanuena nuitabusha bua yeye kukuatshisha tatuʼandi anyi mamuʼandi; 
Mark7:13 nunku nudi nuona dî dia Nzambi bualu bua tshilele tshienu tshinuakuyisha bantu; nuenu nutu nuenza malu makuabo a bungi bu bualu ebu. 
Mark7:14 Yesu wakabikila tshisumbu tshia bantu kabidi, wakabambila ne, Buonso buenu unvuai, numanye bimpe;" 
Mark7:15 tshintu tshionso tshidi anu hamʼbidi ha muntu, biabuelatshi munda muandi, katshiena tshimanye mua kumubihisha; kadi malu adi aluhuka munda mua muntu ngadi amubihisha. [" 
Mark7:16 ] 
Mark7:17 Yesu wakashîa bantu ku mbelu, wakabuela mu nsubu, bayidi bandi bakamuebesha bualu bua lusumuinu elu." 
Mark7:18 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nuenu kabidi kanuena bamanye bualu ebu, anyi? Kanuena bamanye ne, Tshintu tshionso tshidi hamʼbidi handi, biabuelatshi munda mua muntu, katshiena tshimanye mua kumubihisha?" 
Mark7:19 Bualu bua katshiena tshiya mu mutshima, tshidi tshiya mu difu, tshidi tshiubibua. Bualu bua wakamba dî edi, yeye wakalengesha bintu bionso bia kudia." 
Mark7:20 Wakamba kabidi ne, Tshidi tshiluhuka munda mua muntu ntshidi tshimubihisha." 
Mark7:21 Mu mitshima ya bantu mudi muluhuka meshi mabi ne tshiendenda ne buibi ne kushiha kua bantu ne masandi 
Mark7:22 ne lukuka lua biuma ne malu mabi ne mashimi ne bulobo ne disu dibi ne bihendu ne diambu ne buhote; 
Mark7:23 malu mabi â onso adi aluhuka munda mua muntu, ngadi amubihisha." 
Mark7:24 Yesu wakumukaku, wakaya mu nseke ya Tulo ne Sidona. Wakabuela mu nsubu, kakasua muntu amanye ne, Udimu; kadi yeye kakamanya mua kusokoma." 
Mark7:25 Mukashi wakadiku, muanʼandi mukese wa bakashi wakadi ne nyuma wa bukoya munda; hakunvua mukashi lumu lua Yesu, wakalua, wakadiela ku makasa andi." 
Mark7:26 Mukashi au wakadi muntu wa tshisamba tshia bende tshia Bena Suliafoinike. Wakamutendekena ne, Umusha demon munda mua muanʼanyi." 
Mark7:27 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bana bûkute diambedi; bualu bua kambimpe bia kuangata bidia bia bana kuelela mbua." 
Mark7:28 Kadi mukashi wakandamuna ne, Bulelela, Mukelenge; kadi mbua idi munshi mua mesa itu yadia nkototo idi bana bamatshisha hanshi." 
Mark7:29 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua dî edi ya biebe, demon wakumana kumuka munda mua muanʼebe." 
Mark7:30 Wakaya kuandi, wakasangana muana muladika ha bulalu, demon mumane kuluhuka." 
Mark7:31 Yesu wakumuka mu nseke ya Tulo, wakahitshila mu Sidona ne mu nseke ya Dekapoli, wakafika ku dishiba dia Galela." 
Mark7:32 Bakalua kudiye ne muntu wakadi ne mahaha, wakadi kabidi ne tshikukumina; bakamutendekena ne, Umulenge tshianza." 
Mark7:33 Yesu wakaya nʼandi ha nkayandi, bantu bakuabo bakashala, wakabuesha minu mu matshu andi, wakatuila lute, wakamulenga ku ludimi;" 
Mark7:34 wakatangila mulu, wakahumuna, wakamuambila ne, Efata, udi bu Ikale majibuke." 
Mark7:35 Matshu andi akajikuka lukasa, tshiakadi tshisuika ludimi luandi tshiakusuluka lukasa, wakakula bimpe." 
Mark7:36 Wakabambila bikole ne, Kanuambidi muntu; kadi hakabambilambileye bikole nunku, bobo bakatamba kutangalasha lumu." 
Mark7:37 Bakatamba kukema ne, Wakenza malu onso bimpe, yeye wakunvuisha bakadi ne mahaha, wakakuisha bakadi tumama." 
Mark8:1 Mu matuku au tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu tshiakadiku kabidi, kabakadi ne tshia kudia; Yesu wakabikila bayidi bandi, wakabambila ne," 
Mark8:2 Ndi ne bantu aba luse, bualu bua bobo bakusomba nʼanyi matuku asatu, kabena ne tshia kudia;" 
Mark8:3 binabatuma kuabo ne nsala, nebahange mu nshila; bakuabo mbafume kule." 
Mark8:4 Bayidi bandi bakamukonka ne, Muntu udi mumanye mua kukutshisha bantu aba mu muaba eu wa tshihela kudi kunyi?" 
Mark8:5 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi ne mitanda bungi munyi? Bakamba ne, Muanda mutekete." 
Mark8:6 Yeye wakambila tshisumbu tshia bantu ne, Shikamai hanshi; wakamema mitanda muanda mutekete, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakatshibula, wakaifila mu bianza bia bayidi bualu bua kuitekabo ku mpala kua bantu; bakateka ku mpala kua bantu." 
Mark8:7 Bakadi kabidi ne tushiha tukese; hakatendeleleye Nzambi, wakamba ne, Nututeke ku mpala kua bantu." 
Mark8:8 Bakadia, bakûkuta; bakangula bihesa bia bidia biakashala bisaka muanda mutekete biule tente." 
Mark8:9 Bakadi bu binunu binai; wakabatuma kuabo. 
Mark8:10 Wakabuela ne bayidi bandi mu buatu, wakalua mu nseke ya Dalamanuta." 
Mark8:11 Bafalese bakalua, bakabanga kumukonka malu, bamuteta munda ne, Utuleshe tshimanyinu tshia mu diulu." 
Mark8:12 Yeye wakahumuna munda munda, wakamba ne, Ba mu tshikondo etshi badi bakebela tshimanyinu tshinyi? Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Kabena baha ba mu tshikondo etshi tshimanyinu." 
Mark8:13 Yeye wakabashia, wakabuela mu buatu kabidi, wakaya dishia." 
Mark8:14 Muoyo wakabahua bua kuangata mitanda ya bidia; bakadi mu buatu anu ne mutanda umue. 
Mark8:15 Yeye wakabambila bikole ne, Tangilai bimpe, nudimukile luevene lua Bafalese ne lua Helode." 
Mark8:16 Bobo bakambilangana ne, Buakuambileye nunku mbua tuetu katuakangata mitanda ya bidia," 
Mark8:17 Hakamanya Yesu bualu ebu, wakabakonka ne, Nudi nuambidilangana ne, Mbua tuetu katuakangata mitanda ya bidia, tshinyi? Kanuena bunvue bimpe tô ne katataka, anyi? Kanuena bamanye? Mitshima yenu idi mikole, anyi?" 
Mark8:18 Nudi ne mesu, kamina numona? Nudi ne matshu, kanuena nunvua? Kanuena nuvuluka?" 
Mark8:19 Hanakatshibuila bantu binunu bitanu mitanda itanu, nuakangula bisaka bungi munyi biule tente ne bihesa? Bakamuambila ne, Dikumi ne bibidi." 
Mark8:20 Hanakatshibuila bantu binunu binai mitanda muanda mutekete, nuakangula bisaka bungi munyi biule tente ne bihesa? Bakamuambila ne, Muanda mutekete." 
Mark8:21 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Kanuena nujingulula bimpe tô ne katataka, anyi?" 
Mark8:22 Bakalua ku Bete-saîda. Bakalua kudiye ne mufofo, bakamutendekena ne, Umulenge tshianza." 
Mark8:23 Wakakuata mufofo ku tshianza tshiandi, wakaluhuka nʼandi mu musoko; hakamutuileye lute mu mesu andi, wakamulenga bianza, wakamukonka ne, Udi umona tshintu, anyi?" 
Mark8:24 Hakatangila mufofo mulu, wakamba ne, Ndi ntangila bantu; ndi mbamona benda bu mitshi." 
Mark8:25 Wakamulenga bianza ku mesu andi tshiakabidi; mufofo wakatangila talalâ, wakatabala kabidi, wakamona bintu bionso bimpe." 
Mark8:26 Yesu wakamutuma kuandi ne, Kubuedi mu musoko." 
Mark8:27 Yesu ne bayidi bandi bakaya mu misoko ya Kaisalia wa Filipoi; yeye wakakonka bayidi bandi mu nshila ne, Bantu badi hangamba meme ne, Nganyi?" 
Mark8:28 Bakamuambila ne, Bakuabo badi bamba ne, Yeye udi Yone Mubatiji; bakuabo ne, Yeye udi Eliya; bakuabo ne, Yeye udi muprofete." 
Mark8:29 Wakabakonka ne, Kadi nuenu nudi nungamba ne, Meme ndi nganyi? Petelo wakamuandamuna ne, Wewe udi Kilisto." 
Mark8:30 Yeye wakabambila bikole ne, Kanungambi kudi muntu mukuabo." 
Mark8:31 Yeye wakabanga kumanyisha bayidi bandi ne, Budi Muana wa muntu nʼabu mbua kukengeshibua makenga a bungi, ne bua kuedibua kudi bakulu ne kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne kudi bafundi, ne bua kushihibua, ne bua kubika hahita matuku asatu." 
Mark8:32 Yeye wakajukuila bantu bonso dî edi. Petelo wakaya ne Yesu, wakabanga kumubela." 
Mark8:33 Kadi Yesu wakatshinguluka; hakamoneye bayidi bandi, wakabela Petelo ne, Satana, yila ku nyima kuanyi, bualu bua wewe kuena welangana meshi a malu a Nzambi, udi welangana meshi anu a malu a bantu." 
Mark8:34 Yesu wakabikila tshisumbu tshia bantu ne bayidi bandi, wakabambila ne, Biasua muntu kundonda, adihidie, ambule mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, andonde." 
Mark8:35 Bualu bua wasua kusungila muoyo wandi neaujimishe; wajimisha muoyo wandi bua bualu buanyi ne bua lumu luimpe neausungile. 
Mark8:36 Biasumba muntu buloba buonso ku muoyo wandi, mushinga wandi muimpe udi hanyi?" 
Mark8:37 Muntu udi ne tshintu kai tshia kushintakasheye bua kuangateye muoyo wandi kabidi? 
Mark8:38 Muntu yonso udi unfua meme ne mei anyi bundu mu tshikondo etshi tshia masandi ne tshia malu mabi, Muana wa muntu neamufue yeye bundu, halueye ne banjelo ba tshijila mu butumbi bua Tatu wandi." 
Mark9:1 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bakuabo badi bimana aha kabena bafua tô ne hamonabo bukelenge bua Nzambi bulua ne bukole buabu." 
Mark9:2 Hakahita matuku asambombo, Yesu wakangata Petelo ne Yakobo ne muanʼabo Yone, wakabanda nʼabo ku mukuna mule, bobo nkayabo; yeye wakakudimuka ku mesu kuabo;" 
Mark9:3 bilulu biandi biakengelela, biakadi bitoke tô, buvu ba bilulu bonso ba ha buloba kabena bamanye mua kubitokesha nunku." 
Mark9:4 Eliya ne Mose bakamueneka kudibo; bakadi bayikila ne Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Petelo wakandamuna Yesu ne, Labi, hatudi kunoko mbimpe, tuenzai bitanda bisatu, tshikuabo ntshiebe, tshinga ntshia Mose, tshikuabo ntshia Eliya." 
Mark9:6 Yeye kakamanya dî dia kubakudimuna, bualu bua bobo bakadi batshina." 
Mark9:7 Ditutu diakalua, diakababuikila, dî diakaluhuka mu ditutu ne, Eu udi Muanʼanyi munanga, munvuilai." 
Mark9:8 Hakakenzakanabo lukasa, kabakamona muntu mukuabo, anu Yesu nguakadi nʼabo." 
Mark9:9 Hakadibo bahueka ha mukuna, yeye wakabambila bikole ne, nuambidi muntu mukuabo bualu bunuakumona tô ne habika Muana wa muntu ku lufu." 
Mark9:10 Bakateka di edi munda muabo, bakadi bakonkangana ne, Kubika ku lufu kudi munyi?" 
Mark9:11 Bakamukonka ne, Bafundi batu bambila tshinyi ne, Budi Eliya nʼabu mbua kudianjileye kutua diambedi?" 
Mark9:12 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, Eliya udi ulua diambedi, udi ulongolola bintu bionso bu muakadibi diambedi; bakafundila Muana wa muntu tshinyi ne, Neakenge makenga a bungi, nebamuhetule?" 
Mark9:13 Kadi meme ndi nuambila ne, Eliya wakumana kulua, bakumuenzela bualu buakasuabo, ba muakadibo bamufundile." 
Mark9:14 Hakaluabo kudi bayidi, bakatangila tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu tshibunguile ne bafundi babakonka malu." 
Mark9:15 Hakamumona bantu, bakatamba kukema, bakaya kudiye lukasa, bakamuela muoyo." 
Mark9:16 Yeye wakabebesha ne, Nudi nubakonka tshinyi?" 
Mark9:17 Muntu wa mu tshisumbu wakamuandamuna ne, Muyishi, nakulua kûdi ne muanʼanyi mulume, yeye udi ne nyuma mubi wa kamama;" 
Mark9:18 kuonso kudiye umuendesha utu wamututa hanshi; muana utu wahatuka lututu ku mishiku, utu wasumakana mena, udi unyanganyanga; nakulomba bayidi bebe mua kumushabo nyuma, kadi bobo kabakamanya mua kumumusha." 
Mark9:19 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nuenu ba tshikondo etshi tshia buhidia, nenshale nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Nentate nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Luai nʼandi kundi." 
Mark9:20 Bakalua nʼandi kudiye; hakamumoneye, nyuma mubi wakamuhaluisha bikole; muana wakadikuma hanshi, wakabunguluka, wakahatuka lututu ku mishiku." 
Mark9:21 Yesu wakakonka tatu wandi ne, Bualu ebu buakulua kudi muana musangu bule munyi? Yeye wakandamuna ne, Hakadiye muana." 
Mark9:22 Misangu ya bungi budi bumuela mu kahia ne mu mai bua kumushiha; kadi biwamanya mua kuenza bualu, utufue luse, utukuatshishe." 
Mark9:23 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Binamanya mua kuenza bualu! Bitabusha muntu, malu onso adi mua kumuenzekela." 
Mark9:24 Tatu wa muana wakela dî diandi lukasa ne, Ndi ngitabusha; unkuatshishe, umane mpata yanyi." 
Mark9:25 Hakamona Yesu bantu ba bungi bunguila lukasa, wakabela nyuma wa bukoya, wakamuambila ne, Wewe nyuma wa kamama ne wa mahaha, ndi nku buluila ne, Umuka munda muandi, kubuedimu kabidi." 
Mark9:26 Nyuma wakela dî bikole, wakahaluisha muana bikole, wakumuka munda muandi; muana wakadi bu muntu mufue; bantu ba bungi bakamba ne, Wafu." 
Mark9:27 Kadi Yesu wakamukuata ku tshianza, wakamubisha, wakabika." 
Mark9:28 Hakabueleye mu nsubu, bayidi bandi bakamukonka nkayabo ne, Kadi tuetu tuakuhangila mua kumumusha bua tshinyi?" 
Mark9:29 Yeye wakabambila ne, Mushindu eu udi mumanye mua kumuka anu ku ditendelela." 
Mark9:30 Bakumukaku, bakahitshila mu Galela. Yesu kakasua bantu bamanye bualu ebu." 
Mark9:31 Yeye wakadi uyisha bayidi bandi ne, Nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu, nebamushihe; hamushihabo, yeye neabike kabidi, hahita matuku asatu." 
Mark9:32 Kadi bobo kabakamanya mei au, bakatshina mua kumukonka." 
Mark9:33 Bakalua ku Kapênuma; hakadiye mu nsubu, wakabakonka ne, Hanuakadi mu nshila, nuakuelangana mpata ya tshinyi?" 
Mark9:34 Bakahua, bualu bua bobo bakadi belangana mpata mu nshila ne, Udi mutambe bakuabo nganyi?" 
Mark9:35 Yeye wakashikama, wakabikila bayidi dikumi ne babidi, wakabambila ne, Biasua muntu kuhita ku mpala, yeye neashale ku nyima kua bonso, neikale muena mudimu wa buonso buabo." 
Mark9:36 Yeye wakangata muana mukese, wakamushikika munkatshi muabo, wakamuambula mu maboko andi, wakabambila ne," 
Mark9:37 Witabusha muana mukese nunku mu dina dianyi udi ungitabusha meme; wangitabusha meme, kena ungitabusha meme nkayanyi, udi witabusha udi muntume." 
Mark9:38 Yone wakambila Yesu ne, Muyishi, tuakutangila muntu umusha bademon munda mua bantu mu dina diebe; tuakumukanda bualu bua yeye kakadi utulonda." 
Mark9:39 Kadi Yesu wakamba ne, Kanumukandi; bienza muntu bualu bua kukema mu dina dianyi, yeye kena mumanye mua kumpetula lukasa." 
Mark9:40 Udi kai utuhidia udi nʼetu. 
Mark9:41 Wanuha luhanza lua mai a kunua, bualu bua nuenu nudi ba Kilisto, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Kena uhanga kuangata difutu diandi." 
Mark9:42 Kadi bialenduisha muntu umue wa mu bantu aba bahuekele, biakadi kutamba buimpe kumusuika dibue dinene dia kuhela nʼadi mu nshinga muandi, kumuela mu mai manene." 
Mark9:43 Biakulenduisha tshianza tshiebe, watshikosa; bua wewe kubuela mu muoyo ne tshilema kudi kutamba bua wewe kuya mu Ngena ne bianza biebe bibidi, mu kahia kadi kakai kajima tshiendelele. [" 
Mark9:44 ] 
Mark9:45 Biakulenduisha dikasa diebe, wadikosa; bua wewe kubuela mu muoyo uzobela kudi kutamba bua wewe kuedibua mu Ngena ne makasa ebe abidi. [" 
Mark9:46 ] 
Mark9:47 Biakulenduisha disu diebe, wadimasha; bua wewe kubuela mu bukelenge bua Nzambi ne disu dimue kudi kutamba bua wewe kuimashibua mu Ngena ne mesu abidi;" 
Mark9:48 amu tshikusu tshiabo katshiena tshitua, kahia kakena kajima." 
Mark9:49 Bu mudibo batuisha bintu ne lueho, nunku muntu yonso neatuishibue ne kahia." 
Mark9:50 Lueho ludi luimpe; kadi hatshihala lueho kutua kualu, nenulutuishe kabidi ne tshinyi? Ikalai ne lueho munda muenu, ikalanganai talalâ." 
Mark10:1 Yesu wakabikaku, wakalua mu nseke ya Yudaya ne dishia dia Yadene; bantu ba bungi bakalua kudiye kabidi: yeye wakabayisha bu muakadiye wenza matuku onso." 
Mark10:2 Bafalese bakalua kudiye, bakamukonka ne, Biahidia mulume mukashi wandi neashihe mukenshi wa Nzambi, anyi? Bakamuteta munda nunku." 
Mark10:3 Yeye wakabandamuna, wakabakonka ne, Mose wakanuambila tshinyi?" 
Mark10:4 Bakamba ne, Mose wakitabusha bualu bua kufunda mukanda wa kushiha dibaka, ne bua kumumusha." 
Mark10:5 Kadi Yesu wakabambila ne, Yeye wakanufundila mukenshi eu bualu bua bukole bua mitshima yenu." 
Mark10:6 Kadi ku tshibangidilu tshia bufuki Nzambi wakabafuka mulume ne mukashi. 
Mark10:7 Bua bualu ebu mulume neumuke kudi tatuʼandi ne kudi mamuʼandi, nealamate mukashi wandi;" 
Mark10:8 bubidi buabo nebalue mubidi umue; nunku kabena bantu babidi kabidi, badi mubidi umue." 
Mark10:9 Muntu kahanduludi tshidi tshibumbakanya kudi Nzambi. 
Mark10:10 Hakayabo mu nsubu, bayidi bandi bakamukonka bualu ebu kabidi." 
Mark10:11 Yeye wakabambila ne, Wumusha mukashi wandi, habakeye mukuabo, yeye udi wenda masandi, nunku udi wenzela mukashi wandi bibi;" 
Mark10:12 biahidia mukashi bayandi, biayeye ku dibaka dikuabo, mukashi eu udi wenda masandi." 
Mark10:13 Bakadi balua ne bana bakese kudiye bua yeye kubalenga tshianza tshiandi; kadi bayidi bakabasamina. 
Mark10:14 Hakamona Yesu bualu ebu, wakadi ne tshishi, wakabambila ne, Nuitabushe bua bana bakese kulua kundi, kanubakandi; bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi mbua badi bu bana." 
Mark10:15 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi kai witabusha bukelenge bua Nzambi bu muana mukese, kena ubuelamu." 
Mark10:16 Yeye wakabambula mu maboko andi, wakabasankisha, wakabalenga bianza." 
Mark10:17 Hakadiye uya mu nshila, muntu wakalua lubilu kudiye, wakamutuila binu hanshi, wakamukonka ne, Muyishi muimpe, nengenze tshinyi mua kuhiana muoyo wa tshiendelele?" 
Mark10:18 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udi umbikidila meme ne, Muimpe, tshinyi? Kakuena munga muimpe anu Nzambi." 
Mark10:19 Wewe udi mumanye mikenshi ya Nzambi ne, Kushihi muntu, kuendi masandi, kuibi, kudingidi muntu, kunyengi tshintu tshia muntu, unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe." 
Mark10:20 Nsongalume wakamuambila ne, Muyishi, nakenzenza malu â onso, hanakadi muana mukese tô ne katataka." 
Mark10:21 Yesu wakamutangila talalâ, wakamunanga, wakamuambila ne, Bualu bumue mbukushala; ya biebe, uhane biudi nʼabi bionso, ubihe bantu bahele, newikale ne bintu mu tshibutshilu mu diulu, ulue kundonda meme." 
Mark10:22 Hakunvueye dî edi, wakabungama, wakaya unyingalala; bualu bua yeye wakadi ne bintu bia bungi." 
Mark10:23 Hakakenzakana Yesu, wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Ha kubuela kua bantu badi ne bintu bia bungi mu bukelenge bua Nzambi mbualu bukole." 
Mark10:24 Dî edi nunku diakakemesha bayidi bandi. Kadi Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Bana banyi, ha kubuela kua bantu badi beyemene biuma mu bukelenge bua Nzambi mbualu bukole." 
Mark10:25 Kubuela kua kamelu mu disu dia kashingi kudi kutamba kubuela kua muntu mubanshi mu bukelenge bua Nzambi butekete. 
Mark10:26 Bakatamba kukema, bakamukonka ne, Ahu udi mumanye mua kusungidibua nganyi?" 
Mark10:27 Yesu wakabajosha talalâ, wakabambila ne, Bantu kabena bamanye mua kuenza bualu ebu, kadi Nzambi udi mumanye mua kuenza malu onso." 
Mark10:28 Petelo wakabanga kumuambila ne, Ahu tuetu tuakushia malu etu onso, tuakukulonda." 
Mark10:29 Yesu wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi nuabila ne, Muntu yondo wakushila nsubu wandi, anyi nana babo balume, anyi bana babo bakashi, anyi mamuʼandi, anyi bana babo bana bandi, anyi madimi andi, bua bualu buanyi ne bua lumu luimpe," 
Mark10:30 katataka yeye neahete bintu misangu lukama bitambe bia diambedi mu tshikondo etshi, nsubu ne bana babo balume ne bana babo bakashi ne bamamu ne bana ne madimi, ne makenga kabidi; halua tshikondo tshikuabo, neahete muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Mark10:31 Kadi ba bungi badi ku mpala katataka nebikale ku nyima; badi ku nyima katataka nebikale ku mpala. 
Mark10:32 Bakadi mu nshila babanda ku Yelushalema; Yesu wakadi uya ku mpala kuabo; bakadi bakema; bakuabo bakadi balonda ku nyima bakatshina. Hakadiye ne bayidi dikumi ne babidi nkayabo, wakabanga kubamanyisha malu alua kudiye," 
Mark10:33 wakabambila ne, Unvuai, tudi tubanda ku Yelushalema; nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi; bobo nebamuhishe ne lufu, nebamufile mu bianza bia bisamba bia bende;" 
Mark10:34 bamuseke, bamutuile mate, bamukume, bamushihe: kadi hahita matuku asatu, yeye neabike kabidi." 
Mark10:35 Yakobo ne Yone, bana ba Zebedayo, bakalua kudi Yesu, bakamba ne, Muyishi, tudi basue wewe utuenzele malu onso atuakulomba." 
Mark10:36 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi basue meme nuenzele tshinyi?" 
Mark10:37 Bakamuambila ne, Witabushe bua tuetu kushikama nʼebe mu butumbi buebe, mukuabo ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume ne mukuabo ku tshianza tshiebe tshia babashi." 
Mark10:38 Kadi Yesu wakabambila ne, Kanu enu bamanye tshinudi nulomba. Nudi bamanye mua kunua luhanza lundi nua, anyi? Ne mua kubatijibua ne dibatiza diambatizabo nʼadi, anyi?" 
Mark10:39 Bobo bakandamuna ne, Tudi bamanye. Yesu wakabambila ne, Luhanza lundi nua, nenulunue kabidi; nebanubatize ne dibatiza didibo bambatiza nʼadi;" 
Mark10:40 kadi kushikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume anyi ku tshianza tshianyi tshia bakashi kambualu buanyi bua kuha muntu; kushikama nunku kudi bua bakabulongoluelabo kudi Nzambi. 
Mark10:41 Hakunvua bayidi diku mi bualu ebu, bakadi ne Yakobo ne Yone tshishi." 
Mark10:42 Yesu wakababikila, wakabambila ne, Nudi bamanye ne, Bakusungudibua bua kulumbulula malu a bantu ba bisamba bia bende badi babalongoluela malu abo ne diambu, bantu babo badi banene badi babakokesha." 
Mark10:43 Kadi bualu buenu kabuena nunku; wasua kulua munene munkatshi muenu neikale muena mudimu wenu; 
Mark10:44 wasua kuikala ha mutu henu neikale muhika wa buonso buenu. 
Mark10:45 Muana wa muntu kabidi kakuluila bua bantu bamukuatshile mudimu, wakuluila bua kubakuatshila mudimu, ne bua kufila muoyo wandi bua kuhikula nʼau bantu ba bungi." 
Mark10:46 Bakalua ku Yeleko; hakadiye uluhuka mu Yeleko ne bayidi bandi ne bantu bakuabo ba bungi, muana wa Timayo, dina diandi Bâtimayo, mufofo mulombi, wakadi ushikama kukala kua nshila." 
Mark10:47 Hakunvueye ne, Udi Yesu, muena Nazaleta, yeye wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Yesu, muana wa Davidi, unfue luse." 
Mark10:48 Bantu ba bungi bakamukanda ne, Hua; kadi yeye wakatamba kuela dî diandi bikole ne, Wewe muana wa Davidi, unfue luse." 
Mark10:49 Yesu wakimana, wakamba ne, Numubikile, Bakabikila muntu mufofo, bakamuambila ne, Kolesha mutshima webe, bika, yeye udi ukubikila." 
Mark10:50 Wakimasha tshilulu tshiandi, wakabika lubilu, wakalua kudi Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Udi musue meme nkuenzele tshinyi? Muntu mufofo wakamuambila ne, Muyishi wanyi, mesu anyi atabale." 
Mark10:52 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe; ditabusha diebe diakukusungila. Wakatabala lukasa, wakamulonda mu nshila." 
Mark11:1 Hakafikabo ha buihi ne Yelushalema, ku Bete-fage ne Betania, ku Mukuna wa Oleve, Yesu wakatuma bayidi bandi babidi," 
Mark11:2 wakabambila ne, Yai mu musoko udi buludiludi bunudi batangile; hanuabuelamu, nenumone muana wa nyama wa mpunda musuika, muntu kena muanze kushikama ha nyima handi; numusulule, nulue nʼandi." 
Mark11:3 Bianukonka muntu ne, Nudi nuenzela nunku tshinyi? Numuambile ne, Mukelenge udi nʼandi bualu; yeye neamuhingishe lubilu." 
Mark11:4 Bakaya, bakasangana muana wa mpunda musuika mu musesu ku mbelu kua nsubu; bakamusulula." 
Mark11:5 Bakuabo bakadi bimana aha bakabakonka ne, Nudi nusuluila muana wa mpunda tshinyi?" 
Mark11:6 Bakabambila bu muakamba Yesu; bakitabusha ne, Yai bienu." 
Mark11:7 Bakalua ne muana wa mpunda kudi Yesu, bakateka bivualu biabo ha nyima handi, Yesu wakashikama ha nyima handi." 
Mark11:8 Bantu ba bungi bakâdisha bivualu biabo mu nshila, bakuabo bakâdisha bisala bia mitshi biakakosabo mu madimi." 
Mark11:9 Bakadi baya ku mpala kuandi ne bakadi bamulonda ku nyima kuandi bakela mbila ne, Hosana, udi ulua mu dina dia Mukelenge atumbishibue;" 
Mark11:10 bukelenge budi bulua butumbishibue, bukelenge bua tatu wetu Davidi; Hosana mu diulu!" 
Mark11:11 Yesu wakabuela mu Yelushalema, mu ntempelo mene; hakatangileye malu onso akadimu, bualu bua diba diakamba kubuela, yeye wakaluhuka, wakaya ne bayidi dikumi ne babidi ku Betania." 
Mark11:12 Hakatshiabu, bakaluhuka mu Betania, Yesu wakadi ne nsala." 
Mark11:13 Hakamoneye mutshi wa nfigi kuakua muikale ne mabeshi, wakalua kudiu ne, Mpete mamuma; hakalueye, wakasangana mutshi mutuhu, anu mabeshi, bualu bua katshiakadi tshikondo tshia nfigi." 
Mark11:14 Yeye wakambila mutshi ne, Muntu kadî dimuma diebe tô tshiendelele. Bayidi bandi bakunvua dî edi." 
Mark11:15 Bakalua ku Yelushalema, Yesu wakabuela mu ntempelo, wakabanga kuihata bakadi bahana bintu ne bakadi basumba bintu mu ntempelo, wakatokola mesa a bashintakashi ba mpalata, ne nkuasa ya basumbishi ba nyunyu ya nkutshi;" 
Mark11:16 yeye kakitabusha bua mu ntu ahitshile ne tshintu mu ntempelo. 
Mark11:17 Wakabayisha ne, Kabakafunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Nebabikile nsubu wanyi ne, Nsubu wa tshitendelelu tshia bisamba bionso, anyi? Kadi nuenu nuakumuvuisha muaba wa banyengi." 
Mark11:18 Bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi bakunvua dî edi, bakakeba mua kumushiha; bakamutshina, bualu bua diyisha diandi diakakemesha bantu bonso." 
Mark11:19 Ku dituku ku dituku wakadi uhatuka mu musoko, hakamba diba kubuela." 
Mark11:20 Hakadibo bahita mu nshila dinda, bakamona mutshi wa nfigi mufubidile tô ne ku miji yau." 
Mark11:21 Hakuvuluka Petelo, wakambila Yesu ne, Labi, ahu mutshi wa nfigi, uwakuela mulau wakufuba." 
Mark11:22 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nuitabushe Nzambi mene." 
Mark11:23 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso wambila mukuna eu ne, Ubishibue, wedibue mu mai manene, yeye neikale ne bualu buakulombeye bikaleye kai ne mpata munda, bikaleye witabusha ne, Bualu bundi ndomba nebulue." 
Mark11:24 Nunku ndi nuambila ne, Hanuatendelela Nzambi, binuamulomba tshintu tshionso, nenutshiangate, binuikala bitabushe ne, Tuakumana kutshiangata." 
Mark11:25 Hanuimana nutendelela Nzambi, nujimishile mualu bubi buandi, binuikala nʼandi tshilumbu; nunku Tatu wenu udi mu diulu neanujimishile mibi yenu. [" 
Mark11:26 ] 
Mark11:27 Bakalua mu Yelushalema kabidi; hakadiye utambakana mu ntempelo, bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi ne bakulu bakalua kudiye;" 
Mark11:28 bakamukonka ne, Wewe udi wenza malu â ne bukokeshi kai? Wakukuha bukokeshi ebu bua kuenza nʼabu malu â nganyi?" 
Mark11:29 Yesu wakabambila ne, Meme kabidi nenukonke bualu bumue; binuangandamuna bimpe, nenuambile bualu bua bukokeshi bundi ngenza nʼabu malu â." 
Mark11:30 Dibatiza dia Yone diakafuma kudi kunyi; mu diulu anyi kudi bantu? Nungandamune. 
Mark11:31 Bobo bakelangana meshi munda munda ne, Bituamba ne, Mu diulu, yeye neatuebeshe ne, Munyi kanuakamuitabusha?" 
Mark11:32 Kadi bituamba ne, Kudi bantu,—bakatshina bantu, bua bantu bonso bakitabusha Yone ne, Udi muprofete." 
Mark11:33 Bakandamuna Yesu ne, Katuena bamanye. Yesu wakabambila ne, Meme kabidi tshiena nuambila bua bukokeshi bundi ngenza nʼabu malu â." 
Mark12:1 Yesu wakabanga kubambila malu mu nsumuinu. Muntu wakatentula mionshi ya mamuma a nvinyo mu budimi buandi, wakelela budimi luhangu lua mitshi idi isasa, wakimbamu dinu dia kukamina mamuma, wakasa nsubu wa batentekedi mule, wakabushîa mu bianza bia ba bidime, wakaya biandi ku luseke lukuabo kule." 
Mark12:2 Hakalua tshidimu tshia mamuma, wakatuma muntu wandi kudi ba bidime bua kuangata mamuma a mu budimi buandi kudi ba bidime." 
Mark12:3 Kadi bobo bakamukuata, bakamukuma, bakamuhingisha hatuhu." 
Mark12:4 Wakatuma muntu wandi mukuabo kudibo; bakamutaha mu mutu, bakamuenzela bibi." 
Mark12:5 Wakatuma mukuabo; bakamushiha; wakatuma bakuabo ba bungi; kadi ba bidime bakakuma bakuabo, bakashiha bakuabo." 
Mark12:6 Yeye wakadi ne muanʼandi umue mulela, wakadiye munange; wakamutuma kudibo kunshikidilu, wakamba ne, Nebanemeke muanʼanyi." 
Mark12:7 Kadi ba bidime aba bakambilangana ne, Eu udi muhianyi; tuyai, tumushihe, buhianyi nebuikale buetu." 
Mark12:8 Bakamukuata, bakamushiha, bakamuimasha mu budimi." 
Mark12:9 Bua bobo bakenza nunku, muena budimi nenze tshinyi? Yeye nealue kushiha ba bidime, neahe bakuabo budimi buandi." 
Mark12:10 Kanuakubala dî dia mu Mukanda wa Nzambi, anyi, ne, Dibue diakahidiabo kudi bibaki ba nsubu Bakaditeka ku mutu kua ditumba;" 
Mark12:11 Eu mudimu wa Mukelenge, Udi bu bualu bua kukema ku mesu kuetu?" 
Mark12:12 Hakunvuabo dî idi dia Yesu, bakasua kumukuata, kadi bakatshina bantu; bakamanya ne, Buakueleleye lusumuinu etu mbualu buetu; bakamushia, bakaya." 
Mark12:13 Bakatuma Bafalese bakuabo ne Bena Helode kudiye bua kumukuata ku mei. 
Mark12:14 Hakaluabo, bakamuambila ne, Muyishi, tudi bamanye ne, Wewe kuena utshina muntu, bualu bua kuena ne bualu ne muntu, wewe udi uyisha bantu nshila wa Nzambi bulelela. Mbimpe kuha Kaisa mulambu, anyi?" 
Mark12:15 Netumuhe mulambu, anyi katumuhi? Kadi yeye wakamanya lubombo luabo, wakabambila ne, Nudi nuntetshila munda tshinyi? Luai ne ndenalio kunoko, nmutangile." 
Mark12:16 Bakalua nʼandi. Yeye wakabakonka ne, Tshindidimbi etshi ne mei â adi mafundahu mbia nganyi? Bakamuambila ne, Mbia Kaisa." 
Mark12:17 Yesu wakabambila ne, Nuhe Kaisa bintu bia Kaisa, nuhe Nzambi bintu bia Nzambi. Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakatamba kumukema." 
Mark12:18 Basadoke bakahia kudiye, badi bamba ne, Dibika dia ku lufu kadienaku; bakamukonka ne," 
Mark12:19 Muyishi, Mose wakafundila ne, Biafua muanʼabo ne muntu, biashîeye mukashi wandi kai ne muana, muanʼabo angate mukashi wandi, alelele muanʼabo wakafua bana." 
Mark12:20 Balume ba difu dimue muanda mutekete bakadiku. Muanʼa bute wakabaka mukashi, wakafua biandi, kakashila muana;" 
Mark12:21 muibidi wakangata mukashi, yeye wakafua, kakashila muana; ne muisatu kabidi wakenza nunku;" 
Mark12:22 buonso buabo muanda mutekete kabakasua bana. Ku nyima kua bonso, mukashi wakafua kabidi." 
Mark12:23 Halua dibika dia bantu ku lufu, yeye neikale mukashi wa nganyi? Wakadi mukashi wa buonso buabo muanda mutekete." 
Mark12:24 Yesu wakabambila ne, Ebu mbualu bunudi nuhambukila mu nshila, kanuena bamanye Mukanda wa Nzambi ne tukole buandi." 
Mark12:25 Habika bantu ku lufu kabena babaka, kabena babakibua; badi bu banjelo ba mu diulu." 
Mark12:26 Kadi bualu bua bantu bafue ne bua dibisha diabo ku lufu, kanuakubala mukanda wa Mose mu luseke lua bualu bua Katshi, anyi? Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Ndi bianyi Nzambi wa Abalahama, ne Nzambi wa Isaka, ne Nzambi wa Yakoba." 
Mark12:27 Yeye kena Nzambi wa bafue, udi Nzambi wa badi ne muoyo; nuenu nuakutamba kuhambuka." 
Mark12:28 Mufundi mukuabo wakalua, wakuntua muakadibo bakonkangana; hakamanyeye ne, Yesu wakubandamuna bimpe, wakamukonka ne, Mukenshi kai udi mutambe mikuabo yonso?" 
Mark12:29 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Mukenshi wa kumudilu udi nunku: Unvua, Isalele, Mukelenge Nzambi wetu, Mukelenge udi umue;" 
Mark12:30 sua Mukelenge Nzambi webe ne mutshima webe wonso ne muoyo webe wonso ne lungenyi luebe luonso ne bukole buebe buonso. 
Mark12:31 Mukenshi muibidi udi nunku: Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue. Kakuena mukenshi mukuabo udi mutambe ei. 
Mark12:32 Mufundi wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, Muyishi, wewe wakuamba bimpe ne, Yeye udi umue; yeye udiku nkayandi;" 
Mark12:33 kumusua ne mutshima wonso ne lungenyi luonso ne bukole tuonso, kusua kabidi mukuabo bu mudiye mudisue kudi kutamba milambu yonso ya kuosha ne nyama mishiha." 
Mark12:34 Hakamanya Yesu ne, Yeye wakuandamuna dî dia lungenyi, Yesu wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi ha buihi ne bukelenge bua Nzambi. Hakashika bualu ebu, kakuakadi muntu wakadi ne bukitu bua kumukonka bualu." 
Mark12:35 Hakadi Yesu uyisha bantu mu ntempelo, yeye wakabakonka ne, Bafundi badi bamba ne, Kilisto udi muana wa Davidi, munyi?" 
Mark12:36 Davidi mene wakamba mu Nyuma Muimpe ne, Mukelenge wakambila Mukelenge wanyi ne, Shikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume Tô ne hanateka badi nʼebe lukuna munshi mua makasa ebe." 
Mark12:37 Davidi wakamubikila ne, Mukelenge, yeye udi muanʼandi munyi? Kadi bantu ba tshianana ba bungi bakadi bunvua mei andi ne disanka." 
Mark12:38 Hakadiye ubayisha, wakabambila ne, Nudimukile bafundi, bobo badi basue kuendakana baluate bikowelu bile, badi basue bantu babasekelele mu bisalu," 
Mark12:39 badi basue nkuasa minene mu nsunagoga, badi basue miaba minene hayabo ku bidia bia disanka;" 
Mark12:40 bobo kabidi batu banyenga nsubu ya bakashi ba mu lufuila; batu batendelela Nzambi musangu mule anu bualu bua lubombo luabo; kuhila kuabo nekutambe bunene. 
Mark12:41 Yesu wakashikama buludiludi ne tshibutshilu, wakadi utangila bu muakadi bantu bela mpalata mu tshibutshilu; bantu babanshi ba bungi bakela mpalata ya bungi." 
Mark12:42 Mukashi muhele wa mu lufuila wakalua, wakelamu tukuta tubidi, tuakadi bu nsantima ibidi." 
Mark12:43 Yesu wakabikila bayidi bandi, wakabambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bintu biakuela mukashi eu muhele wa mu lufuila bidi bitambe bidi bakuabo bonso bela mu tshibutshilu;" 
Mark12:44 buonso buabo bakuela bintu biakadibo kabai nʼabi bualu, bia ha mutu; kadi mukashi eu wakuela bintu biakadiye nʼabi bualu, bintu biandi bionso bia kudia mene mene." 
Mark13:1 Hakadi Yesu uluhuka mu ntempelo, muyidi wandi mukuabo wakamuambila ne, Muyishi, mona mabue â manene ne bunene bua nsubu ya ntempelo:" 
Mark13:2 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udi umona nsubu ei minene, anyi? Kabena bashîa dibue dimue ha mutu ha dikuabo, nebâsasule buonso buau." 
Mark13:3 Hakadiye ushikama ku mukuna wa Oleve buludiludi ne ntempelo, Petelo ne Yakobo ne Yone ne Andele bakamukonka nkayabo ne," 
Mark13:4 Utuambile bualu, malu â nealue dituku kai? Tshimanyinu tshia malu â ne akadi ha kulua ntshinyi?" 
Mark13:5 Yesu wakabanga kubambila ne, Nuende badimuke, muntu kanuhambuishi." 
Mark13:6 Ba bungi nebalue mu dina dianyi, bamba ne, Meme nyeye mene; nebahambuishe bantu ba bungi." 
Mark13:7 Hanunvua bualu bua nvita ne ngumu ya nvita, kanuhampakanyi; malu au nealue, kadi nshikidilu kena muanze kulua." 
Mark13:8 Tshisamba tshikuabo netshiluangane ne tshinga, bukelenge bukuabo nebuluangane ne bunga, buloba nebukanke ku nseke ne ku nseke, biole nebikaleku; malu au adi tshibangidilu tshia kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Mark13:9 Nuende badimuke, bualu bua bantu nebanufile kudi balumbuludi babo, nebanukume mu nsunagoga yabo, nenuimane ku mesu kua ba-ngovena ne ku mesu kua banfumu bua bualu buanyi, nenuikale bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kuabo." 
Mark13:10 Nebambile bisamba bionso lumu luimpe diambedi. 
Mark13:11 Hayabo nʼenu ku tshilumbuluidi, hanufilabo, kanutambi kuelangana meshi diambedi ne, Netuambe tshinyi? Nuambe bualu buanuhabo kudi Nyuma Muimpe diba adi; nuenu kanuena nuamba, Nyuma Muimpe udi wamba." 
Mark13:12 Muanʼabo ne muntu neafile muanʼabo ku lufu, tatu neafile muanʼandi, bana nebatombokele batatuʼabo ne bamamuʼabo, nebabashiheshe." 
Mark13:13 Bantu bonso nebikale nʼenu lukuna bua dina dianyi; kudi wananukila tô ne kunshikidilu neasungidibue. 
Mark13:14 Kadi hanuamona tshinyanga tshia dibutuka tshimane mu muaba Udi kawi watshi (udi ubala bualu ebu amanye biandi), ha diba adi badi mu Yudaya banyemene ku mikuna;" 
Mark13:15 udi ha mutu ha nsubu katuluki mu nsubu muandi bua kuangata bintu bidimu; 
Mark13:16 udi mu budimi kahinganyi bua kuangata tshikowelu tshiandi. 
Mark13:17 Kadi dikenga dikole nedikale kudi badi ne mafu ne kudi badi bâmusha bana mabele mu matuku au. 
Mark13:18 Nulombe Nzambi ne, Bualu ebu kabutu mu tshidimu tshia mashika." 
Mark13:19 Matuku au neikale dikenga dikole, ku tshibangidilu tshia bufuki buakafuka Nzambi tô ne katataka kakuakadi dikenga bu edi, kadiena dilua kabidi tshiendelele." 
Mark13:20 Bu Mukelenge kai mukeheshe matuku au, muntu umue kakadi kuhanduka; kadi yeye wakukehesha matuku au bualu bua bantu bandi bakusunguleye." 
Mark13:21 Bianuambila muntu ne, Kilisto udi aha, anyi, Udi kuakua, kanumuitabushi;" 
Mark13:22 bualu bua ba-Kilisto ba mashimi nebalue, ne baprofete ba mashimi, nebaleshe bantu bimanyinu ne malu a kukema bua kuhambuisha badibo basungula kudi Nzambi mene, biamanyabo mua kuenza nunku." 
Mark13:23 Dimukai bienu, nakunuambila malu onso diambedi." 
Mark13:24 Mu matuku au, hashika dikenga, diba nedifikuluke, ngondo kena ukenka," 
Mark13:25 mitoto neituke mulu, neihone, nebanyukule bukole buakadi buendesha bintu ebi mu diulu." 
Mark13:26 Hashishe, nebamone muana wa muntu ulua mu matutu ne bukole buandi bunene ne butumbi buandi." 
Mark13:27 Hashishe kabidi, yeye neatume banjelo bandi, neasangishe bakusunguleye ba ku mpehele inai, kunfudilu kua buloba tô ne kunfudilu kua diulu." 
Mark13:28 Nuyile lusumuinu lua mutshi wa nfigi: hatoloka lutonga luau, hasampila mabeshi alu, nenumanye ne, Tshidimu tshia mayowa tshidi ha buihi;" 
Mark13:29 nunku nuenu kabidi hanuamona malu â onso alua, nenumanye ne, Yeye udi ha buihi, udi ku mbelu mene mene." 
Mark13:30 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bantu ba tshikondo etshi kabena bashika tô ne hashika malu â onso." 
Mark13:31 Diulu ne buloba nebijimine, kadi mei anyi kêna ajimina." 
Mark13:32 Kadi bua dituku adi ne ha diba adi kakuena muntu udi mumanye, banjelo mene mene ba mu diulu kabena bamanye, Muana kena mumanye, anu Tatu udi mumanye." 
Mark13:33 Dimukai, nutabale bimpe, nutendelele Nzambi; bua kanuena bamanye dituku adi haluadi." 
Mark13:34 Bualu ebu budi bu muntu wakaya ku luendu ku luseke lukuabo; wakashîa nsubu wandi, wakabanyina bantu bandi bukokeshi, muntu mudimu wandi muntu mudimu wandi, wakambila kabidi mulami wa ku tshibi ne, Udimuke." 
Mark13:35 Nuenu nudimuke; bua kanuena bamanye dituku dialua muena nsubu, ne ndilolo, ne mundankulu, ne mpasama tshitala tshiambedi, ne ndinda;" 
Mark13:36 bialueye lukasa, kalu kunusangana balale tulu." 
Mark13:37 Ndi ngambila bantu bonso dî dinakunuambila ne, Dimukai." 
Mark14:1 Hakahita matuku abidi, disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa ne dia bidia bidi kabi ne luevene diakalua; bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi bakakeba bua kumukuata mu busokoko ne mua kumushiha;" 
Mark14:2 bakamba ne, Katuenji nunku mu matuku a disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa, diyoyo dia bantu nedijuke." 
Mark14:3 Yesu wakadi mu Betania, mu nsubu wa Simona muena nsudi, hakadiye mushikame udia bidia, mukashi wakalua ne mulonda wa alabasta, mu mulondo muakadi mananashi a mushinga mutambe bukole, luenza ne nâdo mulelela; wakatshibula mulondo, wakamuela mananashi ha mutu handi." 
Mark14:4 Kadi bakuabo bakadi ne tshishi, bakamba ne, Bakunyangila mananashi nunku bua tshinyi?" 
Mark14:5 Bakadi kuhana mananashi au ku mushinga udi mutambe ndenalio nkama isatu ya kuha bantu bahele. Bakamujiana nunku. 
Mark14:6 Kadi Yesu wakamba ne, Numulekele; nudi numutatshishila tshinyi? Yeye wakungenzela bimpe." 
Mark14:7 Nudi ne bahele matuku onso munkatshi muenu; nudi bamanye mua kubenzela bimpe dituku dionso dinuasua; kadi kanuena nʼanyi meme matuku onso. 
Mark14:8 Mukashi eu wakuenza bu muakumanyeye mua kuenza; yeye wakungela mananashi hamʼbidi hanyi kabai banze kunjika. 
Mark14:9 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Mu miaha yonso ya ha buloba buonso yambabo lumu ela luimpe, nebambe kabidi bualu buakuenza mukashi eu, buikale bu tshivulukidi tshiandi." 
Mark14:10 Yudasa Isakaliote wa mu bayidi dikumi ne babidi wakaya kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi bua kumufila kudibo. 
Mark14:11 Hakunvuabo bualu abu, mitshima yabo yakasanka, bakamulaya mpalata. Nunku yeye wakakeba tshikondo tshiakane tshia kumufila mu bianza biabo." 
Mark14:12 Hakalua dituku dia kumudilu dia disanka dia bidia bidi kabi biela luevene, diakashihashihabo bana ba mikoko ya Kuhita kua Yehowa, bayidi ba Yesu bakalua kudiye, bakamuebesha ne, Udi musue tuye kulongolola ha wewe kudila Kuhita kua Yehowa kudi kunyi?" 
Mark14:13 Yeye wakatuma bayidi bandi babidi, wakabambila ne, Yai mu tshimenga, nenusangile ne mulume utuala mulondo wa mai; numulonde;" 
Mark14:14 nsubu wabueleye nuambile muena nsubu ne, Muyishi udi ukonka ne, Nsubu wanyi wa buenyi unadila bidia bia Kuhita kua Yehowa ne bayidi banyi udi hanyi?" 
Mark14:15 Yeye neanuleshe nsubu munene wa mulu nuimana kulongolola bintu bionso; nuenu nutulongoluelemu. 
Mark14:16 Bayidi babidi bakaya, bakalua mu tshimenga, bakasangana bu muakabambileye; bakalongolola Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Mark14:17 Hakabuela diba, Yesu wakalua ne bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi." 
Mark14:18 Hakadibo bashikame badia, Yesu wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muanʼenu mukuabo neantungile tshitungu, yeye mene udi udia nʼanyi." 
Mark14:19 Mitshima yabo yakabanga kunyingalala, bakamukonka ku muntu ku muntu ne, Meme, anyi?" 
Mark14:20 Yeye wakabambila ne, Udi biandi wa ba dikumi ne babidi, udi utua nʼanyi tshianza mu dilonga." 
Mark14:21 Bualu bua Muana wa muntu udi uya bu muakamufundabo, kadi mulau neulue kudi wakutungila Muana wa muntu tshitungu; biakadi bimpe bu muntu eu kai muledibue." 
Mark14:22 Hakadibo badia, yeye wakamema mutanda wa bidia; hakatendeleleye Nzambi, wakautshibula, wakabaha, wakamba ne, Angatai bienu, etshi tshidi mubidi wanyi" 
Mark14:23 Wakamema luhanza; hakasakidileye Nzambi, wakabahalu; buonso buabo bakanua." 
Mark14:24 Yeye wakabambila ne, Etshi tshidi mashi anyi a dihungila, akamatshila bantu ba bungi." 
Mark14:25 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Tshiena nua maluvu kabidi tô ne halua dituku dinanua maluvu mahia-mahia mu bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Mark14:26 Hakimbabo musambu, bakaluhuka, bakaya mu mukuna wa Oleve." 
Mark14:27 Yesu wakabambila ne, Buonso buenu nenulenduke; bua bakafunda ne, Nenshihe mulami wa mikoko, mikoko neitangadike." 
Mark14:28 Kadi hanabika, nenye ku mpala kuenu mu Galela." 
Mark14:29 Kadi Petelo wakamuambila ne, Bialenduka bakuabo bonso, meme tshiena ndenduka." 
Mark14:30 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Lelu, butuku ebu mene, tshitala katshi tshianze kusama misangu ibidi, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu." 
Mark14:31 Kadi Petelo wakamba ne bulobo ne, Bikala bualu bunkuata bua kufua nʼebe, tshiena nkuhidia. Buonso buabo bakamba nunku kabidi." 
Mark14:32 Bakalua mu muaba wakadibo babikila ne, Getesemane; yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Shikamai aha, hanatendelela Nzambi." 
Mark14:33 Wakaya biandi ne Petelo ne Yakobo ne Yone, wakabanga kukema bikole, mutshima wandi wakatamba kunema." 
Mark14:34 Yeye wakabambila ne, Mutshima wanyi udi utamba kunyingalala, lufu ludi luntonda; nushale aha, nutabale." 
Mark14:35 Wakaya biandi ku mpala tshituha, wakadikuma hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakamba ne, Biwamanya mua kuenza nunku, tshituha etshi tshia diba tshimpite." 
Mark14:36 Wakamba kabidi ne, Aba, Tatu, wewe udi mumanye mua kuenza malu onso; ungumushile luhanza elu; kadi bualu buenjibue bu mûdi musue, kabuenjibu bu mundi musue." 
Mark14:37 Wakalua, wakabasangana balale tulu, wakakonka Petelo ne, Simona, udi mulale tulu? Wewe kuakumanya mua kutabala tshituha tshimue tshia diba?" 
Mark14:38 Nudimuke, nutendelele Nzambi; nunku kanuhonyi mu mateyi; mutshima udi musue nunku, kadi mubidi udi mutekete." 
Mark14:39 Wakaya tshiakabidi, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakadi wamba mei momumue." 
Mark14:40 Wakalua kabidi, wakabasangana balale tulu, bualu bua mesu abo akadi maneme ne tulu; kabakamanya mua kumukudimuna dî." 
Mark14:41 Wakalua biandi musangu muisatu, wakabambila ne, Nudi nulala nuikisha! Kuakushika; diba diakufika! Muana wa muntu udi mufila mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Mark14:42 Bikai, tuye; tangilai, muntungidi udi ha buihi." 
Mark14:43 Hakatshidi Yesu wamba nunku, Yudasa, mukuabo wabo wa ba dikumi ne babidi, wakalua ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, bakadi ne miele ne bibonge bafume kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi ne bakulu." 
Mark14:44 Mutungidi wa Yesu wakabaha tshimanyinu ne, Unatuangana nʼandi mishiku, nyeye; numukuate, nuye nʼandi bimpe." 
Mark14:45 Hakalueye, wakaya kudi Yesu lukasa, wakamba ne, Labi; wakatuangana nʼandi mishiku." 
Mark14:46 Bakamulenga bianza, bakamukuata." 
Mark14:47 Kadi mukuabo wa bakadi bimane ha buihi wakatula muele wandi; wakataha muntu wa muakuidi munene, wakamukosa ditshu." 
Mark14:48 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nuakulua ne miele ne bibonge bua kunkuata bu mudibo bakuata munyengi munyi?" 
Mark14:49 Nakadi nʼenu mu ntempelo ku dituku ku dituku, nyisha bantu, kanuakankuata; kadi malu â akulua bua kushikisha mei adi mafunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
Mark14:50 Bayidi bandi bonso bakamushia, bakanyema." 
Mark14:51 Nsongalume mukuabo wakamulonda, mudiele tshilulu tshia line ha makaya, mubidi wakadi mutuhu; bakamukuata;" 
Mark14:52 kadi yeye wakashîa tshilulu tshiandi tshia line, wakanyema butaka." 
Mark14:53 Bakaya ne Yesu kudi muakuidi munene; bakuidi banene ne bakulu ne bafundi bakalua kusangisha nʼandi. 
Mark14:54 Petelo wakadi ulonda Yesu ha bule ha bule, wakabuela mu luhangu lua muakuidi munene; yeye wakadi ushikama hamue ne tuhalai, ku dinkenka dia kahia, wota." 
Mark14:55 Bakuidi banene ne balumbuludi bonso bakakeba bualu bua kubandabo Yesu bua kumushihesha; kabakabumona. 
Mark14:56 Ba bungi bakamudingila, kadi mei abo kâkakanangana." 
Mark14:57 Bakuabo bakimana, bakamudingila ne," 
Mark14:58 Tuakunvua wamba ne, Nembumbule ntempelo eu udi muasa ne bianza; nengibake mukuabo udi kai muasa ne bianza matuku asatu." 
Mark14:59 Mei abo kâkakanangana kabidi. 
Mark14:60 Muakuidi munene wakimana munkatshi muabo, wakakonka Yesu ne, Wewe kuena witaba dî? Bualu ebu budi munyi budi bamonyi aba bakubanda?" 
Mark14:61 Kadi yeye wakahua, kakamba dî. Muakuidi munene wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi Kilisto, Muana wa Mutumbe, anyi?" 
Mark14:62 Yesu wakamba ne, Nmeme; nenumone Muana wa muntu mushikame ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Bukole, ulua biandi ne matutu a mu diulu." 
Mark14:63 Muakuidi munene wakadihandila bilulu biandi, wakamba ne, Tudi ne bualu bua bamanyi kabidi kudi kunyi?" 
Mark14:64 Nuakunvua bihendu bidiye uhenda nʼabi Nzambi; nudi nuamba tshinyi? Buonso buabo bakumuhisha ne, Mbimpe bamushihe." 
Mark14:65 Bakuabo bakabanga kumutuila mate, bakamubuikila ku mesu, bakamukuma bisusu, bakamuambila ne, Amba bualu bûdi umona; tuhalai tuakamuangata, tuakamukuma mikumu." 
Mark14:66 Hakadi Petelo mu luhangu, umue wabo wa bakashi benji ba mudimu wa muakuidi munene wakalua;" 
Mark14:67 hakamoneye Petelo wota kahia wakamujosha talalâ, wakamuambila ne, Wewe kabidi wakadi ne Yesu, Muena Nazaleta." 
Mark14:68 Kadi yeye wakayila ne, Tshiena mumanye bualu, tshiena ngunvua mûdi wamba: yeye wakaluhuka, wakaya ha mbelu; tshitala tshiakasama." 
Mark14:69 Mukashi muenji wa mudimu wakamumona, wakabanga kuambila bakadi bimane ne, Eu nguabo." 
Mark14:70 Kadi yeye wakayila kabidi. Hakahita tshituha tshihi kabidi, bakadi bimane ha buihi bakambila Petelo ne, Bulelela, wewe udi wabo, bualu bua wewe udi Muena Galela." 
Mark14:71 Yeye wakabanga kudiela mulau ne kuditshiha ne, Tshiena mumanye muntu eu unudi nuamba." 
Mark14:72 Hakambeye di edi, tshitala tshiakasama tshiakabidi. Petelo wakavuluka dî diakamuambila Yesu ne, Tshitala katshi tshianze kusama misangu ibidi, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu. Hakelanganeye meshi a bualu ebu, wakabanga kudila bikole." 
Mark15:1 Hakatshia butuku, bakuidi banene ne bakulu ne bafundi ne balumbuludi bonso bakasangisha dî diabo, bakasuika Yesu, bakaya nʼandi, bakamufila mu bianza bia Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi? Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bûdi wamba mbulelela." 
Mark15:3 Bakuidi banene bakamubanda malu a bungi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato wakamukonka kabidi ne, Kuena witaba di? Unvua mudibo bakubanda malu a bungi." 
Mark15:5 Kadi Yesu kakitaba kabidi dî dikuabo; Pilato wakakema. 
Mark15:6 Mu disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa Pilato wakadi ne tshilele tshia kulekelela bantu muena lukanu umue wakalombabo. 
Mark15:7 Muntu wakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu, dina diandi Balaba, musuika ne batomboke nʼandi; mu batomboki buabo bakadi bashihangane." 
Mark15:8 Bantu ba bungi bakaya kudi Pilato, bakamuambila ne, Utuenzele bu mudi tshilele tshiebe." 
Mark15:9 Pilato wakabakonka ne, Nudi basue meme nulekelele Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi?" 
Mark15:10 Yeye wakamanya ne, Bakuidi banene bakumufila bualu bua mukau." 
Mark15:11 Kadi bakuidi banene bakenzesha tshisumbu tshia bantu ne, Utulekelele Balaba." 
Mark15:12 Pilato wakabakonka kabidi ne, Nengenzele unudi nubikila ne, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, tshinyi?" 
Mark15:13 Bakela mbila kabidi ne, Umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:14 Pilato wakabakonka ne, Kadi wakenza bubi kai? Bobo bakatamba kuela mbila ne, Umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:15 Pilato wakasua kuenzela tshisumbu tshia bantu biakane, wakabalekelela Balaba; hakakumeye Yesu, wakamufila bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:16 Masalayi akaya ne Yesu mu luhangu—luolo luakadi nsubu manene wa mukelenge; akabikilangana tshisumbu tshiau tshionso. 
Mark15:17 Akamuluatshisha tshikowelu tshikunze; hakalukau tshifulu tshia meba tshia bukelenge, akamuasatshi ku mutu;" 
Mark15:18 akabanga kumunemekela ne, Muoyo, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda!" 
Mark15:19 Akamukuma ne mulangala ku mutu, akamutuila lute, akatua binu hanshi, akamukukuila." 
Mark15:20 Hakashikishau kumuseka, akamuvula tshikowelu tshikunze, akamuluatshisha bilulu biandi. Akaya nʼandi bua kumushiha ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:21 Muntu dina diandi Simona, Muena Kulene, tatu wa Alesandelo ne Lufo, wakadi ufuma ku mpata; hakasangileye nʼabo, masalayi akamuenzesha ku bukole bua kuyeye nʼabo, mutuale mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yesu." 
Mark15:22 Bakalua nʼandi ku muaba, dina diau Gologota, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muaba wa Kabalubalu ka mutu." 
Mark15:23 Bakamuha nvinyo musangisha ne mula; kadi yeye wakabenga. 
Mark15:24 Bakamukumina milonda mu bianza ne makasa ku mutshi mutshiamakane; bakabanyangana bilulu biandi, bakabielela nshobo bua kumanyabo tshiangata muntu ne muntu." 
Mark15:25 Bakamukumina milonda ku mutshi mutshiamakane dinda ha tshitema. 
Mark15:26 Bakafunda bubandi buakamubandabo ha mutu handi ne: Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda. 
Mark15:27 Bakakumina nʼandi banyengi babidi milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mitshi mitshiamakane, mukuabo ku tshianza tshiandi tshia balume, munga ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bakashi. [" 
Mark15:28 ] 
Mark15:29 Bahitshi ba mu nshila bakamuhenda, bakakuha mitu yabo, bakamba ne, Ka kia! Wewe muhudi wa ntempelo ne mumuibaki wa matuku asatu," 
Mark15:30 udisungile, utuluke ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Mark15:31 Bakuidi banene ne bafundi bakamuseka nunku kabidi, bakamba ne, Yeye wakadi usungila bakuabo, kena mumanye mua kudisungila." 
Mark15:32 Kilisto, Mukelenge wa Isalele, atuluke biandi ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bua tuetu tumone, tumuitabushe. Bakadi nʼandi ha mitshi mitshiamakane bakamuhenda." 
Mark15:33 Midima yakadi ha buloba buonso munda munya tô ne diba ha isatu. 
Mark15:34 Hakafika diba ha isatu, Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakatani? Kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Nzambi wanyi, Nzambi wanyi, wakundekela tshinyi?" 
Mark15:35 Bakuabo bakadi bimaneku, hakunvuabo dî edi, bakamba ne, Yeye udi Ubikila Eliya." 
Mark15:36 Mukuabo wakaya lukasa, wakûsha musukulampampa tente ne nvinega, wakaubuesha ku mulangala, wakaha Yesu ne, Nua; wakamba ne, Lekela, tumone Eliya ne walua bua kumutulula hanshi." 
Mark15:37 Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole, wakahuola muoyo wandi." 
Mark15:38 Tshilulu tshiakadi tshikudika mu ntempelo tshiakahandika bihesa bibidi ku mutu kuatshi tô ne kunshi; 
Mark15:39 kapitene ka masalayi lukama wakadi wimana ha buihi ne Yesu; hakamoneye ne, Yesu wakuhuola muoyo, wakamba ne, Bulelela, muntu eu wakadi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Mark15:40 Bakashi bakadiku kabidi, batangidile ha bule; munkatshi mua bakashi aba muakadi Malia wa ku Magadala, ne Malia mamu wa Yakobo mukese ne wa Yose, ne Salome." 
Mark15:41 Hakadiye mu Galela, bakashi aba bakadi bamulonda, bamukuatshisha; bakashi bakuabo ba bungi bakadiku, bakabanda nʼandi ku Yelushalema." 
Mark15:42 Hakamba diba kubuela, bualu bua dituku adi diakadi Dilongolola, diakadi ku nyima kua Lumingu lua Bayuda," 
Mark15:43 Yosefe wa ku Alimataya wakalua; yeye wakadi mulumbuludi wa butumbi, wakadi mutekemene bukelenge bua Nzambi; wakaya kudi Pilato ne dikima mu mutshima, wakamulomba tshitalu tshia Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato wakakema ne, Ukadi mufue katataka; wakabikila kapitene ka masalayi lukama, wakamukonka ne, Ukadi mufue musangu mule, anyi?" 
Mark15:45 Hakamumanyisha kapitene ka masalayi bualu abu, yeye wakafila tshitalu kudi Yosefe." 
Mark15:46 Yeye wakasumba tshilulu tshia line; hakamutululeye hanshi, wakamujingila tshilulu, wakamuladika mu lukita lumbula mu dibue; wakabunguluisha dibue dinene, wakadijibika ku mushiku wa mbelu wa lukita." 
Mark15:47 Malia wa ku Magadala ne Malia mamu wa Yose bakamona hakamuladikabo. 
Mark16:1 Hakahita dituku diabo dia kuikisha, Malia wa ku Magadala ne Malia mamu wa Yakobo ne Salome bakasumba bintu bia muhuya muimpe bualu bua kulua kumulababi." 
Mark16:2 Dituku dia kumudilu dia lumingu hatshiatshia bakalua ku lukita, diba dimane kuhatuka." 
Mark16:3 Bakadi bakonkangana ne, Watubunguluishila dibue didi ku lukita nganyi?" 
Mark16:4 Hakabandulukabo, bakamona dibue dimana kubunguluisha; diakadi ditambe bunene." 
Mark16:5 Hakabuelabo mu lukita, bakamona nsongalume mushikame ku luseke lua tshianza tshia balume, muluate tshilulu tshitoke; bakakema bikole." 
Mark16:6 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kanukemi; nudi nukeba Yesu Muena Nazaleta, wakashihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane; yeye wakubika ku lufu; kena munemu; monai muaba wakadibo bamuladike!" 
Mark16:7 Kadi ya! bienu, nuambile bayidi bandi ne Petelo ne, Yeye neadianjile ku mpala kuenu mu Galela, nenumumoneku bu muakunuambileye." 
Mark16:8 Bakumuka mu lukita, bakanyema, bualu bua lukanku ne buowa biakabakuata; kabakambila muntu dî, bua bakadi batshina." 
Mark16:9 Hakabika Yesu ku lufu dinda dia dituku dia kumudilu dia lumingu, wakamueneka diambedi kudi Malia wa ku Magadala, wakumusheye bademon muanda mutekete." 
Mark16:10 Yeye wakaya, wakamanyisha bakadi bikale ne Yesu, hakadibo bajinga badila." 
Mark16:11 Hakunvuabo ne, Yeye udi ne muoyo, wakumueneka kudi Malia, kabakitabusha." 
Mark16:12 Hakashika malu â, yeye wakamueneka mukudimuka ne munga mubidi kudi bakuabo babidi, hakadibo baya mu mpata." 
Mark16:13 Bobo bakaya, bakambila bakuabo bualu ebu; kudi kabakitabusha dî diabo." 
Mark16:14 Hashishe yeye wakamueneka kudi bayidi dikumi ne umue ha nkayabo, hakadibo bashikame badia bidia; yeye wakababela bualu bua buhidia buabo ne bukole bua mitshima yabo, bua bobo bakahidia kuitabusha dî dia bakamumona, hakabikeye ku lufu." 
Mark16:15 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu ha buloba buonso, nuambile bionso biakafukibua lumu luimpe." 
Mark16:16 Witabusha, wabatijibua, nebamusungile; wahidia, nebamuhishe." 
Mark16:17 Bimanyinu ebi nebifile badi bitabushe: nebumushe bademon munda mua bantu mu dina dianyi; nebakule miaku mihia-mihia; 
Mark16:18 nebakuate nyoka ne bianza, bianuabo tshintu tshia lufu, katshiena tshibasamisha; bialengabo badi ne masama bianza, nebasangale." 
Mark16:19 Hakabambila Mukelenge Yesu nunku, wakangatshibua mu diulu, wakashikama ku tshianza tshikole tshia Nzambi." 
Mark16:20 Bakaya, bakamba bualu bua Nzambi kuonso; Mukelenge wakabenzesha, wakajadika dî ne bimanyinu biakabalonda. Amen." 
Luke1:1 Bualu bua bantu ba bungi bakabanga kufunda malu au akenjibua munkatshi muetu," 
Luke1:2 akatuambilabo kudi bamonyi ne benji badi," 
Luke1:3 nakuelangana meshi munda, Mukelenge Teofilo, ne, Mbimpe bia meme kabidi kukufundila malu au malondolola biakane, bualu bua meme nakualonda bimpe ku tshibangidilu tshiau tô ne katataka;" 
Luke1:4 bua wewe umanye ne, Malu akukumanyishabo adi malelela." 
Luke1:5 Mu matuku a Helode, mukelenge wa Yudaya, muakuidi wa Nzambi wakadiku, dina diandi Zakâya, wakadi wa mu mulongo wa Abiya; mukashi wandi wakadi wa mu bana bakashi ba Alona, dina diandi Elisabeta." 
Luke1:6 Bubidi buabo bakadi bakane ku mesu kua Nzambi, bakadi balonda mikenshi yonso ya Mukelenge ne mei andi, kabakadi ne bualu." 
Luke1:7 Kabakadi ne muana, bualu bua Elisabeta wakadi nkumba, bubidi buabo bakadi banunu." 
Luke1:8 Nunku hakadiye wenza mudimu wandi wa buakuidi ku mesu kua Nzambi mu mulongo wandi," 
Luke1:9 bu muakadi tshilele tshia mudimu wa bakuidi, yeye wakasungudibua bua kubueleye mu ntempelo wa Mukelenge bua kuosha musenga wa mananashi." 
Luke1:10 Hakafika diba dia kuosha musenga wa mananashi, tshisumbu tshionso tshia bantu tshiakadi tshitendelela Nzambi ku mbelu kua ntempelo." 
Luke1:11 Muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakamueneka kudiye, muimane ku tshianza tshia balume tshia tshioshelu tshia mananashi." 
Luke1:12 Mutshima wa Zakâya wakahandika hakamumoneye, buowa buakamukuata." 
Luke1:13 Kadi muanjelo wakamuambila ne, Zakâya, kutshinyi, bualu bua bakunvua kulomba kuebe, mukashi webe Elisabeta neakulelele muana, neumuidike ne, Yone." 
Luke1:14 Wewe newikale ne diese ne disanka; bantu ba bungi nebasanke bualu bua kuledibua kuandi. 
Luke1:15 Yeye neikale muntu munene ku mesu kua Mukelenge; kanu biandi nvinyo ne bintu bidi bikuatangana; yeye neûshibue tente ne Nyuma Muimpe diambedi mamu wandi kai muanze kumulela. 
Luke1:16 Yeye neakudimushe mitshima ya bana ba Isalele ba bungi kudi Mukelenge Nzambi wabo. 
Luke1:17 Yeye neaye ku mpala kuandi ne nyuma ne bukole bia Eliya, bualu bua kuhingisha mitshima ya batatu kudi bana, ne bua kualukisha bena buhidia ku meshi a badi bakane; ne bua kulongoluela Mukelenge bantu badi ne mitshima yabo mimana kulongolola." 
Luke1:18 Zakâya wakakonka muanjelo ne, Nemanye bualu ebu munyi? Bualu bua meme ndi muntu mununu, ne mukashi wanyi udi ne bidimu bia bungi." 
Luke1:19 Muanjelo wakamuandamuna ne, Ndi bianyi Gabaliele, ntu ngimana ku mesu kua Nzambi; nakutumibua bua kuakula nʼebe ne bua kukuluila ne lumu luimpe." 
Luke1:20 Tangila, wewe neuhue, kuena umanya mua kuakula tô ne halua dituku dialua malu â, bualu bua wewe kuakuitabusha mei anyi, neajalame dituku dialua malu au." 
Luke1:21 Bantu bakadi bindila Zakâya, bakakema bualu bua yeye wakanenga musangu mule mu ntempelo." 
Luke1:22 Hakaluhukeye, kakamanya mua kuakula nʼabo; bakamanya ye, Yeye wakumona tshikena kumona mu ntempelo; wakadi wakula nʼabo ne bianza biandi, wakashala kamama," 
Luke1:23 Hakashika matuku a mudimu wandi, wakaya kuandi." 
Luke1:24 Hakahita matuku â, Elisabeta wakimita difu; yeye wakadisokoka ngondo itanu, wakamba ne," 
Luke1:25 Mukelenge wakungenzela bimpe nunku, mu matuku akadiye untangila, bualu bua kumusha bundu buanyi munkatshi mua bantu." 
Luke1:26 Mu ngondo muisambombo muanjelo Gabaliele wakatumibua kudi Nzambi mu musoko wa Galela, dina diau Nazaleta," 
Luke1:27 kudi mukashi wakatshidi kamama, mubangila kudi mulume, dina diandi Yosefe, wa mu tshiota tshia Davidi; dina dia mukashi au Malia." 
Luke1:28 Muanjelo wakalua kudiye, wakamba ne, Muoyo, bakukufuila luse lua bungi, Mukelenge udi nʼebe." 
Luke1:29 Kadi yeye wakatamba kutshina bualu bua dî edi, wakelangana meshi munda ne, Eu muoyo mungelela tshinyi?" 
Luke1:30 Muanjelo wakamuambila ne, Malia, kutshinyi; wewe wakusangana luse kudi Nzambi." 
Luke1:31 Mona, wewe newimite difu, neulele muana mulume, neumuidike ne, Yesu;" 
Luke1:32 yeye neikale munene, nebamuidike dina ne, Muana wa Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu; Mukelenge Nzambi neamuhe nkuasa wa butumbi wa tatu wandi Davidi;" 
Luke1:33 neikale mukelenge wa nsubu wa Yakoba tshiendelele; bukelenge buandi kabuena ne tshishikidilu. 
Luke1:34 Malia wakakonka muanjelo ne, Bualu ebu nebulue munyi, meme tshi muanze kumanya mulume?" 
Luke1:35 Muanjelo wakamuandamuna ne, Nyuma Muimpe nealue kûdi, ne bukole bua Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu nebukubuikile bu ditutu; nebidike muana wa tshijila uwalela ne, Muana wa Nzambi." 
Luke1:36 Mona, Elisabeta, mukashi wa mu tshiota tshienu, yeye kabidi, wakuimita difu dia muana mulume ku bununu buandi; bakadi bamuamba ne, Udi nkumba, kadi ngondo eu nguandi muisambombo." 
Luke1:37 Bualu bua kakuena dî dimue dia Nzambi didi kadî ne bukole. 
Luke1:38 Malia wakamba ne, Mona, mukashi muhika wa Mukelenge; bangenzele bu muwakuamba. Muanjelo wakamushîa, wakaya biandi." 
Luke1:39 Mu matuku â Malia wakabika, wakaya lukasa mu buloba bua mikuna, mu musoko wa Yuda;" 
Luke1:40 wakabuela mu nsubu wa Zakâya, wakela Elisabeta muoyo." 
Luke1:41 Hakunvua Elisabeta muoyo wakamuela Malia, muana wakatabuluka mu difu diandi; Elisabeta wakûshibua tente ne Nyuma Muimpe;" 
Luke1:42 wakela dî diandi bikole, wakamba ne, Wewe udi mukashi mutambe kusankishibua, muana udi munda muebe udi muvudishila disanka." 
Luke1:43 Bualu ebu buakulua kundi munyi, bua mamu wa Mukelenge wanyi wakulua kundi?" 
Luke1:44 Hakubuela dî dia muoyo uwakungela mu matshu anyi, muana wakutabuluka mu difu dianyi bualu bua disanka." 
Luke1:45 Mukashi wakitabusha udi ne disanka, bua nebashikishe malu onso akamuambilabo kudi Mukelenge." 
Luke1:46 Malia wakamba ne, Muoyo wanyi udi utumbisha Mukelenge," 
Luke1:47 Mutshima wanyi wakutamba kusanka mu Nzambi, Musungidi wanyi." 
Luke1:48 Yeye wakatangila buhuekele bua mukashi muhika wandi; Milongo yonso ya bantu tô ne tshiendelele neimbikile ne, Udi ne disanka." 
Luke1:49 Bualu bua udi ne bukole wakungenzela malu manene; Dina diandi ndia tshijila. 
Luke1:50 Luse luandi ludi ku milongo ne ku milongo Ya bantu badi bamutshina. 
Luke1:51 Wakenza malu makole ne diboko diandi; Wakatangalasha badi badisua bua meshi mabi akadi mu mitshima yabo. 
Luke1:52 Wakahuekesha banfumu bakadi mu nkuasa ya butumbi, Wakabandisha bantu bahuekele," 
Luke1:53 Bakadi ne nsala wakabukutshisha ne bintu bimpe; Babanshi wakabahingisha hatuhu. 
Luke1:54 Wakukuatshisha muntu wandi Isalele 
Luke1:55 Wakubutuka bua kufuila Abalahama ne bana bandi luse tshiendelele, Bu mu akambileye bankambua betu." 
Luke1:56 Malia wakasomba nʼandi bu ngondo isatu, wakahingana kuabo." 
Luke1:57 Ngondo ya Elisabeta yakakumbana ya kuleleye, yeye wakalela muana mulume." 
Luke1:58 Bakuandi ne bena tshiota tshiandi bakunvua ne, Nzambi wakumuvudishila luse luandi: bakasanka nʼandi." 
Luke1:59 Hakalua dituku dia muanda mukulu, bakalua kutengula muana; bakamba kumuidika ne, Zakâya, bu dina dia tatuʼandi." 
Luke1:60 Mamuʼandi wakandamuna ne, Nasha, bamuidike ne, Yone." 
Luke1:61 Bakamuambila ne, Kakuena umena tshiota tshienu udi muidika dinu edi." 
Luke1:62 Bakidikishila tatuʼandi bianza ne, Udi musue bamuidike dina kai?" 
Luke1:63 Yeye wakalomba mukanda wa kufundahu, wakafunda ne, Dina diandi Yone. Buonso buabo bakakema." 
Luke1:64 Mukana muandi muakabuluka lubilu, ludimi luandi luakambuluka, wakakula utumbisha Nzambi." 
Luke1:65 Buowa buakakuata bantu bonso bakadi ha buihi nʼabo; malu â onso akadi enda ambibua mu buloba buonso bua mikuna ya Yudaya. 
Luke1:66 Bantu bonso bakaunvua bakâteka mu mitshima yabo, bakakonka ne, Eu muana neikale muana kai? Bualu bua tshianza tshia Mukelenge tshiakadi nʼandi." 
Luke1:67 Tatuʼandi Zakâya, mûshibue tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, wakamba malu akadi kâi manze kulua ne," 
Luke1:68 Batumbishe Mukelenge, Nzambi wa Isalele, Bua yeye wakulua kutangila bantu bandi, wakubahidia," 
Luke1:69 Yeye wakutubishila lusengu lua luhandu Mu tshiota tshia muanʼandi Davidi," 
Luke1:70 (Bu muakambeye mukana mua baprofete bandi ba tshijila ba kale)," 
Luke1:71 Luhandu luakutuhandisheye kudi badi nʼetu lukuna ne mu bianza bia bonso badi batukina. 
Luke1:72 Yeye wakalesha bankambua betu luse, Wakavuluka dihungila diandi dia tshijila," 
Luke1:73 Mutshihu wakatshihileye Abalahama tatu wetu 
Luke1:74 Ne, Hanuasungidibua mu bianza bia badi nʼenu lukuna," 
Luke1:75 Nenutendelele mu buimpe ne mu Buakane ku mpala kuanyi matuku enu onso, kanui ntshina." 
Luke1:76 Ne wewe muana, nebakubikile ne Muprofete wa Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, Bua wewe neuye ku mpala kua Mukelenge bua kumulongoluela nshila yandi," 
Luke1:77 Ne bua kumanyisha bantu bandi Luhandu lua kubabuikidila mibi yabo," 
Luke1:78 Bualu bua mutshima wa luse wa Nzambi wetu; nunku hatshiatshia ha kulu nehatuluile," 
Luke1:79 Bua kutokeshela badi bashikame mu mîdima ne mu dileshi dia lufu, Ne bua kuendesha makasa etu mu nshila wa ditalala." 
Luke1:80 Muana wakadiunda, wakakola mu mutshima wandi, wakadi biandi mu bihela tô ne ku dituku diakamuenekeye kudi Isalele." 
Luke2:1 Mu matuku au Kaisa Augusto wakela mukenshi ne, Bafundishe mena a ba ha buloba bonso." 
Luke2:2 Eku kuakadi kuindisha kua kumudia kuakenzabo, hakadi Kulenio ngovena wa Sulia." 
Luke2:3 Bantu bonso bakaya bua kufundishabo mena abo, mutu kuabo mutu kuabo." 
Luke2:4 Yosefe, kabidi, wakumuka mu Galela, mu musoko wa Nazaleta, wakabanda mu Yudaya, ku musoko wa Bayidi, udibo babikila ne, Beteleheme, bualu bua yeye wakadi wa mu nsubu wa Davidi ne wa tshiota tshiandi;" 
Luke2:5 wakaya nunku bua kufundishabo dina diandi ne dia Malia, wakadiye mubaka, wakadi biandi ne difu." 
Luke2:6 Hakadibo aku, matuku akakumbana a kuleleye." 
Luke2:7 Wakalela muanʼandi mulume, muanʼa bute, yeye wakamujingila tshilulu, wakamuladika mu tshidilu tshia nyama, bualu bua mu nsubu wa tshilala benyi kamuakadi muaba." 
Luke2:8 Mu luseke alu muakadi balami ba mikoko, balala mu mpata, balama mikoko yabo mu butuku." 
Luke2:9 Muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakimana ha buihi nʼabo, butumbi bua Mukelenge buakabatemena; bakatamba kutshina." 
Luke2:10 Muanjelo wakabambila ne, Kanutshinyi, bualu bua nakunusua ne lumu luimpe lua disanka dinene, nedikale kudi bantu bonso;" 
Luke2:11 lelu bakunulelela Musungidi mu musoko wa Davidi, yeye udi Kilisto Mukelenge." 
Luke2:12 Etshi ntshimanyinu kunudi ne, Nenusangane muana mujingila tshilulu, mulale mu tshidilu tshia nyama." 
Luke2:13 Tshisumbu tshia masalayi a mu diulu tshiakadisangisha lukasa ne muanjelo, batumbisha Nzambi, bamba ne," 
Luke2:14 Butumbi buikale kudi Nzambi mu diulu, Ditalala dikale hanshi ha buloba munkatshi mua bantu badi basankisha Nzambi." 
Luke2:15 Banjelo bakabashia, bakaya mu diulu; balami ba mikoko bakambilangana ne, Tuyai ku Beteleheme tukatangile bualu ebu buakulua buakutumanyisha Mukelenge." 
Luke2:16 Bakalua lukasa, bakasangana Malia ne Yosefe, ne muana mulale mu tshidilu tshia nyama." 
Luke2:17 Hakamonabo bualu ebu, bakasokolola dî diakabambilabo bua muana eu." 
Luke2:18 Bantu bonso bakunvua malu akabambilabo kudi balami bakakema. 
Luke2:19 Kadi Malia wakalama mei â onso, wakadi wela meshi munda munda." 
Luke2:20 Balami bakahingana, batumbisha Nzambi bamutendelela, bualu bua malu anso akunvuabo ne akamonabo, bu muakabambilabo." 
Luke2:21 Hakakumbana matuku muanda mukulu bua kumutengulabo, bakamuidika ne, Yesu, bu muakamuidikabo kudi muanjelo kabai banze kumuimita." 
Luke2:22 Hakakumbana matuku a kudiuvua kuabo, bu mudi mukenshi wa Mose wamba, bakalua nʼandi ku Yelushalema bua kumufila kudi Mukelenge" 
Luke2:23 (bu muakafundabo mu mikenshi ya Mukelenge ne, Nebabikile muana mulume yonso udi ubulula difu dia mukashi ne, Wa tshijila wa Mukelenge)," 
Luke2:24 ne bua kufila mulambu mushihela Yehowa bu muakambabo mu mikenshi ya Mukelenge ne, Nyunyu ya nkutshi ibidi, anyi bana babidi ba nyunyu ya nkudimba." 
Luke2:25 Muntu mulume wakadi mu Yelushalema, dina diandi Shimeona; muntu eu wakadi muakane, wakadi kabidi mutumikidi wa mei, wakadi utekemena disamba dia Isalele; Nyuma Muimpe wakadi nʼandi." 
Luke2:26 Nyuma Muimpe wakamana kumumanyisha ne, Wewe kuena ufua tô ne hawamona Kilisto wa Mukelenge." 
Luke2:27 Yeye wakalua mu ntempelo mu Nyuma Muimpe; hakabuelamu baledi ba Yesu ne muana bua kumuenzela bu muakadi tshilele tshia mikenshi ya Mose," 
Luke2:28 Shimeona wakamuambula mu maboko, wakatumbisha Nzambi, wakamba ne," 
Luke2:29 Mukelenge, mpindiu wewe udi ulekela muhika webe aye biandi Talalâ bu muwakuamba;" 
Luke2:30 Bualu bua mesu anyi akumona luhandu luebe 
Luke2:31 Luwakulongolola ku mesu kua bantu bonso; 
Luke2:32 Munya wamueneka kudi bisamba bia bende Ne butumbi bua Isalele, bantu bebe." 
Luke2:33 Tatuʼandi ne mamuʼandi bakakema bualu bua malu akamuambabo; 
Luke2:34 Shimeona wakabasankisha, wakambila Malia mamu wandi ne, Muana eu udi mutekela bualu bua kuhona ne bua kubika kua bantu ba bungi mu Isalele, ne bualu bua tshimanyinu tshiahetulabo;" 
Luke2:35 muele wa nvita neutubule muoyo webe, nunku meshi a mu mitshima ya ba bungi neamueneke." 
Luke2:36 Muprofete mukashi, dina diandi Ana wakadiku, yeye wakadi muana wa Fanuele wa tshisamba tshia Ashê, wakadi mununu be, bayandi wakamubaka hakatshidiye kamama, wakashala nʼandi bidimu muanda mutekete," 
Luke2:37 wakashala mu lufuila bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne binai; yeye kakumuka mu ntempelo, wakatendelela Nzambi butuku ne munya, ujila bia kudia, umulomba." 
Luke2:38 Yeye wakalua ha diba adi, wakasakidila Nzambi, wakambila bonso bakadi batekemene buhikudi bua Yelushalema bualu buandi." 
Luke2:39 Hakashikishabo malu onso a mu mikenshi ya Mukelenge, bakahingana mu Galela, ku musoko wabo Nazaleta." 
Luke2:40 Muana wakadiunda biandi, wakakola, wakadi, mûle tente ne lungenyi; luse lua Nzambi luakadi nʼandi." 
Luke2:41 Ku tshidimu ku tshidimu baledi ba Yesu bakaya ku Yelushalema ku disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa. 
Luke2:42 Hakadiye bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, bakabanda ku Yelushalema bu mudi tshilele tshia disanka;" 
Luke2:43 hakashika matuku, hakadibo bahingana, Yesu wakadi tshitende wakashala ku nyima mu Yelushalema; baledi bandi kabakamanya bualu ebu;" 
Luke2:44 bakadi bamanye ne, Yeye udi mu tshisumbu tshia batudi nʼabo mu nshila; bakaya mu nshila dituku dijima; bakamukeba mu bana babo ne mu bantu bakadibo bamanye;" 
Luke2:45 hakahangabo kumumona, bakahingana ku Yelushalema bamukeba." 
Luke2:46 Hakahita matuku asatu, bakamusangana mu ntempelo, mushikame munkatshi mua bayishi, unvua mei abo, ubakonka malu;" 
Luke2:47 bantu bonso bakadi bunvua mei andi bakakema bualu bua lungenyi luandi ne bualu bua mei akabandamuneye. 
Luke2:48 Hakamumonabo, bakakema; baba wandi wakamukonka ne, Muanʼanyi, wakatuenzela nunku tshinyi? Tatu webe ne meme kabidi tuakukukeba tunyingalala." 
Luke2:49 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nuakadi nunkebela tshinyi? Kanuena bamanye ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kuikala mu malu a Tatu wanyi?" 
Luke2:50 Bobo kabakajingulula dî diakabambileye. 
Luke2:51 Yeye wakahueka nʼabo, wakaya ku Nazaleta; wakadi utumikila mei abo; baba wandi wakalama malu â onso mu mutshima wandi." 
Luke2:52 Yesu wakadiunda mu lungenyi ne mu kuleha ne mu diakalengele kudi Nzambi ne kudi bantu. 
Luke3:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne itanu tshia bunfumu bua Tibelio Kaisa, hakadi Ponto Pilato ngovena wa Yudaya, ne hakadi Helode muloho wa Galela, ne hakadi muanʼabo Filipo muloho wa luseke lua Itulaya ne Takoniti, ne hakadi Lusania muloho wa Abilene," 
Luke3:2 ne hakadi Ana ne Kayafa bakuidi banene, dî dia Nzambi diakalua kudi Yone, muana wa Zakâya, mu tshihete." 
Luke3:3 Yeye wakalua mu luseke luonso luakadi ha buihi ne Yadene, wenda wambila bantu bualu bua dibatiza dia kukudimuna kua mitshima bua mibi yabo ijimishibue;" 
Luke3:4 bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa mei a Yeshaya muprofete ne, Dî dia muntu udi wela lubila mu tshihela ne, Longololai nshila wa Mukelenge, Nululamishe nshila yandi." 
Luke3:5 Nebalandakashe mpongo yonso, Nebabatamishe mikuna yonso, minene ne mikese, Nebaludike nshila mikonyangale, Nebaseneshe nshila idi bizakala bizakala;" 
Luke3:6 Bantu bonso nebamone luhandu lua Nzambi. 
Luke3:7 Yeye wakakonka bisumbu bia bantu biakalua kudiye bua yeye kubabatiza ne, Nuenu bana ba nyoka, wakunudimusha bua kunyema ku mulau ulualua kunudi nganyi?" 
Luke3:8 Nukuame mamuma adi makanangane ne dikudimuna dia mitshima yenu, kanuhangi kudiamba mu mitshima yenu ne, Tuetu tudi ne Abalahama tatu wetu; meme ndi nuambila ne, Nzambi udi mumanye mua kubisha mabue â alue bana ba Abalahama." 
Luke3:9 Katataka tshisui tshidi tshiladika ha muji wa mutshi wonso; mutshi wonso udi kawi ukuama mamuma mimpe nebaushimbule, nebawele mu kahia." 
Luke3:10 Bantu bakamukonka ne, Ahu netuenze tshinyi?" 
Luke3:11 Wakabambila ne, Udi ne bikowelu bibidi aheshe udi kai nʼatshi tshinga; udi ne bia kudia enze muomumue." 
Luke3:12 Basangishi ba mulambu kabidi bakatua kubatijibua, bakamukonka ne, Muyishi, tuetu netuenze tshinyi?" 
Luke3:13 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kanuangatshi mulambu mutambe wakunuambilabo." 
Luke3:14 Masalayi kabidi akamukonka ne, Ne tuetu, netuenze tshinyi? Yeye wakambila ne, Kanunyengi tshintu tshia muntu ku bukole, kanusonguedi muntu tshianana; nuitabusha difutu dienu ne disanka."
