Luke3:15 Hakadibo batekemena bualu, ne hakadibo buonso buabo belangana meshi a Yone mu mitshima yabo ne, Yeye udi Kilisto, anyi?" 
Luke3:16 Yone wakabandamuna buonso buabo ne, Bulelela, ndi nubatiza ne mai, kadi udi muntambe meme ulualua, tshiena ne buakane bua kusulula mionshi ya bisabata biandi; yeye neanubatize mu Nyuma Muimpe ne mu kahia;" 
Luke3:17 tshihehudi tshiandi tshidi mu tshianza, yeye neatokeshe tshituilu tshiandi bimpe, neasangishe mponda mu mudiba wandi, kadi yeye neoshe bisote mu kahia kadi kakai kajima tshiendelele." 
Luke3:18 Yeye wakambila bantu lumu luimpe ukoleshe mitshima yabo ne mei makuabo a bungi; 
Luke3:19 kadi muloho Helode wakadiye mubele bualu bua Helodia, mukashi wa muanʼabo, ne bualu bua malu mabi onso akenza Helode;" 
Luke3:20 yeye wakatentekesha bualu ebu bukuabo ha mutu ha malu au onso: wakabuesha Yone mu nsubu wa lukanu. 
Luke3:21 Hakabatizabo bantu bonso ne Yesu kabidi, hakadiye utendelela Nzambi, diulu diakabuluka," 
Luke3:22 ne Nyuma Muimpe wakahueka hamʼbidi handi ne mubidi bu wa nyunyu wa nkutshi; di diakafuma mu diulu ne, Wewe udi Muana wanyi munanga, udi unsankisha bimpe." 
Luke3:23 Hakabanga Yesu mene kuyisha bantu, yeye wakadi bu bidimu makumi asatu, bantu bakadi belangana meshi ne, yeye udi muana wa Yosefe, muana wa Heli," 
Luke3:24 muana wa Matata, muana wa Lewi, muana wa Meleki, muana wa Yana, muana wa Yosefe," 
Luke3:25 muana wa Matana, muana wa Amosa, muana wa Nahuma, muana wa Eseli, muana wa Nagai," 
Luke3:26 muana wa Mâta, muana wa Matatia, muana wa Semei, muana wa Yoseke, muana wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 muana wa Yoanana, muana wa Lesa, muana wa Zelubabela, muana wa Shalatiele, muana wa Neli," 
Luke3:28 muana wa Meleki, muana wa Adi, muana wa Kosama, muana wa Elemadama, muana wa Ele," 
Luke3:29 muana wa Yesu, muana wa Eliezê, muana wa Yolima, muana wa Matata, muana wa Lewi," 
Luke3:30 muana wa Shimeona, muana wa Yuda, muana wa Yosefe, muana wa Yonama, muana wa Eleyakima," 
Luke3:31 muana wa Melea, muana wa Mena, muana wa Matata, muana wa Natana, muana wa Davidi," 
Luke3:32 muana wa Yishai, muana wa Obeda, muana wa Boaza, muana wa Salamona, muana wa Nashona," 
Luke3:33 muana wa Aminadaba, muana wa Ani, muana wa Heselona, muana wa Pelese, muana wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 muana wa Yakoba, muana wa Isaka, muana wa Abalahama, muana wa Tela, muana wa Nahô," 
Luke3:35 muana wa Seluga, muana wa Leu, muana wa Pelege, muana wa Ebê, muana wa Shela," 
Luke3:36 muana wa Kenana, muana wa Afashada, muana wa Sheme, muana wa Noa, muana wa Lemeke," 
Luke3:37 muana wa Metushela, muana wa Hanoka, muana wa Yalede, muana wa Mahalalêle, muana wa Kenana," 
Luke3:38 muana wa Enosha, muana wa Shete, muana wa Adama, muana wa Nzambi." 
Luke4:1 Yesu wakadi mûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, wakafuma ku Yadene, Nyuma wakamulombola mu tshihela tô matuku makumi anai," 
Luke4:2 Diabolo wakadi umuteya. Kakadia tshintu matuku au; hakashikau, yeye wakadi ne nsala." 
Luke4:3 Diabolo wakamuambila ne, Biwikala Muana wa Nzambi, amba dibue edi diandamuke mutanda wa bidia." 
Luke4:4 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bakafunda dî ne, Muntu kikadi biandi ne muoyo bualu bua bidia nkayabi." 
Luke4:5 Diabolo wakabanda nʼandi, wakamulesha makelenge onso a ha buloba tshikondo tshimue." 
Luke4:6 Diabolo wakamuambila ne, Nenkuhe bukokeshi ebu buonso ne butumbi bua makelenge au; bakamana kubumpa; muntu yonso undi musue kumuhabu, nemuhebu." 
Luke4:7 Biwankukuila, nebuikale buebe." 
Luke4:8 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bakafunda dî ne, Kukuila Mukelenge Nzambi webe, umuenzele yeye nkayandi mudimu." 
Luke4:9 Diabolo wakaya ngandi ku Yelushalema, wakamushikika ha musonga wa ntempelo, wakamuambila ne, Biwikala Muana wa Nzambi, udiele hanshi," 
Luke4:10 bualu bua bakafunda ne, Yeye neakufile mu bianza bia banjelo bandi, bakulame;" 
Luke4:11 Ne dî dikuabo ne, Nebakutuale mu bianza biabo, Bua wewe kukumi dikasa diebe ku dibue." 
Luke4:12 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne. Bakamba ne, Kuteyi Mukelenge Nzambi webe." 
Luke4:13 Hakashikisha diabolo mateyi onso, wakamusha tô ne ku tshikondo tshikuabo." 
Luke4:14 Yesu wakahingana mu Galela ne bukole bua Nyuma; lumu luandi luakatangadika mu luseke elu luonso. 
Luke4:15 Yeye wakabayisha mu bitendelelu biabo, buonso buabo bakadi bamutumbisha." 
Luke4:16 Yeye wakalua ku Nazaleta kuakakoleleye; wakabuela mu nsunagoga dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda bu muakadi tshilele tshiandi, wakimana bua kubala mukanda." 
Luke4:17 Bakamulesha mukanda wa muprofete Yeshaya. Yeye wakavungulula mukanda, wakamona muaba wakafundabo ne," 
Luke4:18 Nyuma wa Nzambi udi hamʼbidi hanyi, Bualu bua yeye wakangela manyi ha mutu ne, Ambila bantu bahele lumu luimpe; Yeye wakuntuma ne, Ambila bena lukanu bualu bua dikohoka diabo, Ne bafofo bualu bua kutabasha kua mesu abo, Uhe badi batata budishikaminyi," 
Luke4:19 Ambila bantu bualu bua tshidimu tshiakitabusha Mukelenge. 
Luke4:20 Yeye wakavunga mukanda, wakauhingisha mu bianza bia mulami wau, wakashikama; bonso bakadi mu nsunagoga bakamutangila talalâ." 
Luke4:21 Yeye wakabanga kubambila ne, Lelu bualu ebu buakafundabo buakujalama mu matshu enu." 
Luke4:22 Bantu bonso bakamuvidila, bakakema bualu bua mei a luse akaluhuka mukana muandi, bakakonka ne, Yeye ke muana wa Yosefe, anyi?" 
Luke4:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bulelela, nenungelele lusumuinu ne, Wewe muena buanga, udiondahe, enza biebe kuenu malu atuakunvua wenza ku Kapênuma." 
Luke4:24 Yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, udi nuambila ne, Kabatu bitabusha muprofete kudi ba ku luseke luabo." 
Luke4:25 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bakashi ba mu lufuila ba bungi bakadi mu Isalele mu matuku a Eliya, hakadi diulu dibuikila bidimu bisatu ne ngondo isambombo, ha kalua tshiole tshinene ha buloba bu onso;" 
Luke4:26 kadi Eliya kakatumibu a kudi bakuabo, anu ku Salefata mu boloba bua Sidona, kudi mukashi wakadi mu lufuila." 
Luke4:27 Bena nsudi ba bungi bakadi mu Isalele mu matuku a muprofete Elisha; kadi bakuabo kabakalengeshibua, anu Nâmana Muena Sulia." 
Luke4:28 Bantu bonso bakadi mu nsunagoga bakûlangana ne tshishi, hakunvuabo malu â." 
Luke4:29 Bakabika, bakamuihata mu musoko, bakalua nʼandi ku mutu kua mukuna wakadibo base musoko bua kumukuha ma luhongo mutu muinyika munshi." 
Luke4:30 Yeye wakahita munkatshi muabo, wakaya biandi." 
Luke4:31 Wakahueka ku Kapênuma, musoko wa Galela. Wakabayisha dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda;" 
Luke4:32 diyisha diandi diakabakemesha, bualu bua dî diandi diakadi ne bukole." 
Luke4:33 Mu nsunagoga muakadi muntu wakadi ne nyuma wa demon wa bukoya, wakela dî diandi bikole ne," 
Luke4:34 Ei! Wewe Yesu, Muena Nazaleta, tudi nʼebe bualu kai? Wewe wakulua bua kutushiha, anyi? Ndi mukumanye, wewe udi Wa Tshijila wa Nzambi." 
Luke4:35 Yesu wakamusamina ne, Hua, Umuka munda muandi. Hakamuela demon hanshi munkatshi muabo, wakumuka munda muandi, kai mumuenzele bibi." 
Luke4:36 Buowa buakabakuata bonso, bakakonkangana ne, Edi ndî kai? Yeye udi ne bukokeshi ne bukole bua kuela nyuma ya bukoya dî, yumuke munda mua bantu." 
Luke4:37 Lumu luandi luakaya mu miaba yonso ya luseke alu. 
Luke4:38 Wakabika mu nsunagoga, wakabuela mu nsubu wa Simona. Muku wa Petelo mukashi wakadi ne mubidi wandi mukuatshike kahia ka bungi; bakasengelela Yesu bua disama diandi." 
Luke4:39 Yeye wakimana mumuinangile, wakakandika disama dia kahia; diakamulekela; yeye wakabika lukasa, wakabalongoluela bia kudia." 
Luke4:40 Hakamba diba kubuela, bonso bakadi ne bakuatshike mabedi a bungi bakalua nʼabo kudiye; wakabalenga bianza buonso buabo, wakabakolesha." 
Luke4:41 Bademon bakumuka munda mua bantu ba bungi, bela dî bikole ne, Wewe udi Muana wa Nzambi. Yeye wakabasamina, kakitabusha bua bobo kuakula, bualu bua bobo bakamanya ne, Yeye udi Kilisto." 
Luke4:42 Hakatshia butuku, wakaluhuka, wakaya mu tshihela; bantu ba bungi bakamukeba, bakalua kudiye, bakakeba kumuhumbisha ne, Kumuki munkatshi muetu." 
Luke4:43 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kuambila misoko mikuabo lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua Nzambi; buakantuminabo mbualu ebu." 
Luke4:44 Yeye wakadi wamba bualu bua Nzambi mu nsunagoga ya mu Galela. 
Luke5:1 Hakadiye muimane ku muelelu wa dishiba dia Genesaleta, bantu ba bungi bakamunguila bua kunvua dî dia Nzambi;" 
Luke5:2 wakatangila matu abidi kukala kua mai, kadi bilembi biakadi bimane kuluhuka, biakadi biuvua tuhamba tuabi." 
Luke5:3 Wakabuela mu buatu bukuabo, buakadi bua Simona, wakamuambila ne, Semesha buatu tshituha tshibi mu mai. Wakashikama mu buatu, wakayisha bisumbu bia bantu." 
Luke5:4 Hakalekeleye kuakula, wakambila Simona ne, Semesha buabi ku mai male, nuhuekeshe tuhamba, nukuate minyinyi." 
Luke5:5 Simona wakandamuna ne, Mukelenge, tuakadi ne mudimu butuku tô, katuakukuata tshintu; kadi nempuekeshe tuhamba bualu bua dî diebe." 
Luke5:6 Hakenzabo nunku, bakakunguisha minyinyi ya bungi; tuhamba tuabo tuakamba kutuanyika;" 
Luke5:7 bakaloba ba bilembi nʼabo bakadi mu buatu bukuabo ne, Luai nutukuatshishe. Bakalua, bakûsha matu abidi tente, akamba kudina." 
Luke5:8 Hakamona Simona Petelo bualu ebu, wakadihonena hanshi ku binu bia Yesu, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, Umuka kundi, bualu bua meme ndi muntu bubi." 
Luke5:9 Wakakema ne bonso bakadi nʼandi bualu bua bungi bua minyinyi yakakuatabo; 
Luke5:10 Yakobo ne Yone, bana ba Zebedayo, ba bilembi ne Simona, bakakema kabidi Yesu wakambila Simona ne, Kutshinyi, katataka tô ne tshiendelele wewe neukuate bantu." 
Luke5:11 Hakaluabo ne matu abo ku mpata, bakâshla, bakamulonda." 
Luke5:12 Hakadiye mu musoko mukuabo, muntu wakadiku, wakadi ne disama dia nsudi dia bungi; hakamoneye Yesu, wakatua mpala hanshi, wakamutendekena, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, biwasua, udi mumanye mua kundengesha." 
Luke5:13 Yetu wakuolola tshianza tshiandi, wakamulenga ne, Ndi musue, wikale mulengeshibue. Nsudi yakamulekela lukasa." 
Luke5:14 Yesu wakamuambila bikole ne, Kuambidi muntu bualu ebu; uye biebe, udimueneshe kudi muakuidi wa Nzambi, udie biakamba Mose bu tshimanyishilu ku mesu kua bantu bualu bua kulengeshibua kuebe." 
Luke5:15 Kadi lumu luandi tuakatamba kumuangalaka; bantu ba bungi bakahia bua kunvua dî diandi, ne bua kubakolesheye ku matekete abo." 
Luke5:16 Kadi yeye wakaya biandi mu bihela, wakatendelela Nzambi." 
Luke5:17 Dituku dikuabo yeye wakadi uyisha bantu; Bafalese ne bayishi ba mikenshi ya Mose bakadi bashikame ha buihi, bafume ku misoko yonso ya Galela ne ya Yudaya ne ku Yelushalema; bukole bua Mukelenge buakadi nʼandi bua kuondaheye nʼabu bantu." 
Luke5:18 Bakalua ne muntu wakadi ne kaneke mulale mu bulalu; bakakeba kubuela nʼandi mu nsubu bua kumuladika ku mpala kua Yesu. 
Luke5:19 Hakahangabo mua kubuela nʼandi bualu bua tshisumbu tshia bantu, bakabanda ha mutu ha nsubu, bakalamuna mampana akadi ku musaka, bakamuhuekesha ne bulalu buandi hankatshinkatshi ku mpala kua Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Hakamoneye ditabusha diabo, wakamba ne, Mulumiana, mibi yebe idi mijimishibue." 
Luke5:21 Bafundi ne Bafalese bakabanga kukonkangana ne, Muntu eu udi uhenda Nzambi nganyi? Muntu kai udi mumanye mua kujimisha mibi, anu Nzambi nkayandi?" 
Luke5:22 Hakamanya Yesu dikonkangana diabo, yeye wakabandamuna ne, Nudi nukonkelangana nunku munda muenu tshinyi?" 
Luke5:23 Tshidi tshitambe butekete ntshinyi, kuambila umena kaneke ne, Mibi yebe idi mijimishibue; anyi kumuambila ne, Bika, enda biebe?" 
Luke5:24 Kadi bua nuenu mimanye ne, Muana wa muntu udi ne bukole, hatshidiye ha buloba, bua kujimisha mibi (yeye wakambila muena kaneke ne), Ndi nkuambila ne, Bika biebe, ambula bulalu buebe, ya ku nsubu kuebe." 
Luke5:25 Wakabika lukasa ku mesu kuabo, wakambula tshiakadiye mulale, wakaya ku nsubu kuandi, utumbisha Nzambi." 
Luke5:26 Buonso buabo bakakema, bakatumbisha Nzambi; buowa buakabakuata, bakamba ne, Lelu tuakutangila malu a kukema." 
Luke5:27 Hakashika malu â, yeye wakumukaku, wakamona musangishi wa mulambu, dina diandi Lewi, mushikame ku tshilambuidi, wakamuambila ne, Undonde." 
Luke5:28 Wakashîa bintu bionso, wakabika, wakamulonda." 
Luke5:29 Lewi wakamulambishila bidia bia bungi mu nsubu muandi; basangishi ba mulambu ba bungi ne bantu bakuabo kabidi bakadi bashikame nʼabo ku mesa. 
Luke5:30 Bafalese ne bafundi babo bakajiana bayidi ba Yesu, bakabakonka ne, Nudi nudila, nudi nunuina ne basangishi ba mulambu ne bantu babi tshinyi?" 
Luke5:31 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Badi ne bukole kabena ne muondahi bualu, anu badi ne mabedi." 
Luke5:32 Tshiakuluila bua kubikila badi bakane bua kukudimunabo mitshima yabo, nakuluila bua kubikila anu badi babi." 
Luke5:33 Bakamuambila ne, Bayidi ba Yone batu bajila bia kudia misangu ya bungi, batu balomba Nzambi, bayidi ba Bafalese batu benza nunku kabidi; kadi bebe batu badia, batu banua." 
Luke5:34 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nudi bamanye mua kujidisha balunda ba mubaki wa mukashi bia kudia, hatshidi mubaki wa mukashi nʼabo, anyi?" 
Luke5:35 Kadi matuku makuabo nealue; habanyengabo mubaki wa mukashi, nebajile bia kudia matuku au." 
Luke5:36 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu ne, Bantu kabatu bahanda tshihesa tshia tshmialu tshihia-tshihia bualu bua kutshitelalula ha tshmialu tshikulukulu; bienzabo nunku, nebabande tshivualu tshihia-tshihia, ne tshihesa tshiatshi kabidi katshiena tshiakanangane ne tshikulukulu." 
Luke5:37 Bantu kabatu bela maluvu mahia-mahia mu milondo ya biseba bikulukulu; bienzabo nunku, malulu neahande biseba, neaye hanshi, ne biseba nebifue." 
Luke5:38 Kadi bidi bimpe bia kuelabo maluvu mahia-mahia mu milondo ya biseba bihia-bihia. 
Luke5:39 Bikala muntu munue maluvu makulukulu, yeye kena musue mahia-mahia; bualu bua yeye neambe ne, A kale adi matambe." 
Luke6:1 Yesu wakadi uhitshila mu madimi a blé dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda, bayidi bandi bakatshibula miehu yai, benda baivinga mu bianza, badia." 
Luke6:2 Kadi Bafalese bakuabo bakabakonka ne, Nuenu nudi nuenzela bualu budi bujila dituku dia Lumingu tshinyi?" 
Luke6:3 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Nuenu kanuakubala bualu buakenza Davidi, hakadiye ne nsala, yeye ne bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, anyi?" 
Luke6:4 Bualu bua yeye wakabuela mu nsubu wa Nzambi, wakangata bidia bilesha, wakahidia, wakahaku bakadi nʼandi; biakadi tshijila, anu bakuidi ba Nzambi bakadi badia." 
Luke6:5 Yeye wakabambila ne, Muana wa muntu udi mukelenge wa dituku dia Lumingu." 
Luke6:6 Hakalua Lumingu lukuabo lua Bayuda, yeye wakabuela mu nsunagoga, wakayisha bantu; muntu wakadiku ne tshianza tshiandi tshia balume tshiume." 
Luke6:7 Bafundi ne Bafalese bakamutentekela ne, Yeye neondahe bantu dituku dia Lumingu, anyi? Bakakeba mua kumubanda." 
Luke6:8 Kadi yeye wakamanya meshi abo, wakambila muntu wakadi ne tshianza tshiandi tshiume ne, Bika, Imana hankatshinkatshi. Wakabika, wakimana." 
Luke6:9 Yesu wakabambila ne, Ndi musue kunukonka bualu: Tshidi tshimpe ntshinyi, kuenza malu mimpe dituku dia Lumingu, anyi kuenza malu mabi; kusungila muoyo, anyi kûshiha?" 
Luke6:10 Yeye wakabatangila buonso buabo, wakamuambila ne, Olola tshianza. Yeye Wakenza nunku, tshianza tshiandi tshiakakana kabidi." 
Luke6:11 Bakafuna bulobo, bakela tshifufu tshiabo ne, Netuenzele Yesu tshinyi?" 
Luke6:12 Mu matuku â yeye wakaya ku mukuna bua kutendelela Nzambi; wakamutendelela tô butuku buonso. 
Luke6:13 Hakatshia butuku, wakabikila bayidi bandi; wakasungula biandi dikumi ne babidi, wakabidika ne, Bapostolo;" 
Luke6:14 Simona, wakidikeye dina dikuabo ne, Petelo, ne muanʼabo Andele, ne Yakobo ne Yone, ne Filipo ne Bâtolomayo," 
Luke6:15 ne Matayo, ne Toma, ne Yakobo muana wa Alafayo, ne Simona wakadibo babikila ne, Muena Lukunukunu," 
Luke6:16 ne Yuda muana wa Yakobo, ne Yudasa Isakaliote, yeye wakalua mumutungidi." 
Luke6:17 Yeye wakahueka nʼabo, wakimana ha muaba mubatame ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bayidi bandi ne bantu ba bungi ba mu luseke luonso lua Yudaya ne ba mu Yelushalema ne ba mu luseke lua Tulo ne Sidona kukala kua mai manene, bakalua bua kunyua di diandi, ne bua yeye kushikisha mabedi abo;" 
Luke6:18 bakadi batatshishibua kudi nyuma ya bukoya bakalengesha. 
Luke6:19 Bantu bonso bakasua kumulenga bianza, bualu bua bukole buakadi bufuma munda muandi, bakashikisha masama a buonso buabo." 
Luke6:20 Yesu wakajosha bayidi bandi, wakamba ne, Nuenu bahele nudi ne disanka, bua bukelenge bua Nzambi budi buenu." 
Luke6:21 Nuenu badi ne nsala katataka nudi ne disanka, bua nuenu nenukute. Nuenu badi badila katataka nudi ne disanka, bua nuenu nenuseke." 
Luke6:22 Hikala bantu nʼenu lukuna, hanumushabo munkatshi muabo, hanuhendabo, hahetulabo dina dienu ne, Ndibi, bua bualu bua Muana wa muntu, nenuikale ne disanka." 
Luke6:23 Dituku adi nusanke, nutuhike bua disanka, bualu bua difutu dienu didi dinene mu diulu; bualu bua bankambua babo bakenzela baprofete nunku kabidi." 
Luke6:24 Kadi nuenu badi babanshi, mulau ulualua kunudi, bua nuenu nuakumana kuangata disamba dienu!" 
Luke6:25 Nuenu badi bûkute katataka, mulau ulualua Kunudi, bua nenuikale ne nsala! Nuenu badi baseka katataka, mulau ulualua kunudi, bua nenujinge, nenudile!" 
Luke6:26 Nuenu badi batumbisha kudi bantu bonso, mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu bua bankambua babo bakenzela baprofete bakadi ne mashimi nunku kabidi!" 
Luke6:27 Kadi ndi nuambila nuenu badi batelesha ne, Suai badi nʼenu lukuna, nuenzele badi nʼenu tshishi malu mimpe," 
Luke6:28 nusankishe badi banuela mulau, lombelai badi banukengesha Nzambi." 
Luke6:29 Biakutaha muntu dihi ku ditama, umuandamuine dinga ditama; bianyenga muntu kazaku kebe, kuhidi mua kumuha nshemise webe kabidi." 
Luke6:30 Uhe bonso badi bakulomba; bianyenga muntu bintu biebe, kumulombibi kabidi." 
Luke6:31 Nuenzele bantu malu onso anudi basue banuenzele. 
Luke6:32 Binuasua anu badi banusue, nenuikale ne disakidila kai? Bualu bua bantu babi badi basue badi babasue." 
Luke6:33 Binuenzela anu badi banuenzela bimpe malu mimpe, nenuikale ne disakidila kai? Bualu bua bantu babi batu benza nunku." 
Luke6:34 Binuasombesha bintu anu kudi banudi nutekemena ne, Nebatuhingishile tshia kasombela kabidi, nenuikale ne disakidila kai? Bantu babi mene badi basombesha badi babi bintu ne, Netubiangate bionso kabidi." 
Luke6:35 Kadi nuenu suai badi nʼenu lukuna, nubenzele bimpe, nubasombeshe bintu, kanui nubitekemena kabidi; nunku difutu dienu nedikale dinene, nenuikale bana ba Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, bualu bua yeye udi wenzela badi kabai bamusakidila ne badi babi malu mimpe." 
Luke6:36 Nufuile bantu luse bu mudi Tatu wenu ufuila bantu luse. 
Luke6:37 Kanulumbuiudi malu adi munda mua bantu bakuabo, nunku bobo kabena balumbulula malu adi munda muenu; kanubishi bantu bakuabo, nunku bobo kabena banuhisha; nulekele bantu, nunku nebandekele kabidi;" 
Luke6:38 nuhe bantu bintu, nunku nebanuhe bintu kabidi; nebafile mu biadi bienu tshihikilu tshiakane, tshishindika, tshisekenkesha, tshihongoloka. Bualu bua nebanuhikile bintu ne tshihikilu tshinudi nubahikila nʼatshi kabidi." 
Luke6:39 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu ne, Mufofo udi mumanye mua kulombela munga mufofo munyi? Bubidi buabo kabena bahona mu dina, anyi?" 
Luke6:40 Muyidi kena mutambe muyishi wandi; kadi muntu yonso wakumana kuyishibua neikale bu muyishi wandi. 
Luke6:41 Ntshinyi tshiudi utangidila kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanʼenu, kui utangila mutshi mimene udi mu disu diebe?" 
Luke6:42 Munyi mûdi mumanye mua kuambila muanʼenu ne, Muanʼetu, nkûmushe kasosa kadi mu disu diebe, kui utangile mutshi munene udi mu diebe disu? Wewe udi muena lubombo, diambedi umushe mutshi mimene udi mu disu diebe, nunku neumone mua kûmusha kasosa kadi mu disu dia muanʼenu." 
Luke6:43 Kakuena mutshi muimpe udi ukuama mamuma mabi; kakuena kabidi mutshi mubi udi ukuama mamuma mimpe. 
Luke6:44 Mutshi wonso udi mumanyibue ku mamuma au. Bualu bua bantu kabatu bahuola nfigi ku mionshi ya meba, kabatu bahuola mamuma a nvinyo ku mingonga." 
Luke6:45 Muntu muimpe udi uhatula tshintu tshimpe mu tshibutshilu tshimpe tshia mutshima wandi; muntu mubi udi uhatula tshintu tshibi mu tshibutshilu tshibi; bua mukana muandi mudi muamba anu malu adi matambe kuvulangana mu mutshima wandi. 
Luke6:46 Ntshinyi tshinudi numbikidila meme ne, Mukelenge, Mukelenge, kanui nuenza bu mundi ngamba?" 
Luke6:47 Muntu yonso udi ulua kundi, udi unvua mei anyi, udi wenza, nenuleshe udiye mufuanangane nʼandi;" 
Luke6:48 yeye udi mufuanangane ne muntu wakadi muibake nsubu, wakimba mutubu mule, wakateka bishimikidi ha mutu ha dibue dinene; hakûla musulu, wakakuma ku nsubu, kawakamanya mua kumutshikisha, bualu bua wakadi muibaka bimpe." 
Luke6:49 Kadi muntu yonso udi unvua mei, kai wênza, udi bu muntu wakibaka nsubu wandi ha buloba butekete, kakadi ne bishimikidi; musulu wakakuma ku nsubu, wakashimbuka lukasa; diuhuka dia nsubu au diakadi dinene." 
Luke7:1 Hakashikisheye kuambila bantu mei andi onso mu matshu abo, wakabuela mu Kapênuma." 
Luke7:2 Muntu wa kapitene kakuabo ka masalayi lukama wakadi munanga kudi nfumu wandi, lufu luakadi lumutonde." 
Luke7:3 Hakunvueye lumu lua Yesu, wakatuma bakulu ba Bena Yuda kudiye, bua kumusengelela bua kulua kuhandisheye muntu wandi." 
Luke7:4 Hakaluabo kudi Yesu, bakamutendekena bikole, bakamba ne, Yeye udi ne buimpe bua wewe kumuenzela bualu ebu," 
Luke7:5 yeye udi munange tshisamba tshietu, wakatulukila nsunagoga wetu." 
Luke7:6 Yesu wakaya nʼabo. Hakadiye ha buihi ne nsubu, kapitene kakatuma balunda baku kudiye bua kumuambila ne, Mukelenge, kuditatshishi, meme tshiena muntu mukumbane bua wewe kubuela mu nsubu muanyi;" 
Luke7:7 bua bualu ebu mbunakelela meshi ne, Tshiena bianyi muakane bua meme kumueneka kûdi; kadi wambe anu dî diebe, muntu wanyi neasangale." 
Luke7:8 Meme kabidi ndi ku nyima kua bakuabo, ndi ne masalayi ku nyima kuanyi; adi ngambila disalayi edi ne, Ya, diodio diaya; ndi ngambila dikuabo ne, Lua, diodio dialua; ndi ngambila muntu wanyi ne, Enza bualu ebu, yeye wenza." 
Luke7:9 Hakunvua Yesu mei â, wakakema, wakatshinguluka, wakambila tshisumbu tshia bantu tshiakadi tshimulonda ne, Ndi nuambila ne, Munkatshi mua Bena Isalele mene mene tshiena musanganemu ditabusha dinene nunku." 
Luke7:10 Bakadi batumibua bakahingana ku nsubu, bakasangana muntu wa kapitene mumane kusanguluka." 
Luke7:11 Hakahita tshituha tshihi, yeye wakaya mu musoko, dina diau Naina; bayidi bandi bakaya nʼandi ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu." 
Luke7:12 Hakafikeye ha buihi ne tshibuelelu tshia mu musoko, hakadi baluhuka ne muntu mufue, wakadi biandi muana umuehele mulela kudi mamu wandi, mamu wandi wakadi wa mu lufuila; bantu ba bungi ba mu musoko bakadi nʼandi." 
Luke7:13 Hakamutangila Mukelenge, yeye wakamufua luse, wakamuambila ne, Kudidi." 
Luke7:14 Wakalua ha buihi, wakalenga tshituadilu tshia tshitalu tshianza; batuadi batshi bakimana. Yesu wakamba ne, Nsongalume, ndi nkuambila ne, Bika." 
Luke7:15 Wakadi mufue wakabika, wakashikama, wakabanga kuakula, Yesu wakamufila kudi mamu wandi." 
Luke7:16 Buowa buakabakuata buonso buabo; bakatumbisha Nzambi bamba ne, Muprofete munene wakumueneka munkatshi muetu, Nzambi wakulua kutangila bantu bandi." 
Luke7:17 Lumu luandi elu luakamuangalaka mu luseke luonso lua Yudaya ne ku matshika onso. 
Luke7:18 Bayidi ba Yone bakamuambila malu â onso. 
Luke7:19 Yone wakabikila bayidi bandi bakuabo babidi, wakabatuma kudi Mukelenge bua kumukonka ne, Wewe nyeye ulualua, anyi tutekemene mukuabo?" 
Luke7:20 Hakaluabo kudiye, bakamuambila ne, Yone Mubatiji wakututuma bua kukukonka ne, Wewe nyeye ulualua, anyi tutekemene mukuabo?" 
Luke7:21 Ha diba adi mene Yesu wakadi wondaha bantu ba bungi mabedi abo ne masama abo makole, wakadi ubumushila nyuma mibi; wakadi utabasha mesu a ba bungi bakadi bafofo." 
Luke7:22 Yeye wakabakudimuna di ne, Yai bienu, nuambile Yone malu anuakumona ne anuakunvua ne, Bafofo badi batabala, balema badi benda, bena nsudi badi balengeshibue, bena mahaha badi bunvue, bafue badi babishibue ku lufu, badi bambila bahele lumu luimpe lua Nzambi." 
Luke7:23 Muntu yonso udi kai ulenduka bua bualu buanyi udi ne disanka. 
Luke7:24 Hakahingana bena mukenshi ba Yone, Yesu wakabanga kuambila bantu bualu bua Yone ne, Nuakuyila mu tshihela bua kutangila tshinyi? Bua kutangila disele didibo banyungisha kudi luhehele, anyi?" 
Luke7:25 Nuakuyila bua kutangila tshinyi? Bua kutangila muntu muluate bilulu binefuke, anyi? Bantu badi ne bilulu bilengele, badi mu buneme buabo, batu bikala mu nsubu ya banfumu." 
Luke7:26 Kadi nuakuyila bua kutangila tshinyi? Muprofete, anyi? E, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye udi mutambe muprofete." 
Luke7:27 Eu nyeye wakafundabo ne, Monai, ndi ntuma mukenshi wanyi ku mpala kuebe, Yeye nealongolole nshila webe ku mpala kuebe." 
Luke7:28 Ndi nuambila ne, Munkatshi mua bakalelabo kudi bakashi kamuakadi mukuabo mutambe Yone; kadi udi mutambe bonso bukese mu bukelenge bua mu diulu udi mumutambe yeye." 
Luke7:29 Hakunvua bantu bonso malu au, ne basangishi ba mulambu kabidi, bakabingisha Nzambi, bakadi bamane kubatijibua ne dibatiza dia Yone." 
Luke7:30 Kadi Bafalese ne bamanyi ba mikenshi bakahidia lungenyi lua Nzambi, bakadi kabai babatijibue kudiye." 
Luke7:31 Nenfuanyikishe bantu ba tshikondo etshi bu tshinyi? Badi bu tshinyi? 
Luke7:32 Badi bu bana bakese badi bashikama mu tshisalu, badi babikilangana, badi bamba ne, Tuakunuelela nshiba, kanuena baje; tuakujinga, kanuena badile." 
Luke7:33 Bualu bua Yone Mubatiji wakulua kai udia bidia kai unua maluvu; nudi nuamba ne, Yeye udi ne demon munda." 
Luke7:34 Muana wa muntu wakulua udia bidia ne unua maluvu; nudi nuamba ne, Yeye udi muena mudi, udi mukuatshiki wa maluvu, udi mulunda wa basangishi ba mulambu ne wa bantu babi." 
Luke7:35 Bana bonso ba lungenyi badi balujadika. 
Luke7:36 Mufalese mukuabo wakasua Yesu adie ngandi bidia. Yeye wakabuela mu nsubu wa Mufalese, wakashikama ku mesa." 
Luke7:37 Mu musoko muakadi mukashi mubi; hakamanyeye ne, Yesu udi ushikama ku mesa mu nsubu wa Mufalese, wakalua ne mulondo wa alabasta, mu mulondo muakadi mananashi;" 
Luke7:38 hakadiye muimane ku makasa a Yesu ku nyima kuandi udila, wakabanga kubolesha makasa andi ne binsonshi biandi, wakâkuhula ne nsuki yandi, wakatua mishiku ku makasa a Yesu, wakaela mananashi." 
Luke7:39 Hakamona Mufalese wakamubikila bua kudia bualu abu, wakamba munda munda ne, Bu muntu eu muikale muprofete, yeye wakadi kumanya mudi mukashi eu wakumulenga bianza ne, Udi mubi." 
Luke7:40 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Simona, ndi ne dî dia kukuambila. Yeye wakamba ne, Muyishi, ambaku." 
Luke7:41 Musombeshanganyi wakadiku, wakadi ne bena mabanza andi babidi; mukuabo wakadi ne dibanza dia ndenalio nkama itanu, mukuabo wakadi ne dibanza dia ndenalio makumi atanu." 
Luke7:42 Hakahangabo bintu bia kumufuta, yeye wakabalekelela mabanza bubidi buabo. Bubidi buabo watamba kumusua nganyi?" 
Luke7:43 Simona wakamuandamuna ne, Ndi ngela meshi ne, Muena dibanza dinene wakalekeleleye. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Wakujingulula bimpe." 
Luke7:44 Hakatshingulukeye kudi mukashi, wakambila Simona ne, Udi utangila mukashi eu? Nakubuela mu nsubu webe kuakumpa mai a makasa anyi, kadi yeye wakubolesha makasa anyi ne binsonshi biandi, wakuakuhula ne nsuki yandi." 
Luke7:45 Wewe kuakutuangana nʼanyi mishiku, kadi hanakubuela tô ne katataka yeye kena ulekela kutua mishiku yandi ku makasa anyi." 
Luke7:46 Wewe kuakungela manyi ha mutu, kadi yeye wakangela mananashi ha makasa anyi." 
Luke7:47 Bua bualu ebu ndi nkuambila ne, Mibi yandi idi ya bungi, yakujimishibua; bualu bua yeye wakadi ne dinanga dia bungi; walekelelabo malu makese udi ne dinanga dikese." 
Luke7:48 Yeye wakambila mukashi ne, Mibi yebe yakujimishibua." 
Luke7:49 Bakadi bashikame nʼandi ku mesa bakabanga kukonkangana ne, Eu udi ujimishilangana mibi nganyi?" 
Luke7:50 Yeye wakambila mukashi ne, Ditabusha diebe diakukusungila, ya biebe talalâ." 
Luke8:1 Hakahita tshituha tshihi, Yesu wakendakana mu bimenga ne mu misoko mikese, wambila bantu bualu bua Nzambi, wenda ne lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua Nzambi; bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi bakadi nʼandi," 
Luke8:2 ne bakashi bakuabo bakumushileye nyuma mibi munda, bakashikisheye matekete abo: Malia wakadibo babikila ne Muena Magadala, bademon muanda mutekete bakumuka munda muandi," 
Luke8:3 ne Yoana mukashi wa Kuza mulami wa bintu wa Helode, ne Susana ne bakuabo ba bungi, bakadi babakuatshisha ne bintu biabo." 
Luke8:4 Bakunguila tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, kakalua ba mu misoko yonso kudiye, wakela lusumuinu ne," 
Luke8:5 Mumiaminyi wakaya bua kumiamina maminu andi; hakadiye umiamina, maminu makuabo akamata kukala kua nshila; bantu bakâdiata mu makasa, nyunyu ya mu diulu yakâzokola." 
Luke8:6 Makuabo akamata ha dibue; hakatolokau, akafubidila, bualu bua kâkadi ne tshitelela." 
Luke8:7 Makuabo akamata mu mionshi ya meba, mionshi yakadiunda nʼau, yakânyengela." 
Luke8:8 Makuabo akamata mu buloba buimpe, akadiunda, akavudisha maminu makuabo lukama. Hakambeye malu â, wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Udi ne matshu unvue biandi." 
Luke8:9 Bayidi bandi bakamukonka bualu bua lusumuinu elu. 
Luke8:10 Yeye wakamba ne, Bakunuha bienu lungenyi lua kumanya malu a bukelenge bua Nzambi adi masokoka; kadi badi bambila bakuabo malu anu mu nsumuinu; nunku hamonabo, kabena bamona bimpe; hunvuabo, kabena bajingulula." 
Luke8:11 Lusumuinu elu ludi nunku: Maminu adi dî dia Nzambi. 
Luke8:12 Ba kukala kua nshila badi bantu bakunvua dî; hashishe, diabolo ulualua, udi unyenga dî mu mitshima yabo ne, Kabitabushi, kabasungidibu." 
Luke8:13 Ba ha dibue badi bu bantu badi bitabusha dî ne disanka, hakudiunvuabo; kadi Bobo kabena ne miji, badi bitabusha tshituha, ku dituku dia diteta dia munda badi basesuka." 
Luke8:14 Au akamata mu mionshi ya meba adi bu bantu bakumpua dî; hatshidibo baya mu nshila, meshi abo ne biuma ne masanka a muoyo udibo nʼau katataka bidi bibafiekela mu nshingu, kabena bakuama maminu aboba." 
Luke8:15 Au a mu buloba buimpe adi bu bantu bakunvua dî mu mitshima mimpe ne ya kalolo, badi badilama bikole, badi bavudisha maminu bua dinanukila diabo." 
Luke8:16 Hatemesha muntu muinda, yeye kena ûbuikila ne mushete, kena ûteka munshi mua bulalu; kadi yeye udi ûteka ha mesa a muinda, bua bonso badi babuela bamone dinkenka diau." 
Luke8:17 Kakuena bualu busokoka buahanga kusokolodibua; kakuena bualu bua mu musokoko buahanga kumanyibua ne kumueneka. 
Luke8:18 Dimukai munudi nunvua; bua udi ne bintu nebamuhe binga, kadi udi kai ne tshintu nebamunyenge tshidiye wela meshi ne, Ndi nʼatshi." 
Luke8:19 Mamu wandi ne bana babo bakalua kudiye, kabakamanya mua kulua ha buihi nʼandi bualu bua tshisumbu tshia bantu." 
Luke8:20 Bakamuambila ne, Mamu webe ne bana benu badi bimane ku bula, badi basue kukutangila." 
Luke8:21 Kadi yeye wakabandamuna ne, Mamuʼanyi ne bana betu badi anu bantu batu batelesha dî dia Nzambi, batu badienza." 
Luke8:22 Dituku dikuabo yeye wakabuela mu buatu, yeye ne bayidi bandi; wakabambila ne, Tusabukai dishia dia dishiha; bakasemesha buatu mu mai." 
Luke8:23 Hakadibo baya, yeye wakalala tulu; tshihuhu tshikole tshiakahueka ha dishiba; buatu buakamba kûla ne mai, bakamba kufua." 
Luke8:24 Bakalua kudiye, bakamubisha ku tulu, bakamba ne, Mukelenge, Mukelenge, tudi tufua. Yeye wakabika, wakabuikila luhehele ne mavuala; biakalekela, muaba au wakatalala talalâ." 
Luke8:25 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Ditabusha dienu didi kudi kunyi? Bakadi ne buowa, bakakema, bakakonkangana ne, Ahu eu udi nganyi? Yeye udi wela mpehele ne mai dî diandi, bidi bimunvuila. Ku Gelasa Yesu udi umusha bademon munda mua mufitu" 
Luke8:26 Bakafika ku luseke lua Bena Gelasa, luakadi buludiludi ne Galela." 
Luke8:27 Hakasabukeye ku mpata, muntu wa mu musoko wakasangila nʼandi, wakadi ne bademon munda; tô musangu mule yeye kakadi uluata bilulu, kakadi ulala mu nsubu, anu mu majambu." 
Luke8:28 Hakamoneye Yesu, wakela dî diandi bikole, wakadihonena ku mpala kuandi, wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Ndi nʼebe bualu kai, wewe Yesu, Muana wa Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu? Ndi nkutendekena ne, Kunkengeshi;" 
Luke8:29 bua wakadi wela mulamatshi dî ne, Hatuka munda mua muntu eu. Nyuma wa bukoya wakadi umukuata misangu ya bungi; bakadi bamusuika ne nkanu ne nkata; hakatshibuleye nkanu, demon wakadi umuihata mu bihela." 
Luke8:30 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Dina diebe nganyi? Wakamba ne, Legona, bualu bua bademon ba bungi bakadi munda muandi." 
Luke8:31 Bakamutendekena ne, Kutuambidi bua tuetu kuya mu dina didi kadî ne tshishikidilu." 
Luke8:32 Tshisumbu tshia ngulube ya bungi tshiakadiku idia mashinde ku mukuna; bakamutendekena ne, Itabusha bua tuetu kubuela munda muai. Yeye wakitabusha." 
Luke8:33 Bademon bakaluhuka munda mua muntu, bakabuela munda mua ngulube; tshisumbu tshiai tshiakanyemena lubilu ku tshibungubungu, yakahona mu dishiba, yakafua mu mai." 
Luke8:34 Hakamona badishi bai bualu ebu, bakanyema, bakamba bualu ebu ku musoko ne mu luseke alu." 
Luke8:35 Bakahatuka mu musoko bua kutangila bualu buakalua; bakalua kudi Yesu, bakasangana muntu wakahatuka bademon munda muandi mushikame ku makasa a Yesu, muluate bilulu, muikale ne lungenyi luimpe; bakatshina." 
Luke8:36 Bamonyi ba bualu abu bakabamanyisha muakusungilabo wakadi mukuatshike ne bademon. 
Luke8:37 Bantu bonso ba mu luseke lua Bena Gelasa bakamuambila ne, Umuka kutudi; bualu bua buowa bunene buakabakuata; wakabuela mu buatu, wakahingana." 
Luke8:38 Kadi muntu wakahatuka bademon munda muandi wakamutendekena ne, Ndi musue kuikala nʼebe; kadi Yesu wakamutuma ne," 
Luke8:39 Uhingane ku nsubu kuebe, ubambile malu manene akukuenzela Nzambi. Yeye wakaya, wakamba malu manene akamuenzela Yesu mu musoko wonso." 
Luke8:40 Hakahingana Yesu, bantu ba bungi bakamusankidila, bualu bua bakadi bamuindile." 
Luke8:41 Muntu wakalua, dina diandi Yailo, yeye wakadi mukelenge wa nsunagoga; wakadiela ku makasa a Yesu, wakamutendekena ne, Ulue mu nsubu wanyi;" 
Luke8:42 bualu bua wakadi ne muana mukashi umuehele, wakadi bu bidimu dikumi ne bibidi; yeye wakamba kufua. Hakadiye wenda, bantu ba bungi bakamunguila." 
Luke8:43 Mukashi wakadiku, wakadi ne disama dia mashi ahatuka bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, wakafuta banganga buka bintu biandi bionso, kakuakadi muntu wakamanya mua kushikisha disama diandi;" 
Luke8:44 yeye wakalua ku nyima kua Yesu, wakalenga ku mubangu wa kazaku kandi; ha diba adi mene dihatuka dia mashi diakushika." 
Luke8:45 Yesu wakakonka ne, Wakundenga tshianza nganyi? Bakavila buonso buabo, Petelo ne bakuabo bakadi nʼandi bakamba ne, Mukelenge, bisumbu bia bantu bidi bikunguile, bidi bikutshintshimika." 
Luke8:46 Kadi Yesu wakamba ne, Muntu wakundenga tshianza; bualu bua nakudiunvua munda munda ne, Bukole buakuhatuka munda muanyi." 
Luke8:47 Hakamanya mukashi ne, Tshiena musokoma, wakalua uzakala, wakadiela ku mpala kuandi, wakamba ku mesu kua bantu bonso tshiakamulengeleye ne muakashika disama diandi ha diba adi mene." 
Luke8:48 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Muanʼanyi, ditabusha diebe diakukuhandisha, ya biebe talalâ." 
Luke8:49 Hakadiye wamba nunku, muntu wakafuma ku nsubu wa mukelenge wa nsunagoga, wakamba ne, Muanʼebe udi mufue, kutatshishi Muyishi." 
Luke8:50 Hakunvua Yesu dî diabo, wakamuambila ne, Kutshinyi, itabusha anu kuitabusha, nebamusungile." 
Luke8:51 Hakalueye ku nsubu, kakitabusha bua muntu mukuabo abuele nʼandi anu Petelo ne Yone ne Yakobo ne tatu wa muana ne mamu wandi." 
Luke8:52 Bonso bakadi badila, bakadi bamujinga; kadi yeye wakamba ne, Kanudidi; bualu bua yeye kena mufue, udi mulale tulu." 
Luke8:53 Bakamuseka, bakamanya ne, Yeye udi mufue." 
Luke8:54 Kadi yeye wakamukuata ku tshianza, wakamubikila ne, Muana, bika." 
Luke8:55 Muoyo wandi wakahingana, wakabika lukasa; Yesu wakamba ne, Bamuhe bia kudia." 
Luke8:56 Bamuledi bandi bakakema; kadi yeye wakabambila bikole ne, Kanuambidi muntu bualu buakuenjibua." 
Luke9:1 Yeye wakabikila bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi, wakabaha bukole ne bukokeshi bua kuleshabo bademon bonso, ne bua kukoleshabo bakadi ne mabedi." 
Luke9:2 Yeye wakabatuma bua kuambilabo bantu bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi, ne bua kukoleshabo bena mabedi." 
Luke9:3 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kanuangatshi bintu bia kuya nʼabi mu luendu, anyi tshibangu, anyi tshibombo, anyi bidia, anyi mpalata, anyi bikowelu bibidi." 
Luke9:4 Hanuabuela mu nsubu, nushalemu tô ne hanumuka." 
Luke9:5 Bantu badi kabai banuitabusha, hanutshidi nuluhuka mu musoko au, nututule nsenga idi mu makasa enu bu tshimanyinu tshia dibenga diabo." 
Luke9:6 Bakamuangalaka, bakaya mu misoko mikese tô, benda bamba lumu luimpe, bashikisha masama a bantu kuonso kuakayabo." 
Luke9:7 Muloho Helode wakunvua lumu lua malu au onso akenzabo; wakatamba kulubakana, bualu bua bantu bakuabo bakadi bamba ne, Yone wakubika ku lufu;" 
Luke9:8 banga ne, Eliya wakumueneka; banga ne, Muprofete wa kale wakubika kabidi." 
Luke9:9 Helode wakamba ne, Nakukosa Yone mutu; ahu au undi ngunvua lumu luandi nganyi? Wakakeba mua kumumona." 
Luke9:10 Hakahingana bapostolo, bakambila Yesu malu akenzabo. Wakabangata, wakaya nʼabo nkayabo mu musoko, dina diau Bete-saîda." 
Luke9:11 Kadi bantu ba bungi, hakatangilabo bualu ebu, bakamulonda; yeye wakabakidila, wakabambila bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi, wakakolesha bakadi ne mabedi." 
Luke9:12 Diba diakamba kubuela, bayidi bandi dikumi ne babidi bakalua, bakamuambila ne, Umuangalashe bantu, baye mu misoko ne mu luseke elu bua kulala ne bua kuangata bia kudia: bualu bua kunoko tudi mu tshihela." 
Luke9:13 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu nubahe bia kudia. Bakamba ne, Katuena ne bia kudia bihite mitanda itanu ne mishiha ibidi, anu bituaya kusumba bia kudia bia bantu aba bantu." 
Luke9:14 Bakadi balume bu binunu bitanu. Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Nubashikike hanshi, ku tshisumbu bu makumi atanu, ku tshisumbu bu makumi atanu." 
Luke9:15 Bakenza nunku, bakabashikika buonso buabo." 
Luke9:16 Yeye wakamema mitanda itanu ne mishiha ibidi, wakatangila mulu, wakabivuidishila disanka, wakabitshibula, wakabifila mu bianza bia bayidi bua kubitekabo ku mpala kua bantu." 
Luke9:17 Bakadia, bakukuta buonso buabo; bakangula bihesa bia bidia biakadi bishala bisaka dikumi ne bibidi." 
Luke9:18 Hakadiye utendelela Nzambi ha nkayandi, bayidi bakadi ha buihi nʼandi; yeye wakabakonka ne, Bantu badi bangamba meme ne, Nganyi?" 
Luke9:19 Bakamuandamuna ne, Yone Mubatiji; kadi bakuabo badi bamba ne, Eliya; bakuabo ne, Muprofete wa kale wakubika kabidi." 
Luke9:20 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Kadi nuenu nudi nungamba ne, Nganyi? Petelo wakamuandamuna ne, Kilisto wa Nzambi." 
Luke9:21 Yeye wakabambila bikole ne, Kanuambidi muetu bualu ebu;" 
Luke9:22 wakabambila ne, Budi Muana wa muntu nʼabu mbua kukengeshibua makenga a bungi, ne bua kuhidibua kudi bakulu ne kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne kudi bafundi, ne bua kushihibua, ne bua kubishibua hahita matuku asatu." 
Luke9:23 Yeye wakabambila buonso buabo ne, Biasua muntu kundonda, adihidie, atuale mutshi wandi mutshiamakane ku ditutu ku dituku, andonde." 
Luke9:24 Bualu bua wasua kusungila muoyo wandi neaujimishe; kadi wajimisha muoyo wandi bua bualu buanyi neausungile. 
Luke9:25 Biaheta muntu buloba buonso, ne bua bualu ebu udi udijimisha anyi udi unyanga muoyo wandi, mushinga wandi muimpe udi hanyi?" 
Luke9:26 Muntu yonso udi unfua meme ne mei anyi bundu, Muana wa muntu neamufue yeye bundu, halueye ne butumbi buandi ne bua Tatu ne bua banjelo ba tshijila." 
Luke9:27 Ndi nuambila bulelela ne, Bakuabo badi bimana aha kabena bafua tô ne hamonabo bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke9:28 Yesu wakashikisha kuamba malu â; hakahita matuku bu muanda mukulu, yeye wakangata Petelo ne Yone ne Yakobo, wakabanda nʼabo ku mukuna bua kutendelela Nzambi." 
Luke9:29 Hakadiye utendelela Nzambi, mpala wandi wakakudimuka, bilulu biandi biakalua bitoke, biakengelela." 
Luke9:30 Monai, balume babidi bakadi bayikila nʼandi, Mose ne Eliya;" 
Luke9:31 bakamueneka mu butumbi, bakadi bamba bualu bua lufu luandi luakambeye kushikisha ku Yelushalema." 
Luke9:32 Mesu a Petelo ne a bakuabo bakadi nʼandi akadi maneme ne tulu; kadi hakatabalabo, bakatangila butumbi buandi, ne balume babidi bimane nʼandi." 
Luke9:33 Hakadi balume aba bumuka kudiye, Petelo wakambila Yesu ne, Mukelenge, hatudi kunoko mbimpe, tuasai bitanda bisatu, tshikuabo ntshiebe, tshinga ntshia Mose, tshikuabo ntshia Eliya; Petelo kakamanya tshiakadiye wamba." 
Luke9:34 Hakadiye wamba dî edi, ditutu diakalua, diakababuikila; hakadibo babuela mu ditutu, bakadi ne buowa." 
Luke9:35 Dî diakaluhuka mu ditutu ne, Eu udi Muanʼanyi musungula, munvuilai." 
Luke9:36 Hakakosa dî, bakasangana Yesu nkayandi. Bakahua, mu matuku au ka bakamanyisha muntu malu akamonabo." 
Luke9:37 Hakatshiabu, bakahueka ku mukuna, tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu tshiakasangila nʼandi." 
Luke9:38 Muntu wa mu tshisumbu wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Muyishi, ndi nkutendekena, ulue kutangila muanʼanyi mulume; bualu bua udi muana wanyi umuehele mulela;" 
Luke9:39 monai, nyuma mubi udi umukuata, yeye udi utayika ne miadi; nyuma mubi udi umuhaluisha tô lututu luhatuka ku mishiku, kena umulekela lukasa, udi umukuma mikumu." 
Luke9:40 Nakutendekena bayidi bebe ne, Bamumushe; bakuhanga." 
Luke9:41 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Nuenu ba tshikondo etshi tshia buhidia ne tshitshu, nenshale nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Nentate nʼenu musangu bule munyi? Lua ne muanʼebe." 
Luke9:42 Hakadiye ulue, demon wakamukuma hanshi, wakamuhaluisha bibi. Kadi Yesu wakabela nyuma wa bukoya, wakashikisha disama dia muana, wakamuhingisha mu bianza bia tatuʼandi." 
Luke9:43 Buonso buabo bakakema bualu bua butumbi bunene bua bukelenge bua Nzambi. Hakadi bantu bonso bakema bua malu onso akadiye wenza, yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne," 
Luke9:44 Mei â abuele mu matshu enu, bualu bua nebafile Muana wa muntu mu bianza bia bantu." 
Luke9:45 Kadi bobo kabakamanya dî edi, diakadi dibasokoka bua kabadijinguludi; bakatshina mua kumuebesha dî edi." 
Luke9:46 Bayidi bakadi belangana mpata ne, Udi mutambe bakuabo nganyi?" 
Luke9:47 Kadi hakamanya Yesu mpata yakadi mu mitshima yabo, wakangata muana mukese, wakamushikika ha buihi nʼandi," 
Luke9:48 wakabambila ne, Witabusha muana mukese eu mu dina dianyi udi ungitabusha meme; wangitabusha meme udi witabusha udi muntume; bua udi mutambe bukese munkatshi muenu nyeye udi mimene." 
Luke9:49 Yone wakamuandamuna ne, Mukelenge, tuakutangila muntu umusha bademon munda mua bantu mu dina diebe; tuakumukanda bualu bua yeye kena nkulonda nʼetu." 
Luke9:50 Kadi Yesu wakamuambila ne, Kanumukandi, bualu bua udi kai unuhidia udi nʼenu." 
Luke9:51 Hakamba matuku a kumubandishabo mulu kukumbana, yeye wakambula mpala wandi mutangisha ku Yelushalema bua kuyeye kuakua," 
Luke9:52 wakatuma bena mukenshi ku mpala kuandi; bakaya, bakabuela mu musoko wa Bena Samalea, bualu bua kumulongoluela malu." 
Luke9:53 Kadi Bena Samalea bakamuhidia, bualu bua mpala wandi wakadi mutangile ku Yelushalema." 
Luke9:54 Bayidi bandi Yakobo ne Yone, hakamonabo bualu ebu, bakakonka ne, Mukelenge, udi musue tuetu tulombe kahia kalue mu diulu bua kubosha, anyi?" 
Luke9:55 Kadi yeye wakatshinguluka, wakababela." 
Luke9:56 Bakaya ku musoko mukuabo. 
Luke9:57 Hakadibo baya mu nshila, muntu wakamuambila ne, Nenkulonde kuonso kuwaya." 
Luke9:58 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Mibuabua idi ne mena ai, nyunyu ya mulu idi ne masua ai; kadi Muana wa muntu kena ne ha kuladika mutu wandi." 
Luke9:59 Yesu wakambila muntu mukuabo ne, Undonde. Kadi yeye wakakudimuna dî ne, Mukelenge, witabushe bua meme nganje kuya diambedi bua kujika tatu wanyi." 
Luke9:60 Kadi yeye wakamuambila ne, Shîa bafue bajike bafue babo; kadi wewe ya biebe, umanyishe bantu bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke9:61 Mukuabo kabidi wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, nenkulonde; kadi witabushe bua meme nganje kuya diambedi kulaya badi mu nsubu muanyi." 
Luke9:62 Kadi Yesu wakamuambila ne, Muntu mumane kukuata ku lukasu ludi ludima nʼalu tubalu, biatangileye ku nyima, yeye kena muakanangane ne bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke10:1 Hakashika malu â, Mukelenge wakasungula banga bayidi kabidi makumi muanda mutekete, wakabatuma ku mpala kuandi ku babidi ku babidi mu misoko yonso ne mu miaba yonso, yakadiye wamba kuya." 
Luke10:2 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bulelela, bintu bia kunowa bidi bia bungi, kadi bena mudimu badi banya-banya. Nunku nulombe mukelenge wa bintu bia kunowa, atume bena mudimu mu kunowa kuandi." 
Luke10:3 Yai bienu; monai, ndi nutuma bu bana ba mikoko badi munkatshi mua nkashama," 
Luke10:4 Kanuyi ne tshibombo tshia mpalata ne nsahu wa bintu bikuabo, anyi bisabata bikuabo; kanuedi muntu muoyo musangu mule mu nshila." 
Luke10:5 Hanuabuela mu nsubu, nudianjile kuamba ne, Ditalala dikale mu nsubu eu." 
Luke10:6 Bikalamu muana wa ditalala, ditalala dienu nedikale nʼandi; kadi bikaleye kaimu, nedihingane kunudi kabidi." 
Luke10:7 Nushale mu nsubu amu mene, nudie nunue bidibo banuha; bualu bua muena mudimu udi muakanyine bua kuangateye difutu diandi. Kanutambakanyi ku nsubu ne ku nsubu." 
Luke10:8 Binuabuela mu musoko, bianuitabushabo, nudie biatekabo ku mpala kuenu;" 
Luke10:9 nuondahe bena mabedi badimu, nubambile ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi buakulua ha buihi nʼenu." 
Luke10:10 Kadi hanuabuela mu musoko, biabenga bena musoko kunuitabusha, yai mu misesu yau, nuambe ne," 
Luke10:11 Nsenga ya musoko wenu idi milamate mu makasa etu, tudi tunukuhuilai; kadi numanye bienu ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi buakulua ha buihi." 
Luke10:12 Ndi nuambila ne, Halua dituku diadia, bujitu bua dikenga dia musoko au nebutambe bua Sodoma." 
Luke10:13 Wewe Kolazina, mulau ulualua kûdi! Wewe Bete-saîda, mulau ulualua kûdi! Bu malu a kukema akenjibua munkatshi muenu, menjibue mu Tulo ne mu Sidona, bakadi kukudimuna mitshima yabo kale, bashikame mu bilulu bikayabala ne mu butue." 
Luke10:14 Halua dituku dia kulumbulula, bujitu bua dikenga dienu nebutambe bua Tulo ne bua Sidona." 
Luke10:15 Ne wewe Kapênuma, nebakubandishe mu diulu, anyi? Nebakuhuekeshe mu Muaba wa Bafue." 
Luke10:16 Wanunvuila udi ungunvuila meme, wanuhidia udi umpidia meme; wampidia meme udi uhidia wakuntuma." 
Luke10:17 Bayidi makumi muanda mutekete bakahingana ne disanka, bakamba ne, Mukelenge, bademon mene badi batumikila dî dietu mu dina diebe." 
Luke10:18 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nakadi nmona Satana mukuluke mu diulu muhone bu muele wa nvula." 
Luke10:19 Nakunuha bukole bua kudiata nyoka ne tuminyiminyi, ne bua kuhita bukole buonso bua muena lukuna; tshintu katshiena tshinuenzela bibi." 
Luke10:20 Kadi kanusanki bua nyuma mibi idi itumikila dî dienu, kadi nusanke bua mena enu adi mafunda mu diulu." 
Luke10:21 Ha diba adi mene yeye wakasanka mu Nyuma Muimpe, wakamba ne, Tatu wanyi, Mukelenge wa diulu ne wa buloba, ndi nkusakidila bua wewe wakusokoka bena meshi ne bena budimu malu â, wakuasokolola kudi bana bakese; bulelela, Tatu, bua bualu ebu buakadi buimpe ku mesu kuebe." 
Luke10:22 Tatu wanyi wakufila bintu bionso mu bianza bianyi; kakuena muntu udi mumanye Muana, anu Tatu; kakuena muntu udi mumanye Tatu, anu Muana ne udi Muana musue kulesha Tatu." 
Luke10:23 Wakatshinguluka kudi bayidi bandi, wakabambila ha nkayabo ne, Mesu adi amona malu anudi numona adi ne disanka;" 
Luke10:24 ndi nuambila ne, Baprofete ba bungi ne banfumu bakasua kumona malu anudi numona, kabakâmona; bakasua kunvua malu anudi nunvua, kabakaûnvua." 
Luke10:25 Mumanyi wa mikenshi wakimana, wakateta Yesu munda ne, Muyishi, nengenze tshinyi bua kuhiana muoyo wa tshiendelele?" 
Luke10:26 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Bakafunda tshinyi mu mikenshi ya Mose? Udi ubala munyi?" 
Luke10:27 Yeye wakakudimuna dî ne, Sua Mukelenge Nzambi webe ne mutshima webe wonso ne muoyo webe wonso ne bukole buebe buonso ne lungenyi luebe luonso; ne sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue." 
Luke10:28 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Wewe wakuandamuna banue; enza biebe nunku, newikale ne muoyo." 
Luke10:29 Kadi yeye wakasua kudibingisha, wakakonka Yesu ne, Mukuetu nganyi?" 
Luke10:30 Yesu wakamukudimuna dî ne, Muntu wakabika mu Yelushalema, wakadi uhueka ku Yeleko; wakatukidila mu bianza bia banyengi, bakamuvula bilulu biandi, bakamukuma, bakaya, bakamushîa ne tshioyoyo." 
Luke10:31 Muakuidi wa Nzambi wakadi uhueka mu nshila au; hakamoneye muntu, wakahitshila ku luseke lukuabo." 
Luke10:32 Muena Lewi muomumue, hakalueye ku muaba au, hakamumoneye, wakahitshila ku luseke lukuabo kabidi." 
Luke10:33 Kadi Muena Samalea wakadi ulua mu nshila, wakalua kudiye; hakamumoneye, luse luakamukuata," 
Luke10:34 wakalua kudiye, wakamujingila tshilulu ha mputa, wakelabu manyi ne nvinyo; wakamushikika ha nyima ha nyama wandi, wakalua nʼandi ku nsubu wa tshilala benyi, wakamulama bimpe." 
Luke10:35 Hakatshiabu wakahatula ndenalio ibidi, wakaha umena nsubu wa tshilala benyi, wakamuambila ne, Umulame bimpe; hanahingana, nenkuhingishile binga bintu biwahana." 
Luke10:36 Bantu aba basatu, wewe udi wela meshi ne, Muena kuabo ne wakatukidila mu bianza bia banyengi nganyi?" 
Luke10:37 Yeye wakakudimuna di ne, Wakamufua luse. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe wenze muomumue." 
Luke10:38 Hakadibo baya mu nshila, Yesu wakafika ku musoko mukuabo; mukashi wakadimu, dina diandi Mâta, wakamubuesha mu nsubu muandi." 
Luke10:39 Wakadi ne muakunyiʼandi mukashi dina diandi Malia, yeye wakadi mushikame ku makasa a Mukelenge, ulelesha dî diandi." 
Luke10:40 Kadi Mâta wakadi utata ne mudimu wa bungi wa mu nsubu; yeye wakalua kudi Yesu, wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, kuena ubenga bua muakunyiʼanyi anshile mudimu nkayanyi, anyi? Umuambile alue kunkuatshisha." 
Luke10:41 Mukelenge wakamuandamuna ne, Mâta, Mâta, wewe udi utamba kuela meshi a malu a bungi adi akutatshisha;" 
Luke10:42 tudi anu ne tshintu tshimue bualu; Malia wakusungula luseke ludi luimpe, kabena bamanye mua kumunyengalu." 
Luke11:1 Yeye wakadi utendelela Nzambi mu muaba mukuabo; hakalekeleye, muyidi wandi mukuabo wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, utuyishe bietu mua kutendelela Nzambi bu muakayisha Yone bayidi bandi." 
Luke11:2 Yeye wakabambila ne, Hanuatendelela Nzambi, nuambe ne, Tatu, banemeke dina diebe. Bukelenge buebe bulue." 
Luke11:3 Utuhe tshituha tshia bidia bietu bia buatshia-buatshia. 
Luke11:4 Utujimishile mibi yetu, bualu bua tuetu tudi tulekelele muntu yonso udi nʼetu dibanza. Kutufikishi hadi mateyi." 
Luke11:5 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu udi ne mulunda wandi? Biayeye kudi mulunda wandi mundankulu ne, Mulunda, unsombeshe mitanda isatu;" 
Luke11:6 bualu bua mulunda wanyi wakulua ku luendu, tshiena ne tshia kuteka ku mpala kuandi;" 
Luke11:7 yeye udi mu nsubu neandamune ne, Lekela kuntatshisha; tshibi tshidi tshinshila, hana banyi ne meme tudi mu bulalu; tshiena mumanye mua kubika bua kukuha tshintu." 
Luke11:8 Ndi nuambila ne, Bulelela, yeye kena ubika bua kumuha tshintu bua yeye udi mulunda wandi, kadi bualu bua dinanukila diandi yeye neabike, neamuhe bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi bualu." 
Luke11:9 Ndi nuambila ne, Nulombe, nebanuhe; nukebe, nenumone; nukokole, nebanunzuluile." 
Luke11:10 Bualu bua muntu yonso udi ulomba, neahete; udi ukeba, neamone; udi ukokola, nebamunzuluile." 
Luke11:11 Tatu kai wa munkatshi muenu, biamulomba muanʼandi mutanda, neamuhe dibue, anyi? Biamulombeye mushiha, neamuhe nyoka, anyi?" 
Luke11:12 Muomumue, biamulombeye dikela, neamuhe kaminyiminyi, anyi?" 
Luke11:13 Nunku nuenu bantu babi, binuamanya mua kuha bana benu bintu bimpe, Tatu wenu wa mu diulu kena uha batu bamulomba Nyuma Muimpe, anyi?" 
Luke11:14 Yeye wakadi umusha demon wa kamama munda mua muntu Hakumuka demon, kamama kakakula; bantu bakakema." 
Luke11:15 Kadi bakuabo bakamba ne, Yeye udi umusha bademon mu dina dia Belezebula, mukelenge wa bademon." 
Luke11:16 Bakuabo bakamuteta munda, bakamulomba tshimanyinu tshia mu diulu." 
Luke11:17 Kadi yeye wakamanya meshi abo, wakabambila ne, Bukelenge buonso budi buhanduluke nebufue, nsubu kabidi udi muhanduluke neuhukile ha munga." 
Luke11:18 Ne Satana kabidi biahandulukeye, bukelenge buandi budi bumanye mua kujalama munyi? Bua nuenu nudi nungamba ne, Udi umusha bademon mu dina dia Belezebula." 
Luke11:19 Bingikala ngumusha bademon mu dina dia Belezebula, bana benu badi babumusha mu dina dia nganyi? Nunku bobo nebikale balumbuludi benu." 
Luke11:20 Kadi bingikala ngumusha bademon ne munu wa Nzambi, bukelenge bua Nzambi buakumana kulua kunudi." 
Luke11:21 Bialama muena bukole luhangu luandi, muikale ne bintu bionso bia nvita, biuma biandi nebikale talalâ;" 
Luke11:22 kadi biamutukidila mukuabo udi mumutambe bukole, neamutshimune, neamunyenge bintu biandi bionso bia nvita biakueyemeneye, neabanyine bakuabo bintu biakunyengeye." 
Luke11:23 Udi kai nʼanyi udi umpidia; udi kai usangisha nʼanyi bintu udi ubitangalasha. 
Luke11:24 Haluhuka nyuma wa bukoya munda mua muntu, nyuma udi wendakana mu miaba idi kayi mai, ukeba ha kuikisha; biahangeye mua kuhamona, yeye udi wamba munda munda ne, Nempingane mu nsubu wanyi unakuluhuka." 
Luke11:25 Halueye, udi usangana nsubu mukomba, mulengesha." 
Luke11:26 Hashishe, yeye udi uya biandi, udi wangata minga nyuma muanda mutekete idi imutamba yeye bubi, idi ibuelamu, idi ishikama; malu a muntu au a hashishe adi atamba a diambedi bubi." 
Luke11:27 Hakadiye wamba malu â, mukashi wa mu tshisumbu tshia bantu wakela dî diandi, wakamba ne, Difu diakukutuala didi ne disanka ne mabele awakuamua." 
Luke11:28 Kadi yeye wakamba ne, Nasha, badi batelesha dî dia Nzambi, badi badilama, badi ne disanka." 
Luke11:29 Hakamunguila bisumbu bia bantu, wakabanga kubambila ne, Ba tshikondo etshi badi babi, badi bakeba tshimanyinu; kabena babaha tshimanyinu tshikuabo anu tshia Yona." 
Luke11:30 Bu muakadi Yona tshimanyinu ku mesu kua Bena Ninewe, Muana wa muntu neikale nunku kabidi ku mesu kua ba tshikondo etshi." 
Luke11:31 Mu dituku dia kulumbulula, mukelenge mukashi wa ku sude neabike ne bantu ba tshikondo etshi, neabahishe; bua yeye wakalua biandi kunfudilu kua buloba bualu bua kunvua lungenyi lua Solomo; ne monai, udi mutambe Solomo udi aha." 
Luke11:32 Mu dituku dia kulumbulula, Bena Ninewe nebimane ne bantu ba tshikondo etshi, nebabahishe; bua bobo bakakudimuna mitshima yabo, hakuluabo mei a Yona; ne monai, udi mutambe Yona udi aha." 
Luke11:33 Hatemesha muntu muinda, yeye kena ûteka mu tshisokomenu, anyi munshi mua mushete, udi ûteka ha mesa a muinda, bua bonso babuela bamone dinkenka diau." 
Luke11:34 Disu diebe didi muinda wa mubidi webe; bikala disu diebe dimona tshintu bimpe, mubidi webe wonso neuteme ne munya; bikaladi dibi, mubidi webe wonso neufike ne mîdima." 
Luke11:35 Udimuke ne munya udi munda muebe kawikadi mîdima. 
Luke11:36 Bikala mubidi webe wonso utoka ne munya, kawi ne luseke lukuabo lufike, wonso neutoke ne munya, bu mudi muinda ukutemena ne dinkenka diau." 
Luke11:37 Hakadiye wakula, Mufalese wakamubikila ne, Udie nʼanyi bidia bia dinda; wakabuela mu nsubu, wakashikama ku mesa." 
Luke11:38 Hakamona Mufalese bualu abu, wakakema bua yeye kakowa diambedi." 
Luke11:39 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Ahu nuenu Bafalese nutu nûvua ha nyima ba luhanza ne dilonga, kadi munda muenu mudi mûle tente ne bunyengi ne malu mabi." 
Luke11:40 Nuenu bahote, muenji wa munda kena muenji wa ha nyima kabidi, anyi?" 
Luke11:41 Nuhe bantu bintu bia luse binudi nʼabi munda; nunku bintu bionso nebitoke ku mesu kuenu. 
Luke11:42 Kadi nuenu Bafalese, mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu bua nuenu nutu nuafila tshia dikumi tshia luenyi ne tshia tshikote ne tshia midioko yonso, kadi nudi nuhetula dilumbulula dijalame ne luse bia Nzambi; biakadi bimpe bia nuenu kuenza malu â a itu nyima, kambimpe nuhidie kuenza malu au a ku mpala kabidi." 
Luke11:43 Nuenu Bafalese, mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu bua nudi basue nkuasa minene mu nsunagoga, nudi basue kabidi bantu banusekelele mu bisalu!" 
Luke11:44 Mulau ulualua kunudi, bualu hua nuenu nudi bu nkita idi kayi imueneka, bantu batu batambakenahu kabena baimanye!" 
Luke11:45 Mumanyi wa mikenshi mukuabo wakakudimuna dî, wakamba ne, Muyishi, hawakuamba dî edi, udi utuhenda bietu kabidi." 
Luke11:46 Yesu wakamba ne, Nuenu bamanyi ba mikenshi, mulau ulualua kunudi kabidi, bua nuenu nutu nuateka hamʼbidi ha bantu majitu adi bualu bukole ha kuatuala, kadi nuenu kanutu nuâlenga munu!" 
Luke11:47 Mulau ulualua kunudi, bua nuenu nutu nuibaka nkita ya baprofete, bakashihabo kudi bankambua benu!" 
Luke11:48 Nunku nudi nudibanda, nudi nuitabusha malu akenza bankambua benu; bobo bakabashiha, nuenu kabidi nutu nuibaka nkita yabo." 
Luke11:49 Ebu mbuakamba lungenyi lua Nzambi kabidi ne, Nembatumine baprofete ne bapostolo; nebashihe bakuabo, nebabakengeshe;" 
Luke11:50 nunku nebalombe mashi a baprofete bonso akamatshishabo hanshi ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba tô ne katataka bu dibanza dia bantu ba tshikondo etshi: 
Luke11:51 mashi a Ebele tô ne ku mashi a Zakâya, wakafuila hankatshi ha tshishihelu ne ntempelo; bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Neikale bu dibanza dia bantu ba tshikondo etshi." 
Luke11:52 Nuenu bamanyi ba mikenshi, mulau ulualua kunudi, bua nuenu nuakunyenga luvungula lua ku lungenyi; kanuakubuelamu, nuakuhumbisha kabidi bakadi babuela!" 
Luke11:53 Hakaluhukeye, bafundi ne Bafalese bakabanga kumunguila ne bukole, bamuambishe malu makuabo;" 
Luke11:54 bakadi bamualamine bua kukuatabo dî diahatuka mukana muandi. 
Luke12:1 Ha diba adi mene, bantu mbombo ne mbombo bakadisangisha, bakadiatangana ha makasa; yeye wakabanga kuambila bayidi bandi diambedi ne, Nudimukile luevene lua Bafalese, ludi lubombo." 
Luke12:2 Kadi kakuena tshintu tshibuikila tshiahanga kubuluibua, kakuena tshintu tshisokoka tshiahanga kumanyibua." 
Luke12:3 Nunku malu onso anuakamba mu midima nebaûnvue mu munya; malu onso anuakakula mu ditshu mu bisokomenu nebâmbe ha mitu ya nsubu. 
Luke12:4 Ndi nuambila nuenu balunda banyi ne, Kanutshinyi badi bashiha mubidi, kadi ku nyima kabena bamanye mua kuenza bunga bualu." 
Luke12:5 Meme nenudimushe bua wa nuenu kutshina: Nutshine udi ne bukole bua kuela bantu mu Ngena; bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Numutshine yeye." 
Luke12:6 Kabatu bahana mishamisha itanu ku makuta makese abidi, anyi? Mushamusha umue kawena muhua muoyo ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Luke12:7 Nsuki ya ku mitu yenu mene mene idi mibala yonso. Kanutshinyi, mushinga wenu udi mutambe wa mishamisha ya bungi." 
Luke12:8 Ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso wangitabusha ku mesu kua bantu, Muana wa muntu neamuitabushe kabidi ku mesu kua banjelo ba Nzambi;" 
Luke12:9 kadi muntu yonso wampidia ku mesu kua bantu neahidibue ku mesu kua banjelo ba Nzambi. 
Luke12:10 Muntu yonso watela Muana wa muntu dî dibi nebamujimishile bubi buandi; kadi kabena bajimisha bubi bua wahenda Nyuma Muimpe. 
Luke12:11 Haluabo nʼenu ku mpala kua badi ku mutu kua nsunagoga, ne kua balumbuludi, ne kua banfumu, kanutambi kuelangana meshi ne, Netubakudimune dî kai? Netuambe tshinyi?" 
Luke12:12 Nyuma Muimpe neanuyishe mua kuamba ha diba adi. 
Luke12:13 Muntu wa mu tshisumbu tshia bantu wakamuambila ne, Muyishi, ambila muanʼetu antahuluile buhianyi." 
Luke12:14 Kadi Yesu wakamukonka ne, Mulumiana, wakunteka meme mulumbuludi wenu ne munutahuluidi nganyi?" 
Luke12:15 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nudimuke, kanukumi mitshima ku biuma; bua muntu kena ne muoyo bualu bua bungi bua bintu bidiye nʼabi." 
Luke12:16 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu ne, Budimi bua muntu mubanshi buakakuama bintu bia bungi;" 
Luke12:17 wakelangana meshi munda ne, Ngenze tshinyi? Tshiena ne ha kusangishila bintu bianyi." 
Luke12:18 Wakamba ne, Nengenze nunku, nensasule mayeba anyi, nengase makuabo matambe a diambedi bunene, nensangishilemu maminu anyi onso ne biuma bianyi." 
Luke12:19 Nengambile mutshima wanyi ne, Mutshima, wewe udi ne bintu bia bungi bibuta bia bidimu bingi; wikishe, udie, unue, usanke biebe." 
Luke12:20 Kadi Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi muhote, butuku ebu mene badi balomba muoyo webe; bintu biwakulongolola nebikale kudi nganyi?" 
Luke12:21 Muntu udi udibutshila bintu biandi, kai mubanshi ku mesu kua Nzambi, udi nunku." 
Luke12:22 Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Ebu mbundi nuambila ne, Kanutambi kuelangana meshi a muoyo wenu ne, Netudie tshinyi? Ne a mibidi yenu ne, Netuluate tshinyi?" 
Luke12:23 Bua muoyo udi mutambe bia kudia, mubidi udi mutambe bilulu," 
Luke12:24 Monai bikololo; kabitu biakuna maminu, kabiena ne bibutshilu ne mayeba; kadi Nzambi utu waidisha; mushinga wenu udi mutambe wa nyunyu misangu bungi munyi?" 
Luke12:25 Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, bikaleye utamba kuelangana meshi, udi mumanye mua kulunga ku bule buandi nkubita umue?" 
Luke12:26 Binuikala kanui bamanye mua kuenza bualu butambe bukese, nudi nuelelangana meshi a malu makuabo tshinyi?" 
Luke12:27 Monai bilongo bia mu mpata mudibi bileha; kabitu biakuata mudimu, kabitu biasala buanda; kadi ndi nuambila ne, Solomo wakadi ne butumbi buandi bunene, kadi kabakamuluatshisha bu tshilongo etshi." 
Luke12:28 Bisosa bia mu mpata bidiku lelu, hatshiabu nebibueshibue mu matshua; nuenu bena ditabusha dikese, bialuatshisha Nzambi bisosa nunku, yeye kena utamba kunuluatshisha, anyi?" 
Luke12:29 Nuenu, kanukebi bia kudia ne bia kunua, mitshima yenu kailubakanyi." 
Luke12:30 Bisamba bia ha buloba bidi bikeba bintu ebi bionso; kadi Tatu wenu udi mumanye ne, Nuenu nudi ne bintu ebi bionso bualu." 
Luke12:31 Kadi kebai bukelenge buandi, nebanuhe bintu ebi." 
Luke12:32 Nuenu tshisumbu tshikese tshia mikoko, kanutshinyi; bua Tatu wenu udi musue kunuha bukelenge." 
Luke12:33 Nuhane binudi nʼabi, nubihe bantu bahele ku luse; nudienzele bibombo bidi kabi bikulukasha, bintu bia mu tshibutshilu tshia mu diulu bidi kabi bishika tshiendelele, mudi muibi kai ulua ha buihi, mudi tshishi katshi tshinyanga." 
Luke12:34 Mitshima yenu kabidi idi kudi bintu bia mu tshibutshilu tshienu. 
Luke12:35 Nuele mikaya yenu, minda yenu ikale itema;" 
Luke12:36 nuenu kabidi nuikale bu bantu badi batekemena nfumu wabo, udi ufuma kuakudieye bidia bia dibanji; hafikeye, hakokoleye ku tshibi, nebamunzuluile lubilu." 
Luke12:37 Bahika aba, biabasangana nfumu wabo bamutekemena, nebikale ne disanka; bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye neasuike mukaba, neabashikike ku mesa, neabenzele mudimu." 
Luke12:38 Bialueye nasha mundankulu, nasha hasama tshitala tshiaʼmbedi, biabasanganeye benza nunku, bobo nebikale ne disanka." 
Luke12:39 Nudi bamanye ne, Bu muena nsubu mumanye ha diba dialua muibi, wakadi kulala tshitabala, kakadi kukuitabusha batubule nsubu wandi disoso." 
Luke12:40 Nuenu kabidi nudilongolole, bualu bua Muana wa muetu nealue ha diba dinudi kanui belangana meshi." 
Luke12:41 Petelo wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, tuetu nkayetu mbûdi welela lusumuinu elu, anyi udi welela bantu bonso?" 
Luke12:42 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Nganyi mulami wa bintu udi ulamata nfumu wandi ne dinanukila, ne udi muntu wa lungenyi? Nfumu wandi neamuteke ha mutu ha bantu bandi bua yeye kubaha bidia biabo, halua dituku diabi." 
Luke12:43 Muhika au neikale ne disanka, hahingana nfumu wandi, hamusanganeye wenza nunku." 
Luke12:44 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Yeye neamuteke ha mutu ha bintu biandi bionso." 
Luke12:45 Kadi biamba muhika au munda munda ne, Nfumu wanyi kena ulua katataka, biabangeye kukuma bahika bakuabo, balume ne bakashi, biadieye, bianueye, biabangeye kukuatshika maiuvu," 
Luke12:46 nfumu wa muhika au nealue dituku didiye kai mumutekemene ne ha diba didiye kai mumanye, neamukume bibi, neamuteke ku luseke lua bena buhidia." 
Luke12:47 Nunku muhika wakadi mumanye muakadi nfumu wandi musue, kadi yeye kakalongolola malu andi, kakenza bu muakasueye, nebamukume bikole;" 
Luke12:48 kadi wakadi kai mumanye bualu, Wakenza malu a kukumibua, nebamukume bikese. Muntu yonso udi uheshibua bia bungi nebamulombe bia bungi; biatekabo bia bungi mu bianza bia muntu, nebamulombe bikuabo ha mutu." 
Luke12:49 Nakuluila bua kutuma kahia ha buloba; nakadi musue kateme! 
Luke12:50 Ndi ne dibatiza diambatizabo nʼadi, ndi mu bualu bukole tô ne hashikadi!" 
Luke12:51 Nudi nuelangana meshi munda ne, Nakuluila bua kuha bantu ditalala ha buloba, anyi? Ndi nuambila ne, Nasha, nakuluila bua kuabulula bantu;" 
Luke12:52 mu nsubu umue nemuikale bantu batanu bâbuluke; basatu nebikale ne babidi mpata, babidi nebikale ne basatu mpata." 
Luke12:53 Nebâbuluke; tatu neikale ne muanʼandi mulume mpata, muana mulume-neikale ne tatuʼandi mpata; mamu neikale ne muanʼandi mukashi mpata, muana mukashi neikale ne mamuʼandi mpata; mamuʼandi-muenu neikale ne mukashiʼa muanʼandi mpata, mukashiʼa muana neikale ne mamuʼandi-muenu mpata." 
Luke12:54 Yeye wakambila bisumbu bia bantu kabidi ne, Hanuatangila ditutu dibanda ku wesete, nudi nuamba lubilu ne, Nvula ukadi ulua; bulelela, nealue." 
Luke12:55 Hanuatangila luhehele lulua ku sude, nudi nuamba ne, Munya mukole ukadi ulua; bulelela, neulue." 
Luke12:56 Nuenu bena lubombo, nudi bamanye mua kujingulula mpala wa buloba ne wa diulu, munyi kanuena bamanye mua kujingulula malu a tshikondo etshi?" 
Luke12:57 Munyi kanuena nudisunguile bualu budi buakane? 
Luke12:58 Hautshidi uya ne udi nʼebe lukuna kudi mukelenge, mu nshila mene umusengelele bikole akulekele; biwikala kui wenza nunku, yeye neakukoke kudi mulumbuludi, mulumbuludi neakufile mu bianza bia mpolushe, mpolushe nenkuele mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Luke12:59 Ndi nkuambila ne, Kuena uluhukamu tô ne hawafuta dibanza dionso, nasha kakuta kakese kushala." 
Luke13:1 Bantu bakadiku dituku adi, bakambila Yesu bualu bua Bena Galela, bakadi Pilato mukasangishe mashi abo ne a nyama yakadi mishihela Nzambi." 
Luke13:2 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi nuelangana meshi ne, Bena Galela aba bakadi batambe Bena Galela bonso bubi, bua bobo bakakenga nunku; anyi?" 
Luke13:3 Ndi nuambila ne, Nasha; badi binuikala kanui nukudimuna mitshima yenu, buonso buenu nenufue muomumue." 
Luke13:4 Ne bualu bukuabo, bantu aba dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bakuhukilabo kudi tshibunda tshia tushola mu Siloama, tshiakabashiha, nudi nuelangana meshi ne, Bobo bakadi batambe bonso ba mu Yelushalema bubi, anyi?" 
Luke13:5 Ndi nuambila ne, Nasha; kadi binuikala kanui nukudimuna mitshima yenu, buonso buenu nenufue muomumue." 
Luke13:6 Yeye wakela lusumuinu elu ne, Muntu wakadi ne mutshi wa nfigi mukuna mu budimi buandi bua mamuma a nvinyo; yeye wakalua kukebaku mamuma, kakâsangana." 
Luke13:7 Wakambila mulami wa budimi ne, Tangila, nakalua bidimu ebi bisatu bua kukeba mamuma ku mutshi eu wa nfigi, nakûsangana hatuhu; ûtahe; udi wonena buloba tshinyi?" 
Luke13:8 Kadi yeye wakandamuna dî ne, Mukelenge, ûlekele tshidimu etshi; nenguihile, nenguele tunvi;" 
Luke13:9 biakuamau mamuma, mbimpe; kadi bikalau kawi mukuame, ûtahe." 
Luke13:10 Yeye wakadi uyisha bantu mu nsunagoga dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda. 
Luke13:11 Mukashi wakadiku, wakadi ne nyuma wa butekete bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, mubidi wandi wakadi mukonyame, kakadi ne bukole bua kudiolola." 
Luke13:12 Nakamumona Yesu, wakamubikila, wakamuambila ne, Mukashiana, matekete ebe akulekele." 
Luke13:13 Wakamulenga bianza, mubidi wandi wakololoka katataka, yeye wakatumbisha Nzambi." 
Luke13:14 Mukelenge wa nsunagoga wakadi ne tshishi bualu bua Yesu wakondaha muntu dituku dia Lumingu, wakambila bantu ne, Matuku asambombo adiku adibo ne bua kukuata mudimu wabo; mu matuku au nulue bua kuondahibua, kanulu dituku dia Lumingu." 
Luke13:15 Kadi Mukelenge wakamukudimuna dî ne, Nuenu bena lubombo, mukuabo wenu kai udi kai usulula ngombe wandi anyi nyama wa mpunda ku tshidilu bua kuyeye kumunuisha mai dituku dia Lumingu?" 
Luke13:16 Mukashi eu udi muana wa Abalahama, wakadi musuika kudi Satana bidimu ebi dikumi ne muanda mukulu; kabiakadi bimpe bia kumusulula dituku dia Lumingu, anyi?" 
Luke13:17 Hakambeye dî edi, bonso bakadi nʼandi lukuna bakakuatshika bundu ku mesu; bantu ba tshisumbu tshionso bakasanka bua malu onso a butumbi akenzeye." 
Luke13:18 Yeye wakamba ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi budi bu tshinyi? Nembufuanyikishe bu tshinyi?" 
Luke13:19 Budi bu lutete lua mutada luakangata muntu bua kukuneye mu budimi buandi; luakuleha, luakulua mutshi munene; nyunyu ya mu diulu yakuikila mu matamba au." 
Luke13:20 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Nenfuanyikishe bukelenge bua Nzambi bu tshinyi?" 
Luke13:21 Budi bu luevene luakangata mukashi, wakalusokoka mu bihikilu bisatu bia bukula tô ne hakenduluka luevene mu bukula buonso." 
Luke13:22 Yesu wakahitshila mu bimenga ne mu misoko mikese, wenda uyisha bantu, uya ku Yelushalema." 
Luke13:23 Muntu wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, bantu banya-banya nebasungidibue, anyi? Yeye wakabambila ne," 
Luke13:24 Nuidikishe mua kubuela ku mushiku wa mbelu mubumbakane; ndi nuambila ne, Ba bungi nebakebe kubuelaku, nebahange." 
Luke13:25 Habika muena nsubu, hinshileye tshibi, nuenu nenubange kuimana ku bula nukokola ku tshibi ne, Mukelenge, utunzuluile; yeye neanuandamune ne, Tshiena mumanye kunuakufuma;" 
Luke13:26 hashishe nenubange kuamba ne, Tuakadi tudia nʼebe, tunua nʼebe, wewe kabidi wakadi uyisha bantu mu misesu yetu;" 
Luke13:27 yeye neambe ne, Ndi nuambila ne, Tshiena mumanye kunuakufuma, buonso buenu benji ba malu mabi, umukai kundi." 
Luke13:28 Muadi newikalemu ne kusumakana menu, hanuatangila Abalahama ne Isaka ne Yakoba ne baprofete bonso bashikame ku mesa mu bukelenge bua Nzambi, ne hanuaditangila bahatula ku bula." 
Luke13:29 Nebafume ku esete ne ku wesete ne ku node ne ku sude, nebashikame ku mesa mu bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke13:30 Banga badi ku nyima katataka nebikale ku mpala, banga badi ku mpala katataka nebikale ku nyima." 
Luke13:31 Ha diba adi mene Bafalese bakuabo bakalua, bakamuambila ne, Umuka eku, ya biebe, bualu bua Helode udi musue kukushiha." 
Luke13:32 Yeye wakabambila ne, Yai bienu nuambile nyama au wa budimu ne, Lelu ne makelela ndi ngumusha bademon munda mua bantu, ndi nmana masama a bantu, maihi nenshikishe mudimu wanyi." 
Luke13:33 Kadi bundi nʼabu mbua kuya mu nshila lelu ne makelela ne maihi; bualu bua muprofete kena mumanye mua kufuila kukuabo anu mu Yelushalema. 
Luke13:34 Wewe Yelushalema, Yelushalema, utu washiha baprofete, utu wakuma bakukutuminabo mabue! Misangu ya bungi nakasua kusangisha bana bebe bu mudi nsolo usangisha bana bandi mu mahuahua andi, kadi nuenu nuakuhidia." 
Luke13:35 Tangilai, nsubu wenu udi mushale hatuhu; ndi nuambila ne, Kanuena nuntangila tô ne hanuamba ne, Udi ulua mu dina dia Mukelenge atumbishibue." 
Luke14:1 Hakabueleye mu nsubu wa muntu munene wa Bafalese dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda bua kudia bidia, bakadi bamutentekela." 
Luke14:2 Muntu wakalua ku mpala kuandi, wakadi ne disama dia munana." 
Luke14:3 Yesu wakakonka bamanyi ba mikenshi ne Bafalese ne, Kuondaha kua bantu dituku dia Lumingu kudi kushiha mukenshi, anyi?" 
Luke14:4 Kadi bobo bakahua. Yesu wakamuangata, wakashikisha disama diandi, wakamulekela." 
Luke14:5 Wakabamhila ne, Mukuabo wenu kai, bikaleye ne nyama wa mpunda anyi ngombe muhone mu dina dia mai, kena umusabula lubilu difuku dia Lumingu?" 
Luke14:6 Kabakamanya mua kumukudimuna dî. 
Luke14:7 Yeye wakelela bakabikilabo ku bidia lusumuinu, hakabatangileye badisunguila nkuasa minene, wakabambila ne," 
Luke14:8 Biakubikilabo bua kudia bidia bia dibanji, kudishikaminyi mu nkuasa munene; bikalabo babikile mukuabo udi mukutambe," 
Luke14:9 wakumbikila nʼandi nealue, neakuambile ne, Ushile muntu eu muaba; wewe neubange kuangata muaba mutambe bukese." 
Luke14:10 Kadi hakubikilabo, ya biebe ushikame ha muaba udi mutambe bukese; hashishe halua wakukubikila, neakuambile ne, Mulunda, bandila biebe; wewe newikale ne butumbi ku mesu kua bantu bonso badi bashikame nʼebe ku mesa." 
Luke14:11 Bualu bua wadibandisha nebamuhuekeshe, wadihuekesha nebamubandishe." 
Luke14:12 Yesu wakambila wakamubikila bua kudia ne, Hawalambishila bantu bidia bia munda munya anyi bia dilolo, kubikidi balunda bebe anyi bana benu anyi ba tshiota tshienu anyi babanshi badi ha buihi nʼebe; biakubikilabo wewe kabidi, nebakuhingishile bintu biebe." 
Luke14:13 Kadi hawalambishila bantu bidia, ubikile bahele ne bataha ne balema ne bafofo;" 
Luke14:14 nebakutumbishe, bua bobo kabena ne bia kukuhingishila kabidi; nebakuhingishilebi, halua dibika dia bantu bakane ku lufu." 
Luke14:15 Mukuabo wa bakadi badia nʼandi bidia, hakunvueye mei a Yesu, wakamuambila ne, Wadia bidia mu bukelenge bua Nzambi udi ne disanka." 
Luke14:16 Kadi Yesu wakamuambila ne, Muntu wakadiku, wakalamba bidia bia dilolo bia bungi, wakabikila bantu ba bungi." 
Luke14:17 Hakafika diba dia kudia, wakatuma muntu wandi bua kuambila bakadiye mubikile diambedi ne, Luai, bualu bua bintu bionso bidi bilongolola." 
Luke14:18 Buonso buabo bakabanga kumulayidila bu dî dimana kuhunga. Wa kumudilu wakamuambila ne, Nakûla budimi, bundi nʼabu mbua kuya kubumona; udi nkusengelela bua kundayidila." 
Luke14:19 Mukuabo wakamba ne, Nakûla ngombe dikumi, ibidi ku mutshi wa tshikokedi ibidi ku mutshi wa tshikokedi, nenye kuiteta. Ndi nkusengelela bua kundayidila." 
Luke14:20 Mukuabo wakamba ne, Nakubaka mukashi, nunku tshiena mumanye mua kuya." 
Luke14:21 Muntu wakalua, wakambila nfumu wandi malu â. Muena nsubu wakadi ne tshishi, wakambila muntu wandi ne, Ya biebe lubilu mu misesu ya musoko ne mu tushila tukese, ulue ne bahele ne bataha ne bafofo ne balema." 
Luke14:22 Muntu wandi wakamba ne, Nfumu wanyi, bakuenza bu muwakuamba, kadi miaba mikuabo idi mishale." 
Luke14:23 Nfumu wakambila muntu wandi ne, Ya biebe mu misesu ne ha buihi ne mpangu, ubabueshe mu nsubu, ûle tente." 
Luke14:24 Ndi nuambila ne, Banakubikila diambedi, kakuena umue wabo udi mua kulabula bidia bianyi." 
Luke14:25 Bantu ba bungi bakadi baya nʼandi, yeye wakatshinguluka, wakabambila ne," 
Luke14:26 Bialua muntu kundi kai ne tatu wandi lukuna ne baba wandi ne mukashi wandi ne bana bandi ne bana babo balume ne bana babo bakashi, ne muoyo wandi mene kabidi, kena mumanye mua kuikala muyidi wanyi." 
Luke14:27 Muntu yonso udi kai utuala mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, undonda, kena mumanye mua kuikala muyidi wanyi." 
Luke14:28 Mukuabo wenu kai, biasueye kuibaka tshibumba tshia tushola, kai mushikame diambedi mubale mushinga watshi ne, Ndi ne bia kutshishikisha nʼabi, anyi?" 
Luke14:29 Bikaleye kai muenze nunku, bonso bamona bualu ebu nebabange kumuseka, halongeye tushola tua kunshi nkayatu, kai mumanye mua kutshishikisha tshionso," 
Luke14:30 nebambe ne, Muntu eu wakubanga kuibaka tshibumba, kai mumanye mua kutshishikisha." 
Luke14:31 Anyi, nfumu kai, biayeye bua kuluangana ne nfumu mukuabo, kai mushikame diambedi muelangane meshi ne, Ndi mua kuluangana ne udi ulua ne masalayi mbombo ibidi bishi, kadi meme ndi ne anu lubombo lumue?" 
Luke14:32 Anyi, hatshidi mukuabo kule, neamutumine miloho bua kuebeshai bualu bua kuikalabo talalâ." 
Luke14:33 Nunku muntu yonso wa munkatshi muenu udi kai uhidia bintu bionso bidiye nʼabi kena mumanye mua kuikala muyidi wanyi. 
Luke14:34 Lueho ludi luimpe, kadi biatshihala lueho kutua kualu, nebalutuishe kabidi ne tshinyi?" 
Luke14:35 Kaluena luimpe bua kuluelabo mu budimi, anyi ha diala; nebaluimashe tshianana. Udi ne matshu unvue biandi." 
Luke15:1 Basangishi ba mulambu bonso ne bantu habi bakadi balua ha buihi nʼandi bua kunvua muakadiye wamba. 
Luke15:2 Kadi Bafalese ne bafundi bakajiana ne, Muntu eu udi witabusha bantu babi, udi udia nʼabo." 
Luke15:3 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu elu ne," 
Luke15:4 Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, bikaleye ne lukama lua mikoko, hajimisheye mukuabo, kena ushîa minga makumi tshitema ne tshitema mu tshihela wenda ukeba udi mujimine tô ne haumoneye?" 
Luke15:5 Haumoneye, neawambule ha diaha ne mutshima usanka." 
Luke15:6 Hahinganeye kuandi, neabikile balunda bandi ne bena mutumba nʼandi neabambile ne, Nusanke nʼanyi, bua nakumona mukoko wanyi wakadi munjimine." 
Luke15:7 Ndi nuambila ne, Nunku kabidi disanka dia mu diulu bua muntu umue mubi wakukudimuna mutshima wandi neditambe disanka bua bantu bakane makumi tshitema ne tshitema badi kabai ne bua kukudimuna mitshima yabo." 
Luke15:8 Mukashi kai, bikaleye ne mpalata dikumi, hajimisheye umue, kena Utemesha muinda, akombe mu nsubu, akebe bimpe tô ne hamumoneye?" 
Luke15:9 Hamumoneye, neabikile balunda bandi ne bena mutumba nʼandi, neabambile ne, Nusanke nʼanyi, bua nakumona mpalata wakadi mujimine." 
Luke15:10 Ndi nuambila ne, Nunku kabidi disanka didi ku mesu kua banjelo ba Nzambi bualu bua muntu umue mubi wakukudimuna mutshima wandi." 
Luke15:11 Yesu wakamba ne, Muntu wakadiku, wakadi ne bana balume babidi." 
Luke15:12 Muana muakunyi wakambila tatu wandi ne, Tatu, umpe luanyi luseke lua biuma lualua kundi. Yeye wakabatahuluila bintu biandi bionso." 
Luke15:13 Hakahita matuku makese, muana muakunyi wakasangisha bintu biandi bionso, wakaya mu luendu kule ku luseke lukuabo; wakatangadishaku bintu biandi bionso ku malu mabi akenzenzeye." 
Luke15:14 Hakamaneye bintu bionso, tshiole tshinene tshiakalua ku luseke alu; wakabanga kukengela bintu." 
Luke15:15 Wakaya, wakadilamika kudi muntu wa ku luseke alu; muntu au wakamutuma mu madimi andi bua kudisheye ngulube." 
Luke15:16 Yeye wakasua kûsha difu diandi tente ne bihusu biakadi ngulube idia. Kakuakadi muntu wakamuha tshintu. 
Luke15:17 Hakakatamuteye, wakadikonka munda ne, Bena mudimu ba tatu wanyi hadi bungi munyi badi ne bia kudia bia bungi ne bintu bikuabo bisambuke ha mutu kabidi, kadi meme ndi nfua ne nsala kunoko?" 
Luke15:18 Nembike, nenye kudi tatu wanyi, nemuambile ne, Tatu, nakuenzela diulu bibi, nakuenza bibi ku mesu kuebe kabidi." 
Luke15:19 Tshiena bianyi muimpe kabidi bua kumbikilabo ne, Muanʼebe, umbueshe mu mudimu bu bena mudimu bebe bakuabo." 
Luke15:20 Yeye wakabika, wakalua kudi tatu wandi. Hakadiye kuakua, tatu wandi wakamumona, luse luakamukuata, wakanyema lubilu, wakamuela tshituha ku nshingu, wakamutuatua mishiku." 
Luke15:21 Muana wakamuambila ne, Tatu, nakuenzela diulu bibi, nakuenza bibi ku mesu kuebe kabidi; tshiena bianyi muimpe kabidi bua kumbikilabo ne, Muanʼebe." 
Luke15:22 Kadi tatu wandi wakambila bantu bandi ne, Nulue lubilu ne tshilulu tshidi tshitambe buimpe, munuluatshishetshi; numuele kakanu ku munu ne bisabata ku makasa." 
Luke15:23 Nulue ne muana wa ngombe udi ne manyi, numushihe, tudie bietu, tusanke bietu," 
Luke15:24 bualu bua muana wanyi eu wakadi mufue, udi ne muoyo kabidi; wakadi mujimine, wakamueneka. Bakabanga kusanka." 
Luke15:25 Kadi muanʼandi muanʼa bute wakadi mu budimi; hakadiye ulua, ukadi ufika hehi ne nsubu, wakunvua mutoyi wa biombelu ne maja." 
Luke15:26 Yeye wakabikila muena mudimu, wakamuebesha ne, Abu mbualu tshinyi?" 
Luke15:27 Wakamuambila ne, Muanʼenu wakulua; tatu webe wakushiha muana wa ngombe wa manyi, hua yeye wakumuangata mukole." 
Luke15:28 Kadi yeye wakadi ne tshishi, wakahidia kubuela mu nsubu; tatu wandi wakaluhuka, wakamusengelela." 
Luke15:29 Yeye wakandamuna tatu wandi ne, Ahu bidimu ebi bia bungi bindi mukukuatshile mudimu webe, tshiena muhidie di diebe; kadi wewe kuena mumpe kana ka mukoko bua meme kusanka ne balunda banyi;" 
Luke15:30 kadi bakulua muana webe eu, wakutangadisha bintu biebe kudi bakashi ba masandi, wewe wakumushihela muana wa ngombe wa manyi." 
Luke15:31 Tatu wandi wakamuambila ne, Muanʼanyi, wewe udi nʼanyi tshiendelele, bintu bianyi bionso mbiebe." 
Luke15:32 Biakadi bimpe bia kusaba ne kusanka, bualu bua muanʼenu eu wakadi mufue, udi ne muoyo kabidi; wakadi mujimine, wakumueneka." 
Luke16:1 Yesu wakambila bayidi bandi kabidi ne, Muntu mubanshi wakadiku, wakadi ne mulami wa bintu biandi; bakamubanda ku mesu kua mukelenge wandi ne, Yeye utu watangalasha bintu biebe." 
Luke16:2 Wakamubikila, wakamukonka ne, Bualu buebe bunakunvua budi tshinyi? Umpeshe mukanda wa bulami buebe, bualu bua wewe kuena mumanye mua kushala mulami kabidi." 
Luke16:3 Mulami wa bintu wakadikonka ne, Mukelenge wanyi ukadi ha kunyenga bulami buanyi, nengenze tshinyi? Tshiena ne bukole bua kudima nʼabu, bundu nebunkuate bua kulombalomba bantu bintu tshianana." 
Luke16:4 Ndi mumanye bualu bua meme kuenza; hangumushabo mu bulami, bantu bangitabushe bua meme kubuela mu nsubu yabo." 
Luke16:5 Wakabikila bena mabanza a mukelenge wandi bonso, wakebesha wa kumudilu ne, Udi ne dibanza dia mukelenge wanyi bungi munyi?" 
Luke16:6 Yeye wakamba ne, Didi dia bihikilu bia manyi lukama. Wakamuambila ne, Angata mukanda webe, ushikame lubilu, ufunde makumi atanu." 
Luke16:7 Hashishe wakebesha mukuabo ne, Dibanza diebe didi munyi? Wakamba ne, Bihikilu bia blé lukama. Wakamuambila ne, Angata mukanda webe, ufunde makumi muanda mukulu." 
Luke16:8 Mukelenge wakunyisha mulami mubi bualu bua yeye Wakenza budimu; bualu bua bana ba mu tshikondo etshi munkatshi mua ba mu mulongo wabo badi batambe bana ba munya budimu. 
Luke16:9 Ndi nuambila ne, Nudiangatshile balunda ku mamona a malu mabi; hashikau, nebanuitabushe bua nuenu kubuela mu nsubu ya tshiendelele." 
Luke16:10 Muntu udi mua kueyemenyibua hadiye ne bintu bikese neikale mua kueyemenyibua kabidi hikaleye ne bintu bia bungi; muntu udi mubi hadiye ne bintu bikese neikale mubi kabidi hikaleye ne bintu bia bungi. 
Luke16:11 Binuikala kanui bikale mua kueyemenyibua hanuakadi ne mamona mabi, wateka biuma bilelela mu bianza bienu nganyi?" 
Luke16:12 Binuikala kanui bikale mua kueyemenyibua hanuakadi ne bintu bia muntu mukuabo, wanuha bidi bienu nganyi?"
