Luke16:13 Muena mudimu kena mumanye mua kukuatshila banfumu babidi mudimu diakamue; yeye neikale ne mukuabo lukuna ne mukuabo dinanga, anyi nealamate mukuabo neahidie mukuabo. Kanuena bamanye mua kukuatshila Nzambi mudimu ne Mamona diakamue." 
Luke16:14 Bafalese bakadi ne lukuka lua biuma bakunvua mei â onso, bakamubuidia." 
Luke16:15 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu nutu nuadibingisha ku mesu kua bantu, kadi Nzambi udi mumanye mitshima yenu; tshintu tshidi tshitumba ku mesu kua bantu tshidi tshinyanguka ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Luke16:16 Mikenshi ya Mose ne baprofete biakadiku tô ne hakalua Yone; bakalueye tô ne mpindiu badi bambila bantu lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua Nzambi, bantu bonso badi babuelamu ku bukole." 
Luke16:17 Kujimina kua diulu ne buloba mbualu bukese, kadi kuhona kua katoba kamue ka mikenshi ya Mose mbualu bunene." 
Luke16:18 Wahidia mukashi wandi, wabaka mukuabo, udi muena masandi; wabaka mukashi muhidia kudi mulume wandi nunku udi muena masandi." 
Luke16:19 Muntu mubanshi wakadiku uluata bilulu bikunze ne bia mushinga mukole, wakadi ne disanka diandi ne butumbi ku dituku ku dituku." 
Luke16:20 Mulombi wa bintu wakadiku, dina diandi Lazalo, bakamuladika ku tshibi tshiandi, mubidi wandi wonso wakadi ne mputa;" 
Luke16:21 wakasua bamudishe nkototo yakadi imata hanshi ku mesa a muntu mubanshi; mbua mene mene yakalua, yakalaka mputa yandi." 
Luke16:22 Hashishe mulombi wakafua, banjelo bakaya nʼandi mu tshiadi tshia Abalahama; muntu mubanshi kabidi wakafua, bakamujika." 
Luke16:23 Mu Muaba wa Bafue yeye wakatangila mulu, hakadiye mu makenga, wakamona Abalahama kuakua ne Lazalo mu tshiadi tshiandi." 
Luke16:24 Wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Tatu Abalahama, unfue luse, utume Lazalo, atue lusongo lua munu mu mai, antalashe ludimi luanyi, bualu bua meme ndi ne dikenga mu kahia aka." 
Luke16:25 Kadi Abalahama wakamba ne, Muanʼanyi, uvuluke ne, Wewe, hawakadi ne muoyo, wakadi ne bintu biebe bimpe, Lazalo kabidi wakadi ne bintu bibi; kadi katataka kunoko yeye udi usanka ne wewe udi ukenga." 
Luke16:26 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, hankatshi hetu nʼenu hadi luhongo lunene ludi luikale tshiendelele, bua badi basue kumuka kutudi bua kuya kunudi, anyi badi basue kumuka kunudi bua kusambuka kulua kutudi, kabamanyi mua kuenza nunku." 
Luke16:27 Yeye wakamba ne, Tatu, ndi nkusengelela, umutume ku nsubu wa tatu wanyi;" 
Luke16:28 meme ndi ne bana betu batanu; abambile, kabalu mu muaba eu wa dikenga." 
Luke16:29 Kadi Abalahama wakamba ne, Badi ne Mose ne baprofete, bunvue mei abo." 
Luke16:30 Yeye wakamba kabidi ne, Nasha, tatu Abalahama, biaya muntu wa mu bafue, nebakudimune mitshima yabo." 
Luke16:31 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bikalabo kabai bunvua mei a Mose ne a baprofete, kabena bitabusha biabika muntu wa mu bafue." 
Luke17:1 Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Malu adi alenduisha bantu kêna ahanga kulua, kadi mulau ulualua kudi udi wavuisha." 
Luke17:2 Biakadi bimpe kumusuika dibue dia kuhela nʼadi mu nshingu, kumuela mu mai manene, diambedi kai muanze kulenduisha umue wabo wa mu bantu aba bahuekele." 
Luke17:3 Nudilame bimpe; bienza muanʼenu bibi, umubele; biakudimuneye mutshima wandi, umujimishile bubi buandi." 
Luke17:4 Biakuenzeye bibi misangu muanda mutekete dituku dimue, biahinganeye kûdi misangu muanda mutekete wamba ne, Nakukudimuna mutshima, wewe umujimishile bubi buandi." 
Luke17:5 Bapostolo bakambila Mukelenge ne, Udiundishe ditabusha dietu." 
Luke17:6 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Bu nuenu bikale ne ditabusha bunene bua lutete lua mutada, nuakadi kuambila mutshi eu wa sukamina ne, Ujudibue, ukunyibue mu dishiba; wowo wakadi kutumikila dî dienu." 
Luke17:7 Umue wenu kai, bikaleye ne muhika wandi udima anyi ulama mikoko, hafumeye ku budimi, neamuambile ne, Lua katataka, ushikame ku mesa?" 
Luke17:8 Nasha, neamuambile ne, Undongoluele bia meme kudia, usuike mukaba, umpeshe meme bidia tô ne hanashikisha kudia ne kunua; hashishe wewe neudie, neunue." 
Luke17:9 Yeye neasakidile muhika wandi bua yeye wakuenza malu akumuambileye, anyi?" 
Luke17:10 Nuenu kabidi nudi nunku; hanuashikisha kuenza malu onso akunuambilabo, nuambe ne, Tudi bahika ba tshianana, tuakuenza anu malu atuakadi nʼau bua kuenza." 
Luke17:11 Hakadibo baya mu nshila wa ku Yelushalema, wakahitshila mu nseke ya Samalea ne Galela." 
Luke17:12 Hakambeye kubuela mu musoko mukuabo, bena nsudi dikumi bakasangila nʼandi, bakadi bimane ha bule." 
Luke17:13 Bakela mbila ne, Mukelenge Yesu, utufue luse." 
Luke17:14 Hakabamoneye, wakabambila ne, Yai, nudimueneshe kudi bakuidi ba Nzambi, Hakadibo baya, bakalengeshibua." 
Luke17:15 Mukuabo, hakamoneye ne, Nakulengeshibua, wakahingana utumbisha Nzambi ne dî dikole;" 
Luke17:16 wakadihonena, wakatua mpala wandi hanshi ku makasa a Yesu, wakamusakidila; yeye wakadi Muena Samalea." 
Luke17:17 Yesu wakakonka ne, Bantu dikumi kabena balengeshibue, anyi? Ahu tshitema tshidi hanyi?" 
Luke17:18 Munyi kabakutangila muntu mukuabo muhingane bua kutumbisha Nzambi, anu muntu eu wa bende?" 
Luke17:19 Wakamuambila ne, Bika, ya biebe; ditabusha diebe diakukusungila." 
Luke17:20 Bafalese bakamukonka ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi nebulue dituku kai? Yeye wakabakudimuna dî ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi kabuena bulua ku mesu kua bantu babutangile;" 
Luke17:21 kabena bamba kabidi ne, Kabuobu aha! Anyi, Kabuobu kuakua! Monai, bukelenge bua Nzambi budi munda muenu." 
Luke17:22 Yesu wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Matuku nealue anuasua kutangila dituku dimue dia mu matuku a Muana wa muntu, kadi kanuena nuditangila," 
Luke17:23 Nebanuambile ne, Kayeu kuakua! Kayeu aha! Kanuyi, kanubalondi." 
Luke17:24 Bu mudi muele wa nvula uhenya ku luseke lukuabo lua diulu, ukenkela ku lunga luseke lua diulu, Muana wa muntu neikale nunku halua dituku diandi." 
Luke17:25 Kadi diambedi budiye nʼabu mbua kukengeye makenga a bungi ne bua kumuhidiabo kudi bantu ba tshikondo etshi. 
Luke17:26 Bualu bua matuku a Muana wa muntu nebuikale bu muakadibu mu matuku a Noa. 
Luke17:27 Bakadi badia, bakadi banua, bakadi babaka, bakadi babakibua tô ne hakalua ditutu diakabuela Noa mu buntu bunene, hakalua mai a bungi, hakafuabo buonso buabo." 
Luke17:28 Bualu buakadi nunku kabidi mu matuku a Lota; bakadi badia, bakadi banua, bakadi basumba, bakadi bahana, bakadi bakuna, bakadi bibaka;" 
Luke17:29 kadi dituku diakahatuka Lota mu Sodoma, kahia ne soufre biakafuma mulu, biakabashiha bonso;" 
Luke17:30 bualu nebuikale nunku halua dituku diamueneka Muana wa muntu. 
Luke17:31 Dituku adi udi ha mutu ha nsubu, ne bintu biandi bidi mu nsubu, katuluki bua kuyeye nʼabi; udi mu budimi muomumue, kahinganyi." 
Luke17:32 Vulukai ha mukashi wa Lota. 
Luke17:33 Wasua kuangata muoyo wandi neaujimishe, wajimisha muoyo wandi neausungile." 
Luke17:34 Ndi nuambila ne, Butuku abu balume babidi nebikale mu bulalu; nebangate munga, nebashie mukuabo." 
Luke17:35 Bakashi babidi nebikale bahela; nebangate munga, nebashie mukuabo. [" 
Luke17:36 ] 
Luke17:37 Bayidi bakamuebesha ne, Mukelenge, kudi kunyi? Yeye wakabambila ne, Bikololo bitu biadisangisha hadi tshintu tshibole." 
Luke18:1 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu bua kubamanyisha ne, Mbimpe bia nuenu kutendelela Nzambi matuku onso, kanuhangi;" 
Luke18:2 wakamba ne, Mu musoko mukuabo muakadi njuji, yeye kakadi utshina Nzambi, kakadi unemeka bantu;" 
Luke18:3 mu musoko au kabidi muakadi mukashi wa mu lufuila; wakalua kudiye misangu ya bungi, wakamuambila ne, Unsombuele kudi udi nʼanyi lukuna." 
Luke18:4 Yeye kakasua kubuenza musangu mule, kadi ku nyima wakamba munda munda ne, Bulelela, tshiena ntshina Nzambi, tshiena nemeka bantu," 
Luke18:5 kadi bualu bua mukashi eu wa mu lufuila udi untatshisha, nemusombuele; bialueye misangu ya bungi, neasunsule." 
Luke18:6 Mukelenge wakamba ne, Unvuai muakamba njuji mubi." 
Luke18:7 Nzambi mene kena usombuela bakasunguleye, batu badila kudiye butuku ne munya, nasha bialehesheye musangu mule bua kubakuatshisha, anyi?" 
Luke18:8 Ndi nuambila ne, Neabasombuele lubilu. Kadi halua Muana wa muntu, neasangane ditabusha ha buloba, anyi?" 
Luke18:9 Bantu bakuabo bakadi badieyemena ne, Tudi bakane, bakadi bahetula bantu bakuabo, Yesu wakabelela lusumuinu ne," 
Luke18:10 Bantu babidi bakabanda mu ntempelo bua kutendelela Nzambi; munga wakadi Mufalese, mukuabo wakadi musangishi wa mulambu." 
Luke18:11 Mufalese wakimana, wakatendelela Nzambi munda munda ne, Nzambi, ndi nkusakidila bua meme tshiena bu bantu bakuabo, bobo badi banyengi, badi babi, badi bena masandi, tshiena kabidi bu musangishi wa mulambu eu." 
Luke18:12 Ntu ngajila bia kudia lumingu lumue misangu ibidi; ntu ngafila tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso bintu ngaheta. 
Luke18:13 Kadi musangishi wa mulambu wakimana ha bule, kakasua kuambula mpala mulu, wakadikuma mu tshiadi, wakamba ne, Nzambi, ndi muntu mubi, unfue luse." 
Luke18:14 Ndi nuambila ne, Muntu au wakuhueka ku nsubu kuandi mubinge, mukuabo muhile; bualu bua wadibandisha nebamuhuekeshe, wadihuekesha nebamubandishe." 
Luke18:15 Bakadi balua ne bana bakese kudiye bua yeye kubalenga tshianza tshiandi; kadi hakamona bayidi bualu ebu, bakabasamina." 
Luke18:16 Kadi Yesu wakababikila wakamba ne, Nuitabushe bua bana bakese kulua kundi, kanubakandi; bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi mbua badi bu bana." 
Luke18:17 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi kai witabusha bukelenge bua Nzambi bu muana mukese, kena ubuelamu." 
Luke18:18 Mukelenge mukuabo wakamukonka ne, Muyishi Muimpe, nengenze tshinyi bua kuhiana muoyo wa tshiendelele?" 
Luke18:19 Yesu wakamuambila ne. Udi umbikidila meme ne, Muimpe, tshinyi? Kakuena muntu muimpe anu umue, Nzambi." 
Luke18:20 Wewe udi mumanye mikenshi ya Nzambi ne, Kuendi masandi, kushihi muntu, kuibi, kudingidi muntu, unemeke tatuʼebe ne mamuʼebe." 
Luke18:21 Nsongalume wakamba ne, Nakenzenza malu â onso, hanakadi muana mukese tô ne katataka." 
Luke18:22 Hakunvua Yesu dî adi, wakamuambila ne, Bualu bumue mbukushala; uhane biudi nʼabi bionso, ubiabanyine bantu bahele, newikale ne bintu mu tshibutshilu mu diulu; ulue kundonda meme." 
Luke18:23 Kadi hakunvueye mei â, mutshima wandi wakatamba kunyingalala, bualu bua yeye wakadi ne bubanshi buhite." 
Luke18:24 Hakamumona Yesu, wakamba ne, Ha kubuela kua bantu badi ne bintu bia bungi mu bukelenge bua Nzambi mbualu bukole." 
Luke18:25 Kubuela kua kamelu mu disu dia kashingi kudi kutambe kubuela kua muntu mubanshi mu bukelenge bua Nzambi kuteketa. 
Luke18:26 Bantu bakunvua dî adi bakamukonka ne, Ahu udi mumanye mua kusungidibua nganyi?" 
Luke18:27 Yeye wakamba ne, Malu adi bantu kabai bamanye mua kuenza Nzambi udi mua kuênza." 
Luke18:28 Petelo wakamba ne, Ahu tuetu tuakushia bintu bietu, tuakukulonda." 
Luke18:29 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Kakuena muntu wakashia nsubu wandi, anyi mukashi wandi, anyi bana babo, anyi bamuledi, anyi bana bandi, bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi," 
Luke18:30 udi kai uheta bintu bikuabo bitambe bia diambedi misangu ya bungi mu tshikondo etshi; halua tshikondo tshikuabo, neahete muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Luke18:31 Hakadiye uya ne bayidi nkayabo dikumi ne babidi, wakabambila ne, Unvuai, tudi tubanda ku Yelushalema, nebenzele Muana wa muntu malu onso akafundabo kudi baprofete." 
Luke18:32 Nebamufile mu bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bia bende, nebamuseke, nebamuhende, nebamutuile mate;" 
Luke18:33 nebamukume, nebamushihe; kadi hahita matuku asatu, neabike kabidi." 
Luke18:34 Bayidi kabakajingulula malu â; di edi diakabasokoma, kabakamanya malu akambeye." 
Luke18:35 Hakafikeye hehi ne Yeleko, mufofo wakadi ushikama kukala kua nshila ulomba." 
Luke18:36 Hakunvueye tshisumbu tshia bantu tshihita, wakakonka ne, Ntshinyi?" 
Luke18:37 Bakamuambila ne, Yesu wa ku Nazaleta udi uhita." 
Luke18:38 Wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Yesu, muana wa Davidi, unfue luse." 
Luke18:39 Bakadi baya ku mpala bakamukanda ne, Hua; kadi yeye wakatamba kuela dî diandi bikole ne, Wewe muana wa Davidi, unfue luse." 
Luke18:40 Yesu wakimana, wakamba ne, Balue nʼandi; hakalueye ha buihi, wakamukonka ne," 
Luke18:41 Udi musue meme nkuenzele tshinyi? Wakamba ne, Mukelenge, mesu anyi atabale." 
Luke18:42 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Tabala, ditabusha diebe diakukusungila." 
Luke18:43 Wakatabala lukasa, wakamulonda utumbisha Nzambi; bantu bonso, hakatangilabo bualu ebu, bakatumbisha Nzambi." 
Luke19:1 Yesu wakafika mu Yeleko, wakadi uhita." 
Luke19:2 Muntu wakadimu, dina diandi Zakayo; wakadi muntu munene wa basangishi ba mulambu, wakadi mubanshi." 
Luke19:3 Wakakeba mua kutangila Yesu ne, Udi nganyi? Yeye kakadi mumanye mua kumutangila bualu bua tshisumbu tshia bantu ne bualu bua yeye wakadi wa tshituha." 
Luke19:4 Wakanyema ku mpala, wakabanda ku mutshi wa sukomo bua kumutangila, bualu bua yeye wakamba kuhitshilaku." 
Luke19:5 Hakafika Yesu ha muaba au, wakatangila kulu, wakamuambila ne, Zakayo, tuluka lukasa, bundi nʼabu mbua kuikala mu nsubu muebe lelu." 
Luke19:6 Wakatuluka lukasa, wakamubuesha mu nsubu usanka." 
Luke19:7 Hakamonabo bualu ebu, bakajiana ne, Wakuya kulala mu nsubu wa muntu mubi." 
Luke19:8 Zakayo wakimana, wakambila Mukelenge ne, Mukelenge, unvua, nempe bahele tshituha tshia hankatshi ha bintu bianyi; ne bingikala muangate tshintu tshia muntu mukuabo ku mashimi anyi, nemuhingishile bintu binai." 
Luke19:9 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Lelu luhandu luakulua ku nsubu eu, bualu bua yeye kabidi udi muana wa Abalahama." 
Luke19:10 Bualu bua muana wa muntu wakuluila bua kukeba ne bua kusungila tshidi tshijimine. 
Luke19:11 Hakunvuabo mei â, yeye wakatenteka dî dikuabo, wakela lusumuinu, bualu bua yeye wakadi hehi ne Yelushalema, ne bualu bua bobo bakadi belangana meshi ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi bukadi ha kulua katataka." 
Luke19:12 Wakamba ne, Muntu munene wakadiku, wakaya ku luseke lukuabo kule bua kuangata bukelenge buandi, ne bua kuhingana kabidi." 
Luke19:13 Wakabikila bahika bandi dikumi, wakabaha mpalata dikumi, wakabambila ne, Nuenduluke nʼai mushinga tô ne hanalua." 
Luke19:14 Kadi bantu bandi bakadi nʼandi lukuna, bakatuma miloho bua kumulonda ne, Katuena basue muntu eu ikale mukelenge wetu." 
Luke19:15 Hakangateye bukelenge, hakahinganeye, wakabikila bahika bakaheye mpalata bua kumanyeye bintu biakuhetabo ku mushinga." 
Luke19:16 Wa kumudilu wakalua ku mesu kuandi, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, mpalata webe wakuheta minga mpalata dikumi." 
Luke19:17 Wakamuambila ne, Bimpe, wewe udi muhika muimpe: bualu bua wewe wakadi mutumikile hawakadi ne tshintu tshikese, wikale biebe nfumu wa misoko dikumi." 
Luke19:18 Muibidi wakalua, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, mpalata webe wakuheta mpalata itanu." 
Luke19:19 Wakamuambila kabidi ne, Wewe wikale nfumu wa misoko itanu." 
Luke19:20 Mukuabo wakalua, wakamba ne, Mukelenge, mpalata webe kayeu, unakadi musuike mu dituaya;" 
Luke19:21 nakukutshina, bua wewe udi amena tshinyangu, utu wambula tshiudi kui muteke, utu wahuola biudi kui mukune." 
Luke19:22 Wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi muhika mubi, nenkuleshe bua mei akuhatuka mukana muebe. Wewe wakamanya ne, Meme ndi muena tshinyangu, ntu ngambula tshindi tshi muteke, ntu ngahuola tshindi tshi mukune;" 
Luke19:23 munyi kufidi mpalata wanyi mu bianza bia basombeshanganyi? Nunku hanakulua, nakadi kumuangata ne tshia kasombelu." 
Luke19:24 Wakambila bakadi bimane ha buihi nʼandi ne, Numunyenge mpalata, nuhe udi ne mpalata dikumi." 
Luke19:25 Bakamuambila ne Mukelenge, yeye udi ne mpalata dikumi." 
Luke19:26 Ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso udi ne bintu, nebamuhe binga; kadi muntu yonso udi kai ne tshintu nebamunyenge tshidiye nʼatshi." 
Luke19:27 Kadi bantu aba badi nʼanyi lukuna, bakadi kabai basue meme ngikale mukelenge wabo, nulue nʼabo kunoko, nubashihe ku mesu kuanyi." 
Luke19:28 Hakashikisheye kuamba dî edi, wakatungununa ku mpala kuabo, uya ku Yelushalema." 
Luke19:29 Hakafikabo ha buihi ne Bete-fage ne Betania, ku mukuna udibo babikila ne Oleve, wakatuma bayidi babidi ne," 
Luke19:30 Yai bienu mu musoko udi buludiludi bunudi batangile; hanuabuelamu, nenusangane muana wa nyama wa mpunda musuika, muntu kena muanze kushikama ha nyima handi; numusulule, nulue nʼandi." 
Luke19:31 Bianukonka muntu ne, Nudi numusuluila tshinyi? Numuambile ne, Mukelenge udi nʼandi bualu." 
Luke19:32 Bakadi batumibue bakasangana bu muakabambileye. 
Luke19:33 Hakatshidibo basulula muana wa mpunda, banfumuʼandi bakabakonka ne, Nudi nusuluila muana wa mpunda tshinyi?" 
Luke19:34 Bakamba ne, Mukelenge udi nʼandi bualu." 
Luke19:35 Bakalua nʼandi kudi Yesu; bakateka bikowelu ha nyima handi, bakashikikahu Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Hakadiye uya, bakâdisha bikowelu biabo mu nshila." 
Luke19:37 Hakafikeye kunshi kua mukuna wa Oleve, tshisumbu tshionso tshia bayidi bakabanga kusanka ne kutumbisha Nzambi ne dî dikole bua malu onso a kukema akumonamonabo," 
Luke19:38 bakamba ne, Mukelenge udi ulua mu dina dia Nzambi atumbishibue; ditalala dikale mulu ne butumbi mu diulu." 
Luke19:39 Bafalese bakuabo bakadi mu tshisumbu tshia bantu bakamuambila ne, Muyishi, ubele bayidi bebe." 
Luke19:40 Yeye wakabakudimuna dî ne, Biahuabo, mabue nêle mbila." 
Luke19:41 Hakafikeye ha buihi, wakatangila musoko, wakajinga," 
Luke19:42 wakamba ne, Bu wewe mumanye mu dituku edi malu adi akuhesha ditalala! Kadi bakukusokokau ku mesu kuebe." 
Luke19:43 Bualu bua matuku nealue adi badi nʼebe lukuna babuelela luhangu, nebatunyunguluke, nebakutshintshimike ku nseke yonso," 
Luke19:44 nebakukume hanshi ne bana badi nʼebe; kabena bashîa dibue dimue ha mutu ha dikuabo, bualu bua wewe kuakumanya dituku diakalua Nzambi kûdi." 
Luke19:45 Yeye wakabuela mu ntempelo, wakabanga kuihata bahanyi ba bintu," 
Luke19:46 wakabambila ne, Bakafunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Nsubu wanyi neikale nsubu wa kutendelelamu Nzambi, kadi nuenu nuakumuvuisha muaba wa banyengi." 
Luke19:47 Wakadi ubayisha mu ntempelo ku dituku ku dituku. Kadi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi ba bantu bakakeba mua kumushiha; 
Luke19:48 kabakamanya mua kuenza bualu, bua bantu bakadi bamunguile, batelesha mei andi." 
Luke20:1 Dituku dikuabo, hakadiye uyisha bantu mu ntempelo, hakadiye ubambila bualu bua lumu luimpe, bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi ne bakulu bakamutukidila;" 
Luke20:2 bakamukonka ne, Utuambile, udi wenza malu â ne bukokeshi kai? Wakukuha bukokeshi ebu nganyi?" 
Luke20:3 Yeye wakabakudimuna dî, wakabakonka ne, Meme kabidi nenukonke dî dimue, nungambile," 
Luke20:4 Dibatiza dia Yone diakufuma kudi kunyi? Mu diulu, anyi kudi bantu?" 
Luke20:5 Bobo bakelangana meshi munda munda ne, Bituamba ne, Mu diulu, yeye neatuebeshe ne, Munyi kanuakamuitabusha?" 
Luke20:6 Kadi bituamba ne, Kudi bantu, bantu bonso nebanshihe ne mabue, bua bobo badi bitabusha ne, Yone udi muprofete." 
Luke20:7 Bakakudimuna Yesu dî ne, Katuena bamanye kuakufumadi." 
Luke20:8 Yesu wakabambila ne, Meme kabidi tshiena numanyisha bualu bua bukokeshi bundi ngenza nʼabu malu â." 
Luke20:9 Yeye wakabanga kuelela bantu lusumuinu elu ne, Muntu wakatentula mionshi ya mamuma a nvinyo mu budimi buandi, wakabushîa mu bianza bia ba bidime, wakaya ku luseke lukuabo kule bua kushikamaku musangu mule." 
Luke20:10 Hakalua tshidimu tshia mamuma, wakatuma muntu wandi kudi ba bidime ne, Bampe mamuma a mu budimi. Kadi ba bidime bakamukuma, bakamuhingisha hatuhu." 
Luke20:11 Wakatuma muntu wandi mukuabo; bakamukuma yeye kabidi, bakamuenzela bibi, bakamuhingisha hatuhu." 
Luke20:12 Wakatuma muisatu; bakamutaha mputa, bakamuihata." 
Luke20:13 Muena budimi wakadikonka ne, Ngenze tshinyi? Nentume muana wanyi munanga; bumue nebamunemeke." 
Luke20:14 Kadi hakamumona ba bidime, bakambilangana ne, Eu udi muhianyi; tumushihai, buhianyi buikale buetu." 
Luke20:15 Bakamuihata mu budimi, bakamushiha. Muena budimi neabenzele tshinyi?" 
Luke20:16 Nealue kushiha ba bidime aba, neahe bakuabo budimi buandi. Hakunvuabo dî edi dia Yesu, bakamba ne, Bualu kabulu nunku." 
Luke20:17 Kadi yeye wakabajosha, wakabakonka ne, Edi ndî kai diakafundabo mu Mukunda wa Nzambi ne, Dibue diakahidiabo kudi bibaki ba nsubu Bakaditeka ku mutu kua ditumba?" 
Luke20:18 Wahona ha dibue adi neatshibuke bituha; biahonenadi muntu, nedimuboteshe, nedimutangadishe bu luhuishi." 
Luke20:19 Bafundi ne bakuidi banene ba Nzambi bakasua kumukuata ha diba adi mene, kadi bakatshina bantu; bakamanya ne, Buakueleleye lusumuinu elu mbualu buetu." 
Luke20:20 Bakamutentekela, bakatuma batentekedi bua kumukuatabo ku mei, bobo bakadi badinga ne, Tudi bantu bakane, bakasua kumufila mu bianza bia ngovena, muena bukokeshi." 
Luke20:21 Bakamukonka ne, Muyishi, tudi bamanye ne malu audi wamba ne audi uyisha adi mimpe, kuena ne muntu bualu, wewe udi uyisha bantu nshila wa Nzambi bulelela." 
Luke20:22 Mbimpe tuetu kuha Kaisa mulambu, anyi?" 
Luke20:23 Kadi yeye wakamanya budimu buabo, wakabambila ne." 
Luke20:24 Nundeshe ndenalio. Udi ne tshindidimbi tshia nganyi, ne mei mafundahu nga nganyi? Bakamba ne, Mbia Kaisa." 
Luke20:25 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuhe Kaisa bintu bia Kaisa, nuhe Nzambi bintu bia Nzambi." 
Luke20:26 Kabakamanya mua kumukuata ku mei ku mesu kua bantu; bakakema bua dî diakakudimuneye, bakahua." 
Luke20:27 Basadoke bakuabo bakalua kudiye, aba mbadi bamba ne, Dibika dia ku lufu kadienaku;" 
Luke20:28 bakamukonka ne, Muyishi, Mose wakatufundila ne, Biafua muanʼabo ne muntu, biashîeye mukashi wandi kai ne muana, muanʼabo angate mukashi wandi, alelele muanʼabo wakafua bana." 
Luke20:29 Balume ba difu dimue muanda mutekete bakadiku. Muanʼa bute wakabaka mukashi, wakafua biandi, kakashia muana:" 
Luke20:30 ne muibidi wakenza muomumue; 
Luke20:31 ne muisatu wakangata mukashi; nunku buonso buabo muanda mutekete kabakasua bana, bakafua." 
Luke20:32 Ku nyima mukashi wakafua biandi. 
Luke20:33 Halua dibika dia bantu ku lufu, yeye neikale mukashi wa nganyi? Yeye wakadi mukashi wa buonso buabo muanda mutekete." 
Luke20:34 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bana ba tshikondo etshi batu babaka, batu babakibua;" 
Luke20:35 kadi bantu bakasungulabo ne, Badi bakane bua kufikila ku tshikondo tshiatshia ne ku dibika dia bantu ku lulu, kabena babaka, kabena babakibua;" 
Luke20:36 kabena bamanye mua kufua kabidi, badi muomumue ne banjelo; badi bana ba Nzambi, badi bana ba dibika dia ku lufu." 
Luke20:37 Mose mene mene wakatumanyisha bua dibika dia bafue mu luseke ludi luamba bualu bua Katshi, yeye udi Ubikila Mukelenge ne, Nzambi wa Abalahama ne Nzambi wa Isaka ne Nzambi wa Yakoba." 
Luke20:38 Yeye kena Nzambi wa bafue, udi Nzambi wa badi ne muoyo; bualu bua bonso badi ne muoyo bua bualu buandi." 
Luke20:39 Bafundi bakuabo bakamuandamuna ne, Muyishi, wakuamba bimpe." 
Luke20:40 Bualu bua kabakadi ne bukitu bua kumukonka bualu kabidi. 
Luke20:41 Yeye wakabebesha ne, Badi mua kuamba ne, Kilisto udi muana wa Davidi, munyi?" 
Luke20:42 Davidi mene mene udi wamba mu Mukanda wa Misambu ne, Mukelenge wakambila Mukelenge wanyi ne, Shikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume" 
Luke20:43 Tô ne hanateka badi nʼebe lukuna munshi mua makasa ebe. 
Luke20:44 Nunku Davidi wakamubikila ne, Mukelenge; yeye udi muanʼandi munyi?" 
Luke20:45 Yeye wakambila bayidi bandi, bantu bonso bunvue, ne," 
Luke20:46 Nudimukile bafundi, bobo badi basue kuendakana baluate bikowelu bile, badi basue bantu babasekelele mu bisalu, badi basue nkuasa minene mu nsunagoga, badi basue miaba minene hayabo ku bidia bia disanka;" 
Luke20:47 bobo kabidi batu banyenga nsubu ya bakashi ba mu lufuila; batu batendelela Nzambi musangu mule anu bualu bua lubombo luabo; kuhila kuabo nekutambe bunene. 
Luke21:1 Yeye wakabanduluka, wakamona bantu babanshi bela diha diabo mu tshibutshilu." 
Luke21:2 Wakamona mukashi muhele wa mu lufuila wela tukuta tubidi. 
Luke21:3 Yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bintu biakuela mukashi eu muhele wa mu lufuila bidi bitambe biakuela bakuabo bonso," 
Luke21:4 bualu bua buonso buabo bakuela bintu mu mushete wa Nzambi biakadibo kabai nʼabi bualu, bia ha mutu; kadi mukashi eu wakuela bintu biakadiye nʼabi bualu, bintu biandi bionso ma kudia mene meme." 
Luke21:5 Hakadi bakuabo bamba bua ntempelo ne, Udi mulengesha ne mabue mimpe ne bintu bifila kudi bantu," 
Luke21:6 Yesu wakamba ne, Nudi nutangila bintu ebi, kadi matuku nealue ikalabo kabai bashîa dibue dimue ha mutu ha dikuabo, nebâsasule buonso buau." 
Luke21:7 Bakamukonka ne, Muyishi, malu â nealue dituku kai? Tshimanyinu tshia malu â ne akadi ha kulua ntshinyi?" 
Luke21:8 Yeye wakamba ne, Nuende badimuke, muntu kanuhambuishi; ba bungi nebalue mu dina dianyi, bamba ne, Meme nyeye mene; bamba kabidi ne, Dituku diakulua; kanubalondi." 
Luke21:9 Hanunvua bualu bua nvita ne mayoyo kanutshinyi; budi malu â nʼabu mbua kulua diambedi, kadi nshikidilu kena ulua lukasa." 
Luke21:10 Yeye wakabambila ne, Tshisamba tshikuabo netshiluangane ne tshinga, bukelenge bukuabo nebuluangane ne bunga," 
Luke21:11 buloba nebutambe kutaka, biole ne bihuhu nebikale ku nseke ne ku nseke, malu a buowa ne bimanyinu binene nebifume mulu." 
Luke21:12 Kadi malu â onso kâi manze kulua, nebanukuate, nebanukengeshe, nebanufile mu nsunagoga ne mu nsubu ya lukanu, nebalue nʼenu ku mesu kua banfumu ne bangovena bua dina dianyi." 
Luke21:13 Malu au nealue kunudi bu tshimanyishilu. 
Luke21:14 Nukoleshe mitshima yenu ne, Katuedianganyi meshi diambedi a dî ditudi basue kubakudimuna;" 
Luke21:15 meme nenuhe mukana ne lungenyi bidi badi nʼenu lukuna kabai bamanye mua kutantamana ne mua kukudimuna dî. 
Luke21:16 Nebanutungile tshitungu kudi baledi benu mene ne bana benu ne ba tshiota tshienu ne balunda benu; nebashihe bakuabo benu. 
Luke21:17 Bantu bonso nebikale nʼenu lukuna bua dina dianyi. 
Luke21:18 Lusuki lumue lua ku mitu yenu kaluena lujimina. 
Luke21:19 Nenudiangatshile mioyo yenu bualu bua dinanukila dienu. 
Luke21:20 Hanuatangila bena nvita banyunguluke musoko wa Yelushalema, mimanye ne dibutuka diau diakulua." 
Luke21:21 Badi mu Yudaya mu tshikondo atshi banyemene ku mikuna; badi mu musoko bahatuke; badi mu ntshiamba kabahinganyi mu musoko. 
Luke21:22 Bualu bua â adi matuku a disombuela, bua kushikisha malu onso akafundibua mu Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
Luke21:23 Kadi mulau mukole newikale kudi badi ne mafu ne kudi badi bâmuisha bana mabele mu matuku au; bualu bua dikenga dikole nedikale ha buloba, lukuna neluikale kudi bantu aba." 
Luke21:24 Nebahone ku muele wa nvita, nebaye nʼabo bakuata mu bisamba bionso; bantu ba bisamba bia bende nebadiate Yelushalema munshi mua makasa abo tô ne hashika tshikondo tshia bantu ba bisamba bia bende." 
Luke21:25 Bimanyinu nebikale mu diba ne mu ngondo ne mu mitoto; ha buloba nehikale dikenga dikole dia bantu, nebatshine tshiona tshinene tshia mai manene ne tshia mavuala;" 
Luke21:26 bantu nebafue tshihuka bua buowa ne bua ditekemena dia malu alua ha buloba; bualu bua nebanyukule makole a mu diulu. 
Luke21:27 Hashishe nebamone Muana wa muntu ulua mu ditutu ne bukole ne butumbi bunene. 
Luke21:28 Habanga malu â kulua, nubanduluke, nutangile mulu, bualu bua bunuhikudi buenu budi ha buihi." 
Luke21:29 Yeye wakabelela lusumuinu ne, Tangilai mutshi wa nfigi ne mitshi yonso;" 
Luke21:30 hasampilai, hanuamona bualu ebu, nenumanye ne, Tshidimu tshia mayowa tshidi ha buihi." 
Luke21:31 Nuenu kabidi, hanuatangila malu â alua, mimanye bienu ne, Bukelenge bua Nzambi budi ha buihi." 
Luke21:32 Bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bantu ba tshikondo etshi kabena bashika tô ne hashika malu â onso." 
Luke21:33 Diulu ne buloba nebijimine, kadi mei anyi kêna ajimina." 
Luke21:34 Nudilame bimpe, bua mitshima yenu kainemi ne mudiu ne dibuluka dia maluvu ne malu a ha buloba, ne bua dituku adi kadilu kunudi lukasa bu buteyi?" 
Luke21:35 Bualu bua dituka adi nedilue kudi bonso badi bashikame ha buloba buonso. 
Luke21:36 Tabalai misangu yonso, nutendelele Nzambi mua kuikala ne bukole bua kuhanduka mu malu â onso alua, ne bua kuimana ku mesu kua Muana wa muntu." 
Luke21:37 Yeye wakadi uyisha bantu mu ntempelo ku dituku ku dituku; butuku wakalubuka, wakalala mu mukuna udibo babikila ne, Oleve." 
Luke21:38 Bantu bonso bakadi balua mu ntempelo dinda bua kunvua dî diandi. 
Luke22:1 Disanka dia bidia bidi kabi ne luevene diakadi ba buibi, badi badibikila ne, Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Luke22:2 Bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bafundi bakakeba mua kumushiha, bua bobo bakadi batshina bantu." 
Luke22:3 Satana wakahuela munda mua Yudasa, wakadibo babikila ne Isakaliote, yeye wakadi wabo wa ba dikumi ne babidi." 
Luke22:4 Wakumuka biandi wakasangisha dî ne bakuidi banene ne tuhita tua balami ba ntempelo bualu bua kumufileye mu bianza biabo. 
Luke22:5 Bakadi ne disanka, bakamulaya ne, Netukuhe mpalata." 
Luke22:6 Yeye wakitabusha, wakakeba mua kumufila mu bianza biabo tshisumbu tshia bantu katshîhu." 
Luke22:7 Dituku dia usanka dia bidia kabî biela luevene diakafika, diakadibo ne bualu bua kushiha bana ba mikoko ya Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Luke22:8 Yeye wakatuma Petelo ne Yone ne, Yai nutulongoluele Kuhita kua Yehowa bua tuetu kudia." 
Luke22:9 Bakamukonka ne, Udi musue tuetu tulongoluela kudi kunyi?" 
Luke22:10 Yeye wakabambila ne, Hanuabuela mu musoko, nenusangile ne mulume mutuale mulondo wa mai; numulonde mu nsubu wabueleye." 
Luke22:11 Nuambile muena nsubu ne, Muyishi udi ukukonka ne, Nsubu wa buenyi unadila bidia bia Kuhita kua Yehowa ne bayidi banyi udi hanyi?" 
Luke22:12 Yeye neanuleshe nsubu mimene wa mulu mmuana kulongolola bintu bionso; nulongololemu. 
Luke22:13 Bakaya, bakamona bi muakabambileye: bakalongolola Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Luke22:14 Hakafika diba wakashikama ku mesa ne bapostolo. 
Luke22:15 Wakabambila ne, Nakutamba kusua bua kudia nʼenu bidia ebi bia Kuhita kua Yehowa, diambedi tshi muanze kukenga;" 
Luke22:16 ndi nuambila ne, Tshiona ndia bintu ebi kabidi tô ne hashikishabo malu onso mu bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke22:17 Bakamuhesha luhanza; hakasakidileye Nzambi, wakamba ne, Angatai, nuabanyangane;" 
Luke22:18 ndi nuambila ne, Tshiena nua mai a mamuma a nvinyo kabidi tô ne halua bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Luke22:19 Yeye wakamema mutanda wa bidia; hakasakidileye Nzambi, wakautshibula, wakaha bayidi bandi, wakamba ne, Eu udi mubidi wanyi udi unuhebua; enzai nunku bua kunvuluka." 
Luke22:20 Hakashikishabo kudia, yeye wakamema luhanza muomumue kabidi, wakamba ne, Luhanza elu ludi dihungila dihia-dihia dia mu mashi anyi akunumatshishilabo hanshi." 
Luke22:21 Kadi, tangilai, tshianza tshia udi untungila tshitungu tshidi nʼanyi ha mesa." 
Luke22:22 Bulelela, Muana wa muntu udi uya bu muakasungulabo, kadi mulau neulue kudi wakumutungila tshitungu." 
Luke22:23 Bobo bakabanga kukonkangana ne, Nganyi nenze bualu ebu?" 
Luke22:24 Bakadi belangana mpata ne, Bakusungula nganyi bua yeye kutamba bakuabo?" 
Luke22:25 Yeye wakabambila ne, Banfumu ba bantu ba bisamba bia bende badi babakokesha ne diambu, ne banfumu babo badi babikidibua ne, Benji ba bilengelele." 
Luke22:26 Kadi nuenu, kanuikadi nunku; udi mutambe bakuabo munkatshi muenu alue biandi muakunyi; udi biandi nfumu alue muena mudimu." 
Luke22:27 Udi mutambe mukuabo nganyi, udi mushikame ku mesa, anyi udi umuhetesha bia kudia? Udi mushikame ku mesa kena mutambe, anyi? Kadi meme udi munkatshi muenu bu muena mudimu." 
Luke22:28 Kadi nuenu mbakunanukila nʼanyi mu makenga anyi; 
Luke22:29 ndi nuha bukelenge bu muakumpa Tatu wanyi bukelenge," 
Luke22:30 bua nuenu kudia ne kunua ku mesa anyi mu bukelenge buanyi; nenushikame mu nkuasa ya butumbi nulumbuluisha bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia Isalele. 
Luke22:31 Yesu wakamba ne, Simona, Simona, mona, Satana wakalomba mua kunuangata bualu bua kunusengeye bu ntete;" 
Luke22:32 kadi nakukulombela wewe Nzambi bua ditabusha diebe kadihangi; wewe, hawakudimuka, ukoleshe mitshima ya bana benu." 
Luke22:33 Petelo wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, ndi ne dikima dia mua kuya nʼebe ne mu nsubu wa lukanu ne ku lufu." 
Luke22:34 Yeye wakamba ne, Petelo, ndi nkuambila ne, Tshitala katshî tshianze kusama lelu wewe neuvile misangu isatu ne, Tshiena mumumanye." 
Luke22:35 Yeye wakabambila ne, Hanakanutuma kanui ne mukaba ne tshibombo ne bisabata, nuakuhanga tshintu, anyi? Bakamba ne, Nasha." 
Luke22:36 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kadi katataka, udi ne mukaba awangate ne tshibombo kabidi; udi kai ne muele wa nvita ahane kazaku kandi, ausumbe." 
Luke22:37 Bualu bua ndi nuambila ne, Budibo nʼabu mbua kushikisha kundi di edi didi difunda ne, Bakamubala hohamue ne bantu babi; bualu bua nebashikishe mei onso akafundabo bualu buanyi." 
Luke22:38 Bakamba ne, Mukelenge, tangila, miele ya nvita ibidi kayiyi. Yeye wakabambila ne, Kuakushika." 
Luke22:39 Yeye wakaluhuka, wakaya ku mukuna wa Oleve, bu muakadi tshilele tshiandi; bayidi bakamulonda." 
Luke22:40 Hakafikeye ku muaba au, wakabambila ne, Nutendelele Nzambi bua nuenu kanuhonyi mu mateyi." 
Luke22:41 Yeye wakadi nkayandi bu ntanta wa kuela dibue diafika; wakatua binu hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi," 
Luke22:42 wakamba ne, Tatu, biwasua, ungumushile luhanza elu; kadi bualu buenjibue bu mûdi musue, kabuenjibu bu mundi musue." 
Luke22:43 Muanjelo wa mu diulu wakamueneka kudiye, wakamukolesha." 
Luke22:44 Wakatamba kukenga ne kanyinganyinga, wakatendelela Nzambi bikole; luanga luakahatuka mamata manene hamʼbidi handi bu mashi amata hanshi." 
Luke22:45 Hakajukeye ku kutendelela kuandi, wakalua kudi bayidi, wakabasangana balale tulu bualu bua kanyinganyinga," 
Luke22:46 wakabebesha ne, Nudi baladile tulu tshinyi? Jukai, nutendelele Nzambi bua kanuhonyi mu mateyi." 
Luke22:47 Hakadiye wamba nunku, monai, tshisumbu tshia bantu tshiakalua, mukuabo wabo wa ba dikumi ne babidi, dina diandi Yudasa, wakalua ku mpala kuabo; wakalua ha buihi ne Yesu bua kutuangana nʼandi mishiku." 
Luke22:48 Kadi Yesu wakamuebesha ne, Yudasa, udi utungila Muana wa muntu tshitungu ku kutuangana kua mishiku, anyi?" 
Luke22:49 Bakadi ha buihi ne Yesu, hakamonabo ne bualu buakadi ha kulua, bakamuebesha ne, Mukelenge, tubatahe ne muele, anyi?" 
Luke22:50 Mukuabo wakataha muntu wa muakuidi munene, wakamukosa ditshu dia tshianza tshia bukole." 
Luke22:51 Kadi Yesu wakandamuna ne, Nubalekele, benze. Wakalenga tshianza ku ditshu diandi, wakamuhingishiladi." 
Luke22:52 Yesu wakakonka bakuidi banene ne tuhita tua balami ba ntempelo ne bakulu bakadi bamuluile ne, Nuakulua ne miele ne bibonge bu mudibo bakuata munyengi munyi?" 
Luke22:53 Hanakadi nʼenu mu ntempelo ku dituku ku dituku, kanuakandenga bianza; kadi edi diba ndienu, ne bukokeshi bua mîdima." 
Luke22:54 Bakamukuata, bakaluhuka nʼandi, bakalua nʼandi mu nsubu wa muakuidi munene. Petelo wakaha londa ha bule ha bule." 
Luke22:55 Hakatemeshabo kahia nu bunene bua luhangu, hakashikamabo hohamue, Petelo wakadi mushikame munkatshi muabo." 
Luke22:56 Mukashi muenji wa mudimu wakamutangila hakadiye mushikame ku dinkenka dia kahia, wakamutangila talala, wakamba ne, Muntu eu kabidi wakadi ne Yesu." 
Luke22:57 Yeye wakavila ne, Mukashiana, tshiena mumumanye." 
Luke22:58 Hakaleha tshituha, mukuabo wakamutangila, wakamuambila ne, Wewe kabidi udi umue wabo. Petelo wakamba ne, Nasha, mulumiana, tshiena wabo." 
Luke22:59 Hakahita bu tshituha tshia diba, mukuabo wakamba ne, Bulelela, muntu eu wakadi ne Yesu, bualu bua yeye udi Muena Galela." 
Luke22:60 Kadi Petelo wakamba ne, Mulumiana, tshiena mumanye tshiudi wamba. Hakadiye wakula nunku, tshitala tshiakasama." 
Luke22:61 Mukelenge wakatshinguluka, wakatangila Petelo talala. Petelo wakavuluka dî dia Mukelenge diakamuambileye ne, Tshitala katshi tshianze kusama lelu, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu." 
Luke22:62 Wakaluhuka biandi, wakadila bikole." 
Luke22:63 Bakadi bakuata Yesu, bakamuseka, bakamukuma bisusu." 
Luke22:64 Bakamubuikila tshitambala ku mesu, bakamuambila ne, Amba bualu bûdi umona, wakukukuma nganyi?" 
Luke22:65 Bakamuambila malu makuabo a bungi bamuhenda. 
Luke22:66 Hakatshia butuku, tshisumbu tshia bakulu ba bantu tshiakudisangisha, bakuidi banene ne bafundi; bakaya nʼandi ku tshilumbuluidi tshiabo, bakamuambila ne," 
Luke22:67 Biwikala Kilisto, utuambile. Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Binanuambila, kanuena nuitabusha;" 
Luke22:68 bianukonka bualu, kanuena nunkudimuna." 
Luke22:69 Kadi ha dituku edi tô ne tshiendelele Muana wa muntu neashikame ku tshianza tshia balume tshia bukole bua Nzambi. 
Luke22:70 Buonso buabo bakamukosa ne, Wewe udi Muana wa Nzambi, anyi? Yeye wakabakudimuna dî ne, Nudi nuamba mundi yeye." 
Luke22:71 Bakamba ne, Tudi ne bualu bua bamanyi kabidi kudi kunyi? Tuetu tuakudiunvuila mei a mukana muandi mene." 
Luke23:1 Buonso buabo bakabika, bakalua nʼandi ku mpala kua Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Bakabanga kumubanda ne, Tuakusangana muntu eu utombosha tshisamba tshietu uhidisha bantu ne, Kanulambudi Kaisa, wamba kabidi ne, Meme ndi Kilisto, Mukelenge." 
Luke23:3 Pilato wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi? Wakamukudimuna dî ne, Bûdi wamba mbulelela." 
Luke23:4 Pilato wakambila bakuidi banene ne bisumbu bia bantu ne, Tshiena musangane muntu eu ne bualu." 
Luke23:5 Kadi bobo bakakolesha dî diabo ne, Yeye udi usonsola bantu, wenda ubambila mu luseke lua Yudaya, mubangile ku Galela tô ne kunoko." 
Luke23:6 Hakunvua Pilato dî edi, wakakonka ne, Muntu eu udi Muena Galela, anyi?" 
Luke23:7 Hakamanyeye ne, Ngua ku nyima kua Helode, wakamutuma kudi Helode, wakadi biandi mu Yelushalema matuku â." 
Luke23:8 Helode wakasanka hakamoneye Yesu, bualu bua musangu mule wakadi musue kumutangila, wakadi mumane kunyua lumu luandi; wakasua kutangila bualu bua kukema buenzeye." 
Luke23:9 Helode wakamukonka malu a bungi; kadi Yesu kakamukudimuna di. 
Luke23:10 Bakuidi banene ne bafundi bakimana, bakamubanda bikole." 
Luke23:11 Helode ne masalayi andi bakamutshimbisha, bakamuseka, bakamuluatshisha tshilulu tshitoke tô, bakamuhingisha kudi Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Dituku adi mene Helode ne Pilato bakakuatangana bulunda kabidi, diambedi bakadi bikalangane lukuna." 
Luke23:13 Pilato wakabikila bakuidi banene ne miloho ne bantu," 
Luke23:14 wakabambila ne, Nuakulua ne muntu eu kundi ne, Yeye udi utombosha bantu; hanakumulumbuluisha malu andi ku mesu kuenu, tshiena mumusangane ne bualu bunudi bamubande;" 
Luke23:15 ne Helode kabidi kena mumusangane nʼabu, yeye wakamuhingisha kutudi; yeye kena muenze bualu buafuileye." 
Luke23:16 Nemukume, nemulekele. [" 
Luke23:17 ] 
Luke23:18 Buonso buabo bakela dî diabo diakamue ne, Umusha muntu eu, utulekelele Balaba;" 
Luke23:19 yeye wakadi mubueshibue mu nsubu wa lukanu bualu bua ditomboka diakadi mu musoko ne bua dishihangana. 
Luke23:20 Pilato wakakula nʼabo kabidi, wakasua kulekela Yesu;" 
Luke23:21 kadi bobo bakela mbila ne, Umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane, umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Luke23:22 Yeye wakabakonka tshiakasatu ne, Bualu kai? Muntu eu wakuenza bualu bubi kai? Tshiena mumusangane ne bualu buafuileye; nenukume, nemulekele." 
Luke23:23 Kadi bobo bakakolesha mei abo, bakamulomba ne, Bamushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Mei abo akamutekesha." 
Luke23:24 Pilato wakakosa tshilumbu, wakamba ne. Bualu buakulombabo buenjibue." 
Luke23:25 Pilato wakalekela wakadi mubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu bualu bua ditomboka ne bua dishihangana, wakamulombabo; kadi yeye wakafila Yesu mu bianza biabo bua kuenzabo bu muakadibo basue." 
Luke23:26 Hakadibo baya nʼandi, bakakuata muntu dina diandi Simona, Muena Kulene, wakadi ufuma mu ntshiamba, bakateka mutshi mutshiamakane ha diaha diandi, autuale ku nyima kua Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu tshiakamulonda ne tshia bakashi bakadi badila bamujinga. 
Luke23:28 Yesu wakatshinguluka, wakamba ne, Bana bakashi ba Yelushalema, kanunjingi, nudijinge, nujinge bana benu." 
Luke23:29 Tangilai, matuku alualua amba bantu ne, Bakashi badi nkumba badi ne disanka ne mafu adi kâi manze kulela bana ne mabele adi kâi mâmushe." 
Luke23:30 Hashishe nebabange kuambila mikuna minene ne, Nutubuikile; ne mikuna mikese ne, Nutubuikile." 
Luke23:31 Bienzabo malu â hatshidi mutshi ne muoyo, nebenze tshinyi humau?" 
Luke23:32 Bakadi baya ne bantu bakuabo babidi, benji ba malu mabi, bua kubashiha nʼandi." 
Luke23:33 Hakafikabo ku muaba udibo babikila ne, Kabalubalu ka Mutu, bakamukumina milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bakenzela bantu babidi nunku kabidi, mukuabo ku tshianza tshia balume, mukuabo ku tshianza tshia bakashi." 
Luke23:34 Yesu wakamba ne, Tatu, ubabuikidile bubi buabo, kabena bamanye bualu budibo benza. Bakabanyangana bilulu biandi, bela nʼabi nshobo." 
Luke23:35 Bantu bakadi bimane batangila. Miloho yakamuseka ne, Yeye wakasungila bakuabo, adisungile bikaleye Kilisto wa Nzambi musungula kudiye." 
Luke23:36 Masalayi kabidi akamuseka, akalua kudiye, akamuha nvinega," 
Luke23:37 akamba ne, Biwikala Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, udisungile." 
Luke23:38 Bakafunda ha mutu handi ne: Eu udi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda. 
Luke23:39 Bantu babi babidi bakadi bahohela, mukuabo wakahenda Yesu ne, Wewe kuena Kilisto, anyi? Udisungile, utusungile." 
Luke23:40 Kadi mukuabo wakamubela ne, Wewe kuena utshina Nzambi, anyi? Wewe udi mu dihila diodimue." 
Luke23:41 Bakakosa tshilumbu tshietu bimpe; tuetu tudi tuangata difutu bu mutuakenza, kadi muntu eu kena muenze bualu bubi." 
Luke23:42 Yeye wakamba ne, Yesu, hawabuela mu bukelenge buebe, unvuluke." 
Luke23:43 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Lelu wewe newikale nʼanyi mu Paladiso." 
Luke23:44 Hakafika diba munda munya, mîdima yakadi ha buloba buonso tô ne hakafika diba ha isatu;" 
Luke23:45 diba diakahanga kutema; tshilulu tshikudika mu ntempelo tshiakahandika hankatshi. 
Luke23:46 Yesu wakela dî dikole ne, Tatu, ndi nteka muoyo wanyi mu bianza biebe; hakambeye nunku, wakahuola muoyo." 
Luke23:47 Hakatangila kapitene ka masalayi bualu ebu, wakatumbisha Nzambi ne, Bulelela, eu wakadi muntu muakane." 
Luke23:48 Bantu bonso bakadi balue kutangila malu â bakahingana badikuma mu biadi, hakamonabo malu akenjibue." 
Luke23:49 Bonso bakamanyeye ne bakashi bakadi bafume ku Galela bamulonda bakadi bimanyine ha bule, batangile malu â." 
Luke23:50 Muntu wakadiku, dina diandi Yosefe, yeye wakadi mulumbuludi, wakadi muntu muimpe kai ne kansungunsungu," 
Luke23:51 (yeye kakitabusha dî diabo ne bualu buakenzabo) wakadi muntu wa ku Alimataya, musoko wa Bena Yuda, wakadi mutekemene bukelenge bua Nzambi;" 
Luke23:52 muntu au wakaya kudi Pilato, wakamulomba tshitalu tshia Yesu." 
Luke23:53 Wakatshitulula, wakatshijingila tshilulu tshia line, wakamuladika mu lukita lumbula mu dibue, muakadi kamui tshitalu diambedi." 
Luke23:54 Dituku adi diakadi dia Dilongolola, Lumingu lua Bayuda luakadi ha buihi." 
Luke23:55 Bakashi bakadi bafume nʼandi ku Galela bamulonda ku nyima, bakatangila lukita ne muakaladikabo tshitalu tshiandi." 
Luke23:56 Bakahingana, bakalongolola bintu bia muhuya muimpe ne manyi a mananashi. Dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda bakikisha bu mudi mukenshi wa Nzambi." 
Luke24:1 Kadi hakatshia butuku dituku dia kumudilu dia lumingu, bakashi bakalua ku lukita ne bintu bia muhuya muimpe biakalongololabo." 
Luke24:2 Bakasangana dibue diumusha ku mushiku wa lukita. 
Luke24:3 Bakabuelamu, kabakasangana tshitalu tshia Mukelenge Yesu." 
Luke24:4 Hakadibo balubakana bua bualu ebu, monai, balume babidi bakadi bimane ha buihi nʼabo baluate bilulu biengelela." 
Luke24:5 Hakatshinabo, hakatuabo mpala hanshi, balume bakabakonka ne, Nudi nukebela udi ne muoyo munkatshi mua bafue tshinyi?" 
Luke24:6 Yeye kena kunoko, wakubika; numiluke bu muakanuambileye hakadiye mu Galela ne," 
Luke24:7 Budi Muana wa muntu nʼabu mbua kumufilabo mu bianza bia bantu babi ne bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane ne bua kubikeye kabidi hahita matuku asatu. 
Luke24:8 Bakavuluka mei andi," 
Luke24:9 bakumuka ku lukita, bakahiana, bakambila bayidi dikumi ne umue ne bakuabo bonso malu â onso." 
Luke24:10 Bakashi aba bakadi Malia wa ku Magadala ne Yoana ne Malia mamu wa Yakobo; bakashi bakuabo kabidi bakadi nʼabo bakambila bapostolo malu â. 
Luke24:11 Kadi mei â akadi bu biakulakula ku matshu abo, kabakitabusha muakambabo." 
Luke24:12 Kadi Petelo wakabika, wakaya lubilu ku lukita; wakinangila, wakatangilamu, wakamona bilulu bia line ha buabi; wakahingana kuandi ukema bua malu au." 
Luke24:13 Dituku adi mene babidi babo bakadi baya ku musoko dina diau Emau, ku Yelushalema ne ku musoko au kuakadi ntanta bu kilometa dikumi ne umue." 
Luke24:14 Bakadi bayikila bua malu â onso akalua. 
Luke24:15 Hakadibo bayikila bakonkangana, Yesu mene wakalua nʼabo ha buihi, wakenda nʼabo." 
Luke24:16 Kadi mesu abo akadi bitayitayi, kabakamumanya." 
Luke24:17 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi nuenda nuyikidila tshinyi? Bobo bakimana babungame." 
Luke24:18 Mukuabo, dina diandi Keleopa, wakamukonka kabidi ne, Ahu wewe udi muenyi udi usomba ha nkayebe mu Yelushalema kui mumanye malu akulua matuku â?" 
Luke24:19 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Malu kai? Bakamuambila ne, Malu a Yesu, Muena Nazaleta, wakadi biandi muprofete mukole mu bienzedi ne mu mei ku mpala kua Nzambi ne kua bantu bonso;" 
Luke24:20 bakuidi banene ne miloho yetu bakamufila bua kumuhishabo ne lufu, ne bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Luke24:21 Kadi tuetu tuakadi bamutekemene ne, Nyeye wahikula Isalele! Ne bualu bukuabo kabidi, matuku asatu akuhita akalua malu â." 
Luke24:22 Ne bualu bukuabo bakashi bakuabo ba mu tshisumbu tshietu bakadi ku lukita dindadinda bakatukemesha; 
Luke24:23 hakahangabo kumona tshitalu tshiandi, bakahingana, bakamba ne, Tuakumona bikena kumona bu banjelo bakatuambila ne, Yeye udi ne muoyo." 
Luke24:24 Bakuabo bakadi nʼetu bakaya ku lukita, bakasangana bualu bu muakamba bakashi; kadi kabakamumona." 
Luke24:25 Yesu wakabambila ne, Nuenu bantu kabai ne lungenyi, nudi nunenga ha kuitabusha mei onso akamba baprofete!" 
Luke24:26 Kabiakadi bimpe bia Kilisto kukengeye mu malu â ne bua kubueleye mu butumbi buandi, anyi?" 
Luke24:27 Wakabangila ku Mose ne ku baprofete bonso, wakabajinguluila malu akafundabo mu Mukanda wa Nzambi wonso bualu buandi." 
Luke24:28 Hakafikabo ha buihi ne musoko wakadibo baya, yeye wakamba kuhita." 
Luke24:29 Bakamusengelela bikole ne, Ulale nʼetu kunoko; bualu bua diba dikadi dibuela, munya ukadi ushika. Yeye wakaya kulala nʼabo." 
Luke24:30 Hakashikameye nʼabo ku mesa, wakamema mutanda wa bidia, wakatendelela Nzambi: hakautshibuleye bituha, wakabahabi." 
Luke24:31 Mesu abo akabuluka, bakamumanya; yeye wakabajimina ku mesu kuabo." 
Luke24:32 Bakambilangana ne, Mitshima yetu kayakadi itema munda muetu, anyi, hakadiye utuambila malu mu nshila, hakadiye utujinguluila Mukanda wa Nzambi?" 
Luke24:33 Bakabika ha diba adi mene, bakahingana mu Yelushalema, bakasangana bayidi dikumi ne umue badisangishe hohamue ne bakuabo bakadi nʼabo," 
Luke24:34 bakamba ne, Mukelenge wakubika ku lufu bulelela, wakumueneka kudi Simona." 
Luke24:35 Bakabalondela malu akanjibua mu nshila ne muakadiye mumanyibue kudibo mu kutshibula kua bidia. 
Luke24:36 Hakadibo bamba mei â, yeye mene wakimana munkatshi muabo, wakabambila ne, Nuikale talala." 
Luke24:37 Kadi mitshima yabo yakabandika, bakatshina, bakelangana meshi ne, Tudi lutangila mukishi." 
Luke24:38 Yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi nutshinyina tshinyi? Makonka adi ajuka mu mitshima yenu bua tshinyi?" 
Luke24:39 Monai bianza bianyi ne makasa anyi ne, Meme muine; nundenge bianza, nutangile, bualu bua mukishi kena ne munyinyi ne mifuba binudi nuntangila nʼabi." 
Luke24:40 Hakabambileye dî edi, wakabalesha bianza biandi ne makasa andi." 
Luke24:41 Hakadibo kabai banze kuitabusha bualu bua disanka diabo, hakadibo bakema, yeye wakabakonka ne, Nudi ne tshintu tshia kudia kunoko, anyi?" 
Luke24:42 Bakamuhesha tshihesa tshia mushiha mukanga. 
Luke24:43 Yeye wakatshiangata, wakatshidia ku mesu kuabo." 
Luke24:44 Wakabambila ne, Â adi mei anyi anakanuambila hanakadi nʼenu, ne, Budibo nʼabu mbua kushikisha malu onso akafundabo bualu buanyi mu mikenshi ya Mose ne mu luseke lua baprofete ne mu misambu." 
Luke24:45 Hashishe yeye wakabulula mitshima yabo bua kujingululabo Mukanda wa Nzambi. 
Luke24:46 Yeye wakabambila ne, Bakafunda ne, Mbimpe bia Kilisto kukengeye ne kubikeye ku lufu hahita matuku asatu;" 
Luke24:47 mbimpe kabidi bia kuambilabo bisamba bionso bualu bua kukudimuna kua mitshima ne bua kujimishibua kua mibi yabo mu dina diandi, babangile ku Yelushalema." 
Luke24:48 Nuenu nudi bamanyi ba malu â. 
Luke24:49 Monai, ndi nutumina mulayi wa Tatu wanyi; kadi nushale mu musoko eu tô ne hanuluatshishabo bukole bua mu diulu." 
Luke24:50 Yesu wakabalombola tô ne ku muaba wakadi buludiludi ne Betania; wakabisha bianza biandi, wakabasankisha." 
Luke24:51 Hakadiye ubasankisha nunku, wakumuka kudibo, wakatuadibua mu diulu." 
Luke24:52 Bakamutendelela, bakahingana ku musoko ne disanka dinene;" 
Luke24:53 bakadi mu ntempelo ku dituku ne ku dituku batumbisha Nzambi. 
John1:1 Ku tshibangidilu Dî diakadiku, Dî diakadi ne Nzambi, Dî diakadi Nzambi." 
John1:2 Diodi diakadi ne Nzambi ku tshibangidilu. 
John1:3 Bintu bionso biakafukibua kudiye; kakuena tshintu tshiakafukibua kudi mukuabo, anu kudiye." 
John1:4 Munda muandi muakadi muoyo; muoyo au wakadi munya wa bantu. 
John1:5 Munya udi utema mu midima, kadi mîdima kayakautamba bukole." 
John1:6 Muntu wakalua, mutuma kudi Nzambi, dina diandi Yone." 
John1:7 Yeye wakalua bu mumanyi wa bualu bua kumanyisheye bantu bua munya, bua buonso buabo bitabushile bua dî diandi." 
John1:8 Yeye kakadi munya mene, wakaluila anu bua kumanyisha bantu bualu bua munya." 
John1:9 Munya mulelela wakadiku, wakadi ulua ha buloba, utemena bantu bonso." 
John1:10 Yeye wakadi ha buloba, buloba buakafukibua kudiye, kadi ba ha buloba kabakamumanya." 
John1:11 Wakalua kudi bintu biandi, kadi bantu bandi mene kabakamuitabusha." 
John1:12 Yeye wakaha bonso bakamuitabusha bukole bua kuluabo bana ba Nzambi, bobo mene badi bitabusha dina diandi;" 
John1:13 bakadi kabai baledibue kudi mashi, anyi kudi disua dia mubidi, anyi kudi disungula dia muntu, kadi bakaledibua kudi Nzambi." 
John1:14 Dî diakakudimuka muntu, diakuikala munkatshi muetu tshituha, diakadi diule tente ne ngasa ne bulelela; tuakumona butumbi buandi, buakadi bu bua muana umuehele udi mulela kudi Tatu wandi." 
John1:15 Yone wakambila bantu bualu buandi, wakela dî bikole ne, Kayeu unakuamba ne, Ulualua ku nyima kuanyi udi muntambe, bua yeye wakadiku ku mpala kuanyi." 
John1:16 Buonso buetu tuakuangata tshiuwidi tshiandi, ne ngasa ha mutu ha ngasa." 
John1:17 Mose wakatuha mikenshi, kadi ngasa ne bulelela biakafuma kudi Yesu Kilisto." 
John1:18 Kakuena muntu wakuanza kutangila Nzambi; Muana umuehele mulela udi mu tshiadi tshia Tatu, yeye wakamuamba." 
John1:19 Edi ndî dia Yone hakatuma Bena Yuda ba mu Yelushalema bakuidi ba Nzambi ne Bena Lewi kudiye bua kumuebesha ne, Wewe nganyi?" 
John1:20 Wakitabusha, kakavila, wakitabusha ne, Meme tshiena Kilisto." 
John1:21 Bakamukonka ne, Ahu udi nganyi? Wewe udi Eliya, anyi? Wakamba ne, Tshiena yeye. Bakamukonka kabidi ne, Wewe mmuprofete au, anyi? Wakamba ne, Nasha." 
John1:22 Bakamukonka ne, Wewe nganyi, bua tuhingashe di kudi bakututuma? Wewe udi udiamba nganyi?" 
John1:23 Wakamba ne, Ndi bianyi di dia muntu udi wela lubila mu tshihela ne, Nululamishe nshila wa Mukelenge, bu muakamba muprofete Yeshaya." 
John1:24 Bakatumibua kudi Bafalese. 
John1:25 Bakamuebesha ne, Biwikala kui Kilisto, kui Eliya, kui muprofete au, tshiudi ubatijila bantu ntshinyi?" 
John1:26 Yone wakabakudimuna di ne, Ndi mbatiza bantu mu mai; munkatshi muenu mudi muimane unudi kanui bamanye," 
John1:27 yeye mene ulualua ku nyima kuanyi, tshiena ne buakane bua kusulula mionshi ya bisabata biandi." 
John1:28 Malu â akadi enjibua mu Betania dishia dia Yadene, muakadi Yone ubatiza." 
John1:29 Hakatshiabu, yeye wakamona Yesu ulua kudiye, wakamba ne, Tangilai, Muanʼa mukoko wa Nzambi, udi umusha bubi bua ba ha buloba!" 
John1:30 Kayeyʼeu unakuamba ne, Ku nyima kuanyi kulualua muntu udi muntambe, bualu bua yeye wakadiku ku mpala kuanyi." 
John1:31 Meme tshiakumumanya; kadi nakuluila mbatiza bantu mu mai bualu bua kumumuenesha kudi Isalele. 
John1:32 Yone wakamba ne, Nakumona Nyuma uhueka mu diulu bu nyunyu wa nkutshi, wakumuikila." 
John1:33 Tshiakumumanya; kadi wakantuma bua kubatiza bantu mu mai wakungambila ne, Muntu uwatangila Nyuma uhuekela hamʼbidi handi, mumuikile, yeye nguabatiza bantu mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
John1:34 Nakumona bualu ebu, ne nakumanyisha bantu ne, Eu udi Muana wa Nzambi." 
John1:35 Hakatshiabu kabidi, Yone wakadi muimane ne bayidi bandi babidi." 
John1:36 Wakatangila Yesu talala, hakadiye wenda, wakamba ne, Tangilai, Muanʼa mukoko wa Nzambi:" 
John1:37 Bayidi babidi bakunvua dî diakambeye, bakalonda Yesu." 
John1:38 Yesu wakatshinguluka, wakabamona bamulonda, wakabakonka ne, Nudi nukeba tshinyi? Bakamuebesha ne, Labi (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muyishi), wewe udi wikala kudi kunyi?" 
John1:39 Yeye wakabambila ne, Luai numone. Bakaya, bakamona kuakadiye mutule. Bobo bakashala nʼandi difuku adi; diba diakadi bu ha inai." 
John1:40 Babidi bakunvua dî dia Yone, bakalonda Yesu, mukuabo wakadi Andele, muanʼabo ne Simona Petelo." 
John1:41 Yeye wakasangana muanʼabo Simona diambedi, wakamuambila ne, Tuakumona Mashiya (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Kilisto)." 
John1:42 Wakalua nʼandi kudi Yesu. Yesu wakamumona wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi Simona, muana wa Yona; nebakuidike dina ne, Kefa (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Petelo)." 
John1:43 Hakatshiabu, wakamba kuya mu Galela, wakasangana Filipo. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Undonde." 
John1:44 Filipo wakadi Muena Bete-saiîa, musoko wa Andele ne Petelo." 
John1:45 Filipo wakasangana Natanaele, wakamuambila ne, Tuakumona wakafunda Mose mu mikenshi, ne baprofete, Yesu wa ku Nazaleta, muana wa Yosefe." 
John1:46 Natanaele wakamuebesha ne, Tshintu tshimpe tshidi tshimanye mua kufuma mu Nazaleta, anyi? Filipo wakamuambila ne, Lua umone." 
John1:47 Yesu wakatangila Natanaele ulua kudiye, wakamuamba ne, Tangilai, yeye udi Muena Isalele bulelela, udi kai ne lubombo." 
John1:48 Natanaele wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi munmanye meme kudi kunyi? Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Diambedi Filipo kai muanze kukubikila, hawakadi munshi mua mutshi wa nfigi, nakukutangila." 
John1:49 Natanaele wakamuandamuna ne, Labi, wewe udi Muana wa Nzambi, wewe udi Mukelenge wa Isalele." 
John1:50 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi witabusha bualu bua nakukuambila ne, Nakukutangila munshi mua mutshi wa nfigi, anyi? Neumone malu ahita abu." 
John1:51 Wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Nenumone diulu dibulula ne banjelo babanda bahueka ha Muana wa muntu." 
John2:1 Hakahita matuku asatu, dibaka diakadi mu Kana wa Galela; mamu wa Yesu wakadiku;" 
John2:2 bakabikila Yesu ne bayidi bandi ku dibanji. 
John2:3 Hakashika nyinyo, mamu wa Yesu wakamuambila ne, Kabena ne nvinyo." 
John2:4 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Mukashi, ndi nʼebe bualu kai? Diba dianyi kadiena dianze kulua." 
John2:5 Mamu wandi wakambila bena mudimu ne, Enzai muanuambileye." 
John2:6 Milondo isambombo ya mai misonga ya mabue yakadi nutekela bua mai a kuowa bu mudi tshilele tshia Bena Yuda, mulondo lita makumi tshitema, mulondo lita makumi tshitema." 
John2:7 Yesu wakabambila ne, Nûshe milondo tente ne mai. Bakayûsha tô ne ku mibangu yai." 
John2:8 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nutunte, nuye nʼandi kudi udi ha mutu ha dibanji. Bakaya nʼandi." 
John2:9 Hakalabula wakadi ha mutu ha dibanji mai akukudimuka nvinyo, hakadiye kai mumanye kuakufumeye (kadi bena mudimu bakatuma mai bakamanya), wakadi ha mutu ha dibanji wakabikila mubaki wa mukashi," 
John2:10 wakamuambila ne, Bantu bonso batu bafila nvinyo muimpe diambedi; hanuabo wa bungi, nebafile udi kai muimpe ku nyima; kadi wewe wakuteka nvinyo muimpe tô ne katataka." 
John2:11 Bualu ebu buakenza Yesu mu Kana wa Galela buakadi bua kumudilu bua bimanyinu biandi, wakalesha bantu butumbi buandi; bayidi bandi bakamuitabusha." 
John2:12 Hakashika malu â, wakaya ne mamuʼandi, ne bana babo, ne bayidi bandi ku Kapênuma; kabakashalamu matuku a bungi." 
John2:13 Disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa dia Bena Yuda diakadi ha buihi, Yesu wakabanda ku Yelushalema." 
John2:14 Wakasangana mu ntempelo bahanyi ba ngombe ne mikoko ne nyunyu ya nkutshi, ne bashintakashi ba mpalata bashikame;" 
John2:15 yeye wakasuikakasha muonshi ne tuonshi tukese wakîhata buonso buai mu ntempelo ne mikoko ne ngombe, wakitshikisha mpalata ya bashintakashi, wakatokola mesa abo;" 
John2:16 wakambila bahanyi ba nyunyu ya nkutshi ne, Umushai bintu ebi; kanuvuishi nsubu wa Tatu wanyi bu wa bendi ba mushinga." 
John2:17 Bayidi bandi bakavuluka dî didi difunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Lukunukuna lua ku nsubu webe nelundie." 
John2:18 Bena Yuda bakamuebesha ne, Bualu bua wewe udi wenza nunku, udi utulesha tshimanyinu kai?" 
John2:19 Yesu wakabakudimuna dî ne, Bumbulai ntempelo eu, nemubishe kabidi matuku asatu." 
John2:20 Bena Yuda bakamba ne, Bakibaka ntempelo eu bidimu makumi anai ne bisambombo, wewe neumuibake kabidi matuku asatu, anyi?" 
John2:21 Kadi yeye wakadi wamba bua ntempelo wa mubidi wandi. 
John2:22 Hakabikeye ku lufu, bayidi bandi bakavuluka dî edi diakambeye, bakitabusha malu akadi mafunda ma Mukanda wa Nzambi ne dî diakamba Yesu." 
John2:23 Hakadiye mu Yelushalema ku Kuhita kua Yehowa, mu matuku a disanka, bantu ba bungi bakitabusha dina diandi, hakamonabo bimanyinu biandi biakenzeye." 
John2:24 Kadi Yesu kakaditeka mu bianza biabo, bualu bua yeye wakamanya bantu bonso," 
John2:25 ne bua yeye kakadi ne bualu bua muntu amuambile malu a bantu; yeye mene wakadi mumanye malu a munda mua bantu. 
John3:1 Muntu wa ku Bafalese wakadiku dina diandi Nikodemo, yeye wakadi muloho wa Bena Yuda;" 
John3:2 yeye wakalua kudi Yesu butuku, wakamuambila ne, Labi, tudi bamanye ne, Wewe udi muyishi mufume kudi Nzambi, bualu bua kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kuenza bimanyinu ebi biudi wenza, bikala Nzambi kai nʼandi." 
John3:3 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bulelela, bulelela, adi nkuambila ne, Bikala muntu kai muledibue tshiakabidi, kena mumanye mua kutangila bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
John3:4 Nikodemo wakamukonka ne, Hakulumpa muntu, yeye udi mumanye mua kuledibua tshiakabidi munyi? Udi mumanye mua kubuela munda mua mamu wandi tshiakabidi, amulele, anyi?" 
John3:5 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Bikala muntu kai muledibue kudi mai ne kudi Nyuma, yeye kena mumanye mua kubuela mu bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
John3:6 Wakaledibua kudi mubidi udi mubidi; wakaledibua kudi Nyuma udi nyuma. 
John3:7 Kukemi bua dî dinakukuambila ne, Bunudi nʼabu mbua kuledibua tshiakabidi." 
John3:8 Luhehele ludi luheha kudilu lusue, wewe udi unvua tshiona tshialu, kadi kuena mumanye kudilu lufuma ne kudilu luya; muntu yonso udi muledibue kudi Nyuma udi nunku." 
John3:9 Nikodemo wakamuebesha ne, Malu â adi mamanye mua kuikala nunku munyi?" 
John3:10 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi muyishi wa Isalele, kuena mumanye malu â?" 
John3:11 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Tudi tuamba butudi bamanye, tudi tuambila bantu butuakumona; nuenu kanuena nuitabusha butuakunuambila." 
John3:12 Binuahidia kuitabusha malu a ha buloba anakunuambila, nudi bamanye mua kuitabusha binanuambila malu a mu diulu munyi?" 
John3:13 Kakuena muntu wakubanda mu diulu anu yeye wakufuma mu diulu, Muana wa muntu mene, udi biandi mu diulu." 
John3:14 Bu muakabisha Mose nyoka mu tshihela, nunku budi Muana wa muntu nʼabu mbua kubishibua muomumue;" 
John3:15 bua muntu yonso witabusha ikale ne muoyo wa tshiendelele bualu buandi. 
John3:16 Bualu bua Nzambi wakatamba kusua ba ha buloba, yeye wakabaha Muanʼandi umuehele mulela bua muntu yonso wamuitabusha kafu biandi, kadi ikale ne muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
John3:17 Nzambi kakatuma Muana wandi ha buloba bua kulumbuluisha ba ha buloba, kadi bua ba ha buloba basungidibue kudiye." 
John3:18 Kabena balumbuluisha wamuitabusha, kadi bakumana kulumbuluisha wahidia kuitabusha, bualu bua kakitabusha dina dia Muana umuehele mulela wa Nzambi." 
John3:19 Etshi ntshilumbu tshia bantu ne, Munya wakalua ha buloba, kadi bantu bakasua midima, kabakasua munya, bua bienzedi biabo biakadi bibi." 
John3:20 Muntu yonso utu wenza malu mabi katu wasua munya, kena ulua mu munya bua bienzedi biandi kabimanyibu." 
John3:21 Kadi muntu yonso utu wenza malu mimpe udi ulua mu munya bua bienzedi biandi bimueneke, bualu bua biakenjibua mu Nzambi." 
John3:22 Hakashika malu â, Yesu ne bayidi bandi bakalua mu luseke lua Yudaya; wakashalaku tshituha ubatiza bantu." 
John3:23 Yone kabidi wakadi ubatiza bantu mu Ainona hehi ne Salima, bualu bua mpokolo ya mai yakadiku ya bungi; bantu bakalua, bakabatijibua." 
John3:24 Kabakadi banze kuela Yone mu nsubu wa lukanu. 
John3:25 Bayidi ba Yone bakadi ne Muena Yuda mpata bua kudiuvua. 
John3:26 Bakalua kudi Yone, bakamuambila ne, Labi, uwakadi nʼandi dishia dia Yadene, uwakambila bantu, udi ubatiza bantu, bantu bonso balualua kudiye." 
John3:27 Yone wakandamuna ne, Muntu kena mumanye mua kudiangatshila tshintu, kabai bamuhetshi tshifume mu diulu." 
John3:28 Nuenu nudi bamanyi banyi ne nakamba ne, Tshiena Kilisto, kadi nakutumibua ku mpala kuandi." 
John3:29 Udi ne mukashi udi biandi mubaki wa mukashi; kadi mulunda wa mubaki, himaneye nʼandi, hatelesheye dî diandi, neatambe kusanka bualu bua dî dia mubaki; ka disanka dianyi didi dikumbane." 
John3:30 Budiye nʼabu mbua kutumba, bundi nʼabu mbua kuhueka." 
John3:31 Udi mufume mulu ngudi mutambe bonso; wa ha buloba udi wa ha buloba, udi wamba malu a ha buloba; udi mufume mulu udi mutambe bonso." 
John3:32 Yeye udi wamba malu akamoneye ne akunvueye; kakuena muntu udi witabusha malu akambeye. 
John3:33 Wakuitabusha malu akambeye wakuteka tshimanyishilu tshiandi tshilesha ne, Nzambi udi mulelela." 
John3:34 Udi mutuma kudi Nzambi udi wamba mei a Nzambi; bualu bua yeye kena umulobela Nyuma. 
John3:35 Tatu udi musue Muana wandi, wakafila bintu bionso mu bianza biandi." 
John3:36 Udi witabusha Muana udi ne muoyo wa tshiendelele; kadi udi uhidia Muana kena umona muoyo, tshishi tshia Nzambi tshidi tshishala ngandi." 
John4:1 Hakamanya Mukelenge ne, Bafalese bakunvua ne, Yesu udi mutambe Yone kuvuisha bantu bayidi ne kubabatiza" 
John4:2 (kadi Yesu mene kakadi ubabatiza, bayidi bandi bakadi bababatiza)," 
John4:3 yeye wakumuka mu Yudaya, wakahingana mu Galela kabidi." 
John4:4 Buakadiye nʼabu mbua kuhitshila mu Samalea. 
John4:5 Yeye wakalua ku musoko wa Samalea, dina diau Suka, hehi ne muaba wakadi Yakoba muhe muanʼandi Yosefe." 
John4:6 Dina dia mai dia Yakoba diakadihu. Luendu luakatonda Yesu, yeye wakashikama nunku kukala kua dina. Diba diakadi munda munya." 
John4:7 Mukashi wa mu Samalea wakalua kusuna mai. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Umpe mai a kunua." 
John4:8 Bayidi bandi bakadi bamane kuya mu musoko bua kusumba bia kudia. 
John4:9 Mukashi wa mu Samalea wakamukonka ne, Wewe Muena Yuda udi undombela meme Muena Samalea mai a kunua tshinyi? (Bualu bua Bena Yuda kabena babuelakana ne Bena Samalea.)" 
John4:10 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bu wewe mumanye diha dia Nzambi ne wakukulomba ne, Umpe mai a kunua, wewe wakadi kumulomba ne yeye wakadi kukuha mai a muoyo." 
John4:11 Mukashi wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, wewe kuena ne tshia kukoka nʼatshi mai, dina didi dile, wewe udi ne mai a muoyo kudi kunyi?" 
John4:12 Wewe udi mutambe tatu wetu Yakoba, anyi? Yeye wakatuha dina, wakânuaku ne bana bandi ne bimuna biandi." 
John4:13 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Wanua mai â neikale ne nyota kabidi," 
John4:14 kadi wanua mai anamuha kena wikala ne nyota kabidi tshiendelele; mai anamuha neikale munda muandi bu mushimi wa mai abanda mu muoyo wa tshiendelele. 
John4:15 Mukashi wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, Umpe mai â, tshikadi ne nyota, tshilu tô kunoko bua kusuna." 
John4:16 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ya ubikile mulume webe, ulue biebe kunoko." 
John4:17 Mukashi wakamuandamuna ne, Tshiena ne mulume. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Wakuamba bulelela ne, Tshiena ne mulume;" 
John4:18 bualu bua wewe wakadi ne balume batanu, ûdi nʼandi katataka kena mulume webe; wewe wakuamba bulelela." 
John4:19 Mukashi wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, ndi njingulula ne, Wewe udi muprofete." 
John4:20 Bankambua betu bakadi batendelela Tatu ku mukuna eu; kadi nuenu nudi nuamba ne, Mu Yelushalema mudi muaba udi bantu ne bua kutendelelamu Tatu." 
John4:21 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Mukashi, witabushe dî dianyi, diba nedilue dikala bantu kabai batendelela Tatu ku mukuna eu anyi mu Yelushalema." 
John4:22 Nudi nutendelela tshinudi kanui bamanye; tuetu tudi tutendelela tshitudi bamanye; bualu bua luhandu ludi lufuma kudi Bena Yuda. 
John4:23 Kadi diba nedilue, didiku katataka mene, ditendelela batendeledi balelela Nzambi mu nyuma ne mu bulelela; Tatu udi ukeba bantu ba nunku bamutendelela." 
John4:24 Nzambi udi Nyuma; budi bamutendeledi nʼabu mbua kumutendelela mu nyuma ne mu bulelela. 
John4:25 Mukashi wakamuambila ne, Ndi mumanye ne, Mashiya ulualua (udibo babikila ne, Kilisto); halueye, neatumanyishe malu onso." 
John4:26 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Meme udi wakula nʼebe nyeye." 
John4:27 Bayidi bandi bakalua ha diba adi mene; bakakema bualu bua yeye wakadi wakula ne mukashi; kadi muntu kakamufuka ne, Udi ukeba tshinyi? Udi wakuila nʼandi tshinyi?" 
John4:28 Mukashi wakashia mulondo wandi wa mai, wakaya ku musoko, wakambila bantu ne," 
John4:29 Luai numone muntu wakungambila malu onso anakenzenza; nyeye Kilisto, anyi?" 
John4:30 Bakaluhuka mu musoko, bakadi balua kudiye." 
John4:31 Hakadibo benza nunku, bayidi bakamusengelela ne, Labi, diaku." 
John4:32 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Ndi ne bia kudia binudi kanui bamanye." 
John4:33 Bayidi bakakonkangana ne, Bakulua ne bia kudia kudiye, anyi?" 
John4:34 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bidia bianyi bidi kuenza bu mudi wakuntuma musue ne kushikisha mudimu wandi." 
John4:35 Kanutu nuamba ne, Hahua ngondo inai, kunowa nekulue, anyi? Ndi nuambila ne, Bandulukai, numone madimi, adi matoke katataka bua kunowabo." 
John4:36 Udi unowa udi wangata difutu, udi usangisha bintu bia ku muoyo wa tshiendelele; bua mukunyi ne munowi basanke hohamue." 
John4:37 Dî edi ndilelela ne, Munga udi ukuna, munga udi unowa." 
John4:38 Nakunutuma bua kunowa bintu binuakadi kanui bakuatshile mudimu; bakuabo bakakuata mudimu, nuenu nuakuhingana mu mudimu wabo." 
John4:39 Bena Samalea ba bungi ba mu musoko au bakamuitabusha bualu bua dî dia mukashi diakambeye ne, Yeye wakungambila malu onso anakenzela." 
John4:40 Hakalua Bena Samalea kudiye, bakamusengelela ne, Shala nʼetu; yeye wakalalamu matuku abidi." 
John4:41 Bakuabo ba bungi kabidi bakitabusha bualu bua dî diandi; 
John4:42 bakambila mukashi ne, Tuakuitabusha katataka, kambualu bua dî diebe, tuakudiunvuila, tudi bamanye ne, Bulelela, eu udi Musungidi wa ba ha buloba." 
John4:43 Hakahita matuku abidi, wakumukamu, wakaya mu Galela." 
John4:44 Yesu mene wakamba ne, Muprofete kena ne butumbi mu luseke luabo." 
John4:45 Hakalueye mu Galela nunku, Bena Galela bakamuitabusha, bua bobo bakatangila malu onso akenzeye mu Yelushalema ku disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa; bobo kabidi bakadi baye ku disanka." 
John4:46 Yeye wakalua kabidi ku Kana wa Galela kuakakudimuneye mai nvinyo. Muloho wa mukelenge wakadi ne muanʼandi usama mu Kapênuma. 
John4:47 Hakunvueye lumu ne, Yesu wakumuka mu Yudaya, wakulua mu Galela, wakaya kudiye, wakamutendekena ne, Uhueke, wondahe muanʼanyi; bualu bua lufu luakadi lumutonde." 
John4:48 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Binuikala kanui numona bimanyinu ne malu a kukema, kanuena nuitabusha, nasha kakese." 
John4:49 Muloho wa mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, hueka diambedi muanʼanyi kai muanze kufua." 
John4:50 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe, muanʼebe udi ne muoyo, Muntu au wakitabusha dî diakamuambila Yesu, wakaya biandi." 
John4:51 Hakadiye uya mu nshila, bantu bandi bakasangila nʼandi, bakamuambila ne, Muanʼebe udi ne muoyo." 
John4:52 Yeye wakabakonka diba diakabangeye kusangala. Bakamuambila ne, Makelela, hakadi diba ha umue, mubidi kahia wakamulekela," 
John4:53 Nunku tatu wakamanya ne, Mpa diba adi mene diakungambila Yesu ne, Muanʼebe udi ne muoyo. Yeye wakitabusha ne ba mu nsubu wandi bonso." 
John4:54 Etshi ntshimanyinu tshibidi tshiakenza Yesu hakumukeye mu Yudaya, bakalueye mu Galela." 
John5:1 Hakashika malu â, disanka dia Bena Yuda diakadiku; Yesu wakaya ku Yelushalema." 
John5:2 Mu Yelushalema, hehi ne tshibuelelu tshia mikoko, mudi mpokolo wa mai a kuowa, udi Bena Yuda babikila ne, Beteseda, wakadi ne bitanda bitanu." 
John5:3 Mu bitanda amu muakadi mulale tshisumbu tshia bakadi batekete ne bafofo ne balema ne banyane. [ 
John5:4 ] 
John5:5 Muntu wakadimu ne disama dia matekete bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu. 
John5:6 Hakamumona Yesu mulale, hakamanyeye ne, Yeye wakadi mu bualu ebu musangu mule, wakamukonka ne, Udi musue kuondahibua, anyi?" 
John5:7 Muntu musame wakamuandamuna ne, Mukelenge, havuandululabo mai, tshiena ne muntu wa kumbuesha mu mpokolo; hantshidi nya, munga udi umpita ku mpala." 
John5:8 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bika, ambula bulalu buebe, endaku." 
John5:9 Muntu wakakoleshibua lukasa, wakambula bulalu, wakenda. Dituku adi diakadi dia Lumingu lua Bayuda." 
John5:10 Bena Yuda bakambila wakondahibua ne, Lelu ndituku dia Lumingu, kutuala bulalu buebe kudi kushiha mukenshi." 
John5:11 Kadi yeye wakabandamuna ne, Wakungondaha wakungambila ne, Ambula bulalu buebe, endaku." 
John5:12 Bakamukonka ne, Nganyi wakukuambila ne, Ambula bulalu buebe, endaku?" 
John5:13 Wakondahibua kakamanya wakamukolesha; bualu bua Yesu wakumukaku, tshisumbu tshia bantu tshikala ha muaba au." 
John5:14 Hashishe Yesu wakamusangana mu ntempelo, wakamuambila ne, Mona, wakukola; kuenji bualu bubi kabidi, bua dikenga ditambe kadilu kûdi." 
John5:15 Muntu au wakumuka, wakambila Bena Yuda ne, Wakankolesha udi Yesu." 
John5:16 Bua bualu ebu Bena Yuda bakatatshisha Yesu, bua yeye wakenza malu â dituku dia Lumingu." 
John5:17 Kadi Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Tatu wanyi udi ukuata mudimu tô ne katataka, ne meme kabidi ndi ngukuata." 
John5:18 Bua bualu ebu Bena Yuda bakatamba kukeba mua kumushihabo, bua yeye wakashiha mukenshi wa Lumingu, ne bua wakubikila Nzambi ne, Ntatu wanyi, udivuisha muomumue ne Nzambi." 
John5:19 Yesu wakabakudimuna dî ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muana kena mumanye mua kudienzela bualu, utu wenza anu budiye umona Tatu wandi wenza; malu onso adi Tatu wenza Muana utu wênza muomumue." 
John5:20 Bualu bua Tatu udi musue Muana, udi umulesha malu onso atshidiye wenza; yeye neamuleshe malu a kukema matambe â, bua nuenu kukema." 
John5:21 Bu mudi Tatu ubisha bafue, ubaha muoyo; nunku kabidi Muana udi uha badiye musue muoyo." 
John5:22 Tatu kena ulumbuluisha muntu, kadi yeye wakuha Muana bulumbuluishi buonso," 
John5:23 bua bantu bonso batumbishe Muana bu mudibo batumbisha Tatu. Udi kai utumbisha Muana kena utumbisha Tatu wakamutuma. 
John5:24 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Unvua dî dianyi, witabusha wakuntuma, udi ne muoyo wa tshiendelele, kena ulua ku tshilumbu, wakumuka mu lufu, wakubuela mu muoyo." 
John5:25 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Diba nedilue, didiku katataka mene, diunvua bafue dî dia Muana wa Nzambi; badi bunvua nebikale ne muoyo." 
John5:26 Bu mudi Tatu ne muoyo munda muandi, nunku yeye wakaha Muana kabidi bua kuikaleye ne muoyo munda muandi;" 
John5:27 yeye wakamuha bukokeshi bua kulumbuluisha, bualu bua yeye udi muana wa muntu." 
John5:28 Kanukemi bua bualu ebu; bualu bua diba nedilue diunvua bonso badi mu nkita dî diandi," 
John5:29 nebajuke; bakenzenza bimpe nebajuke mu dibika dia muoyo, bakenzenza bibi nebajuke mu dibika dia dihila." 
John5:30 Meme nkayanyi tshiena mumanye mua kuenza bualu; ndi ndumbulula bu mundi ngunvua; ndi ndumbulula biakane, bua tshiena nkeba kuenza bu mundi musue, ndi nkeba kuenza bu mudi wakuntuma musue." 
John5:31 Binadiamba, dî dianyi kadiena dijalama." 
John5:32 Udi ungamba nmukuabo; ndi mumanye ne, Budiye ungamba mbulelela." 
John5:33 Nuenu nuakatuma bantu kudi Yone, ne yeye wakujadika bualu bulelela ne kuamba kuandi." 
John5:34 Tshiena ngangata dijadika dia bualu buanyi kudi muntu; kadi ndi ngamba malu â bua nuenu kusungidibua. 
John5:35 Yeye wakadi muinda utema ukenka; nuenu nuakitabusha bua kusanka mu dinkenka diandi musangu. 
John5:36 Kadi tshimanyinu tshindi nʼatshi tshidi tshitambe dî dia Yone, bualu bua malu a kukema akumpa Tatu bua meme kuenza, malu antshidi ngenza mene, adi angamba ne, Tatu wakuntuma." 
John5:37 Tatu wakantuma waku ngamba kabidi. Kanuena banze kunvua dî diandi tshikondo tshimue, kanuena banze kutangila mubidi wandi." 
John5:38 Kanuena ne dî diandi dishala munda muenu, bualu bua kanuena nuitabusha wakatumeye." 
John5:39 Nudi nukeba kujingulula malu adi mafunda mu Mukunda wa Nzambi, bua nudi nuelangana meshi ne, Mu malu â tudi ne muoyo wa tshiendelele; malu au kabidi adi angamba;" 
John5:40 kanuena basue kulua kundi bua nuenu kuikala ne muoyo. 
John5:41 Tshiena nkeba kuangata butumbi kudi bantu. 
John5:42 Kadi ndi munumanye ne, Kanuena ne luse lua Nzambi munda muenu." 
John5:43 Nakulua mu dina dia Tatu wanyi, kanuena nungitabusha; biadiluila mukuabo mu diandi dina, nenumuitabushe." 
John5:44 Nuenu, badi batumbishangana, badi kabai bakeba butumbi budi bufuma kudi Nzambi nkayandi, nudi bamanye mua kuitabusha munyi?" 
John5:45 Kanuedianganyi meshi ne, Meme nenubande ku mesu kua Tatu; mukuabo udiku, Mose mene, unudi beyemene, yeye neanubande." 
John5:46 Bu nuenu bitabushe Mose, nuakadi kungitabusha meme, bua yeye wakafunda bualu buanyi." 
John5:47 Binuikala kanui nuitabusha malu akafundeye, nenuitabushe mei anyi munyi?" 
John6:1 Hakashika malu â, Yesu wakaya dishia dia dishiba dia Galela, didi dishiba dia Tibelia." 
John6:2 Bantu ba bungi bakamulonda, bualu bua bakatangila bimanyinu biakenzeleye bena mabedi." 
John6:3 Yesu wakabanda ku mukuna, wakashikamaku ne bayidi bandi." 
John6:4 Kuhita kua Yehowa, disanka dia Bena Yuda, kuakadi ha buihi." 
John6:5 Yesu wakabanduluka, wakamona bantu ba bungi balua kudiye, wakakonka Filipo ne, Netusumbe mitanda ya bidia kudi kunyi, bantu aba badie?" 
John6:6 Wakamukonka nunku bua kumuteta munda, bua yeye wakadi mumanye bualu buakadiye ha kuenza." 
John6:7 Filipo wakamuandamuna ne, Bidia bia mushinga wa ndenalio nkama ibidi kabiena bibakumbana bua muntu ne muntu kuangata anu bikese." 
John6:8 Muyidi wandi mukuabo, Andele, muanʼabo ne Simona Petelo, wakamuambila ne," 
John6:9 Nsongalume mukese udi aha, udi ne mitanda itanu ya bidia bia seola ne mishiha ibidi; kadi bintu ebi ntshinyi tshienzelabi bantu bungi nunku?" 
John6:10 Yesu wakamba ne, Shikamishai bantu. Mashinde a bungi akadihu. Nunku balume bakashikama, bakadi bu binunu bitanu." 
John6:11 Yesu wakamema mitanda; hakatendeleleye Nzambi, wakayabanyina bakadi bashikame, ne mishiha kabidi bungi buakadibo basue." 
John6:12 Hakûkutabo, wakambila bayidi ne, Angula! bihesa bia bidia bidi bishale, tshintu katshijiminyi." 
John6:13 Bakabiangula nunku, bakûsha bisaka dikumi ne bibidi tente ne bihesa bia mitanda itanu ya bidia bia seola biakadibo bashîa kudi bakadia." 
John6:14 Hakamona bantu tshimanyinu etshi tshiakenzeye, bakamba ne, Bulelela, eu udi muprofete ulualua ha buloba." 
John6:15 Hakamanya Yesu ne, Badi bamba kunkuata ku bukole bua kumbuesha mu bukelenge, wakaya ku mukuna kabidi, yeye nkayandi." 
John6:16 Hakabuela diba, bayidi bandi bakahueka ku dishiba;" 
John6:17 bakabuela mu buatu, bakadi baya dishia ku Kapênuma. Butuku buakila, Yesu kakanza kulua kudibo." 
John6:18 Mai akadi ajuka mavuala bualu bua tshihehele tshikole tshiakadi tshiheha. 
John6:19 Hakitabo bualu ntanta bu ya kilometa inai anyi itanu, bakatangila Yesu wenda ha mutu ha mai, ulua hehi ne bualu; bakatshina." 
John6:20 Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Nmeme, kanutshinyi." 
John6:21 Nunku bakitabusha bua kumubuesha mu buabi; buatu buakafika lukasa ku mpata kuakadibo baya. 
John6:22 Hakatshiabu, bantu bakadi bimane dishia dia dishiba bakamona anu buatu bumue; bakamanya kabidi ne, Yesu kena mubuele mu buatu ne bayidi bandi, anu bobo nkayabo bakuya," 
John6:23 (kadi matu mafume ku Tibelia akalua hehi ne muaba wakadiabo bidia, hakatendelela Mukelenge Nzambi);" 
John6:24 hakamanya bantu ne, Yesu kena kunoko ne bayidi bandi, bakabuela mu matu, bakalua ku Kapênuma, bakeba Yesu." 
John6:25 Hakamumonabo dishia dia dishiba, bakamukonka ne, Labi, wakulua kunoko diba henyi?" 
John6:26 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Bulelela, bulelela, udi nuambila ne, Kanuena nunkeba bua bimanyinu binuakutangila, nudi nunkebela bua nuakudia mitanda, nuakûkuta." 
John6:27 Kanukuatshi mudimu bua bia kudia bitu biafua, kadi nûkuate bua bidi bishala tô ne ku muoyo wa tshiendelele, bianuha Muana wa muntu; bualu bua Tatu, Nzambi mene, wakamuteka tshimanyishilu." 
John6:28 Bakamukonka ne, Netuenze tshinyi bua tuetu kuenza midimu ya Nzambi?" 
John6:29 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Mudimu wa Nzambi udi nunku: nuitabushe wakatumeye." 
John6:30 Bakamukonka ne, Udi wenza tshimanyinu kai bua tuetu tumone, tuitabushe dî diebe? Tshiudi wenza ntshinyi?" 
John6:31 Bankambua betu bakadia mana mu tshihela, bu muakafundabo ne, Yeye wakabaha bidia bia mu diulu." 
John6:32 Yesu wakabambila ne. Bulelela, bulelela, udi nuambila ne, Mose kakanuha bidia bia mu diulu, Tatu wanyi udi unuha bidia bilelela bia mu diulu." 
John6:33 Bua bidia bia Nzambi mbiobio bîdi bifuma mu diulu, bidi biha ba ha buloba muoyo." 
John6:34 Bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, Utuhe bidia ebi matuku onso." 
John6:35 Yesu wakabambila ne, Ndi bianyi bidia bia muoyo; walua kundi kena wikala ne nsala, wangitabusha kena wikala ne nyota." 
John6:36 Kadi nakunuambila ne, Nuakutangila, kanuena nuitabusha." 
John6:37 Bonso badi Tatu umpa nebalue kundi; tshiena ngihata walua kundi. 
John6:38 Tshiakufika mu diulu bua kuenza bu mundi musue, anu bu mudi wakuntuma musue." 
John6:39 Edi ndisua dia wakuntuma ne tshijimishi muntu umue wa mu bantu bakampeye, yeye udi musue mbabishe dituku dia kunshikidilu." 
John6:40 Tatu wanyi udi musue muntu yonso udi utangila Muana, udi umuitabusha, ikale ne muoyo wa tshiendelele; ne meme nemubishe dituku dia kunshikidilu." 
John6:41 Bena Yuda bakamujiana, bualu bua yeye wakamba ne, Ndi bianyi bidia biakafuma mu diulu." 
John6:42 Bakakonka ne, Eu kena Yesu, muana wa Yosefe utudi bamanye tatuʼandi ne mamuʼandi, anyi? Ahu munyi mudiye wamba ne, Ndi mufume mu diulu?" 
John6:43 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Kanuikadi ne tshimanu munkatshi muenu." 
John6:44 Kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kudivuila kundi, hikala Tatu wakuntuma kai mumukoke; ne meme nemubishe dituku dia kunshikidilu." 
John6:45 Baprofete bakafunda ne, Nzambi neabayishe bonso. Muntu yonso wakunvua mei a Tatu, wakuayila, ulualua kundi." 
John6:46 Kakuena muntu wakumona Tatu, anu yeye udi mufume kudi Nzambi, yeye wakumona Tatu." 
John6:47 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Udi witabusha udi ne muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
John6:48 Ndi bianyi bidia bia muoyo. 
John6:49 Bankambua benu bakadia mana mu tshihela, bakafua." 
John6:50 Ebi mbidia bitu biafuma mu diulu, bua muntu kudia biandi, kafu." 
John6:51 Ndi bianyi bidia bidi ne muoyo biakafuma mu diulu; biadia muntu bidia ebi, neikale ne muoyo tshiendelele; bulelela, bidia binafila ku muoyo wa ba ha buloba nmubidi wanyi." 
John6:52 Bua dî edi Bena Yuda bakelangana mpata ne, Muntu eu udi mumanye mua kutuha mubidi wandi, tudie, munyi?" 
John6:53 Nunku Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Binuikala kanui nudia mubidi wa Muana wa muntu, binuikala kanui nunua mashi andi, kanuena ne muoyo munda muenu." 
John6:54 Udi udia mubidi wanyi, udi unua mashi anyi, udi ne muoyo wa tshiendelele, nemubishe dituku dia kunshikidilu." 
John6:55 Mubidi wanyi udi bidia bilelela, mashi anyi adi bia kunua bilelela." 
John6:56 Udi udia mubidi wanyi, udi unua mashi anyi, udi wikala munda muanyi ne meme munda muandi." 
John6:57 Bu muakantuma Tatu udi ne muoyo, ne bu mundi ne muoyo bualu bua Tatu, nunku wandia meme neikale ne muoyo bualu buanyi." 
John6:58 Ebi mbidia biakufuma mu diulu; kabiena bu wakadia bankambua betu, bakafua; wadia bidia ebi neikale ne muoyo tshiendelele." 
John6:59 Yeye wakamba malu â mu nsunagoga hakadiye uyisha bantu mu Kapênuma. 
John6:60 Bayidi bandi ba bungi, hakunvuabo dî edi, bakamba ne, Dî edi didi dikole, udi mumanye mua kuditabusha nganyi?" 
John6:61 Hakamanya Yesu munda munda ne, Bayidi banyi badi bajiana bua dî edi, wakabakonka ne, Bualu ebu budi bunulenduisha, anyi?" 
John6:62 Ahu binuatangila Muana wa muntu ubanda kuakadiye diambedi? 
John6:63 Nyuma ngudi uha muoyo, mubidi kawena wenza bualu; mei anakunuambila adi nyuma ne muoyo." 
John6:64 Kadi bakuabo benu kabena bitabusha. Ku tshibangidilu Yesu wakadi mumanye bakadi kabai bitabushe, wakadi mumanye wamutungila tshitungu." 
John6:65 Wakamba ne, Bua bualu ebu nakunuambila ne, Kakuena muntu ndi mumanye mua kudivuila kundi, bikalabo kabai bamuhebu kudi Tatu." 
John6:66 Bayidi bandi ba bungi bakahingana ku malu a diambedi bualu bua dî edi, kabakenda nʼandi kabidi." 
John6:67 Yesu wakakonka bayidi dikumi ne babidi ne, Nuenu kabidi, kanuena basue kuya, anyi?"
