John6:68 Simona Petelo wakamukudimuna ne, Mukelenge, netuye kudi nganyi? Wewe udi ne mei a muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
John6:69 Tuakuitabusha, tudi bamanye ne, Wewe udi Wa Tshijila wa Nzambi." 
John6:70 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Tshiakunusungula dikumi ne babidi, anyi? Kadi umue wenu udi wa diabolo." 
John6:71 Yeye wakadi wamba bua Yudasa, muana wa Simona Isakaliote, bualu bua yeye nguakadi ha kumutungila tshitungu, yeye wakadi umue wabo wa ba dikumi ne babidi." 
John7:1 Hakashika malu â, Yesu wakadi wendakana mu Galela; kakadi wendakana mu Yudaya, bualu bua Bena Yuda bakadi bakeba mua kumushiha." 
John7:2 Disanka dia Bena Yuda, Disanka dia Bisambusambu, diakadi ha buihi." 
John7:3 Bana babo ba difu dimue bakamuambila ne, Umuka kunoko, ya mu Yudaya bua bayidi bebe kabidi bamone malu a kukema audi wenza." 
John7:4 Kakuena muntu udi wenza bualu mu busokoko biasueye kumanyibua kudi bantu. Biwenza malu â, udimueneshe kudi ba ha buloba." 
John7:5 Bualu bua bana babo ba difu dimue kabakamuitabusha. 
John7:6 Yesu wakabambila ne, Diba dianyi kadiena dianze kufika, kadi diba dienu didiku matuku onso." 
John7:7 Ba ha buloba kabena bamanye mua kuikala nʼenu lukuna; kadi badi nʼanyi lukuna, bualu bua ndi mbamba ne, Malu adibo benza nmabi." 
John7:8 Yai bienu ku disanka, tshiena nya katataka ku disanka edi, bua diba dianyi kadiena dianze kukumbana." 
John7:9 Hakabambileye dî edi, wakashala mu Galela." 
John7:10 Hakaya bana babo ne Yesu ku disanka, yeye kabidi wakaya mu musokoko, bantu kabai bamanye." 
John7:11 Bena Yuda bakamukeba ku disanka, bakebeshangana ne, Udi hanyi?" 
John7:12 Bantu bakatamba kuelangana mpata ya bualu buandi mu musokoko; bakuabo bakamba ne, Udi muntu muimpe; bakuabo ne, Nasha, yeye udi uhambuisha bantu." 
John7:13 Kadi kakuakadi muntu wakamuamba ku mesu kua bantu, bua bakatshina Bena Yuda." 
John7:14 Kadi hankatshi ba matuku a disanka, Yesu wakalua mu ntempelo, wakayisha bantu." 
John7:15 Bena Yuda bakakema ne, Muntu eu udi mumanye mikanda, kai muanze kuiyila, munyi?" 
John7:16 Yesu wakabakudimuna dî ne, Diyisha dianyi kandianyi, ndia udi muntume." 
John7:17 Bitabusha muntu kuenza bu mudi Nzambi musue, yeye neamanye diyisha edi, ne ndia Nzambi, anyi ndi ndiambila nkayanyi." 
John7:18 Wadiambila udi ukeba butumbi buandi; kadi wakeba butumbi bua wakumutuma udi biandi muntu mulelela, kena ne bualu bubi munda." 
John7:19 Mose kakanuha mikenshi, anyi? Kadi kakuena umue wenu udi uyenza. Nudi nukebela kushihela tshinyi?" 
John7:20 Bantu bakamukudimuna dî ne, Udi ne demon munda, udi ukeba kukushiha nganyi?" 
John7:21 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nakuenza bualu bumue bua kukema, buonso buenu nudi nukema bualu ebu." 
John7:22 Mose wakanuha bualu bua ditengula (kadiakafuma kudi Mose, diakafuma kudi bankambua); nutu nuatengula muntu dituku dia Lumingu." 
John7:23 Biatengulabo muntu dituku dia Lumingu, bua kabashihi mukenshi wa Mose; nudi nʼanyi lukuna, bua nakahingisha bukole mu mubidi wa muntu wonso mujima difuku dia Lumingu, anyi?" 
John7:24 Kanulumbuluishi muntu tshilumbu ku bimuenu biandi, nulumbulule ne kulumbulula kuakane." 
John7:25 Bakuabo ba mu Yelushalema bakakonka ne, Eu kanyeye udibo bakeba kushiha, anyi?" 
John7:26 Kadi monai, yeye udi wamba malu ku mesu kua bantu bonso, kabena bamuambila bualu. Bakelenge badi bamanye bulelela ne, Yeye udi Kilisto, anyi?" 
John7:27 Kadi tuetu tudî bamanye muntu eu kuakufumeye; halua Kilisto, kakuena muntu wamanya kuafumeye." 
John7:28 Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole mu ntempelo, uyisha bantu ne, Nudi banmanye, nudi bamanye kunakufuma; tshiakudivuila, wakuntuma udi mulelela, unudi kanui bamanye." 
John7:29 Meme ndi mumumanye, bualu bua nakufuma kudiye, yeye wakuntuma." 
John7:30 Bakakeba mua kumukuata; kadi muntu kakamulenga tshianza, bualu bua diba diandi kadiakadi dianze kulua." 
John7:31 Bantu ba bungi ba mu tshisumbu bakamuitabusha, bakakonka ne, Halua Kilisto, nenze bimanyinu bitambe ebi bidi muntu eu wenza, anyi?" 
John7:32 Bafalese bakunvua bantu belangana mpata ya bualu buandi; bakuidi banene ne Bafalese bakatuma tuhalai bua kumukuata. 
John7:33 Yesu wakamba ne, Nengikale nʼenu tshituha tshihi, hashishe nenye kudi wakuntuma." 
John7:34 Nenunkebe, kanuena nunmona; kanuena bamanye mua kulua kungikala." 
John7:35 Bena Yuda bakakonkangana ne, Muntu eu neaye, kudi kunyi kutudi katu! bamanye mua kumumona? Neaye kudi bena tshimuangi munkatshi mua Bena Gelika, neayishe Bena Gelika, anyi?" 
John7:36 Edi ndî kai diakambeye ne, Nenunkebe, kanuena nunmona; kanuena bamanye mua kulua kungikala?" 
John7:37 Hakalua dituku dia kunshikidilu dia disanka, diakadi dituku dinene, Yesu wakimana, wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Bikala muntu ne nyota, alue kundi, anue." 
John7:38 Misulu ya mai a muoyo nebatuke munda mua wangitabusha, bu muakamba Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
John7:39 Yeye wakadi Wamba bua Nyuma wangatabo kudi bakumuitabusha; Nyuma kakadi muanze kulua, bua Yesu kakanza kutumbishibua." 
John7:40 Bantu bakuabo, hakunvuabo mei â, bakamba ne, Bulelela, yeye udi muprofete au wa Nzambi." 
John7:41 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Yeye udi Kilisto. Kadi bakuabo bakakonka ne, Ahu Kilisto udi ufuma mu Galela, anyi?" 
John7:42 Mukanda wa Nzambi kawena wamba ne, Kilisto neikale kankanunuina ka Davidi, neafume ku Beteleheme, kuakadi Davidi, anyi?" 
John7:43 Ditahuluka diakadiku munkatshi mua bantu bua bualu buandi. 
John7:44 Bakuabo bakasua kumukuata, kadi muntu kakamulenga tshianza." 
John7:45 Tuhalai tuakahingana kudi bakuidi banene ne Bafalese; bobo bakabakonka ne, Munyi kanuakulua nʼandi?" 
John7:46 Tuhalai tuakabakudimuna ne, Kakuakadi muntu kale tô ne katataka wakakula bu mudi muntu eu wakula." 
John7:47 Bafalese bakabandamuna ne, Nuenu kabidi, bakanuhambuisha, anyi?" 
John7:48 Bantu betu banene anyi Bafalese bakumuitabusha, anyi?" 
John7:49 Bantu ba tshisumbu etshi badi kabai bamanye mikenshi ya Nzambi badi bedibua mulau. 
John7:50 Nikodemo, muntu wakalua kudiye diambedi, umue wabo wa Bafalese, wakabambila ne," 
John7:51 Mukenshi wetu udi ukosa tshilumbu tshia muntu diambedi kabai banze kunvua dî diandi, kabai banze kumanya bualu buakuenzeye, anyi?" 
John7:52 Bakamukonka ne, Wewe kabidi udi muena Galela, anyi? Ujingulule, Umanye ne, Muprofete katu watuma ku Galela. [" 
John7:53 Muntu ne muntu wakahingana kuandi. 
John8:1 Kadi Yesu wakaya ku mukuna wa Oleve. 
John8:2 Dinda yeye wakalua mu ntempelo kabidi, bantu bonso bakalua kudiye; wakashikama, wakabayisha:" 
John8:3 Bafundi ne Bafalese bakalua ne mukashi mukuata wenda masandi; hakamutekabo munkatshi," 
John8:4 bakambila Yesu ne, Muyishi, bakukuata mukashi eu wenda masandi, mpa bualu mene." 
John8:5 Mu mikenshi ya Mose yeye wakutuambila ne, Nukume bantu badi benza nunku mabue; ahu wewe udi umuamba tshinyi?" 
John8:6 Bakamba nunku, bamuteta munda bua kuikalabo ne tshibandidi tshia kumubanda batshi. Kadi Yesu wakazonzama, wakadi ufunda hanshi ne munu wandi." 
John8:7 Kadi hakadibo bamukonkakonka, wakabanduluka, wakabambila ne, Udi munkatshi muenu udi kai ne bualu bubi, adianjile kumuela dibue." 
John8:8 Wakazonzama kabidi, wakafunda hanshi ne munu wandi." 
John8:9 Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakumuka ku umue ku umue balondangane, babange ku wakadi mubatambe bukulu tô ne ku wa kunshikidilu; bakashîa Yesu nkayandi ne mukashi hankatshi hakadiye muimane." 
John8:10 Yesu wakabanduluka, wakakonka mukashi ne, Mukashiana, badi hanyi? Kakuena udi mukubande, anyi?" 
John8:11 Yeye wakamba ne, Mukelenge, kakuena muntu. Yesu wakamba ne, Meme kabidi tshiena nkubanda, ya biebe, kuenji bualu bubi kabidi tshiendelele.]" 
John8:12 Yesu wakabambila kabidi ne, Ndi munya wa ba ha buloba; wandonda kena wendakana mu mîdima, kadi neikale ne munya wa muoyo." 
John8:13 Ahu Bafalese bakamuambila ne, Wewe udi udiamba, dî diebe kadiena dilelela." 
John8:14 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Binadiamba, dî dianyi didi dilelela; bualu bua ndi mumanye kunakufuma ne kunaya; kadi nuenu kanuena bamanye kunakufuma ne kunaya." 
John8:15 Nuenu nudi nulumbuluisha bantu bu mudi mubidi, meme tshiena ndumbuluisha muntu." 
John8:16 Kadi bialumbuluisha muntu, bulumbuluishi buanyi budi bulelela; bualu bua meme tshiena nkayanyi, meme ndiku ne Tatu wakuntuma." 
John8:17 Ne mu mikenshi yenu bakafunda ne, Dî dia bantu babidi didi dilelela." 
John8:18 Meme ndi ndiamba, ne Tatu wakuntuma udi untamba." 
John8:19 Bakamukonka ne, Tatu webe udi hanyi? Yesu wakandamuna ne, Kanuena banmanye, kanuena bamanye Tatu wanyi; bu nuenu banmanye meme, nuakadi kumanya Tatu wanyi kabidi." 
John8:20 Yeye wakamba mei â mu muaba wa tshibutshilu tshia mu ntempelo, hakadiye uyisha bantu mu ntempelo; muntu kakamukuata, bualu bua diba diandi kadiakadi dianze kulua." 
John8:21 Yeye wakabambila kabidi ne, Nengumuke bianyi, nenunkebe, nenufue mu bubi buenu; kanuena bamanye mua kulua kunaya." 
John8:22 Bena Yuda bakakonka ne, Yeye udi wamba ne, Kanuena bamanye mua kulua kunaya, neadishihe, anyi?" 
John8:23 Yeye wakabambila ne, Nuenu nuakufuma hanshi, meme nakufuma mulu; nuenu nudi ba ha buloba ebu, meme tshiena wa ha buloba ebu." 
John8:24 Ebu mbualu bunakunuambila ne, Nenufue mu mibi yenu; binuikala kanui nungitabusha, nenufue mu mibi yenu." 
John8:25 Bakamukonka ne, Wewe nganyi? Yesu wakabambila ne, Ndi yeye unakunuambila ku tshibangidilu tô ne katataka." 
John8:26 Ndi ne malu a bungi a kuamba bualu buenu ne a kunulumbuluisha; kadi wakuntuma udi mulelela; ndi ngambila ba ha buloba malu anakusua kudiye. 
John8:27 Kabakamanya ne, Yeye udi utuambila bualu bua Tatu." 
John8:28 Yesu wakamba ne, Hanuabisha Muana wa muntu, nenumanye ne, Meme nyeye, ne tshitu ngadienzela bualu, kadi ntu ngamba anu malu akunyisha Tatu." 
John8:29 Wakuntuma udi neanyi; kakunshia nkayanyi, bualu bua matuku onso ntu ngenza malu adi amusankisha." 
John8:30 Hakambeye mei â, ba bungi bakamuitabusha." 
John8:31 Yesu wakambila Bena Yuda bakuitabusha dî diandi ne, Binuashala mu di dianyi, nudi bayidi banyi bulelela;" 
John8:32 nenumanye kabidi bualu bulelela, ne bualu bulelela nebunuhe budishikaminyi." 
John8:33 Bakamukudimuna ne, Tudi bana ba Abalahama, katuakadi bahika ba muntu tô ne katataka; udi wamba ne, Nebanuhe budishikaminyi, munyi?" 
John8:34 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muntu yonso utu wenza bubi udi muhika wa bubi." 
John8:35 Muhika kena ushikama mu nsubu wa nfumu wandi tshiendelele; muana udi ushikamamu tshiendelele. 
John8:36 Bianuha Muana budishikaminyi, nenuikale badishikamine bulelela." 
John8:37 Ndi mumanye ne, Nudi bana ba Abalahama; kadi nudi nukeba mua kunshiha, bua di dianyi kadiena ne muaba munda muenu." 
John8:38 Meme ntu ngamba malu anakutangila kudi Tatu wanyi, nuenu kabidi nutu nuenza malu anuakunvua kudi tatu wenu." 
John8:39 Bakamukudimuna ne, Abalahama ntatu wetu, Yesu wakabambila ne, Bu nuenu bikale bana ba Abalahama, nuakadi kuenza bienzedi bia Abalahama." 
John8:40 Kadi katataka nudi nukeba mua kunshiha, meme muntu wakunuambila bualu bulelela bunakunvua kudi Nzambi; Abalahama kakenza nunku." 
John8:41 Nutu nuenza bienzedi bia tatu wenu. Bakamuambila kabidi ne, Katuena baledibue mu masandi; tudi ne Tatu umue, Nzambi mene." 
John8:42 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bu Nzambi muikale Tatu wenu, nuakadi kunsua meme; bualu bua nakufuma kudi Nzambi, ndi mulueku; tshiakudivuila, kadi yeye wakuntuma." 
John8:43 Munyi kanuena numanya mundi ngamba? Bualu bua kanuena bamanye mua kunvua dî dianyi," 
John8:44 Nuenu nudi bana ba diabolo, tatu wenu, nudi basue kuenza bu mudi nkuka ya tatu wenu. Ku tshibangidilu yeye wakadi mushihianganyi, katu wimana mu bualu bulelela, bua yeye kena ne bualu bulelela munda muandi. Hambeye dî dia mashimi, udi wamba malu andi mene; bua yeye udi muena mashimi, ne udi tatu wau." 
John8:45 Kadî bualu bua meme ntu ngamba bualu bulelela, kanuena nungitabusha." 
John8:46 Nganyi wenu udi umpisha bua bualu bubi? Bingamba bualu bulelela, munyi kanuena nungitabusha?" 
John8:47 Wa Nzambi udi unvua mei a Nzambi; ebu mbualu bunudi kanui nûnvuila, bua kanuena ba Nzambi." 
John8:48 Bena Yuda bakamuebesha ne, Katuena tuamba bulelela ne, Wewe udi Muena Samalea, udi ne demon munda, anyi?" 
John8:49 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Tshiena ne demon munda, ndi ntumbisha Tatu wanyi, nuenu nudi numpetula." 
John8:50 Kadi meme tshiena nkeba butumbi buanyi; wabukeba udihu, yeye nealumbuluishe bantu." 
John8:51 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Biatumikila muntu dî dianyi, yeye kena umona lufu tô tshiendelele." 
John8:52 Bena Yuda bakamuambila ne, Tudi bamanye katataka ne, Wewe udi ne demon munda. Abalahama wakafua ne baprofete, kadi wewe udi wamba ne, Biatumikila muntu dî dianyi, kena ulabula lufu tô tshiendelele." 
John8:53 Udi mutambe tatu wetu Abalahama wakafua, anyi? Baprofete kabidi bakafua, wewe udi udivuisha nganyi?" 
John8:54 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Binaditumbisha, butumbi buanyi budi tshianana; udi untumbisha nTatu wanyi; nuenu nudi numuamba ne, Yeye udi Nzambi wetu;" 
John8:55 nuenu kanuakumumanya, kadi meme ndi mumumanye; binamba ne, Tshiena mumumanye, nengikale muena mashimi bu nuenu; meme ndi mumumanye, ntu ngatumikila dî diandi." 
John8:56 Tatu wenu Abalahama wakatamba kusanka bua kutangila dituku dianyi; wakadimona, wakasanka." 
John8:57 Bena Yuda bakamukonka ne, Bidimu biebe kabiena bikumbane makumi atanu, wewe wakumona Abalahama, anyi?" 
John8:58 Yesu wakabambila ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Diambedi kabai banze kulela Abalahama, meme ndiku." 
John8:59 Bua bualu ebu bakangula mabue bua kumuela; kadi Yesu wakasokoma, wakumuka mu ntempelo." 
John9:1 Hakadiye uhita, wakamona muntu mulela mufofo." 
John9:2 Bayidi bandi bakamukonka ne, Labi, wakuenza bualu bubi nganyi, muntu eu, anyi bamuledi, bua yeye udi muledibue mufofo?" 
John9:3 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Kabakuenza bualu bubi kudi muntu eu anyi kudi bamuledi; bualu ebu buakulua bua malu adi Nzambi wenza amueneke bualu bua muntu au." 
John9:4 Butudi nʼabu mbua kuenza malu a wakuntuma hatshidi munya; butuku bulualua budi muntu kai mumanye mua kuenza mudimu. 
John9:5 Hantshidi ha buloba, ndi munya wa ba ha buloba." 
John9:6 Hakambeye edi, wakatuila lute hanshi, wakasohakanya nʼalu buloba, wakamulababu ku mesu," 
John9:7 wakamuambila ne, Ya wowe mu tshina tshia mai a kuowa dina diatshi Siloama (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Mutumibue). Wakaya biandi, wakowa, wakahingana mutabale." 
John9:8 Bena kuabo ne bakamumona diambedi ne, Mulombi, bakakonka ne, Eu kanyeye wakadi ushikama ulomba, anyi?" 
John9:9 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Nyeye; bakuabo ne, Nasha, kadi udi mumufuane. Kadi yeye wakamba ne, Ndi yeye mene." 
John9:10 Bakamuebesha ne, Mesu ebe adi matabale munyi?" 
John9:11 Yeye wakabakudimuna ne, Muntu udibo babikila ne, Yesu, wakasohakanya buloba, wakabundaba ku mesu, wakangambila ne, Ya ku Siloama, wowe; nunku nakuya, nakuowa, nakutabala." 
John9:12 Bakamukonka ne, Yeye udi hanyi? Wakamba ne, Tshiena mumanye." 
John9:13 Bakalua ne wakadi mufofo kudi Bafalese. 
John9:14 Dituku diakasohakanya Yesu buloba, diakabululeye mesu andi diakadi dia Lumingu lua Bayuda." 
John9:15 Bafalese kabidi bakamukonka ne, Wakutabala munyi? Wakabambila ne, Yeye wakulaba buloba busohakanya ku mesu anyi, nakuowa, nakashala." 
John9:16 Bafalese bakuabo bakamba ne, Muntu eu kena mufume kudi Nzambi, bualu bua yeye katu wajila dituku dia Lumingu. Kadi bakuabo bakakonka ne, Muntu udi mubi udi mumanye mua kuenza bimanyinu ebi munyi? Nunku bakatahuluka munkatshi muabo." 
John9:17 Bakakonka muntu wakadi mufofo kabidi ne, Yeye wakutabasha mesu ebe, ahu wewe udi umuamba munyi? Wakabakudimuna ne, Yeye udi muprofete." 
John9:18 Bena Yuda kabakitabusha ne yeye wakadi mufofo ne wakutabala, anu hakabikilabo baledi ba wakatabala," 
John9:19 bakabakonka ne, Eu udi muana wenu unudi nuamba ne, Mulela mufofo, anyi? Wakutabala katataka munyi?" 
John9:20 Bamuledi bakandamuna ne, Tudi bamanye ne, Eu udi muana wetu, wakadi mulela mufofo;" 
John9:21 kadi katuena bamanye muakutabaleye katataka, katuena bamanye wakumutabasha mesu; numukonke; yeye nmuntu mukole; neadiambile." 
John9:22 Bamuledi bakamba nunku, bua bakadi batshina Bena Yuda; Bena Yuda bakadi bamane kusangisha dî ne, Wamujukula ne, Kilisto, nebamumushe mu nsunagoga." 
John9:23 Ebu mbualu buakamba bamuledi ne, Yeye nmuntu mukole, numukonke yeye." 
John9:24 Bakabikila wakadi mulela mufofo tshiakabidi, bakamuambila ne, Utumbishe Nzambi; iudi bamanye ne muntu eu udi mubi." 
John9:25 Yeye wakabakudimuna ne, Ne udi muntu mubi, tshiena mumanye; udi mumanye anu bualu bumue ne, Nakadi mufofo, katataka ndi mona." 
John9:26 Bakamukonka ne, Yeye wakakuenzela tshinyi? Wakatabasha mesu ebe munyi?" 
John9:27 Wakabakudimuna ne, Nakunuambila katataka, kanuena bunvue; nudi nusuila kunvua tshiakabidi tshinyi? Nudi basue kulua bayidi bandi, anyi?" 
John9:28 Bakamutandisha ne, Wewe udi muyidi wandi, tuetu tudi bayidi ba Mose." 
John9:29 Tudi bamanye ne, Nzambi wakakula ne Mose, kadi muntu eu, katuena bamanye kuakufumeye." 
John9:30 Yeye wakabakudimuna ne, Ahu ebu mbualu bua kukema, bua nuenu kanuena bamanye kuakafumeye, yeye wakatabasha mesu anyi." 
John9:31 Tudi bamanye ne, Nzambi kena unvua dî dia bantu babi; watendelela Nzambi, wenza bu mudiye musue, neunvue dî diandi." 
John9:32 Ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba tô ne katataka kabena banze kunvua bualu bua muntu utabasha mesu a muntu mulela mufofo. 
John9:33 Bu muntu eu kai mufume kudi Nzambi, kakadi kumanya mua kuenza bualu." 
John9:34 Bakamukudimuna ne, Wakuledibua mu malu mabi bulelela, wewe udi utuyisha tuetu, anyi? Bakamuihata." 
John9:35 Yesu wakunvua ne, Bakumuihata. Hakamumoneye, wakamukonka ne, Udi witabusha Muana wa Nzambi, anyi?" 
John9:36 Wakamukudimuna ne, Mukelenge, yeye udi nganyi, nmuitabushe?" 
John9:37 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Wewe wakumumona, udi wakula nʼebe nyeye mene." 
John9:38 Muntu au wakamba ne, Mukelenge, ndi ngitabusha. Wakamukukuila." 
John9:39 Yesu wakamba ne, Nakuluila ha buloba bua kulumbuluisha bantu, badi kabai bamona bamone, badi bamona balue bafofo." 
John9:40 Bafalese bakuabo bakadi nʼandi, hakunvuabo mei â, bakamukonka ne, Tuetu kabidi, tudi bafofo, anyi?" 
John9:41 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Bu nuenu bikale bafofo, kanuakadi kuikala ne bubi; kadi katataka nudi nudiamba ne, Tudi tumona; bubi buenu budi bushala." 
John10:1 Bulelela, bulelela, udi nuambila ne, Udi kai ubuelela ku mbelu wa luhangu lua mikoko, udi ubandila kukuabo, yeye udi muibi ne munyengi:" 
John10:2 kadi wabuelela ku mbelu udi mulami wa mikoko. 
John10:3 Mulami wa ku mbelu udi umunzuluila; mikoko idi yunvua dî diandi; udi Ubikila mikoko yandi ku mena ai, udi uhatuka wilombola." 
John10:4 Hashikisheye kumusha yandi yonso, udi uya ku mpala kuai, mikoko idi imulonda, bualu bua idi mimanye dî diandi." 
John10:5 Kadi kayena ilonda muntu wa bende, neimunyeme, bualu bua kayena mimanye dî dia bantu ba bende." 
John10:6 Yesu wakabelela lusumuinu elu; kadi kabakajingulula malu akabambileye. 
John10:7 Yesu wakabambila kabidi ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Meme ndi mushiku wa mbelu wa mikoko." 
John10:8 Bonso bakalua ku mpala kuanyi badi bibi ne banyengi; kadi mikoko kayakunvua dî diabo. 
John10:9 Meme ndi mushiku wa mbelu; wabuela kundi, neasungidibue, neabuele, neahatuke, neahete mashinde." 
John10:10 Muibi udi uluila anu bua kuiba ne bua kushiha ne bua kubutula; meme nakuluila bua bantu bahete muoyo, bauhete muvule." 
John10:11 Ndi mulami muimpe wa mikoko; mulami muimpe udi ufuila mikoko. 
John10:12 Muena mudimu wa difutu, kai mulami wa mikoko mene, kai muena mikoko, hamoneye nkashama ulua, udi ushîa mikoko, udi unyema, nkashama udi wikuata, udi witangadisha;" 
John10:13 yeye udi unyema bualu bua yeye udi muena mudimu wa difutu, mikoko kayena bu bualu kudiye." 
John10:14 Ndi mulami muimpe wa mikoko; ndi mumanye yanyi, yanyi idi minmanye," 
John10:15 bu mudi Tatu munmanye, meme kabidi ndi mumanye Tatu: ndi nfuila mikoko." 
John10:16 Ndi ne mikoko mikuabo idi kayi ya mu luhangu elu; bundi nʼabu mbua kulua nʼai, neyunvue dî dianyi; neilue tshisumbu tshimue, ne mulami umue." 
John10:17 Ebu mbualu budi Tatu wanyi mutuile, ndi nteka muoyo wanyi hanshi bua meme kûangata kabidi." 
John10:18 Kakuena mukuabo udi ûnyenga, ndi nditekelau hanshi nkayanyi. Ndi ne bukole bua kuteka hanshi, ndi ne bukole bua kûangata kabidi. Nakuangata mukenshi eu kudi Tatu wanyi." 
John10:19 Ditahuluka diakalua kabidi munkatshi mua Bena Yuda bua mei â. 
John10:20 Ba bungi bakamba ne, Udi ne demon munda, udi muhale; nudi nunvuila dî diandi tshinyi?" 
John10:21 Bakuabo bakamba ne, Â kêna mei a muntu mukuatshike ne demon. Demon udi mumanye mua kutabasha mesu a bafofo, anyi?" 
John10:22 Disanka dia dijidila dia ntempelo diakadi ku Yelushalema; 
John10:23 yakadi ngondo ya mashika; Yesu wakadi wendakana mu ntempelo mu mbalanda wakadi muidika ne, Wa Solomo." 
John10:24 Bena Yuda bakamunguila, bakamukonka ne, Wewe neutushie ne mioyo yetu kulu-kulu musangu bûle munyi? Biwikala Kilisto, utuambile hatoke." 
John10:25 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Nakunuambila, kadi kanuena nuitabusha; malu antshidi ngenza mu dina dia Tatu wanyi adi angamba." 
John10:26 Kadi nuenu kanuena nuitabusha, bualu bua kanuena ba mu mikoko yanyi." 
John10:27 Mikoko yanyi idi yunvua dî dianyi, ndi muimanye, idi indonda;" 
John10:28 ndi nyiha muoyo wa tshiendelele; kayena ifua tshiendelele, kakuena mukuabo udi winyenga mu tshianza tshianyi." 
John10:29 Tatu wakuimpa udi mutambe bonso bukole, kakuena wainyenga mu tshianza tshia Tatu." 
John10:30 Meme ne Tatu tudi bamue. 
John10:31 Bena Yuda bakamema mabue kabidi bua kumuela. 
John10:32 Yesu wakabandamuna ne, Nakunulesha malu mimpe a bungi a Tatu anakuenza, nudi nungelela mabue bua muanda kai unakuenza?" 
John10:33 Bena Yuda bakamukudimuna ne, Katuena tukuelela mabue bua muanda muimpe uwakuenza, anu bua bihendu biudi uhenda nʼabi Nzambi, ne bua wewe muntu udi udivuisha Nzambi." 
John10:34 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Kabena bafunde mu mikenshi yenu ne, Nakuamba ne, Nuenu nudi banzambi, anyi?" 
John10:35 Bikaleye mubabikile ne banzambi, aba bakatuminabo dî dia Nzambi (ne dî dia mu Mukanda wa Nzambi kadiena mua kumushibua)," 
John10:36 bua yeye wakajidilabo kudi Nzambi ne wakatumeye ha buloba, munyi nudi nuamba ne, Udi uhenda Nzambi, bua nakuamba ne, Ndi Muana wa Nzambi?" 
John10:37 Bingikala tshî ngenza malu a Tatu wanyi, kanuitabushi dî dianyi." 
John10:38 Kadi bingikala ngenza malu au, nasha numbenga meme, nuitabushe malu au; bua nuenu kumanya ne kujingulula ne, Tatu udi munda muanyi, ne meme ndi munda mua Tatu." 
John10:39 Bakakeba kabidi mua kumukuata, kadi yeye wakumuka mu bianza biabo." 
John10:40 Wakaya kabidi dishia dia Yadene ku muaba wakadi Yone ubatiza bantu diambedi, wakashikamaku." 
John10:41 Ba bungi bakatua kudiye; bakamba ne, Bulelela, Yone kakenza tshimanyinu, kadi malu onso akamba Yone bua muntu eu akadi malelela." 
John10:42 Ba bungi bakamuitabushaku. 
John11:1 Muntu wakadiku, wakadi usama, dina diandi Lazalo wa mu Betania, musoko wa Malia ne muanʼabo Mâta." 
John11:2 Au Malia wakela Mukelenge mananashi, wakamukuhula makasa andi ne nsuki, muanʼabo Lazalo nguakadi usama." 
John11:3 Bana babo ba bakashi bakatumina Yesu dî ne, Mukelenge, ûdi musue udi usama." 
John11:4 Hakunvua Yesu dî edi, wakamba ne, Edi kadiena disama dia lufu, kadi didi bualu bua butumbi bua Nzambi ne bua Muana wa Nzambi kutumbishibueye." 
John11:5 Yesu wakasua Mâta, ne muanʼabo wa bakashi, ne Lazalo." 
John11:6 Hakunvueye bualu bua disama diandi, wakashikama kuakadiye matuku abidi." 
John11:7 Hashishe wakambila bayidi bandi ne, Tuyai mu Yudaya kabidi." 
John11:8 Bayidi bakamuambila ne, Labi, Bena Yuda bakadi bakeba kukukuma mabue anu katataka, wewe uyayaku kabidi, anyi?" 
John11:9 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Munya mujima kawena ne bituha bia diba dikumi ne bibidi, anyi? Biendakana muntu mu munya, yeye kena ulenduka, bua yeye udi utangila munya wa buloba ebu." 
John11:10 Kadi biendakana muntu mu butuku, udi ulenduka, bua munya kawena munda muandi." 
John11:11 Hakambeye malu â, wakabambila ne, Mulunda wetu Lazalo udi mulale tulu; kadi ndi nya kumubisha mu tulu." 
John11:12 Bayidi bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, bikaleye mulale tulu, neasangale." 
John11:13 Yesu wakadi wamba bua lufu luandi; kadi bobo bakadi bela meshi ne, Budiye wamba anu bua tulu." 
John11:14 Hashishe Yesu wakabajukuila ne, Lazalo udi mufue;" 
John11:15 ne ndi nsanka bua bualu buenu bualu bua tshiakadiku, bua nuenu kungitabusha; tuyai kudiye." 
John11:16 Toma, udibo babikila ne, Didumo, wakambila bayidi nʼandi ne, Tuyai kabidi, bua tuetu tufue nʼandi." 
John11:17 Hakalua Yesu, wakamusangana mumane kulala mu lukita matuku anai." 
John11:18 Betania wakadi hehi ne Yelushalema, ntanta bu ya kilometa isatu;" 
John11:19 Bena Yuda ba bungi bakadi balue kudi Mâta ne Malia bua kubasamba bua muanʼabo. 
John11:20 Hakunvua Mâta ne, Yesu ulualua, wakaya kumuakidila; kadi Malia wakashala mushikame mu nsubu." 
John11:21 Mâta wakambila Yesu ne, Mukelenge, bu wewe muikale kunoko, muanʼetu kakadi kufua." 
John11:22 Ne katataka mene ndi mumanye ne, Tshionso tshiwalomba Nzambi, Nzambi neakuhetshi." 
John11:23 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Muanʼenu neabike kabidi." 
John11:24 Mâta wakamuambila ne, Ndi mumanye ne, Yeye neabike dituku dia kunshikidilu diabika bantu bonso kabidi." 
John11:25 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Meme ndi bianyi dibisha, ndi bianyi muoyo; udi ungitabusha, nasha biafueye, neikale ne muoyo kabidi;" 
John11:26 muntu yonso udi ne muoyo, udi ungitabusha, kena ufua tshiendelele. Wewe udi witabusha dî edi, anyi?" 
John11:27 Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, Mukelenge, nakuitabusha ne, Wewe udi Kilisto, Muana wa Nzambi, nyeye ulualua ha buloba." 
John11:28 Hakambeye nunku, wakaya, wakabikila muanʼabo Malia mu busokoko, wakamuambila ne, Muyishi wakulua, udi ukubikila." 
John11:29 Hakunvueye dî edi, wakabika lubilu, wakaya kudiye." 
John11:30 Yesu kakanza kulua mu musoko, wakatshidi kuakasangila ngandi Mâta." 
John11:31 Bena Yuda bakadi nʼandi mu nsubu bamusamba, hakamonabo Malia ubika lubilu uluhuka, bakamulonda bamanye ne, Yeye Uyaya ku lukita bua kudilaku." 
John11:32 Hakalua Malia kudi Yesu, hakamumoneye, wakahonena ku makasa andi, wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, bu wewe muikale kunoko, muanʼetu kakadi kufua." 
John11:33 Hakamutangila Yesu udila ne Bena Yuda bakalua nʼandi badila, tshishi tshiakûla munda muandi tente, mubidi wandi wakakanka," 
John11:34 wakakonka ne, Nuakumujika kudi kunyi? Bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, lua umone." 
John11:35 Yesu wakashikunka. 
John11:36 Bena Yuda bakamba ne, Tangilai muakumusueye." 
John11:37 Kadi bakuabo bakamba ne, Muntu eu wakatabasha mesu a wakadi mufofo, kakamanya mua kusungila muntu eu, kafu biandi, munyi?" 
John11:38 Yesu wakalua ku lukita ne tshishi tshiule munda muandi tente kabidi. Luakadi lua lubuebue, dibue diakadi dibuikilaku." 
John11:39 Yesu wakamba ne, Umushai dibue. Kadi Mâta, muanʼabo ne mufue wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, yeye ukadi ununka katataka, ukadimu matuku anai." 
John11:40 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Tshiakukuambila ne, Biwitabusha, neumone butumbi bua Nzambi, anyi?" 
John11:41 Bakumusha dibue. Yesu wakabandisha mesu mulu, wakamba ne, Tatu, ndi nkusakidila bua wewe wakunvua dî dianyi." 
John11:42 Nakumanya ne, Wewe udi unvua mei anyi matuku onso; kadi nakuamba dî edi bualu bua bantu badi bimane banyunguluke bitabushe ne, Wewe udi muntume." 
John11:43 Hakambeye nunku, wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Lazalo, luhuka." 
John11:44 Wakadi mufue wakaluhuka, munyengela bilulu ku bianza ne ku makasa. Ku mpala kuandi kuakadi kunyengela tshitambala. Yesu wakabambila ne, Numujingulule, aye biandi." 
John11:45 Bena Yuda ba bungi, bakadi balue kudi Malia, bakamuitabusha, hakamonabo bualu buakenzeye." 
John11:46 Kadi bakuabo bakaya kudi Bafalese, bakabambila malu akenza Yesu." 
John11:47 Nunku bakuidi banene ne Bafalese bakadisangisha mu tshifufu, bakakonkangana ne, Muntu eu udi wenza bimanyinu bia bungi, neluenze tshinyi?" 
John11:48 Bituamulekela hatuhu, bantu bonso nebamuitabushe; Bena Lomo nebalue, nebanyenge muaba wetu ne tshisamba tshietu." 
John11:49 Kadi umue wabo, dina diandi Kayafa, wakadi ha mutu ha bakuabo tshidimu atshi, wakabambila ne, Nuenu kanuena bamanye bualu," 
John11:50 kanuena nuela meshi ne, Mbualu buakane kunudi bua muntu umue afuile bantu, ne tshisamba tshionso katshifu." 
John11:51 Yeye kakadiambila dî edi; kadi bualu bua yeye wakadi ha mutu ha bakuidi tshidimu atshi, wakamba bualu buakadi kabui buanze kulua ne, Yesu neafuile tshisamba tshietu;" 
John11:52 yeye kakafuila anu tshisamba tshimue, kadi wakafuila bua kusangisha mu tshisumbu tshimue bana ba Nzambi bakadi batangadike." 
John11:53 Ku dituku adi tô bakadi basangisha dî diabo bua kumushiha. 
John11:54 Bua bualu ebu Yesu kakendakana munkatshi mua Bena Yuda kabidi; wakumukaku, wakaya mu luseke luakadi hehi ne tshihela, ku musoko dina diau Efelayima; wakalalaku ne bayidi." 
John11:55 Disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa dia Bena Yuda diakadi ha buihi; ba bungi bakumuka mu nseke yabo, bakaya ku Yelushalema diambedi Kuhita kua Yehowa kakui buanze kufika, bua kudiuvuabo." 
John11:56 Bakadi bakeba Yesu; hakadibo bimane mu ntempelo, bakakonkangana ne, Nudi nuelangana meshi munyi? Kena ulua ku disanka edi, anyi?" 
John11:57 Bakuidi banene ne Bafalese bakamana kuela mukenshi ne, Hamanya muntu kudiye, aleshe kudiye, bamukuate." 
John12:1 Yesu wakalua ku Betania, kuakadi Lazalo wakabisheye ku lufu; wakalalaku matuku asambombo diambedi Kuhita kua Yehowa kakui kuanze kulua." 
John12:2 Bakamulambishila bidia bia butuku; Mata wakadi ubakuatshisha, kadi Lazalo wakadi mukuabo wa bakadi bashikame nʼandi ku mesa." 
John12:3 Malia wakangata tshituha tshia kilogama tshia mananashi a mushinga mutambe bukole, menza ne nâdo mulelela, wakamuela mananashi ku makasa a Yesu, wakâkuhula ne nsuki yandi, nsubu wakadi mule tente ne muhuya wa mananashi." 
John12:4 Kadi muyidi wandi mukuabo, Yudasa Isakaliote, wakadi ha kumutungila tshitungu, wakakonka ne," 
John12:5 Munyi kabakahana mananashi â ku ndenalio nkama isatu, bua kuha bantu bahele?" 
John12:6 Yeye kakamba dî edi bua wakadi ne bahele luse, anu bua wakadi muibi; bualu bua yeye wakadi ne tshibutshilu, wakadi udiangatshila biakadi bitekamu." 
John12:7 Yesu wakamba ne, Mulekelai, nuitabushe ne, Yeye wakadi mualame tô ne dianjikabo." 
John12:8 Nudi ne bahele matuku onso munkatshi muenu, kadi kanuena nʼanyi meme matuku onso." 
John12:9 Bantu ba bungi ba Bena Yuda bakunvua lumu ne, Yeye udi eku; kabakaluila bua Yesu nkayandi, bakaluila kabidi bua kutangila Lazalo wakabisheye ku lufu." 
John12:10 Kadi bakuidi banene bakasangisha dî diabo bua kushiha Lazalo kabidi," 
John12:11 bua Bena Yuda ba bungi bakadi bumuka bitabushila Yesu bua bualu buandi. 
John12:12 Hakatshiabu, bantu ba bungi bakadi balue ku disanka, hakunvuabo ne, Yesu ulualua ku Yelushalema," 
John12:13 bakangata malala a mabue, bakaluhuka bua kusangila nʼandi, bakela mbila ne, Hosana; udi ulua mu dina dia Mukelenge, Mukelenge wa Isalele mene, udi ne disanka." 
John12:14 Hakasangana Yesu muana wa mpunda, wakashikama ha nyima handi, bu muakafundabo ne," 
John12:15 Muana mukashi wa Siona, kutshinyi; mona, Mukelenge webe ulualua mushikame ha nyima ha muana wa mpunda." 
John12:16 Diambedi bayidi bandi kabakamanya malu â; kadi hakatumbishibua Yesu, bakavuluka malu akamufundabo ne akamuenzelabo." 
John12:17 Bantu tshisumbu tshinene bakadi nʼandi hakabikileye Lazalo mu lukita ne hakamubisheye ku lufu, bakadi bamanyishangana bualu ebu." 
John12:18 Bantu bakaya kusangila nʼandi, bua bakunvua bualu bua tshimanyinu etshi tshiakenzeye." 
John12:19 Bafalese bakambilangana ne, Nudi numona ne kanuena nuheta bualu; monai, ba ha buloba bonso badi bamulonda." 
John12:20 Bena Gelika bakuabo bakadi munkatshi mua bakaya kutendelela Nzambi ku disanka. 
John12:21 Bobo bakahia kudi Filipo, muena Bete-saîda wa Galela, bakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, tudi basue kutangila Yesu." 
John12:22 Filipo wakaya, wakambila Andele; Andele ne Filipo bakaya, bakambila Yesu." 
John12:23 Yesu wakabambila ne, Diba diakufika bua Muana wa muntu kutumbishibua." 
John12:24 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Bikala lutete lua blé kalui luhone mu buloba, kalui lufue, nelushale nkayalu; kadi biafualu, nelukuamishe maminu makuabo a bungi." 
John12:25 Wasua muoyo wandi neaujimishe; wikala ne muoyo wandi udiye nʼau ha buloba lukuna neaulame tô ne ku muoyo wa tshiendelele. 
John12:26 Biangenzela muntu mudimu, andonde; muena mudimi wanyi neikale kundi ngikala; biangenzela muntu mudimu, Tatu neamutumbishe." 
John12:27 Katataka mutshima wanyi udi utata, nengambe tshinyi? Tatu, unsungile mu dikenga dia diba edi. Kadi nakuluila ku diba edi bua bualu ebu." 
John12:28 Tatu, utumbishe dina diebe. Di diakafuma mu diulu ne, Nakaditumbisha, nenditumbishe kabidi." 
John12:29 Bantu bakadi bimane ha buihi bakunvua di edi, bakamba ne, Mukungulu wa nvula; bakuabo bakamba ne, Muanjelo wakuakula nʼandi." 
John12:30 Yesu wakandamuna ne, Dî edi kadiakuluila bua bualu buanyi, diakuluila bua bualu buenu." 
John12:31 Katataka dihila dia buloba ebu didiku; nebihate mukokeshi wa buloba ebu. 
John12:32 Ne meme, biambishabo ha buloba, nenkoke bantu bonso kundi." 
John12:33 Yeye wakamba nunku bua kubamanyisha bua lufu luafueye nʼalu. 
John12:34 Bantu bakamukonka ne, Tuakunvua mu mikenshi ya Nzambi ne, Kilisto udi wikala tshiendelele; ahu munyi mûdi wamba ne, Budi nʼabu Muana wa muntu mbua kubishibua? Eu Muana wa muntu nganyi?" 
John12:35 Yesu wakabambila ne, Nenuikale ne munya munkatshi muenu anu tshituha tshihi. Endakanai hanutshidi ne munya, butuku kabunuididi; wendakana mu mîdima kena mumanye kudiye uya." 
John12:36 Hanutshidi ne munya, nuitabushe munya, nunku nenuikale bana ba munya. Yesu wakamba malu â, wakumukaku, wakabasokoma." 
John12:37 Yeye wakenza bimanyinu bia bungi ku mesu kuabo, kadi kabakamuitabusha;" 
John12:38 bua dî diakamba muprofete Yeshaya dishike ne, Mukelenge, wakitabusha dî dietu nganyi? Diboko dia Mukelenge diakamueneka kudi nganyi?" 
John12:39 Bua bualu ebu kabakamanya mua kuitabusha, bua Yeshaya wakamba kabidi ne," 
John12:40 Yeye wakafofomesha mesu abo, wakakolesha mitshima yabo; Nunku mesu abo kâmonyi, kabamanyi mu mitshima yabo, Kabakudimunyi mitshima yabo Bua meme kubondaha." 
John12:41 Yeshaya wakamba malu â, bualu bua yeye wakatangila butumbi buandi; yeye wakamuamba nunku," 
John12:42 Kadi ba munkatshi mua bakokeshi mene ba bungi bakamuitabusha; kadi bualu bua Bafalese kabakajukula muanda eu, batshina ne, Nebatumbile mu nsunagoga." 
John12:43 Kusua kuabo kua butumbi bua bantu kuakatamba kusua kuabo kua butumbi bua Nzambi. 
John12:44 Yesu wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Udi ungitabusha meme kena ungitabusha meme nkayanyi, udi witabusha ne wakuntuma kabidi." 
John12:45 Udi untangila meme udi utangila ne wakuntuma kabidi. 
John12:46 Nakulua ha buloba bu munya, bua yonso wangitabusha kashadi biandi mu midima." 
John12:47 Biunvua muntu mei anyi, biahidieye kuênza, meme tshiena mulumbuluisha; bualu bua tshiakuluila bua kulumbuluisha ba ha buloba, nakuluila bua kubasungila." 
John12:48 Wampidia meme ne wahidia mei anyi udi ne mumulumbuluishi; dî diakamba nedimulumbuluishe dituku dia kunshikidilu. 
John12:49 Tshiena ndiambila nkayanyi; Tatu wakantuma wakampa mukenshi wa malu anamba ne bu munâmba. 
John12:50 Ndi mumanye ne, Mukenshi wandi udi muoyo wa tshiendelele; nunku malu andi ngamba ndi ngamba bu mudi Tatu ungambila." 
John13:1 Diambedi disanka dia Kuhita kua Yehowa kadi dianze kulua, Yesu wakamanya ne, Diba dianyi dia kumuka ha buloba bua kuya kudi Tatu diakufika, yeye mumane kusua bandi mene bakadi ha buloba, wakabasua tô ne kunshikidilu." 
John13:2 Hakadibo badia, diabolo mumane kubuesha munda mua Yudasa Isakaliote, muana wa Simona bualu bua kutungila Yesu tshitungu;" 
John13:3 hakamanya Yesu ne, Tatu wanyi wakufila bintu bionso mu bianza bianyi, nakufuma kudi Nzambi, nempingane kudi Nzambi;" 
John13:4 Yesu wakabika ku mesa, wakavula bivualu biandi, wakangata dituaya, wakadijingiladi." 
John13:5 Hashishe yeye wakela mai mu dilonga, wakabanga kuowesha bayidi makasa ne kuakuhula ne dituaya diakadiye mudijingile." 
John13:6 Nunku yeye wakalua kudi Simona Petelo. Petelo wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe udi ungowesha meme makasa, anyi?" 
John13:7 Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Wewe kuena mumanye bundi ngenza katataka, kudi neujingulule ku nyima." 
John13:8 Petelo wakamuambila ne, Nasha, tô ne tshiendelele wewe kungoweshi makasa. Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bingikala tshî mukuoweshe, kuena nʼanyi luseke lumue." 
John13:9 Simona Petelo wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, kungoweshi anu makasa anyi nkayau, ungoweshe kabidi bianza ne mutu." 
John13:10 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udi mumane kuowa hamʼbidi, udi anu ne bua kuowa ku makasa, mubidi wonso udi mutoke; nuenu nudi batoke, kadi buonso buenu kanuena nunku." 
John13:11 Yeye wakamanya wamutungila tshitungu; ebu mbualu buakuambidileye ne, Buonso buenu kanuena batoke." 
John13:12 Hakashikisheye kubowesha, wakambula bivualu biandi, wakashikama ku mesa kabidi, wakabakonka ne, Nudi bamanye bunakunuenzela?" 
John13:13 Nudi numbikila ne, Muyishi ne Mukelenge; nudi nuamba bimpe, bua meme ndi nunku." 
John13:14 Meme Mukelenge ne Muyishi, bingikala munuoweshe makasa, mbimpe nuenu nuoweshangane makasa." 
John13:15 Nakunuha tshifuanyikishi etshi bua nuenu kuenza bu munakunuenzela. 
John13:16 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Muhika kena mutambe nfumu wandi, wakutumibua kena mutambe wakumutuma." 
John13:17 Binuamanya malu â, nenuikale ne disanka binuâenza." 
John13:18 Tshiena nuamba buonso buenu; ndi mumanye banakusungula, kadi bualu ebu buakulua bua kushikisha dî diakafundabo ne, Utu wadia bidia bianyi wakuntua museba." 
John13:19 Katataka ndi mbanga kunuambila bualu budi kabui buanze kulua, bua, haluabu, nuenu nuitabushe ne, Meme nyeye." 
John13:20 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Witabusha unatuma neangitabushe meme; wangitabusha meme neitabushe wakuntuma." 
John13:21 Hakamba Yesu nunku, mutshima wandi wakanema bujitu, wakamba ne, Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Umue wenu neantungile tshitungu." 
John13:22 Bayidi bakatangilangana, bela mpata munda ne, Udiye wamba nganyi?" 
John13:23 Muyidi mukuabo, wakadi Yesu musue, wakadi nʼandi ku mesa, mumueyemene mu tshiadi." 
John13:24 Nunku Simona Petelo wakamuloba, wakamuambila ne, Utuambile udiye wamba." 
John13:25 Bualu bua yeye wakadi ha buihi nunku, wakeyema tshianyima mu tshiadi, wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, yeye nganyi?" 
John13:26 Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Unasabidila tshihesa tshia bidia unaha, nyeye. Nunku hakuvukuleye tshihesa, wakatshiangata, wakatshiha Yudasa, muana wa Simona Isakaliote." 
John13:27 Hakangateye tshihesa, Satana wakabuela munda muandi. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Enza bûdi wenza lukasa." 
John13:28 Kakuakadi muntu wa bakadi ku mesa wakamanya buakamuambidileye dî edi. 
John13:29 Bualu bua Yudasa wakadi ne tshibutshilu, bakuabo bakela meshi ne, Yesu wakamuambila ne, Usumbe bintu bitudi nʼabi bualu bua disanka, anyi ne, Uhe bahele tshintu." 
John13:30 Hakangateye tshihesa, wakumuka lukasa; buakadi butuku." 
John13:31 Hakumuka Yudasa, Yesu wakamba ne, Katataka Muana wa muntu udi mutumbishibue, ne Nzambi udi mutumbishibue bua bualu buandi;" 
John13:32 Nzambi neatumbishe Muana munda muandi kabidi, neamutumbishe lukasa." 
John13:33 Bana banyi bakese, nengikale nʼenu tshituha tshihi. Nenunkebe, hadi bu munakambila Bena Yuda ne, Kanuena bamanye mua kulua kunaya; katataka udi nuambila nuenu muomumue." 
John13:34 Ndi nuelela mukenshi muhia-muhia ne, Nusuangane; nusuangane bu munakunusua." 
John13:35 Bua bualu ebu bantu bonso nebamanye ne, Nudi bayidi banyi, binuasuangana nunku." 
John13:36 Simona Petelo wakamukonka ne, Neuye kudi kunyi? Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Katataka kuena mumanye mua kundonda kunaya, kadi hashishe neundonde." 
John13:37 Petelo wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, munyi mundi tshi mumanye mua kukulonda katataka? Nenkufuile." 
John13:38 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Wewe neunfuile, anyi? Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Tshitala katshi tshianze kusama, wewe neumpidie misangu isatu." 
John14:1 Mitshima yenu kaizakadi; nuitabushe Nzambi, nungitabushe meme kabidi." 
John14:2 Mu nsubu wa Tatu wanyi mudi miaba ya bungi ya kuikala; bu bualu ebu kabui bulelela, nakadi kunuambila; nenye kunulongoluela muaba." 
John14:3 Binaya ne binanulongoluela muaba, nempingane kabidi, nenuangate kundi meme muine, bua kundi ngikala, nuenu nenuikaleku kabidi." 
John14:4 Nudi bamanye nshila wa kundi nya. 
John14:5 Toma wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, katuena bamanye kuwaya, tudi bamanye nshila kudi kunyi?" 
John14:6 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Meme udi bianyi nshila ne bulelela ne muoyo; kakuena muntu udi ulua kudi Tatu, kai muanze kulua kundi diambedi." 
John14:7 Bu nuenu banmanye meme, nuakadi kumanya Tatu wanyi kabidi; nudi bamumanye katataka ne tshiendelele, nuakumumona." 
John14:8 Filipo wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, utuleshe Tatu, ebu mbualu butudi basue." 
John14:9 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Filipo, nakadi nʼenu musangu bulo nunku, wewe kuena nummanye, anyi? Wakuntangila meme wakatangila Tatu; abu munyi mûdi wamba ne, Utuleshe Tatu?" 
John14:10 Kuena witabusha ne, Meme ndi munda mua Tatu, Tatu udi munda muanyi, anyi? Tshiena ndiambila mei andi nuambila; Tatu udi muikale munda muanyi utu wenza malu andi." 
John14:11 Nungitabushe ne, Meme ndi munda mua Tatu, Tatu udi munda muanyi; binuikala kanui nuenza nunku, nungitabushile bua malu mene antshidi ngenza." 
John14:12 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Wangitabusha nenze biandi kabidi malu antshidi ngenza; nenze biandi malu adi mahite andi ngenza, bualu bua meme ndi nya kudi Tatu." 
John14:13 Nengenze malu onso anualomba mu dina dianyi, bua Tatu atumbishibue bua Muana." 
John14:14 Binualomba bualu buonso mu dina dianyi, nembuenze." 
John14:15 Binuansua, nenuenze mikenshi yanyi." 
John14:16 Nendombe Tatu, yeye neanuhe Musambi mukuabo, ikale nʼenu tshiendelele," 
John14:17 Nyuma wa bulelela mene udi ba ha buloba kabai bamanye mua kuangata, bua bobo kabena bamumona, kabena bamumanye; nuenu nudi bamumanye bua yeye utu wikala nʼenu, neikale munda muenu." 
John14:18 Tshiena nushîa bana ba nshîe, nempingane kunudi." 
John14:19 Tshituha tshihi ba ha buloba kabena bantangila kabidi; kadi nuenu nudi nuntangila; bualu bua meme ndi ne muoyo, muenu kabidi nenuikale ne muoyo." 
John14:20 Mu ditutu adi nenumanye ne, Meme ndi munda mua Tatu wanyi, nuenu nudi munda muanyi, meme ndi munda muenu." 
John14:21 Udi ne mikenshi yanyi, udi uyenza, ngudi munsue; Tatu wanyi neasue wansua, meme nemusue kabidi, nendimueneshe kudiye." 
John14:22 Yudasa (ka Isakaliote nasha) wakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, bualu kai buakulua buwadimuenesha kutudi, kui udimuenesha kudi ba ha buloba?" 
John14:23 Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Biansua muntu, nenze dî dianyi; Tatu wanyi neamusue, tuetu netulue kudiye, netuikale ngandi." 
John14:24 Udi kai munsue kena wenza mei anyi; dî dinudi nunvua kandianyi, ndia Tatu wakantuma." 
John14:25 Nakunuambila malu â hantshidi nʼenu. 
John14:26 Kadi Musambi, Nyuma Muimpe mene, watumabo kudi Tatu mu dina dianyi, yeye neanuyishe malu onso, neanuvuluishe mei onso anakunuambila." 
John14:27 Ndi nushila ditalala, ndi nuha ditalala dianyi; tshiena nuhadi bu mudi ba ha buloba banuhadi. Mitshima yenu kaizakadi, kaitshinyi." 
John14:28 Nuakunyua dî dinakunuambila ne, Ndi nya, nempingane kunudi. Bu nuenu bansue, nuakadi, kusanka, bualu bua meme ndi nya kudi Tatu, bua Tatu udi muntambe meme." 
John14:29 Nakunuambila bualu ebu diambedi kabui buanze kulua bua nuenu nuitabushe, haluabu." 
John14:30 Tshiena nuambila malu makuabo a bungi, bualu bua mukokeshi wa buloba ulualua, yeye kena nʼanyi bualu munda muanyi;" 
John14:31 kadi bua ba ha buloba bamanye ne, Ndi musue Tatu, ne bu muakampa Tatu mukenshi, nunku mundi ngenza. Bikai, tuye." 
John15:1 Meme ndi muonshi mimene mulelela wa mamuma a nvinyo, Tatu wanyi udi mulami wau." 
John15:2 Ditamba dianyi dionso didi kadî dikuama mamuma, yeye neadiumushe, kadi ditamba dionso didi dikuama mamuma yeye neadilengeshe bua kukuamadi mamuma makuabo." 
John15:3 Katataka nudi balengeshibue bualu bua dî dinakunuambila. 
John15:4 Nuenu nuikale munda muanyi, meme nengikale munda muenu. Bu mudi ditamba kadi dimanye mua kudikuamina mamuma, anu hikaladi ku muonshi mimene; nunku nuenu kabidi kanuena bamanye mua kukuama mamuma, binuikala kanui nushala munda muanyi." 
John15:5 Meme ndi muonshi munene, nuenu nudi matamba; wikala munda muanyi, meme muikale munda muandi, yeye neakuame mamuma a bungi; binuikala kanui nʼanyi, kanuena bamanye mua kuenza bualu." 
John15:6 Bikala muntu kai ushala munda muanyi, nebamumushe bu ditamba, neafube; badi bunguisha matamba, baêla mu kahia, adi ahla." 
John15:7 Binuikala munda muanyi, bikala mei anyi munda muenu, nulombe tshionso tshinuasua, nebanuenzeletshi." 
John15:8 Tatu wanyi udi utumbishibua mu bualu ebu ne, Nudi nukuama mamuma a bungi; nunku nenuikale bayidi banyi." 
John15:9 Nakunusua bu muakunsua Tatu, Shalai mu dinanga dianyi." 
John15:10 Binuatumikila mikenshi yanyi, nenushale mu dinanga dianyi, bu munakutumikila mikenshi ya Tatu wanyi, ne mundi nshala mu dinanga diandi." 
John15:11 Nakunuambila malu â bua disanka dianyi kuikaladi munda muenu, ne bua disanka dienu kukumbanadi." 
John15:12 Eu udi mukenshi wanyi ne, Nusuangane bu munakunusua." 
John15:13 Kakuena muntu udi ne dinanga didi ditambe edi, dia muntu udi ufuila balunda bandi." 
John15:14 Nenuikale balunda banyi, binuenza bu mundi nuambila." 
John15:15 Tshiena nubikila kabidi bahika; bualu bua muhika kena mumanye budi mukelenge wandi wenza; kadi nakunubikila balunda; bualu bua nakunumanyisha malu onso anakunvua kudi Tatu wanyi. 
John15:16 Nuenu kanuakunsungula, nakunusungula, nakunujadika bua nuenu kuya kukuama mamuma ne bua mamuma enu ikale tshiendelele, bua tshintu tshionso tshinualomba Tatu mu dina dianyi yeye anuhetshi." 
John15:17 Nakunuambila malu â bua nuenu kusuangana. 
John15:18 Bikala ba ha buloba nʼenu lukuna, nudi bamanye ne, Bakadi nʼanyi lukuna diambedi." 
John15:19 Bu nuenu bikale ba ha buloba, ba ha buloba bakadi kusua bantu babo; kadi bualu bua nuenu kanuena ba ha buloba, nakunusungulula mu ba ha buloba, nunku ba ha buloba badi nʼenu lukuna." 
John15:20 Nuvuluke dî dinakunuambila ne, Muhika kena mutambe nfumu wandi. Biankengeshabo, nebanukengeshe kabidi; bienzabo dî dianyi, nebenze dî dienu kabidi." 
John15:21 Nebanuenzele malu â onso bualu bua dina dianyi, bua bobo kabena bamanye wakuntuma." 
John15:22 Bu meme tshî mulue, tshî mubambile bualu, kabakadi kuikala ne bubi; kadi katataka kabena ne tshilayidilu tshia bubi buabo." 
John15:23 Udi nʼanyi lukuna udi ne Tatu wanyi kabidi lukuna. 
John15:24 Bu meme tshi muenze munkatshi muabo malu akadi muntu mukuabo kai muenze, bobo kabakadi kuikala ne bubi; kadi katataka bakuntangila ne Tatu wanyi, bakadi ne bubidi buetu lukuna." 
John15:25 Nunku bakushikisha dî diakadi difunda mu mikenshi yabo ne, Bakadi nʼanyi lukuna tshianana." 
John15:26 Kadi halua Musambi unanutumina, Nyuma wa bulelela mene mene, wafuma kudi Tatu, yeye neangambe;" 
John15:27 nuenu kabidi nudi nungamba, bualu bua nuakadi nʼanyi ku tshibangidilu tô ne katataka." 
John16:1 Nakunuambila malu â bua nuenu kanulenduki. 
John16:2 Nebanuhatule mu nsunagoga; bulelela, diba nedilue diela munushihi meshi ne, Ndi ngenzela Nzambi mudimu." 
John16:3 Nebenze malu â bualu bua kabakamanya Tatu, kabakanmanya meme kabidi." 
John16:4 Nakunuambila malu â bua nuenu kuavuluka, halua diba diau ne, Nakumana kunuambilau. Tshiakanuambila malu â ku tshibangidilu, bualu bua nakadi nʼenu." 
John16:5 Kadi katataka ndi nya kudi wakuntuma; kakuena umue wenu udi unkonka ne, Uyaya kudi kunyi?" 
John16:6 Bualu bua nakunuambila malu â, mitshima yenu idi miule tente ne kanyinganyinga." 
John16:7 Kadi ndi nuambila bulelela ne, Meme muye mbimpe bienu; bingikala tshî nya, Musambi kena ulua kunudi; kadi binaya, nenutumineye." 
John16:8 Halueye, neatuishe ba ha buloba bua bubi, ne bua buakane, ne bua dihila;" 
John16:9 bua bubi, bualu bua bobo kabena bangitabusha;" 
John16:10 bua buakane, bualu bua meme ndi nya kudi Tatu, kanuena nuntangila kabidi;" 
John16:11 bua dihila, bualu bua mukokeshi wa buloba ebu wakumana kuhila." 
John16:12 Ntshidi ne malu makuabo a bungi a kunuambila, kadi nuenu kanuena bamanye mua kuatuala katataka." 
John16:13 Kadi halua Nyuma wa bulelela, yeye neanulombole mu malu malelela onso; bua yeye kena udiambila, kadi neambe anu malu ûnvueye, neanuambile malu alualua." 
John16:14 Neantumbishe meme; bualu bua neangate malu anyi, neanuambileu." 
John16:15 Malu onso a Tatu ngânyi; ebu mbualu bunakuambila ne, Yeye neangate malu anyi, neanuambileu." 
John16:16 Haleha tshituha tshihi kanuena nuntangila, haleha tshituha tshihi kabidi nenuntangile." 
John16:17 Bayidi bandi bakuabo bakakonkangana ne, Edi ndî kai didiye utuambila ne, Haleha tshituha tshihi kanuena nuntangila, ne haleha tshituha tshihi kabidi nenuntangile, ne dî dikuabo ne, Bualu bua meme ndi nya kudi Tatu?" 
John16:18 Bakadi bakonkangana nunku ne, Edi ndî kai ne, Haleha tshituha tshihi? Katuena bamanye tshidiye wamba." 
John16:19 Hakamanya Yesu ne, Badi basue kunkonka bualu ebu, yeye wakabakonka kabidi ne, Nudi nuebeshangana bua dî dinakuamba ne, Haleha tshituha tshihi kanuena nuntangila, ne haleha tshituha tshihi kabidi nenuntangile?" 
John16:20 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Nenudile, nenujinge, kadi ba ha buloba nebasanke; nenuikale ne kanyinganyinga, kadi kanyinganyinga kenu nekakudimuke disanka." 
John16:21 Hatshidi mukashi mukuatshike ha kulela, udi ne kanyinganyinga, bua diba diandi diakufika; kadi haleleye muana, kena uvuluka kabidi kanyinganyinga, bualu bua disanka diandi ne, Muntu wakuledibua ha buloba." 
John16:22 Nunku katataka nudi ne kanyinganyinga; kadi nenumone kabidi, mitshima yenu neisanke, muntu kena ununyenga disanka dienu." 
John16:23 Dituku adi kanuena nunkonka bualu. Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nuambila ne, Binualomba Tatu tshintu, yeye neanuhetshi mu dina dianyi." 
John16:24 Tô ne katataka kanuakanza kulomba tshintu mu dina dianyi; nulombe, nenuangate, bua disanka dienu dikumbane." 
John16:25 Nakunuambila malu â mu nsumuinu; kadi diba nedilue dingikala tshi nuambila malu mu nsumuinu kabidi, nenujukuile bualu bua Tatu." 
John16:26 Dituku adi nenulombe mu dina dianyi; tshiena nuambila ne, Nenulombele Tatu;" 
John16:27 bua Tatu mene udi munusue, bualu bua nuenu nuakunsua meme, nuakuitabusha ne, Nakafuma kudi Tatu." 
John16:28 Nakafuma kudi Tatu, nakulua ha buloba; ndi ngumuka ha buloba kabidi, nempingane kudi Tatu." 
John16:29 Bayidi bandi bakamba ne, Katataka wewe udi utujukuila bualu, kuena ubuamba mu lusumuinu." 
John16:30 Katataka tudi bamanye ne, Wewe udi mudimanyine malu onso, kuena ne bualu bua muntu kukukonka; bua bualu ebu tudi tuitabusha ne, Wewe wakafuma kudi Nzambi." 
John16:31 Yesu wakabakudimuna ne, Nudi nuitabusha mpindiu, anyi?" 
John16:32 Unvuai, diba nedilue, diakumana kufika mene mene, dianumuangalashabo, muntu kuandi, muntu kuandi; nenunshîe meme nkayanyi; kadi tshiena nkayanyi bualu bua Tatu udi neanyi." 
John16:33 Nakunuambila malu â bua nuenu nuikale ne ditalala munda muanyi. Ha buloba nudi ne dikenga; kadi nukoleshe mitshima yenu; nakuhita ba ka buloba bukole. 
John17:1 Hakamba Yesu malu â, wakatangila mulu, wakamba ne, Tatu, diba diakufika; utumbishe Muanʼebe, bua Muana akutumbishe;" 
John17:2 bu muwakumuha bukole bua kukokesha bantu bonso bua kuheye bonso bawakumuha muoyo wa tshiendelele. 
John17:3 Eu udi muoyo wa tshiendelele, bua bobo bakumanye wewe, Nzambi umuehele mulelela, ne yeye uwakatuma, Yesu Kilisto mene." 
John17:4 Nakukutumbisha ha buloba, nakushikisha mudimu uwakumpa." 
John17:5 Tatu, katataka untumbisha diatshimue nʼebe ne butumbi butuakadi nʼabu nʼebe diambedi buloba kabuihu." 
John17:6 Ba mu ba ha buloba bawakumpa nakubalesha dina diebe; bakadi bebe, wewe wakubampa; bakutumikila dî diebe." 
John17:7 Katataka badi bamanye ne, Malu onso awakumpa akafuma kûdi;" 
John17:8 bualu bua mei awakumpa nakubahau; bakuitabusha, bakumanya bulelela ne, Nakufuma kûdi; bakuitabusha kabidi ne, Wewe wakuntuma." 
John17:9 Ndi mbalombela; tshiena ndombela ba ha buloba, ndi ndombela anu bawakumpa; bualu bua bobo badi banyi;" 
John17:10 bintu bionso bidi bianyi mbiebe, biebe mbianyi kabidi; ndi ntumbishibua munda muabo." 
John17:11 Meme tshiena ngikala ha buloba kabidi, kadi aba badi ha buloba, meme ndi ndua kûdi. Tatu wanyi wa tshijila, ubalame mu dina diebe diwakumpa, bua bobo kuikala bamue bu mutudi bietu bamue." 
John17:12 Hanakadi nʼabo, nakubalama mu dina diebe diwakumpa; ne nakabalama, ne kakuakadi umue wakujimina anu muana wa dibutuka, bua kushikisha dî diakadi difunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
John17:13 Kadi katataka udi ndua kûdi; udi ngamba malu â ha buloba bua disanka dianyi kukumbanadi munda muabo. 
John17:14 Nakubaha dî diebe, ba ha buloba badi nʼabo lukuna, bualu bua bobo kabena ba ha buloba, bu mundi meme tshî wa ba buloba." 
John17:15 Tshiena nkulomba ne, Ubumushe ha buloba; ndi nkulomba ne, Ubasungile kudi bubi." 
John17:16 Bobo kabena ba ha buloba, bu mundi meme tshi wa ha buloba." 
John17:17 Ubajidile mu bulelela: dî diebe mbulelela. 
John17:18 Bu muwakuntuma munkatshi mua ba ha buloba, mbu munakubatuma munkatshi mua ba ha buloba kabidi." 
John17:19 Ndi ndijidila bua bualu buabo, bua bobo kabidi bikale bajidila mu bulelela." 
John17:20 Tshiena ndombela aba nkayabo, kadi ndi ndombela kabidi badi bangitabusha bua dî diabo;" 
John17:21 bua buonso buabo bikale bamue; Tatu, bu mûdi munda muanyi ne meme munda muebe, bobo kabidi bikale munda muetu, bua ba ha buloba bitabushe ne, Wewe wakantuma." 
John17:22 Nakabaha butumbi buwakampa bua kuikalabo bamue bu mutudi bietu bamue; 
John17:23 meme munda muabo, wewe munda muanyi bua bobo kuikala bamue bulelela; bua ba ha buloba bamanye ne, Wewe wakantuma; wewe udi mubasue bu mûdi munsue meme." 
John17:24 Tatu, ndi musue bawakumpa bikale kundi bua kutangilabo butumbi buwakumpa, bualu bua wewe wakansua meme diambedi kabai banze kufuka buloba." 
John17:25 Tatu wanyi muakane, ba ha buloba kabakakumanya, kadi meme nakakumanya; aba kabidi bakamanya ne, Wewe wakuntuma;" 
John17:26 nakubamanyisha dina diebe, nembamanyishedi kabidi, bua dinanga diwakunnanga nʼadi meme kuikaladi munda muabo, ne meme munda muabo." 
John18:1 Hakamba Yesu mei â, wakaya ne bayidi bandi dishia dia kasulu ka Kidilona diakadi muaba wa mitshi ya mamuma, wakabuelamu ne bayidi bandi." 
John18:2 Yudasa kabidi, mumutungidi, wakadi mumanye muaba au; bualu bua Yesu wakadi uyaku misangu ya bungi ne bayidi bandi." 
John18:3 Nunku hakangata Yudasa tshisumbu tshia masalayi ne tuhalai tua bakuidi banene ne Bafalese, wakaluamu ne minda ne bimunyi ne bintu bia nvita." 
John18:4 Nunku Yesu wakamanya matu onso akadi alua kudiye, wakaya kudibo, wakabakonka ne, Nudi nukeba nganyi?" 
John18:5 Bakamukudimuna ne, Yesu wa ku Nazaleta. Yesu wakabambila ne, Mmeme. Yudasa, mumutungidi, wakadi muimane nʼabo." 
John18:6 Hakabambileye ne, Mmeme, bakahingana tshianyima, bakadishinda." 
John18:7 Yeye wakabakonka tshiakabidi ne, Nudi nukeba nganyi? Bakamba ne, Yesu wa ku Nazaleta." 
John18:8 Yesu wakamba ne, Nakunuambila ne, Mmeme; binuikala nunkeba meme, lekelai aba baye;" 
John18:9 bua kushikishabo dî diandi diakambeye ne, Bawakampa tshiakujimisha umue." 
John18:10 Simona Petelo wakadi ne muele wa nvita, wakatula, wakataha muntu wa muakuidi munene, wakamukosa ditshu dia ku tshianza tshia bukole. Muntu au dina diandi mMalako." 
John18:11 Yesu wakambila Petelo ne, Hingasha muele webe mu luhaha; tshiena nua luhanza luakumpa Tatu, anyi?" 
John18:12 Masalayi ne kapitene ne tuhalai tua Bena Yuda bakakuata Yesu, bakamusuika," 
John18:13 bakaya nʼandi diambedi kudi Ana, bualu bua yeye wakadi tatuʼandi-muenu wa Kayafa, nguakadi ha mutu ha bakuidi bakuabo tshidimu atshi." 
John18:14 Kayafa nguakaha Bena Yuda lungenyi ne, Mbimpe bia muntu umue kufuila bantu." 
John18:15 Simona Petelo wakalonda Yesu, ne muyidi mukuabo. Muyidi au wakamanyibua kudi muakuidi munene, wakabuela ne Yesu mu nsubu wa muakuidi;" 
John18:16 kadi Petelo wakadi muimane ku tshibi ku bula. Muyidi wakadi mumanyibue kudi muakuidi munene wakaluhuka, wakakula ne mukashi wakadi ulama ku tshibi, wakabuela ne Petelo." 
John18:17 Mukashi muenji wa mudimu wakadi ulama ku tshibi, wakakonka Petelo ne, Wewe kabidi udi mukuabo wa bayidi ba muntu eu, nasha? Yeye wakamba ne, Tshiena wabo." 
John18:18 Bena mudimu ne tuhalai bakadi bimaneku, bamane kutemesha kahia ka makala, bualu bua mashika; bakadi bota, kahia; Petelo kabidi wakadi nʼabo, muimane wota kahia." 
John18:19 Muakuidi mimene wakakonka Yesu bua bayidi bandi ne bua diyisha diandi. 
John18:20 Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Nakujukuila bantu dî dianyi hatoke; matuku onso nakadi uyisha mu nsunagoga ne mu ntempelo, muakadi Bena Yuda bonso bunguile; tshiakamba bualu bumue mu busokoko." 
John18:21 Udi unkonkela meme tshinyi? Ukonke bakunva mei anyi bua malu anakabambila; monai, aba badi bamanye malu anakamba." 
John18:22 Hakambeye dî edi, kahalai kakuabo kakadi kimane nʼandi ha buihi kakamukuma, kakamba ne, Wakukudimuina muakuidi wa Nzambi dî nunku tshinyi?" 
John18:23 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bingikala muambe bualu bubi, ubilambe; bingikala muambe bimpe, udi unkumina tshinyi?" 
John18:24 Ana wakamutuma musuika kudi Kayafa, muakuidi munene." 
John18:25 Simona Petelo wakadi muimane wota kahia. Bakamukonka ne, Wewe kabidi udi mukuabo wa bayidi bandi, nasha? Yeye wakavila, wakamba ne, Tshiena wabo." 
John18:26 Mukuabo wa bantu ba muakuidi munene, muanʼabo ne wakakosabo ditshu kudi Petelo, wakamukonka ne, Tshiakukutangila nʼandi mu muaba wa mitshi ya mamuma, anyi?" 
John18:27 Petelo wakayila kabidi. Tshitala tshiakasama. 
John18:28 Bakumuka ne Yesu kua Kayafa, bakaya nʼandi mu nsubu munene wa mukelenge; hakadi hatshiatshia; kadi bobo bine kabakabuela mu nsubu munene bua kabakasua kubiha, nunku kabakadi kumanya mua kudia Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
John18:29 Pilato wakaya kudibo, wakabakonka ne, Nudi mibanda muntu eu ne bualu kai?" 
John18:30 Bakamukudimuna ne, Bu muntu eu kai muenze bualu bubi, katuakadi kumufila mu bianza biebe." 
John18:31 Pilato wakabambila ne, Nuenu numuangate, nulumbulule tshilumbu tshiandi bu mudi mukenshi wenu. Bena Yuda bakamuambila ne, Katuena ne bukokeshi bua kushiha muntu." 
John18:32 Nunku bakashikisha dî dia Yesu diakambeye hakadiye wamba bualu bua lufu luafueye nʼalu. 
John18:33 Pilato wakabuela mu nsubu munene wa mukelenge kabidi, wakabikila Yesu, wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi?" 
John18:34 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Wewe udi udikonkela dî edi, anyi bakuabo bakungamba kûdi?" 
John18:35 Pilato wakamukudimuna ne, Meme ndi Muena Yuda, anyi? Bantu ba tshisamba tshienu ne bakuidi banene bakukufila mu bianza bianyi, wakuenza tshinyi?" 
John18:36 Yesu wakamukudimuna ne, Bukelenge buanyi kabuena bua ha buloba ebu; bu bukelenge buanyi buikale bua ha buloba ebu, bantu banyi bakadi kuluangana, tshifidibu mu bianza bia Bena Yuda; kadi katataka bukelenge buanyi kabuena bua kunoko." 
John18:37 Pilato wakamukonka ne, Ahu wewe mukelenge, anyi? Yesu wakamba ne, Bûdi Wamba mbulelela, ndi Mukelenge. Nakuledibua bua bualu ebu, nakuluila ha buloba bualu ebu, ne bua kuamba malu malelela. Muntu yonso wa bulelela udi unvua dî dianyi." 
John18:38 Pilato wakamukonka ne, Bulelela ntshinyi? Hakamukonkeye dî edi, wakaluhuka, wakaya kudi Bena Yuda, wakabambila ne, Tshiena mumusangane ne bualu." 
John18:39 Nudi ne tshilele tshienu tshia meme kunulekelela muntu umue ha Kuhita kua Yehowa; nudi basue nnulekelele Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda, anyi?" 
John18:40 Kadi bobo bakela mbila kabidi ne, Muntu eu nasha, anu Balaba. Balaba wakadi munyengi wa bintu." 
John19:1 Hashishe Pilato wakangata Yesu, wakamukuma." 
John19:2 Masalayi akaluka tshifulu tshia bukelenge tshia meba akamubuesha ku mutu, akamuluatshisha tshikowelu tshikunze;" 
John19:3 akalua kudiye, akamuambila ne, Muoyo, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda. Akamukuma." 
John19:4 Pilato wakaluhuka, wakalua kudibo kabidi, wakabambila ne, Tangilai, nakulua nʼandi kunudi bua nuenu mimanye ne, Tshiena mumusangane ne dihila." 
John19:5 Yesu wakaluhuka muluate tshifulu tshia meba ne tshikowelu tshikunze. Pilato wakabambila ne, Monai, muntu eu kayeu!" 
John19:6 Hakamumona bakuidi banene ne tuhalai, bakela mbila ne, Umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane, umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Pilato wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudiangatshileye, numushihe; meme tshiena mumusangane ne dihila." 
John19:7 Bena Yuda bakamukudimuna ne, Tudi ne mukenshi wetu, mbimpe bia yeye afue biandi bu mudi mukenshi wetu, bua yeye wakudivuisha bu Muana wa Nzambi." 
John19:8 Hakunvua Pilato dî edi, wakatamba kutshina;" 
John19:9 wakabuela kabidi mu nsubu munene wa mukelenge, wakakonka Yesu ne, Wewe Wakufuma kudi kunyi? Kadi Yesu kakamukudimuna dî." 
John19:10 Pilato wakamuambila ne, Kuena ungambila dî? Kuena munmanye ne, Meme ndi ne bukokeshi bua kukulekela, ndi ne bukokeshi kabidi bua kukushiha ku mutshi mutshiamakane?" 
John19:11 Yesu wakamuandamuna ne, Bu bukokeshi kabui bukuhebue kudi wa mu diulu, wewe kuakadi kuikala nʼabu bua kungenzela bualu; bua bualu ebu nunku wakunfila mu bianza biebe ngudi ne bualu butambe bubi." 
John19:12 Ha diba adi Pilato wakakeba mua kumulekela; kadi Bena Yuda bakela mei abo bikole ne, Biwalekela muntu eu, kuena mulunda wa Kaisa; muntu yonso udi udivuisha bu mukelenge udi utombokela Kaisa." 
John19:13 Hakunvua Pilato mei â, wakaluhuka ne Yesu, wakashikama mu nkuasa wa bulumbuludi ha muaba wakadibo babikila ne, Wa Mabue Malongolola Hanshi, kadi mu Buena Yuda ne, Gabata." 
John19:14 Dilongolola dia Kuhita kua Yehowa diakafika, diba diakadi bu munda munya. Yeye wakambila Bena Yuda ne, Monai Mukelenge wenu!" 
John19:15 Bakela mei abo bikole ne, Umumushe, umumushe, umushihe ku mutshi mutshiamakane! Pilato wakabakonka ne, Nshihe Mukelenge wenu, anyi? Bakuidi banene bakamukudimuna ne, Katuena ne mukelenge mukuabo, anu Kaisa." 
John19:16 Hashishe yeye wakamufila mu bianza biabo bua kumushihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane. 
John19:17 Bakangata Yesu; yeye wakaluhuka mudituadile mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, wakaya ku muaba udibo babikila ne, Muaba wa Kabalubalu ka Mutu, mu Buena Yuda ne, Gologota." 
John19:18 Bakamukuminaku milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bakenzela bakuabo babidi muomumue, mukuabo eku, munga eku, Yesu hankatshi." 
John19:19 Pilato wakafunda makanda, wakauteka ku mutshi mutshiamakane. Wakafunda ne: Yesu wa mu Nazaleta, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda." 
John19:20 Bena Yuda ba bungi bakabala mukanda eu, bualu bua muaba wakashihabo Yesu wakadi hehi ne musoko; mukanda wakadi mufunda mu muaku wa Bena Yuda ne wa Bena Lomo ne wa Bena Gelika." 
John19:21 Kadi bakuidi banene ba Bena Yuda bakambila Pilato ne, Kufundi ne, Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda; ufunde ne, Yeye wakamba ne, Ndi Mukelenge wa Bena Yuda." 
John19:22 Pilato wakabambila ne, Nakuenda munakufunda." 
John19:23 Masalayi, hakamukuminau milonda mu bianza ne ku makasa ku mutshi mutshiamakane, akangata bilulu biandi akabanyangana anai, disalayi biadi, disalayi biadi; ne tshikowelu tshiandi kabidi, kadi tshikowelu katshiakadi ne mitelu, tshiakadi tshikuma tshijima kulu tô ne hanshi." 
John19:24 Bakambilangana ne, Katutshihandi, tutshielele nshobo ne tshikala tshia nganyi; nunku bakashikisha dî diakafundabo mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Bakabanyangana bilulu bianyi, Bakelela tshikowelu tshianyi nshobo. Masalayi akenza nunku." 
John19:25 Kadi mamu wandi, ne muanʼabo ne mamu wandi mukashi, ne Malia mukashi wa Kelopa, ne Malia wa ku Magadala, bakadi bimane hehi ne mutshi mutshiamakane wa Yesu." 
John19:26 Hakamona Yesu mamu wandi ne muyidi wakadiye musue muimahe ha buihi, wakambila mamu wandi ne, Mukashi, muanʼebe kayau." 
John19:27 Wakambila muyidi ne, Mamu webe kayau. Ha diba adi mene muyidi au wakaya ngandi ku nsubu kuandi." 
John19:28 Hashishe Yesu wakamanya ne, Malu onso akushika; bualu bua kushikisha dî diakadi difunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi, yeye wakamba biandi ne, Ndi ne nyota." 
John19:29 Dilonga diakadihu diule tente ne nvinega; bakateka musukulampampa mûsha tente ne nvinega ku mutshi wa hisopa, bakauteka ku mishiku yandi." 
John19:30 Hakangateye nvinega, wakamba ne, Bualu buakushika; wakinyika mutu, wakahuola muoyo." 
John19:31 Dituku adi diakadi dia Dilongolola; bualu bua bitalu kabishadî ku mitshi mitshiamakane dia Lumingu (Lumingu alu luakadi dituku dinene), Bena Yuda bakalomba Pilato bua kubitshibulabo bibelu ne kubiumusha." 
John19:32 Masalayi akalua, akutshibula bibelu bia wa kumudia, ne bia mukuabo wakabashihabo nʼandi ku mutshi mutshiamakane;" 
John19:33 kadi hakalau kudi Yesu, akamusangana mumane kufua, kâkatshibula bibelu biandi." 
John19:34 Kadi dinga disalayi diakamutua difuma mu lubadi, mashi ne mai biakahatuka." 
John19:35 Wakatangila bualu abu nguakabuamba, dî diandi ndelela; udi mumanye biandi, ne, Dî dianyi ndilelela, bua nuenu kabidi nuitabushe." 
John19:36 Malu â akulua bua kushikisha dî diakafundabo mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Kabena batshibula mukuha wandi." 
John19:37 Dinga dî didi mu Mukanda wa Nzambi kabidi ne, Nebatangile wakutuabo difuma." 
John19:38 Hakashika malu â, Yosefe wa ku Alimataya, wakadi muyidi wa Yesu mu musokoko bualu bua wakadi utshina Bena Yuda, wakalomba Pilato bua kuangata tshitalu tshia Yesu; Pilato wakitabusha. Nunku yeye wakalua, wakangata tshitalu tshiandi." 
John19:39 Nikodemo, nguakalua kudi Yesu butuku diambedi, wakalua ne mula ne alo bisangisha, biakadi ne bujitu bua kilogama bu makumi anai." 
John19:40 Bakangata tshitalu tshia Yesu, bakatshinyengela ne bintu ebi bia muhuya muimpe mu bilulu bia line, bu mudi tshilele tshia Bena Yuda ha kujikabo bantu." 
John19:41 Kuakashihelabo Yesu kuakadi muaba wa mitshi ya mamuma; mu muaba au muakadi lukita luhia-luhia, muakadi tshitalu katshi tshianze kujikibuamu diambedi." 
John19:42 Bualu bua Dilongolola dia Bena Yuda, ne bua lukita luakadi ha buihi, bakajikamu Yesu." 
John20:1 Dituku dia kumudilu dia lumingu, Malia wa ku Magadala wakalua ku lukita hatshiatshia, butuku kabui buanze kutshia, wakamona dibue dimana kumusha ku lukita." 
John20:2 Wakanyema lubilu, wakaya kudi Simona Petelo ne kudi muyidi mukuabo wakadi musuibue kudi Yesu, wakabambila ne, Bakumusha Mukelenge mu lukita, katuena bamanye kuakumuladikabo." 
John20:3 Petelo wakaluhuka ne muyidi au, bua kuyabo ku lukita." 
John20:4 Bubidi buabo bakaya lubilu, kadi muyidi mukuabo wakahita Petelo lubilu, Wakafika ku lukita diambedi;" 
John20:5 wakinangila, wakatangilamu, wakamona bilulu bia line hanshi, kadi yeye kakabuelamu." 
John20:6 Simona Petelo wakalua umulonda ku nyima, wakabuela mu lukita, wakamona bilulu bia line hanshi," 
John20:7 kadi tshitambala tshiakadi ku mutu kua Yesu katshiakadi ha bilulu bia line, tshiakadi tshianga ha buatshi." 
John20:8 Hashishe, muyidi wakadianjila kufika ku lukita, wakabuela, wakatangila, wakitabusha." 
John20:9 Diambedi kabakadi banze kumanya dî dia mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Budiye nʼabu mbua kubika ku lufu." 
John20:10 Bayidi bakahingana ku nsubu kuabo kabidi. 
John20:11 Malia wakadi muimane ku lukita udila; hakadiye udila nunku, wakinangila, wakatangila mu lukita;" 
John20:12 wakamona banjelo babidi bashikame baluate bilulu bitoke tô, munga ku mutu, mukuabo ku makasa, hakadi tshitalu tshia Yesu tshiladika." 
John20:13 Bakamukonka ne, Mukashi, udi udidila tshinyi? Yeye wakabambila ne, Bua bakuya ne Mukelenge wanyi, tshiena mumanye kuakumuladikabo." 
John20:14 Hakambeye nunku, wakatshinguluka, wakamona Yesu muimane, kakamumanya ne, Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu wakamukonka ne, Mukashi, udi udidila tshinyi? Udi ukeba nganyi? Wakela meshi ne, Muena mudimu wa mu muaba au, wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, biwikala mumumushe kunoko, ungambile kuwakumuladika, nemuangate." 
John20:16 Yesu wakamba ne, Malia. Hakatshingulukeye, wakamuambila mu Buena Yuda ne, Laboni, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muyishi." 
John20:17 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Kundengi tshianza, bualu bua tshiena muanze kuya kulu kudi Tatu; ya kudi bana betu, ubambile ne, Ndi nya kulu kudi Tatu wanyi ne Tatu wenu, kudi Nzambi wanyi ne Nzambi wenu." 
John20:18 Malia wa ku Magadala wakalua, wakambila bayidi ne, Nakumona Mukelenge, yeye wakungambila malu â." 
John20:19 Dituku adi dia kumudilu dia lumingu, diba dimane kubuela, bayidi bakadi mu nsubu ne bibi binshila bualu bua bakatshina Bena Yuda, Yesu wakalua, wakimana munkatshi muabo, wakabambila ne, Ditalala dikale kunudi." 
John20:20 Hakambeye dî edi, wakabalesha bianza biandi ne lubadi luandi. Mitshima ya bayidi yakasanka, hakatangilabo Mukelenge." 
John20:21 Yesu wakabambila kabidi ne, Ditalala dikale kunudi; bu muakantuma Tatu, nunku mundi nutuma." 
John20:22 Hakambeye dî edi, wakabela muhuya, wakabambila ne, Nuangate Nyuma Muimpe;" 
John20:23 muetu yonso unuajimishila mibi yandi, neijimishibue; muntu yonso unudi kanui nujimishila, neashale kudiye," 
John20:24 Kadi Toma, mukuabo wa bayidi dikumi ne babidi, dina diandi dikuabo ne, Didumo, kakadi nʼabo, hakalua Yesu." 
John20:25 Bayidi bakuabo bakamuambila ne, Tuakumona Mukelenge. Kadi yeye wakabambila ne, Bingikala tshi ntangila bibangu bia milonda bidi mu bianza biandi, tshî mbuesha munu mu bibangu bia milonda, tshî mbuesha tshianza mu lubadi, tshiena ngitabusha." 
John20:26 Hakahita matuku muanda mukulu kabidi, bayidi bandi bakadi mu nsubu, Toma wakadi nʼabo. Bibi biakadi binshila, Yesu wakalua, wakimana munkatshi muabo, wakamba ne, Ditalala dikale kunudi." 
John20:27 Yeye wakambila Toma ne, Tuma munu webe kunoko, umone bianza bianyi; tuma tshianza tshiebe, utshibueshe mu lubadi luanyi; kuikadi ne mpata, witabushe." 
John20:28 Toma wakamuandamuna ne, Mukelenge wanyi ne Nzambi wanyi." 
John20:29 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Bualu bua wewe wakuntangila, wakuitabusha; bakungitabusha, kabai banze kuntangila, badi ne disanka." 
John20:30 Yesu wakenza bimanyinu bikuabo bia bungi ku mesu kua bayidi, bidi kabi bifundibue mu mukanda eu;" 
John20:31 kadi malu â adi mafundibue bua nuenu nuitabushe ne, Yesu udi Kilisto, Muana wa Nzambi; ne bua nuenu nuikale ne muoyo mu dina diandi, hanuitabusha." 
John21:1 Hakashika malu â, Yesu wakamueneka kabidi kudi bayidi bandi ku dishiba dia Tibelia; wakamueneka nunku:" 
John21:2 Simona Petelo, ne Toma udibo babikila ne, Didumo, ne Natanaele wa Kana wa mu Galela, ne bana ba Zebedayo, ne bayidi bandi bakuabo babidi bakadi hohamue." 
John21:3 Simona Petelo wakambila bakuabo ne, Ndi nya kukuata minyinyi ya mu mai. Bakamuambila ne, Tuetu tuyaya nʼebe. Bakaya, bakabuela mu buatu; butuku abu kabakakuata tshintu." 
John21:4 Kadi hakamba hanshi kutoka, Yesu wakadi muimane ku muelelu wa mai; kadi bayidi kabakamumanya ne, NYesu." 
John21:5 Yesu wakabakonka ne, Bana, nudi ne tshia kudia, anyi? Bakamukudimuna ne, Nasha." 
John21:6 Yeye wakabambila ne, Elai tuhamba ku tshianza tshia balume, nenuhete minyinyi. Bakatula, tshituha tshihi kabakamanya mua kutukoka bualu bua bungi bua minyinyi." 
John21:7 Muyidi, wakadi Yesu musue, wakambila Petelo ne, Mukelenge. Hakunvua Petelo ne, Mukelenge, wakadijingila tshivualu tshiandi bua wakadi mutshivule, wakadiela mu mai." 
John21:8 Kadi banga bayidi bakalua mu buatu bukese, benda bakoka tuhamba tûle tente ne minyinyi, bualu bua ku mpata kuakadi ha buihi, ntanta bu wa metu lukama." 
John21:9 Hakafikabo ku mpata, bakamona makala a kahia akenka ne munyinyi wa mu mai muteka ha kahia ne mutanda wa bidia." 
John21:10 Yesu wakabambila ne, Luai no minyinyi mikuabo inuakukuata katataka." 
John21:11 Simona Petelo wakabuela mu buatu, wakakoka tuhamba ku mpata, tûle tente ne minyinyi minene lukama ne makumi atanu ne isatu; minyinyi yakadi bungi nunku, kadi tuhamba katuakadi tuhandike." 
John21:12 Yesu wakabambila ne, Luai nudie. Kakuakadi muyidi wakadi ne dikima dia kumuebesha ne, Wewe nganyi? Bakadi bamumanye ne, Mukelenge." 
John21:13 Yesu wakalua, wakamema mutanda wa bidia, wakabahau ne munyinyi kabidi." 
John21:14 Eu wakadi musangu muisatu wakamueneka Yesu kudi bayidi, hakabikeye ku lufu." 
John21:15 Hakashikishabo kudia, Yesu wakakonka Simona Petelo ne, Simona wa Yona, wewe udi mutambe aba bakuabo kunnanga, anyi? Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, Mukelenge, wewe udi mumanye ne, Ndi mukusue. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udishe bana banyi ba mikoko." 
John21:16 Wakamukonka tshiakabidi ne, Simona wa Yona, udi munnange, anyi? Yeye wakamuambila ne, Bulelela, Mukelenge, wewe udi mumanye ne, Ndi mukusue. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Ulame mikoko yanyi." 
John21:17 Wakamukonka tshiakasatu ne, Simona wa Yona, udi munsue, anyi? Mutshima wa Petelo wakanyingalala bua yeye wakamukonka tshiakasatu ne, Udi munsue, anyi? Wakamuambila ne, Mukelenge, wewe udi mumanye malu onso; udi mumanye ne, Ndi mukusue. Yesu wakamuambila ne, Udishe mikoko yanyi." 
John21:18 Bulelela, bulelela, ndi nkuambila ne, Hawakadi nsongalume, wakadi udisuika mukaba, wakadi wendakana kuonso kuwakasua; kadi hawakulumpa, wewe newolole bianza biebe, mukuabo neakusuike mukaba, neakutuale kudi kui musue." 
John21:19 Yesu wakamba dî edi bua kumumanyisha lufu luatumbisheye nʼalu Nzambi. Hakambeye nunku, wakamuambila ne, Undonde." 
John21:20 Petelo wakatshinguluka, wakamona muyidi wakadi Yesu munange, ulonda, nguakadi mumueyemene tshianyima mu tshiadi hakadibo badia bidia butuku, nguakamukonka ne, Wakutungila tshitungu nganyi?" 
John21:21 Hakamumona Petelo nunku, yeye wakakonka Yesu ne, Mukelenge, ahu muntu eu nenze tshinyi?" 
John21:22 Yesu wakamuambila ne, Binasua bua ashale ne muoyo tô ne hanalua, mbualu buebe, anyi? Wewe undonde." 
John21:23 Dî edi diakatangadika munkatshi mua bana babo ba mu Kilisto ne, Muyidi eu kena ufua; kadi Yesu kakamba ne, Yeye kena ufua; wakamba ne, Binasua bua ashale ne muoyo tô ne hanalua, mbualu buebe, anyi?" 
John21:24 Muyidi eu mene wakamba malu â, wakâfunda; tudi bamanye ne, Dî diandi ndilelela." 
John21:25 Malu makuabo a bungi adiku kabidi akenza Yesu; biâfundabo onso, ndi ngamba ne, Buloba bujima mene kabuena bukumbana miaba ya kuteka mikanda yafundabo." 
Acts1:1 Teofilo, mu mukanda wa diambedi nakafunda malu onso akabanga Yesu kuenza ne kuyisha bantu" 
Acts1:2 tô ne ku dituku diakangatshibueye mu diulu, hakamaneye kuambika bapostolo bakasunguleye mikenshi yandi kudi Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts1:3 Hakamaneye kukenga, wakamueneka kudibo ne muoyo, bimanyinu bia buala ebu biakadi bia bungi, wakamuenekamueneka kudibo nunku matuku makumi anai Wamba malu a bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Acts1:4 Hakadisangisheye nʼabo, wakabambila bikole ne, Kanumuki mu Yelushalema, kadi nujidile mulayi wa Tatu unuakunvua kundi." 
Acts1:5 Bulelela, Yone wakabatiza bantu ne mai, kadi matuku kêna mashale a bungi anuabatijibua mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts1:6 Hakadisangishabo nunku, bakadi ukonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe neuhingishe Isalele bukelenge katataka, anyi?" 
Acts1:7 Yeye wakabambila ne, Kumanya kua bikondo ne bidimu biakusungula Tatu mu bukokeshi buandi kambualu buenu." 
Acts1:8 Kadi nuenu nenuangate bukole, hanuhuekela Nyuma Muimpe hamʼbidi henu; nenuikale bamanyi banyi mu Yelushalema ne mu Yudaya yonso ne Samalea ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Acts1:9 Hakambeye dî edi, hakadibo bamutangila, wakangatshibua mu diulu; ditutu diakamuangata, kabakamumona kabidi." 
Acts1:10 Hakadiye uya, bakatangila mu diulu talala; monai, balume babidi bimane ha buihi nʼabo baluate bilulu bitoke tô;" 
Acts1:11 ne bakamba ne, Nuenu Bena Galela, nudi bimane nutangidila mu diulu tshinyi? Yesu eu wakadi nʼenu wakubandishibua mu diulu, nealue kabidi bu munuakumumona ubanda mu diulu." 
Acts1:12 Hashishe bakahingana mu Yelushalema bafuma ku mukuna udibo babikila ne, Oleve, udi biau hehi ne Yelushalema, bu ntanta wa luendu lua dituku dia Lumingu tua Bayuda." 
Acts1:13 Hakahinganabo, bakabanda mu nsubu wa mulu, muakadi muikale Petelo ne Yone ne Yakobo ne Andele ne Filipo ne Toma ne Bâtolomayo ne Matayo ne Yakobo muana wa Alafayo ne Simona muena Lukunukunu ne Yuda wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Buonso buabo bakadi ne mitshima muomumue, bakananukila kutendelela Nzambi, ne bakashi, ne Malia mamu wa Yesu, ne bana babo ne Yesu." 
Acts1:15 Mu matuku â Petelo wakimana munkatshi mua bana babo ba mu Kilisto, bakadi badisangishe nunku bu lukama ne makumi abidi, yeye wakamba ne," 
Acts1:16 Bana betu, buakadibo nʼabo mbua kushikisha dî didi difunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi, diakambabo bua Yudasa diambedi kudi Nyuma Muimpe mukana mua Davidi, yeye wakadi mulombodi wa bakuatshi ba Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Bakadi bamubala nʼetu, wakadi mumane kuangata luandi luseke lua mudimu eu." 
Acts1:18 (Muntu eu wakasumba muaba ku difutu dia bubi buandi; wakahona mutu munshi, wakahandika hankatshi, mala andi onso akahatuka." 
Acts1:19 Bena Yelushalema bonso bakamanya bualu ebu; ebu mbualu buakabikidilabo muaba au ne, Akeledama, kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muaba wa Mashi.)" 
Acts1:20 Bakafunda mu Mukanda wa Misambu ne, Nsubu wandi ashale hatuhu, Muntu kikadimu; ne, Mukuabo angate butangidi buandi." 
Acts1:21 Balume bakuabo bakadi bendakana nʼetu matuku onso akadi Mukelenge Yesu utambakana munkatshi muetu," 
Acts1:22 babangile ku dibatiza diandi kudi Yone tô ne ku dituku diakangatshibueye kutudi bua kaya mu diulu; budi umue wabo nʼabo mbua kusungudibua bua kuikaleye mumanyi nʼetu wa dibika diandi ku lufu. 
Acts1:23 Bakimanyika babidi, Yosefe wakadibo babikila ne, Bâsaba, wakadi biandi ne dinga dina ne, Yusto, ne Matia." 
Acts1:24 Bakatendelela Nzambi bambe ne, Wewe, Mukelenge, ngudi mumanye mitshima ya bantu bonso, utuleshe wa babidi aba umue uwakusungula," 
Acts1:25 bua kuangateye muaba mu mudimu eu ne mu bupostolo muakahonena Yudasa bua kuyeye ku muaba wandi muine. 
Acts1:26 Bakabelela nshobo, nshobo yakakuata Matia; bakamubala ne bapostolo dikumi ne umue." 
Acts2:1 Hakalua dituta dia Pentekoste, buonso buabo bakadi hohamue mu muaba umue." 
Acts2:2 Tshiona tshiakafuma lubilu mulu bu tshihehele tshikole tshihita, tshiakûsha mu nsubu muonso muakadibo bashikame tente." 
Acts2:3 Ndimi mihanduluke yakamueneka kudibo, yakadi bu kahia, kakashikama ha mutu ha muntu ne muntu." 
Acts2:4 Buonso buabo bakadi bûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, bakabanga kuakula miaku mikuabo bu muakabaha Nyuma dî dia kuambabo." 
Acts2:5 Mu Yelushalema muakadi mushikame Bena Yuda bakadi bananukila kutendelela Nzambi, ba mu bisamba bionso bia ha buloba." 
Acts2:6 Hakuluabo tshiona etshi, bantu ba bungi bakunguila hamue, bakakema, bualu bua muntu ne muntu wakunvua bakula muaku wandi." 
Acts2:7 Bakadi balubakana, bakadi batamba kukema ne, Tangilai, bantu aba badi bakula nunku kaBena Galela, anyi?" 
Acts2:8 Tudi tunvua, muntu ne muntu, muaku wandi wa kuakatulabo munyi?" 
Acts2:9 Bena Pâtia ne Bena Madai ne Bena Elama, ne badi bashikame mu Mesopotamia, ne mu Yudaya ne mu Kapadokia, ne mu Ponto ne mu Asia," 
Acts2:10 ne mu Fugia ne mu Pampulia, ne mu Ejipitu ne mu nseke ya Libue ne Kulene, ne ba ku Lomo badi basomba kunoko, ne Bena Yuda ne ba bende bakitabusha bualu bua Bena Yuda," 
Acts2:11 ne Bena Kulete ne Bena Alaba, tudi tunvua bantu aba bamba mianda minene ya Nzambi mu miaku yetu." 
Acts2:12 Buonso buabo bakadi batamba kukema, mitshima yabo yakalubakana, bakakonkangana ne, Bualu ebu budi munyi?" 
Acts2:13 Kadi bakuabo bakaseka, bakamba ne, Badi bakuatshike maluvu mahia-mahia." 
Acts2:14 Kadi Petelo wakimana ne bapostolo dikumi ne umue, wakabandisha dî diandi, wakabambila ne, Nuenu Bena Yudaya ne buonso buenu badi bashikama mu Yelushalema, numanye bienu bualu ebu, nunvue mei anyi." 
Acts2:15 Bantu aba kabena bakuatshike maluvi bu munudi nuamba bienu, bualu bua diba didi anu ha tshitema;" 
Acts2:16 kadi ebu mbualu buakambabo kudi muprofete Yoele ne," 
Acts2:17 Nzambi udi wamba ne, Halua matuku a kunshikidilu, Nengitshikishile bantu bonso Nyuma wanyi, Bana benu balume ne bana benu bakashi nebambe malu adi kâi manze kulua, Bansongalume benu nebamone bikena kumona, Bakulumpe benu nebalote bilota," 
Acts2:18 E, halua matuku au nengitshikishile bahika banyi balume ne bahika banyi bakashi Nyuma wanyi, nebambe malu adi kâi manze kulua." 
Acts2:19 Nendeshe bantu malu a kukema mu diulu Ne bimanyinu ha buloba, Mashi, ne kahia, ne dibungibungi dia muinshi." 
Acts2:20 Diba nedikudimunyibue midima, Ne ngondo mashi, Diambedi dituku dia Mukelenge kadî dianze kulua, Adi ndituku dinene dia kukema." 
Acts2:21 Halua bualu ebu, watela dina dia Mukelenge neasungidibue." 
Acts2:22 Nuenu Bena Isalele, unvuai mei â: Yesu wa ku Nazaleta, muntu mujadikibue kudi Nzambi ku mesu kuenu bua malu makole akenzeye ne malu a kukema ne bimanyinu biakamuenzesha Nzambi munkatshi muenu, bu munudi bamanye;"
