Acts2:23 yeye wakadi mufila bu muakadi meshi akasungula Nzambi ne bu muakadi budianjidi kumanya buandi, nuenu nuakuenzesha bianza bia bantu babi bua kumutekabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane ne bua kumushihabo." 
Acts2:24 Nzambi wakamubisha, mumane kusulula nkanu ya lufu, bualu bua kakadi mua kusuikibua kudilu tshiendelele." 
Acts2:25 Bualu bua Davidi udi wamba bualu buandi ne, Nakumona Mukelenge ku mesu kuanyi matuku onso; Bualu bua yeye udi ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume bua meme tshî muzakale." 
Acts2:26 Nunku mutshima wanyi wakusanka, ludimi luanyi luakuamba disanka dianyi; Ne bualu bukuabo, mubidi wanyi neulale ne ditekemena," 
Acts2:27 Bua wewe kuena ushîa muoyo wanyi mu Muaba wa Bafue, Kuena ufila Webe wa Tshijila bua kuboleye." 
Acts2:28 Wewe wakunmanyisha nshila ya muoyo; Neungûshe tente ne disanka ku mesu kuebe. 
Acts2:29 Bana betu, ndi mua kunujukuila bualu bua nkambua wetu Davidi ne, Yeye wakafua, bakamujika, lukita luandi ludi munkatshi muetu tô ne katataka." 
Acts2:30 Yeye wakadi muprofete, wakamanya biandi ne, Nzambi wakaditshiha ne, Nenshikike kankanunuina ka munda muebe ha nkuasa webe wa butumbi;" 
Acts2:31 bua yeye wakadianjila kutangila bualu ebu diambedi, wakamba bua dibika dia Kilisto ku lufu ne, Kabakamushîa mu Muaba wa Bafue, mubidi wandi kawakabola." 
Acts2:32 Yesu eu, Nzambi wakamubisha ku lufu, buonso buetu tudi bamanyi ba bualu ebu." 
Acts2:33 Yeye, mumane kubandishibua ku tshianza tshia balume tshia Nzambi, mumane kuangata mulayi wa Nyuma Muimpe kudi Tatu, wakuitshikisha bualu ebu bunudi numona ne bunudi nunvua." 
Acts2:34 Bualu bua Davidi kakabanda mu diulu, hadi yeye mene wakamba ne, Mukelenge wakambila Mukelenge wanyi ne, Shikama ku tshianza tshianyi tshia balume" 
Acts2:35 Tô ne hanavuisha badi nʼebe lukuna tshitekelu tshia munshi mua makasa ebe. 
Acts2:36 Ka Bena Isalele bonso bamanye bushua ne, Nzambi wakuvuisha Yesu eu unuakushiha ku mutshi mutshiamakane Mukelenge ne Kilisto kabidi." 
Acts2:37 Hakunvuabo dî edi, mitshima yabo yakanyingalala, bakakonka Petelo ne bapostolo bakuabo ne, Bana betu, netuenze tshinyi?" 
Acts2:38 Petelo wakabambila ne, Kudimunai mitshima yenu, nubatijibue buonso buenu mu dina dia Yesu Kilisto bualu bua kunujimishilabo mibi yenu; nunku nenuangate kuha kua Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts2:39 Mulayi wa bualu ebu udi kunudi ne kudi bana benu balela ne kudi bonso badi kule, kudi bonso mene babikila Mukelenge Nzambi wetu kudiye." 
Acts2:40 Yeye wakabambila mei makuabo a bungi, wakabadimusha ne, Disungilai kudi ba mu tshikondo etshi tshia tshitshu." 
Acts2:41 Bakitabusha dî diandi bakabatijibua. Dituku adi kantu bu binunu bisatu bakadikungisha nʼabo. 
Acts2:42 Bobo bakananukila kuikala mu dilengesha dia bapostolo ne mu buobumue, ne mu kutshibula kua bidia ne mu kutendelela kua Nzambi." 
Acts2:43 Buowa buakabakuata buonso buabo; bapostolo bakenza malu a kukema a bungi ne bimanyinu. 
Acts2:44 Bena kuitabusha bonso bakadi ne mitshima muomumue, bakasangisha bintu biabo hohamue;" 
Acts2:45 bakahana madimi abo ne bintu, bakabiabanyina bantu bonso bu muakadi muntu yonso nʼabi bualu." 
Acts2:46 Ku dituku ku dituku bakadi bananukila kudisangisha mu ntempelo, ne mutshima umue, ku nsubu yabo bakadi batshibula bidia, bakadi badia bidia biabo ne disanka ne mitshima ya kanemu," 
Acts2:47 bakadi batumbisha Nzambi, bakadi ne diakalengele kudi bantu bonso. Ku dituku ku dituku Mukelenge wakadi usangisha kudibo bakuabo bakadi basungidibua." 
Acts3:1 Petelo ne Yone bakadi babanda ku ntempelo hakadi diba dia kutendelela Nzambi, diba ha Isatu." 
Acts3:2 Muntu mulume mulela njeku wakadi mutuala kudi bantu, bakadi bamuteke ku dituku ku dituku ku tshibi tshia ntempelo tshidibo babikila ne, Tshimpe, bua kulombeye bakadi babuela mu ntempelo bintu." 
Acts3:3 Hakamoneye Petelo ne Yone bamba kubuela mu ntempelo, wakabalomba tshintu." 
Acts3:4 Petelo wakamutangila talala, ne Yone kabidi, wakamba ne, Ututangile." 
Acts3:5 Yeye wakabunvuila, utekemena ne, Nebampe tshintu." 
Acts3:6 Kadi Petelo wakamba ne, Tshiena ne argent ne ngolo, kadi tshindi nʼatshi, nenkuhetshi. Mu dina dia Yesu Kilisto wa ku Nazaleta, enda biebe." 
Acts3:7 Wakamukuata ku tshianza tshia balume, wakamubisha; makasa andi ne tuhombo biakakola lubilu." 
Acts3:8 Wakajuka lukasa, wakimana, wakabanga kuenda, wakabuela nʼabo mu ntempelo, wenda, utuhika, utumbisha Nzambi." 
Acts3:9 Bantu bonso bakamumona wenda utumbisha Nzambi; 
Acts3:10 bakamumanya ne, Nyeye wakadi ushikama ku Tshibi Tshimpe tshia ntempelo ulomba bintu; bakatamba kukema bua bualu buakalua kudiye." 
Acts3:11 Hakadi ujeka uhukila Petelo ne Yone, bantu bonso bakabunguila mu mbalanda udibo babikila ne, Wa Solomo, batamba kukema," 
Acts3:12 Hakamona Petelo bualu ebu, wakambila bantu ne, Nuenu Bena Isalele, bualu ebu budi bunukemesha munyi? Nudi nututangidila talala tshinyi, bu tuetu mbakuendesha muntu eu ku bukole buetu anyi ku buimpe buetu?" 
Acts3:13 Nzambi wa Abalahama ne wa Isaka ne wa Yakoba, Nzambi wa bankambua betu, yeye wakatumbisha Muana wandi Yesu, unuakufila, ne unuakuhidia ku mesu kua Pilato, hakasueye kumulekela." 
Acts3:14 Nuenu nuakuhidia Udi wa Tshijila ne Muakane, nuakulomba bua kunuhabo muntu mushihianganyi;" 
Acts3:15 nuakushiha Mukelenge wa muoyo, wakabishabo ku lufu kudi Nzambi, tuetu tudi bamanyi ba bualu ebu." 
Acts3:16 Bualu bua ditabusha dia mu dina diandi, dina diandi diakukolesha muntu eu unudi nutangila ne unudi bamanye; bulelela, ditabusha diakufuma kudiye ndiakumuha bukole ku mesu kua buonso buenu." 
Acts3:17 Bana betu, ndi mumanye ne, Nuenu nuakuenza bualu ebu mu dituhakana dienu, bu inuakuenza badi ku mutu kuenu." 
Acts3:18 Kadi malu akamba Nzambi diambedi mukana mua baprofete bandi bonso ne, Kilisto wanyi neakenge, yeye wakashikisha nunku." 
Acts3:19 Kudimunai mitshima yenu, andamukai kabidi, bua mibi yenu Ijimishibue; bua bikondo bia kunukankamasha bifume ku mesu kua Mukelenge," 
Acts3:20 ne bua yeye atume Kilisto wakunusunguileye, Yesu mene." 
Acts3:21 Budiye nʼabu mbua kushala mu diulu tô ne halua bikondo bia kujadikabo tshiakabidi malu onso akamba Nzambi mukana mua baprofete bandi ba tshijila kale kale tô ne katataka. 
Acts3:22 Mose mene wakamba ne, Mukelenge Nzambi neanubishile muprofete wa munkatshi mua bana benu, bu muakambisheye meme; nenutumikile mei andi onso anuambileye." 
Acts3:23 Muntu yonso wahidia kutumikila mei a muprofete au nebamubutule munkatshi mua bantu. 
Acts3:24 Bulelela, baprofete bonso, ku Samuele tô ne ku bakamulonda, bungi buabo bakadi bamba, bakamba bua matuku â kabidi." 
Acts3:25 Nuenu nudi bana ba baprofete, ne ba dihungila dia Nzambi diakahungeye ne bankambua benu, wambila Abalahama ne, Bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bualu bua tunkanuniuna tuebe." 
Acts3:26 Nzambi mumane kubisha Muana wandi diambedi, wakamutuma kunudi bua kunusankisheye, hanumusheye muntu ne muntu ku mibi yandi." 
Acts4:1 Hakadibo bambila bantu dî edi, bakuidi banene ne kahita ka ntempelo ne Basadoke bakahia kudibo;" 
Acts4:2 bakadi ne tshishi bualu bua bakadi bayisha bantu, bakadi bamba bua dibika dia ku lufu bualu bua Yesu wakabika." 
Acts4:3 Bakabakuata, bakababuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu tô ne hakatshiabu, bualu bua diba diakamba kubuela." 
Acts4:4 Kadi ba bungi bakunvua dî bakitabusha; bungi bua balume buakakumbana bu binunu bitanu. 
Acts4:5 Hakatshiabu, bakokeshi babo ne bakulu ne bafundi bakadisangisha mu Yelushalema;" 
Acts4:6 Ana, muakuidi munene wakadika, ne Kayafa, ne Yone, ne Alesandelo, ne ba mu tshiota tshionso tshia muakuidi munene." 
Acts4:7 Hakimanyikabo Petelo ne Yone munkatshi muabo, bakabakonka ne, Nuakuenza bualu ebu ne bukole kai, anyi mu dina dia nganyi?" 
Acts4:8 Petelo mûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, wakabambila ne, Nuenu bakokeshi ba bantu, ne bakulu," 
Acts4:9 biatulumbuluishabo lelu bua bualu buimpe biakuenzelabo muntu wa mubidi mutekete mudiye mukoleshibue; 
Acts4:10 buonso buenu ne Bena Isalele bonso numanye ne, Mu dina dia Yesu Kilisto wa ku Nazaleta, unuakashiha ku mutshi mutshiamakane, wakabisha Nzambi ku lufu, mu dina edi mene mudi muntu eu, udi muimane ku mpala kuenu, mukoleshibue." 
Acts4:11 Yesu udi dibue diakahidiabo kunudi nuenu bibaki ba nsubu, kadi diakatekabo ku mutu kua ditumba." 
Acts4:12 Mu munga muntu yonso kamuena luhandu, bualu bua kakuena dinga dina munshi mua diulu, diba bantu, didi dimanye mua kutusungila." 
Acts4:13 Hakamonabo dikima dia Petelo ne Yone, hakamanyabo ne, Kabena bamanye mikanda, badi bantu hatuhu, bakakema; bakabamanya ne, Mbakadi ne Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Hakamonabo muntu mukoleshibue muimane nʼabo, kabakamanya mua kuamba dî." 
Acts4:15 Hakabambilabo ne, Umukai ba tshilumbuluidi, bakadi bebeshangana ne," 
Acts4:16 Netuenzele bantu aba tshinyi? Bulelela, bonso badi bashikama mu Yelushalema badi bamanye ne, Bantu aba bakuenza tshimanyinu tshidi tshimanyibua; katuena bamanye mua kutshivila." 
Acts4:17 Kadi bua bualu ebu kabutangadiki munkatshi mua bantu, tubakanyinai ne, Kanuambidi muntu bualu mu dina edi kabidi tshiendelele." 
Acts4:18 Bakababikila, bakabambila bikole ne, Kanuambidi bantu bualu mu dina dia Yesu, kanubayishi." 
Acts4:19 Kadi Petelo ne Yone bakabakudimuna ne, Nusungule budi buakane ku mesu kua Nzambi, kutumikila di dienu anyi dî dia Nzambi;" 
Acts4:20 bualu bua katuena bamanye mua kuenza bualu bukuabo, anu kuambila bantu malu atuakumona ne atuakunvua." 
Acts4:21 Hakabakanyinabo kabidi bikole, bakababela, kabakamona bualu bua kubakengesha, bakatshina bantu; bualu bua bantu bonso bakadi batumbisha Nzambi bua muanda wakenjibua." 
Acts4:22 Muntu wakenzelabo tshimanyinu etshi tshia kuondahibua wakadi bidimu makumi anai bisambuke. 
Acts4:23 Hakabalekelabo, bakahingana kudi bana babo, bakabamanyisha malu onso akabambila bakuidi banene ne bakulu." 
Acts4:24 Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakatumbisha Nzambi ne mutshima umue, bakamba ne, Mukelenge wetu, wewe wakafuka diulu ne buloba ne mai manene ne bintu bionso bidimu;" 
Acts4:25 wewe wakamba kudi Nyuma Muimpe mukana mua tatu wetu Davidi, muntu webe ne, Bisamba bia bende biakufunyina bulobo tshinyi? Bantu bakuelela meshi a malu a hatuhu tshinyi?" 
Acts4:26 Bakelenge ba ha buloba bakutantamana bua kuluangana, Banfumu bakudisangisha bua Kuelela Mukelenge ne Kilisto wandi tshifufu." 
Acts4:27 Bulelela, mu musoko eu, Helode ne Pontio Pilato ne bisamba bia bende ne Bena Isalele bakadisangisha bua kuelela Muana webe wa tshijila Yesu, uwakela manyi ha mutu, tshifufu," 
Acts4:28 ne bua kuenza malu onso akasungula tshianza tshiebe ne mutshima webe diambedi ne, Alue." 
Acts4:29 Mukelenge, bua malu a mpindiu, utangile dikanyina diabo; uhe bantu bebe mitshima ya kuamba dî diebe ne dikima dikole," 
Acts4:30 hautshidi wolola tshianza tshiebe bua kuondaha bantu; bimanyinu ne malu a kukema Menjibue mu dina dia Muana webe wa tshijila Yesu. 
Acts4:31 Hakatendelelabo Nzambi nunku, muaba wakadibo badisangisha wakakankishibua; buonso buabo bakadi bûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, bakamba dî dia Nzambi ne dikima." 
Acts4:32 Tshisumbu tshia bakadi bitabusha tshiakadi ne mutshima ne musûke umue; kakuakadi muntu umue wakamba ne, Bintu bindi nʼabi mbianyi nkayanyi; kadi bakasangisha bintu bionso hohamue." 
Acts4:33 Bapostolo bakadi bamba ne bukole bua bungi bua dibika dia Mukelenge Yesu ku lufu, ngasa wa bungi wakadi nʼabo bonso." 
Acts4:34 Munkatshi muabo kamuakadi muntu wakadi ukengela tshintu; bualu bua bakadi ne madimi anyi nsubu, bakabihana, bakadi balua ne mushinga wa biakahanabo," 
Acts4:35 bakadi bauteka ku makasa a bapostolo; bakadi babanyangana muntu ne muntu bu muakadiye nʼatshi bualu. 
Acts4:36 Muntu wakadiku, dina diandi Yosefe, bapostolo bakamuidika dinga dina ne, Bânaba (kukudimuna kua muaku ne, Muana wa Busambi), Muena Lewi, mulela ku Kupulio;" 
Acts4:37 wakadi ne budimi, wakabuhana, wakalua ne mushinga, wakauteka ku makasa a bapostolo." 
Acts5:1 Muntu wakadiku, dina diandi Anania, ne mukashi wandi Sapila, wakahana tshintu tshiakadiye nʼatshi," 
Acts5:2 wakasokoka tshituha tshia mushinga, mukashi wandi wakadi mumanye bualu ebu; Anania wakalua ne tshinga tshituha, wakatshiteka ku makasa a bapostolo." 
Acts5:3 Kadi Petelo wakamba ne, Anania, bualu kai Satana wakûsha mutshima webe tente bua wewe kudinga Nyuma Muimpe ne bua kusokoka tshituha tshia mushinga wa budimi?" 
Acts5:4 Hakadi budimi mu tshianza tshiebe, kabuakadi buebe, anyi? Hawakubuhana mushinga wabu kawakadi webe, anyi? Wakuelelangana meshi a bualu ebu mu mutshima webe munyi? Kuakudinga bantu, wakudinga Nzambi." 
Acts5:5 Hakunvua Anania mei â, wakahona hanshi, wakahuola, muoyo wandi; buowa bunene buakakuata bantu bonso bakunvua bualu ebu." 
Acts5:6 Bansongalume bakabika, bakamunyengela bilulu, bakaluhuka ngandi, bakamujika." 
Acts5:7 Hakahita diba bu mpola Isatu, mukashi wandi wakabuela, kai mumanye bualu." 
Acts5:8 Petelo wakamukonka ne, Ungambile, nuenu nuakuhana budimi ku mushinga bungi kampanda, anyi? Yeye wakamba ne, Bulelela, ku mushinga bungi nunku." 
Acts5:9 Kadi Petelo wakamukonka ne, Nuakusangishila mei enu bua kuteta Nyuma wa Mukelenge munda tshinyi? Tangila, makasa a bakujika bayebe adi ku mbelu, nebaluhuke nʼebe." 
Acts5:10 Yeye wakahona hanshi lukasa ku makasa andi, wakahuola muoyo wandi; bansongalume bakabuela, bakamusangana mufue, bakaluhuka nʼandi, bakamujika hehi ne bayandi." 
Acts5:11 Buowa bunene buakakuata bena ekelesia bonso; buakakuata bonso bakutuma malu â kabidi. 
Acts5:12 Ku bianza bia bapostolo bimanyinu bia bungi ne malu a kukema biakadi bienjibua munkatshi mua bantu; buonso buabo bakadi badisangisha mu mbalanda wa Solomo ne mutshima umue. 
Acts5:13 Kakuakadi muntu wa bakadi bashale wakadi ne bukitu bua kudisangisha nʼabo; kadi bantu bakadi babatumbisha; 
Acts5:14 bena kuitabusha bakasangishibua kudi Mukelenge, bisumbu bia balume ne bia bakashi, batambe ba diambedi bungi." 
Acts5:15 Bua bualu ebu bantu bakalua ne basame mu misesu ya musoko, bakabaladika ha malalu ne ha biata ne, Hahita Petelo, mundidimbi wandi ubuikile nasha mukuabo wabo." 
Acts5:16 Bantu ba bungi bafume ku misoko yakadi hehi ne Yelushalema bakadi badiunguisha, batuale basame ne bakadi batatshisha kudi nyuma ya bukoya; masama a buonso buabo akashika." 
Acts5:17 Kadi muakuidi mimene wakabika ne bonso bakadi nʼandi (mba luseke lua Basadoke), bakadi bûle tente ne mukau;" 
Acts5:18 bakakuata bapostolo, bakababuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Acts5:19 Kadi mu butuku muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakunzulula bibi bia nsubu wa lukanu, wakaluhuka nʼabo, wakabambila ne," 
Acts5:20 Yai bienu, nuimane mu ntempelo, nuambile bantu mei onso a Muoyo eu." 
Acts5:21 Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakabuela mu ntempelo hatshiatshia, bakabanga kuyisha bantu. Kadi muakuidi mimene wakalua ne bakadi nʼandi, wakabikila balumbuludi ne bakulu bonso ba bana ba Isalele, wakatuma dî ku nsubu wa lukanu bua kuluabo nʼabo." 
Acts5:22 Kadi baka lua tuhalai, katuakabasangana mu nsubu wa lukanu; tuakahingana, tuakamba ne," 
Acts5:23 Tuakusangana nsubu wa lukanu muinshila bimpe ne balami bimane ku bibi; kadi hatuakunzulula, katuakusanganamu muntu." 
Acts5:24 Hakunvua kahita ka balami ba ntempelo ne bakuidi banene mei â, mitshima yabo yakalubakana ne, Bualu ebu nebuikale munyi?" 
Acts5:25 Muntu wakalua, wakabambila ne, Tangilai, banuakubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu badi bimane mu ntempelo bayisha bantu." 
Acts5:26 Hashishe kahita ka bulami ba ntempelo ne tuhalai bakaya, bakalua nʼabo, kabai babakoka ku bukole, bua bakadi batshina bantu ne, Nebatukume mabue." 
Acts5:27 Hakaluabo nʼabo, bakabateka ku mpala kua balumbuludi. Muakuidi munene wakabakonka ne," 
Acts5:28 Tuakunukandika bikole ne, Kanuyishi bantu mu dina edi; ne tangilai, nuenu nuakûsha Yelushalema tente ne diyisha dienu, nudi basue kuteka mashi a muntu eu hamʼbidi hetu." 
Acts5:29 Kadi Petelo ne bapostolo bakandamuna ne, Butudi nʼabu mbua kutumikila mei a Nzambi ku mpala kua mei a bantu." 
Acts5:30 Nzambi wa bankambua betu wakabisha Yesu unuakashiha mukudika ku mutshi mutshiamakane. 
Acts5:31 Nzambi wakamubisha ne tshianza tshiandi tshîa balume bua kuikaleye Mukelenge ne Musungidi, ne bua kuheye Isalele kukudimuna kua mitshima ne kujimisha kua mibi." 
Acts5:32 Tuetu tudi bamanyi ba malu â, ne Nyuma Muimpe kabidi, udi Nzambi muhe badi batumikila mei andi." 
Acts5:33 Hakunvuabo dî edi, tshishi tshikole tshiakabakuata; bakasua kushiha bapostolo." 
Acts5:34 Kadi muetu mukuabo, Mufalese, dinu diandi Gamaliele, muyishi wa mikenshi ya Mose, mutumbishibue kudi bantu bonso, wakimana mu tshilumbuluidi; wakamba ne, Bahatule bantu aba tshituha." 
Acts5:35 Wakamba biandi ne, Nuenu Bena Isalele, nudimuke bua bualu bunukadi ha kuenzela bantu aba." 
Acts5:36 Bualu bua ku mpala kua matuku â Teuda wakabika biandi, wakamba ne, Meme ndi muntu munene; bantu bu nkama inai bakadisangisha nʼandi; kadi yeye wakashihebua; bonso bakadi bamutumikila bakatangadishibua, bualu buabo buakalua tshianana." 
Acts5:37 Ku nyima kua bualu ebu Yuda wa mu Galela wakabika mu matuku akadibo bafunda mena a bantu, wakalohesha bantu bakuabo ku nyima kuandi; yeye kabidi wakafua, bonso bakadi bamutumikila bakatangadishibua." 
Acts5:38 Katataka ndi nuambila ne, Ehukai kudi bantu aba, kanubenzedi bualu; bualu bua bikala lungenyi elu anyi mudimu eu bia bantu, nebijimine;" 
Acts5:39 kadi bikala bualu ebu bua Nzambi, kanuena bamanye mua kubuhumbisha; nunku nebansangane nuluisha Nzambi nvita." 
Acts5:40 Bakitabusha dî diandi; hakabikilabo bapostolo, bakabakuma, bakabakandika ne, Kanuambi bualu mu dina dia Yesu, bakabalekela." 
Acts5:41 Bakumuka ku mpala kua bena tshilumbuluidi basanka bualu bua bakabadibua ne, Mbakane bua kufuishibuabo bundu bualu bua Dina dia Yesu." 
Acts5:42 Ku dituku ku dituku, mu ntempelo ne mu nsubu yabo, kabakalekela kuyisha bantu ne kubambila lumu luimpe ne, Yesu udi Kilisto." 
Acts6:1 Mu matuku â, hakadi bayidi bakumbane ba bungi, Bena Yuda bakadi bakula muaku wa Bena Gelika bakajiana Bena Ebelu ne, Ha kuabanyangana kua bintu ku dituku ku dituku, badi bahua muoyo bua bakashi betu ba mu lufuila." 
Acts6:2 Bapostolo dikumi ne babidi bakabikila tshisumbu tshionso tshia bayidi, bakamba ne, Kambimpe bia tuetu kulekela dî dia Nzambi bua kuenza mudimu wa mesa." 
Acts6:3 Bana betu, nukebe balume muanda mutekete munkatshi muenu badi ne lumu luimpe, badi bûle tente ne Nyuma ne lungenyi, netubateke ha mutu ha bualu ebu." 
Acts6:4 Kadi tuetu netunanukile mu kutendelela kua Nzambi ne mu kuenza kua mudimu wa dî diandi. 
Acts6:5 Di edi diakabasankisha buonso buabo; bakasungula Stefano, mule tente ne ditabusha ne Nyuma Muimpe; ne Filipo, ne Polokolo, ne Nikanô, ne Timono, ne Pâmena, ne Nikolao wa ku Antiokia wakadi muitabushi wa bualu bua Bena Yuda." 
Acts6:6 Bakabateka ku mpala kua bapostolo; hakatendelelabo Nzambi, bakabatentekesha bianza ha mitu yabo." 
Acts6:7 Di dia Nzambi diakadiundadiunda, bayidi bakadi bavulangana ba bungi mu Yelushalema; bakuidi ba bungi bakadi bitabusha lumu luimpe." 
Acts6:8 Stefano, mûle tente ne ngasa ne bukole, wakenzenza malu a kukema ne bimanyinu binene munkatshi mua bantu." 
Acts6:9 Kadi bakuabo ba mu nsunagoga udibo babikila ne, Ngua Bena Budishikaminyi, ne wa Bena Kulene, ne wa Bena Alesandelia, ne wa Bena Kilikia ne Bena Asia bakabika, bakela mpata ne Stefano." 
Acts6:10 Kabakamanya mua kuhita lungenyi luandi ne Nyuma wakadi umuakuisha. 
Acts6:11 Bakabueshela bantu bakuabo, bobo bakamba ne, Tuakunvua muntu eu uhenda Mose ne Nzambi." 
Acts6:12 Bakahila bantu ne bakulu ne bafundi, bakalua kudiye, bakamukuata, bakalua nʼandi ku tshilumbuluidi," 
Acts6:13 bakatua ne bamanyi ba mashimi, bobo bakamba ne, Muntu eu kena ulekela kuhetula muaba eu wa tshijila, ne mikenshi ya Mose;" 
Acts6:14 tuakumunvua wamba ne, Yesu eu wa mu Nazaleta neabutuishe muaba eu, neakudimune bilele biakatuha Mose." 
Acts6:15 Bonso bakadi ha tshilumbuluidi bakamutangila talala, bakamona mpala wandi mukudimuke bu wa muanjelo." 
Acts7:1 Muakuidi munene wakamukonka ne, Malu â adi malelela, anyi?" 
Acts7:2 Stefano wakamba ne, Bana betu ne batatu, unvuai; Nzambi wa butumbi wakamueneka kudi tatu wetu Abalahama, hakadiye mu Mesopotamia, diambedi yeye kai muanze kushikama mu Halana," 
Acts7:3 wakamuambila ne, Umuke mu buloba buebe ne munkatshi mua bena kuenu, ulue mu buloba bundualua kukulesha." 
Acts7:4 Yeye wakumuka mu buloba bua Bena Kasada, wakashikama mu Halana; hakafua tatu wandi, Nzambi wakamumushaku, wakamuteka mu buloba ebu bunudi bashikamemu katataka;" 
Acts7:5 kadi yeye kakamuhamu buhianyi, nasha kaba kakese ka kudiateye makasa; Nzambi wakamulaya ne, Nenkuhe buloba ebu tshiendelele ne tunkanunuina tuebe, yeye kai muanze kulela muana." 
Acts7:6 Nzambi wakamba nunku ne, Tunkanunuina tuandi netuikale mu buloba bua bende, bobo nebababueshe mu buhika, nebabenzele bibi bidimu nkama inai." 
Acts7:7 Nzambi wakamba ne, Nendumbuluishe tshisamba tshia bantu tshikalabo bahika babo; hashishe nebaluhuke, nebankuatshile mudimu mu muaba eu." 
Acts7:8 Nzambi wakamuha dihungila dia ditengula; nunku Abalahama wakalela Isaka, wakamutengula hakakumbana matuku muanda mukulu; Isaka wakalela Yakoba, Yakoba wakalela bankambua betu dikumi ne babidi." 
Acts7:9 Bankambua betu bakadi ne Yosefe mukau, bakamuhana mu Ejipitu; kadi Nzambi wakadi nʼandi," 
Acts7:10 wakamusungila mu makenga andi onso, wakamuha diakalengele ne lungenyi ku mesu kua Palô, mukelenge wa Ejipitu; wakamuteka ngovena wa Ejipitu ne wa nsubu wandi yonso." 
Acts7:11 Tshiole tshiakalua mu buloba buonso bua Ejipitu ne bua Kanâna, ne dikenga dikole; bankambua betu kabakamona bia kudia." 
Acts7:12 Hakunvua Yakoba ne, Mu Ejipitu mudi bia kudia, wakatumamu bankambua betu musangu wa kumudilu." 
Acts7:13 Hakayabo musangu muibidi, Yosefe wakadimanyisha kudi bana babo, ne tshisamba tshia Yosefe tshiakamanyibua kudi Palô." 
Acts7:14 Yosefe wakatuma dî, wakabikila tatu wandi Yakoba ne bena kuabo bonso, bakadi bantu makumi muanda mutekete ne batanu." 
Acts7:15 Yakoba wakahueka mu Ejipitu; wakafua biandi ne bankambua betu bonso; 
Acts7:16 bakaya nʼabo ku Shekeme, bakabajika mu lukita luakasumba Abalahama ku mushinga wa argent kudi bana ba Hamô mu Shekeme." 
Acts7:17 Hakafikila tshikondo tshia kushikishabo mulayi wakalaya Nzambi Abalahama ha buihi, bantu bakavulangana, bakakumbana ba bungi mu Ejipitu" 
Acts7:18 tô ne hakabika mukuabo mukelenge wa Ejipitu wakadi kai mumanye Yosefe. 
Acts7:19 Yeye wakafukila tshisamba tshietu budimu, wakenzela bankambua betu bibi, bua bobo bele bana babo bakese balela ha mbelu, bua kabashadi ne muoyo." 
Acts7:20 Mu tshikondo etshi bakalela Mose, yeye wakadi muana muimpe be ku mesu kua Nzambi; bakamudisha ngondo isatu mu nsubu wa tatu wandi;" 
Acts7:21 hakamumushabo mu nsubu, muana mukashi wa Palô wakamuangula, wakamudisha bu muanʼandi." 
Acts7:22 Bakayisha Mose lungenyi luonso lua Bena Ejipitu; yeye wakadi mukole mu mei andi ne mu bienzedi biandi. 
Acts7:23 Hakadiye bidimu bu makumi anai, bualu buakalua mu mutshima wandi bua kuyeye kutangila bana babo, bana ba Isalele." 
Acts7:24 Hakamoneye umena kuabo ukengeshibua, wakaya kumuluila nvita, wakasombuela wakadi ukenga, wakashi Muena Ejipitu." 
Acts7:25 Yeye wakelangana meshi ne, Bena kuetu nebajingulule ne, Nzambi udi ubasungila ne tshianza tshianyi; kadi bobo kabakajingulula bualu ebu." 
Acts7:26 Hakatshiabu, wakatukidila bakuabo baluangana, yeye wakateta bua kubasunga, wakamba ne, Balumiana, nudi bana ba muntu umue; nudi nuenzelangana bibi tshinyi?" 
Acts7:27 Kadi wakadi wenzela umena kuabo bibi wakamusekila ne, Wakukuvuisha mukelenge wetu ne mulumbuludi wetu nganyi?" 
Acts7:28 Udi musue kunshiha bu muwakashiha Muena Ejipitu makelela, anyi?" 
Acts7:29 Hakunvua Mose dî edi, wakanyema, wakalua bu muenyi mu buloba bua Midiyana, kuakaleleleye bana balume babidi." 
Acts7:30 Hakakumbana bidimu makumi anai, muanjelo wakamueneka kudiye mu tshihela tshia mukuna wa Sinai mu ludimi lua kahia luakadi mu katshi." 
Acts7:31 Hakamona Mose bualu ebu, wakakema; hakayeye ha buihi bua kubumona, dî dia Mukelenge diakalua ne," 
Acts7:32 Ndi bianyi Nzambi wa bankambua bebe, Nzambi wa Abalahama ne wa Isaka ne wa Yakoba. Mose wakazakala, yeye kakadi ne bukitu bua kubumona." 
Acts7:33 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Umusha bisabata ku makasa, bualu bua muaba ûdi muimane udi buloba bua tshijila." 
Acts7:34 Bulelela, nakatangila dikenga dia bantu banyi badi mu Ejipitu, nakunvua mikemu yabo, nakuhueka bua kubasungila; luaku katataka, nenkutume mu Ejipitu." 
Acts7:35 Mose eu nguakahidiabo ne, Wakuvuisha mukelenge ne mulumbuludi nganyi? Nzambi wakamutuma bu mukelenge ne musungidi ne tshianza tshia muanjelo wakamueneka kudiye mu katshi." 
Acts7:36 Muntu eu wakabalombola, mumane kuenza malu a kukema ne bimanyinu mu Ejipitu, ne mu Mai Makunze, ne mu tshihela bidimu makumi anai." 
Acts7:37 Yeye Mose eu mene wakambila bana ba Isalele ne, Nzambi neanubishile muprofete wa munkatshi mua bana benu, bu muakambisheye meme." 
Acts7:38 Yeye nguakadi mu ekelesia wa mu tshihela ne muanjelo wakadi wakula nʼandi ku mukuna wa Sinai, wakadi kabidi ne bankambua betu; yeye wakangata mei a muoyo a kutuha bietu;" 
Acts7:39 bankambua betu kabakamutumikila, bakamusekila, bakahingisha mitshima yabo mu Ejipitu;" 
Acts7:40 bakambila Alona ne, Utuenzele nzambi ya kuya ku mpala kuetu, bualu bua katuena bamanye bualu buakukuata Mose eu wakutuluhula mu buloba bua Ejipitu." 
Acts7:41 Mu matuku au bakenza muana wa ngombe, bakashihela luhingu nyama, bakasanka bua bintu biakenzabo ne bianza biabo." 
Acts7:42 Kadi Nzambi wakabakoma nyima, wakabalekela bua kutendelelabo tshisumbu tshia bidi mulu; bu muakafundabo mu mukanda wa baprofete ne, Nuakafila nyama mishiha ne milambu kundi meme Bidimu makumi anai mu tshihela, anyi, nuenu ba mu nsubu wa Isalele?" 
Acts7:43 Nuakambula nsubu wa tshilulu wa Moleke, Ne mutoto wa nzambi wenu Lefana, Bifuanyikishi binuakenza bua kubikukuila; Ne meme nenuteke ku nyima kua Babulona." 
Acts7:44 Bankambua betu bakadi ne nsubu wa tshilulu wa tshimanyishilu mu tshihela bu muakalongolola wakadi wakula ne Mose ne, Umuenze bu tshifuanyikishi tshiwakutangila," 
Acts7:45 Bankambua bakamuhiana, bakalua nʼandi ne Yoshua, hakabuelabo mu buloba bua bisamba bia bende bakumushabo kudi Nzambi ku mesu kua bankambua betu, wakadika tô ne mu matuku a Davidi." 
Acts7:46 Davidi wakadi ne diakalengele kudi Nzambi, wakamulomba ne, Nkebele Nzambi wa Yakoba nsubu;" 
Acts7:47 kadi Solomo wakamuibakila nsubu. 
Acts7:48 Kadi Udi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu kena usomba mu nsubu mibaka ne bianza; bu muakamba muprofete ne," 
Acts7:49 Diulu didi nkuasa wanyi wa butumbi, Buloba budi tshitekelu tshia munshi mua makasa anyi; Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Nenungibakile nsubu kai? Nengikale ne tshikishilu mu muaha kai?" 
Acts7:50 Tshianza tshianyi katshiakenza bintu ebi bionso, anyi?" 
Acts7:51 Nuenu bena tshishiku, badi kabai batengudibue mu mitshima ne mu matshu, matuku onso nudi nuhidia Nyuma Muimpe; nudi nuenza bu muakenza bankambua benu." 
Acts7:52 Muprofete kai wakadi bankambua benu kabai bamukengeshe? Bakashiha bakadi badianjila kuamba diambedi ne, Muakane ulualua; katataka nuenu nuakulua bamutungidi bandi ne bamushihi;" 
Acts7:53 nuenu bakangata mikenshi ya Mose mihebue kudi banjelo, kanuakatumikila." 
Acts7:54 Hakunvuabo mei â, tshishi tshikole tshiakabakuata, bakamudiangena ku menu." 
Acts7:55 Kadi yeye, mûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, wakatangila mulu talala, wakamona butumbi bua Nzambi, ne Yesu muimane ku tshianza tshia bukole tshia Nzambi," 
Acts7:56 wakamba ne, Monai, ndi ntangila diulu dibululuke, ne Muana wa muntu muimane ku tshianza tshia bukole tshia Nzambi." 
Acts7:57 Kadi bakela bila, bakajibika mu matshu abo, bakamunguila, bakamukuata buonso buabo hamue;" 
Acts7:58 bakamuhatula mu musoko, bakamukuma mabue. Bamonyi ba bualu ebu bakateka bivualu biabo ku makasa a nsongalume dina diandi Shaula." 
Acts7:59 Bakadi bakuma Stefano mabue ulomba Mukelenge wamba ne, Mukelenge Yesu, angata muoyo wanyi," 
Acts7:60 Wakatua binu hanshi, wakela dî dikole ne, Mukelenge, kubatekedi bubi ebu. Hakambeye dî edi, wakalala tulu." 
Acts8:1 Shaula wakadi witabusha bua Stefano kufueye. Dituku adi mene dikenga dikole diakakuata bena ekelesia ba mu Yelushalema, buonso buabo bakatangadika mu nseke ya Yudaya ne ya Samalea, anu bapostolo bakadi bashale." 
Acts8:2 Batendeledi bakane bakajika Stefano, bakamuashila madilu makole." 
Acts8:3 Kadi Shaula wakabutula bena ekelesia, wakabuela mu nsubu yonso, wakakoka balume ne bakashi, wakababuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu." 
Acts8:4 Nunku bakadi batangadike bakendakana bamba dî dia lumu luimpe. 
Acts8:5 Filipo wakahueka ku musoko wa Samalea, wakabanga kubambila bua Kilisto." 
Acts8:6 Bantu ba bungi bakitabusha malu akabambila Filipo ne mutshima umue, hakunvuabo, ne hakamonabo bimanyinu biakenzenzeye." 
Acts8:7 Bualu bua nyuma ya bukoya yakadi munda mua bantu ba bungi, yakaluhuka yela mei ai bikole; ba bungi bakadi ne tuneke ne bakadi balema bakakoleshibua." 
Acts8:8 Ma musoko au muakadi disanka dinene. 
Acts8:9 Mu musoko muakadi muntu, dina diandi Simona, diambedi wakadi mutempeshanganyi wa mbuku, wakukemesha Bena Samalea, udiamba ne, Ndi muntu mimene." 
Acts8:10 Bantu bonso bakunvuila dî diandi, banene ne ba tshianana, bakamba ne, Muntu eu udi Bukole bua Nzambi budibo babikila ne, Bunene." 
Acts8:11 Bakunvuila dî diandi bualu bua yeye wakabakemesha ne mbuku yandi tô musangu mule. 
Acts8:12 Hakitabushabo Filipo ubambila lumu luimpe lua bukelenge bua Nzambi ne lua dina dia Yesu Kilisto, bakabatijibua, balume ne bakashi." 
Acts8:13 Simona mene wakitabusha kabidi; hakamubatizabo, yeye wakalamata kudi Filipo; hakatangileye bimanyinu ne malu manene a kukema biakenjibua, wakakema biandi." 
Acts8:14 Hakunvua bapostolo bakadi mu Yelushalema ne, Bena Samalea bakuitabusha dî dia Nzambi, bakabatumina Petelo ne Yone." 
Acts8:15 Hakahuekabo, bakabalombela Nzambi bua kuangatabo Nyuma Muimpe;" 
Acts8:16 bualu bua yeye kakadi muanze kuhonena nasha umue wabo; bakadi anu babatijibue mu dina dia Mukelenge Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Hakabatentekeshabo bianza, bakangata Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts8:18 Hakamona Simona ne, Nyuma Muimpe udi uheshibua kuditentekesha dia bianza bia bapostolo, wakabalesha bintu, wamba ne," 
Acts8:19 Numpe meme kabidi bukole ebu, bua muntu unatentekesha bianza bianyi angate biandi Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts8:20 Kadi Petelo wakamuambila ne, Argent yebe ifue nʼebe, bualu bua wewe wakulangana meshi ne, Nengangate diha dia Nzambi ku bintu." 
Acts8:21 Wewe kuena ne tshituha anyi luseke mu bualu ebu, bua mutshima webe kawena muimpe ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Acts8:22 Nunku kudimuna mutshima webe, ulekele bubi buebe ebu, ulombe Nzambi ne bumue neakubuikidile meshi adi munda muebe." 
Acts8:23 Ndi mona ne wewe utshidi mu nyongangandu wa bululu ne mu lukanu lua bualu bubi. 
Acts8:24 Simona wakakudimuna dî ne, Nundombele Mukelenge bua nasha bumue bua malu anuakuamba kabufiki kundi." 
Acts8:25 Hakamanyisha bapostolo bantu bualu buabo, hakabambilabo dî dia Mukelenge, bakahingana ku Yelushalema, bambila misoko ya bungi ya Bena Samalea lumu luimpe." 
Acts8:26 Muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakambila Filipo ne, Bika, ya ku luseke lua ku sude mu nshila udi mumuke ku Yelushalema muye ku Aza; nshila au wa mu tshihela." 
Acts8:27 Yeye wakabika, wakaya. Tangilai, Muena Atiopa, muntu mutungula wa bukokeshi bunene ku nyima kua Kandake, nfumu mukashi wa Bena Atiopa, muikale ku mutu kua tshibutshilu tshiandi tshionso, wakadi mulue ku Yelushalema bua kutendelela Nzambi;" 
Acts8:28 wakadi uhingana mushikame mu dikalu diandi ubala mukunda wa muprofete Yeshaya. 
Acts8:29 Nyuma wakambila Filipo ne, Ya ha buihi, ulamate ku dikalu edi." 
Acts8:30 Filipo wakaya lubilu kudiye, wakamunvua ubala mukanda wa muprofete Yeshaya, wakamukonka ne, Udi mujingulule bualu bûdi ubala, anyi?" 
Acts8:31 Yeye wakamukudimuna ne, Ndi mua kujingulula munyi, bikala muntu kai mundeshe? Yeye wakasengelela Filipo bua kubandeye ne bua kushikameye nʼandi." 
Acts8:32 Luseke lua Mukanda wa Nzambi luakadiye ubala luakadi luamba ne, Bakalua nʼandi ku tshishihelu bu mukoko; Bu muana wa mukoko udi uhua ku mpala kua mukoshi wa miosa, Nunku yeye kena ubulula mukana muandi;" 
Acts8:33 Mu kudihuekesha kuandi bakanyanga tshilumbu tshiandi; Nganyi neambe bua mulongo wandi? Bakamunyenga muoyo wandi ha buloba. 
Acts8:34 Muntu mutungula wakakonka Filipo ne, Muprofete udi wamba nganyi? Udi udiamba, anyi udi wamba muntu mukuabo?" 
Acts8:35 Filipo wakabulula mukana muandi, wakabanga ku dî edi mu Mukanda wa Nzambi, wakamuambila lumu luimpe lua Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Hakadibo baya mu nshila, bakajika ku mai; muntu mutungula wakamba ne, Ahu ka mai â tshidi tshimpumbisha bua kubatijibua ntshinyi? [" 
Acts8:37 ] 
Acts8:38 Yeye wakamba ne, Dikalu dimane. Bubidi buabo bakaya mu mai, Filipo ne muntu mutungula, Filipo wakamubatiza." 
Acts8:39 Hakaluhukabo mu mai, Nyuma wa Mukelenge wakangata Filipo, wakaya nʼandi; muntu mutungula kakamutangila kabidi, wakaya biandi mu nshila usanka." 
Acts8:40 Kadi Filipo wakamueneka ku Azoto; wakahitshila mu misoko yonso tô ne ku Kaisalia, wenda ubambila lumu luimpe." 
Acts9:1 Shaula wakatshidi ufunyina bayidi ba Mukelenge bua kubashiheye, wakaya kudi muakuidi munene." 
Acts9:2 Wakamulomba mikanda ya kuya nʼai mu nsunagoga ya mu Damaseke bua kusuika basanganeye mu Nshila eu wa Nzambi, nasha balume nasha bakashi, ne bua kulueye nʼabo ku Yelushalema." 
Acts9:3 Hakadiye uya mu nshila, Wakafika hehi ne Damaseke, munya mukole wa mu diulu wakamutemena lukasa;" 
Acts9:4 wakahona hanshi, wakunvua dî dimuambila ne, Shaula, Shaula, udi unkengeshila meme tshinyi?" 
Acts9:5 Yeye wakakonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe udi nganyi? Wakamukudimuna ne, Ndi bianyi Yesu ûdi ukengesha;" 
Acts9:6 kadi bika, ubuele mu musoko, nebakuambile bualu bûdi nʼabu mbua kuenza." 
Acts9:7 Bakadi benda nʼandi bakimana bahue; bakuama dî, kadi kabakamona muntu." 
Acts9:8 Shaula wakabika hanshi; hakabululuka mesu andi, kakadi utangila tshintu; bakamukuata ku tshianza, bakamulombola tô ne ku Damaseke." 
Acts9:9 Yeye wakadi kai umona tô matuku asatu, kakadia, kakanua." 
Acts9:10 Mu Damaseke muakadi muyidi mukuabo, dina diandi Anania; Mukelenge wakamuambila mu tshilota ne, Anania. Yeye wakitaba ne, Ndiku, Mukelenge." 
Acts9:11 Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Bika biebe, uye ku nshila wa musoko udibo babikila ne, Mululame, ku nsubu wa Yuda, ukonkeku muntu, dina diandi Shaula, udi biandi Muena Tâso, bua tangila, yeye udi utendelela Nzambi;" 
Acts9:12 yeye kabidi wakamona muntu, dina diandi Anania, ubuela kudiye ma tshikena kumona, umulenga tshianza bua kutabaleye." 
Acts9:13 Kadi Anania wakandamuna ne, Mukelenge, nakunvua kudi bantu ba bungi lumu lua muntu eu, ne bu mudi malu mabi a bungi akenzeleye basanto bebe ba mu Yelushalema;" 
Acts9:14 kunu kabidi, udi ne bukole buakuangateye kudi bakuidi banene bua kusuikeye bonso badi batendelela dina diebe." 
Acts9:15 Kadi Mukelenge wakamuambila ne, Ya biebe, bualu bua yeye udi bu luhanza lunakasungula bua kutuala dina dianyi ku mesu kua bisamba bia bende, ne kua banfumu, ne kua bana ba Isalele;" 
Acts9:16 bualu bua neamuleshe bungi bua malu adiye ne bua kukengela bua dina dianyi. 
Acts9:17 Anania wakaya biandi, wakabuela mu nsubu, wakamulenga tshianza, wakamuambila ne, Muanʼetu Shaula, Mukelenge Yesu mene wakumueneka kûdi hawakadi ulua mu nshila, wakuntuma bua wewe kutabala ne bua wewe kûla tente ne Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts9:18 Bintu bu bilamulamu biakalamuka ku mesu andi lubilu, wakamona; wakabika, bakamubatiza." 
Acts9:19 Wakadia biandi, wakakankamana. Wakashala ne bayidi ba mu Damaseke matuku." 
Acts9:20 Ha diba adi mene wakabanga kuambila bantu bualu bua Yesu mu nsunagoga ne, Yeye udi Muana wa Nzambi." 
Acts9:21 Bonso bakunvua dî diandi bakadi bakema, bakabanga kukonka ne, Eu kanyeye wakabutula bakadi batendelela dina edi mu Yelushalema, anyi? Yeye wakadi muluile bualu ebu kunoko bua kuyeye nʼabo basuika ku mesu kua bakuidi banene." 
Acts9:22 Shaula wakadiundadiunda mu bukole, wakadi utshiudisha Bena Yuda bakadi mu Damaseke, wakabaluisha ne, Eu udi Kilisto." 
Acts9:23 Hakahita matuku a bungi, Bena Yuda bakasangisha dî diabo bua kumushiha;" 
Acts9:24 kadi Shaula wakamanya tshifufu tshiabo. Bakadi batentekela ku bibi bia musoko butuku ne munya bua kumushihabo: 
Acts9:25 kadi bayidi bandi bakamuangata butuku, bakamutuluila ha disoso dia lumbu, bamuhuekesha mu tshisaka." 
Acts9:26 Hakayeye ku Yelushalema, wakasua kulamata kudi bayidi; kadi bobo bakamutshina, kabakitabusha ne, Udi muyidi." 
Acts9:27 Kadi Bânaba wakamuangata, wakaya nʼandi kudi bapostolo, wakabambila bu mu akamoneye Mukelenge mu nshila, ne bu muakakula Mukelenge nʼandi ne bu muakajukuileye bantu dî mu dina dia Yesu mu Damaseke." 
Acts9:28 Wakadi mu Yelushalema, wakadi ubuela nʼabo, uluhuka nʼabo," 
Acts9:29 wakadi ubajukuila dî mu dina dia Mukelenge; wakadi wakula ne Bena Yuda bakadi bakula muaku wa Bena Gelika, wakadi welangana nʼabo mpata; kadi bakadi bakeba kumushiha." 
Acts9:30 Hakamanya bana babo ba mu Kilisto bualu ebu, bakalua nʼandi ku Kaisalia, bakamutuma ku Tâso." 
Acts9:31 Nunku bena ekelesia ba mu Yudaya yonso ne ba mu Galela ne ba mu Samalea bakadi ne ditalala, bakadi badiunda mu bualu bua Nzambi; bakadi benda mu dishina dia Mukelenge ne mu disamba dia Nyuma Muimpe; bakadi bavulangana ba bungi." 
Acts9:32 Hakadi Petelo wendakana mu nseke yonso, wakahueka kudi basanto bakadi ku Luda." 
Acts9:33 Wakasanganaku muntu, dina diandi Ainea, wakadi mulale ha bulalu buandi bidimu muanda mukulu, bua wakadi ne disama dia kaneke." 
Acts9:34 Petelo wakamuambila ne, Ainea, Yesu Kilisto udi ukukolesha; bika, udilongoluele bulalu buebe. Yeye wakabika lubilu." 
Acts9:35 Bonso ba mu Luda ne ba mu Shalona bakamumona, bakakudimuna mitshima yabo kudi Mukelenge." 
Acts9:36 Mu Yopa muakadi muyidi mukashi, dina diandi Tabita, kukudimuna mu muaku wa Bena Gelika ne, Dôka. Mukashi eu wakadi ne midimu mimpe ya bungi ne luse biakenzelenzeleye bantu," 
Acts9:37 Matuku au disama diakamukuata, wakafua. Hakoweshabo tshitalu tshiandi, bakatshiteka mu nsubu wa ha mutu." 
Acts9:38 Luda wakadi ha buihi ne Yopa; hakunvua bayidi ne, Petelo udi eku, bakamutumina bantu babidi bamusengelela ne, Kushanguluki bua kulua kutudi." 
Acts9:39 Petelo wakabika, wakaya nʼabo. Hakalueye, bakaya nʼandi mu nsubu wa ha mutu. Bakashi bonso ba mu lufuila bakadi bimane ha buihi nʼandi, badila, baleshangana mitelu ne bivualu biakatela Dôka hakadiye nʼabo." 
Acts9:40 Kadi Petelo wakabumusha buonso buabo, wakatua binu hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi; wakatshinguluka kudi tshitalu, wakamba ne, Tabita, bika. Mukashi wakabulula mesu; hakamoneye Petelo, wakashikama." 
Acts9:41 Petelo wakamukuata ne tshianza, wakamubisha. Hakabikileye basanto ne bakashi ba mu lufuila, wakabalesheye ne muoyo." 
Acts9:42 Bualu ebu buakamanyibua mu musoko wonso wa Yopa, ba bungi bakitabusha Mukelenge." 
Acts9:43 Yeye wakalala matuku a bungi mu Yopa mu nsubu wa mukuonyi wa biseba, dina diandi Simona." 
Acts10:1 Mu Kaisalia muakadi muntu, dina diandi Kônelio, yeye wakadi kapitene ka tshisumbu tshia masalayi lukama, tshiakadibo babikila ne, Tshia Bena Italia." 
Acts10:2 Yeye wakadi mutendeledi muakane, wakadi utshina Nzambi ne ba mu nsubu wandi bonso, wakadi uha bantu bintu bia luse bia bungi, wakadi utendelela Nzambi matuku onso." 
Acts10:3 Hakadi diba bu ha Isatu dilolo, yeye wakamona mu tshikena kumona ku buntu muanjelo wa Nzambi ubuela mudiye, umuambila ne, Kônelio." 
Acts10:4 Hakamujosheye, wakatshina, wakakonka ne, Mukelenge, ntshinyi? Wakamukudimuna ne, Mitendelelu yebe ne bintu biebe bia luse Mutu wahangana diakabanda ku mesu kua Nzambi bu tshivulukidi." 
Acts10:5 Katataka utume bantu ku Yopa, balue ne Simona, dinga dina Petelo;" 
Acts10:6 yeye udi ulala mu nsubu wa Simona, mukuonyi wa biseba, nsubu wandi udi kukala kua mai." 
Acts10:7 Hakumuka muanjelo wakadi wakula nʼandi, wakabikila bena mudimu bandi babidi ba mu nsubu ne disalayi dimpe dia bakadi bamukuatshila mudimu matuku onso;" 
Acts10:8 hakabalondaleye malu â onso, wakabatuma ku Yopa." 
Acts10:9 Hakatshiabu, hakadibo baya mu nshila, hakambabo kufika ha buihi ne musoko, Petelo wakabanda ha mutu ha nsubu bua kutendelela Nzambi, diba diamba kufika munda munya." 
Acts10:10 Nsala yakamukuata, wakasua kudia; hakadibo balongolola bidia, wakalotakana," 
Acts10:11 wakamona diulu dibuluke ne tshintu bu tshilulu tshinene tshihueka hanshi tshikuata ku nzemba yatshi inai; 
Acts10:12 munda muatshi muakadi nyama yonso ya makama anai ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu ya mulu. 
Acts10:13 Dî diakalua kudiye ne, Petelo, bika, shiha, udie." 
Acts10:14 Kadi Petelo wakamba ne, Nasha, Mukelenge; ku kale tô ne katataka tshiena muanze kudia bintu bia tshianana ne bidi tshijila." 
Acts10:15 Dî diakalua kudiye tshiakabidi ne, Kubikidi tshiakulengeshabo kudi Nzambi ne, Ntshia tshianana." 
Acts10:16 Bakenza nunku misangu isatu, tshintu bu tshilulu tshiakahingana lubilu mulu kabidi." 
Acts10:17 Hakadi Petelo ulubakana mu mutshima wandi, ukeba kumanya bua tshikena kumona tshiakamoneye, tangila, bantu batumibue kudi Kônelio bakadi bimane ku tshibi, bamane kukonka nsubu wa Simona;" 
Acts10:18 bebesha ne, Simona, udibo babikila ne, Petelo, udi emu, anyi?" 
Acts10:19 Hakadi Petelo welangana meshi a tshikena kumona, Nyuma wakamuambila ne, Tangila, bantu basatu badi bakukeba." 
Acts10:20 Bika, hueka munshi, uye nʼabo; kuedi mpata, bualu bua nakubatuma." 
Acts10:21 Petelo wakahueka munshi muakadibo, wakabambila ne, Meme eu unudi nukeba, nudi baluile tshinyi?" 
Acts10:22 Bakamba ne, Kônelio, kapitene ka masalayi lukama, udi muntu muakane udi utshina Nzambi, lumu luandi ludi luimpe ku tshisamba tshionso tshia Bena Yuda; Nzambi wakamudimusha kudi muanjelo wa tshijila bua kukubikileye ulue mu nsubu muandi ne bua kunvueye mei ebe." 
Acts10:23 Nunku wakababikila mu nsubu, wakabalesha ha kulala. Hakatshiabu, wakabika, wakaya nʼabo; bana babo bakuabo ba mu Kilisto ba mu Yopa bakaya kumufila." 
Acts10:24 Bakalala mu nshila; hakatshiabu, bakafika ku Kaisalia. Kônelio wakadi mubatekemene, mumane kubikila ba mu tshiota tshiandi ne balunda bandi." 
Acts10:25 Hakabuela Petelo mu nsubu, Kônelio wakamuakidila, wakadihonena ku makasa andi, wakamukukuila." 
Acts10:26 Kadi Petelo wakamubisha ne, Bika biebe, meme muine ndi anu muntu." 
Acts10:27 Hakadiye wakula nʼandi, wakabuela munda mua nsubu, wakasanganamu bantu ba bungi badisangishe." 
Acts10:28 Wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudi bamanye ne, Bualu bua Muena Yuda kusomba ne muntu wa tshisamba tshikuabo anyi kulueye ha buihi nʼandi budi tshijila; kadi Nzambi wakundesha ne, Kubikidi muntu mukuabo ne, Ngua tshianana, anyi ngua tshijila;" 
Acts10:29 ebu mbualu bunakuluila; hakumbikilabo, tshiakuela mpata. Ndi nukonka bunuakumbikidila." 
Acts10:30 Kônelio wakamukudimuna ne, Kuakuata matuku anai, mpa diba edi mene ha isatu, nakadi utendelela Nzambi mu nsubu muanyi; tangila, muntu wakimana ku mpala kuanyi muluate bilulu biengelela," 
Acts10:31 yeye wakangambila ne, Kônelio, bakunvua kutendelela kuebe, Nzambi udi uvuluka bua bintu bia luse biutu wahangana." 
Acts10:32 Tuma dî ku Yopa, ubikile Simona udibo babikila ne, Petelo; yeye udi ulala mu nsubu wa Simona mukuonyi wa biseba udi hehi ne mai." 
Acts10:33 Nunku nakukutumina dî lubilu; wakulua, wakuenza bimpe. Katataka buonso buetu tudi munemu ku mesu kua Nzambi bua kunvua malu onso akukuambila Mukelenge." 
Acts10:34 Petelo wakabulula mukana muandi, wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi njingulula ne, Nzambi kena ne kansungunsungu," 
Acts10:35 kadi yeye udi witabusha wa mu tshisamba tshionso udi umutshina, udi wenza malu makane." 
Acts10:36 Yeye kabidi wakatumina bana ba Isalele dî, wakabambidila lumu luimpe lua ditalala kudi Yesu Kilisto (yeye udi Mukelenge wa bantu bonso);" 
Acts10:37 nuenu mene nudi bamanye dî edi, diakutangalashabo mu nseke yonso ya Yudaya dibangila ku Galela ku nyima kua dibatiza diakambabo kudi Yone;" 
Acts10:38 nudi bamanye kabidi bualu bua Yesu wa mu Nazaleta bu muakamuela Nzambi Nyuma Muimpe ne bukole; yeye wakendakana wenza malu mimpe, wondaha ukolesha bonso bakadi bakengeshibua kudi diabolo, bua Nzambi wakadi nʼandi." 
Acts10:39 Tuetu tudi bamanyi ba malu onso akenzeye mu luseke lua Bena Yuda ne mu Yelushalema; bakamushiha mukudika ku mutshi mutshiamakane. 
Acts10:40 Nzambi wakamubisha hakahita matuku asatu; kakamumuenesha kudi bantu bonso," 
Acts10:41 kadi wakamumuenesha anu kudi bamanyi bakasungula Nzambi diambedi, batuetu aba, mbakadia nʼandi, mbakanua nʼandi hakabikeye ku lufu." 
Acts10:42 Yesu wakatuambila bikole ne, Nuambile bantu bualu ebu, nubamanyishe ne, Eu nyeye wakusungudibua kudi Nzambi bua kuikala Mulumbuludi wa badi ne muoyo ne wa bafue." 
Acts10:43 Baprofete bonso badi bamba bualu buandi ne, Muntu yonso wamuitabusha neangate dijimisha dia dibi mu dina diandi." 
Acts10:44 Hakatshidi Petelo wamba mei â, Nyuma Muimpe wakahuekela bonso bakunvua dî." 
Acts10:45 Bena kuitabusha batengula bakadi balue ne Petelo bakakema, bualu bua bakuitshikishila bisamba bia bende kabidi kuha kua Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts10:46 Bakabunvua bakula mu miaku mikuabo, batumbisha Nzambi. Petelo wakakonka ne," 
Acts10:47 Muntu kai udi mumanye mua kuhidia mai bua kubatijibuabo, bobo bamane kuangata Nyuma Muimpe bu mutudi bangate?" 
Acts10:48 Yeye wakamba ne, Babatijibue mu dina dia Yesu Kilisto. Hashishe bakamusengelela bua yeye kushala nʼabo matuku makuabo." 
Acts11:1 Bapostolo ne bana babo ba mu Kilisto bakadi mu Yudaya bakunvua ne, Bisamba bia bende kabidi biakuangata dî dia Nzambi." 
Acts11:2 Hakalua Petelo ku Yelushalema, bakadi batengula bakela nʼandi mpata ne," 
Acts11:3 Wewe wakubuelakana ne bantu bakadi kabai batengula, wakadia nʼabo." 
Acts11:4 Petelo wakabanga kubalondoluela ne," 
Acts11:5 Nakadi mu musoko wa Yopa ntendelela Nzambi; mu kulotakana nakumona tshikena kumona, ntshintu tshihueka bu tshilulu tshinene tshifuma mulu tshikuata ku nzemba yatshi inai, tshiakuhuekela kundi mene." 
Acts11:6 Hanakutshitangila, nakutshijingulula bimpe, nakumona nyama ya makama anai ya ha buloba ne nyama ya mu tshisuku ne bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne nyunyu ya mulu." 
Acts11:7 Nakunvua kabidi dî diakungambila ne, Petelo, bika, shiha, udie." 
Acts11:8 Kadi nakuamba ne, Nasha, Mukelenge; tshintu tshia tshianana anyi tshia tshijila katshiena tshianze kubuela mukana muanyi." 
Acts11:9 Kadi dî diakufuma mulu tshiakabidi ne, Kivuishi tshidi tshilengesha kudi Nzambi ne, Ntshianana." 
Acts11:10 Bakenza nunku misangu isatu, bakakoka bintu bionso mulu kabidi." 
Acts11:11 Ha diba adi mene bantu basatu bakadi bimane ku mpala kua nsubu utuakadi, buntumina ku Kaisalia." 
Acts11:12 Nyuma wakungambila ne, Ya nʼabo, kuedi mpata. Bana betu aba to mu Kilisto basambombo bakuya kunfila, luakubuela mu nsubu wa muntu au." 
Acts11:13 Yeye wakutuambila bu muakamoneye muanjelo muimane mu nsubu muandi, umuambila ne, Tuma bantu ku Yopa, balue ne Simona, dinga dina Petelo," 
Acts11:14 yeye neakuambile mei a kukusungila nʼau ne ba mu nsubu webe bonso. 
Acts11:15 Hanakubanga kuakula, Nyuma Muimpe wakabahuekela bu muakutuhuekeleye ku tshibangidilu." 
Acts11:16 Nakuvuluka dî dia Mukelenge diakambeye ne, Bulelela, Yone wakabatiza bantu ne mai, kadi nuenu nenubatijibue mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
Acts11:17 Bikala Nzambi mubahe kuha kuakutuheye hatuakuitabusha Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto, ahu meme nakadi nganyi wa kufuilangana ne Nzambi?" 
Acts11:18 Hakunvuabo malu â, bakahua, bakatumbisha Nzambi ne, Nzambi wakuha bisamba bia bendekabidi kukudimuna kua mutshima bua kuikalabo ne muoyo." 
Acts11:19 Bakadi batangadike bualu bua dikenga diakajuka bua lufu lua Stefano bakaya tô ne ku Foinike ne ku Kupulio ne ku Antiokia, bambila anu Bena Yuda dî." 
Acts11:20 Kadi bakuabo bakadi Bena Kupulio ne Bena Kulene, hakafikabo ku Antiokia, bakabanga kuambila Bena Gelika kabidi lumu luimpe lua Mukelenge Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Tshianza tshia Nzambi tshiakadi nʼabo; bantu ba bungi bakitabusha, bakakudimuna mitshima yabo kudi Mukelenge." 
Acts11:22 Lumu luabo luakafika ku matshu a bena ekelesia ba mu Yelushalema; bakatuma Bânaba tô ne ku Antiokia. 
Acts11:23 Hakafikeye, hakamoneye ngasa wa Nzambi, wakasanka; wakakolesha mitshima ya buonso buabo ne, Nunanukile kushala hehi ne Mukelenge ne disuminyina mu mitshima." 
Acts11:24 Bualu bua yeye wakadi muntu muimpe, wakadi mûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe ne ditabusha; ba bungi bakasangishibua kudi Mukelenge." 
Acts11:25 Bânaba wakaya ku Tâso bua kukeba Shaula. 
Acts11:26 Hakamumoneye, wakalua nʼandi ku Antiokia. Bakadi badisangisha ne bena ekelesia tô tshidimu tshijima, bakayisha bantu ba bungi; mu Antiokia muakabangabo kubikila bayidi ne, Bena Kilisto." 
Acts11:27 Mu matuku â baprofete ba ku Yelushalema bakalua ku Antiokia. 
Acts11:28 Mukuabo, dina diandi Agabo, wakabika biandi, Nyuma mumane kumumanyisha, wakamba ne, Tshiole tshinene netshilue ha buloba buonso. Bulelela, tshiakalua hakadi Kulaudio mu bukelenge." 
Acts11:29 Bayidi bonso, muntu ne tshiakadiye nʼatshi muntu ne tshiakadiye batshi, bakahangidisha bua kukuatshisha nʼabi bana babo ba mu Kilisto ba mu Yudaya;" 
Acts11:30 bakenza nunku, bakabituma kudi bakulu mu bianza bia Bânaba ne Shaula." 
Acts12:1 Mu matuku au mukelenge Helode wakakuata bena ekelesia bakuabo bua kubakengesha. 
Acts12:2 Wakashiha Yakobo, muanʼabo ne Yone, ne muele." 
Acts12:3 Hakamoneye ne, Bualu ebu budi busankisha Bena Yuda, wakakuata Petelo kabidi. Matuku au akadi a bidia bidi kabi biela luevene." 
Acts12:4 Hakamukuateye, wakamuela mu nsubu wa lukanu, wakamufila mu bianza bia masalayi dikumi ne asambombo, bua kumulamau; wakasua kulua nʼandi ku mesu kua bantu hashika Kuhita kua Yehowa." 
Acts12:5 Nunku bakalama Petelo mu nsubu wa lukanu, kadi bena ekelesia bakamulombela Nzambi bikole." 
Acts12:6 Hakadi Helode wamba kulua nʼandi, butuku abu mene Petelo wakadi mulale hankatshi ha masalayi abidi, musuika ne nkanu ibidi; ku tshibi kuakadi balami balama nsubu wa lukanu." 
Acts12:7 Tangila, muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakimana ha buihi nʼandi, dinkenka diakatema mu nsubu; wakatuta Petelo ha mbale, wakamubisha ku tulu, wakamba ne, Juka lukasa. Nkanu yakadikohokela ku bianza." 
Acts12:8 Muanjelo wakamuambila ne, Suika mukaba webe, buesha bisabata. Petelo wakenza nunku. Wakamuambila kabidi ne, Ela tshivualu tshiebe hamʼbidi, undonde." 
Acts12:9 Wakaluhuka, wakamulonda; kakamanya ne, Budi muanjelo wenza mbulelela, wakelangana meshi ne, Tshinakumona ntshikena kumona." 
Acts12:10 Hakahitshilabo mu nsubu wa kumudilu ne mu nsubu muibidi, bakafika ku tshibi tshia tshiamu tshia ku mushiku wa mbelu wa nshila wa kuhatuka ku musoko, tshiakadiunzulukila; bakaluhuka; hakayilabo mu musesu umue, muanjelo wakamushîa lukasa." 
Acts12:11 Hakamanya Petelo bualu ebu bimpe, wakamba ne, Bulelela, ndi mumanye katataka ne, Mukelenge wakutuma muanjelo wandi, wakunsungila mu bianza bia Helode ne mu malu onso akatekemena bantu ba Bena Yuda." 
Acts12:12 Hakadiye welangana meshi a bualu ebu, Wakafika ku nsubu wa Malia, mamu wa Yone, wakadi ne dinga dine Mâko; mu nsubu muakadi ba bungi badisangishe, bakadi batendelela Nzambi." 
Acts12:13 Hakakokoleye ku tshibi tshia ku mbelu, mukashi muenji wa mudimu, dina diandi Loda, wakaya kuitaba." 
Acts12:14 Hakunvueye dî dia Petelo, kakunzulula tshibi bualu bua disanka, kadi wakanyema lubilu mu nsubu, wakamba ne, Petelo udi muimane ku tshibi." 
Acts12:15 Bakamuambila ne, Wewe udi muhale. Kadi yeye wakabambila bikole ne, Mbulelela. Bakamba ne, Udi muanjelo wandi." 
Acts12:16 Kadi Petelo wakadi ukokolakokola ku tshibi; hakunzululabo, bakamumona, bakakema." 
Acts12:17 Kadi yeye wakabahoha tshianza ne, Huai; wakabambila bu muakamumusha Mukelenge mu nsubu wa lukanu. Wakamba ne, Nuambile Yakobo ne bana betu ba mu Kilisto malu â. Wakumuka biandi, wakaya ku muaba mukuabo." 
Acts12:18 Hakatshiabu, masalayi akadi ahampakana bikole ne, Petelo udi hanyi?" 
Acts12:19 Helode wakamukeba; hakahangeye kumumona, wakebesha balami, wakabalumbuluisha ne, Baye nʼabo bua kubashiha. Yeye wakumuka mu Yudaya, wakahueka ku Kaisalia, wakashikamaku." 
Acts12:20 Bena Tulo ne Bena Sidona bakafikisha Helode munda bikole; hakakuatabo bulunda ne Bulasto, mulami wa bintu bia mukelenge, bakalua kudi Helode ne mutshima umue bua kulengesha nʼandi, bualu bua luseke lua mukelenge luakadi ludisha luseke luabo." 
Acts12:21 Hakafikila dituku diakasungulabo, Helode wakaluata bilulu bia bukelenge, wakashikama ha nkuasa wa butumbi, wakadi ubambila mei mimpe." 
Acts12:22 Bantu bakela mbila ne, Ndi dia nzambi, kandia muntu." 
Acts12:23 Muanjelo wa Mukelenge wakamukuma lukasa, bualu bua yeye kakadi utumbisha Nzambi; tuishi tuakamudia, wakahuola muoyo wandi." 
Acts12:24 Kadi dî dia Nzambi diakadiunda, diakavulangana." 
Acts12:25 Hakashikishabo kufila bintu, Bânaba ne Shaula bakahingana, bafume ku Yelushalema; bakalua ne Yone, dinga dina Mâko." 
Acts13:1 Munkatshi mua bena ekelesia ba mu Antiokia muakadi baprofete ne bayishi, mena abo akadi Bânaba, ne Shimeona muidika ne, Nigê, ne Lukio wa ku Kulene, ne Manaene wakakola ne muloho Helode, ne Shaula." 
Acts13:2 Hakadibo benzela Mukelenge mudimu, hakadibo bajila bia kudia, Nyuma Muimpe wakamba ne, Nungumushile Bânaba ne Shaula ka tshisumbu tshienu bua mudimu unakubabikidila." 
Acts13:3 Hakajilabo bia kudia, hakatendelelabo Nzambi, hakabatentekeshabo bianza ha mitu habo, bakabatuma." 
Acts13:4 Bakahueka ku Seleukia, batumibue kudi Nyuma Muimpe. Bakumukaku, bakasabuka ku tshisanga tshia Kupulio." 
Acts13:5 Hakadibo mu Salami, bakambila bantu dî dia Nzambi mu nsunagoga ya Bena Yuda. Bakadi ne Yone bu mubakuatshishi." 
Acts13:6 Hakahitshilabo mu tshisanga tshionso tô ne ku Pafo, bakasanganamu Muena Yuda, wakadi mutempeshanganyi wa mbuku, dina diandi Bâ-yesu, wakadi muprofete wa mashimi." 
Acts13:7 Wakadi mushikame ne muloho munene, dina diandi Sêgio Paulo, muntu wa lungenyi. Sêgio Paulo wakabikila Bânaba ne Shaula, wakakeba bua kunyua dî dia Nzambi." 
Acts13:8 Kadi Eluma, mutempeshanganyi wa mbuku, bua badi bakudimuna dina diandi nunku, wakabatantamena, wakasua kusesuisha muloho munene ku ditabusha." 
Acts13:9 Kadi Shaula, udi ne dinga dina Paulo, mûle tente ne Nyuma Muimpe, wakamutangila talala," 
Acts13:10 wakamba ne, Wewe, mûle tente ne mashimi ne budimu, muana wa diabolo, udi ne malu makane onso lukuna, kuena ulekela kunyanga nshila milulame ya Mukelenge, anyi?" 
Acts13:11 Katataka mona, tshianza tshia Mukelenge tshidi hamʼbidi hebe, newikale mufofo tshituha, kui mumanye mua kutangila diba. Tshibungibungi ne mîdima biakamuhonena lukasa, wakendakana ukeba muntu wa kumulombola ku tshianza." 
Acts13:12 Hakatangila muloho munene bualu ebu, wakitabusha, diyisha dia Mukelenge diakamukemesha." 
Acts13:13 Paulo ne bakadi nʼandi bakumuka ku Pafo, bakasabuka ku Pêge wa mu Pampulia. Kadi Yone wakabalekela, wakahingana ku Yelushalema." 
Acts13:14 Kadi bobo bakumuka ku Pêge bakaya tô ne ku Antiokia wa mu Pisidia; hakalua dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda, bakabuela mu nsunagoga, bakashikama." 
Acts13:15 Hakashikishabo kubala mikenshi ya Mose ne mei a baprofete, bakelenge ba mu nsunagoga bakatumina Paulo ne bakadi nʼandi dî ne, Bana betu, binuikala ne dî dia kukolesha nʼadi mitshima ya bantu, ambai." 
Acts13:16 Paulo wakabika, wakabahoha tshianza, wakamba ne, Nuenu, bantu ba Isalele, ne badi batshina Nzambi, unvuai:" 
Acts13:17 Nzambi wa tshisamba etshi tshia Isalele wakasungula bankambua betu, wakabisha bantu hakadibo bashikame mu buloba bua Ejipitu, wakabumushamu ne diboko dikole." 
Acts13:18 Bu bidimu makumi anai yeye wakabatuala mu tshihela bu tatu muledi. 
Acts13:19 Hakabutuleye bisamba muanda mutekete mu buloba bua Kanâna, wakabaha buloba buabo bu buhianyi tô bidimu bu nkama inai ne makumi atanu." 
Acts13:20 Hashishe wakabaha balumbuludi tô ne ku muprofete Samuele. 
Acts13:21 Hashishe bakalomba mukelenge; Nzambi wakabaha Shaula, muana wa Kishi, muntu wa mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina, tô bidimu makumi anai." 
Acts13:22 Hakamumusheye, wakabisha Davidi bua kuikaleye nfumu wabo, wakambeye ne, Nakusangana Davidi, muana wa Yishai, muntu udi mutshima wanyi musue, yeye nenze malu onso andi musue." 
Acts13:23 Nzambi wakasungula kankanunuina ka muntu eu, wakakabishila Isalele bu Musungidi, Yesu mene, bu muakabalayeye." 
Acts13:24 Yesu kai muanze kulua, Yone wakadianjila kuambila bantu bonso ba Isalele bualu bua kubatiza kua kukudimuna kua mitshima." 
Acts13:25 Hakamba Yone kushikisha mudimu wandi, wakamba ne, Nudi nuelangana meshi ne, Meme ndi nganyi? Tshiena yeye; kadi tangila, munga ulualua ku nyima kuanyi ngundi tshi ne buakane bua kusulula mionshi ya bisabata biandi." 
Acts13:26 Bana betu, tunkanunuina tua Abalahama, ne ba munkatshi muenu badi batshina Nzambi, bakatutumina tuetu dî dia luhandu elu." 
Acts13:27 Badi mu Yelushalema ne bakelenge habo, bualu bua bobo kabakamumanya, ne kabakamanya mei a baprofete adibo babala Mbingu yonso, bakashikisha mei â hakamuhishabo." 
Acts13:28 Kabakamusangana ne bualu bua kufueye, kadi bakalomba Pilato ne, Bamushihe." 
Acts13:29 Hakashikishabo malu onso akadibo bamufunde, bakamutulula ku mutshi, bakamuladika mu lukita." 
Acts13:30 Kadi Nzambi wakamubisha ku bafue. 
Acts13:31 Bakamumonamona matuku a bungi, bumuka nʼandi mu Galela, baya nʼandi ku Yelushalema, mbobo badi bamanyi bandi katataka ku mesu kua bantu." 
Acts13:32 Tudi tunumanyisha lumu luimpe lua mulayi wakalayabo bankambua betu," 
Acts13:33 ne Nzambi wakashikishila bana betu mulayi eu, hakabisheye Yesu ku lufu; bu muakafundabo mu musambu muibidi ne, Wewe udi Muana wanyi, nakukulela lelu." 
Acts13:34 Ne bua dibisha diandi ku lufu, kai uhingana kashidi bua kuboleye, Nzambi wakamba ne, Nenuhe masanka makane ne a bushua a Davidi." 
Acts13:35 Bualu bua yeye udi wamba mu musambu mukuabo kabidi ne, Kuena ufila Webe wa Tshijila bua kubeleye." 
Acts13:36 Hakashikisha Davidi kuenza mu tshikondo tshiandi malu akasua Nzambi, wakafua, wakajikibua ne bankambua bandi, wakabola;" 
Acts13:37 kadi yeye wakabishabo kudi Nzambi kakabola. 
Acts13:38 Nunku bana betu, mimanye bimpe ne, Badi banuambila bua dijimisha dia mibi yenu kudi muntu eu Yesu;" 
Acts13:39 ne bua bualu buandi, muntu yonso wamuitabusha udi ubingishibua ku malu onso, akadi mikenshi ya Mose kayi mimanye mua kunubingisha." 
Acts13:40 Dimukai bua bualu buakambabo kudi baprofete kabulu kunudi ne," 
Acts13:41 Nuenu bena dihetu, tangilai, nukeme, nubutuke; Bualu bua ndi ngenza mudimu mu matuku enu, Bianuambila muntu bualu buau, kanuena nuitabusha." 
Acts13:42 Hakadibo baluhuka, bakabatendekena ne, Nutuambile mei â kabidi Lumingu lualua." 
Acts13:43 Hakamuangalaka bantu, Bena Yuda ba bungi ne bitabushi bimpe ba bualu bua Bena Yuda bakalonda Paulo ne Bânaba; bobo bakabambila ne, Nunanukile mu ngasa wa Nzambi." 
Acts13:44 Hakalua Lumingu lukuabo lua Bayuda, bantu bonso ba mu musoko bakadisangisha bua kunvua dî dia Nzambi, anu bakese bakashala." 
Acts13:45 Hakamona Bena Yuda bisumbu bia bantu nunku, bakûlangana tente ne mukau, bakadila mei akadi Paulo wamba, bakamuhenda." 
Acts13:46 Paulo ne Bânaba bakajukuila bantu, bakamba ne, Butuakadi nʼabu mbua kunuambila nuenu dî dia Nzambi diambedi. Kadi bualu bua nuenu nudi nuhidia dî edi, ne nudi nudilumbuluila bualu buenu ne, Katuena bantu bakane ba kuangata muoyo wa tshiendelele, tuetu netuye kudi bantu ba bisamba bia bende." 
Acts13:47 Nunku Mukelenge wakatulela mikenshi ne, Nakukuteka bu munya wa kutemena bantu ba bisamba bia bende, Bua wewe wikale bua luhandu lua bantu tô ne kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Acts13:48 Hakunvua bantu ba bende dî edi, bakasanka, bakatumbisha di dia Nzambi; bakadi basungidibue bua kubahabo muoyo wa tshiendelele bakitabusha." 
Acts13:49 Bakatangalasha dî dia Mukelenge mu luseke alu luonso. 
Acts13:50 Kadi Bena Yuda bakakabila bakashi bimpe bakadi ne butumbi ne bantu banene ba mu musoko, bakabishila Paulo ne Bânaba dikenga, bakabumusha mu luseke luabo." 
Acts13:51 Kadi Ponto ne Bânaba bakabatutuila nsenga ya buloba yakadi mu makasa abo, kakalua ku Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Bayidi bakadi bûle tente ne disanka ne Nyuma Muimpe. 
Acts14:1 Mu Ikonio bakabuela diakamue mu nsunagoga wa Bena Yuda, bakambila bantu dî diakitabushisha ba bungi, Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika." 
Acts14:2 Kadi Bena Yuda bakadi bahidia bakavundulula mitshima ya bantu ba bisamba bia bende, bakaivuisha mifike kudi bena kuitabusha." 
Acts14:3 Bakashalamu musangu mule, bakajukuila bantu dî mu Mukelenge, yeye wakajadika dî dia ngasa wandi, hakabaheye bimanyinu ne malu a kukema akenzelabo ne bianza biabo." 
Acts14:4 Kadi bantu ba mu musoko bakadi batahuluke; bakuabo bakadi ku luseke lua Bena Yuda, bakuabo ku luseke lua bapostolo." 
Acts14:5 Hakadisangisha bantu ba bisamba bia bende ne Bena Yuda ne bakelenge babo bua kubenzela bibi ne bua kubakuma mabue," 
Acts14:6 bakamanya bualu abu, bakanyemena ku misoko ya mu Lukaonia, mena ai Luseta ne Dêbe, ne ku luseke alu;" 
Acts14:7 bakambaku lumu luimpe. 
Acts14:8 Mu Luseta muakadi mushikame muntu ne makasa andi matekete, mamuʼandi wakamulela mulema nunku, kakanza kuenda." 
Acts14:9 Yeye wakunvua Paulo wakula; Paulo wakamutangila talala; hakamanyeye ne, Yeye udi ne ditabusha dia kukoleshibua," 
Acts14:10 wakela di diandi bikole ne, Imana ne makasa ebe Wakabika lukasa, wakenda." 
Acts14:11 Hakatangila bantu bualu buakenza Paulo, bakela mbila, bamba mu muaku wabo wa luseke lua Lukaonia ne, Nzambi yakuhueka kutudi mifuane bantu." 
Acts14:12 Bakidika Bânaba ne, Yupita; Paulo ne, Mêkulio, bua yeye wakadi muakuidi wa malu." 
Acts14:13 Tshitendelelu tshia Yupita tshiakadi ku mpala kua musoko, mubuki wa Yupita wakalua ne ngombe ne bilongo ku bibi bia musoko, yeye ne bantu bonso bakasua kubashihela nyama ai." 
Acts14:14 Kadi bapostolo Bânaba ne Paulo, hakunvuabo bualu abu, bakadihanda bivualu, bakaya lubilu munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bantu, bela dî bikole ne," 
Acts14:15 Balumiana, nudi nuenzela nunku tshinyi? Tuetu tudi bantu bafukibue bu nuenu, tudi banuvuile ne lumu luimpe, bua nuenu nulekele malu â a hatuhu, nulonde Nzambi wa muoyo, wakafuka diulu ne buloba ne mai manene ne bintu bionso bidimu;" 
Acts14:16 mu bikondo bia ku nyima yeye wakitabusha bua bisamba bionso bia bende biende mu nshila yakadi mitshima yabo misue. 
Acts14:17 Kadi yeye kakashala kai ne ntemu; wakanuenzela bimpe, wakanuha nvula ne bidimu bia kuvudisha bia kudia bifume mu diulu, wakûsha mitshima yenu tente ne bidia ne disanka." 
Acts14:18 Hakashikishabo mei â, bualu buakadi bukole kudibo bua kukanda bantu ne, Kanutushihedi nyama." 
Acts14:19 Kadi Bena Yuda ba ku Antiokia ne Ikonio bakalua ka Luseta, bakashikila bantu, bakakuma Paulo ne mabue, bakamukoka bamuimasha kukala kua musoko, bela meshi ne, Udi mufue." 
Acts14:20 Kadi hakadi bayidi bimane bamunguile, wakabika, wakaya mu musoko; hakatshiabu, wakaya ne Bânaba ku Dêbe." 
Acts14:21 Hakambilabo bena musoko au bualu bua lumu luimpe, hakavuishabo bantu ba bungi bayidi, bakahingana ku Luseta ne ku Ikonio ne ku Antiokia," 
Acts14:22 benda bakolesha mioyo ya bayidi, babasengelela ne, Nushale mu ditabusha dienu; bua tuetu kubuela mu bukelenge bua Nzambi, anu hawahitshila mu makenga a bungi." 
Acts14:23 Hakasungula Paulo ne Bânaba ekelesia ne ekelesia bakulu, hakatendelelabo Nzambi ne dijila dia bia kudia, bakabashia mu bianza bia Mukelenge wakitabushabo." 
Acts14:24 Bakahitshila mu Pisidia, bakafika mu Pampulia." 
Acts14:25 Hakashikishabo kuamba di mu Pêge, bakahueka ku Atalia." 
Acts14:26 Bakumukaku mu bualu, bakasabuka ku Antiokia, kuakafidibuabo mu ngasa wa Nzambi bua mudimu wakushikishabo." 
Acts14:27 Hakaluabo, hakasangishabo bena ekelesia, bakabalondela malu onso akenza nʼabo Nzambi, ne bua yeye wakunzuluila bisamba bia bende tshibi tshia ditabusha." 
Acts14:28 Bakashalamu musangu mule ne bayidi. 
Acts15:1 Bantu bakuabo bakadi bafume mu Yudaya bakalua, bakadi bayisha bana betu ba mu Kilisto ne, Binuikala kanui batengula bu mu tshilele tshia Mose, kanuena bamanye mua kusungidibua." 
Acts15:2 Hakadi Paulo ne Bânaba nʼabo mpata ne dikonka musangu mule, bana babo ba mu Kilisto bakasungula Paulo ne Bânaba ne bakuabo babo bua kuyabo ku Yelushalema kudi bapostolo ne bakulu bua dikonka edi." 
Acts15:3 Bena ekelesia bakabashindikila, bakahitshila mu Foineke ne Samalea, benda bambila bantu bua kukudimuna kua mitshima kua bisamba bia bende; bakatamba kusankisha mitshima ya bana babo bonso ba mu Kilisto." 
Acts15:4 Hakafikabo ku Yelushalema, bakabitabusha kudi bena ekelesia ne kudi bapostolo ne bakulu; Paulo ne Bânaba bakabambila malu onso akenza nʼabo Nzambi." 
Acts15:5 Kadi bakuabo ba mu luseke lua Bafalese, bakadi bamane kuitabusha, bakabika bamba ne, Butudi nʼabu mbua kutengula ba bisamba bia bende, ne bua kubambila bua kuenzabo mikenshi ya Mose." 
Acts15:6 Bapostolo ne bakulu bakadisangisha bua kulondabo bualu ebu," 
Acts15:7 Hakadibo ne mpata ya bungi, Petelo wakabika, wakabambila ne, Bana betu, nudi bamanye ne, Mu matuku a kai e Nzambi wakasungula munkatshi muenu bua bisamba bia bende biunvue dî dia lumu luimpe mukana muanyi, bitabushe." 
Acts15:8 Nzambi mumanyi wa mu mitshima, wakabavidila, wakabaha Nyuma Muimpe bu muakutuheye bietu:" 
Acts15:9 kakatahulula hankatshi hetu nʼabo, wakuvua mitshima yabo ku ditabusha." 
Acts15:10 Katataka nudi nutetshila Nzambi munda tshinyi, bua nudi basue kuteka tshikokedi ha nshingu ya bayidi tshiakadi bankambua betu kabai bamanye mua kutshituala ne tuetu kabidi?" 
Acts15:11 Kadi tuetu tudi tuitabusha ne, Tudi tusungidibua ku ngasa wa Mukelenge Yesu muomumue nʼabo." 
Acts15:12 Buonso buabo bakahua, bakatelesha muakadi Bânaba ne Paulo bamba bua bimanyinu ne malu a kukema biakenza nʼabo Nzambi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende." 
Acts15:13 Hakayabo, Yakobo wakamba ne, Bana betu, teleshai dî dianyi;" 
Acts15:14 Simona wakalonda bu muakadianjila Nzambi kumueneka kudi bisamba bia bende bua kusungula munkatshi muabo bantu bua kuikalabo ne dina diandi. 
Acts15:15 Mei a baprofete adi makanangane ne bualu ebu, bu muakafundabo ne," 
Acts15:16 Hashika malu â, nempingane, Nengibake kabidi nsubu wa tshilulu wa Davidi udi muhuke, Nengibake kabidi bituha biandi bidi binyanguke, Nemuimanyike kabidi;" 
Acts15:17 Nengenzele nunka bua bantu badi bashale bakebe Mukelenge, Ne bisamba bionso bia bende kabidi badi babikidibua ku dina dianyi;" 
Acts15:18 Mukelenge udi Wamba nunku udi umanyisha malu â kale. 
Acts15:19 Bua bualu ebu udi ngamba ne, Katutatshishi ba bisamba bia bende badi bakudimuna mitshima yabo kudi Nzambi;" 
Acts15:20 kadi tubafundile mukanda bua kutekelabo bintu bidi bibihisha kudi mpingu, ne bua kutekelabo masandi, ne nyama mifiekela mu nshingu ha kuishiha, ne mashi." 
Acts15:21 Bualu bua Mose kale tô ne katataka udi ne bambi ba malu andi mu nsunagoga ya misoko yonso, badi babala mei andi nunku ku Lumingu ku Lumingu." 
Acts15:22 Hashishe bapostolo ne bakulu ne bena ekelesia bonso bakelangana meshi ne, Mbimpe tusungule ba mu tshisumbu tshietu, tubatume ne Paulo ne Bânaba ku Antiokia; bakatuma nunku Yuda, udi ne dina dikuabo ne, Bâsaba, ne Sila, hakadi bantu banene ba munkatshi mua bana babo ba mu Kilisto." 
Acts15:23 Bakabaha mukanda mufunda nunku ne, Bapostolo ne bana betu badi bakulu badi batumina bana betu ba mu bisamba bia bende mu Antiokia ne mu Sulia ne mu Kilikia muoyo." 
Acts15:24 Bualu bua tuakulua lumu ne, Bakuabo ba munkatshi muetu bakuya kunudi, bakunutatshisha ne mei abo, badi bamba kuona mioyo yenu; tuetu katuakubatuma ne mukenshi kunudi;" 
Acts15:25 hatuakuhunga dî dimue, tuakula meshi ne, Mbimpe tusungule bantu, tubatume kunudi ne bana betu bananga, Bânaba ne Paulo," 
Acts15:26 bobo mene bakafila mioyo yabo bualu bua dina dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto. 
Acts15:27 Nunku tuakutuma Yuda ne Sila, bobo kabidi nebanuambile mei momumue mukana muabo." 
Acts15:28 Bualu bua Nyuma Muimpe wakamona, ne tuetu kabidi, ne, Kembimpe bia kunutekela bunga bujitu, anu malu atudi nʼau bualu:" 
Acts15:29 nulekele bintu bidi bishihela mpingu, nulekele kabidi mashi ne nyama mifiekela mu nshingu ha kuishiha, ne masandi; binualekela malu â, nenuenze bimpe. Nushale ne bukole." 
Acts15:30 Nunku hakalayanganabo nʼabo, bakahueka ku Antiokia, hakasangishabo bantu, bakabaha mubanda." 
Acts15:31 Hakaubalabo, mitshima yabo yakasanka bua disamba diakabasambabo nʼadi." 
Acts15:32 Bualu bua Yuda ne Sila bakadi baprofete, bakambila bantu mei a bungi, bakakolesha mitshima yabo." 
Acts15:33 Hakalelabo kuakua musangu, bana babo ba mu Kilisto bakabahingisha talalâ kudi bakabatuma. [" 
Acts15:34 ] 
Acts15:35 Kadi Paulo ne Bânaba bakashala mu Antiokia, bayisha ne bambila bantu dî dia Mukelenge; bakuabo ba bungi bakadi nʼabo kabidi." 
Acts15:36 Hakahita matuku makuabo, Paulo wakambila Bânaba ne, Tuhingane bua kutangila bana betu ba mu Kilisto ba mu misoko yonso ituakadi tuambila dî dia Mukelenge, tumone ne badi munyi." 
Acts15:37 Bânaba wakasua kuya kabidi ne Yone wakadibo babikila ne, Mâko." 
Acts15:38 Kadi Paulo wakelangana meshi ne, Kembimpe bia kuya ne muntu wakumuka watushîa mu Pampulia, kai muye nʼetu ku mudimu." 
Acts15:39 Hakadibo ne mpata mikole, nunku bakahanduluka, Bânaba wakangata Mâko, wakasabuka nʼandi ku Kupulio." 
Acts15:40 Kadi Paulo wakasungula Sila, wakaya, hakamufilabo mu ngasa wa Mukelenge kudi bana babo ba mu Kilisto." 
Acts15:41 Wakahitshila mu Sulia ne Kilikia wenda ukolesha mitshima ya bena ekelesia. 
Acts16:1 Yeye wakalua kabidi ku Dêbe ne Luseta. Mu Luseta muakadi muyidi, dina diandi Timote, muana wa Muena Yuda mukashi wakadi muena kuitabusha, kadi tatu wandi wakadi Muena Gelika." 
Acts16:2 Yeye mene wakadi ne lumu luimpe lumanyibua kudi bana babo ba mu Kilisto ba mu Luseta ne mu Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Paulo wakasua aye nʼandi. Wakamuangata, wakamutengula, bualu bua Bena Yuda bakadi mu nseke ai; bua bantu bonso bakamanya ne, Tatu wandi wakadi Muena Gelika." 
Acts16:4 Hakadibo bendakana mu misoko, bakafila mikenshi yakelabo kudi bapostolo ne bakulu ba mu Yelushalema bua kuitumikilabo." 
Acts16:5 Nunku ekelesia yakakoleshibua mu ditabusha, yakadi ivulangana ku dituku ku dituku." 
Acts16:6 Hakabakanda Nyuma Muimpe bua kuamba di dia Nzambi mu Asia, bakahitshila mu luseke lua Fugia ne Galatia." 
Acts16:7 Hakafikabo ha buihi ne Musia, bakakeba kuya mu Bitunia, kadi Nyuma wa Yesu kakitabusha." 
Acts16:8 Hakahitalu hehi ne Musia, bakahueka ku Toa." 
Acts16:9 Tshikena kumona tshiakamueneka kudi Paulo butuku: Muntu wa ku Makedonia wakadi muimane, umutendekena ne, Lua biebe mu Makedonia, utukuatshishe." 
Acts16:10 Hakamoneye tshikena kumona, ha diba adi tuakakeba kuya mu Makedonia, tuelangana meshi ne, Nzambi wakumbikila bua tuetu kubambila lumu luimpe." 
Acts16:11 Hatuakumuka mu Toa, tuakasabuka, baye balulame ku Samotaka; hakatshiabu, tuakafika ku Neapoli;" 
Acts16:12 tuakajukamu, tuakaya ku Filipoi, musoko wakadi muhite yonso mikuabo ya mu luseke alu lua Makedonia; musoko eu wakadi nkolonyi wa Bena Lomo; tuakadi tulala mu musoko au matuku." 
Acts16:13 Hakalua dituku dia Lumingu tua Bayuda, tuakahatukila ku tshibuelelu tshia musoko, tuakaya ku muelelu wa musulu, ha muaba utuakela meshi ne, Ngua kutendelela; tuakashikama hanshi, tuakayikila ne bakashi bakadi badisangisheku." 
Acts16:14 Mukashi wakadiku, dina diandi Ludia, wakadi biandi musumbishi wa bilulu bikunze wa ku musoko wa Tuatila, yeye wakadi mutendeledi wa Nzambi, wakunvua dî dietu; Nzambi wakabulula mutshima wandi bua kutumikileye malu akambabo kudi Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Hakamubatizabo ne bakadi mu nsubu muandi, yeye wakatendekena ne, Binuanjingulula ne, Meme udi muena ditabusha mulelela wa Mukelenge, nulue mu nsubu muanyi nushalemu. Wakatuenzesha ne disengelela diandi." 
Acts16:16 Hatuakadi tuya ku muaba wa kutendelela, nsongakashi muhika wakasangakana nʼetu, wakadi ne nyuma mubi wakadi umubukisha, wakamuenesha banfumuʼandi bintu bia bungi bualu bua lubuku luandi." 
Acts16:17 Wakatulonda, tuetu ne Paulo, wela mbila ne, Balume aba mbahika ba Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, badi banuambila bua nshila wa luhandu." 
Acts16:18 Wakadi wenza nunku matuku a bungi. Kadi hakatata Paulo bikole, wakatshinguluka, wakambila nyuma mubi ne, Ndi nkuambila mu dina dia Yesu Kilisto, umuke munda muandi. Ha diba adi mene wakaluhuka." 
Acts16:19 Kadi hakatangila banfumuʼandi ne, Ditekemena dia luhetu luetu diakumuka, bakakuata Paulo ne Sila, bakakakoka mu tshisalu kudi bantu banene ba musoko." 
Acts16:20 Hakaluabo nʼabo kudi balumbuludi, bakamba ne, Bantu aba mBena Yuda, badi babisha diyoyo dia bungi mu musoko wetu," 
Acts16:21 badi bambila bantu bilele bitudi katu! bamanye mua kuitabusha anyi kuenza, bua tudi Bena Lomo." 
Acts16:22 Tshisumbu tshiabo tshionso tshiakabahungulukila, balumbuludi bakabavula bilulu biabo, bakamba ne, Bubakume ne nkodi." 
Acts16:23 Hakabakumabo mikumu ya bungi, bakababuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu, bakambila mulami bikole ne, Ubalame bimpe." 
Acts16:24 Hakunvueye muakamuambilabo nunku, wakababuesha mu nsubu wakadi munda mua nsubu munene, wakabuesha makasa abo mu miomba." 
Acts16:25 Kadi bakalua bu mundankulu, Paulo ne Sila bakadi batendelela, bakadi bambila Nzambi misambu, bena lukanu bakadi batelesha;" 
Acts16:26 buloba buakakanka bikole, bishimikidi bia nsubu wa lukanu biakanyunga, bibi bionso biakunzuluka lukasa, nkanu ya bantu bonso yakadibo babasuike nʼai yakasuluka." 
Acts16:27 Mulami wa nsubu wakatabala; hakamoneye bibi bia nsubu biunzuluke, wakatula muele wandi, wakamba kudishiha, wela meshi ne, Bena lukanu bakunyema." 
Acts16:28 Kadi Paulo wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Kudienzedi bibi, buonso buetu tudiku." 
Acts16:29 Mulami wakalombesha minda, wakabuela mu nsubu uzakala ne buowa, wakahona ku mpala kua Paulo ne Sila," 
Acts16:30 wakabaluhula, wakamba ne, Bakelenge, bundi nʼabu mbua kuenza tshinyi bua kusungidibua?" 
Acts16:31 Bakamba ne, Itabusha Mukelenge Yesu, neusungidibue ne ba mu nsubu muebe." 
Acts16:32 Bakamuambila dî dia Mukelenge ne bonso bakadi mu nsubu muandi. 
Acts16:33 Yeye wakabangata ha diba adi mene butuku, wakabuvua ha mibundabunda yabo; bakamubatiza lukasa ne bantu bandi bonso." 
Acts16:34 Wakabanda nʼabo mu nsubu muandi, wakabalongoluela mesa, wakatamba kusanka ne nsubu wandi yonso, bamane kuitabusha Nzambi." 
Acts16:35 Hakatshiabu, balumbuludi bakatuma mpoloto ne dî ne, Balekele bantu aba." 
Acts16:36 Mulami wa nsubu wa lukanu wakamanyisha Paulo mei â ne, Balumbuludi bakutuma bua kunulekela; nunku nuluhuke mpindiu, nuye talala." 
Acts16:37 Kadi Paulo wakabambila ne, Bakatukuma, tuetu Bena Lomo, ku mesu kua bantu; kabai banze kutuhisha mu tshilumbu, bakutubuesha mu nsubu wa lukanu; ne katataka badi basue kutumusha mu busokoko, anyi? Nasha kakese; bobo nkayabo badiluile bua kutuluhula." 
Acts16:38 Mpoloto yakambila balumbuludi mei â; bakatshina, hakunvuabo ne, Badi Bena Lomo;" 
Acts16:39 bakalua, bakabatendekena; hakabaluhulabo, bakabasengelela bua kumukabo mu musoko." 
Acts16:40 Hakaluhukabo mu nsubu wa lukanu, bakabuela mu nsubu wa Ludia. Hakamonabo bana babo ba mu Kilisto, bakabakolesha mitshima, bakaya." 
Acts17:1 Hakahitshilabo mu Amfipoli ne Apolonia, bakafika ku Tesalonike, kuakadi nsunagoga wa Bena Yuda." 
Acts17:2 Paulo, bu mu tshilele tshiandi, wakabuelamu nʼabo; Mbingu isatu ya Bayuda wakakulangana nʼabo malu a mu Mukunda wa Nzambi," 
Acts17:3 wakabajinguluilau, wakabambila ne, Buakadi Kilisto nʼabu mbua kukengeye ne kubikeye ku bafue; Yesu eu undi nuambila nKilisto mene." 
Acts17:4 Bakuabo bakitabusha, bakadisangisha ne Paulo ne Sila; tshisumbu tshinene tshia Bena Gelika bakadi batshina Nzambi ne bakashi ba butumbi ba bungi bakenza nunka kabidi." 
Acts17:5 Kadi Bena Yuda bakakuatshika mukau, bakasangisha bena bufuba babi ba ku tshisalu, bakunguisha tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu, bakabanga kubishisha diyoyo dinene mu musoko, bakabuela mu nsubu wa Yasona ku bukole bakeba kuluhulabo Paulo ne Sila bua kubafilabo kudi bantu." 
Acts17:6 Hakahangabo kubasanganamu, bakakoka Yasona ne bana babo bakuabo ba mu Kilisto ku mpala kua bakelenge ba musoko, bakela mbila ne, Bantu aba bakamana kutombuesha bonso ba ha buloba bakufika kunoko kabidi;" 
Acts17:7 Yasona wakababuesha mu nsubu muandi; bantu aba bonso batu benza malu adi ashiha mikenshi ya Kaisa, bamba ne, Mukelenge mukuabo udiku, dina diandi Yesu." 
Acts17:8 Nunku bakalubakasha mitshima ya bantu ne ya bakelenge ba musoko hakuluabo malu â. 
Acts17:9 Hakangatabo tshieya tshia Yasona ne tshia bakuabo, bakabalekela." 
Acts17:10 Bana babo ba mu Kilisto bakatuma Paulo ne Sila lubilu ku Beloya butuku. Hakafikabo aku, bakabuela mu nsunagoga wa Bena Yuda." 
Acts17:11 Kadi bantu aba bakatamba ba mu Tesalonike buimpe, bua bakitabusha dî ne mitshima mimane kulongolola; bakadi badikebela mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ku dituku ku dituku ne, Malu â adi malelela, anyi?" 
Acts17:12 Nunku ba bungi bakitabusha, ne Bena Gelika bakashi bakadi ne butumbi, ne balume ba bungi kabidi." 
Acts17:13 Hakamanya Bena Yuda ba mu Tesalonike ne, Paulo udi wamba dî dia Nzambi ku Beloya kabidi, bakaluaku kabidi, bakakankisha bantu, bakabalubakasha." 
Acts17:14 Hashishe bana babo ba ma Kilisto bakatuma Paulo lubilu bua kuyeye tô ne ku mai manene, kadi Sila ne Timote bakashalamu." 
Acts17:15 Bafidi ba Paulo bakamulombola tô ne ku Atena; hakangatabo dî dia Paulo diakatumineye Sila ne Timote bua bobo balue kudiye lukasa, bakaya." 
Acts17:16 Hakadi Paulo muindile ku Atena, mutshima wandi wakatamba kunyingalala hakatangileye musoko mûle tente ne mpingu." 
Acts17:17 Yeye wakasangana ne Bena Yuda ne batendeledi bakane mu nsunagoga, wakasomba ne bakasangakana ngandi mu tshisalu ku dituku ku dituku." 
Acts17:18 Bakuabo ba munkatshi mua bena meshi ba Epikuleo ne ba Stoiko ba alua kuelangana nʼandi mpata. Bakuabo bakakonka ne, Muena tshiakulakula au neambe tshinyi? Bakuabo kabidi bakamba ne, Yeye udi bu muambi wa malu a nzambi ya bende, bualu bua yeye wakadi wamba bua Yesu ne bua dibika dia ku lufu." 
Acts17:19 Bakamukuata ku tshianza, bakamulombola ku Aleopago, bakamukonka ne, Tumanye bietu diyisha edi dihia-dihia diudi wamba, anyi?" 
Acts17:20 Bua wewe udi utuambila malu adi mahia-mahia ku matshu etu; ka tudi basue kumanya dijingulula dia malu â. 
Acts17:21 (Bena Atena bonso ne benyi bakadi bashikamemu kabakadi ne diba dia kuenza bualu bukuabo anu bua kuamba anyi bua kunyua bualu buhia-buhia.) 
Acts17:22 Paulo wakimana munkatshi mua Aleopago, wakamba ne, Nuenu Bena Atena, ndi ntangila ne, Mu malu onso nudi nutamba kutshina nzambi yenu." 
Acts17:23 Bualu bua hanakadi mpita mu nshila, ntangila bintu binudi nutendelela, nakasangana kabidi tshioshelu tshiakadi ne dî difundaku ne, Kudi Nzambi udi kai Mumanyibue. Unudi nutendelela kanui bamumanye bimpe, nyeye undi numanyisha." 
Acts17:24 Nzambi wakafuka buloba ne bintu bionso bidihu, bualu bua yeye udi Mukelenge wa diulu ne buloba, katu wikala mu bitendelelu bidi bibaka ku bianza bia bantu." 
Acts17:25 Bianza bia bantu kabiena bimukuatshila mudimu, bu hadiye ne tshintu bualu, bualu bua yeye mene utu waha bantu bonso muoyo ne muhuya ne bintu bionso." 
Acts17:26 Yeye kabidi wakafuka bisamba bionso bia bantu, bafuma mu muntu umue, bua kuikalabo ha buloba buonso; wakatahulula bikondo biabo bidianjile kulongolola diambedi, ne mikalu ya miaba yabo yashikamabo." 
Acts17:27 Wakenza nunku bua bakebe Nzambi, benda babubuta bua kumumonabo, kadi yeye kena nʼetu kule kudi muntu ne muntu." 
Acts17:28 Bualu bua mu Nzambi tudi ne muoyo, tudi tuendakana, tudi luikala; bu muakafunda bafundi benu bakuabo ne, Tuetu kabidi tudi bana bandi." 
Acts17:29 Bua tuetu tudi bana ba Nzambi nunku, kambimpe bia tuetu kuelangana meshi ne, Nzambi udi bu ngolo, anyi argent, anyi dibue, tshidi tshisonga ne lungenyi ne meshi bia bantu." 
Acts17:30 Diambedi Nzambi wakahitshishila bantu bikondo bia buhote buabo hatuhu, kadi katataka yeye udi wela mukenshi ne, Bantu bonso badi kuonso bakudimune mitshima yabo;" 
Acts17:31 bua yeye wakasungula dituku didiye ulumbuluisha ba ba buloba mu buakane kudi muntu wakasunguleye. Yeye kabidi wakaha bantu bonso ditabusha dia bualu ebu, bua yeye wakamubisha ku lufu." 
Acts17:32 Hakinvuabo bua dibika dia bafue, bakuabo bakaseka; kadi banga bakamba ne, Netunvue dî diebe kabidi bua bualu ebu." 
Acts17:33 Hashishe, Paulo wakumuka munkatshi muabo." 
Acts17:34 Kadi banga balume bakamulamata, bakitabusha; munkatshi muabo kabidi muakadi Dionusio, umena Aleopago, ne mukashi, dina diandi Damali, ne bakuabo nʼabo." 
Acts18:1 Hakashika malu â, wakumuka mu Atena wakalua ku Kolinto." 
Acts18:2 Wakasanganamu Muena Yuda mukuabo, dina diandi Akula, mulela ku luseke lua Ponto, mufume tshituha tshihi ku Italia, ne mukashi wandi Pisikila, bua Kulaudio wakela mukenshi ne, Bena Yuda bonso bumuke mu Lomo. Paulo wakaya kudibo." 
Acts18:3 Bualu bua mudimu wandi ne wabo wakadi muomumue, wakadi ushikama nʼabo, bakadi benza mudimu, bua bakadi benji ba nsubu ya bilulu."
