Acts18:4 Yeye wakakulangana ne bantu mu nsunagoga ku Lumingu ne ku Lumingu lua Bayuda, wakakeba kuitabushisha Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika." 
Acts18:5 Hakahueka Sila ne Timote, bafume ku Makedonia, Paulo wakadi wenzeshibua bikole mu kuamba kua dî dia Nzambi, wambila Bena Yuda ne, Yesu udi Kilisto." 
Acts18:6 Hakamutantamenabo ne hakamuhendabo, yeye wakabanyukuila bilulu, wakabambila ne, Mashi enu ikale ha mitu henu, meme tshiena ne bualu; katataka tô ne tshiendelele nenye kudi bisamba bia bende." 
Acts18:7 Wakumukaku, wakabuela mu nsubu wa muntu dina diandi Titio Yusto, wakadi biandi mutendeledi wa Nzambi, nsubu wandi wakadi hehi ne nsunagoga." 
Acts18:8 Kulisipo wakadi ha mutu ha nsunagoga, wakitabusha Mukelenge ne ba mu nsubu wandi bonso; Bena Kolinto ba bungi, hakunvuabo, bakitabusha, bakabatijibua." 
Acts18:9 Mukelenge wakambila Paulo mu tshikena kumona butuku ne, Kutshinyi; kadi amba, kuhû:" 
Acts18:10 bualu bua meme udi nʼebe, kakuena muntu wakulenga tshianza bua kukuenzela bibi; bua meme adi ne bantu ba bungi mu musoko eu." 
Acts18:11 Yeye wakashikamaku talala tshidimu tshijima ne ngondo isambombo, uyisha dî dia Nzambi munkatshi muabo." 
Acts18:12 Hakadi Galio muloho munene mu luseke lua Akaya, Bena Yuda bakabika diatshimue, bakatantamena Paulo, bakalua nʼandi ku tshilumbuluidi," 
Acts18:13 bakamba ne, Muntu eu udi witabushisha bantu bua kutendelelabo Nzambi ne tshitendeledi tshidi mikenshi ikanda." 
Acts18:14 Hakamba Paulo kubulula mukana, Galio wakambila Bena Yuda ne, Nuenu Bena Yuda, bu bualu ebu buikale bua bubi anyi bua dikamakama, nakadi kumanya mua kunyua dî dienu;" 
Acts18:15 kadi bikala malu â makonka a mei ne a mena ne a mikenshi yenu nkayenu, nuenu mene nuditangidileu; tshiena musue kuikala mulumbuludi wa malu â." 
Acts18:16 Yeye wakabihata ha tshilumbuluidi. 
Acts18:17 Buonso buabo babakuata Sosetene, wakadi ha mutu ha nsunagoga, bakamukumina ku mpala kua tshilumbuluidi. Kadi Galio kakabatshuka bua malu â onso." 
Acts18:18 Hakamana Paulo kulala matuku makuabo a bungi ku nyima kua bualu ebu, wakalayangana ne bana babo ba ma Kilisto, wakumuka ne Pisikila ne Akula, wakabanga kusabuka ku Sulia, mumane kubeya nsuki yandi ku Kenekelea, bua yeye wakadi muditshihe." 
Acts18:19 Bakalua ku Efeso, Paulo wakabashîaku; kadi yeye wakabuela mu nsunagoga, wakakusangana ne Bena Yuda." 
Acts18:20 Hakamulombabo bua kushaleye nʼabo tshinga tshituha, kakitabusha." 
Acts18:21 Kadi hakasanganeye nʼabo, hakambeye ne, Nempingane kunudi kabidi biasua Nzambi, wakumuka ne buatu mu Efeso." 
Acts18:22 Hakafikeye ku Kaisalia, wakabanda ka Yelushalema, wakela bena ekelesia muoyo, wakahueka ku Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 Hakashikameyemu musangu, wakumuka, wakahitshila luseke lua Galatia ne lua Fugia ku nyima, ukolesha mitshima ya bayidi bonso." 
Acts18:24 Muena Yuda mukuabo wakadiku, dina diandi Apolo, mulela ku Alesandelo, wakadi ne ludimi luhehele, yeye wakalua ku Efeso; wakadi ne bukole bua mu Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
Acts18:25 Muntu eu wakadi mulongeshibue bua nshila wa Mukelenge, ne bualu bua mutshima wandi wakadi musankedile, yeye wakadi wamba ne uyisha malu a Yesu bimpe, mumanye anu bua dibatiza dia Yone;" 
Acts18:26 wakabanga kuamba dî mu nsunagoga ne dikima. Kadi hakunvua Pisikila ne Akula kuamba kuandi, bakaya nʼandi kuabo, bakamujinguluila bua nshila wa Nzambi biakane." 
Acts18:27 Hakasueye kuya mu Akaya, bana babo ba mu Kilisto bakakolesha mutshima wandi, bakafundila bayidi mukanda bua kumuitabushabo. Hakafikeye, wakatamba kukuatshisha bantu bakadi bamane kuitabusha bua ngasa wa Nzambi;" 
Acts18:28 bualu bua wakadi utuisha Bena Yuda bikole ku mesu kua bantu, ubalesha mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Yesu udi Kilisto." 
Acts19:1 Hakadi Apolo mu Kolinto, Paulo wakalua ku Efeso, mumane kuhita mu nseke ya ku mikuna, wakasanganamu bayidi bakuabo;" 
Acts19:2 wakabakonka ne, Nuakangata Nyuma Muimpe hanuakitabusha, anyi? Bakamuambila ne, Nasha, katuakunvua ne, Nyuma Muimpe udiku." 
Acts19:3 Yeye wakabakonka kabidi ne, Bakanubatiza mu dibatiza kai? Bakamba ne, Mu dibatiza dia Yone." 
Acts19:4 Paulo wakamba ne, Yone wakadi ubatiza bantu ne dibatiza dia kukudimuna kua mitshima wambila bantu ne, Mbimpe bia nuenu kuitabusha ulualua ku nyima kuanyi, au udi Yesu mene." 
Acts19:5 Hakunvuabo dî edi, bakabatijibua mu dina dia Mukelenge Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Hakabatentekesha Paulo bianza ha mitu habo, Nyuma Muimpe wakabahuekela; bakabanga kuakula mu miaku mikuabo, bamba bualu bua Nzambi." 
Acts19:7 Bantu aba bonso bakadi bu dikumi ne babidi. 
Acts19:8 Paulo wakabuela mu nsunagoga, wakadi ujukuila bantu dî ngondo isatu, wakulangana nʼabo bua kubitabushisha malu a bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Acts19:9 Kadi bakakolesha bakuabo mitshima yabo, hakahidiabo, bamba mei mabi bua Nshila wa Nzambi ku mesu kua bantu, wakumuka kudibo, wakumusha bayidi munkatshi muabo, wakadi uyisha ku dituku ku difuku mu ekola wa Tulano." 
Acts19:10 Bualu ebu buakenjibua tô bidimu bibidi, nunku bonso bakadi bashikama mu Asia bakunvua dî dia Mukelenge, Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika." 
Acts19:11 Nzambi wakenza malu makole a kukema ku bianza bia Paulo; 
Acts19:12 nunku bakatuadila basame matuaya ne bitambala biakadiye nʼabi hamʼbidi, mabedi akumuka kudibo, ne nyuma mibi yakumuka munda muabo." 
Acts19:13 Kadi bakuabo bendakanyi ba Bena Yuda, batempeshanganyi ba mbuku, bakatela kabidi mua kubikilabo dina dia Mukelenge Yesu ha bakadi ne nyuma mibi munda, bamba ne, Ndi nkutshihisha mu dina dia Yesu udi Paulo wamba." 
Acts19:14 Bana muanda matekete ba Muena Yuda dina diandi Sekua, muakuidi mimene wa Nzambi, mbakadi benza nunku." 
Acts19:15 Nyuma mubi wakabakudimuna ne, Ndi mumanye Yesu, ndi mumanye bua Paulo kadi nuenu mbanganyi?" 
Acts19:16 Muntu wakadi ne nyuma mubi munda wakabuhukila, wakubatamba bubidi buabo, wakabatekesha; bakanyema mu nsubu muakadibo, butaka ne batahika mputa hamʼbidi." 
Acts19:17 Bualu ebu buakadi bumanyibua kudi bonso, ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika, bakadi bashikama mu Efeso; buowa buakakuata buonso buabo, dina dia Mukelenge Yesu diakadi ditumbishibua." 
Acts19:18 Ba bungi kabidi bakadi bitabushe diambedi bakadi balua, batonda basokolola malu abo." 
Acts19:19 Bena matempu ba bungi bakasangisha mikanda yabo, bakayosha ku mesu kua bantu bonso. Bakabala mushinga wai, bakausangana muikale bituha bia argent mbombo itanu." 
Acts19:20 Nunku dî dia Nzambi diakadiundadiunda bikole, diakatamba." 
Acts19:21 Hakashika malu â, Paulo wakahangidisha bua kuhitshila mu Makedonia ne Akaya bua kuyeye ku Yelushalema, wamba ne, Hangikalaku, bundi nʼabu mbua kuya kumona Lomo kabidi." 
Acts19:22 Hakatumeye babidi ba mu bakadi bamukuatshisha, Timote ne Elasto, ku Makedonia, yeye nkayandi wakashala mu Asia tshituha." 
Acts19:23 Mu matuku au diyoyo dia bungi diakabika bualu bua Nshila wa Nzambi. 
Acts19:24 Muntu mukuabo wakadiku, dina diandi Demetelio, wakadi biandi mutudi wa biamu bia argent, yeye wakadi wenza tusubu tua argent tufuanyikisha bu tshitendelelu tshia Atemise, wakadi uha batudi bakuabo mudimu wa bungi." 
Acts19:25 Yeye wakabasangisha ne bakuabo bakadi ne mudimu wabo muomumue, wakabambila ne, Bana betu, nudi bamanye ne, Ku mudimu eu nkutudi tuhetela biuma bietu." 
Acts19:26 Nudi nutangila, nudi nunvua ne, Nasha mu Efeso nkayamu, kadi mu luseke luonso lua Asia, anu tuaba tukese tudi tushala, Paulo eu wakitabushisha bantu ba bungi wakabakudimusha mitshima yabo, wamba ne, Nzambi idi nuenza ne bianza kayena Nzambi." 
Acts19:27 Kakuena anu bualu ebu bua kutshina ne, Lumu lua mudimu wetu ludi luamba kulua lubi nkayalu, kadi bua ntempelo wa nzambi mukashi munene Atemise neabadibue ne, Ntshianana, ne bua yeye neumushibue ku butumbi buandi, ngudi bantu bonso ba mu Asia ne ba ha buloba bonso batendelela." 
Acts19:28 Hakunvuabo dî adi, bakûlangana ne tshishi, bakadi bela mbila ne, Atemise wa Bena Efeso ke udi munene!" 
Acts19:29 Musoko wakûla tente ne diyoyo; hakakuatabo Gayo ne Alistâko, bantu ba ku Makedonia, bafidi ba Paulo ku luendu luandi, bakanyemena hohamue mu muaba wa tshitangidilu tshia malu." 
Acts19:30 Hakasua Paulo kubuela muakadi bantu aba, bayidi kabakitabusha." 
Acts19:31 Bantu banene bakuabo ba mu Asia, balunda bandi, bakamutumina dî bakadi bamusengelela ne, Kudibueledi mu muaba au wa tshitangidilu." 
Acts19:32 Bakuabo bakadi bela dî dikuabo, bakuabo dî dikuabo; musumba wonso wakadi anu diyoyo; ba bungi kabakamanya bualu buakadibo bunguila." 
Acts19:33 Bakasungula Alesandelo mu musumba wabo, Bena Yuda bakamutuma ku mpala. Alesandelo wakabahoha tshianza, wakamba kudividila ku mesu kua bantu." 
Acts19:34 Kadi hakamanyabo ne, Yeye udi Muena Yuda, buonso buabo bakela mbila ne di dimue tô bituha bia diba bibidi ne, Atemise wa Bena Efeso ke udi munene!" 
Acts19:35 Hakuholesha mufundi wa musoko musumba wa bantu, wakabambila ne, Nuenu Bena Efeso, muntu kai udiku udi kai mumanye ne, Musoko wa Bena Efeso udi mulami wa tshitendelelu tshia Atemise munene, ne wa tshifuanyikishi tshiandi tshiakahona tshifume kudi Yupita?" 
Acts19:36 Bua bantu kabena bamanye mua kudiula dî edi, mbimpe bia nuenu nushikame talala, kanuenji bualu lubilu." 
Acts19:37 Nuenu nuakulua kunoko ne bantu aba, kabai banze kunyenga bintu bia mu bitemielelu, kabai banze kuhenda nzambi wetu mukashi." 
Acts19:38 Nunku Demetelio ne bena mudimu nʼandi, bikalabo ne muntu tshilumbu, matuku a kulumbulula adiku ne balumbuludi badiku, baye kubandanganaku." 
Acts19:39 Kadi binuakeba bunga bualu, nebabushikishe mu disangisha didi dijalama ne mikenshi." 
Acts19:40 Bulelela, tudi mua kubandibua bua diyoyo dia lelu, bua kadi ne bualu buadi, katuena bamanye mua kuamba budi musumba eu mungele." 
Acts19:41 Hakambeye nunku, wakamuangalasha disangisha." 
Acts20:1 Hakashika diyoyo, Paulo wakabikila bayidi, wakakolesha mitshima yabo, wakabalaya, wakumuka bua kuya mu Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Hakahitshileye mu nseke ai, hakakolesheye mitshima yabo ne mei a bungi, wakalua mu Gelika." 
Acts20:3 Hakalaleyeku ngondo isatu, ne Bena Yuda bamane kumuelela tshifufu hakadiye wamba kusabuka ku Sulia, yeye wakadisunguila bua buhingana ku Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Bakadi bamufila ku Asia bakadi Sopato wa ku Beloya, muana wa Pulo; ne Bena Tesalonike, Alistâko ne Sekundo; ne Gayo wa ku Dêbe; ne Timote; ne Tukiko ne Tofimo ba ku Asia." 
Acts20:5 Bantu aba bakadianjila kuya ku mpala, bakadi batuindila mu Toa." 
Acts20:6 Hakashika matuku a bidia bidi kabi biela luevene, tuakumuka mu Filipoi, tuakabuela mu buatu; hakahita matuku atanu, tuakafika ku Toa kuakadibo; tuakalalaku matuku muanda mutekete." 
Acts20:7 Hakalua dituka dia kumudilu dia lumingu, hatuakadisangisha bua kutshibula bidia, Paulo wakadi wakulangana nʼabo; buala bua wakasua kumuka hatshiabu, wakadi ulehesha mei andi tô ne mundankulu." 
Acts20:8 Minda ya bungi yakadi mu nsubu wa mulu mutuakadi basangishile. 
Acts20:9 Nsongalume, dina diandi Eutuko, wakadi mushikamine ha madidishi, wakadi ubunga tulu; bualu bua Paulo wakadi wakula musangu mule, tulu tukole tuakamukuata, wakahona hanshi mu nsubu muisatu mulungakasha, bakamuambula mufue." 
Acts20:10 Paulo wakatuluka munshi, wakadiela hamʼbidi handi, wakamûhukila, wakamba ne, Kanuteki diyoyo, udi ne muoyo munda." 
Acts20:11 Hakabandeye mulu kabidi, hakatshibuleye bidia, hakadieye, hakakuleye musangu mule tô ne hakatshiabu, wakumuka." 
Acts20:12 Bakalua ne nsongalume muikale ne muoyo, mitshima yabo yakatamba kusanka." 
Acts20:13 Tuetu tuakadianjila ku buabi, tuakaya ku Aso, tuela meshi ne, Netuheteku Paulo, bua yeye wakadi muambe nunku, yoyo wakasua kuyilaku ku makasa." 
Acts20:14 Hakatusanganeye ku Aso, bakamubuesha mu buatu, tuakalua ku Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Tua kumukaku mu buatu; hakatshiabu, tuakafika hehi ne Kio; hakatshiabu kabidi, tuakafika ku Samo; hakatshia dinga difuku, tuakalua ku Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Kadi Paulo wakamana kudisunguila bua kuhita Efeso, bua kakasua kulehesha matuku mu Asia; wakadi uya lukasa ne, Binamanya mua kufika ku Yelushalema ha dituku dia Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Hakadi Paulo mu Mileto, wakatuma dî ku Efeso, wakabikila bakulu ba ekelesia." 
Acts20:18 Hakaluabo kudiye, wakabambila ne, Nuenu nudi bamanye bienzedi bianyi binakadi nʼabi munkatshi muenu matuku onso, ku difuku dia kumudilu dinakadiata makasa anyi mu Asia tô ne katataka," 
Acts20:19 nakadi nkuatshila Mukelenge mudimu wandi ne buhuekele buonso ne binsonshi ku mesu ne makenga akalua kundi bualu bua bifufu bia Bena Yuda. 
Acts20:20 Nudi bamanye ne, Tshiakatshina bua kunuambila malu onso akamanya mua kunukuatshisha ne bua kunuyisha hadi bantu bunguile, ne ku nsubu ne ku nsubu," 
Acts20:21 ngambila Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika bua kukudimunabo mitshima kudi Nzambi ne bua kuitabushabo Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto. 
Acts20:22 Katataka nyaya ne mutshima wanyi musuika ku Yelushalema, tshi mumanye malu aluaku kundi," 
Acts20:23 kadi Nyuma Muimpe udi unmanyisha mu misoko yonso ne, Nkanu ne makenga bidi bikuindila." 
Acts20:24 Kadi tshiena mbala muoyo wanyi bu tshintu tshia mushinga mukole kundi, binamanya mua kushikisha tshidikishilu tshianyi tshia lubilu ne mudimu unakuangata kudi Mukelenge Yesu wa kumanyisha bantu lumu luimpe lua ngasa wa Nzambi." 
Acts20:25 Katataka, monai, ndi mumanye ne, Buonso buenu banakadi ngendakana ngambila bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi kanuena nutangila mpala wanyi kabidi." 
Acts20:26 Nunku bua bualu ebu ndi nuambila lelu ne, Ndi mbingishibua ku mashi a bantu bonso." 
Acts20:27 Tshiakatshina bua kunuambila malu onso adi Nzambi musue. 
Acts20:28 Nuditangile bienu bimpe, ne tshisumbu tshionso tshiakanutekelabo batangidi kudi Nyuma Muimpe, nudishe ekelesia wa Mukelenge wakasumbeye ku mashi andi." 
Acts20:29 Ndi mumanye ne, Hanumuka bianyi, nkashama idi ne luonji neilue munkatshi muenu, neyone tshisumbu tshia mikoko;" 
Acts20:30 bantu nebabike munkatshi muenu mene, bambila bantu malu adi kâi malelela bua kukokabo bayidi ku nyima kuabo." 
Acts20:31 Nunku dimukai, neuluke bu munakadi tshi mulekele tô bidimu bisatu bua kunudimusha muntu ne muntu butuku ne munya ne binsonshi ku mesu." 
Acts20:32 Katataka ndi nufila mu bianza bia Nzambi ne mu dî dia ngasa wandi didi dimanye mua kunudiundisha ne mua kunuha buhianyi munkatshi mua bonso badi balengeshibue. 
Acts20:33 Mutshima wanyi kawakukuma ku argent wa muntu, anyi ku ngolo wandi, anyi ku bilulu biandi." 
Acts20:34 Nuenu nudi bamanye ne, Bianza bianyi ebi biakankuatshisha ne bakadi nʼanyi bua bintu bituakadi nʼabi bualu." 
Acts20:35 Mu malu onso nakunulesha tshifuanyikishi bu munudi mua kuenza mudimu bua kukuatshisha badi batekete, ne bua nuenu kuvuluka mei a Mukelenge Yesu akambeye ne, Kuha kudi kutamba kuangata kusankisha muntu." 
Acts20:36 Hakambeye nunku, wakatua binu hanshi, wakatendelela Nzambi ne buonso buabo," 
Acts20:37 Buonso buabo bakadila bikole, bakela Paulo bituha ku nshingu, bakamutua mishiku," 
Acts20:38 mitshima yabo yakatamba kunyingalala bua dî diakambeye ne, Kanuena nutangila mpala wanyi kabidi. Bakamushindikila ku buatu." 
Acts21:1 Hatuakumuka ne buatu, bamane kuhanduluka nʼabo, tuakaya balulame tô ne ku Kosa; hakatshiabu, nakafika ku Lodo; tuakumukamu, nakuya ku Palala." 
Acts21:2 Hatuakasangana buatu bukuabo bukadi ha kusabuka ku Foinike, nakabuelamu, nakaya." 
Acts21:3 Hatuakatangila Kupulio, tuakamushîa ku tshianza tshia luboko; tuakasabuka ku Sulia, nakahueka ku Tulo bua bena buatu bakasua kuhatulaku bintu." 
Acts21:4 Hatuakamona bayidi, tuakalalamu matuku muanda mutekete. Bantu aba, bamane kumanyishibua kudi Nyuma, bakambila Paulo ne, Kubandi ku Yelushalema." 
Acts21:5 Hatuakashikisha kulalamu matuku, nakumuka, tuakaya ku luendu luetu; buonso buabo, ne bakashi ne bana, bakatushindikila tô ne hatuakahatuka mu musoko; hatuakatua binu kukala kua mai, nakatendelela Nzambi, tuakalayangana nʼabo." 
Acts21:6 Tuakabuela mu buatu, kadi bobo bakahingana kuabo." 
Acts21:7 Hatuakashikisha luendu lutuakafuma nʼalu ku Tulo, tuakafika ku Tolemai, nakelangana ne bana betu muoyo, tuakalala nʼabo difuku dimue." 
Acts21:8 Hakatshiabu, tuakumuka tuakalua ku Kaisalia. Hatuakabuela mu nsubu wa Filipo, muambi wa Lumu Luimpe umue wabo wa bulami muanda mutekete, tuakalala kuandi." 
Acts21:9 Yeye wakadi ne bana bakashi banai bakatshidi tumama, bakadi bamba malu akadi kâi manze kulua." 
Acts21:10 Hatuakadi balalemu matuku makuabo, muprofete, dina diandi Agabo, mufume ku Yudaya, wakahueka ku Kaisalia." 
Acts21:11 Hakalueye kutudi, wakangata mukaba wa Paulo, wakadisuika nʼau ku makasa ne ku bianza, wakamba ne, Nyuma Muimpe udi wamba ne, Bena Yuda ba mu Yelushalema nebasuike muena mukaba eu nunku, nebamufile mu bianza bia bantu ba bende." 
Acts21:12 Hatuakunvua malu â, tuetu ne bena ha muaba au tuakadi tumusengelela ne, Kubandi ku Yelushalema." 
Acts21:13 Kadi Paulo wakatuebesha ne, Nudi nuenzela nunku tshinyi, nudila numpandisha mutshima wanyi? Ndi mumane kudilongolola, kembua kusuikibua nkayaku, kadi bua kufua kabidi ku Yelushalema bua dina dia Mukelenge Yesu." 
Acts21:14 Hakahidieye kuitabusha, tuakalekela, tuakamba ne, Bualu budi Mukelenge musue buenjibue." 
Acts21:15 Hakashika matuku â, tuakalongolola bintu bietu, tuakabanda ku Yelushalema." 
Acts21:16 Ba munkatshi mua bayidi ba mu Kaisalia bakabanda nʼetu, balue ne Nasona, Muena Kupulio, muyidi wa kale, muena kuandi kutuaya kulala." 
Acts21:17 Hatuakafika mu Yelushalema, bana betu la mu Kilisto bakatusankidila." 
Acts21:18 Hakatshiabu, Paulo wakaya nʼetu kudi Yakobo; bakulu bonso bakadiku." 
Acts21:19 Hakabeleye muoyo, wakabalondela bualu ne bualu akenza Nzambi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende ku mudimu wandi." 
Acts21:20 Hakunvuabo bualu abu, bakatumbisha Nzambi, bakamuambila ne, Muanʼetu, wewe udi utangila bungi bua mbombo ya ba munkatshi mua Bena Yuda badi bamane kuitabusha; kadi buonso buabo badi ne lukunukunu lua mikenshi ya Mose." 
Acts21:21 Bakunvua lumu luebe ne, Wewe udi uyisha Bena Yuda bonso badi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende bua kulekelabo Mose; udi ubambila ne, Kanutengudi bana benu, kanuenji bilele bia diambedi." 
Acts21:22 Nunku netuenze tshinyi? Nebunvue bulelela ne, Wewe wakulua." 
Acts21:23 Ka, enza bualu ebu bu mutudi tukuambila: Tudi ne balume banai badi baditshiha;" 
Acts21:24 ubangate, udilengesha nʼabo, ubafutshile bua bobo bamanye mua kubeya nsuki yabo; nunku, bonso nebamanye ne, Malu atuakunvua bua bualu buebe kêna malelela, kadi wewe udi wenda mululame, udi wenza mikenshi ya Mose." 
Acts21:25 Kadi bualu bua bantu ba bisamba bia bende bakamana kuitabusha, tuakabatumina mukanda, bahunge dî dietu ne, Nulekele bintu bidi bishihela mpingu, nulekele kabidi mashi, ne nyama mifiekela mu nshingu ha kuishiha, ne masandi." 
Acts21:26 Hashishe Paulo wakangata bantu aba, hakatshiabu wakadilengesha nʼabo, wakabuela mu ntempelo, umanyisha bakuidi ba Nzambi bua dishika dia matuku a kudilengesha kuabo; wakashalamu tô ne hakafilabo mulambu wa muntu ne muntu." 
Acts21:27 Hakamba matuku au muanda mutekete kushika, Bena Yuda ba mu Asia, hakamumonabo mu ntempelo, bakashikila tshisumbu tshionso tshia bantu, bakamukuata," 
Acts21:28 bela mbila ne, Bena Isalele, nutukuatshishe, kayeu muntu udi uyisha bantu bonso kuonso bua kuhidiabo tshisamba tshietu ne mikenshi ya Mose ne muaba eu; bualu bukuabo, yeye wakulua ne Bena Gelika mu ntempelo, wakona muaba eu wa tshijila." 
Acts21:29 Bualu bua bakumumona diambedi wenda mu musoko ne Tofimo, muena Efeso, bakela meshi ne, Paulo wakulua nʼandi mu ntempelo." 
Acts21:30 Diyoyo diakadi mu musoko mujima, bantu bakunguila, bakakuata Paulo, bakabanga kumumusha ku bukole mu ntempelo, bibi biakinshidibua lukasa." 
Acts21:31 Hakadibo bakeba kumushiha, lumu luakafika kudi kamanda ka tshisumbu tshia masalayi ne. Musoko mujima wa Yelushalema udi mujikuka ne mutoyi." 
Acts21:32 Yeye wakangata masalayi ne tupitene lubilu, wakanyema kudibo. Hakamonabo kamanda ne masalayi, bakalekela kukuma Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Hashishe kamanda wakasemena hehi, wakamukuata, wakamba bua kumusuikabo ne nkanu ibidi, wakabanga kubebesha ne, Udi nganyi? Wakuenza tshinyi?" 
Acts21:34 Bakuabo ba mu tshisumbu bakela mbila, mukuabo dî dikuabo mukuabo dî dikuabo; hakahangeye kujingulula bimpe bualu bua diyoyo, wakamba bua kuluabo nʼandi mu nsubu wa masalayi." 
Acts21:35 Hakafikeye ha tshibandilu, masalayi akamuambula, bualu bua luonji lua bantu," 
Acts21:36 bua tshisumbu tshia bantu bakadi babalonda bela mbila ne, Bamumushe." 
Acts21:37 Hakambabo kubuela mu nsubu wa masalayi ne Paulo, yeye wakebesha kamanda ne, Nkuambile dî, anyi? Kamanda wakamukonka ne, Ahu udi mumanye muaku wa Bena Gelika, anyi?" 
Acts21:38 Wewe ke Muena Ejipitu wakajudisha ditomboka mu matuku a diambedi, mulombole bantu binunu binai ba Batahianganyi mu tshihela, anyi?" 
Acts21:39 Kadi Paulo wakamba ne, Ndi Muena Yuda wa ku Tâso wa mu Kilikia, ndi bianyi wa musoko udi kawi wa hatuhu. Ndi nkutendekena bua meme kuambila bantu aba dî." 
Acts21:40 Hakitabusheye, Paulo wakimana ha tshibandilu, wakahoha bantu tshianza; hakahuabo talala, yeye wakabambila di mu muaku wa Bena Ebelu, wakamba ne," 
Acts22:1 Bana betu ne batatu, unvuai divila dianyi dindi musue kunuambila katataka." 
Acts22:2 Hakamunvuabo ubambila dî mu muaku wa Bena Ebelu, bakatamba kuhua talala. Yeye wakamba ne," 
Acts22:3 Ndi bianyi Muena Yuda, nakaledibua mu Tâso wa mu Kilikia, kadi nakakolela mu musoko eu, ku makasa a Gamaliele; bakanyisha bu mudi tshilele mene tshia mikenshi ya bankambua betu, muikale ne lukunukunu lua bualu bua Nzambi bu munudi nʼalu buonso buenu lelu." 
Acts22:4 Nakakengesha Nshila eu tô ne ku lufu, nsuika balume ne bakashi, mbabuesha mu nsubu ya lukanu." 
Acts22:5 Muakuidi munene wa Nzambi udi udidila ne bakulu bonso; nakangata mikanda kudibo mitumine bana betu, nakadi ngenda mu nshila wa ku Damaseke bua kusuika bakadiku mu nkanu, ne bua kulua nʼabo ku Yelushalema bua kubakengeshabo." 
Acts22:6 Hanakadi ngenda nunku, hanakafika ha buihi ne Damaseke, hakadi diba munda munya, munya mukole wa mu diulu wakantemena lukasa." 
Acts22:7 Nakahona hanshi, nakunvua dî dingambila ne, Shaula, Shaula, udi unkengesha meme tshinyi?" 
Acts22:8 Nakamukudimuna dî ne, Mukelenge, wewe udi nganyi? Yeye wakungambila ne, Ndi bianyi Yesu wa ku Nazaleta ûdi ukengesha." 
Acts22:9 Bakadi nʼanyi bakatangila munya bulelela, kadi kabakajingulula dî dia wakadi wakula nʼanyi." 
Acts22:10 Nakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, nengenze tshinyi? Mukelenge wakangambila ne, Bika, uye mu Damaseke, nebakuambilemu malu onso akukusunguilabo bua wewe kuenza." 
Acts22:11 Hanakadi tshi mumanye mua kutangila bualu bua bukole hua munya au, bakadi nʼanyi bakankuata ku tshianza balombola, nunku nakafika ku Damaseke." 
Acts22:12 Muntu mukuabo wakadimu, dina diandi Anania, wakadi mutendeledi muakane utumikile mikenshi ya Mose, lumu luandi luakadi luimpe munkatshi mua Bena Yuda bonso bakadi bashikamemu;" 
Acts22:13 yeye wakalua kundi, wakimana ba buihi nʼanyi, wakangambila ne, Muanʼetu Shaula, tabala. Ha diba adi mene nakatabala, nakamumona." 
Acts22:14 Yeye wakamba ne, Nzambi wa bankambua betu wakakusungula bua wewe kumanya budiye musue, ne bua wewe kutangila Udi Muakane, ne bua wewe kunvua dî dia mukana muandi." 
Acts22:15 Bua wewe newikale mumanyishi wandi kudi bantu bonso wa malu awakutangila ne awakunvua. 
Acts22:16 Udi ushangulukila katataka tshinyi? Bika ubatijibua, uvuibue ku mibi yebe, Ubikila dina diandi." 
Acts22:17 Hanakahingana ku Yelushalema, hanakadi ntendelela Nzambi mu ntempelo, nakalotakana," 
Acts22:18 nakamumona ungambila ne, Umuka mu Yelushalema lubilu, bua kabena bitabusha dî diudi wamba bua bualu buanyi." 
Acts22:19 Nakamba ne, Mukelenge, bobo badi bamanye munakadi mbuesha bakakuitabusha mu nsubu wa lukanu ne munakadi mbakuma mu nsunagoga yonso;" 
Acts22:20 hakadibo bamatshisha mashi a Stefano, mumanyishi wa bualu buebe, meme kabidi nakadi ngimana ba buihi, ngitabusha buala ebu, ndama bivualu bia bamushiha" 
Acts22:21 Yeye wakangambila ne, Umuke munemu, bualu bua nenkutume kuakua kule kudi bisamba bia bende." 
Acts22:22 Bakadi bamutelesha tô ne hakambeye dî edi; hashishe bakabandisha mei ne, Bumusha muntu eu ha buloba, kabiakadi bimpe bia yeye kuikala ne muoyo." 
Acts22:23 Hakadibo bela mbila bikole, bakavula bivalu, bakela buloba mulu." 
Acts22:24 Hakadibo benza nunku, kamanda ka masalayi wakamba bua kuluabo nʼandi mu nsubu wa masalayi, wakamba kabidi bua kumukumabo alonde bua kumanyeye buakamuelelabo mbila nunku." 
Acts22:25 Hakamusuikabo mionshi, Paulo wakebesha kapitene ka masalayi lukama wakadi muimane ha buihi ne, Nudi ne bukole bua kukuma muntu udi Muena Lomo, kabai banze kumuhisha, anyi?" 
Acts22:26 Hakunvua kapitene dî edi, wakaya kudi kamanda, wakamuambila ne, Udi wamba kuenza tshinyi? Muntu eu udi Muena Lomo." 
Acts22:27 Kamanda wakalua, wakamukonka ne, Ungambile, udi Muena Lomo, anyi? Yeye wakitaba ne, E." 
Acts22:28 Kamanda wakamuambila ne, Nakasumba budishikaminyi ebu ku mushinga mukole. Paulo wakamuambila ne, Biadi meme nakaledibua Muena Lomo." 
Acts22:29 Bakadi bamba kumutondesha ku kukole bakumuka kudiye lubilu; ne kamanda kabidi wakatshina hakamumanyeye ne, Udi Muena Lomo, ne bua hakadiye mumusuike." 
Acts22:30 Kadi hakatshiabu, bualu bua wakasua kumanya bimpe tshiakamubandilabo kudi Bena Yuda, kamanda wakamusulula, wakamba bua bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne balumbuludi bonso kudisangishabo, wakahueka ne Paulo, wakamushikika ku mpala kuabo." 
Acts23:1 Paulo wakatangila balumbuludi talala, wakamba ne Bana betu, nakadi muikale ne mutshima muakane ku mesu kua Nzambi tô ne ku dituku edi." 
Acts23:2 Muakuidi mimene wa Nzambi, dinu diandi Anania, wakambila bakadi bimane ha buihi ngandi bua kumukumabo ku mishiku." 
Acts23:3 Hashishe, Paulo wakamuambila ne, Nzambi neakukume, wewe tshimanu tshia nsubu tshidi tshitokesha; udi mushikame undumbuluisha bu mudi mukenshi, kadi wewe wakubangila bua kunkumabo bu mudi kamui mukenshi, munyi?" 
Acts23:4 Bakadi bimane ha buihi ne Paulo bakamuebesha ne, Udi uhenda muakuidi mimene wa Nzambi, anyi?" 
Acts23:5 Paulo wakamba ne, Bana betu, tshiakamanya ne, Yeye udi muakuidi manene wa Nzambi, bua bakafunda ne, Kuhendi mukokeshi wa tshisamba tshiebe." 
Acts23:6 Kadi hakamanya Paulo ne, Bakuabo mBasadoke, bakuabo mBafalese, wakela dî dikole ha tshilumbuluidi ne, Bana betu, Edi bianyi Mufalese, udi muana wa Mufalese; badi bandumbuluishila bua ditekemena ne bua dibika dia befue." 
Acts23:7 Hakambeye nunku, mpata yakajuka hankatshi ha Bafalese ne Basadoke, tshisumbu tshiabo tshiakatahuluka," 
Acts23:8 bualu bua Basadoke batu bamba ne, Kakuena dibika dia bafue anyi muanjelo anyi nyuma; kadi Bafalese badi bitabusha ne, Malu â onso adiku." 
Acts23:9 Diyoyo dia bungi diakajuka; bafundi bakuabo ba ku luseke lua Bafalese bakadi batayika bikole ne, Katuena bamone muntu eu ne bualu, ne nyuma wakumuambila dî, anyi ne muanjelo?" 
Acts23:10 Hakajuka mpata minene nunku, kamanda wakatshina ne, Paulo neatuanyibue, wakambila masalayi bua kuyau kumumusha munkatshi muabo ku bukole ne bua kuluau nʼandi mu nsubu wa masalayi." 
Acts23:11 Hakila butuku, Mukelenge wakimana ha buihi nʼandi, wakamba ne, Kolesha mutshima webe; bu muwakuamba bualu buanyi mu Yelushalema, nunku bûdi nʼabu mbua kubuamba mu Lomo kabidi." 
Acts23:12 Hakatshiabu, Bena Yuda bakasangisha dî diabo, bakadiela mulau ne, Katuena tudia, katuena tunua, tô ne hatuashiha Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Bakadi bele tshifufu nunku bakadi batambe ha makumi anai. 
Acts23:14 Bakalua kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne kudi bakulu, bakamba ne, Tuakusangisha dî dietu, badiele mulau mukole, ne, Katuena tulabula tshintu, tô ne hatuashiha Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Katataka nuenu ne balumbuludi nuambile kamanda bua yeye kulua nʼandi kunudi, bu badi basue kumanya bualu buandi bimpe; tuetu tudi bamane kudilongolola bua kumushiha diambedi yeye kai muanze kulua ha buihi." 
Acts23:16 Kadi muana mulume wa muanʼabo ne Paulo mukashi wakunvua bualu bua kualamina kuabo, wakalua, wakabuela mu nsubu wa masalayi, wakambila Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Paulo wakabikila kapitene kakuabo kudiye, wakamuambila ne, Ya ne nsongalume eu kudi kamanda, bua yeye udi ne dî dia kumuambila." 
Acts23:18 Nunku kapitene wakamuangata, wakaya nʼandi kudi kamanda, wakamuambila ne, Paulo, muena lukanu, wakumbikila kudiye, wakungambila bua kulua ne nsongalume eu kûdi, udi ne dî dia kukuambila." 
Acts23:19 Kamanda wakamukuata ku tshianza, wakaya nʼandi ha nkayandi, wakabanga kumuebesha mu busokoko ne, Udi ne dî kai dia kungambila?" 
Acts23:20 Yeye wakamba ne, Bena Yuda bakasangisha dî diabo bua kukuebesha bua wewe kulua ne Paulo makelela ha tshilumbuluidi, bu wewe udi musue kumuebesha bualu buandi kabidi bimpe." 
Acts23:21 Kuitabushi dî diabo, bua balume batambe makumi anai ba munkatshi muabo badi bamualamine, bamane kusangisha dî ne kudiela mulau ne, Katuena tudia, katuena tunua, to ne hatuamushiha; katataka badi badilongolole, batekemene dî diebe." 
Acts23:22 Nunku kamanda wakatuma nsongalume, wakamuambila ne, Kuambidi muntu mukuabo bu muwakunsokoluela malu â." 
Acts23:23 Kamanda wakabikila tupitene tubidi, wakabambila ne, Nulongolole masalayi nkama ibidi bua kuyau tô ne ku Kaisalia, abike butuku ebu diba ha tshitema, ne masalayi adi enda ha tubalu makumi muanda mutekete, ne bena mafuma nkama ibidi;" 
Acts23:24 wakabambila kabidi bua kuangatabo tubalu tua kushikikahu Paulo bamufikishe bimpe kudi ngovena Felika. 
Acts23:25 Yeye wakafunda mukanda, nunku ne," 
Acts23:26 Kulaudio Lusia udi utumina ngovena wa butumbi Felika muoyo. 
Acts23:27 Bena Yuda bakakuata muntu eu, bakamba kumushiha; kadi nakalua kudibo ne masalayi, nakamusungila, mumane kunvua ne, Udi Muena Lomo." 
Acts23:28 Bualu bua nakasua kumanya bimpe tshiakamubandilabo, nakaya nʼandi ku tshilumbuluidi tshiabo." 
Acts23:29 Nakamusangana mubandibue anu bua makonka a mikenshi yabo, kadi dibanda diandi kadiakadi dia mua kumushiha anyi kumuela mu lukanu." 
Acts23:30 Hakandeshabo ne, Badi belela muntu eu tshifufu, nakumutuma kûdi lubilu; nakambila bamubandi kabidi bua kuyabo kumubandila ku mesu kuebe." 
Acts23:31 Nunku masalayi akangata Paulo, bu muakâmbilabo, akalua nʼandi mu butuku tô ne ku Antipati." 
Acts23:32 Kadi hakatshiabu, akashîa masalayi akadi ha tubalu bua kuyau nʼandi, akahingana ku nsubu wau." 
Acts23:33 Hakalukau ku Kaisalia, Hakaluau mukanda kudi ngovena, akateka Paulo ku mesu kuandi." 
Acts23:34 Hakaubaleye, wakakonka luseke luakadiye; hakamanyeye ne, Ngua ku Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 wakamuambila ne, Nengunvue tshilumbu tshiebe bimpe, halua bakubanda wakamba bua kumulamabo mu nsubu munene wa Helode." 
Acts24:1 Hakahita matuku atanu, muakuidi munene wa Nzambi, dina diandi Anania, wakahueka ne bakulu bakuabo ne mubakuidi, dina diandi Têtulo, bakabanda Paulo ku mesu kua ngovena." 
Acts24:2 Hakabikilabo Paulo, Têtulo wakabanga kumubanda ne, Bualu bua tuetu tudi tusanka bua ditalala ditudi nʼadi bua bualu buebe, ne bua lungenyi luebe batshidi balengesha malu mabi adi mu tshisamba etshi," 
Acts24:3 tudi tuitabusha bualu ebu mu malu onso ne mu miaba yonso, ne disakidila dionso, mukelenge wa butumbi Felika." 
Acts24:4 Bua meme tshikuhumbishi musangu mule, ndi nkutendekena bua wewe kutelesha mei makese atudi nʼau bua lutulu luebe." 
Acts24:5 Tuakusangana muntu eu mutatshishi wa bantu, ne mutomboshi wa Bena Yuda bonso ba ha buloba, udi biandi tshilobo tshia tshisumbu tshia Bena Nazaleta;" 
Acts24:6 yeye wakakeba kuona ntempelo, buakamukuata; [" 
Acts24:7 ] 
Acts24:8 hawamukonka nkayebe, nêumanye mua kujingulula malu â onso atudi tumubanda." 
Acts24:9 Bena Yuda kabidi bakamubanda, bamba ne, Malu â adi malelela." 
Acts24:10 Hakamana ngovena kumushukuila mutu bua kuakuleye, Paulo wakandamuna ne, Bualu bua ndi mumanye ne, Wewe wakamana kuikala mulumbuludi wa tshisamba etshi bidimu bia bungi, ndi ndividila ne mutshima musanke;" 
Acts24:11 bua wewe udi mua kujingulula ne, Matuku kêna manze kuhita dikumi ne abidi hanakabanda ku Yelushalema bua kutendelela Nzambi;" 
Acts24:12 kabakansangana mu ntempelo ngela mpata ne muntu mukuabo anyi ntombosha bantu, nasha mu nsunagoga, nasha mu musoko." 
Acts24:13 Kabena bamanye mua kushikika ku mesu kuebe malu adibo bambanda katataka. 
Acts24:14 Kadi ndi ntonda kûdi ne, Ntu ngakuatshila Nzambi wa bankambua betu mudimu mu Nshila udibo babikila ne, Ngua batahuluki, ndi ngitabusha malu onso adi mu mikenshi ya Nzambi ne akafunda baprofete;" 
Acts24:15 ndi ne ditekemena kudi Nzambi didi bantu aba bitabusha kabidi ne, Dibika dia bafue nedikaleku, ne dia bakane ne dia babi." 
Acts24:16 Bua bualu ebu ndi ndienzesha matuku onso bua kuikala bianyi ne mutshima udi kawi ne tshilema kudi Nzambi ne kudi bantu. 
Acts24:17 Hakahita binga bidimu, nakalua ne bintu bia luse bua kubiha tshisamba tshianyi, ne bia kufila kudi Nzambi." 
Acts24:18 Hanakadi ngenza nunku, bakansangana mumane kulengeshibua mu ntempelo, tshi ne tshisumbu tshia bantu, tshi ne diyoyo; kadi Bena Yuda ba mu Asia bakadimu;" 
Acts24:19 bu bobo bikale nʼanyi tshilumbu, bakadi kulua ku mesu kuebe ne kumbanda." 
Acts24:20 Bantu aba mene kabidi bambe bualu bubi buakansanganabo nʼabu hanakimana ku mpala kua balumbuludi," 
Acts24:21 anu dî edi dimue dinakela hanakimana munkatshi muabo ne, Badi bandumbuluisha ku mesu kuenu lelu bualu bua dibika dia bafue." 
Acts24:22 Kadi Felika, wakadi mumanye bualu bua Nshila bimpe, wakabalaya ne, Hahueka kamanda Lusia, nendonde bualu buenu bimpe." 
Acts24:23 Yeye wakambila kapitene bua kumutumeye ne bila kumulesheye luse ne bua kahidishi balunda bandi bua kuluabo kumukuatshisha. 
Acts24:24 Hakahita matuku, Felika wakalua ne mukashi wandi Dusila, wakadi biandi Muena Yuda, wakabikila Paulo, wakunvua dî diandi bualu bua ditabusha dia mu Kilisto Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Hakadiye wakulangana abo bualu bua buakane, ne bua didikanda, ne bua tshilumbuluidi tshilualua, Felika wakatshina bikole, wakamba ne, Ya biebe katataka; hanaheta tshikondo tshiakane, nenkubikile kundi." 
Acts24:26 Yeye wakadi utekemena ne, Paulo neampe biuma. Ebu mbualu buakadiye numbikidila misangu ne misangu bua kuakula nʼandi." 
Acts24:27 Kadi hakahita bidimu bibidi, Pokio Festo wakahingana ha muaba wa Felika; kadi bualu bua wakasua kuikala ne diakalengele kudi Bena Yuda, Felika wakashia Paulo mu lukanu." 
Acts25:1 Nunku hakabuela Festo mu luseke luandi, hakahita matuku asatu, wakumuka mu Kaisalia, wakabanda ku Yelushalema." 
Acts25:2 Bakuidi banene ba Nzambi ne bantu banene ba Bena Yuda bakabanda Paulo ku mesu kuandi; bakabanga kumutendekena," 
Acts25:3 bakamulomba diakalengele kudibo, diakabi kudi Paulo, ne, Utume dî bua kumubikila ku Yelushalema; bamane kuela tshifufu bua kumushihela mu nshila." 
Acts25:4 Kadi Festo wakandamuna ne, Badi balama Paulo ku Kaisalia, nkadi ha kuyaku tshituha tshihi;" 
Acts25:5 badi ne bukokeshi munkatshi muenu bahueke nʼanyi; bikala muntu au ne bualu bubi, bamubande." 
Acts25:6 Hakalaleye munkatshi muabo matuku kâi mahite ha muanda mukulu anyi dikumi, wakahueka ku Kaisalia; hakatshiabu, wakashikama ha tshilumbuluidi, wakamba bua kuluabo ne Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Hakalueye, Bena Yuda bakadi bafume ku Yelushalema bakimana bamunyungulule, bakamubanda malu makole a bungi akadibo kabai bamanye mua kuashikika." 
Acts25:8 Kadi Paulo wakadividila ne, Tshiakenza bualu bubi bumue, nasha bua mikenshi ya Bena Yuda, nasha bua ntempelo, nasha bua Kaisa." 
Acts25:9 Bualu bua Festo wakasua kuikala ne diakalengele kudi Bena Yuda, yeye wakebesha Paulo ne, Wewe newitabushe bua kuya ku Yelushalema bua kukulumbuluishilaku bua malu â ku mesu kuanyi, anyi?" 
Acts25:10 Kadi Paulo wakamba ne, Ndi muimane ku tshilumbuluidi tshia Kaisa, bundi nʼabu bua kulumbuluishibuaku; tshiakuenzela Bena Yuda bibi, bu mûdi wewe mene mumanye bimpe kabidi." 
Acts25:11 Bingikala muenji wa bualu bubi, ne bingikala muenze bualu bua lufu, tshiena mpidia kufua; kadi hikala malu au onso adi bantu aba bambande kâi malelela, kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kunfila kudibo bua kubasankisha. Ndi ndayidila kudi Kaisa." 
Acts25:12 Hashishe, Festo wakasangisha dî ne bamukuatshishi ba bilumbu, wakamukudimuna ne, Wewe wakujidila kudi Kaisa, neuye kudi Kaisa." 
Acts25:13 Hakahita manga matuku, mukelenge Agipa ne Bênike bakalua ku Kaisalia bua kuela Festo muoyo." 
Acts25:14 Hakadibo balalaku matuku a bungi, Festo wakalesha mukelenge tshilumbu tshia Paulo ne, Muena lukanu mukuabo udiku, mushîa kudi Felika:" 
Acts25:15 hanakadi ku Yelushalema, bakuidi banene ne bakulu ba Bena Yuda bakanmanyisha bualu buandi; bakandomba ne, Umuhishe." 
Acts25:16 Nakabakudimuna ne, Bena Lomo kabena ne tshilele tshia kufila muntu tshianana diambedi mubanda kai muanze kuikala ne bamubandi ku mpala kuandi, kai muanze kuikala ne tshikondo tshia kudividila bua bualu buakamubandabo." 
Acts25:17 Nunku hakadisangishabo kunoko, tshiakashanguluka; hakatshiabu, nakashikama ha tshilumbuluidi, nakamba bua kuluabo ne muntu eu." 
Acts25:18 Hakimana bamubandi, kabakadi bamubanda bualu bumue bua malu mabi anakadi ngela meshi;" 
Acts25:19 kadi bakadi bamubanda bua malu makuabo a tshitendeledi tshiabo, ne bua kampanda au Yesu, wakamana kufua, kadi Paulo wakadi ukolesha dî diandi ne, Udi ne muoyo." 
Acts25:20 Bualu bua nakadi ndubakana mua kukonka bua malu â, tshiakamanya mua kukosa tshilumbu etshi, nakamukonka ne, Wewe newitabushe bua kuya ku Yelushalema bua bakulumbuluishileku bua malu â, anyi?" 
Acts25:21 Kadi bakalomba Paulo bua kumulamabo tô ne ku dikosa dia tshilumbu tshiandi kudi Augusto, nakabambila bua kumulamabo tô ne hanamanya mua kumutuma kudi Kaisa." 
Acts25:22 Agipa wakambila Festo ne, Meme kabidi nakadi musue kunvua dî dia muntu au. Festo wakamba ne, Makelela neunvue dî diandi." 
Acts25:23 Hakatshiabu, Agipa ne Bênike bakahia ne kudilesha kunene, bakabuela mu muaba wa kunyua bilumbu, ne tumanda ne bantu banene ba musoko; hakamba Festo dî, bakalua ne Paulo." 
Acts25:24 Festo wakamba ne, Mukelenge Agipa ne bonso badi nʼetu kunoko, nudi nutangila muntu eu wakabandabo kudi tshisumbu tshionso tshia Bena Yuda ku mesu kuanyi, ku Yelushalema ne kunoko kabidi, bela mbila ne, Kambimpe bia yeye ikale ne muoyo kabidi." 
Acts25:25 Kadi meme nakamusangana kai muenze bualu bua kufueye; bua yeye nkayandi wakalayidila kudi Augusto, nakasungula bua kumutuma." 
Acts25:26 Kadi tshiena ne dî dilelela dia bualu buandi dia kufundila mukelenge wanyi. Ebu mbualu bunakumubikidila ku mpala kuenu, ne kudi wewe mene, mukelenge Agipa, hakonkibueye tshilumbu tshiandi, nemmanye dî dia kufunda," 
Acts25:27 bualu bua ndi mona ne, Kendungenyi luakane bua kutuma muena lukanu, tshi muambe tshiakamubandabo." 
Acts26:1 Agipa wakambila Paulo ne, Udi mua kudiambila bualu buebe. Paulo wakolola tshianza, wakabanga kudividila ne," 
Acts26:2 Mukelenge Agipa, ndi ne disanka bualu bua lelu ndi ngamba kudividila ku mesu kuebe bua malu onso anakubandibua kudi Bena Yuda;" 
Acts26:3 ndi ntamba kusanka bua wewe udi mumanye bilele bia Bena Yuda ne malu abo bimpe; ndi nkutendekena bua wewe kutelesha dî dianyi ne lutulu. 
Acts26:4 Tshikadilu tshia muoyo wanyi ku buana buanyi, tshinakadi nʼatshi ku tshibangidilu munkatshi mua tshisamba tshianyi mene, ne ku Yelushalema, tshidi tshimanyibue kudi Bena Yuda bonso;" 
Acts26:5 biasuabo kuamba dî dilelela badi banmanye ku tshibangidilu, bu munakadi Mufalese wa tshisumbu tshia bakatamba kulamata tshitendeledi tshietu." 
Acts26:6 Katataka udi muimane aha bua kulumbuluishibua bua ditekemena dia mulayi wakalaya Nzambi bankambua betu; 
Acts26:7 bisamba bietu dikumi ne bibidi bidi bitendelela Nzambi bikole butuku ne munya, bidi bitekemena ne, Netuhete mulayi au. Mukelenge, Bena Yuda badi bambandila bualu bua ditekemena edi." 
Acts26:8 Bimbisha Nzambi bafue, nudi numona bualu ebu bu bualu budi kabui bua kuitabushibua munyi?" 
Acts26:9 Bulelela, meme kabidi nakadi ngelangana meshi ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kuenza malu a bungi adi abihisha dina dia Yesu wa ku Nazaleta." 
Acts26:10 Nakenzenza bualu ebu kabidi mu Yelushalema; hanakangata bukole kudi bakuidi banene ba Nzambi, nakabuesha basanto ba bungi mu nsubu ya lukanu; hakimbabo kubashiha, nakitabusha." 
Acts26:11 Misangu ya bungi nakadi mbakengesha mu nsunagoga yonso, nakakeba bua kubahendesha Nzambi; bualu bua nakadi nʼabo lukuna lutambe, nakabakengesha tô ne ku misoko ya bisamba bikuabo." 
Acts26:12 Hanakadi ngenza nunku, nakadi ngenda mu nshila wa ku Damaseke ne bukole ne dî bia bakuidi banene;" 
Acts26:13 bakafika diba munda munyi mukelenge, nakatangila munya mukole ufuma mu diulu mutambe dinkenka dia diba, wakuntemena meme ne bakadi benda nʼanyi." 
Acts26:14 Buonso buetu hatuakahona hanshi, nakunvua dî dingambila mu muaku wa Bena Ebelu ne, Shaula, Shaula, udi unkengesha meme tshinyi? Wewe udi udikengesha hautshidi usuba mikolo ku mutshi musonga." 
Acts26:15 Nakamukonka ne, Mukelenge, wewe udi nganyi? Mukelenge wakankudimuna ne, Ndi bianyi Yesu ûdi ukengesha;" 
Acts26:16 kadi bika, wimane, bua bualu ebu nakumuenekela kûdi bua kukusungula bu muenji wa mudimu wanyi ne bu mumanyishi wa malu awakumona ne wa malu anamuenekela kûdi;" 
Acts26:17 nenkusungile mu bianza bia bantu ne bia bisamba bia bende, bandi nkutuma kudibo," 
Acts26:18 bua wewe kubulula mesu abo, bakome nyima ku midima batangile ku munya, bakoma nyima ku bukole bua Satana batangile kudi Nzambi, bua bobo bahete dijimisha dia mibi yabo ne buhianyi munkatshi mua badi balengeshibue ku ditabusha didibo bangitabusha nʼadi." 
Acts26:19 Nunku, mukelenge Agipa, tshiakahidia kutumikila tshikena kumona tshia mu diulu," 
Acts26:20 kadi nakambila ba mu Damaseke diambedi, ne ba mu Yelushalema, ne ba mu luseke luonso lua Yudaya, ne ba bisamba bia bende kabidi, bua kukudimunabo mitshima yabo, batshinguluke kudi Nzambi, benze malu adi makanangane ne dikudimuna dia mitshima yabo." 
Acts26:21 Bua bualu ebu mbuakankuatshila Bena Yuda mu ntempelo, bakeba kunshiha." 
Acts26:22 Bualu bua nakaheta dikuatshisha dia kudi Nzambi, ndi muimane tô ne lelu eu, nmanyisha bakese ne banene, tshi ngamba manga malu, anu akambabo kudi baprofete ne kudi Mose ne, Alualua." 
Acts26:23 Ndi mbalesha bu mudi Kilisto mumanye mua kukenga, ne bu mudiye, wa kumudilu wa ku dibika dia bafue, wamba kumanyisha bantu ne bisamba bia bende bualu bua munya." 
Acts26:24 Hakadiye udividila nunku, Festo wakela dî diandi bikole ne, Paulo wewe udi muhale, lungenyi luebe lua bungi ludi lukuhadisha." 
Acts26:25 Kadi Paulo wakamba ne, Mukelenge Festo, tshiena muhale, kadi ndi ngamba mei a bushua ne a meshi." 
Acts26:26 Mukelenge Agipa udi mumanye bua malu â; ndi muambilau ne dikima; bualu bua ndi ngitabusha ne, Kakuena bualu bumue bua mu malu â budi bumusokome, bua bualu ebu kabuakenjibua mu ditumba dia nsubu." 
Acts26:27 Mukelenge Agipa, wewe udi witabusha mei a baprofete, anyi? Ndi mumanye ne, Udi muitabushe." 
Acts26:28 Agipa wakambila Paulo ne, Wewe udi ukeba kungitabushisha ndue Muena Kilisto anu ne kalu kakese." 
Acts26:29 Paulo wakamba ne, Nasha ne kalu kakese nasha ne bualu bunene, ndi ndomba Nzambi kambua wewe nkayebe kadi bua bonso badi bunvua mei anyi lelu kabidi, balue bu mundi emu, anu nkanu ei idishadile." 
Acts26:30 Mukelenge wakabika ne ngovena no Bênike ne bakadi bashikame nʼabo. 
Acts26:31 Hakumukabo, bakambilangana ne, Muntu eu kena wenza bualu bua lufu anyi bua lukanu." 
Acts26:32 Agipa wakambila Festo ne, Bu muntu eu kai mulayidile kudi Kaisa, bakadi kumanya mua kumulekela." 
Acts27:1 Hakasungulabo bua tuetu kuya mu bualu ku Italia bakafila Paulo ne bakuabo bakadi mu nsubu wa lukanu mu bianza bia Yulio, kapitene ka mu tshisumbu tshia masalayi tshiakadibo babikila ne, Tshia Augusto." 
Acts27:2 Hatuakabuela mu buatu bua ku Adulamutiona buakadi buamba kuya ku miaba yakadi kukala kua mai a luseke lua Asia, tuakaya; Alistâko, Muena Makedonia wa ku Tesalonike wakadi nʼetu." 
Acts27:3 Hakatshiabu, tuakafika ku Sidona; Yulio wakenzela Paulo bimpe, wakitabusha bua yeye kuya kudi balunda bandi bamukuatshishe." 
Acts27:4 Hatuakumukaku, tuakayila ku nyima kua Kupulio, bualu bua luhehele luakadi lutuhingisha." 
Acts27:5 Hatuakasabuka mai akadi hehi ne Kilikia ne Pampulia, tuakafika ku Mula, musoko wa mu luseke lua Lukia." 
Acts27:6 Kapitene wakasanganaku buatu bua Alesandelia buakadi buya ku Italia, wakatubueshamu." 
Acts27:7 Hatuakadi tuya matuku a bungi bitulu bitulu, tuakafika ha buihi ne Kinido, benda ne ditata dikole; bua luhehele luakadi lutuhumbisha bua kufikaku, tuakayila ku nyima kua Kulete hehi ne Salamone." 
Acts27:8 Hatuakahitshilaku ne ditata dikole, tuakafika ku muaba udibo babikila ne, Dilobo Dimpe; musoko wa Lasaya wakadi ha buihi." 
Acts27:9 Hakahita matuku a bungi, luendu lumane kutukuata buowa, bualu bua matuku a Dijila dia bia kudia akamana, kuhita, Paulo wakabanga kubadimusha:" 
Acts27:10 wakabambila ne, Balumiana, udi mona ne, Luendu elu neluikale ne dibuluka ne dijimina dikole, kendia bintu ne buatu nkayabi, kadi ndia mioyo yetu kabidi." 
Acts27:11 Kadi kapitene ka masalayi wakatamba kuitabusha dî dia muena yende ne dia muena buatu ku mpala kua mei akamba Paulo. 
Acts27:12 Bualu bua dilobo adi kadiakadi diakane dia kushikishilaku ngondo ya mashika, bakadi batambe bungi bakamba ne, Tumukai kunoko, ne tuamanya mua kufika ku Foinike bua kushikishilaku ngondo ya mashika, aku kudi dilobo dikuabo dia Kulete, didi ditangila ku node-esete ne ku sude-esete." 
Acts27:13 Hakaheha luhehele lua ku Sude bitulu bitulu, bakelangana meshi ne, Tuakuheta butudi basue, bakabisha luongo, bakadi bayila ku muelelu wa mai wa Kulete." 
Acts27:14 Kadi hakahita tshituha tshihi, tshihuhu tshikole tshidibo babikila ne, Eulakulo, tshifuma ku mpata, tshiakatukuma." 
Acts27:15 Hakatutatshi ku buatu, kabuakamanya mua kutulama kuakadi kuvuila tshihuhu, tuakalekela kuita, luhehele luakatuendesha." 
Acts27:16 Hatuakafika ku nyima kua tshisenga tshikese, dina diatshi Kauda, tuakadi ne bualu bukole bua kuambula buatu bukese;" 
Acts27:17 hakabubandishabu, bakanyengela buatu bunene mionshi ha nyima bua kubukuatakasha. Hakatshinabo ne, Luhehele nelutuele ha lusenga lua ku Suti, bakatulula tshilulu tshiakadi tshiendesha buatu, luhehele luakatuendesha." 
Acts27:18 Hatuakatata bikole ne tshihuhu, hakatshiabu, bakabanga kuela biakadibo batuala mu buatu mu mai;" 
Acts27:19 hakafika dituku disatu, bakela bintu bikuabo bia mu buatu mu mai ne bianza biabo," 
Acts27:20 Diba ne mitoto kabiakatutemena matuku a bungi, tshihuhu tshitambe bukole tshiakatukuata, katuakadi ne ditekemena kabidi ne, Netusungidibue." 
Acts27:21 Hakadibo kabai badie musangu mule, Paulo wakimana munkatshi muabo, wakamba ne, Balumiana, biakadi bimpe bia nuenu kunvua dî dianyi; bu nuenu benze nunku, kanuakadi kumuka ku Kuleta, kanuakadi kuikala ne bualu bukole ebu ne bua dibutuisha dia bintu." 
Acts27:22 Katataka ndi nusengelela ne, Koleshai mitshima yenu, bualu bua muoyo wa muntu umue wa munkatshi muenu kawena ujimina, anu buatu." 
Acts27:23 Bualu bua muanjelo wa Nzambi wanyi, undi nkuatshila mudimu, wakuimana ha buihi nʼanyi butuku ebu;" 
Acts27:24 wakungambila ne, Paulo, kutshinyi; bûdi nʼabu mbua kuimana ku mpala kua Kaisa; ne mona, Nzambi wakukuha bonso badi benda nʼebe mu buatu." 
Acts27:25 Nunku, bana betu, nukoleshe mitshima yenu; ndi ngitabusha Nzambi ne, Bualu nebuenjibue bu muakangambileye." 
Acts27:26 Kadi butudi nʼabu mbua kuedibua mu tshianga. 
Acts27:27 Hakalua butuku bua dikumi ne anai, hakadi luhehele lututambakasha mu mai manene a Adulia, mundankulu bena buatu bakelangana meshi ne, Tukadi ha kufika ha buihi ne buloba." 
Acts27:28 Bakateta bule bua mai, bakabusangana maboko makumi abidi; bakayabo tshituha, bakabuteta kabidi, bakabusangana maboko dikumi ne atanu." 
Acts27:29 Hakatshinabo ne, Netuedibue ha mabue, bakela luongo inai mu mai ku tshitaku tshia buatu, bakadi bajinga ne, Buatshiahu." 
Acts27:30 Bena buatu bakamba kunyema, bakadi batulula buatu bukese mu mai, badinga ne, Tudi basue kuela luongo mikuabo ku mpala kua buatu." 
Acts27:31 Kadi Paulo, wakambila kapitene ka masalayi ne masalayi mene ne, Bikala bantu aba kabai bashale mu buatu, kanuena mua kusungidibua." 
Acts27:32 Hashishe masalayi akakosa mionshi ya buatu bukese, buakahona mu mai." 
Acts27:33 Paulo wakadi ubasengelela buonso buabo tô ne hakamba butuku kutshia, bua kudiabo, wamba ne, Edi ndituku dia dikumi ne anai anuakadi bashale, bajile bia kudia kanui badie tshintu." 
Acts27:34 Nunku ndi nusengelela bua nuenu kudia, bualu ebu nduhandu luenu, bualu bua lusuki lua ku mutu kua umue wenu kaluena lujimina." 
Acts27:35 Hakambeye nunku, wakangata mutanda wa bidia, wakasakidila Nzambi ku mesu kua buonso buabo, wakautshibula, wakabanga kudia." 
Acts27:36 Buonso buabo bakakolesha mitshima yabo, ne bobo bine bakangata bia kudia." 
Acts27:37 Buonso buetu tuakadi mu buatu bantu nkama ibidi ne makumi muanda mutekete ne basambombo. 
Acts27:38 Hakûkutabo, bakabanga kuhehesha buatu, bakela blé mu mai." 
Acts27:39 Hakatshiabu, kabakadi bamanye buloba abu; bakatangila tshinkonya tshia mai tshiakadi ne lusenga, bakasangisha dî ne, Ne tuamanya mua kutuma buatu mu muaba wawa." 
Acts27:40 Bakakosa, mionshi ya luongo, bakahisha mu mai ne mionshi; ha diba adi mene bakasulula mionshi ya bidimba; bakabandisha tshilulu tshia ku mpala bua kukuata tshi luhehele, bakabanga kuya balulame ku muelelu wa mai." 
Acts27:41 Kadi hakafikabo ha nsangilu ibidi ya mai, bakatua buatu ku lusenga; mpala wa buatu wakatua ku lusenga, wakashindama, kadi tshitaku tshiabu tshiakabanga kutshibuka bualu bua bukole bua mambuanka." 
Acts27:42 Lungenyi lua masalayi luakadi lua kushiha bena lukanu, bua umue wabo kombedi, kanyemi." 
Acts27:43 Kadi bualu bua kapitene kau wakasua kusungila Paulo, wakâkesha; wakamba ne, Badi bamanye mua kuombela badiele mu mai, badianjile ku mpata," 
Acts27:44 bakuabo bangate mabaya anyi bintu bikuabo bia mu buatu, baye ha mutu habi. Nunku buonso buabo bakafika ku mpata, bakahanduka." 
Acts28:1 Hatuakahanduka, tuakamanya ne, Tshisenga etshi ntshidibo babikila ne, Melita." 
Acts28:2 Basenshi bakadi batutua luse lua bungi: bakatutemena kahia, bakatubikila buonso buetu, bualu bua nvula wakadi muloke ne bua mashika akadiku." 
Acts28:3 Hakatshiabu Paulo tshisumbu tshia nkunyi, hakatshieleye mu kahia, nyoka wakahatukamu bualu bua luiya lua kahia, wakalamata ku tshianza tshiandi." 
Acts28:4 Hakatangila basenshi nyoka mubi mulembelele ku tshianza tshiandi, bakambilangana ne, Bulelela, muntu eu udi mutahianganyi; wakuhanduka mu mai, kadi dilumbulula dilelela kadiena ditabusha bua yeye kuikala ne muoyo." 
Acts28:5 Kadi yeye wakakuha nyoka mu kahia, kakunvua disama." 
Acts28:6 Bobo bakadi batekemena ne, Neûle, anyi neahone hanshi lukasa mufue; kadi hakatekemenabo nunku musangu mule, hakadibo kabai bamone bualu bulue kudiye, bakakudimuna meshi abo bamba ne, Yeye udi nzambi." 
Acts28:7 Ha buihi ne muaba au hakadi madimi a muntu mimene, mukelenge wa tshisenga, dina diandi Popolio, wakatubuesha mu nsubu muandi, wakatuenzela bimpe matuku asatu." 
Acts28:8 Kadi tatu wa Popolio wakadi mulale musame mubidi kahia ne munda mashi; Paulo wakaya kudiye, wakatendelela Nzambi, wakamulenga bianza, wakashikisha masama andi." 
Acts28:9 Hakenzeye nunku, bakuabo ba mu tshisenga bakadi ne mabedi bakadi balua kudiye, bakadi bukoleshibua;" 
Acts28:10 bobo bakatamba tutu tumbisha; hatuakamba kumuka, bakabuesha bintu bitu akadi nʼabi bualu mu bualu." 
Acts28:11 Hakahita ngondo isatu, tuakabuha mu buatu bua ku Alesandelia buakadi bulale ku tshisenga bua ngondo ya mashika, tshimanyinu tshiabu ne, Diosokuli." 
Acts28:12 Hatuakafika ku Sulakusa, tuakalalaku matuku asatu." 
Acts28:13 Hatuakumukaku, tuakatshinguluka, yakafika ku Legio. Hakahita dituku, luhelele lua ku Sude luakajuka, yakafika ku Potiolo dituku dibidi." 
Acts28:14 Tuakasanganamu bana betu ba Nzambi, bobo bakatusengelela bua kushala nʼabo matuku muanda mutekete. Nunku tuakalua ku Lomo." 
Acts28:15 Kadi hakunvua bana betu ba Nzambi ba mu Lomo lumu luetu, bakalua kutuakidila ku Tshisalu tshia Apio ne ha Nsubu Isatu ya Tshilala Benyi; bakabamona Paulo, wakasakidila Nzambi, mutshima wandi wakakankamana." 
Acts28:16 Hatuakabuela mu Lomo, bakitabusha bua Paulo ashikame ha nkayandi ne disalayi dimulame." 
Acts28:17 Hakahita matuku asatu, Paulo wakabikila bakadi ku mutu kua Bena Yuda; hakunguilabo, wakabambila ne, Bana betu, tshiakenza bibi kudi bantu anyi ku bilele bia bankambua betu, kadi mu Yelushalema bakaufila musuika mu bianza bia Bena Lomo." 
Acts28:18 Hakankonkabo bualu, bakasua kundekela, bualu bua kabakasangana ne bualu bua meme kufuila." 
Acts28:19 Kadi hakahidia Bena Yuda kuitabusha dî diabo, bunakadi nʼabu mbua kulayidila kudi Kaisa; tshiakadi ne bualu bua kubanda nʼabu tshisamba tshianyi." 
Acts28:20 Bua bualu ebu nunku bunakunubikidila bua kulua kuntangila ne bua kuakula nʼanyi; ndi musuikibue ne lukanu elu bualu bua ditekemena dia Isalele 
Acts28:21 Bakamuambila ne, Tuetu katuakangata mikanda mifume ku Yudaya bua bualu buebe, kakuena umue wa bana betu wakalua kunoko utuambila lumu, anyi ukutela ne bualu bubi." 
Acts28:22 Tudi basue kunvua bualu bûdi wela meshi; bualu bua tshisumbu etshi, tudi bamanye ne, Badi batshibanda kuonso." 
Acts28:23 Hakamusunguilabo dituku, bakalua ba bungi mu nsubu muandi; yeye wakabalondoluela malu, wakabayisha bua bukelenge bua Nzambi, wakateta bua kubitabushisha Yesu, ne ku mikenshi ya Mose ne ku mei a baprofete, dinda tô ne ku dilolo." 
Acts28:24 Bakuabo bakadi bitabusha malu akambeye, bakuabo bakadi bâhidia." 
Acts28:25 Hakabangabo kuhunga mei munkatshi muabo, bakumuka, hakamana Paulo kubambila anu dî dimue ne, Nyuma Muimpe wakambidila bankambua benu bimpe kudi muprofete Yeshaya ne," 
Acts28:26 Ya biebe kudi bantu aba ubambile ne, Kunvua nenunvue, kanuena nujingulula; Kumona nenumone, kanuena numona bimpe;" 
Acts28:27 Bua mitshima ya bantu aba yakulua manyi a bungi. Badi mpudi matshu, Bakubuikila mesu abo; Nunku kabamonyi ne mesu abo, Kabunvu ne matshu abo, Kabamanyi ne mitshima yabo, Kabakudimunyi mitshima yabo Bua meme neondahe." 
Acts28:28 Numanye bienu ne, Luhandu ebi luakutumibua kudi bantu ba bende, bobo kabidi nebumate. [" 
Acts28:29 ] 
Acts28:30 Paulo wakalalamu bidimu bibidi, wakadi mu wandi nsubu ufuta muena nsubu, wakadi witabusha bantu bonso bakahia kudiye," 
Acts28:31 ubambila bua bukelenge bua Nzambi, ubayisha malu a Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ne dikima dionso, muntu kakamukanda." 
Romans1:1 Paulo, muhika wa Yesu Kilisto, wakabikidibua bua bakola mupostolo; wakafidibua ku lumu luimpe lua Nzambi," 
Romans1:2 luakatulayeye diambedi kudi baprofete bandi mu mifundu ya tshijila," 
Romans1:3 bualu bua Muana wandi Mulume, wakaledibua bu mudi buntu buandi kudi tunkanuniuna tua Davidi," 
Romans1:4 wakamanyishibua Muana wa Nzambi ne bukole ku dibika diandi dia ku bafue, bu mudi nyuma wandi wa tshijila; Yesu Kilisto, Mukelenge wetu." 
Romans1:5 Tuakuangata ngasa kudiye ne bupostolo, bua kuvudisha ditumikila dia ditabusha munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende bionso, bualu bua dina diandi." 
Romans1:6 Munkatshi muabo mudi nuenu kabidi, babikidibue bua kuikala ba Yesu Kilisto." 
Romans1:7 Ndi nfunda kudi bonso ba mu Lomo, banangibue kudi Nzambi, babikidibue bua kuikala basanto. Ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi, udi kabidi Tatu wetu, ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto." 
Romans1:8 Bualu bua kumudilu, udi nsakidila Nzambi wanyi mu Yesu Kilisto bua buonso buenu, bualu bua ditabusha dienu didi dimanyishibue ba buloba buonso." 
Romans1:9 Bualu bua Nzambi, undi nkuatshila mudimu mu nyuma wanyi mu lumu luimpe lua Muana Wandi, udi mumanyi wanyi bu mundi tshî ndekela kunutela misangu yonso mu mitendelelu yanyi," 
Romans1:10 ndomba bianyi ne, Bikala bualu mua kuikala nunku, mpindiu, musangu mumane kuleha, nempete dikasa dimpe ku disua dia Nzambi bua kulua kunudi." 
Romans1:11 Bualu bua udi njinga bua kunumona bua kunuhesha kuha kukuabo kua Nyuma, bua nuenu nujadikibue." 
Romans1:12 Bualu budi muiku, bua meme ne nuenu kusambibua munkatshi muenu, muntu ne muitu ku ditabusha dia mukuabo, ne dienu ne dianyi." 
Romans1:13 Bana betu, tshiena musue nuhange kumanya ne, Misangu ya bungi nakadisunguila bua kulua kunudi (ne nakuhumbishibua tô ne katataka), bua meme kuangata mamuma munkatshi muenu kabidi bu munakuângata munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabo bia bende." 
Romans1:14 Ndi amena dibanza wa Bena Gelika ne wa Basenshi kabidi, ne wa bena lungenyi ne wa bahote kabidi." 
Romans1:15 Nunku, bu mundi mua kuenza, ndi mudilongolole bua kuamba lumu luimpe kudi nuenu kabidi badi mu Lomo." 
Romans1:16 Bualu bua tshiena nfua bundu bua lumu luimpe; bua ludi bukole bua Nzambi ku luhandu kudi muntu yonso udi witabusha, kudi Muena Yuda diambedi, ne kudi Muena Gelika kabidi." 
Romans1:17 Bualu bua buakane bua Nzambi buakubuluibuamu ku ditabusha ne ku ditabusha; bu muakafundabo ne, Muntu muakane neikale ne muoyo ku ditabusha." 
Romans1:18 Bualu bua tshishi tshia Nzambi tshidi tshibuluibua mu diulu ha malu onso adi kâi a Nzambi ne adi kâi makane a bantu, badi bakanda bushua ku malu mabi." 
Romans1:19 Bualu bua mianda ya Nzambi idi mimanyibue kudi bantu idi imueneka munda muabo, bualu bua Nzambi wakaimuenesha kudibo." 
Romans1:20 Bua malu andi akadi kâi mua kumueneka katshia buloba buafukibua, bukole buandi bua tshiendelele mene ne bunzambi buandi, adi amueneka bimpe, bualu bua adi ajinguluka ku bintu biakafukibua; nunku kabena ne tshia kudibingisha nʼatshi." 
Romans1:21 Bualu bua hakamanyabo Nzambi, kabakamutumbisha bu Nzambi, kabakamusakidila; kadi meshi akelabo akalua a hatuhu, ne mitshima yabo mijibale yakalua mîdima." 
Romans1:22 Hakadiambabo ne, Tudi bena lungenyi, bakalua bahote." 
Romans1:23 Bakandamana butumbi bua Nzambi udi kai unyanguka ku tshifuanyikishi tshia mubidi wa muntu udi unyanguka, ne tshia nyunyu, ne tshia nyama ya mikonu inai, ne tshia bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi." 
Romans1:24 Ke Nzambi kabidi wakabafila ku bukoya kudi nkuka ya mitshima yabo, bua kunyanganganabo mibidi yabo ne malu a bundu munkatshi muabo;" 
Romans1:25 bualu bua bakandamuna bushua bua Nzambi ku mashimi, ne bakatendelela tshintu tshifukibua ne bakatshikuatshishila mudimu ku mpala kua Mufuki watshi; udi biandi mutumbishibue tshiendelele. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Bua bualu ebu Nzambi wakabafila ku nkuka ya bundu; bualu bua bakashi babo bakashintakasha tshilele tshiabo ku tshilele tshidi katshî tshiabo; 
Romans1:27 muomumue balume kabidi, bakalekela tshilele tshiabo ne bakashi, bakasaminangana mioyo bua nkuka ya mibidi yabo, balume ne balume bakenzelangana malu a bundu; nunku bakadiangatshila difutu dia kuluhakana kuabo diakadi ne bua kulua kudibo." 
Romans1:28 Bu muakahidiabo kuikala ne Nzambi mu meshi abo, nunku Nzambi wakabafila ku meshi a hatuhu akahidleye, bua kuenzabo malu adi kâi makanangane ne lungenyi." 
Romans1:29 Bakadi bûle tente ne malu onso adi kâi makane, ne malu mabi, ne kusaminangana kua mioyo, ne lukinu; bakadi bûle tente ne mukau, kushibangana, kutandangana, lubombo, lukuna; bena minunganu," 
Romans1:30 bena bunsonge, bena lukuna ne Nzambi, bena dikamakama, badisu, bafunyifunyi, babangi ba malu mabi mahia-mahia, bahidi ba mei a baledi babo," 
Romans1:31 bantu bakadi kabai ne meshi, bakadi kabai balama mei akahungabo, bakadi kabai ne dinanga bu dia bantu, bakadi kabai ne mitshima ya luse." 
Romans1:32 Bantu aba, hakamanyabo mukenshi wa Nzambi ne, Bantu badi benza malu â badi bakanangane ne lufu, bobo bine batshidi bênza, ne badi bikalangana kabidi ne dî dimue ne bantu badi bênza." 
Romans2:1 Nunku, wewe kampanda, utu walumbuluisha bakuabo, kuena ne tshia kudibingisha nʼatshi; udi udihisha biebe ne dilumbulula diudi ulumbuluisha nʼadi mukuabo; bualu bua hawalumbuluisha mukuabo, wewe utu wenza malu momumue." 
Romans2:2 Tudi bamanye ne, Dilumbulula dia Nzambi didiye ulumbuluisha nʼadi batu benza malu a nunku didi dia bushua." 
Romans2:3 Ne wewe kampanda, utu walumbuluisha batu benza malu a nunku, ne utu wenza biebe muomumue, udi welangana meshi ne, Meme nempanduke mu dilumbuluisha dia Nzambi, anyi?" 
Romans2:4 Anyi udi uhetula bubanshi bua buimpe bua Nzambi ne lutulu luandi ne luse lua musangu mule; kuena mumanye ne luse lua Nzambi ludi lukukoka ku dikudimuna dia mutshima, anyi?" 
Romans2:5 Bualu bua tshitshu tshiebe ne mutshima webe wa buhidia, wewe udi udibutshila tshishi tô ne ku dituku dia tshishi ne dia dibuluibua dia kulumbulula kuakane kua Nzambi." 
Romans2:6 Udi uhesha muntu yonso difutu bu mudi midimu yandi. 
Romans2:7 Badi bakeba butumbi ne buneme ne malu adi kâl manyanguka, ku dinanukila diabo mu mudimu muimpe, neabafute muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Romans2:8 Kadi badi ne matandu, badi kabai batumikila malu a bushua, badi batumikila malu mabi, yeye neabafute tshishi ne difika dia munda." 
Romans2:9 Dikenga ne kanyinganyinga nebikale kudi muntu yonso udi wenzenza malu mabi, kudi Muena Yuda diambedi ne kudi Muena Gelika kabidi." 
Romans2:10 Kadi butumbi ne buneme ne ditalala nebikale kudi muntu yonso udi wenza malu mimpe, kudi Muena Yuda diambedi ne kudi Muena Gelika kabidi." 
Romans2:11 Bualu bua kakuena kansungunsungu. 
Romans2:12 Bualu bua bonso bakadi benza malu mabi kabai ne mikenshi nebafue bu badi kabai ne mikenshi; ne bonso bakadi ne mikenshi bakadi benza malu mabi nebalumbuluishibue ku mikenshi. 
Romans2:13 Badi bakane ku mesu kua Nzambi kembunvu ba mikenshi, kadi benji ba mikenshi nebabingishibue." 
Romans2:14 Bualu bua henza bisamba bia bende bidi kabi ne mikenshi bilele bidi mikenshi nuambe, bobo, kabai ne mikenshi, badi badielela mikenshi." 
Romans2:15 Badi balesha mudimu wa mikenshi mufunda mu mitshima yabo, muoyo-mukese wabo udi umanyishangana nʼai ne meshi abo adi abahisha, ababingisha." 
Romans2:16 Nunku nebalumbuluishibue ku dituku didi Nzambi ulumbulula malu masokome a bantu kudi Yesu Kilisto, bu mudi lumu luimpe luanyi luamba." 
Romans2:17 Kadi biwikala muidike ne, Muena Yuda, udi weyemena mikenshi, udi uditumbisha bua Nzambi," 
Romans2:18 udi mumanye disua diandi, udi wanyisha malu adi mahitangane buakane, udi muyishibue mikenshi," 
Romans2:19 wewe udi uditekemena ne, Ndi bianyi mulombodi wa bafofo, ndi munya wa badi mu midima," 
Romans2:20 ndi mulengeshi wa bahote, ndi muyishi wa bana batekete, bualu bua ndi ne tshileshilu tshia lungenyi ne tshia malu malelela mu mikenshi;" 
Romans2:21 nunku wewe udi uyisha mukuabo, kuena udiyisha, anyi? Wewe udi wamba ne, Kanuibi, udi wiba, anyi?" 
Romans2:22 Wewe udi ubambila ne, kanuendi masandi, udi wenda masandi, anyi? Wewe udi ukenuka mpingu, udi uhaula bia mu ntempelo, anyi?" 
Romans2:23 Wewe udi uditumbisha bua mikenshi, udi ufuisha Nzambi bundu bua bushihi buebe bua mikenshi, anyi?" 
Romans2:24 Bualu bua dina dia Nzambi didi dihendibua bualu buenu munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, bu muakafundabo." 
Romans2:25 Bua ditengula didi dikukuatshisha biwikala wenza mikenshi; kadi biwikala mushihi wa mikenshi, ditengula diebe diakulua bu kadi ditengula." 
Romans2:26 Bikala muntu kai mutengula ulama mei a mikenshi, kabena babala muntu eu udi kai ne ditengula bu mutengula, anyi?" 
Romans2:27 Udi kai mutengula bu mu tshilele, bienzeye mikenshi, kena ukuhisha wewe, udi mushihi wa mikenshi ne mei a mikenshi ne ditengula, anyi?" 
Romans2:28 Bua muntu kena Muena Yuda anu bua mubidi wandi; ditengula dia mubidi nkayau kadiena ditengula dilelela. 
Romans2:29 Kadi yeye udi Muena Yuda bua malu adi munda muandi; ne ditengula didi dia mu mutshima didi mu nyuma, kadiena mu mikenshi mifunda; udi ne butumbi buandi kabui bufuma kudi bantu, kadi budi bufuma kudi Nzambi." 
Romans3:1 Nunku ditamba kai didi Muena Yuda nʼadi, anyi dikuatshisha dia ditengula didi ku tshinyi?" 
Romans3:2 Adi a bungi mu malu onso. Bualu bua kumudilu, bakafila mei a Nzambi mu bianza biabo." 
Romans3:3 Kadi bikala bakuabo kabai bitabusha, dihanga diabo dia kuikala ne ditabusha nedivuishe dieyemenyibua dia Nzambi ne hatuhu, anyi?" 
Romans3:4 Nasha kakese! Nzambi ikale amena bulelela, kadi muntu yonso ikale nmona mashimi, bu muakafundabo ne, Bua wewe ubingishibue mu mei ebe, Ne bua wewe utambe mu dilumbulula diebe." 
Romans3:5 Bikala bubi buetu buladika buakane bua Nzambi, netuambe tshinyi? Nzambi udi uvuisha tshishi udi mubi, anyi? (Ndi ngakula bu mudi bantu bakula.)" 
Romans3:6 Nasha kakese! Bikaleye kai wenza nunku, Nzambi nealumbuluishe ba ha buloba munyi?" 
Romans3:7 Bikala bushua bua Nzambi bukumbasha butumbi buandi bualu bua mashimi anyi, munyi mutshidibo bampisha kabidi bu muntu mubi?" 
Romans3:8 Munyi katuambi ne, Tuenze malu mabi bua kuvuisha malu mimpe (bu mudibo batushiminyina ne bu mudi bakuabo bamuangalasha lumu ne, Badi bamba)? Dihila diabo nedikale dijalama." 
Romans3:9 Nunku tumanye bishi? Tudi tubatamba buimpe, anyi? Nasha kakese. Bualu bua tuakudianjila kubanda Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika kabidi ne, Buonso buenu nudi munshi mua bukokeshi bua bubi;" 
Romans3:10 bu muakafundabo ne, Kakuena muntu udi muakane, nasha umue." 
Romans3:11 Kakuena muntu udi ujingulula buakane bua Nzambi, Kakuena muntu udi ukeba Nzambi;" 
Romans3:12 Bonso bakahambuka, bakalua ba tshianana bonso; Kakuena muntu udi wenza malu mimpe, nasha tunue." 
Romans3:13 Muminu wabo udi bu lukita lubulula: Bakashimangana ne ndimi yabo; Lulengu lua nyoka ya ntoka ludi ku mishiku yabo; 
Romans3:14 Mukana muabo mudi mûle tente ne milau ne bululu; 
Romans3:15 Makasa abo adi aya lubilu bua kumatshisha mashi; 
Romans3:16 Dibutula ne kanyinganyinga bidi mu nshila yabo; 
Romans3:17 Kabena bamanye nshila wa ditalala. 
Romans3:18 Ditshina dia Nzambi kadiena ku mesu kuabo. 
Romans3:19 Tudi bamanye ne, Mei onso adi mikenshi yamba, idi yâmbila badi munshi mua mikenshi, bua kubuikila mukana muonso, ne bua ba ha buloba bonso babueshibue munshi mua dilumbuluisha dia Nzambi." 
Romans3:20 Bualu bua kakuena muntu wabingishibua ku mesu kuandi bua kuenza kua mikenshi. Bualu bua ku mikenshi kudi kufuma dijingulula dia bubi. 
Romans3:21 Kadi katataka buakane bua Nzambi buakumueneshibua butahuluke ku mikenshi, bu mudibo babuamba mu mikenshi ne kudi baprofete." 
Romans3:22 Buakane mene bua Nzambi bua ku ditabusha dia mu Yesu Kilisto kudi bonso badi bamuitabusha; bualu bua kakuena ditahuluka. 
Romans3:23 Bualu bua bonso bakenza malu mabi, ne badi bahanga kuheta butumbi kudi Nzambi." 
Romans3:24 Badi babingishibua anu hatuhu ku ngasa wandi bualu bua dihikula didi mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Romans3:25 Nzambi wakamuladika ku mesu kua bantu bua kuikaleye mulambu wa kubuikila nʼau malu mabi a bantu, ku ditabusha dia mu mashi andi, bualu bua kulesha buakane buandi mu dihita diandi dia malu mabi akenzabo diambedi, bua lutulu lua Nzambi." 
Romans3:26 Wakenza nunka bua kulesha buakane buandi mu tshikondo etshi, bua yeye kuikala muakane ne mubingishi wa muntu yonso udi witabusha Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Nunku kuditumbisha kudi hanyi? Kuakûmushibua. Ku mukenshi wa mushindu kai? Ngua bienzedi, anyi? Nasha, kadi anu ku mukenshi wa ditabusha." 
Romans3:28 Nunku tudi tuamba ne, Muntu udi ubingishibua ku ditabusha, kenku kuenza kua mikenshi." 
Romans3:29 Nzambi udi anu Nzambi wa Bena Yuda nkayabo, anyi? Yeye kena Nzambi wa bisamba bia bende kabidi, anyi? E, udi Nzambi wa bisamba bia bende kabidi;" 
Romans3:30 hikala Nzambi umue, ne yeye neabingishe mutengula ku ditabusha ne udi kai mutengula bua ditabusha." 
Romans3:31 Nunku tudi tivuisha mikenshi ne, Nya tshianana bua ditabusha, anyi? Nasha kakese! Tudi kujadika mikenshi." 
Romans4:1 Nunku netuimbe ne, Abalahama, nkambua wetu, wakasangana tshinyi bua mubidi wandi?" 
Romans4:2 bualu bua bikala Abalahama mubingishibue ku bienzedi, udi ne tshia kuditumbisha nʼatshi, kadi kenku mesu kua Nzambi." 
Romans4:3 Mukunda wa Nzambi udi wamba tshinyi? Ne, Abalahama wakitabusha Nzambi, ne ditabusha diandi diakabadibua bu buakane." 
Romans4:4 Bukenshi kabuena bubadibua kudi muntu udi wenza mudimu bu bua ngasa, kadi budi bubadibua bua dibanza." 
Romans4:5 Kudi muntu udi kai wenza mudimu wa mikenshi, kadi udi witabusha Nzambi udi ubingisha badi kabai benza malu andi, ditabusha diandi didi dibadibua bu buakane." 
Romans4:6 Bu mudi Davidi wamba disanka dia muntu kudi Nzambi ubala buakane budi kabui bua mudimu, ne," 
Romans4:7 Bobo badi basankishibua badi ne huhidia buabo bulekedibue, Mbadi ne malu mabi abo mabuikidibue." 
Romans4:8 Muntu udi usankishibua ngudi Mukelenge kai ubala bubi buandi. 
Romans4:9 Nunku disanka edi didi anu kudi batengula, anyi kudi badi kabai batengula kabidi? Bualu bua tudi tuamba ne, Bakabala ditabusha dia Abalahama kudiye bu buakane." 
Romans4:10 Bakamubadiladi munyi? Hakadiye mutengula, anyi hakadiye kai mutengula? Kabakamubadiladi hakadiye mutengula, kadi bakamubadiladi hakadiye kai mutengula." 
Romans4:11 Wakangata tshimanyinu tshia ditengula bu tshimanyishilu tshia buakane bua ku ditabusha diakadiye nʼadi hakadiye kai mutengula, bua yeye kuikala nkambua wa bonso badi bitabusha, nasha bobo kabai batengula kabidi, bua buakane bubadibue kudibo;" 
Romans4:12 ne nkambua wa batengula kudibo, kengua anu kudi badi batengula, kadi kudi badi balonda mu makasa a ditabusha diakadi nʼadi nkambua wetu Abalahama hakadiye kai mutengula." 
Romans4:13 Bualu bua mulayi wa kuhianeye buloba kawakadi kudi Abalahama anyi kudi tunkanunuina tuandi bualu bua mikenshi; kadi wakadika bua buakane bua ku ditabusha. 
Romans4:14 Bikala bena mikenshi bahianyi, ditabusha didi divuishibua hatuhu, ne mulayi kawena ne bualu." 
Romans4:15 Mikenshi idi yenzesha tshishi, kadi kudi kakui mikenshi, kakuena kushiha kua mikenshi." 
Romans4:16 Bua bualu ebu bahianyi budi bufuma ku ditabusha, bua kuikalabu bua ngasa. Buakadi nunku bua kujadikabo mulayi kudi tunkanunuina tuonso; kenkudi badi ne mikenshi nkayabo, kadi kudi badi ne ditabusha dia Abalahama kabidi, udi biandi nkambua wa buonso buetu," 
Romans4:17 (bu muakafundabo ne, Nakakuvuisha nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi). Mulayi wakajadikibua ku mpala kua wakuitabusheye, Nzambi mene, udi uha badi bafue muoyo, udi Ubikila bidi kabihu bu bidi bikalehu." 
Romans4:18 Bualu bua Abalahama, wakitabusha ne ditekemena, kai ne bualu bua kutekemena, bua kulueye nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi, bu mudi dî diakambabo ne, Ke muikale tunkanuniuna tuebe." 
Romans4:19 Yeye kakateketa mu ditabusha diandi bakamanyeye ne, Mubidi wanyi mumane kufua (yeye wakadi bu bidimu lukama), ne Sala muikale nkumba." 
Romans4:20 Bua yeye wakatangila ku mulayi wa Nzambi, kakalenduka mu huhidia, kadi wakakola mu ditabusha, mutumbishe Nzambi," 
Romans4:21 ne mûshibue tente ne dimanya ne, Nzambi udi mua kuenza bu muakandayeye kabidi." 
Romans4:22 Bua bualu ebu ditabusha diandi diakabadibua kudiye bu buakane. 
Romans4:23 Nunku dî edi kadiakafundibua bua bualu buandi nkayandi ne, Ditabusha diandi diakabadibua kudiye," 
Romans4:24 kadi diakafundibua bua bualu buetu kabidi kudibo bamba kubadila ditabusha, badi bitabusha wakabisha Yesu Mukelenge wetu ku bafue, wakafidibua ka lufu bua malu mabi etu, wakabishibua bua dibingishibua dietu." 
Romans5:1 Nunku bualu bua tuakabingishibua ku ditabusha, tuikale ne ditalala ne Nzambi bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
Romans5:2 Bua bualu buandi kabidi tudi ne tshibueledi tshietu bua ditabusha mu ngasa emu mutudi bashindame; tutumbile bietu bua ditekemena dia butumbi bua Nzambi. 
Romans5:3 Bualu bukuabo kabidi, tutumbile bietu mu ntatu, tumanye ne, Ntatu idi yenzesha ditantamana," 
Romans5:4 ne ditantamana didi dienzesha dijadikibua, ne dijadikibua didi dienzesha ditekemena." 
Romans5:5 Ne ditekemena kadiena difuisha bundu, bualu bua luse lua Nzambi luakitshikila mu mitshima yetu kudi Nyuma Muimpe wakafukeye." 
Romans5:6 Bualu bua hatutshivua batekete, mu tshikondo tshiakane Kilisto wakafuila bantu babi." 
Romans5:7 Budi bualu bukole bua muntu kufuila anu muntu mubingishibue, kadi bumue mukuabo neitabushe kufuila muntu muimpe wa bushua." 
Romans5:8 Kadi Nzambi wakatamba kulesha luse luandi kutudi mu muanda eu ne, Hatutshivua bantu babi, Kilisto wakatufuka." 
Romans5:9 Ke bualu budi butambe nunku ne, Hantshidi tubingishibua mpindiu ku mashi andi, netusungidibue ku tshishi tshia Nzambi kudiye." 
Romans5:10 Bualu bua, biwikala balengesha ne Nzambi ku lufu lua Muana wandi, hatuakadi bena lukuna nʼandi, nunku netutambe kusungidibua ku muoyo wandi hatuakamana kulengesha nʼandi." 
Romans5:11 Kemuanda eu nkayau, kadi tudi tutumbila kabidi mu Nzambi bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, kutudi bahete dilengesha kudiye mpindiu." 
Romans5:12 Nunku, bu muakulua bubi ha buloba bualu bua muntu umue, ne bu muakalua lufu bua bubi abu, nunku lufu luakafika kudi bantu bonso, bua bonso bakenza malu mabi." 
Romans5:13 Bualu bua bubi buakadi ha buloba tô ne hakalua mikenshi ya Mose, kadi bubi kabuena bubadibua kudi muntu hadiku kakui mikenshi." 
Romans5:14 Kadi lufu luakukokesha ku Adama tô ne ku Mose, ne ku bobo bine bakadi kabai benze malu mabi mafuane buhidia bua Adama: yeye ntshifuanyikishi tshia wakadi ha kulua." 
Romans5:15 Kadi bushihi bua mikenshi kabuena bu diha dia luse dia Nzambi. Bua bikala bantu bangi bakafua bua bushihi bua mikenshi bua muntu umue, ngasa wa Nzambi ne diha dia ku ngasa wa kudi muntu umue, Yesu Kilisto mene, biakatamba kukumbanyina bantu bangi." 
Romans5:16 Diha dia luse kadiena dilua bu mudi bubi buakenza muntu umue; bualu bua dilumbuluisha diakalua bua muntu umue ku dihila, kadi diha dituhesha hatuhu diakalua bua malu mabi a bungi ku dibingishibua." 
Romans5:17 Bualu bua bikala lufu luakakokesha bua muntu umue bualu bua bushihi bua mikenshi bua muntu umue, bantu badi bangata kuhumukila kua ngasa ne kua diha dia buakane nebatambe kukokesha mu muoyo kudi umue, Yesu Kilisto." 
Romans5:18 Ke mudi bualu bubi bumue baakavuisha dihila kudi bantu bonso, nunku kabidi bualu buakane bumue buakuvuisha dibingishibua dia muoyo kudi bantu bonse." 
Romans5:19 Ne bu muakavuishibua ba bungi bantu babi bua buhidia bua muntu umue, nunku ba bungi nebavuishibue bantu bakane bua kutumikila kua muntu umue." 
Romans5:20 Mikenshi yakabuela kabidi bua bushihi bua mikenshi buvulangane. Kadi hakavulangana bubi, ngasa wakatamba kusangana." 
Romans5:21 Bualu bua bu muakakokesha bubi bantu ku lufu, muomumue muamanya ngasa mua kukokesha bantu bua buakane ku muoyo wa tshiendelele kudi Yesu Kilisto Mukelenge wetu." 
Romans6:1 Ahu netuambe tshinyi? Netushale mu dienzenza dia bubi bua ngasa asangane, anyi?" 
Romans6:2 Nasha kakese! Tuetu bakafua ku bubi, munyi mutuikalemu kabidi?" 
Romans6:3 Kanuena bamanye ne, Tuetu bonso bakabatijibua mu Kilisto Yesu, tuakabatijibua mu lufu luandi?" 
Romans6:4 Ke tuakajikibua nʼandi ku dibatiza mu lufu, bualu bua bu mudi Kilisto mubishibue ku bafue bua butumbi bua Tatu, muomumue kabidi butudi nʼabu mbua kuenda mu muoyo muhia-muhia." 
Romans6:5 Bituikala babumbakasha nʼandi mu tshifuanyikishi tshia lufu luandi, netuikale babumbakasha nʼandi kabidi mu tshifuanyikishi tshia dibika diandi dia ku lufu." 
Romans6:6 Tudi bamanye bualu ebu ne, Muoyo wetu mukulukulu wakashihibua nʼandi ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bua mubidi wetu wa bubi kujimishibua; bua tuetu katuikadi mu buhika bua bubi kabidi." 
Romans6:7 Bua muntu udi mufue udi mubingishibue ku bubi. 
Romans6:8 Bituikala bamane kufua ne Kilisto, tudi tuitabusha ne, Netuikale nʼandi ne muoyo kabidi." 
Romans6:9 Tudi bamanye ne, Kilisto wakabishibua ku lufu kena ufua kabidi; lufu kaluena mua kumukokesha kabidi." 
Romans6:10 Bualu bua hakafueye, yeye wakafua ku bubi musangu umue tshiendelele; kadi muoyo udiye nʼau, udi nʼau kudi Nzambi." 
Romans6:11 Muomumue nuenu kabidi, nudibale ne, Tudi bafue ku bubi, kadi tudi ne muoyo kudi Nzambi mu Kilisto Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Nunku kanuitabushi bua bubi bukokeshe mu mibidi yenu ifuafua, bua nuenu nutumikile nkuka yai." 
Romans6:13 Kanufidi bituha bia mibidi yenu ku bubi, bu bielelu bia nvita bia malu mabi; hadi nudifile kudi Nzambi bu bantu bakubika ku lufu, nufile bituha bia mibidi yenu kabidi bu bielelu bia nvita bia buakane kudi Nzambi." 
Romans6:14 Bualu bua bubi kabuena bunukokesha; bua kanuena munshi mua mikenshi, nudi munshi mua ngasa." 
Romans6:15 Tuenze tshinyi? Tuenze malu mabi bualu bua katuena munshi mua mikenshi ne bua tudi munshi mua ngasa, anyi? Nasha kakese!" 
Romans6:16 Kanuena bamanye ne, Unudi midifila kudiye bu bahika bua kumutungila, nudi hahika ba unudi nutumikila; ne ba bubi tô ne ku lufu, ne ba ditumikila tô ne ku buakane?" 
Romans6:17 Tuasakidila kudi Nzambi, ne, Nuenu nuakadi bahika ba bubi, kadi nuakatumikila mu mitshima yenu mushindu wa diyisha diakanubueshabomu." 
Romans6:18 Hanuakahikudibua ku bubi, nuakavuishibua bahika ba buakane." 
Romans6:19 (Ndi ngakula ne tshiakuidi tshia bantu bualu bua butekete bua mibidi yenu.) Bu munuakafila bituha bia mibidi yenu bu bahika ba bukoya ne malu mabi ha mutu ha malu mabi, nunku katataka filai bituha bia mibidi yenu bu bahika ba buakane bua kudijidila." 
Romans6:20 Bualu bua hanuakadi bahika ba bubi, nuakadi ne budishikaminyi ku buakane." 
Romans6:21 Nunku mu tshikondo atshi nuakadi ne mamuma kai mu malu adi anufuisha bundu katataka? Bua kunshikidilu kua malu au ndufu. 
Romans6:22 Kadi katataka hanuakahikudibua ku bubi, ne hanuakavuishibua bahika ba Nzambi, nudi ne mamuma enu a ku dijidila dienu, kunshikidilu kua malu au mmuoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Romans6:23 Bualu bua difutu dia bubi ndufu, kadi diha dia luse dia Nzambi mmuoyo wa tshiendelele mu Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu." 
Romans7:1 Kanuena bamanye, bana betu (ndi ngambila bantu badi bamanye mikenshi) ne, Mikenshi idi ikokesha muntu matuku onso atshidiye ne muoyo?" 
Romans7:2 Mukashi udi ne bayandi, udi musuikibue kudi bayandi ne mikenshi hatshidiye ne muoyo; kadi biafua bayandi, mukashi udi musuluibue ku mukenshi wa bayandi." 
Romans7:3 Nunku, hatshidi bayandi ne muoyo, biabakibua mukashi kudi munga mulume, nebamuidike ne, Muena masandi; kadi biafua bayandi, mukashi udi umushibua ku mukenshi wa bayandi, ne kena amena masandi biabakibueye kudi mulume mukuabo." 
Romans7:4 Nunku, bana betu, nuenu kabidi nuakashihibua ku mikenshi bua mubidi wa Kilisto, bua nuenu kuikala kudi mukuabo, yeye mene wakabishibua ku lufu, bua tuetu tukuamine Nzambi mamuma." 
Romans7:5 Bualu bua hatuakadi mu malu a mubidi, nkuka ya malu mabi yakadiku bualu bua mikenshi, yakenzesha bituha bia mibidi yetu bua kukuambila mamuma a lufu." 
Romans7:6 Kadi katataka tuakamana kumushibua ku mikenshi hatuakafua ku muanda utuakadi basuikamu; nunku tudi tukuatshila Nzambi mudimu mu malu mahia-mahia a Nyuma, katuena tumukuatshilau mu malu makulukulu a maleta a mikenshi." 
Romans7:7 Netuambe tshinyi? Mikenshi idi bualu bubi, anyi? Nasha kakese! Kadi, tshiakadi kumanya bubi tshi mubumanye ku mikenshi; bualu bua tshiakadi kumanya disamba muoyo bu mikenshi kayi mimane kuamba ne, Kusaminyi bintu bia mukuenu muoyo;" 
Romans7:8 kadi bubi, bualu bua buakaheta tshikondo tshiakane, buakenzesha munda muanyi mishindu yonso ya disamina muoyo; bualu bua kudi kakui mikenshi, bubi budi butue." 
Romans7:9 Tshikondo tshikuabo nakuikala ne muoyo tshi ne mikenshi; kadi hakalua mukenshi, bubi buakatabuluka, ne meme nakafua." 
Romans7:10 Mukenshi, wakadi ku muoyo, eu nakasangana muikale ku lufu." 
Romans7:11 Bualu bua bubi buakaheta tshikondo tshiakane, buakanteya ku mukenshi, buakanshiha nʼau." 
Romans7:12 Nunku mikenshi idi ya tshijila, ne mukenshi au udi wa tshijila ne udi muakane ne udi muimpe." 
Romans7:13 Nunku muanda wakadi muimpe wakalua lufu kundi, anyi? Nasha kakese! Kadi bubi, bua buobuo bimueneshibue ne, Mbubi, mu kuenzesha kua lufu kundi ku muanda udi muimpe; bua bubi bulue bubi butamba bunene bua mukenshi." 
Romans7:14 Tudi bamanye ne, Mikenshi idi ya nyuma, kadi meme ndi ne mutshima wa kulonda malu mabi a mubidi, ndi muhanyibue ku bubi." 
Romans7:15 Bualu bua tshiena njingulula bualu bundi ngenza; tshitu ngenza bualu bundi musue kuenza, kadi ndi ngenza bualu bundi nkina." 
Romans7:16 Bingenza bualu ebu bundi tshi musue, ndi ngitabusha mikenshi ne, Idi mimpe." 
Romans7:17 Nunku kameme kabidi udi wenza bualu ebu, kadi mbubi budi buikala munda muanyi budi kubuenza." 
Romans7:18 Ndi mumanye ne, Munda muanyi, mu mubidi wanyi mene, kamuena muikale bualu buimpe; bualu bua disua dia kuenza bimpe didi kundi, kudi bakole bua mua kuenza nʼabu bimpe kabuenaku." 
Romans7:19 Bualu bua muanda muimpe undi musue kuenza, tshiena ngenza, kadi muanda mubi undi tshi musue kuenza, eu ngundi ngenza." 
Romans7:20 Kadi bingenza muanda undi tshi musue kuenza, kameme kabidi udi wenza, kadi bubi budi buikala munda muanyi budi bungenzesha." 
Romans7:21 Nunku ndi nsangana mukenshi eu kundi meme ne, Handi musue kuenza bimpe, bubi budi nʼanyi." 
Romans7:22 Ndi nsanka munda muanyi bua mikenshi ya Nzambi," 
Romans7:23 kadi ndi mona mukenshi mukuabo mu mubidi wanyi udi uluangana ne mukenshi wa mu meshi anyi, ne udi umbuesha mu buhika bua mukenshi wa bubi udi mu mubidi wanyi." 
Romans7:24 Ka meme muena majia! Wansulula ku mubidi wa lufu elu, nganyi?"
