Romans7:25 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi bua Yesu Kilisto Mukelenge wetu! Nunku meme hanyi ku meshi anyi ndi nkuatshila mikenshi ya Nzambi mudimu, kadi ku mubidi wanyi adi nkuatshila mukenshi wa bubi mudima." 
Romans8:1 Nunku kakuena dihila mpindiu kudi badi mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Romans8:2 Bualu bua mukenshi wa Nyuma wa muoyo wa mu Kilisto Yesu wakampikula ku mukenshi wa bubi ne wa lufu. 
Romans8:3 Bualu bua malu akadi mikenshi kayi ne kukole bua kuenza bua yakadi mitekete bua mibidi ya bantu, Nzambi, hakatumeye Muana wandi mene ne mubidi mufuane wa malu mabi, ne bua bualu bua bubi, wakahisha bubi mu mubidi;" 
Romans8:4 bua buakane budi mikenshi yamba bushikishibue munda muetu, badi kabai benda mu malu a mubidi, kadi badi benda mu malu a Nyuma." 
Romans8:5 Bualu bua badi balonda malu a mubidi badi bateka meshi abo ku malu a mubidi; badi balonda Nyuma badi bateka meshi abo ku malu a Nyuma. 
Romans8:6 Bualu bua meshi mateka ku malu a mubidi adi lufu, kadi meshi mateka kudi Nyuma adi muoyo ne ditalala." 
Romans8:7 Bua meshi mateka ku malu a mubidi adi ne Nzambi lukuna, kêna manze kudihuekesha munshi mua mikenshi ya Nzambi; bualu bukuabo kabidi, kêna ne bukole bua kuenza nunku." 
Romans8:8 Badi bikala mu malu a mubidi kabena bamanye mua kusankisha Nzambi. 
Romans8:9 Kadi nuenu kanuena nuikala mu malu a mubidi, nudi nuikala mu malu a Nyuma, bikala Nyuma wa Nzambi munda muenu. Ne bikala muntu kai ne Nyuma wa Kilisto, kena wa Kilisto nasha." 
Romans8:10 Bikala Kilisto munda muenu, mubidi udi mufue bualu bua bubi, kadi nyuma udi ne muoyo bualu bua buakane." 
Romans8:11 Bikala Nyuma wa yeye wakabisha Yesu ku bafue muikale munda muenu, yeye wakabisha Kilisto Yesu ku bafue neahe kabidi mibidi yenu ifuafua muoyo, bualu bua Nyuma wandi udi usomba munda muenu." 
Romans8:12 Nunku, bana betu, tudi bena dibanza, kendia mubidi bua kulonda malu a mubidi." 
Romans8:13 Bua binualonda malu a mubidi, nudi ne bualu bua kufua; kadi binuafuisha bienzedi bia mubidi kudi Nyuma, nenuikale ne muoyo." 
Romans8:14 Bonso badi balombodibua kudi Nyuma wa Nzambi, bobo badi bana ba Nzambi." 
Romans8:15 Bua kanuakuangata nyuma wa buhika tshiakabidi bua kutshina; kadi nuakuangata nyuma wa buhianyi bua bana utudi tubikila nʼandi Nzambi ne, Aba, Tatu." 
Romans8:16 Nyuma Muimpe muine udi mumanyishangane ne nyuma yetu ne, Tuetu tudi bana ba Nzambi." 
Romans8:17 Ne bituikala bana, tudi bahianyi kabidi; bahianyi ba Nzambi, ne bahianyi tshiahamue ne Kilisto: bituakenga nʼandi, mbua tuetu tutumbishibue nʼandi." 
Romans8:18 Bualu bua ndi mbala makenga a mu tshikondo etshi ne, Kêna makumbane bua kuelekeshibua ne butumbi budi buamba kumueneshibua kutudi." 
Romans8:19 Bualu bua ditekemena dikole dia bifukibua didi dindila dimueneshibua dia bana ba Nzambi. 
Romans8:20 Bualu bua bifukibua biakatekibua ku nyima kua malu a hatuhu, kembualu bua kudisunguila kuabi, kadi bua Nzambi, wakabiteka muiku mu ditekemena edi ne," 
Romans8:21 Bifukibua mene nebihikudibue kabidi ku buhika bua dibola diabi, nebibueshibue mu budishikaminyi bua butumbi bua bana ba Nzambi." 
Romans8:22 Bualu bua tudi bamanye ne. Bifukibua bionso bidi bitua mikemu hohamue ne bidi bidinyenga hohamue tô ne katataka. 
Romans8:23 Kambiobio nkayabi bidi bienza nunku, hadi tuetu kabidi badi ne mamuma a kumudilu a Nyuma Muimpe, tuetu bine tudi tufua mikemu munda muetu, hatudi tuindila buhianyi buetu bua bana, mbuhikudibu bua mibidi yetu mene." 
Romans8:24 Bua tuakasungidibua mu ditekemena; kadi ditekemena didibo bamona ku mesu kanditekemena; bualu bua muntu kai udi utekemena bidiye umona ku mesu? 
Romans8:25 Kadi bituatekemena bitudi katu! tumona ku mesu, tudi tuindila ne ditantamana." 
Romans8:26 Muomumue kabidi, Nyuma Muimpe kabidi udi ukuatshishangana nʼetu mu butekete buetu; bua katuena bamanye mua kulomba Nzambi bu mutudi nʼabu mbua kumulomba, kadi Nyuma muine udi utuakuila ne mikemu idi kayi mua kuambibua." 
Romans8:27 Nzambi, udi ukeba mu mitshima ya bantu, udi mumanye meshi a Nyuma ne, Udi Wakuila basanto bu mudi Nzambi musue." 
Romans8:28 Tudi bamanye kabidi ne, Malu onso adi akuatshishangana bua kumusha diakalengele kudi bantu badi bananga Nzambi, kudi badi babikidibue bu mudi disungula diandi." 
Romans8:29 Bua bantu bakadianjileye kumanya diambedi yeye wakadianjila kubasungila kabidi, bua kuikalabo bafuanyikishibue ku tshifuanyikishi tshia Muana wandi, bua yeye ikale muanʼa bute munkatshi mua bana babo ba bungi." 
Romans8:30 Bakadianjileye kusungula, yeye wakababikila kabidi; ne bakabikileye, yeye wakababingisha kabidi; ne bakabingisheye, yeye wakabatumbisha kabidi." 
Romans8:31 Netuambe tshinyi bua malu â? Bikala Nzambi nʼetu, nganyi udi mumanye mua kutuhumbisha?" 
Romans8:32 Yeye kakimina Muana wandi mene, kadi wakamufila bua buonso buetu, munyi muahidieye kutuha nʼandi kabidi bintu bionso hatuhu?" 
Romans8:33 Udi mua kubanda basungudibue kudi Nzambi nganyi? Udi ubabingisha nNzambi. 
Romans8:34 Udi ubahisha nganyi? NKilisto Yesu mene wakafua, E, bulelela, wakabishibua ku lufu, udi ku tshianza tshikole tshia Nzambi, udi utuakuila kabidi." 
Romans8:35 Udi mua kutuhandulula ku dinanga dia Kilisto nganyi? Ntatu idi mua kuenza nunka, anyi kanyinganyinga, anyi tshinyangu, anyi tshiole, anyi butaka, anyi njû, anyi muele wa nvita?" 
Romans8:36 Mbu muakafundabo ne, Bua bualu buebe tudi tushihibua dinda tô ne ku dilolo; Tudi tubadibua bu mikoko ya kushihibua." 
Romans8:37 Nasha; mu malu â onso tudi tutamba kuhita bualu bua bukole bua Yesu wakatunanga. 
Romans8:38 Bualu bua ndi ngitabushishibua ne, Kakuena lufu, kakuena muoyo, kakuena banjelo, kakuena bakokeshi, kakuena malu atshidiku, kakuena malu atshilualua, kakuena makelenge," 
Romans8:39 kakuena bule, kakuena ndondo, kakuena tshintu tshionso tshikuabo tshifukibua tshidi ne bukole bua kutuhandulula ku dinanga dia Nzambi didi mu Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu." 
Romans9:1 Ndi ngamba bualu bulelela mu Kilisto, tshiena nshima; muoyomukese wanyi udi umanyishangana nʼanyi mu Nyuma Muimpe ne," 
Romans9:2 Meme ndi ne kanyinganyinga kanene ne majia adi kaî ashika mu mutshima wanyi. 
Romans9:3 Nakadi kusua kuedibua mulau wa kumushibua hanyi kudi Kilisto, bualu bua bana betu, badi bakuetu ba mubidi." 
Romans9:4 Badi Bena Isalele mene, badi ne buhianyi bua bana, ne butumbi, ne mahungila, ne kuhebua kua mikenshi, ne mitendelelu, ne milayi." 
Romans9:5 Bankambua betu mbabo, kudibo nkudi Kilisto mufume mu buntu buandi, udi biandi ku mutu kua bonso, Nzambi mene, mutumbishibue tshiendelele. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Kadi bualu ebu kabuena bulesha ne, Dî dia Nzambi diakuhanga. Bualu bua bonso ba mu Isalele kabena Bena Isalele bulelela, ne buonso buabo kabena bana bandi:" 
Romans9:7 bualu bua badi tunkanunuina tua Abalahama; kadi mbu muakafundabo ne, Mu Isaka tunkanunuma tuebe, netubikidibue." 
Romans9:8 Nunku, kembana badi baledibua ku mubidi badi bana ba Nzambi, kadi bana ba mulayi badi babadibua bu tunkanunuma." 
Romans9:9 Bua edi ndî dia mulayi ne, Halua tshikondo etshi, nendue, ne Sala nealele muana mulume." 
Romans9:10 Kembualu ebu nkayabu, kadi Lebeka wakimita difu kudi nkambua wetu, Isaka;" 
Romans9:11 ne diambedi bana kabai banze kuledibua, kabai banze kuenza bualu buimpe anyi bualu bubi, bualu bua disua dia Nzambi dikale dijalama bu mudi disungula diandi, kambua kuenza kua mikenshi, kadi bua yeye udi ubabikila," 
Romans9:12 Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Mukulu neakuatshile muakunyi mudimu." 
Romans9:13 Mbu muakafundabo ne, Nakananga Yakoba, kadi nakakina Esau." 
Romans9:14 Nunku netuambe tshinyi? Malu mabi adi kudi Nzambi, anyi? Nasha kakese!" 
Romans9:15 Nzambi wakambila Mose ne, Nenfuile bantu luse bandi musue kufuila luse, nendeshe bantu dinanga bandi musue kulesha dinanga." 
Romans9:16 Nunku luse ebi kambua disua dia muntu, anyi bua bienzedi bia muntu, kadi anu bua Nzambi udi ufua luse." 
Romans9:17 Mukanda wa Nzambi udi Wambila Palô ne, Bua bualu ebu nakakubishila, bua kulesha bukole buanyi munda muebe, ne bua dina dianyi ditedibue ha buloba buonso." 
Romans9:18 Nunku udi ufuila badiye musue luse, udi ukolesha mitshima ya badiye musue." 
Romans9:19 Nunku neungambile ne, Nzambi utshidi utandishila bantu bualu kai? Bualu bua wakuanza kufunyina Nzambi ku disua diandi nganyi?" 
Romans9:20 Nasha, kadi wewe, muntu udi nganyi udi wela Nzambi mpata? Tshintu tshifukibua netshikenke mufuki watshi ne, Wakunfuka nunku bualu kai, anyi?" 
Romans9:21 Mufumbi kena ne bukokeshi bua dima bua kufumba ne dibulu diodiumue tshifuadi tshimue tshia mudimu wa butumbi ne tshinga tshia mudimu wa hatuhu, anyi?" 
Romans9:22 Bikala Nzambi, hakasueye kulesha bantu tshishi tshiandi, ne kubamanyisha bukole buandi, wakatukisha ne lutulu lunene bifuadi bitekela tshishi tshiandi bilongolodibua bua dibutuka," 
Romans9:23 ne bua kumanyisha bantu bua bubanshi bua butumbi buandi ku bifuadi bilesha luse biakadianjileye kulongolola ku butumbi," 
Romans9:24 tuetu mene, bakabikileye kabidi, kamba munkatshi mua Bayuda nkayabo, kadi ba munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende kabidi; ebu mbualu bukole, anyi?" 
Romans9:25 Bu mudiye muambe kabidi mu Hoshea ne, Nembikile bakadi kabai bantu banyi ne, Mbantu banyi; Nembikile wakadi kai munangibue ne, Munanga." 
Romans9:26 Bualu ebu nebuikaleku kabidi ne, Mu muaba muakadibo bamba ne, Kanuena bantu banyi, muamua nebabikidibue ne, Bana ba Nzambi wa muoyo." 
Romans9:27 Yeshaya wakela dî dikole ne, Bikala bungi bua Bena Isalele bu nsenga ya kukala kua mai manene, difuka didi dishala nedisungidibue." 
Romans9:28 Bualu bua Mukelenge nenze dî diandi ha buloba; neadishikishe, neadikose." 
Romans9:29 Mbu muakamba Yeshaya diambedi ne, Bu Mukelenge wa Misumba Yonso kai mutushile diminu dia bantu, Tuakadi kulua bu Sodoma, tuakadi kufuishibua bu Amola." 
Romans9:30 Ahu, netuambe tshinyi? Netuambe ne, Bantu ba bisamba bia bende, bakadi kabai balonda buakane, bakaheta buakane, buakane mene budi bua ku ditabusha." 
Romans9:31 Kadi Isalele, wakadi ulonda mukenshi wa buakane, kakafika ku mukenshi eu." 
Romans9:32 Bualu kai? Bualu bua bakabakeba kenku ditabusha, hadi bu mudibo babukeba ku kuenza kua mikenshi. Bakalenduka ku dibue dia tshilenduishi," 
Romans9:33 bu muakafundabo ne, Tangila, ndi nteka mu Siona dibue dia tshilenduishi, ne dibue dia buteyi; Ne weyemena kudidi kena ufuishibua bundu." 
Romans10:1 Bana betu, disua dia mu mutshima wanyi ne dilomba dianyi kudi Nzambi bua bualu buabo bidi bua bobo bahete luhandu." 
Romans10:2 Bua ndi mumanyi wa bualu buabo ne, Badi ne lukunukunu kudi Nzambi, kadi kandua lungenyi lulelela." 
Romans10:3 Bualu bua hakahangabo kumanya buakane bua Nzambi, ne hakadibo bakeba kujadika buakane buabo mene, kabakadikokesha ku buakane bua Nzambi." 
Romans10:4 Bualu bua Kilisto udi kundekelu kua mikenshi tô ne ku buakane kudi yonso udi witabusha. 
Romans10:5 Mose wakafunda ne, Muntu udi wenza buakane bua ku mikenshi neikale ne muoyo bualu buabu." 
Romans10:6 Kadi buakane bua ku ditabusha budi buamba nunku ne, Kudiambi munda muebe ne, Wabanda mu diulu nganyi? (bualu ebu budi bu kuhuekesha Kilisto ha buloba);" 
Romans10:7 anyi, Wahueka mu muaba wa bafue nganyi? (bualu ebu budi bu kubisha Kilisto ku bafue)." 
Romans10:8 Kadi buakane bua ka ditabusha budi buamba tshinyi? Dî edi didi ba buihi nʼebe, didi mukana muebe mene ne mu mutshima webe; edi ndî dia ditabusha ditudi tuambila bantu." 
Romans10:9 Biwajukula ne mukana muebe ne, Yesu udi Mukelenge, ne biwitabusha mu mutshima webe ne, Nzambi wakamubisha ku bafue, neusungidibue." 
Romans10:10 Bualu bua bantu badi bitabusha ne mutshima bua kuheta buakane, badi bajukula ne mukana bua kuheta luhandu." 
Romans10:11 Mukanda wa Nzambi udi wamba ne, Wamuitabusha kena ufuishibua bundu." 
Romans10:12 Bualu bua kakuena ditahuluka hankatshi ha Muena Yuda ne Muena Gelika, bualu bua umue udi Mukelenge wa bonso, udi ne bubanshi bua luse kudi bonso badi bamutendekena." 
Romans10:13 Bualu bua muntu yonso watendekena dina dia Mukelenge neasungidibue. 
Romans10:14 Munyi muamutendekenabo kabai banze kumuitabusha? Munyi muamuitabushabo kabai banze kunvua lumu hiandi? Munyi munvuabo lumu luandi kabai ne muambidi. 
Romans10:15 Munyi muabambilabo kabai batumibua? Mbu muakafundabo ne, Makasa malengele nga bantu badi balua ne Lumu luimpe lua malu mimpe." 
Romans10:16 Kadi bonso kabakatelesha ku lumu luimpe. Bua Yeshaya udi wamba ne, Mukelenge, wakuitabusha muwakuamba nganyi?" 
Romans10:17 Nunku ditabusha didi difuma ku diunvua, ne diunvua didi bua dî dia Kilisto." 
Romans10:18 Kadi ndi ngamba ne, Kabakunvua, anyi? E, bulelela, bakunvua, ne, Dî diabo diakamuangalaka ha buloba buonso, Ne mei abo akambibua kunfudilu kua buloba." 
Romans10:19 Kadi ndi nkonka ne, Bena Isalele kabakamanya, anyi? Diambedi Mose udi wamba ne, Meme neufuishe mukau kudi badi kabai bu tshisamba; Nenukuatshishe tshishi kudi tshisamba tshia bantu bahote." 
Romans10:20 Ne Yeshaya udi ne dikima dikole, udi wamba ne, Nakasanganyibua kudi bakadi kabai bankeba; Nakamueneka kudi badi kabai bangebesha." 
Romans10:21 Kadi bua Bena Isalele udi wamba ne, Dituku dijima nakolola bianza bianyi kudi bantu badi ne buhidia ne butontolodi." 
Romans11:1 Nunku ndi ngamba ne, Nzambi wakumusha bantu bandi, anyi? Nasha kakese! Bualu bua meme kabidi, ndi Muena Isalele, kankanunuina ka Abalahama ka mu tshisamba tshia Benyamina." 
Romans11:2 Nzambi kakumusha bantu bandi bakadianjileye kumanya. Anyi kanuena bamanye dî didi Mukanda wa Nzambi wamba bualu bua Eliya, anyi? Mbu mudiye usengelela Nzambi bua kukengesheye Isalele ne," 
Romans11:3 Mukelenge, bakashiha baprofete bebe, bakabutula bioshelu biebe, ne meme ndi mushale nkayanyi, ne badi bakeba muoyo wanyi." 
Romans11:4 Kadi diandamuna dia Nzambi didi dimuambila tshinyi? Udi Wamba ne, Bua bualu buanyi nakadishila balume binunu muanda mutekete badi kabai batue binu hanshi kudi Bâla." 
Romans11:5 Nunku muomumue mu tshikondo etshi difuka dikese didiku bua disungula dia ngasa. 
Romans11:6 Kadi bikaladi bualu bua ngasa, kendia kuenza kua mikenshi kabidi; bua bikaladi nunku, ngasa kena kabidi ngasa." 
Romans11:7 Nunku ntshinyi? Bualu budi Isalele ukeba, mbudiye kai uheta; kadi basungudibue kudi Nzambi bakabuheta, ne bakuabo bakakoleshibua mu mitshima." 
Romans11:8 Mbu muakafundabo ne, Nzambi wakabaha nyuma wa kubabungisha tulu, mesu bua kâmonyi, ne matshu bua kâunvu, tô ne ku dituku edi mene." 
Romans11:9 Ne Davidi udi wamba ne, Mesa a bia kudia alue bukuondo ne buteyi Ne tshilenduishi, ne difutu dihingana kudibo;" 
Romans11:10 Mesu abo ikale mîdima bua kabamonyi, Ukobemeshe nyima yabo matuku onso." 
Romans11:11 Nunku ndi ngamba ne, Bakadilenduisha bua kuhonabo, anyi? Nasha kakese! Kadi bua kuhona kuabo luhandu luakulua kudi bisamba bia bende bua kufuisha Bena Isalele mukau." 
Romans11:12 Ahu bikala kuhona kuabo kuakulua bubanshi bua ba ha buloba, ne bikala dihanga diabo diakulua bubanshi bua bisamba bia bende, divulangana dia dihingana diabo neditambe kuvuisha disanka misangu bungi munyi?" 
Romans11:13 Ndi nuambila dî, nuenu ba bisamba bia bende. Bualu bua meme ndi mupostolo kudi bisamba bia bende, ndi ntumbisha mudimu wanyi;" 
Romans11:14 ne binamanya mua kufuisha ba tshisamba tshianyi mukau ku muanda wonso, ne kusungila bakuabo ba munkatshi muabo." 
Romans11:15 Bua bikata kumushibua kuabo kuakulua dilengesha dia ba ha buloba ne Nzambi, ditabushibua diabo nedilue tshinyi tshikuabo, anu muoyo wa ku bafue mene?" 
Romans11:16 Bikala bintu bia kunowa bia kumudilu bia tshijila, bionso nebikale bia tshijila; bikala muji wa tshijila, matamba adi muomumue kabidi." 
Romans11:17 Bikala matamba makuabo akuahudibua, ne wewe, mutshi wa oleve wa tshisuku wakalamakashibua munkatshi muau, ne wakalua muangatshi nʼau wa bukole bua muji wa mafuta wa mutshi muimpe wa oleve;" 
Romans11:18 kuditumbishi ku matamba â. Kadi biwaditumbisha, uvuluke ne, Kenguewe udi ukolesha muji, kadi mmuji udi ukukolesha wewe." 
Romans11:19 Nunku newambe ne, Bakuahula matamba bua meme kulamakashibuamu." 
Romans11:20 Bimpe; bakuâhula bua huhidia buau, kadi wewe udi ujalamamu bua ditabusha diebe. Kuedi meshi a kudilesha, kadi utshine biebe." 
Romans11:21 Bua bikala Nzambi kai mubange kuahula matamba malelela, kena ubenga kuahula wewe kabidi." 
Romans11:22 Ka, mona buimpe ne mutshima mukole bia Nzambi,—mutshima mukole kudi bakahona, ne buimpe bua Nzambi kudi wewe, biwananukila mu buimpe buandi; kadi biwahanga kunanukila, wewe neukoshibue kabidi." 
Romans11:23 Ne bobo kabidi, bikalabo kabai bananukila mu buhidia buabo, nebalamakashibue ka mutshi kabidi; bualu bua Nzambi udi ne bukole bua kubalamakashaku kabidi." 
Romans11:24 Bua bikala wewe mukoshibue ku mutshi wa oleve udi udiunda mu tshisuku bu mudi tshilele tshiau, ne biwikala mulamakashibue ku mutshi muimpe wa oleve bu mudi kamui tshilele; bualu budi butamba bua wowo, adi matamba malelela, alamakashibue ku mutshi wau mene." 
Romans11:25 Bana betu, tshiena musue nuhange kumanya bualu ebu busokoka, bua nuenu kanuditekemenyi bu munudi bena meshi, ne, Bukole bua mutshima buakakuata Bena Isalele tshituha tshihi, tô ne hafika dikumbana dia bisamba bia bende mu lumu luimpe." 
Romans11:26 Nunku Bena Isalele bonso nebasungidibue, bu muakafundabo ne, Musungidi neahatuke mu Siona; Neatshinguluile Yakoba malu adi kâi a Nzambi;" 
Romans11:27 Ne etshi ntshihungidi tshianyi tshindi mpunga nʼabo, Hanumusha malu mabi abo." 
Romans11:28 Mu bualu bua lumu luimpe, Bena Isalele badi bena lukuna ba Nzambi bua bualu buenu; kadi mu bualu bua disungula dia Nzambi badi banangibua kudiye bua bualu bua bankambua babo." 
Romans11:29 Bua Nzambi kena ukudimuna mutshima bua maha andi ne dibikila diandi kudi Isalele. 
Romans11:30 Bu munuakadi ne buhidia kudi Nzambi mu bikondo biakashala ku nyima, kadi mpindiu nnakuheta luse ku buhidia buabo;" 
Romans11:31 muomumue bobo kabidi badi ne buhidia katataka kudi Nzambi, bua kuhetabo luse katataka ku luse luakanulesheye." 
Romans11:32 Bua Nzambi wakinshidila bantu bonso mu buhidia, bua kulesha bantu bonso luse." 
Romans11:33 Monai ndondo wa bubanshi bua meshi ne lungenyi bua Nzambi! Monai mutudi katui mua kujingulula bilumbuluidi biandi, mutudi katui mua kulonda nshila yandi!" 
Romans11:34 Bua wakamanya meshi a Mukelenge nganyi? Anyi wakamuha meshi nganyi? 
Romans11:35 Anyi muntu kai wakadianjila kuha Mukelenge tshintu, ne nebamuhingashiletshi kabidi?" 
Romans11:36 Bualu bua bintu bionso biakafuma kudiye, bidiku bua bualu buandi, bidi bikala anu kudiye. Butumbi buikale kudiye tshiendelele! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Nunku, bana betu, ndi nusengelela, bua luse lua Nzambi, bua nufile mibidi yenu bu mulambu udi ne muoyo, wa tshijila, udi usankisha Nzambi bimpe; bualu ebu budi kutendelela kuenu kudi ne meshi." 
Romans12:2 Kanudifuanyikishi ku malu a mu tshikondo etshi, kadi miandamuke ku dikudimuna dia meshi enu to meshi mahia-mahia bua nuenu nujingulule mudi disua dia Nzambi didi dimpe, didi dimusankisha, ne didi diakane tshishiki." 
Romans12:3 Bua ndi ngambila muntu yonso udi munkatshi muenu, ku ngasa wakumpabo ne, Katambi kudielangana meshi mahite adiye ne bua kuela, kadi bua kuela meshi ne meshi adi malulame, bu mudi Nzambi muidikishile muntu yonso tshidikishilu tshia ditabusha." 
Romans12:4 Bua, bu mutudi ne bituha bia bungi mu mubidi umue, ne bituha bionso kabiena ne mudimu muomumue," 
Romans12:5 nunku, tuetu, bantu ba bungi, tudi mubidi umue musangila mu Kilisto, ne kudi muntu ne muntu, tudi tuikalangana bu bituha bia bakuabo." 
Romans12:6 Bualu bua tudi ne bihedi bitahuluka bu mudi ngasa wakatuhabo, bitu ikala ne mudimu wa buambi, tuambe bietu bu mudi tshidikishilu tshia ditabusha dietu;" 
Romans12:7 anyi, bituikala ne mudimu wa mukuatshishi, tuenze mudimu wetu bimpe; ne udi uyisha alamate kudi buyishi buandi." 
Romans12:8 Musengeledi alamate kudi disengelela diandi, muntu udi ufila bintu, abifile ne mutshima mulelela; udi ukokesha, akokeshe ne disuminyina; udi ulesha luse, aluleshe ne disanka." 
Romans12:9 Luse luikale kalui ne lubombo. Nukine malu adi mabi; nulamate malu adi mimpe. 
Romans12:10 Mu dinanga dia bana benu ba mu Kilisto nunangangane, muntu ne muntu; mu buneme muntu ne muntu ateke mukuabo ku mpala." 
Romans12:11 Mu disuminyina kanuikadi bashanguluki; nuikale ne lukunukunu mu mitshima yenu; nukuatshile Nzambi mudimu. 
Romans12:12 Nusanke mu ditekemena dienu, nuikale ne ditantamana mu makenga; nunanukile mu kutendelela." 
Romans12:13 Nukuatshishe basanto ne bintu bidibo bakengela; nusankidile benyi misangu yonso. 
Romans12:14 Nusankishe badi banukengesha; nubasankishe, kanubedi mulau." 
Romans12:15 Nusanke ne badi basanka; nudile ne badi badila. 
Romans12:16 Nuikalangane ne meshi amue, muntu ne muntu; kanuteki meshi enu ku malu mahite, kadi nudihuekeshe ku malu adi mahuekela. Kanuditekemenyi bu munudi bena meshi." 
Romans12:17 Kualukishidi muntu bubi ku bubi buandi. Nudianjile kuela meshi bua kuikala ne malu mimpe ku mesu bua bantu bonso. 
Romans12:18 Binuamanya mua kuenza nunku mu bienzedi bienu, nuikale ne bantu bonso ditalala." 
Romans12:19 Kanudisombuedi, bana betu banangibue, kadi nushile tshishi tshia Nzambi muaba; bualu bua bakafunda ne, Busombuedi mbuanyi, meme nenfute; mudi muamba Mukelenge." 
Romans12:20 Kadi bikala muena lukuna webe ne nsala, umuhe bia kudia; bikaleye ne nyota, umuhe bia kunua; bualu bua biwenza nunku, neutentekeshe makala a kahia ha mutu handi." 
Romans12:21 Lekela kuhitshibua kudi malu mabi; kadi wikale uhite malu mabi ku malu mimpe. 
Romans13:1 Muntu yonso aditeke ku nyima kua bakokeshi badi ku mutu kuandi. Bua kakuena bukokeshi budi kabui bulua kudi Nzambi; ne makokeshi adiku akajadikibua kudi Nzambi. 
Romans13:2 Nunku muntu udi uhidia kudikokela kudi bukokeshi udi uhidia mei majadikibue kudi Nzambi. Badi bahidia nunku nebadiangatshile dilumbuluisha. 
Romans13:3 Bualu bua bakokeshi kabena bavuisha buowa kudi benji ba malu mimpe, kadi anu kudi benji ba malu mabi. Wewe udi musue kuikala kui ne buowa kudi bukokeshi, anyi? Wenze malu mimpe ne wewe newikale ne butumbi kudibu." 
Romans13:4 Bualu bua makokeshi yonso udi muena mudimu wa Nzambi kûdi bua kukuvuishila buimpe. Kadi biwenza bibi, utshine; bua yeye kena utuala muele wa nvita hatuhu. Udi biandi muena mudimu wa Nzambi, udi musombuedi wandi bua kuvuisha tshishi kudi udi wenza bibi." 
Romans13:5 Nunku bunudi nʼabu mbua kuditeka ku nyima kuabo, kenganu bualu bua tshishi atshi, kadi bua muoyo-mukese wenu kabidi." 
Romans13:6 Bua bualu ebu nudi nulambula kabidi; bua bobo badi bakuatshi ba mudimu ba Nzambi balamata ku muanda eu mene. 
Romans13:7 Nualukishile bantu bonso mabanza abo: mulambu kudi muenu mulambu, mpunga kudi unudi mua kuhunga, buowa kudi unudi mua kutekela buowa, buneme kudi unudi mua kunemeka." 
Romans13:8 Kanuikadi ne muntu dinga dibanza anu dia kunangangana; bua wananga mukuabo wakushikisha mikenshi. 
Romans13:9 Bualu bua mikenshi ei ne, Kuendi masandi, kushihi muntu, kuibi, kukumi mutshima kudi bintu bia makuabo, ne bikalaku mukenshi wonso mukuabo, wowo udi musungulula mu dî edi ne, Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue." 
Romans13:10 Luse kaluena luenzela mukuabo bubi; nunku luse ludi tshiuwidi tshia mikenshi. 
Romans13:11 Nuenze malu â, bualu bua nudi bamanye tshikondo etshi ne, Diba diakumana kufika bua nuenu kubishibua ku tulu; bua katataka luhandu luetu ludi lutamba dituku dia dianjila kuitabusha kuikala ha buihi." 
Romans13:12 Butuku budi buamba kutshia, munya wakusemena ha buihi, nunku tuvule bienzedi bia midima, tuluate bintu bia nvita bia munya." 
Romans13:13 Tuendakana! bietu bilengele, bu mutudi tuenda mu munya; katuendi mu manaya a tshianana ne mu bukuatshiki bua malulu, mu malu a bundu ne a bienzenza bia masandi, mu kutandangana ne mukau." 
Romans13:14 Kadi nudiluatshishe ne Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto; kanulongoluedi mibidi malu bua kumana nkuka yai. 
Romans14:1 Nuitabushe muntu udi mutekete mu ditabusha diandi bu muanʼenu, kadi kembua kuelangana nʼandi mpata." 
Romans14:2 Munga muntu udi ne ditabusha dia mua kudia bintu bionso, kadi mukuabo udi mutekete ma ditabusha udi udia midioko." 
Romans14:3 Muntu udi udia bintu bionso kahetudi udi kai ubidia; ne udi kai ubidia balumbuluishi udi ubidia; bualu bua Nzambi mene wakamuitabusha. 
Romans14:4 Wewe udi nganyi udi ulumbuluisha umena mudimu wa mu nsubu wa mukuabo? Yeye udi wimana anyi udi uhona bua mukelenge wandi mene. Yeye neimane, bualu bua Mukelenge udi ne bukole bua kumuimanyika." 
Romans14:5 Mukuabo udi utumbisha dituku ha mutu ha dikuabo; kadi mukuabo udi utumbisha matuku onso muomumue. Muntu ne muntu ikale ne dijingulula dijalame bua buala budi buhita buimpe. 
Romans14:6 Udi uteka meshi andi ku dituku udi wateka nunku bua Mukelenge; ne udiadia, udiadia bua Mukelenge, bualu bua udi usakidila Nzambi. Ne udi kai udia, kena udia bua Mukelenge, ne udi Nzambi." 
Romans14:7 Bua kakuena muntu munkatshi muetu udi ne muoyo ha nkayandi, ne kakuena muntu udi udifuila ha nkayandi." 
Romans14:8 Bua bituikala ne muoyo, tudi ne muoyo bua Mukelenge; bituafua, tufuafua bua Mukelenge; nunku, bituikala ne muoyo, anyi bituafua, tudi ba Mukelenge." 
Romans14:9 Bua bualu ebu Kilisto wakafua, ne wakadi ne muoyo kabidi, bua yeye ikale Mukelenge wa bafue ne wa badi ne muoyo kabidi." 
Romans14:10 Abu wewe, udi ulumbuluisha muanʼenu bua tshinyi? Anyi wewe kabidi, udi uhetula muanʼenu bua tshinyi? Bua buonso buetu netuimane ku mpala kua tshilumbuluidi tshia Nzambi." 
Romans14:11 Bua badi bafunda ne, Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Bu mundi ne muoyo, muntu yonso neantuile binu hanshi, Ne ludimi luonso nelutumbishe Nzambi." 
Romans14:12 Nunku, buonso buetu, muntu ne muntu, neabadile malu andi kudi Nzambi." 
Romans14:13 Katulumbuluishanganyi kabidi; kadi mbimpe dilumbulula dienu dikale bua muntu kateki buteyi anyi tshilenduishi mu nshila wa muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto. 
Romans14:14 Ndi mumanye ne ndi neitabushishibue mu Mukelenge Yesu ne, Kakuena tshintu tshidi tshibi nkayatshi; anu kudi muntu udi utshibala bu tshintu tshibi, tshidi tshibi kudiye." 
Romans14:15 Bikala muanʼenu wa mu Kilisto unyingalala mutshima bua bia kudia, wewe kuena wenda kabidi mu nshila wa dinanga. Kushihi muoyo wa muntu wakafuilabo kudi Kilisto ku bia kudia biebe." 
Romans14:16 Nunku bantu kabahendi bualu buebe buimpe. 
Romans14:17 Bua bukelenge bua Nzambi kabuena bualu bua kudia ne bua kunua, kadi mbua buakane ne ditalala ne disanka bia mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
Romans14:18 Bualu bua wakuatshila Kilisto mudimu mu malu â udi usankisha Nzambi ne udi utumbishibua kudi bantu. 
Romans14:19 Nunku tulonde bietu malu adi avuisha ditalala ne malu atudi mua kudiundishangana nʼau. 
Romans14:20 Kushihi mudimu wa Nzambi bualu bua bia kudia. Bionso bidi bimpe bulelela, kadi bidi bibi kudi muntu udi ulenduisha mukuabo habidieye." 
Romans14:21 Bidi bimpe bua muntu kadî munyinyi anyi kanu maluvu anyi kenji bualu luonso budi muanʼenu wa mu Kilisto ulenduka nʼabu. 
Romans14:22 Ahu wewe, ditabusha diudi nʼadi, udilaminedi nkayebe ku mesu kua Nzambi. Udi usanka ngudi kai udilumbuluisha mu malu adiye uteta ne, Adi mimpe." 
Romans14:23 Kadi udi wela mpata udi uhila hadieye, bualu bua kena udia ne ditabusha; bualu buonso budi kabui bufuma ku ditabusha budi bubi." 
Romans15:1 Butudi nʼabu, tuetu bantu bakole, mbua kutuala matekete a badi batekete, kembua kudisankisha nkayetu." 
Romans15:2 Muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muetu asankishe muena mutumba nʼandi bua kuvuisha malu mimpe kudiye adi mua kumudiundisha. 
Romans15:3 Bua Kilisto kabidi kakadisankisha, kadi bu muakafundabo ne, Bihendu bia bakadi bakuhenda, biakahona hamʼbidi hanyi." 
Romans15:4 Bua malu onso akafundabo diambedi akafundibua bua kutuyisha, bua tuetu tuikale ne ditekemena bua ditantamana dietu ne bua busambi bua mu Mukanda wa Nzambi." 
Romans15:5 Nzambi wa ditantamana ne wa busambi anuhe bualu ebu mene,—bua kuikalangana ne meshi amue bu mudi Kilisto Yesu," 
Romans15:6 bua nuenu nutumbishe Nzambi Tatu ne Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ne mutshima umue ne dî dimue. 
Romans15:7 Nunku nuitabushangane bu muakanuitabusha Kilisto bua kuyuisha butumbi kudi Nzambi. 
Romans15:8 Bualu bua ndi ngamba ne, Kilisto wakavuishibua muena mudimu wa batengula bua bushua bua Nzambi, bua yeye ajadike milayi yakalaya Nzambi bankambua betu," 
Romans15:9 ne bua ba bisamba bia bende batumbishe Nzambi bua luse luandi, bu muakafundabo ne, Bua bualu ebu nenkuhe butumbi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, Nengimbile dina diebe misambu." 
Romans15:10 Udi Wamba kabidi ne, Nuenu, bisamba bia bende, nusanke ne bantu bandi." 
Romans15:11 Udi wamba kabidi ne, Nuenu, bisamba bionso bia bende, nutumbishe Mukelenge, Bantu bonso bamutumbishe." 
Romans15:12 Yeshaya udi wamba kabidi ne, Muji wa Yishai newikaleku, Ne udi ubika bua kukokesha bisamba bia bende neikaleku, Bisamba bia bende nebimutekemene." 
Romans15:13 Nzambi wa ditekemena anûshe tente ne disanka ne ditalala dia mu ditabusha dienu, bua nuenu nukumbane mu ditekemena mu bukole bua Nyuma Muimpe." 
Romans15:14 Ne meme bianyi kabidi, bana betu, ndi ngitabushishibua ne, Nuenu mene nudi bûle tente ne buimpe, bûshibua tente ne lungenyi luonso, nudi bamanye mua kudimushangana." 
Romans15:15 Kadi mu manga malu ndi nufundila mei anyi ne dikima dihita, bua kunvuluisha tshiakabidi, bualu bua ngasa wakampabo kudi Nzambi," 
Romans15:16 bua meme kuikala mukuatshishi wa mudimu wa Kilisto Yesu mutumibue kudi bisamba bia bende, ngenza mudimu wa muakuidi wa mu lumu luimpe lua Nzambi, bua kufila kuanyi kua bisamba bia bende kuvuishibue mulambu udi Nzambi musue, mujidibue kudi Nyuma Muimpe." 
Romans15:17 Nunku udi ne kundi ntumbila mu Kilisto Yesu mu malu adi a Nzambi. 
Romans15:18 Bua tshiena ne dikamakama dia kuamba bua malu makuabo, anu bua malu akenza nʼanyi Kilisto bua ditumikila dia bisamba bia bende, ku dî ne ku bienzedi," 
Romans15:19 mu bukole bua bimanyinu ne bua malu a kukema ne mu bukole bua Nyuma Muimpe. Nunku nakuvudisha kuamba kuanyi kua lumu luimpe lua Kilisto ku Yelushalema ne ku nseke idi miunyunguluke tô ne ku Iluliko. 
Romans15:20 Nunku ma buala ebu ndi ntshinta bua kuamba lumu luimpe ku nseke kudi dina dia Kilisto kadi dianze kutedibua, bua meme tshiashi ha bishimikidi biakatekabo kudi munga muntu." 
Romans15:21 Mbu muakafundabo ne, Nebamone kudi kakui lumu luandi kulua kudibo, Ne badi kabai banze kunyua nebajingulule." 
Romans15:22 Bua bualu ebu kabidi nakahumbishibua kudi malu a bungi bua kulua kunudi. 
Romans15:23 Kadi katataka, bualu bua tshiena ne muaba mu nseke ei, ne bualu bua bidimu ebi bia bungi nakajinga bua kulua kunudi," 
Romans15:24 hanaya ku Esepanya, bualu bua ndi ntekemena bua kuntangila mu luendu luanyi, ne bua nuenu mufile ku mpala mu nshila wanyi, binasankishibua nʼenu tshituha diambedi." 
Romans15:25 Kadi katataka nyaya ku Yelushalema bua kukuatshisha basanto. 
Romans15:26 Bua Bena Makedonia ne Bena Akaya bakasanka bua kusangisha bintu bikuabo bua kukuatshisha nʼabi bahele ba munkatshi mua basanto ba mu Yelushalema. 
Romans15:27 Bushua bakadi ne disanka, ne bakadi bena dibanza diabo. Bualu bua bikala bisamba bia bende bangatshi nʼabo ba malu a Nyuma, badi ne bualu bua kubakuatshisha kabidi ne bintu bidi mubidi ukengela." 
Romans15:28 Nunku hanakamana kushikisha bualu ebu, ne hanakamana kufila kudibo dimuma edi, nempitshile munkatshi muenu tô ne ku Esepanya." 
Romans15:29 Ndi mumanye ne, Hanalua kunudi, nendue mu tshiuwidi tshia disanka dia Kilisto." 
Romans15:30 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela bua Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ne bua dinanga dia Nyuma Muimpe, ne, Nudienzeshe nʼanyi bikole mu dilomba dienu dia bualu buanyi kudi Nzambi," 
Romans15:31 bua meme mpanduke mu bianza bia bena tshitshu ba mu Yudaya, ne bua dikuatshisha dinyana nʼadi mu Yelushalema dikale bu mudi basanto basue," 
Romans15:32 ne bua meme nfike kunudi ne disanka bua disua dia Nzambi, ne bua kusangana nʼenu dikisha." 
Romans15:33 Nzambi wa ditalala ikale ne buonso buenu. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Ndi numanyisha bua Foibe, muanʼetu mukashi wa ma Kilisto, udi mulami wa mu ekelesia udi ku Kenekelea," 
Romans16:2 bua nuenu numuitabushe mu Mukelenge bu mudi basanto ne bualu bua kuenza, ne bua kumukuatshisha ne bualu buonso budiye ukengela kunudi; bualu bua yeye wakumana kulua mukuatshishi wa ba bungi, ne wa meme muine." 
Romans16:3 Nuele Pisikila ne Akula, benji nʼanyi ba mudimu ba mu Kilisto Yesu muoyo." 
Romans16:4 Bobo mene bakafila nshingu yabo bua kuikosabo bua muoyo wanyi; kudibo kutudi tubasakidila, kememe nkayanyi, kadi bena ekelesia bonso ba mu bisamba bia bende." 
Romans16:5 Nuele bena ekelesia ba mu nsubu muabo muoyo. Nuele Epaineto, munanga wanyi, muoyo; yeye udi dimuma dia kumudilu dia mu Asia diakukuamishabo kudi Kilisto." 
Romans16:6 Nuele Malia muoyo; yeye wakanukuatshisha ne mudimu wa bungi. 
Romans16:7 Nuele Andaloniko ne Yunia muoyo; mbana betu ne bena mu lukanu neanyi, bakadi ne lumu lunene munkatshi mua bapostolo; bakadi kabidi mu Kilisto tshi muanze kuikala munda muandi." 
Romans16:8 Nuele Ampuliato, munanga wanyi mu Mukelenge, muoyo." 
Romans16:9 Nuele Ubano, umena mudimu nʼetu mu Kilisto, ne Staku, munanga wanyi, muoyo." 
Romans16:10 Nuele Apele, wakumana kutetshibua ne, Muimpe mu Kilisto, muoyo. Nuele ba mu nsubu wa Alistobulo muoyo." 
Romans16:11 Nuele Helodio, muanʼetu, muoyo. Nuele ba mu nsubu wa Nâkiso badi mu Mukelenge muoyo." 
Romans16:12 Nuele Tufaina ne Tufoso, badi benza mudimu wa Mukelenge, muoyo. Nuele Pêsi, munanga, wakuenzela Mukelenge mudimu wa bungi, muoyo." 
Romans16:13 Nuele Lufo, musungudibue mu Mukelenge, ne mamu wandi ne wanyi, muoyo." 
Romans16:14 Nuele Asunkulito, Filegone, Hême, Pateloba, Hôma, ne bana betu ba mu Kilisto badi nʼabo, muoyo." 
Romans16:15 Nuele Filogogo ne Yulia, Neleo ne muanʼabo mukashi, ne Olumpa, ne basanto bonso badi nʼabo muoyo." 
Romans16:16 Nuelangane muoyo ne dituangana dia mishiku dia tshijila. Bena ekelesia yonso ya Kilisto badi banuela muoyo. 
Romans16:17 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela ne, Dimukai bua badi bavuisha matahuluka ne malenduisha munkatshi muenu, adi kâi bu diyisha dinuakayila; nubakome nyima." 
Romans16:18 Bua badi benza nunku kabena bakuatshila Mukelenge wetu Kilisto mudimu, kadi badi bakuatshila anu mafu abo mudimu; ne bua mei abo a lubombo ne a kutumbisha nʼau bantu hatuhu badi badinga mitshima ya badi kabai badimuke." 
Romans16:19 Bua lumu lua ditumikila dienu luakafika kudi bantu bonso. Nunku ndi nsanka bua bualu buenu, kadi ndi musue nuenu nuikale bena meshi ku malu mimpe ne badi ne mitshima mitoke ku malu mabi." 
Romans16:20 Nzambi wa ditalala neadiatshishe Satana munshi mua makasa enu tshituha tshihi. Ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ikale nʼenu. 
Romans16:21 Timote, muena mudimu nʼanyi, ne Lukio ne Yasona ne Sosipato, bana betu, badi banuela muoyo," 
Romans16:22 Meme Têtio, munufundidi wa mukunda eu, ndi nuela muoyo mu Mukelenge." 
Romans16:23 Gayo, muena nsubu undi mushikame ne muena ku nsubu kudi bena ekelesia bonso basangishilamu, udi unuela muoyo. Elasto, mulami wa bintu bia mu musoko, ne Kuâto, muanʼetu wa ma Kilisto, badi banuela muoyo. [" 
Romans16:24 ] 
Romans16:25 Butumbi buikale kudi Nzambi, udi ne bukole bua kunujadika bu mudi lumu luimpe luanyi ne kuamba kuanyi kua Yesu Kilisto, bu mudi dibuluibua dia bualu busokoko buakadi buhuwishibue ku bikondo bia tshiendelele;" 
Romans16:26 kadi katataka buakamueneshibua mu mifundu ya baprofete bu mudi mukenshi wa Nzambi wa tshiendelele; buakumanyishibua ku bisamba bionso bua ditumikila diabo mu ditabusha. 
Romans16:27 Butumbi ebu buikale tshiendelele kudi Nzambi umuehele wa lungenyi, bualu bua Yesu Kilisto. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo, mubikidibue mupostolo wa Yesu Kilisto bua disua dia Nzambi, ne Sosetene, muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto," 
1Corinthians1:2 tudi tufunda mei kudi bena ekelesia ba Nzambi badi mu Kolinto, bajidibue mu Kilisto Yesu, babikidibue bua kuikalabo basanto, ne kudi bonso badi babikila dina dia Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto mu muaba wonso, Mukelenge wabo ne wetu kabidi." 
1Corinthians1:3 Ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu. Kilisto. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi misangu yonso bua bualu buenu, bua ngasa wa Nzambi wakanuhebua mu Kilisto Yesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 bua nuakavuishibua babanshi mu malu onso munda muandi, mu dî dionso ne mu lungenyi luonso;" 
1Corinthians1:6 bu muakajadikibua tshimanyishilu tshia Kilisto munda muenu. 
1Corinthians1:7 Nunku kanuena nuhanga mu tshihedi tshimue; nudi nuindila dimueneka dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto. 
1Corinthians1:8 Yeye kabidi neanujadike tô ne kunshikidilu, bua kanuikadi ne tshia kunubandabo nʼatshi mu dituku dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
1Corinthians1:9 Nzambi udi wa kueyemena, yeye nguakanubikila mu buobumue bua Muana wandi Yesu Kilisto Mukelenge wetu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela bua dina dia Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto, bua buonso buenu nuambe dî diodiumue, ne bua kakuikadi matahuluka munkatshi muenu; kadi bua nuenu nuikale bâkashibue tshishiki mu meshi amue ne mu lungenyi lumue." 
1Corinthians1:11 Bualu bua bakanmanyisha bua bualu buenu, bana betu, kudi ba mu nsubu wa Kaloe ne, Kutandangana kudi munkatshi muenu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Ndi ngamba nunku ne, Muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muenu udi wamba ne, Meme ndi wa Paulo; meme ndi wa Apolo; meme ndi wa Kefa; meme ndi wa Kilisto." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kilisto udi mutahuluka, anyi? Paulo wakanufuila ha mutshi mutshiamakane, anyi? Nuakabatijibua mu dina dia Paulo, anyi?" 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi ne tshiakabatiza umue wenu anu Kulisipo ne Gayo; 
1Corinthians1:15 bua muntu kambi biandi ne, Bakanubatiza mu dina diandi." 
1Corinthians1:16 Nakabatiza ba mu nsubu wa Stefana kabidi; bua munga muntu, tshiena mumanye ne nakabatiza mukuabo anyi." 
1Corinthians1:17 Bualu bua Kilisto kakantuma bua kubatiza, kadi wakantuma bua kuamba lumu luimpe; kembua kuamba mu lungenyi lua mei, bua mutshi mutshiamakane wa Kilisto kauvuishibu bu tshintu tshia hatuhu." 
1Corinthians1:18 Bualu bua kuamba bua mutshi mutshiamakane kudi bualu buhote kudi bantu batshidi bajimina; kadi kudi bukole bua Nzambi kudi tuetu batshidi basungidibua. 
1Corinthians1:19 Bua bakafunda ne, Nenjimishe meshi a bena meshi, Nensesuishe lungenyi lua bena lungenyi." 
1Corinthians1:20 Muena meshi udi hanyi? Mufundi udi hanyi? Muena mpata wa mu tshikondo etshi udi hanyi? Nzambi kakavuisha meshi a ba ha buloba mahote, anyi?" 
1Corinthians1:21 Bualu bua mu meshi a Nzambi hakahanga ba ha buloba kumanya Nzambi mu meshi abo, Nzambi wakasanka bua kusungila badi bamuitabusha ku buhote bua kuamba kua dî diandi." 
1Corinthians1:22 Bualu bua Bena Yuda badi balomba bimanyinu, ne Bena Gelika badi bakeba meshi;" 
1Corinthians1:23 kadi tuetu tudi tuamba Kilisto wakashihabo ku mutshi mutshiamakane, ntshilenduishi kudi Bena Yuda ne mbuhote kudi bisamba bia bende;" 
1Corinthians1:24 kadi kudi badi babikidibue, ne Bena Yuda ne Bena Gelika, Kilisto mbukole bua Nzambi ne meshi a Nzambi." 
1Corinthians1:25 Bualu bua buhote bua Nzambi budi buhita meshi a bantu, ne butekete bua Nzambi budi buhita bukole bua bantu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Bana betu, tangilai dibikidibua dienu ne, Kakuena ba bungi babikidibue badi bena meshi mu buntu buabo, kakuena ba bungi badi bakole, kakuena ba bungi badi baledibue bena butumbi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kadi Nzambi wakasungula malu mahote a ha buloba bua kufuisheye nʼau bena meshi bundu; ne Nzambi wakasungula bintu bitekete bia ha buloba bua kufuisheye nʼabi bintu bikole bundu; 
1Corinthians1:28 ne Nzambi wakasungula malu mahuekela a ha buloba, ne malu adibo bahetula, ne bintu bidi kabîku, bua kuvuisheye nʼabi bintu bidiku ne ntshianana;" 
1Corinthians1:29 bua kakuikadi wa mu mubidi udi mua kutumba ku mesu kua Nzambi. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kadi bua bualu buandi nuenu nudi mu Kilisto Yesu, wakayuishibua meshi a kudi Nzambi kutudi: ne buakane ne bujidibu ne buhikudi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Bualu bua mbu muakafundabo ne, Muntu udi utumba, atumbile mu Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians2:1 Ne meme, bana betu, hanakalua kunudi, tshiakalua ne bulengele bua mei anyi bua meshi, hanakadi nuambila bualu busokoka bua Nzambi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Bualu bua nakadisungula munda bua meme tshimunyi bunga bualu munkatshi muenu, anu Yesu Kilisto, ne yeye mushihibue ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
1Corinthians2:3 Nakadi nʼenu mu butekete ne mu ditshina ne mu kuzakala kua bungi. 
1Corinthians2:4 Dî dianyi ne kuamba kuanyi kabiakadi mu mei a meshi a kuitabushisha nʼau bantu, kadi biakadi mu dimuenesha dia Nyuma Muimpe ne dia bukole;" 
1Corinthians2:5 bua ditabusha dienu kadikadi mu meshi a bantu, kadi dikale mu bukole bua Nzambi." 
1Corinthians2:6 Tudi tuamba mei a meshi munkatshi mua bantu bakamana kukola mu bualu bua Nzambi, kadi kemeshi a tshikondo etshi anyi a bakokeshi ba tshikondo etshi balualua ba hatuhu." 
1Corinthians2:7 Kadi tudi tuamba meshi a Nzambi mu bualu busokoka, meshi mene akadi masokoka, akadianjila Nzambi kusungula ku mpala kua bikondo bionso bua butumbi buetu." 
1Corinthians2:8 Kakuakadi umue wa bakokeshi ba tshikondo etshi wakuamanya; bua bu bobo bâmanye, kabakadi kushiha Mukelenge wa butumbi ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
1Corinthians2:9 Kadi bu muakafundabo ne, Malu adi disu kadi dianze kutangila, ne ditshu kadi dianze kunvua, Adi kâi manze kubuela mu mutshima wa muntu, Malu onso akalongoluela Nzambi badi bamunanga." 
1Corinthians2:10 Kadi Nzambi wakatubuluila malu â mu Nyuma Muimpe; bualu bua Nyuma udi ukebakeba malu onso, tô ne ku malu male a Nzambi." 
1Corinthians2:11 Bualu bua munkatshi mua bantu nganyi udi mumanye malu a muntu? Anu nyuma wa muntu udi munda muandi udi muamanye. Nunku kakuena mukuabo udi mumanye malu a Nzambi, anu Nyuma wa Nzambi udi muamanye." 
1Corinthians2:12 Kadi tuetu tuakangata nyuma, kengua ha buloba, kadi Nyuma wa kudi Nzambi, bua tuetu tumanye masanka akatuabo tshianana kudi Nzambi." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tudi tuamba malu â, kemu mei adi meshi a bantu atuyisha, kadi mu mei adi Nyuma Muimpe utuyisha; tudi tujingulula malu a Nyuma ne mei a Nyuma." 
1Corinthians2:14 Muntu wa ha buloba kena witabusha malu a Nyuma wa Nzambi, bualu bua malu â adi mahote kudiye; yeye kena mua kudimanyinau, bualu bua malu â adi ajinguludibua kudi Nyuma." 
1Corinthians2:15 Muntu udi ne Nyuma udi ujingulula malu onso, kadi muntu eu mene kabena bamujinguluila kudi mukuabo." 
1Corinthians2:16 Muntu kai udi mumanye meshi a Mukelenge bua kumuyisha yeye? Kadi tuetu iudi ne meshi a Kilisto. 
1Corinthians3:1 Meme, bana betu, tshiakamanya mua kuakula nʼenu bu mundi ngakula kudi bantu badi balonda Nyuma, kadi anu bu kudi bantu badi balonda malu a mubidi, bu kudi bana batekete ba mu Kilisto." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nakanuha mabele a kunua, tshiakanuha bia kudia bikole; bua kanuakamanya mua kubidia, ne katataka mene kanuena mua kubidia;" 
1Corinthians3:3 bualu bua nutshidi nulonda malu a mubidi. Bualu bua hatshidi mukau ne kutandangana munkatshi muenu, kanuena nulonda malu a mubidi, anyi? Kanuena nuenda bu mudi tshilele tshia bantu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Bua hamba mukuabo ne, Meme ndi wa Paulo; ne mukuabo ne, Meme ndi wa Apolo; kanuena bu bantu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Nunku Apolo udi bu tshinyi? Paulo udi bu tshinyi? Badi bakuatshi ba mudimu ne nuenu nuakitabusha bua bualu buabo, bu muakabaha Mukelenge bukole muntu ne muntu." 
1Corinthians3:6 Meme nakakuna bintu, Apolo wakabimiamina mai, kadi Nzambi wakabidiundisha." 
1Corinthians3:7 Nunku muntu udi ukuna bintu kena bualu bunene, anyi udi ubimiamina mai, kadi anu Nzambi udi ubidiundisha." 
1Corinthians3:8 Udi ukune ne udi umiamina mai badi umue; kadi muntu ne muntu neangate difutu bu mudi mudimu wandi mene. 
1Corinthians3:9 Bua tudi benzeshanganyi ba mudimu ne Nzambi; nuenu nudi budimi bua Nzambi, nudi nsubu wa Nzambi." 
1Corinthians3:10 Bu mudi ngasa wa Nzambi mumpeshibue bu muibaki udi ne meshi, meme nakajadika bishimikidi bia nsubu, kadi mukuabo udi wasa ha mutu habi. Kadi muntu ne muntu adimuke biandi bu mudiye wasahu." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kakuena muntu udi mua kujadika bishimikidi bikuabo, anu biobio biakamana kujadikibua, bidi Yesu Kilisto mene." 
1Corinthians3:12 Biasa muntu ha bishimikidi ebi ngolo, argent, mabue a mushinga mukole, mitshi, bisosa, anyi bidi hisasa," 
1Corinthians3:13 mudimu wa muntu ne muntu neumueneshibue; bua difuku dilualua nediumueneshe, bualu bua didi dibuluibua mu kahia; ne kahia nekatete mudimu wa muntu ne muntu ne udi wa mushindu kai." 
1Corinthians3:14 Biashala mudimu wa muetu wakaseye ha mutu hatshi, yeye neangate difutu." 
1Corinthians3:15 Biahia mudimu wa muntu, neajimishe mudimu eu wonso, kadi yeye mene neasungidibue, kadi anu bu muntu musambuke kahia." 
1Corinthians3:16 Kanuena bamanye ne nuenu nudi ntempelo wa Nzambi, ne Nyuma wa Nzambi udi wikala munda muenu?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Biashiha muntu ntempelo wa Nzambi, Nzambi neamushihe yeye; bualu bua ntempelo wa Nzambi udi wa tshijila, nuenu nudi muomumue kabidi." 
1Corinthians3:18 Muntu kadidingi. Biela muntu meshi ne, Meme ndi muena meshi munkatshi muenu wa mu tshikondo etshi, alue biandi muhote bua kuikaleye muena meshi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Bualu hua meshi a ha buloba ebu adi maho, te ku mesu kua Nzambi. Bua bakafunda ne, Yeye udi ukuata bena meshi mu budimu buabo." 
1Corinthians3:20 Bakafunda kabidi ne, Mukelenge udi mumanye meshi a bena meshi ne, Adi hatuhu." 
1Corinthians3:21 Nunku muntu katumbidi mu bantu. Bualu bua bintu bionso mbienu; 
1Corinthians3:22 ne Paulo ne Apolo ne Kefa ne buloba ne muoyo ne lufu ne bintu bidiku ne bintu bilualua: bionso mbienu; 
1Corinthians3:23 ne nuenu nudi ba Kilisto, ne Kilisto udi wa Nzambi." 
1Corinthians4:1 Muntu atubale tuetu bu bakuatshi ba mudimu ba Kilisto ne balami ba malu masokoka a Nzambi. 
1Corinthians4:2 Mu bualu ebu kabidi badi bakeba munkatshi mua balami bua kusangana mulami yonso muikale muntu udibo mua kueyemena. 
1Corinthians4:3 Budi bualu butamba bukese kundi bua meme kulumbuluishibua kunudi, anyi kudi tshilumbuluidi tshia tshikondo etshi tshia bantu; bulelela, tshiena ndilumbuluisha kabidi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Bua tshiena munvue munda tshindi mua kudihisha nʼatshi, kadi tshiena mbingishibua bua bualu ebu; kadi udi undumbuluisha udi Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians4:5 Nunku nulekele kulumbulula malu ku mpala kua tshikondo atshi, tô ne halua Mukelenge, neasokolole biandi malu masokoka a midima hatoke, neamueneshe biandi meshi a mu mitshima; hashishe butumbi bua kudi Nzambi nebuikale kudi muntu ne muntu." 
1Corinthians4:6 Bana betu, nakanukudimuina malu anyi ne a Apolo ne tshifuanyikishi bua bualu buenu; bua nuenu nuayila kutudi diyisha edi ne, Kanuhitshi ku mpala kua malu akafundabo, bua umue wenu kikadi ne diambu bua kutumbisha mukuabo ku mpala kua mukuabo." 
1Corinthians4:7 Udi ukutahulula kudi bakuabo nganyi? Udi ne tshintu kai tshiudi kui muangate kudi mukuabo? Biwikala mutshiangate kadi mukuabo, munyi mûdi uditumbisha bu mûdi kui mutshiangate?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Nuakumana kukuta, nuakumana kulua babanshi, nuakalua bakokeshi kanui nʼetu. Bulelela, nakadi musue bua nuenu nuikale bakokeshi, bua tuetu tuikale bakokeshi nʼenu." 
1Corinthians4:9 Bua udi ngela meshi ne, Nzambi wakatuteka tuetu bapostolo kunshikidilu kua bantu bonso bu bantu bakahishabo bua kufua; bua tuetu tuakavuishibua tshimuenenu kudi ba ha buloba, ne kudi banjelo ne kudi bantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tuetu tudi bahote bualu bua Kilisto, kadi nuenu nudi bena lungenyi mu Kilisto; tuetu tudi batekete, kadi nuenu nudi bakole, nuenu nudi ne butumbi, kadi tuetu tudi bahetudibua." 
1Corinthians4:11 Tô ne ku diba edi tudi ne nsala, tudi ne nyota, tudi ne butaka, tudi tukumibua, katuena ne muaba wa kushindama;" 
1Corinthians4:12 tudi tuenza mudimu mukole, tûenza ne bianza bietu; hatuhendabo, tudi tubavuidishila disanka; hatuikala ne makenga, tudi tudikankamika;" 
1Corinthians4:13 hatuvuishilabo lumu lubi, tudi tubasengelela; bakatuvuisha bu manyanu a ba buloba ne bilu bia bintu bionso tô ne katataka." 
1Corinthians4:14 Tshiena nfunda malu â bua kunufuisha bundu, kadi bua kunudimusha bu bana banyi bananga." 
1Corinthians4:15 Bua binuikala ne bayishi lubombo mu Kilisto, kanuena ne batatu ba bungi; bualu bua mu Kilisto Yesu nakanuela ku lumu luimpe." 
1Corinthians4:16 Nunku ndi nusengelela bua kuikala bidikishi banyi. 
1Corinthians4:17 Bua bualu ebu nakanutumina Timote, udi muana wanyi munanga ne wa kueyemena mu Mukelenge; yeye neanuvuluishe bua bienzedi bianyi bia mu Kilisto, bu mundi nyisha bantu kuonso mu ekelesia yonso." 
1Corinthians4:18 Bakuabo bakadisua bu mundi tshi ndua kunudi. 
1Corinthians4:19 Kadi meme nendue kunudi tshituha tshihi, biasua Mukelenge; ne hanalua, nemanye, kendî dia badi badisue, kadi nemanye bukole buabo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Bualu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi kabuena mu dî, kadi budi mu bukole." 
1Corinthians4:21 Nudi basue tshinyi? Ndue kunudi ne mulangala, anyi mu dinanga ne mu nyuma wa kalolo?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Badi bunvua kuonso ne, Masandi adi munkatshi muenu, masandi a bu nunku mene adi kâi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, ne, Umue wenu udi ne mukashi wa tatu wandi." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ne nuenu nuakadisua, ne kanuakadila bu muakadibi kuikala bimpe, bua yeye wakenza bualu ebu umushibue munkatshi muenu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Bua meme, tshî munkatshi muenu mu mubidi, kadi muikale nʼenu mu nyuma wanyi, nakumana kulumbuluisha muntu wakenza bualu ebu nunku, bu mundi muikaleku." 
1Corinthians5:4 Nakamalumbaluisha mu dinu dia Mukelenge Yesu, hanuakadisangishaku ne nyuma wanyi nʼenu, mu bukole bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 bua kufila muntu wa nunku kudi Satana bua kushihesha malu a mubidi, bua nyuma wandi asungidibue mu dituku dia Mukelenge Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Kuditumbisha kuenu kakuena kuimpe. Kanuena bamanye ne luevene lukese ludi lumuangalaka mu mutanda wa bidia mujima, anyi?" 
1Corinthians5:7 Umushai luevene lukulukulu bua nuenu nuikale bu mutanda muhia-muhia, bu munudi kanui ne luevene. Bualu bua mulambu wetu wa Kuhita kua Yehowa wakashihibua, Kilisto mene." 
1Corinthians5:8 Nunku tuikale tudie bidia bia disanka edi; katudidî ne luevene lukulukulu, anyi luevene lua meshi mabi ne lua malu mabi, kadi tudie disanka ne bidia bidi kabi ne luevene, bia malu a hatoke ne a bushua." 
1Corinthians5:9 Nakanufundila mu mutanda wanyi ne, Kanubuelakanyi ne bena masandi;" 
1Corinthians5:10 tshiakamba dî nasha kakese bua bena masandi ba ha buloba ebu, anyi bena lukuka lua bintu, anyi banyengi ba bintu, anyi bena mpingu; nunku nuakadi kuikala ne bualu bua kumuka mu buloba ebu." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kadi mpindiu ndi nufundila ne, Kanubuelakanyi ne muntu udi ne dina dia muanʼenu wa ma Kilisto bikaleye muena masandi, anyi muena lukuka lua bintu, anyi muena mpingu, anyi muhendanganyi, anyi mukuatshiki wa maluvu, anyi munyengi wa bintu; kanudî mene ne muntu wa nunku." 
1Corinthians5:12 Bua ndi ne bualu bua kulumbuluisha badi kabai mu ekelesia kudi kunyi? Nuenu kanuena nulumbuluisha badi mu ekelesia, anyi?" 
1Corinthians5:13 Kadi badi kabai mu ekelesia, Nzambi nkayandi udi ubalumbuluisha. Umushai muntu mubi au munkatshi muenu." 
1Corinthians6:1 Muntu kai wa munkatshi muenu, bikaleye ne muena Kilisto mukuabo tshilumbu, udi ne dikamakama dia kutshilumbulula ku mpala kua bantu babi, ne kena uya nʼatshi kudi basanto?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Kanuena bamanye ne, Basanto nebalumbuluishe ba ha buloba, anyi? Ne bikala ba ha buloba balumbuluishibua kunudi, nuenu kanuena bakanangane ne bilumbuluidi ebi bidi bihita bukese, anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kanuena bamanye ne, Tuetu netulumbuluishe banjelo, anyi? Nunku bualu budi butamba kutukuata bua kulumbulula malu a mu muoyo utudi nʼau." 
1Corinthians6:4 Nunku binuikala ne bilumbuluidi bia malu a mu muoyo utudi nʼau, nudi nuteka ha mutu habi bantu ba hatuhu ba mu ekelesia, anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ndi ngamba bualu ebu bua kunufuisha bundu. Kakuena muena meshi umue munkatshi muenu udi mua kulumbuluila bana benu ba mu Kilisto bilumbu biabo, anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Kadi muanʼenu wa ma Kilisto udi ufunda mukuabo ku tshilumbuluidi, ne udi wenza nunku ku mpala kua badi kabai ne ditabusha, anyi?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Bulelela, bualu ebu buakumana kulua dihanga dinene munkatshi muenu ne, Nudi nuikalangana ne bilumbu. Bualu budi butamba buimpe bua nuenu nuitabushe banuenzele bibi, nasha? Budi butamba buimpe bua nuenu nuitabushe banunyenge bintu, nasha?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Kadi nuenu mene nudi nuenza bibi, nudi nunyenga bintu; nudi nuenzela bana benu ba mu Kilisto bualu ebu." 
1Corinthians6:9 Kanuena bamanye ne, Bantu babi kabena bahiana bukelenge bua Nzambi, anyi? Kanudingibu; bena tshiendenda, anyi bena mpingu, anyi bena masandi, anyi badileshi bu bakashi, anyi balume badi benzelangana malu a bundu," 
1Corinthians6:10 anyi bibi, anyi bena lukuka lua bintu, anyi bakuatshiki ba maluvu, anyi bahendanganyi, anyi banyengi ba bintu, kabena bahiana bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
1Corinthians6:11 Bakuabo benu bakadi nunku; kadi nuakuvuibua, nuakajidibua, nuakabingishibua mu dina dia Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto, ne mu Nyuma wa Nzambi wetu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Meme ndi ne bukole bua kuenza malu onso, kadi malu onso kêna ankuatshisha. Ndi ne bukole bua kuenza malu onso, kadi tshiena nkokeshibua munshi mua bualu bumue." 
1Corinthians6:13 Bia kudia bidiku bua difu, ne difu didiku bua bia kudia, kadi Nzambi neavuishe diodio ne biobio bu bintu bia tshianana. Mubidi kawenaku bua masandi, kadi udiku bua Mukelenge; ne Mukelenge udiku bua mubidi." 
1Corinthians6:14 Nzambi wakabisha Mukelenge ku lufu, neatubishe tuetu kabidi ku bukole buandi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Kanuena bamanye ne mibidi yenu idi bituha bia mubidi wa Kilisto, anyi? Nunku nengumushe bituha bia Kilisto bua kubivuisha bituha bia mukashi wa masandi, anyi? Nasha kakese!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Anyi kanuena bamanye ne, Walamata kudi mukashi wa masandi udi nʼandi mubidi umue, anyi? Bua Nzambi udi wamba ne, Bubidi buabo nebalue mubidi umue." 
1Corinthians6:17 Walamata kudi Mukelenge udi nʼandi nyuma umue. 
1Corinthians6:18 Nyemai masandi. Bubi buonso budi muntu wenza kabuena bua mu mubidi, kadi udi wenda masandi udi wenzela mubidi wandi mene bibi." 
1Corinthians6:19 Anyi, kanuena bamanye ne mubidi wenu udi ntempelo wa Nyuma Muimpe udi munda muenu, unudi nuangata kudi Nzambi, anyi? Kanuena bena mioyo yenu." 
1Corinthians6:20 Bualu bua nuakasumbibua ku mushinga mukole; nunku nutumbishe Nzambi mu mubidi wenu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Bua malu anuakanfundila ndi ngamba ne, Bidi bimpe bua muntu kikadi ne mukashi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Kadi bua kuehuka ku masandi, mulume ne mulume ikale ne mukashi wandi, ne mukashi ne mukashi ikale ne mulume wandi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mulume enzele mukashi wandi budiye nʼabu bualu; ne mukashi kabidi enzele mulume wandi budiye nʼabu bualu. 
1Corinthians7:4 Mukashi wa muntu kena ne bukokeshi bua mubidi wandi, anu mulume wandi udi nʼabu; muomumue kabidi, mulume kena ne bukokeshi bua mubidi wandi, anu mukashi wandi udi nʼabu." 
1Corinthians7:5 Kanuedianganyi, anu hanuahunga dî bua tshikondo, bua kuikala ne musangu wa kutendelela Nzambi, ne bua kudisangisha kabidi, bua Satana kanuteyi bua dihanga dia kudikanda kuenu." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ndi nuambila bualu ebu bu mundi mua kuitabusha, kembu mukenshi." 
1Corinthians7:7 Kadi nakadi kusua balume bonso bikale bu meme. Kadi muntu ne muntu udi ne tshihedi tshiandi kudi Nzambi, mukuabo nunku mukuabo nunku." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kadi ndi ngambila batshidi bajike ne bakashi ba mu lufuila ne, Bidi bimpe biashalabo bu meme mene." 
1Corinthians7:9 Kadi bikalabo kabai mua kudikanda, babake biabo, bualu bua kubaka kudi kutamba kusamina muoyo buimpe." 
1Corinthians7:10 Ndi ngambila bena dibaka di, kememe udi wamba kadi mMukelenge udi ubambila ne, Mukashi kumuki kudi mulume wandi," 
1Corinthians7:11 (kadi biumukeye kudiye, ashale biandi mujike, anyi alengeshe ne mulume wandi) ne mulume kalekedi mukashi wandi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kadi kudi bakuabo ndi mbambila nkayanyi, ke Mukelenge udi wamba, ne, Bikala muanʼenu wa ma Kilisto ne mukashi udi kai mmena ditabusha, ne mukashi eu udi usanka bua kuikala nʼandi, mulume kamulekedi nasha." 
1Corinthians7:13 Ne mukashi udi ne mulume udi kai muena ditabusha, ne mulume eu udi usanka bua kuikala nʼandi, mukashi kalekedi mulume wandi nasha." 
1Corinthians7:14 Bualu bua mulume udi kai muena ditabusha udi mujidila mu mukashi wandi, ne mukashi udi kai muena ditabusha udi mujidila mu mulume wandi udi muena ditabusha; bikala bualu ebu kabui nunku, bana benu batshidi babiha; kadi katataka badi ba tshijila." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kadi biumuka muntu udi kai muena ditabusha, umuke biandi; bualu bua muanʼenu mulume anyi muanʼenu mukashi wa ma Kilisto kena ushala mu buhika mu malu a nunku; Nzambi wakanubikila bua nuenu nuikale mu ditalala." 
1Corinthians7:16 Bua wewe, mukashi, udi mumanye munyi, ne kuena mua kusungila mulume webe anyi? Anyi wewe, mulume, udi mumanye munyi, ne kuena mua kusungila mukashi webe anyi?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kadi, bu mudi Mukelenge mutahuluile muntu ne muntu tshikadilu, bu mudi Nzambi mubikile muntu ne muntu, ende biandi nunku. Au mukenshi undi ngela mu ekelesia yonso." 
1Corinthians7:18 Muntu wakabikidibua hakadiye mutengula, anyi? Kavuishibu bu udi kai mutengula. Muntu wakabikidibua hakadiye kai mutengula, anyi? Kabamutengudi." 
1Corinthians7:19 Kuikala mutengula kakuena bualu; kuikala kai mutengula kakuena bualu; kadi anu kutumikila kua mikenshi ya Nzambi kudi bualu bunene. 
1Corinthians7:20 Muntu ne muntu ashale mu tshikadilu mene tshiakadiye nʼatshi hakabikidibueye. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wewe wakadi muhika hawakabikidibua, anyi? Bualu ebu kabukutatshishi. Kadi biwamanya mua kuheta budishikaminyi, wenza nunku." 
1Corinthians7:22 Bualu bua muntu mubikidibue mu Mukelenge hakadiye muhika udi muena budishikaminyi wa Mukelenge; nunku muntu mubikidibue hakadiye muena budishikaminyi udi muhika wa Kilisto. 
1Corinthians7:23 Bakanusumba ku mushinga mukole; kanulu bahika ba bantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Bana betu, muntu ne muntu ashale ne Nzambi mu tshikadilu tshiakadiye nʼatshi hakabikidibueye." 
1Corinthians7:25 Tshiena ne mukenshi wa kudi Mukelenge bualu bua bakashi batshidi tumama; kadi meme nkayanyi nakahangidisha bualu ebu bu muntu wakamana kuangata luse kudi Mukelenge bua kuikala muntu unudi mua kutekemena. 
1Corinthians7:26 Nunku ndi ngela meshi ne, Bualu bua kanyinganyinga katudi nʼaku katataka bidi bimpe bua mulume ashale bu mudiye." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wewe udi muhumbakasha kudi mukashi, anyi? Kukebi mua kusululuka kudiye. Wewe udi musulula kudi mukashi, anyi? Kukebi mukashi." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kadi biwikala mubake, kuakuenza bualu bubi; ne biabakibua mukashi utshidi kamama, yeye kakuenza, bualu bubi. Kadi bantu aba nebikale ne kanyinganyinga mu mibidi yabo; ne meme udi musue kunusungila ku bualu ebu." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kadi, bana betu, ndi nuambila ne, Musangu udi mukeha bua mu tshikondo tshilualua bantu badi ne bakashi bikale bu badi kabai ne bakashi;" 
1Corinthians7:30 ne bantu badi badila bikale bu badi kabai badila; ne badi basanka bikale bu badi kabai basanka; ne badi basumba bintu bikale bu badi kabai ne bintu; 
1Corinthians7:31 ne bantu badi balonda malu a ha buloba bikale bu bantu badi kabai bukuta nʼau; bualu bua tshimuenekelu tshia malu a ba buloba ebu netshijimine. 
1Corinthians7:32 Ne tshiena musue nuenu nuikale ne ntatu. Muntu udi mujike udi uditatshila bua bintu bia Mukelenge, bu mudiye mumanye mua kusankisha Mukelenge;" 
1Corinthians7:33 kadi muntu udi ne mukashi udi uditatshila bua bintu bia ha buloha, bu mudiye mumanye mua kusankisha mukashi wandi," 
1Corinthians7:34 ne yeye udi mutahulula mu nseke ibidi. Nunku mukashi udi kai ne mulume ne mukashi utshidi kamama badi baditatshila bua bintu bia Mukelenge, bua bobo bikale ba tshijila mu mubidi ne mu nyuma kabidi; kadi mukashi udi ne mulume udi uditatshila bua bintu bia ha buloba, bu mudiye mumanye mua kusankisha mulume wandi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ndi ngamba bualu ebu bua kunukuatshisha; kambualu bua kunuela buteyi, kadi anu bualu bua nuenu nuikale ne malu adi makanangane ne bena Kilisto, ne bua nuenu mimanye mua kukuatshila Mukelenge mudimu kanui ne ntatu." 
1Corinthians7:36 Biela muntu meshi ne, Ndi ngenzela muanʼanyi mukashi utshidi kamama bibi; ne bikala mukashi muhite tshikondo tshiandi tshia dibaka, ne bikaleye ne bualu bua kuenza nunku, tatu enze bualu bu mudiye musue; yeye kena wenza bibi; babake biabo." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kadi muntu udi utantamana mu mutshima wandi, kai ne bualu budi bumuenzesha, kadi udi ne bukole bua kuenza bu mudiye musue, ne wakamana kudisunguila bualu ebu mu mutshima wandi bua kulama muanʼandi mukashi utshidi kamama, yeye nenze bimpe." 
1Corinthians7:38 Nunku muntu udi ufila muanʼandi mukashi utshidi kamama ku dibaka udi wenza bimpe; ne muntu udi kai umufila ku dibaka udi utamba kuenza bimpe. 
1Corinthians7:39 Mukashi udi mubumbakasha kudi mulume wandi hatshidi mulume ne muoyo, kadi biafua mulume wandi, yeye udi mumanye mua kuya ku dibaka kudiye musue, kadi anu mu Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kadi yeye udi utamba kusanka biashaleye bu mudiye, emu bu mundi muhangidishe; udi ngela meshi ne meme ndi ne Nyuma wa Nzambi kabidi." 
1Corinthians8:1 Bualu bua bintu bidibo batendelela nʼabi mpingu: Tudi bamanye ne buonso buetu tudi ne lungenyi lua bualu ebu. Lungenyi ludi luvuisha muntu kudisua, kadi dinanga didi dimudiandisha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Muntu udi wela meshi ne, Ndi mumanye bualu, yeye kena muanze kumanye bu mudiye ne bualu bua kumanya;" 
1Corinthians8:3 kadi biananga muntu Nzambi, yeye udi mumanyibue kudi Nzambi." 
1Corinthians8:4 Ne bualu bua kudia kua bintu bia kutendelelabo nʼabi mpingu, tudi bamanye ne, Kakuena luhingu ludi ne bualu ha buloba, ne kakuena Nzambi mukuabo anu umue." 
1Corinthians8:5 Bikala bintu bidibo babikila nzambi bidiku, nasha mu diulu nasha hanshi ha buloba; bu mudi nzambi ya bungi ne bakelenge ba bungi;" 
1Corinthians8:6 kadi ku mesu kuetu Nzambi umue udiku, Tatu mene; bintu bionso biakafuma kudiye, ne tuetu tudiku bua bualu buandi; ne Mukelenge umue, Yesu Kilisto, bintu bionso mbua bualu buandi ne tuetu tudi bua bualu buandi kabidi." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kadi lungenyi elu kaluena munda mua bantu bonso; kadi bakuabo bakadi ne tshilele tshia kutendelela mpingu tô ne katataka, badi badia bintu ebi bu bintu bia kutendelelabo nʼabi mpingu; ne bualu bua muoyo-mukese wabo udi mutekete, udi ulua mubiha." 
1Corinthians8:8 Bia kudia kabiena bi-tusemesha ha buihi ne Nzambi; bituikala katui tudia, katuena tuhanga tshintu, anyi bituadia, katuena tutamba kutshiheta." 
1Corinthians8:9 Kadi nudimuke bua bukole buenu kabuikadi tshilenduishi kudi badi batekete. 
1Corinthians8:10 Biakumona muntu, wewe muena lungenyi, ushikama bua kudia mu ntempelo wa luhingu, bikaleye mutekete, muoyo-mukese wandi kawena ukoleshibua bua kudieye bintu bia kutendelelabo nʼabi mpingu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Bualu bua ku lungenyi luebe, muntu mutekete udi ujimina, muanʼenu mene, wakafuilabo kudi Kilisto." 
1Corinthians8:12 Nunku binuenzela bana benu ba mu Kilisto bibi, binuasamisha muoyo-mukese wabo hatshidiu mutekete, nudi nuenzela Kilisto bibi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Nunku bialenduisha bia kudia muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto, tshiena ndia munyinyi tô ne tshiendelele, bua tshilenduishi muanʼetu." 
1Corinthians9:1 Tshiena ne budishikaminyi, anyi? Tshiena mupostolo, anyi? Tshiakutangila Yesu, Mukelenge wetu, anyi? Nuenu kanuena bu mudimu wanyi mu Mukelenge, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:2 Bingikala tshî mupostolo kudi bakuabo, ndi mupostolo kudi nuenu bine; bitalu bua nuenu nudi bu tshimanyishilu tshia bupostolo buanyi mu Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians9:3 Eku nkudividila kuanyi kudi bantu badi bandumbuluisha. 
1Corinthians9:4 Katuena ne bukole bua kudia ne bua kunua, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Katuena ne bukole bua kuya ku luendu muntu ne muntu ne mukashi wandi udi muena ditabusha, bu mudibo benza kudi bapostolo bakuabo, ne kudi bana babo ne Mukelenge, ne kudi Kefa, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Anyi, meme nkayanyi ne Bânaba, katuena ne bukole bua kuhidia kuenza mudimu wa bianza, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Muntu udi wenza mudimu wa busalayi udi udifuta bua mudimu wandi musangu kai? Muntu kai udi ukuna mionshi ya nvinyo ne kena udia mamuma ai? Anyi, muntu kai udi udisha tshisumbu tshia bimuna ne kena unua mabele a tshisumbu tshiabi?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Ndi ngamba malu â bu mudi bantu bamba, anyi mikenshi kayena yamba malu â kabidi, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Bua bakafunda mu mikenshi ya Mose ne, Kusuiki nkata ku mishiku ya ngombe udi udiata ntete bua kuishihula. Nzambi udi wela meshi bua ngombe," 
1Corinthians9:10 anyi udi wamba nunku anu bua bualu buetu? Bua bualu buetu bakafunda dî edi, bua muntu udi udima udi ne bualu bua kudima ne ditekemena, muntu udi ushihula udi ne bualu bua kushihula ne ditekemena dia kuangata bia kudia." 
1Corinthians9:11 Bituikala tuakakuna bintu bia Nyuma munkatshi muenu, budi bualu bunene bituahuola bintu bienu bia ha buloba, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Biangata bakuabo bukole ebu ha mutu henu, tuetu katuena tutamba kubuangata, anyi? Kadi katuakanuenzesha ne bukole ebu; kadi tudi tudikankamika mu malu onso, bua tuetu kaluishi dihumbisha dimue ku lumu luimpe lua Kilisto." 
1Corinthians9:13 Kanuena bamanye ne badi benza mudimu ne bintu bia tshijila, badi badia bintu bia mu ntempelo; ne badi bakuata mudimu wa tshioshelu badi bangata tshituha tshiabo ku tshioshelu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Nunku Mukelenge wakela mukenshi ne, Badi bambila bakuabo lumu luimpe bikale ne muoyo ku lumu luimpe." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kadi meme tshiakuenza bualu ne tshintu tshimue tshia bintu ebi nasha; ne tshiena nfundila malu â bua bualu ebu buenjibue nunku kundi; bualu bua meme kufua kudi kutamba bua muntu kuvuisha kutumba kuanyi hatuhu. 
1Corinthians9:16 Bua bingambila bantu lumu luimpe, tshiena ne tshia kutumbila nʼatshi; bua bualu budi bunkuata bua kuluamba, bua ndi ne mulau bingikala tshî ngambila bantu lumu luimpe." 
1Corinthians9:17 Bua bingenza nunku bua kudisunguila kuanyi, ndi ne difutu; kadi bingikala tshî ngenza nunku bua kudisunguila kuanyi, ndi ne bulami butekibue mu bianza bianyi." 
1Corinthians9:18 Nunku difutu dianyi didi tshinyi? Didi nunku; ne, Bua hangambila bantu lumu luimpe, ndi mua kuyuisha lumu luimpe kalui bua mushinga kudibo, bua meme tshienzeshi bantu ne bukokeshi buanyi buonso bua mu lumu luimpe." 
1Corinthians9:19 Bua nakadi ne budishikaminyi kudi bantu bonso, kadi nakadivuisha muhika wa bonso, bua meme kuheta mioyo ya bakuabo ba bungi." 
1Corinthians9:20 Kudi Bayuda nakalua Muyuda, bua meme kuheta mioyo ya Bayuda; kudi bakadi ku nyima kua mikenshi nakalua ku nyima kua mikenshi, meme hanyi tshî muikale ku nyima kua mikenshi, bua meme kuheta mioyo ya bakadi ku nyima kua mikenshi." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kudi bakadi kabai ne mikenshi nakalua muntu udi kai ne mikenshi, meme tshî muikale muntu udi kai ne mikenshi ya Nzambi kadi bu muntu udi ne mikenshi ya Kilisto, bua meme kuheta mioyo ya bakadi kabai ne mikenshi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kudi batekete nakalua mutekete, bua meme kuheta mioyo ya batekete; kudi bonso nakulua muena malu onso, bua meme kumanya mua kusungila bakuabo ne ngenyi yonso." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ne ndi ngenza malu onso bualu bua lumu luimpe, bua kulua bianyi muluabanyanganyi nʼabo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Kanuena bamanye, anyi, ne, Bantu badi batumbila lubilu mu tshilumbilu badi balumbila bonso, kadi umue wabo udi wangata bukenshi? Lumbilai bienu nunku, bua nuenu nuangate bukenshi." 
1Corinthians9:25 Muntu yonso udi utetangana bukole ne bakuabo mu manaya udi udikanda mu malu onso. Bobo badi benza nunku bua kuangata tshifulu tshia butumbi tshidi tshisunsuke, kadi tuetu mbua kuangata tshidi katshi tshisunsuke." 
1Corinthians9:26 Meme ndi ndumbila nunku, tshi usesuka mu nshila; ndi nduangana ne mbata tshî bu muntu udi widikisha." 
1Corinthians9:27 Kadi ndi udikuma tô ne hanavuisha mubidi wanyi mabuba, ndi ngubuesha mu buhika; bua bumue, hanamana kuambila bakuabo bualu bua Nzambi, meme tshikadi mubengibue." 
1Corinthians10:1 Bua tshiena musue nuenu nuhange kumanya, bana betu, ne, Bankambua betu bonso bakadi munshi mua ditutu, buonso buabo bakahita munkatshi mua mai manene;" 
1Corinthians10:2 buonso buabo bakabatijibua mu bulombodi bua Mose mu ditutu ne mu mai manene; 
1Corinthians10:3 buonso buabo bakadia bia kudia biobiumue bia Nyuma; 
1Corinthians10:4 buonso buabo bakanua bia kunua biobiumue bia Nyuma; bua bakanua ku dibue dia Nyuma diakabalonda, ne dibue edi diakadi Kilisto." 
1Corinthians10:5 Kadi Nzambi kakasanka ne bakuabo babo bakadi bahita bungi; bua bakahoneshibua bafue mu tshihela. 
1Corinthians10:6 Malu â akalua bifuanyikishi bia malu etu, bua katukumi mitshima yetu ku malu mabi bu muakakumabo mitshima yabo." 
1Corinthians10:7 Lekelai kuikala batendeledi ba mpingu, bu muakadi bakuabo babo; bu muakafundabo ne, Bantu bakashikama bua kudia ne bua kunua, bakabika bua kunaya." 
1Corinthians10:8 Tulekelai kuenda masandi bu muakenda bakuabo babo, bakafua biabo mbombo ibidi ne binunu bisatu dituku dimue." 
1Corinthians10:9 Tulekelai kuteta Mukelenge bu muakamuteta bakuabo babo, bakashihibua kudi nyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Lekelai kutontolola, bu muakatontolola bakuabo babo, bakashihibua kudi mushihi." 
1Corinthians10:11 Malu â akadi abakuata bu bifuanyikishi, akafundibua bua kutudimusha, kutudi mene kuakufika nshikidilu wa bikondo." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nunku muntu udi wela meshi ne, Ndi muimane, adimuke bua kahonyi biandi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Kakuena diteta diakunukuata didi kadi dikuata muntu yonso; kadi Nzambi udi mua kueyemenyibua, ngudi kai witabusha bua nuenu nutetshibue ne diteta didi dinuhita bukole; kadi halua diteta, yeye neanuenzele nshila wa kuhandukila, bua nuenu mimanye mua kutantamana mu diteta." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nunku, bananga banyi, nyemai kutendelela kua mpingu." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndi ngamba bu mundi ngambila bena meshi, nuenu jingululai bu mundi ngamba." 
1Corinthians10:16 Luhanza lua disanka lutudi tuvuidishila disanka kaluena buobumue buetu mu mashi a Kilisto, anyi? Ne mutanda wa bidia utudi tutshibula kawena buobumue buetu mu mubidi wa Kilisto, anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Bualu bua mutanda wa bidia udi umue, tuetu ba bungi tudi mubidi umue; bualu bua buonso buetu tudi tudisanga ku mutanda umue." 
1Corinthians10:18 Tangilai badi Bena Isalele mu buntu buabo; bantu badi badia milambu ya ha tshioshelu kabena ne buobumue ne tshioshelu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Nunku ndi ngamba tshinyi? Ndi ngamba ne, Tshintu tshidibo bashihela mpingu tshidi ne bualu, anyi luhingu ludi ne bualu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Kadi ndi ngamba ne, Bintu bidi bantu ba bisamba bia bende bashiha bu mulambu badi babishihela bademon, kabena babishihela Nzambi; tshiena musue nuenu nuikale ne buobumue ne bademon." 
1Corinthians10:21 Kanuena mua kunua luhanza lua Mukelenge ne luhanza lua bademon hohamue; kanuena mua kudisanga ku mesa a Mukelenge ne ku mesa a bademon hohamue. 
1Corinthians10:22 Anyi, tudi tufuisha Mukelenge mukau, anyi? Tudi tumutamba bukole, anyi?" 
1Corinthians10:23 Malu onso adi mimpe a kuenza, kadi malu onso kêna atukuatshisha; malu onso adi mimpe a kuenza, kadi malu onso kêna atudiundisha." 
1Corinthians10:24 Muntu kakebi mua kudisankisha, kadi akebe mua kusankisha mukuabo." 
1Corinthians10:25 Tshintu tshionso tshidibo bahana ku tshisalu, nutshidie, kanukonkanganyi dikonka bualu bua muoyo-mukese;" 
1Corinthians10:26 bualu bua buloba mbua Mukelenge ne tshiuwidi tshiabu. 
1Corinthians10:27 Biakulayidila umue wabo udi kai muena ditabusha, ne binuasua kuya, tshintu tshionso tshidibo bateka ku mpala kuenu, nutshidie; kanukonkanganyi dikonka bualu bua muoyo-mukese." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kadi biamu atu bila muntu ne, Tshintu etshi ntshishihela mpingu; kanutshidî, bua bualu buandi wakanumanyisha bualu ebu, ne bua muoyo-mukese kabidi." 
1Corinthians10:29 Tshiena ngamba bua muoyo-mukese webe, kadi bua muoyo-mukese wa mukuabo; bua budishikaminyi buanyi budi bulumbuluishi bua kudi muoyo-mukese wa mukuabo bualu kai?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Bingadia tshintu ne disakidila, badi bampendela bualu kai, bua tshintu tshindi nsakidila nʼatshi Nzambi bualu buatshi?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Nunku binuadia anyi binuanua, anyi malu onso anudi nuenza, nuenze malu onso bua kutumbisha Nzambi." 
1Corinthians10:32 Kanuikadi balenduishi anyi kudi Bena Yuda anyi kudi Bena Gelika anyi kudi ekelesia wa Nzambi; 
1Corinthians10:33 bu mundi nsankisha bantu bonso mu malu onso, tshi ndikebela dikuatshisha dianyi, kadi ndi nkeba dia bantu ba bungi, bua bobo basungidibue." 
1Corinthians11:1 Nuikale bidikishi banyi, bu mundi meme kabidi muidikishi wa Kilisto." 
1Corinthians11:2 Meme ndi nutumbisha bualu bua nudi nunvuluka mu malu onso, ne nudi nulamata bilele bu munakanuheshabi." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kadi ndi musue nuenu numanye ne, Mutu wa mulume yonso udi Kilisto, ne mutu wa mukashi udi mulume, ne mutu wa Kilisto udi Nzambi." 
1Corinthians11:4 Mulume yonso udi utendelela anyi udi wambila bakuabo dî dia Nzambi ne mutu wandi mubuikila, udi uhuekesha butumbi bua mutu wandi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kadi mukashi yonso udi utendelela anyi udi wambila bakuabo dî dia Nzambi ne mutu wandi kawi mubuikila, udi uhuekesha butumbi bua mutu wandi; bualu ebu budi muomumue ne yeye muikale ne mutu wandi mubeya." 
1Corinthians11:6 Bikala mukashi kai ne tshilulu tshibuikila ku mutu, bakose nsuki yandi kabidi; kadi bikala bundu bukuata mukashi bua dikosa anyi dibeya dia nsuki yandi, abuikile tshilulu ku mutu." 
1Corinthians11:7 Bualu bua kembimpe bua mulume mene kubuikila tshilulu ku mutu kuandi, bualu bua yeye udi tshifuanyikishi ne butumbi bua Nzambi; kadi mukashi udi butumbi bua mulume." 
1Corinthians11:8 Bualu bua mulume kakafuma kudi mukashi, kadi mukashi wakafuma kudi mulume;" 
1Corinthians11:9 bua mulume kakafukibua bualu bua mukashi, kadi mukashi wakafukibua bualu bua mulume." 
1Corinthians11:10 Bua bualu ebu budi mukashi nʼabu mbua kuikala ne tshimanyinu tshia bukokeshi ku mutu kuandi, bualu bua banjelo." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kadi mu Mukelenge kamuena mua kuikala bakashi kamui balume, ne kamuena mua kuikala balume kamui bakashi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Bualu bua bu muakafuma mukashi kudi mulume, nunku mulume udi uledibua kudi mukashi; kadi bintu bionso bidi bifuma kudi Nzambi." 
1Corinthians11:13 Nudilumbuluile bualu munda muenu ne, Bidi bimpe bua mukashi atendelele Nzambi kai ne tshilulu tshibuikila ku mutu kuandi, anyi?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Malu nkayau adi munda mua bantu kêna anuyisha ne, Bikala mulume ne nsuki yandi mile, bualu ebu budi bundu kudiye, anyi?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Kadi bikala mukashi ne nsuki yandi mile, ebu mbutumbi kudiye; bua nsuki yakamuhebua bu tshibuikilu." 
1Corinthians11:16 Kadi biasua muntu kutandangana bua buala ebu, katuena ne tshilele tshia nunku, ne ekelesia ya Nzambi kayena nʼatshi kabidi." 
1Corinthians11:17 Hananuambila dî edi, tshiena nutumbisha, bualu bua nudi nudisangisha kambualu bua kuvudisha malu mimpe kadi malu mabi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Bualu bua kumudilu, hanuadisangisha mu ekelesia, ndi ngunvua ne matahuluka adi munkatshi muenu; ndi ngitabusha lumu elu tshituha." 
1Corinthians11:19 Bua bunudi nʼabu mbua kutahuluka mu bisumbu, bua badi bajalama bamueneshibue munkatshi muenu." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nunku hanuadisangisha, kanuena bamanye mua kudia bidia bia Mukelenge;" 
1Corinthians11:21 bualu bua hanuadia, muntu ne muntu udi udianjila kudia bidia biandi ku mpala kua bakuabo; ne mukuabo udi ne nsala, ne mukuabo udi mukuatshike maluvu." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kanuena ne nsubu bua nuenu kudiamu ne bua nuenu kunuamu, anyi? Nudi nuhetula ekelesia wa Nzambi ne nudi basue kufuisha badi kabai ne bia kudia bundu, anyi? Ndi nuambila tshinyi? Nenutumbishe, anyi? Tshiena nutumbisha bua bualu ebu." 
1Corinthians11:23 Bua nakangata kudi Mukelenge bualu bunakanuha ne, Butuku buakamufilabo, Mukelenge Yesu wakamema bidia;" 
1Corinthians11:24 hakasakidileye Nzambi, wakabitshibula, wakamba ne, Ebi bidi mubidi wanyi wakanuhebua bualu buenu; enzai nunku bua kubuluka." 
1Corinthians11:25 Muomumue kabidi, hakashikishabo kudia, yeye wakamema luhanza, wamba ne, Luhanza elu ludi dihungila dihia-dihia dia mu mashi anyi; misangu yonso inualunua, enzai nunku bua kunvuluka." 
1Corinthians11:26 Bua misangu yonso inuadia bidia ebi ne inuanua luhanza elu, nudi nuambila bantu bua lufu lua Mukelenge tô ne halueye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Nunku wadia bidia ebi ne wanua luhanza lua Mukelenge ne budiavi, neahile bua mubidi ne mashi bia Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kadi muntu aditete munda diambedi, nunku adie biandi bidia ebi, anue luhanza elu." 
1Corinthians11:29 Bua wadia bidia ebi ne wanua luhanza elu udi udia dihila, udi unua dihila, bikaleye kai ujingulula mubidi wa Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians11:30 Bua bualu ebu ba bungi ba munkatshi muenu badi batekete, badi ne mabedi, ne bakuabo bakumbana badi balala tulu mu lufu." 
1Corinthians11:31 Bituikala badijingulule munda muetu, kabakadi ne bualu bua kulumbuluisha." 
1Corinthians11:32 Kadi hatulumbuluishabo, tudi tukengeshibua kudi Mukelenge bu bana bandi, bua tuetu katuhishibu hohamue ne ba ha buloba." 
1Corinthians11:33 Nunku, bana betu, hanuadisangisha bua kudia, nuindilangane." 
1Corinthians11:34 Bikala muntu ne nsala, adie biandi kuandi, bua kanudisangishi bua kulumbuluishibua. Ne meme nendongolole malu makuabo hanalua." 
1Corinthians12:1 Bana betu, tshiena musue nuenu nuhange kumanya bualu bua bihedi bia kudi Nyuma." 
1Corinthians12:2 Nudi bamanye ne, Hanuakadi ba mu bisamba bia bende, nuakasesuishibua kudi mpingu ya tumama, bu muakamanyabo mua kunulombola." 
1Corinthians12:3 Nunku ndi numanyisha ne, Kakuena muntu udi wakula mu Nyuma wa Nzambi, udi wamba ne, Yesu udi muedibue mulau; ne kakuena muntu udi mua kuamba ne, Yesu udi Mukelenge, bikaleye kai mu Nyuma Muimpe." 
1Corinthians12:4 Mishindu ya bihedi idiku, kadi Nyuma udi anu muomumue." 
1Corinthians12:5 Mishindu ya midimu idiku kabidi, kadi Mukelenge udi anu muomumue." 
1Corinthians12:6 Mishindu ya bienzelu idiku, kadi Nzambi udi muomumue, udi wenzesha malu onso mu bantu bonso." 
1Corinthians12:7 Kadi muntu ne muntu udi uheshibua dimueneka dia Nyuma bua kukuatshishangana. 
1Corinthians12:8 Bua mukuabo udi uhebua dî dia meshi kudi Nyuma; mukuabo, dî dia lungenyi kudi Nyuma muomumue;" 
1Corinthians12:9 munga muntu udi uhebua ditabusha mu Nyuma muomumue, mukuabo udi uhebua tshihedi tshia kuondaha mabedi mu Nyuma umue;" 
1Corinthians12:10 mukuabo udi uhebua mua kuenza malu a kukema; mukuabo udi uhebua mua kuambila bantu bualu bua Nzambi; mukuabo udi uhebua mua kujingulula nyuma; mukuabo udi uhebua mua kuakula miaku ya bungi; ne mukuabo udi uhebua mua kujinguluila bantu miaku; 
1Corinthians12:11 kadi Nyuma umue muomumue udi wenzesha malu â onso, udi utahuluila muntu ne muntu tshihedi tshiandi bu mudiye musue." 
1Corinthians12:12 Bualu bua bu mudi mubidi umue, ne udi ne bituha bia bungi, ne bituha bionso bia mu mubidi bidi bia bungi kadi bidi mu mubidi umue; nunku mudi Kilisto kabidi." 
1Corinthians12:13 Bualu bua mu Nyuma umue buonso buetu tuakabatijibua mu mubidi umue, ne tudi Bena Yuda anyi Bena Gelika, anyi bahika anyi badishikamine; bakatunuisha Nyuma umue." 
1Corinthians12:14 Bua mubidi kawena tshituha tshimue, kadi udi bituha bia bungi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Biamba dikasa ne, Bualu bua tshiena tshianza, tshiena wa mubidi; bualu ebu kabuena budivuisha ne kadiena dia mubidi." 
1Corinthians12:16 Biamba ditshu ne, Bualu bua tshiena disu, tshiena wa mubidi; bualu ebu kabuena budivuisha ne kadiena dia mubidi." 
1Corinthians12:17 Bikala mubidi mujima anu disu, kunvua kudi hanyi? Bikala mubidi mujima anu kunyua, kununkila kudi hanyi?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kadi katataka Nzambi wakalongolola bituha mu mubidi, tshituha ne tshituha, bu muakasueye." 
1Corinthians12:19 Bu bituha ebi bionso bikale anu tshituha tshimue, mubidi wakadi kuikala kudi kunyi?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Kadi katataka bituha bidi bia bungi, kadi mubidi udi umue." 
1Corinthians12:21 Disu kadiena dimanye mua kuambila tshianza ne, Tshiena nʼebe bualu; ne mutu kabidi kawena mumanye mua kuambila makasa ne, Tshiena nʼenu bualu." 
1Corinthians12:22 Nasha; kadi bituha bia mubidi bidi bimueneka bu bituha bitamba butekete bidi ne bualu bukole; 
1Corinthians12:23 ne bituha bia mubidi bitudi tuela meshi ne, Kabiena bitamba butumbi, tudi tuluatshisha biobio ne butumbi butamba bunene; ne bituha bietu bia mubidi bidi kabi bilengele ku mesu bidi bitamba bulengele;" 
1Corinthians12:24 kadi bituha bietu bidi bilengele kabiena ne bualu. Kadi Nzambi wakasangakasha bituha bia mubidi, wakahesha butumbi butamba bunene kudi tshituha tshiakadi katshi nʼabu," 
1Corinthians12:25 bua mu mubidi kamuikadi ditahuluka, kadi bua bituha biambuluishangane muomumue."
