1Corinthians12:26 Bikala tshituha tshimue ne dikenga, bituha bionso bidi bikenga nʼatshi; ne bikala tshituha tshimue tshitumbishibua, bituha bionso bidi bisanka nʼatshi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nunku nuenu nudi mubidi wa Kilisto, muntu tshituha tshiau, muntu tshituha tshiau." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ne Nzambi wakateka bakuabo mu ekelesia: ba kumudilu bapostolo, bibidi baprofete, bisatu bayishi, hashishe, malu a kukema, ne bihedi bia kuondaha, ne bakuatshishi, ne bakokeshi ba bantu bandi, ne lungenyi lua kuakula miaku ya bungi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Bonso badi bapostolo, anyi? Bonso badi baprofete, anyi? Bonso badi bayishi, anyi? Bonso badi benji ba malu a kukema, anyi?" 
1Corinthians12:30 Bonso badi ne bihedi bia kuondaha, anyi? Bonso badi bakula miaku mikuabo, anyi? Bonso badi bajingulula bantu miaku, anyi?" 
1Corinthians12:31 Nanukilai kusua bihedi bitamba bunene. 
1Corinthians13:1 Biakula ne ndimi ya bantu ne ya banjelo, kadi bingikala tshi ne luse, nakulua bu tshiamu tshia mitaku tshidibo bakuma, anyi bu dikasa didi diakula." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ne bingikala ne tshihedi tshia kuambila bantu dî dia Nzambi, ne binamanya malu onso atshidi masokoka ne lungenyi luonso, ne bingikala ne ditabusha dionso dindi mua kumusha nʼadi mikuna, kadi bingikala tshi ne luse, ndi tshianana." 
1Corinthians13:3 Binahesha bintu bianyi bionso bua kudishabo nʼabi bahele, ne binafila mubidi bua kungoshabo, kadi bingikala tshi ne luse, malu â kena ankuatshisha nasha." 
1Corinthians13:4 Luse ludi lukenga musangu mule, ludi luenzela bakuabo bimpe; luse kaluena ne mukau; luse kaluena lufunafuna, kaluena ludisua;" 
1Corinthians13:5 luse kaluena luenza malu a dikamakama, kaluena ludikebela bintu, kaluena lukuata tshishi lubilu, kaluena lubala malu mabi adibo baluenzela;" 
1Corinthians13:6 kaluena lusanka bua malu mabi, ludi lusanka bua kuikala ne malu a bushua;" 
1Corinthians13:7 ludi tutuala malu onso, ludi luitabusha malu onso, ludi lutekemena malu onso, ludi ludikankamika mu malu onso." 
1Corinthians13:8 Luse kaluena luhanga tshiendelele; kadi bikala mayisha a baprofete adiku, neashike; bikala miaku ya bantu idiku, neihue; bikala lungenyi ludiku, nelushikile." 
1Corinthians13:9 Bua tudi bamanye anu tshituha tshia malu, tudi tuamba anu tshituha tshia mei a Nzambi;" 
1Corinthians13:10 kadi halua dikumbana dia malu onso, malu adi a tshituha neâshikile." 
1Corinthians13:11 Hanakadi muana, nakadi ngakula bu muana, nakadi ngela meshi bu muana, nakadi njingulula malu bu muana; katataka hanakulua muntu mukole, nakulekela malu a buana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Katataka tudi tutangila mu ludimuenu bu dijimbu; kadi dituku diadia netutangilangane mpala ha mpala; katataka ndi mumanye anu tshituha tshia malu; kadi dituku diadia nenmanye malu onso, bu munakamanyibua mu malu onso." 
1Corinthians13:13 Katataka ditabusha ne ditekemena ne luse bidi bishala, busatu buabi; kadi tshidi tshihita buonso buabi hunene nduse." 
1Corinthians14:1 Nulonde luse, nanukilai kukeba bihedi bia Nyuma, kadi nulambe kubikeba bua nuenu mimanye mua kuambila bantu dî dia Nzambi." 
1Corinthians14:2 Bualu bua muntu udi wakula muaku udi bantu kabai bamanye, kena wakula kudi bantu kadi udi wakula kudi Nzambi; bualu bua kakuena muntu udi unvua dî diandi; kadi mu nyuma wandi yeye udi wamba malu atshidi masokoka." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kadi muntu udi wambila bantu dî dia Nzambi udi wakula nʼabo bua kubadiundisha, bua kubasamba, ne bua kubakolesha mitshima." 
1Corinthians14:4 Muntu udi wambila bantu dî mu muaku udibo kabai bamanye udi udidiundisha; kadi muntu udi wambila bantu dî dia Nzambi udi udiundisha ekelesia. 
1Corinthians14:5 Ndi musue buonso buenu numanye mua kuakula miaku, kadi ndi ntamba kusua bua nuenu numanye mua kuambila bantu dî dia Nzambi; muntu udi wambila bantu dî dia Nzambi udi utamba muntu udi ubambila dî mu muaku udibo kabai bamanye, bikaleye kai utujinguluila muaku, bua ekelesia adiundishibue." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kadi bana betu, binalua kunudi ngakula miaku mudi kanui bamanye, nenukuatshishe munyi, bingikala tshî ngakula nʼenu malu adi masokolola, anyi a lungenyi, anyi a mayisha a baprofete, anyi a diyisha?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Kadi bintu bidi kabi ne muoyo ne bidi biakula, nasha lushiba nasha tshisanji, bikala muadi wabi kawi mutahuluke, nebamanye munyi, tshidibo bela anyi tshidibo bimba?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Bua biadila mpungi ne dî didi kadî dijinguluka, muntu kai wadilongolola bua kuluangana?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Nunku nuenu kabidi, binuikala kanui nuakula ne ludimi dî didi diunvuika bimpe, nebamanye dî diudi wakula munyi? Bualu bua nenuele mei mu luhehele." 
1Corinthians14:10 Bumue mishindu ya bungi ya miaku idi ha buloba, ne kakuena umue udi kawi ne dijinguluka." 
1Corinthians14:11 Bingikala tshi mumanye dijingulula dia muaku, nengikale musenshi kudi mualu udi uwakula, ne yeye udi uwakula neikale musenshi kundi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Nunku nuenu kabidi, bualu bua nudi nutamba kunanukila kukeba bihedi bia Nyuma, nukebe mua kukumbanamu bualu bua kudiundisha kua ekelesia." 
1Corinthians14:13 Nunku muntu udi wakula muaku udi bantu kabai bamanye, alombe Nzambi bua yeye amanye mua kubajinguluila muaku." 
1Corinthians14:14 Binatendelela mu muaku undi tshî mumanye, nyuma wanyi udi utendelela, kadi meshi anyi kêna wenza bualu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Nunku ntshinyi? Nentendelele ne nyuma, nentendelele ne meshi kabidi; nengimbe ne nyuma, nengimbe ne meshi kabidi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Anyi, biwatendelela Nzambi anu ne nyuma, muntu udi munkatshi mua badi kabai ne bihedi bia Nyuma udi mumanye mua kuamba ne, Amen, munyi, hawasakidila Nzambi, hadiye kai mumanye dî diudi wamba?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Bua wewe udi usakidila Nzambi bimpe bulelela, kadi mukuabo kena udiundishibua." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi; ndi nutamba buonso buenu kuakula miaku; 
1Corinthians14:19 kadi mu ekelesia ndi ntamba kusua kuakula mei atanu ne meshi anyi, bua kuyisha bakuabo kabidi, ku mpala kua kuakula mei lubombo mu muaku udibo kabai bamanye." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bana betu, lekelai kuikala bana mu meshi enu, kadi nuikale tuana tukese mu malu mabi, nuikale bantu bakole mu meshi enu." 
1Corinthians14:21 Bakafunda mu mikenshi ne, Nengakule ne bantu aba mu miaku ya bende ne ku mishiku ya bantu ba bende; kadi Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Bua malu â mene, kabena bangunvuila." 
1Corinthians14:22 Nunku miaku idi bu tshimanyinu, kenkudi badi bitabusha, kadi kudi badi kabai bena ditabusha; kadi mayisha a baprofete adi bu tshimanyinu, kenkudi badi kabai bena ditabusha, kadi kudi badi bitabusha." 
1Corinthians14:23 Nunku biadisangisha bena ekelesia bonso mu muaba umue, ne biakulabo buonso buabo mu miaku mikuabo, ne biabuela bantu badi kabai bamanye miaku anyi badi kabai bena ditabusha, bobo kabena bamba ne, Badi bahale, anyi?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kadi biamba buonso buabo dî dia Nzambi, ne biabuela muntu udi kai muena ditabusha anyi udi kai mumanye miaku, yeye udi ubedibua kudi buonso buabo, udi ulumbuluishibua kudi buonso buabo;" 
1Corinthians14:25 ne malu adi masokoka mu mutshima wandi neikale masokolola; ne yeye neatue mpala hanshi, neakukuile Nzambi, neambe ne, Nzambi udi munkatshi muabo bulelela." 
1Corinthians14:26 Nunku ntshinyi, bana betu? Hanuadisangisha, muntu ne muntu udi ne musambu, udi ne diyisha, udi ne bualu buakabuluibua kudiye, udi ne muaku udibo kabai bamanye, udi ne kujingulula kua muaku. Malu onso enjibue bua kunudiundisha." 
1Corinthians14:27 Biakula muntu muaku unudi kanui bamanye, bakule nunka kudi babidi, kabahitshi ha basatu, balondangane muntu ne muntu, ne umue wenu abajinguluile muaku" 
1Corinthians14:28 kadi bikalaku kakui mubajinguluidi, muena muaku ahue biandi mu ekelesia, adiakuile munda munda, akule kudi Nzambi kabidi." 
1Corinthians14:29 Baprofete babidi anyi basatu bakule, ne bakuabo bajingulule mei abo." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kadi bikala bualu bubuluibua kudi mukuabo udi ushikamamu, muntu wa kumudilu ahue biandi." 
1Corinthians14:31 Bualu bua buonso buenu nudi bamanye mua kuamba dî dia Nzambi ku muntu ku muntu, bua buonso buenu nuyile, ne bua buonso buenu nusambibue." 
1Corinthians14:32 Nyuma ya baprofete idi ikokeshibua kudi baprofete; 
1Corinthians14:33 bualu bua Nzambi kena Nzambi wa malu mabuelakane, kadi udi Nzambi wa ditalala. Bu mudi bualu mu ekelesia yonso ya basanto," 
1Corinthians14:34 bakashi bahue mu ekelesia; bualu bua kabena bitabusha bua bakashi bakulemu, kadi bikale ku nyima kua balume bu mudi mikenshi yamba." 
1Corinthians14:35 Biasuabo kuyila bualu, bakonke balume babo ku nsubu yabo; bua budi bualu bua bundu bua mukashi kuakula mu ekelesia." 
1Corinthians14:36 Dî dia Nzambi diakafuma kunudi, anyi? Anyi, dî dia Nzambi diakafika kunudi nkayenu, anyi?" 
1Corinthians14:37 Biela muntu meshi ne, Meme ndi muprofete, anyi, Meme ndi muena bihedi bia Nyuma, amanye mei andi nufundila ne, Adi mukenshi wa Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians14:38 Bikala muntu mujibale, ashale biandi mujibale." 
1Corinthians14:39 Nunku, bana betu, nunanukile kukeba tshihedi tshia kuamba kua dî dia Nzambi, ne kanubidi kuakula kua miaku." 
1Corinthians14:40 Kadi malu onso enjibue bilengele, ne alondangane biakane." 
1Corinthians15:1 Bana betu, katataka ndi numanyisha lumu luimpe lunakanuambila, lunuakitabusha kabidi, lunudi nuimanamu kabidi," 
1Corinthians15:2 kudilu kunudi nusungidibua binuananukila kulonda dî dinakanuambila, binuikala kanui bitabushe hatuhu." 
1Corinthians15:3 Bua nakafila kunudi ku mpala kua malu onso bualu bunakangata kabidi ne, Kilisto wakafuila bua malu mabi etu, bu mudi Mukanda wa Nzambi wamba;" 
1Corinthians15:4 wakajikibua, wakubishibua ku lufu hakahita matuku asatu, bu mudi Mukanda wa Nzambi wamba;" 
1Corinthians15:5 wakamueneka kudi Kefa, ne ku nyima kudi bapostolo dikumi ne babidi;" 
1Corinthians15:6 hashishe, wakamueneka kudi bantu batambe nkama itanu tshikondo tshimue; bakuabo babo ba bungi batshidi ne muoyo tô ne katataka, kadi bakuabo babo bakalala tulu mu lufu;" 
1Corinthians15:7 hashishe, wakamueneka kudi Yakobo, hashishe, kudi bapostolo bonso;" 
1Corinthians15:8 ne kunshikidilu kua bonso wakamueneka kundi, meme muana wa kabishi." 
1Corinthians15:9 Bualu bua meme ndi muntu mutambe kuhuekela munkatshi mua bapostolo, udi tshi ne buimpe bua kumbikilabo mupostolo, bualu bua nakakengesha ekelesia wa Nzambi." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kadi bualu bua ngasa wa Nzambi ndi bu mundi emu; ne ngasa wandi kundi kakalua hatuhu, bualu bua meme nakatamba buonso buabo kuenza mudimu; kadi kememe nkayanyi, kadi ngasa wa Nzambi wakadi nʼanyi." 
1Corinthians15:11 Nunku ne meme ne bobo, mbu mutudi tuamba dî dia Nzambi, ne mbu munuakitabusha." 
1Corinthians15:12 Bianuambilabo bualu bua Kilisto ne, Yeye wakabishibua ku bafue, munyi mudi bakuabo ba munkatshi muenu bamba ne, Kakuena dibika dia bafue?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Bikalaku kakui dibika dia bafue, Kilisto kena muanze kubishibua kabidi;" 
1Corinthians15:14 ne bikala Kilisto kai muanze kubishibua ku bafue, nunku kuamba kuetu kua dî dia Nzambi kudi hatuhu, ne ditabusha dienu didi hatuhu kabidi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Badi batusangana kabidi bamanyishi ba bualu bua Nzambi badi ne mashimi, bualu bua tuakamanyisha bua Nzambi ne, Wakabisha Kilisto ku bafue, udiye kai mubishe ka bafue, bikala bantu bafue kabai babishibue ku lufu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Bikala bantu bafue kabai babishibue ku lufu, Kilisto kena muanze kubishibua ku bafue;" 
1Corinthians15:17 ne bikala Kilisto kai mubishibue ku bafue, ditabusha dienu didi hatuhu, ne nutshidi mu malu mabi enu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ne bantu aba kabidi bakamana kulala tulu mu Kilisto bakajimina. 
1Corinthians15:19 Bituikala batekemene Kilisto anu mu muoyo eu nkayau, tudi tutamba bantu bonso kukengela luse." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kadi katataka Kilisto wakumana kubishibua ku bafue, bu mamuma a kukuama diambedi a bantu bakulala tulu mu lufu." 
1Corinthians15:21 Bualu bua lufu luakalua bualu bua muntu, nunku dibika dia bantu bafue diakalua bua muntu kabidi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Bua bu mudi bonso bafua mu Adama, nunku mu Kilisto kabidi bonso nebavuishibue muoyo." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kadi muntu ne muntu nebabike mu mulongo wandi: Kilisto, mamuma a kukuama diambedi; ne hashishe, bantu ba Kilisto nebabike halueye." 
1Corinthians15:24 Hashishe, kunshikidilu kulualua, hafileye bukelenge kudi Nzambi, Tatu mene, hajimisheye makelenge onso makuabo ne bukokeshi buonso ne bukole." 
1Corinthians15:25 Budiye nʼabu mbua kukokesha tô ne hatekeye bena lukuna nʼandi bonso munshi mua makasa andi. 
1Corinthians15:26 Muena lukuna wa kunshikidilu udiye ujimisha ndufu. 
1Corinthians15:27 Bualu bua yeye wakateka bintu bionso munshi mua makasa andi. Kadi hambeye ne, Bintu bionso biakukokeshibua munshi muandi, tudi bamanye ne, Yeye kena wamba bua Tatu wakamulekela bintu bionso munshi muandi." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ne hatekabo bintu bionso munshi muandi, hashishe, Muana muine kabidi neatekibue munshi mua Tatu wakateka bintu bionso munshi muandi, bua Nzambi kuikala ku mutu kua bionso ne mu bintu bionso." 
1Corinthians15:29 Bikala bualu ebu kabui bulelela, badi babatijibua bua bantu bafue nebenze tshinyi? Bikala bantu bafue kabai babishibua ku lufu, badi babatijibua bualu buabo bua tshinyi?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ne tuetu kabidi tudi tuamba kufua diba dionso bua tshinyi? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ndi nditshiha, bana betu, kudi butumbi buadi nʼabu kunudi mu Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu ne, Ndi munangile ku lufu ku dituku ne ku dituku." 
1Corinthians15:32 Bingikala muluangane ne nyama ku Efeso bu mudi tshilele tshia bantu, bualu ebu budi bunkuatshisha munyi? Bikala bantu bafue kabai babishibua ku lufu, tudie bietu, tunue bietu, bualu bua makelela tufuafua." 
1Corinthians15:33 Kanudingibu; malunda mabi adi anyanga malu makane a bantu. 
1Corinthians15:34 Nutabale biakane, nulekele kuenza malu mabi; bualu bua bakuabo kabena bamanye Nzambi. Ndi ngamba nuaku bua kunufuisha bundu." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kadi mukuabo neakonke ne, Bantu bafue nebabike ku lufu munyi? Nebalue ne mibidi kai?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Wewe, muhange meshi, bintu biudi ukuna biebe kabiena bitoloka ne muoyo bikalabi kabi bifue;" 
1Corinthians15:37 ne bintu biudi ukuna kuena ukuna mubidi udi uhuola, kadi anu maminu nkayau, nasha a blé nasha a mushindu mukuabo;" 
1Corinthians15:38 kadi Nzambi udi uha maminu onso mubidi bu mudiye musue, ne udi uha diminu ne diminu mubidi wadi." 
1Corinthians15:39 Munyinyi wonso kawena muomumue nasha; kadi munyinyi wa bantu udiku, ne munyinyi mukuabo wa nyama, ne munyinyi mukuabo wa nyunyu, ne munyinyi mukuabo wa mishiha." 
1Corinthians15:40 Mibidi ya bintu bia mu diulu idiku ne mibidi ya bintu bia ha buloba; kadi butumbi bua mibidi ya mu diulu budi ha buabu, ne butumbi bua mibidi ya bia ha buloba budi ha buabu." 
1Corinthians15:41 Bunga butumbi mbua diba, ne bunga butumbi mbua ngondo, bunga butumbi mbua mitoto, bua munga mutoto udi utahuluka kudi munga mutoto mu butumbi buau." 
1Corinthians15:42 Dibika dia bantu bafue didi nunku kabidi. Mubidi udi ukunyibua mubole, udi ubishibua kawi mubole;" 
1Corinthians15:43 udi ukunyibua kawi ne butumbi, udi ubishibua ne butumbi; udi ukunyibua ne butekete, udi ubishibua ne bukole;" 
1Corinthians15:44 udi ukunyibua mubidi wa bantu, udi ubishibua mubidi wa nyuma. Bikalaku mubidi wa bantu, mubidi wa nyuma udiku kabidi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Bu muakafundabo ne, Muntu wa kumudilu, Adama, wakalua musûke udi ne muoyo. Ne Adama wa kunshikidilu wakalua nyuma udi uhesha bantu muoyo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Kadi bintu bia nyuma kabiena bia kumudilu, anu bintu bia mubidi; hashishe, bintu bia nyuma bidi bilonda." 
1Corinthians15:47 Muntu wa kumudilu udi mufukibue ne dinfuenkenya dia buloba; muntu muibidi udi muntu wa mu diulu. 
1Corinthians15:48 Bu mudi wakafukibua ne dinfuenkenya, nunku kabidi mudi bobo badi bafukibua ne dinfuenkenya; ne bu mudi wa mu diulu, nunku kabidi mudi bobo badi ba mu diulu." 
1Corinthians15:49 Bu mutuakatuala tshifuanyikishi tshia wakafukibua ne dinfuenkenya, neatuale kabidi tshifuanyikishi tshia wa mu diulu." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ndi ngamba bualu ebu, bana betu, ne, Munyinyi ne mashi kabiena bimanye mua kuhiana bukelenge bua Nzambi. Ne bintu bidi bibole kabiena bihiana bintu bidi kabi bibole." 
1Corinthians15:51 Monai, ndi nuambila bualu busokoka: Buonso buetu katuena tulala tulu mu lufu, kadi buonso buetu netuandamuke," 
1Corinthians15:52 mu diba dikese, mu kuvinya kua disu, helabo mpungi wa kunshikidilu; bualu bua nebele mpungi ne bantu bafue nebabike ne mibidi idi kayi mibole, ne tuetu netuandamuke." 
1Corinthians15:53 Bualu bua mubidi eu mubole udi ne bualu bua kuluata udi kawi mubole, ne mubidi eu udi ufua udi ne bualu bua kuluata udi kawi ufua tshiendelele." 
1Corinthians15:54 Hamana mubidi eu mubole kuluata udi kawi mubole, ne hamana mubidi eu udi ufua kuluata udi kawi ufua tshiendelele, hashishe, dî diakafundabo nedishike ne, Lufu luakaminyibua mu kulutamba kua Kilisto." 
1Corinthians15:55 Lufu, kutamba kuebe kudi hanyi? Lufu, kalonda kebe kadi hanyi?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Kalonda ka lufu kadi bubi, ne bukole bua bubi budi mikenshi;" 
1Corinthians15:57 kadi tuasakidila kudi Nzambi, udi utuha kutamba kua lufu bualu bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
1Corinthians15:58 Nunku, bana betu bananga, nuikale bakole, nutantamane, nukumbashe mudimu wa Mukelenge misangu yonso, bualu bua nudi bamanye ne, Mudimu unudi nuenza mu Mukelenge kawena hatuhu." 
1Corinthians16:1 Bualu bua disangisha dia bintu bia kufila kudi basanto, bu munakela di kudi ekelesia wa mu Galatia, enzai bienu muomumue kabidi." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ku dituku dia kumudilu dia Lumingu ne Lumingu, muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muenu adibutshile bintu, bu muakabiheteye, bua kakuikadi masangisha a bintu hanalua." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ne hanafika, nentume bantu banuakajadika ne mikanda yenu, bua kuyabo ne bintu bienu bia luse ku Yelushalema;" 
1Corinthians16:4 ne hikala bualu bunkumbana bua meme kuya kabidi, bobo nebaye nʼanyi." 
1Corinthians16:5 Nendue kunudi hanahitshila mu Makedonia; bualu bua nempitshile mu Makedonia; 
1Corinthians16:6 kadi bumue nenshikame nʼenu musangu, anyi tshidimu tshia mashika tshijima mene, bua nuenu kuntuma ku luendu kunaya." 
1Corinthians16:7 Bua tshiena musue kunutangila katataka mu dihita dianyi dia mu nshila, bua ndi ntekemena bua kushala nʼenu musangu, bitabusha Mukelenge." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kadi nenshale ku Efeso tô ne ku dituku dia Pentekoste; 
1Corinthians16:9 bua bakumana kungunzuluila tshibi tshinene ne tshia kuenza mudimu mukole, ne bahumbishi ba bungi badiku." 
1Corinthians16:10 Bialua Timote kunudi, nuamanya bua yeye kuikala nʼenu kai ne ditshina, bualu bua yeye udi wenzela Mukelenge mudimu bu mundi ngenza;" 
1Corinthians16:11 nunku muntu kamuhetudi nasha. Kadi numutume ku luendu luandi talala, bua yeye alue kundi; bualu bua meme ndi mutekemena ne bana betu bakuabo ba mu Kilisto." 
1Corinthians16:12 Bualu bua Apolo, muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto, nakamusengelela tô bua yeye alue kunudi ne bana betu bakuabo ba mu Kilisto; ne yeye kakasua kulua katataka, nasha kakese; kadi yeye nealue kunudi haheteye tshikondo." 
1Corinthians16:13 Nutabale, nutantamane mu ditabusha, nuikale balume mene, nukuatshibue bikole." 
1Corinthians16:14 Malu enu onso enjibue mu luse. 
1Corinthians16:15 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela (nudi bamanye ba mu nsubu wa Stefana ne badi bu mamuma a kukuama diambedi mu Akaya, ne bakadifila bua kukuatshila basanto mudimu)" 
1Corinthians16:16 bua nuenu nuditeke munshi mua bantu ba nunku, ne munshi mua muntu yonso udi ukuatsihahangana nʼetu ne udi wenza mudimu wa Nzambi." 
1Corinthians16:17 Nakasanka kabidi bua difika dia Stefana ne Fôtunato ne Akaiko; bualu bua bobo bakakumbasha malu anuakahanga. 
1Corinthians16:18 Bualu bua bobo bakakankamisha nyuma wanyi ne nyuma yenu kabidi; nunku nuitabushe bantu ba nunku. 
1Corinthians16:19 Bena ekelesia ba mu Asia badi banutumina muoyo. Akula ne Pisikila ne bena ekelesia ba mu nsubu wabo badi banutumina muoyo wa bungi mu Mukelenge. 
1Corinthians16:20 Bana betu bonso ba mu Kilisto badi banutumina muoyo. Nuelangane muoyo ne dituangana dia mishiku dia tshijila. 
1Corinthians16:21 Meme Paulo, udi nutumina muoyo, mufunde ne tshianza tshianyi." 
1Corinthians16:22 Bikala muntu kai musue Mukelenge, edibue biandi mulau. Mukelenge alue biandi." 
1Corinthians16:23 Ngasa wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ikale nʼenu. 
1Corinthians16:24 Dinanga dianyi dikale ne buonso buenu mu Kilisto Yesu. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Paulo, mupostolo wa Kilisto Yesu, bua disua dia Nzambi, ne Timote, muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto, tudi tufunda mei kudi bena ekelesia wa Nzambi ba mu Kolinto ne kudi basanto bonso ba mu buloba buonso bua Akaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
2Corinthians1:3 Nzambi Tatu wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, Tatu wa luse ne Nzambi wa busambi buonso, atumbishibue;" 
2Corinthians1:4 utu watusamba mu makenga etu onso, bua tuetu tumanye mua kusamba bakuabo mu makenga abo onso ne busambi butudi tusambibua kudi Nzambi." 
2Corinthians1:5 Bu mudi makenga a Kilisto akumbana kutudi, nunku bua Kilisto busambi buetu budi bukumbana kabidi." 
2Corinthians1:6 Bituakengeshibua, bualu ebu mbua busambi buenu ne luhandu luenu; anyi bituasambibua, bualu ebu mbua busambi buenu budi bunuenzesha mu dikankamana dia mu makenga momumue atudi tukenga nʼau." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ne ditekemena dietu bua bualu buenu didi dijalama; bua tudi bamanye ne, Bu munudi babanyanganyi nʼetu ba makenga, nunku nudi babanyanganyi nʼetu ba busambi kabidi." 
2Corinthians1:8 Bana betu, katuena basue nuenu nuhange kumanya bua makenga akatukuata mu Asia, bu muakatamba bujitu kutunemena, buhita bukole buetu, tô ne hatuakamanya ne. Netufue;" 
2Corinthians1:9 kadi tuetu tuakadi ne dihila dia lufu hamʼbidi hetu bua tuetu katuditekemenyi, kadi bua tuetu tutekemene Nzambi udi ubisha bafue;" 
2Corinthians1:10 wakatusungila ku lufu lunene nunku, neatusungileku kabidi; utudi tueyemena mu ditekemena dietu ne, Yeye neatusungile kabidi;" 
2Corinthians1:11 nuenu kabidi nudi nukuatshishangana bua bualu buetu ne disengelela dienu, bua bantu ha bungi basakidile Nzambi bua bualu buetu, bua kuha kuakatuhabo ku kutendelela kua bantu ba bungi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Bualu bua ditumba dietu didi bualu ebu, tshimanyishilu tshia muoyo-mukese wetu ne, Tuetu tuakenda munkatshi mua ba ha buloba ne bienzedi bia tshijila ne bia hatoke bia Nzambi, kemu meshi a bantu kadi mu ngasa wa Nzambi, ne tuakatamba kuenda nunku munkatshi muenu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Katuena tunufundila malu makuabo anu malu anudi mibala ne anudi bamanye mene; ndi musue nuenu mimanye malu au tô ne kunshikidilu; 
2Corinthians1:14 bu munuakatumanya tshituha ne, Tuetu tudi butumbi buenu, bu munudi butumbi buetu, mu dituku dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ne mu ditekemena edi nakasua kulua kunudi diambedi bua nuenu kuikala ne ngasa tshiakabidi; 
2Corinthians1:16 nakasua kuhitshila munkatshi muenu ku Makedonia, ne kuhingana kunudi ku Makedonia kabidi, bua nuenu kuntuma ku mpala mu luendu luanyi lua ku Yudaya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Hanakadi ngelangana meshi nunku, nakadi ne kutatakana, anyi? Malu andi musue kuenza, ndi musue anu bu ba ha buloba, badi bamba ne, E, E, ne Nasha, Nasha, anyi?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Bu mudi Nzambi mua kueyemenyibua, dî dietu kunudi kadiena E ne Nasha." 
2Corinthians1:19 Bualu bua Muana wa Nzambi, Yesu Kilisto, wakanuambidibua munkatshi muenu kutudi, kudi meme ne Siluano ne Timote, kakadi ne E ne Nasha; kadi munda muandi mudi anu E." 
2Corinthians1:20 Bualu bua bu mudi bungi bua milayi ya Nzambi, munda muandi mudi anu E; nunku kabidi bua bualu buandi kudi Amen, bua Nzambi atumbishibue bua bualu buetu." 
2Corinthians1:21 Wakatujadika nʼenu mu Kilisto, wakatuela manyi ha mutu, nNzambi;" 
2Corinthians1:22 wakatutekela tshimanyishilu tshiandi ne wakatuha tshieya tshia Nyuma Muimpe mu mitshima yetu kabidi. 
2Corinthians1:23 Ndi mbikila Nzambi bu mumanyi wa bualu ne mutshima wanyi ne, Nakahidia mua kulua ku Kolinto bua kunusungila ku ditandangana dietu." 
2Corinthians1:24 Kembua tudi ne bukokeshi ku ditabusha dienu, kadi tudi bakuatshishanganyi nʼenu mu disanka dienu; bualu bua nudi nujalama mu ditabusha." 
2Corinthians2:1 Kadi nakadisunguila bualu ebu munda muanyi bua meme tshilu kunudi kabidi ne kanyinganyinga. 
2Corinthians2:2 Bua binanyingalasha mitshima yenu, muntu kai udi unsankisha, anu muntu udi ne mutshima wandi munyingalashibue kundi?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Nakanufundila bualu ebu mene bua meme, hanalua, tshikadi ne kanyinganyinga kudi bantu bandi ne bua kuikala ne disanka kudibo; ndi ne ditekemena kunudi bonso ne, Disanka dianyi didi dia buonso buenu." 
2Corinthians2:4 Nakanufundila ne kanyinganyinga ka bungi ne mutshima munemu bujitu bua bungi ne binsonshi bia bungi ku mesu; kembua mitshima yenu inyingalashibue, kadi bua nuenu mimanye dinanga dindi ntamba kukumbasha kunudi." 
2Corinthians2:5 Kadi bikala muntu mumane kunyingalasha mitshima, yeye kakanyingalasha mutshima wanyi (tshiena musue kutamba kukolesha bualu), kadi wakanyingalasha mitshima ya buonso buenu tshituha." 
2Corinthians2:6 Dikenga diakangateye kudi bungi buenu didi dikumbana kudi muntu wa nunku; 
2Corinthians2:7 kadi nudi ne bualu bua kumulekelela bubi buandi ne kumusamba, bua bumue muntu wa nunku katambi bu ku kanyinganyinga kakole." 
2Corinthians2:8 Nunku ndi nusengelela bua nuenu nûjadike luse luenu kudiye. 
2Corinthians2:9 Bua bualu ebu kabidi nakunufundila bua meme kumanya bu mudi dijadikibua dienu, ne nudi ne ditumikila mu malu onso, anyi?" 
2Corinthians2:10 Kadi kudi muntu unudi nulekelela bualu buonso, meme nemulekelelebu kabidi; bua bualu bunakunulekelela kabidi, bingikala munulekelele bualu buonso, nakunulekelelabu bua bualu buenu ku mesu kua Kilisto;" 
2Corinthians2:11 bua Satana kikadi ne muaba wa kutuhitshila budimu; bualu bua tuetu katuena tuhanga kumanya madimu andi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Hanakalua ku Toa bualu bua lumu luimpe lua Kilisto ne hakadi tshibi tshinene tshingunzuluila mu Mukelenge; 
2Corinthians2:13 tshiakadi ne dikisha mu mutshima wanyi, bualu bua tshiakasangana Tito, muanʼetu wa ma Kilisto; kadi nakalayangana nʼabo, nakaya ku Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kadi tuasakidila kudi Nzambi udi utulombola misangu yonso bu bantu batambibue mu Kilisto, udi ununkishila dihembu dia lungenyi luandi mu bianza bietu ku miaba yonso." 
2Corinthians2:15 Bualu bua tudi bu dihembu dimpe dia Kilisto mu Nzambi kudi bantu badi basungidibua ne kudi bantu badi bajimishibua; 
2Corinthians2:16 kudi bakuabo tudi bu dihembu dia lufu ku lufu, ne kudi bakuabo tudi bu dihembu dia muoyo ku muoyo. Muntu kai udi ukumbana malu â?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Bualu bua tuetu katuena bu ba bungi badi banyanga dî dia Nzambi! kadi mu Kilisto tudi tuamba dî ne mitshima mitoke bu mutudi ba kudi Nzambi ne ku mesu kua Nzambi. 
2Corinthians3:1 Tudi tubanga tshiakabidi kuditumbisha, anyi? Tuetu tudi ne bualu, bu mudi bakuabo benza, bua kulua ne mikanda ya kudimanyisha nʼai kunudi, anyi? Anyi tudi ne bualu bua kunulomba mikanda ya kudimanyisha nʼai kudi bakuabo, anyi?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Nuenu nudi mukanda wetu, mufundibue mu mitshima yetu, mumanyibue ne mubadibue kudi bantu bonso;" 
2Corinthians3:3 budi bumueneshibua ne, Nuenu nudi mukanda wa Kilisto, muenjibue kutudi, wakafundibua kene mai a mikanda, kadi ne Nyuma wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo; kempa mabue, kadi mu mitshima ya bantu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Edi nditekemena ditudi nʼadi kudi Nzambi bualu bua Kilisto; 
2Corinthians3:5 kembua tuetu tudi tukumbana nkayetu bua kudibadila bualu bu mudibu bufuma kutudi, kadi dikumbana dietu didi difuma kudi Nzambi;" 
2Corinthians3:6 yeye wakatukumbasha kabidi bu bena mudimu ba dihungila dihia-dihia; kendia maleta a mikenshi mafunda, kadi dia nyuma: bualu bua maleta mafunda adi avuisha lufu, kadi nyuma udi uvuisha muoyo." 
2Corinthians3:7 Kadi bikala mudimu wa lufu muenjibue ne maleta mafundibue ha mabue wakalua ne butumbi, ne bua nunku Bena Isalele kabakamanya mua kutangilatangila mpala wa Mose bualu bua butumbi bua mpala wandi, butumbi abu buakadi bujiminajimina;" 
2Corinthians3:8 mudimu wa nyuma kawena utamba kuikala ne butumbi, anyi?" 
2Corinthians3:9 Bualu bua bikala mudimu wa kuhisha bantu ne butumbi, mudimu wa kuvuisha buakane udi utamba butumbi." 
2Corinthians3:10 Bua bulelela, bualu buakavuishibua butumbi diambedi kabuena buvuishibua butumbi nunku katataka, bualu bua butumbi budi butamba budiku." 
2Corinthians3:11 Bualu bua bikala bualu budi bujiminajimina ne butumbi, bualu budi bushala budi butamba butumbi." 
2Corinthians3:12 Bualu bua tudi ne ditekemena dia nunku, tudi tuamba dî dietu ne dikima dikole;" 
2Corinthians3:13 ne katuena bu Mose wakateka tshilulu tshikudika ha mpala wandi bua Bena Isalele kabatangidi kunshikidilu kua butumbi buakadi bujiminajimina; 
2Corinthians3:14 kadi meshi abo akakoleshibua, bualu bua tô ne ku dituku edi, habalabo dihungila dikulukulu, tshilulu tshikudika tshiotshimue tshitshidi tshishala, bualu ebu kabuena buanze kubuluibua kudibo ne, Tshidi tshiumushibua mu Kilisto." 
2Corinthians3:15 Kadi tô ne ku dituku edi habalabo mei a Mose, tshilulu tshikudika tshidi tshilala ku mitshima yabo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kadi biakudimuka mitshima yabo kudi Mukelenge, tshilulu tshikudika tshidi tshiumushibua." 
2Corinthians3:17 Mukelenge udi Nyuma, ne hadi Nyuma wa Mukelenge hadi budishikaminyi." 
2Corinthians3:18 Kadi buonso buetu, katui ne tshilulu tshikudika ha mpala, tudi tutangila bu mu ludimuenu butumbi bua Mukelenge, tudi tuandamushibua mu tshifuanyikishi tshiotshimue ku butumbi ne ku butumbi; bu mudi kudi Mukelenge Nyuma." 
2Corinthians4:1 Bua bualu ebu tuetu tudi ne mudimu eu, bu mutuakaheta luse, katuena tuhanga;" 
2Corinthians4:2 kadi tuakahidia malu masokome a bundu, katuena tuendakana ne budimu, katuena tudinga bantu ne dî dia Nzambi, kadi tudi tudianyisha ku dimuenesha dia bushua ku muoyo-mukese wa muntu yonso ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
2Corinthians4:3 Bikala lumu luimpe luetu ne tshilulu tshikudika, ludi nʼatshi anu kudi batshidi bajimina;" 
2Corinthians4:4 bakafofomishabo mesu a meshi a badi kabai bitabusha kudi nzambi wa tshikondo etshi, bua dinkenka dia lumu luimpe lua butumbi bua Kilisto, udi tshifuanyikishi tshia Nzambi, kaditemi kudibo." 
2Corinthians4:5 Bualu bua katuena tudiamba, kadi tudi tuamba Kilisto Yesu bu Mukelenge; ne tuetu bu bahika benu bualu bua Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Bualu bua Nzambi nguakamba ne, Munya neuteme mu mîdima; yeye wakatema mu mitshima yetu bua kutuha dinkenka dia lungenyi lua butumbi bua Nzambi ha mpala ha Yesu Kilisto." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kadi tudi ne bualu ebu bua mushinga mukole mu bintu biakafumbabo ne buloba, bua bulengele butambe bua bukole buikale bua Nzambi, kabufumi kutudi;" 
2Corinthians4:8 bakatutshintshimika ku nseke yonso, kadi katuena mu muaba mubumbakane; tudi tulubakana, kadi katuena banze kuteketa;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tuakuihatshibua, kadi katuena tulekedibua ha nkayetu; tuakukumibua hanshi, kadi katuena tushihibua;" 
2Corinthians4:10 misangu yonso tudi tutuala dishihibua dia Yesu mu mibidi yetu, bua muoyo wa Yesu umueneshibue kabidi mu mibidi yetu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Bualu bua tuetu badi ne muoyo tudi tufidibua ku lufu misangu yonso bualu bua Yesu, bua muoyo wa Yesu kabidi umueneshibue mu mibidi yetu ifuafua." 
2Corinthians4:12 Nunku lufu ludi luenzesha munda muetu, kadi muoyo udi wenzesha munda muenu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Kadi bualu bua tudi ne nyuma muomumue wa ditabusha bu mudi dî difundibue ne, Nakitabusha, nunku nakakula; tuetu tudi tuitabusha kabidi, nunku tudi tuakula kabidi:" 
2Corinthians4:14 tudi bamanye ne, Wakabisha Mukelenge Yesu ku lufu neatubishe kabidi ne Yesu, neatumueneshe nʼenu ka mesu kuandi." 
2Corinthians4:15 Bua malu onso adi bua bualu buenu, bua ngasa, udi uvulangana kudi badi batamba bungi, akumbashe disakidila ku butumbi bua Nzambi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Nunku katuena tuhanga; kadi bikala mibidi yetu ifuafua ifuafua, mioyo yetu idi ivuishibua mihia-mihia ku dituku ku dituku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Bualu bua dikenga dietu dikese dia tshituha tshihi didi ditamba kutuenzeshela bujitu bua butumbi bua tshiendelele musangu ne musangu; 
2Corinthians4:18 hatudi katui tutangila bintu bidi bimueneka ku mesu, kadi tudi tutangila bintu bidi kabi bimueneka ku mesu; bualu bua bintu bidi bimueneka ku mesu bidi bia tshituha tshihi, kadi bintu bidi kabi bimueneka ku mesu bidi bia tshiendelele." 
2Corinthians5:1 Tudi bamanye ne, Bikala nsubu wa ha buloba wa mubidi wetu muhuke, tudi ne nsubu mufume kudi Nzambi, nsubu udi kai muasa ne bianza, udi mu diulu tshiendelele." 
2Corinthians5:2 Bulelela, mu nsubu eu tudi tufua mikemu, bualu bua tudi tujinga bua kuluatshishibua ne nsubu wetu udi ufuma mu diulu;" 
2Corinthians5:3 nunku kabidi, bitualuatshishibua, kabena batusangana butaka." 
2Corinthians5:4 Bulelela, tuetu badi mu nsubu eu tudi tufua mikemu banemena kudi bujitu; kembua tudi basue kuvula bintu bitudi tuluata, kadi tudi basue kuluatshishibua, bua tshidi ne bua kufua tshiminyibue kudi muoyo." 
2Corinthians5:5 Nguakatuenza bua bualu ebu mene nNzambi, wakatuha kabidi tshieya tshia Nyuma." 
2Corinthians5:6 Nunku bualu bua tudi ne dikima misangu yonso ne bualu bua tudi bamanye ne, Hatuikala kunu mu mubidi, katuena tuikala kua Mukelenge" 
2Corinthians5:7 (bualu bua tudi tuenda bua ditabusha, kembua bintu bidi bimueneka ku mesu);" 
2Corinthians5:8 bua malu â tudi ne dikima, mundi ngamba, ne tudi tutamba kusua kumuka ku mubidi bua kuikala kua Mukelenge." 
2Corinthians5:9 Nunku bualu butudi tukeba kabidi ne, Bituikala mu mubidi anyi katui mu mubidi, mbua kumusankisha." 
2Corinthians5:10 Bualu bua butudi nʼabu mbua kumueneshibua buonso buetu ku mpala kua tshilumbuluidi tshia Kilisto, bua muntu ne muntu kuangateye bintu bia mu mubidi wandi bu muakenzenzeye, nasha malu mimpe nasha malu mabi." 
2Corinthians5:11 Bualu bua tuetu tudi bamanye ditshina dia Mukelenge, tudi tuitabushisha bantu; kadi tudi tumueneshibua ku mpala kua Nzambi, ne ndi ntekemena ne, Tudi tumueneshibua ku muoyo-mukese wenu kabidi." 
2Corinthians5:12 Katuena tudimanyisha kunudi tshiakabidi, kadi tudi tunuha bua kuditumbisha nʼabu bua bualu buetu, bua nuenu numanye mua kuitaba kudi bantu badi batumba mu malu adi amueneka ku mesu, kenga mu mutshima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Bituikala ne meshi matshimbakane, budi bua Nzambi; anyi bituikala ne mitshima mihole, budi bua bualu buenu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Bualu bua dinanga dia Kilisto didi dituenzesha; bua tuakujingulula bualu ebu ne, Bualu bua umue wakafuila bonso, nunku bonso bakafua;" 
2Corinthians5:15 ne yeye wakafuila bonso bua badi ne muoyo kabikadi nʼau bua bualu buabo nkayabo, kadi bikale nʼau kudi yeye wakafua ne wakabika ku lufu kabidi bua bualu buabo." 
2Corinthians5:16 Nunku mu malu atshidi ku mpala katuena bamanye bantu ku mibidi yabo; bituamana kumanya Kilisto ku mubidi wandi diambedi, katataka katuena bamumanye nunku kabidi." 
2Corinthians5:17 Nunku bikala muntu mu Kilisto, yeye udi mufukibue muhia-muhia; malu makulukulu akaya, monai, akalua mahia-mahia." 
2Corinthians5:18 Kadi malu onso adi afuma kudi Nzambi, wakatulengesha kudiye bualu bua Kilisto wakatuha mudimu wa kulengeshisha bakuabo kudiye:" 
2Corinthians5:19 ne. Nzambi munda mua Kilisto wakadi ulengesha ba ha buloba kudiye, kakababadila malu mabi abo, ne wakateka munda muetu dî dia kulengeshisha bakuabo kudiye." 
2Corinthians5:20 Nunku tudi miloho bua bualu bua Kilisto, bu mudi Nzambi munusengelele ne dî dietu, nunku tuetu tudi tunusengelela bua bualu bua Kilisto ne, Nulengeshibue ne Nzambi." 
2Corinthians5:21 Yeye nguakadi kai mumanye bubi, Nzambi wakamuvuisha bubi bua bualu buetu; bua tuetu tuikale buakane bua Nzambi munda muandi." 
2Corinthians6:1 Tuetu, benji ba mudimu ne Nzambi, tudi tunusengelela kabidi ne, Kanuangatshi ngasa wa Nzambi bu bualu bua hatuhu;" 
2Corinthians6:2 bua yeye udi wamba ne, Nakakunvuila mu tshikondo tshimpe, Mu dituku dia luhandu nakakukuatshisha; monai, katataka ntshikondo tshimpe, monai, katataka ndituku dia luhandu." 
2Corinthians6:3 Katuena tulenduisha muntu mu bualu, bua mudimu wetu kaubandibu." 
2Corinthians6:4 Kadi mu malu onso tudi tudimanyisha bu bena mudimu ba Nzambi, mu ditantamana dia bungi, ne mu makenga, ne mu malu adi atukolela, ne mu tunyinganyinga;" 
2Corinthians6:5 ne mu mibundabunda, ne mu nsubu ya lukanu, ne mu mayoyo, ne mu midimu mikole, ne mu kutentekela, ne mu kujila kua bia kudia;" 
2Corinthians6:6 ne mu butoke bua mitshima, ne mu lungenyi, ne mu lutulu, ne mu luse, ne mu Nyuma Muimpe, ne mu dinanga didi kadi ne lubombo;" 
2Corinthians6:7 ne mu dî dia bushua, ne mu bukole bua Nzambi; ne ku bintu bia nvita bia buakane bikuata ku tshianza tshia balume ne ku tshianza tshia bakashi," 
2Corinthians6:8 ku butumbi ne mu dihetula, ku lumu lubi ne ku lumu luimpe; bu bena mashimi, kadi tudi bena mei malelela;" 
2Corinthians6:9 bu bantu badi kabai bamanyibua, kadi tudi bamanyibua bimpe; bu bantu bafuafua, kadi monai, tudi ne muoyo; bu bakengeshibua, kadi katuena tushihibua;" 
2Corinthians6:10 bu badi ne kanyinganyinga ka mutshima, kadi tutu tuasanka misangu yonso; bu bahele, kadi tudi tuvuisha ba bungi babanshi; bu badi kabai ne bintu, kadi tudi ne bintu bionso." 
2Corinthians6:11 Bena Kolinto, mukana muetu mudi mubulule kunudi, mitshima yetu idi midiundishibue." 
2Corinthians6:12 Kanuena nukeheshibua munda muetu, kadi nudi nukeheshibua mu mitshima yenu nuenu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Bua difutu diodiumue dihingana katudi, (udi nuambila bu bana) nuenu kabidi nudiundishibue ma mitshima yenu." 
2Corinthians6:14 Lekelai kulamakashibua ne badi kabai bena ditabusha bu badi kabai bakanangane; bua buakane budi ne bulunda kai ne bualu bubi; anyi munya udi ne buobumue kai ne midima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Ne Kilisto udi ne di dimue ne Beliyala kudi kunyi; anyi muena ditabusha udi ne tshituha kai ne udi kai ne ditabusha? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ntempelo wa Nzambi udi uhunga di kai ne mpingu? Bualu bua tuetu tudi bu ntempelo wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo; bu muakamba Nzambi ne, Nengikale munda muabo, nengendakane munda muabo; Nengikale Nzambi wabo ne bobo nebikale bantu banyi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Nunku umukai munkatshi muabo, nuikale batahuluke, bu mudi Mukelenge wamba; Kanulengi tshintu tshibiha, ne meme nenuitabushe," 
2Corinthians6:18 Nengikale kunudi bu Tatu, ne nuenu nenuikale kundi bu bana balume ne bana bakashi, Mudi muamba Nzambi wa Bukole Buonso." 
2Corinthians7:1 Bana betu, bualu bua tuetu tudi ne milayi ei, tudilengeshe ku manyanu onso a mubidi ne a nyuma, tukumbashe tshijila tshietu mu ditshina dia Nzambi." 
2Corinthians7:2 Nutushile muaba mu mitshima yenu; katuakenzela muntu bibi, katuakanyanga muntu, katuakatamba muntu mukuabo budimu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Tshiena ngamba bualu ebu bua kunuhisha; bua nakanuambila diambedi ne, Nuenu nudi mu mitshima yetu bua tuetu tufue hohamue ne tuikale ne muoyo hohamue." 
2Corinthians7:4 Dikima dia mei anyi didi dinene kunudi, kutumba kuanyi kudi kunene bua bualu buenu; nakûshibua tente ne busambi, disanka dianyi didi dihongoloka mu dikenga dietu dionso." 
2Corinthians7:5 Hatuakalua mu Makedonia mene, mibidi yetu kayakadi ne dikisha, kadi tuakadi tutatshishibua ku nseke yonso; nvita yakadi hamʼbidi, ne ditshina diakadi munda muetu." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kadi Nzambi, udi usamba bantu buhuekela, wakatusamba mu kulua kua Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 tuakasambibua kembua kulua kuandi nkayaku, kadi bua busambi buakasambibueye nʼabu bua bualu buenu hakatuambileye bualu bua dijinga dienu ne kudila kuenu ne lukunukunu luenu bia bualu buanyi; nunku nakatamba kusanka." 
2Corinthians7:8 Nakanyingalasha mitshima yenu ne mukanda wanyi, kadi tshiena ne dibungama katataka bua buala abu; kadi nakadi ne dibungama (bua ndi ntangila ne mukanda au wakanyingalasha mitshima yenu, kadi anu bua musangu muihi)," 
2Corinthians7:9 katataka ndi ne disanka, kambualu bua nuakanyingalashibua, kadi bualu bua nuakanyingalashibua tô ne ku dikudimuna dia mitshima yenu; bualu bua nuakanyingalashibua bu mudi Nzambi musue, bua nuenu kanujimishi tshintu tshimue bua bualu buetu." 
2Corinthians7:10 Bualu bua kanyinganyinga kadi Nzambi musue kadi kenzesha dikudimuna dia mutshima tô ne ku luhandu ludi kalui luvuisha dibungama; kadi kanyinganyinga ka ha buloba ebu kadi kavuisha lufu. 
2Corinthians7:11 Monai, bualu ebu mene bua kunyingalashibua kuenu bu mudi Nzambi musue, buakenzesha disuminyina munda muenu, ne didibingisha, ne difika munda, ne ditshina, ne dijinga, ne lukunukunu, ne disombuela. Mu malu onso nuakadimuenesha bu badi ne mitshima mitoke mu bualu ebu." 
2Corinthians7:12 Nunku nakanufundila, kadi kembua muntu wakenza bualu bubi abu, anyi bualu bua muntu wakenzelabo bibi; kadi bua disuminyina dienu bua bualu buetu dimueneshibue kunudi ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Nunku tuetu tuakasambibua; ne mu busambi buetu tuakatamba kusanka bualu bua disanka dia Tito, bualu bua nyuma wandi wakakankamishibua kudi buonso buenu." 
2Corinthians7:14 Bua bingikala mutumbe kudiye mu muanda mukuabo bua bualu buenu, tshiakafuishibua bundu; kadi bu mutuakanuambila malu onso mu bushua, nunku kabidi ditumbila dietu kudi Tito diakalua dilelela." 
2Corinthians7:15 Dinanga diandi didi ditamba kunudi havulukeye ditumikila dia buonso buenu, ne bu munuakamuitabusha ne ditshina ne kuzakala." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndi ne disanka bualu bua mu mianda yonso ndi ne ditekemena dimpe bua bualu buenu. 
2Corinthians8:1 Bana betu, tudi tunumanyisha bua ngasa wa Nzambi wakaheshibua munkatshi mua ekelesia ya mu Makedonia," 
2Corinthians8:2 ne, Mu kuteta kua bungi kua mu makenga, dikumbana dia disanka diabo ne buhele buabo bua bungi biakavudisha bubanshi bua kuha kuabo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Bakajila bintu bu muakadi bukole buabo, ndi mumanyi wa bualu ne, tô ne hakahitabo bukole buabo; bakabifila bu muakasua mitshima yabo," 
2Corinthians8:4 Bakatusengelela ne disengelela dia bungi bua ngasa eu ne buobumue bia mu kukuatshishangana kua basanto; 
2Corinthians8:5 ne kabakenza anu bu mutuakatekemena, kadi bakadianjila kudifila kudi Mukelenge, ne kutudi, bu mu disua dia Nzambi." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ne bua bualu ebu tuakasengelela Tito, bua yeye, bu muakabangeye mudimu eu diambedi, nunku akebe biandi kukumbasha ngasa eu munda muenu kabidi." 
2Corinthians8:7 Bu munuakamana kukumbana mu malu onso, ne mu ditabusha, ne mu kuamba, ne mu lungenyi, ne mu disuminyina dionso, ne mu dinanga dienu kutudi, nukebe mua kukumbana mu ngasa eu kabidi." 
2Corinthians8:8 Ndi ngamba, kembu mukenshi, kadi bua kujadika bushua bua dinanga dienu ku disuminyina dia bakuabo." 
2Corinthians8:9 Nudi bamanye ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ne, Yeye wakadi mubanshi, kadi wakalua muhele bua bualu buenu, bua nuenu nulue babanshi ku buhele buandi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Kadi mu bualu ebu ndi nuha dijingulula dianyi: ebu mbualu bunudi nʼabu, nuenu mbakabanga bualu ebu tshidimu tshia ku mpala, kembua kuenza nkayaku, kadi mbua kusua kuenza kabidi." 
2Corinthians8:11 Katataka nushikishe kuenza kuabu kabidi; bu munuakadi badilongolole bua kusua, nunku nuikale ne dishikisha dia bualu kabidi bu munudi mua kuenza." 
2Corinthians8:12 Bikala kudilongolola kudiku, bidi bitabushibua bu mudi muntu nʼabi, kembu mudiye kai nʼabi." 
2Corinthians8:13 Tshiena nuambila dî edi bua bakuabo batalale ne bua nuenu nuikale ne bujitu," 
2Corinthians8:14 kadi bualu bua kukelemesha majitu; dikumbana dia bintu bienu dikale dikuatshisha dia dikeha dia bintu biabo mu tshikondo tshia mpindiu, ne dikumbana diabo kabidi dikale dikuatshisha dia dikeha dia bintu bienu; nunku majitu enu neakelemeshibue;" 
2Corinthians8:15 bu muakafundabo ne, Muntu wakasangisha bia bungi kakadi ne bia ha mutu; ne muntu wakasangisha bikese kakakengela bintu." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kadi tuasakidila kudi Nzambi utu wateka mutshima muomumue wa disuminyina bua bualu buenu munda mua Tito. 
2Corinthians8:17 Bua yeye wakitabusha disengelela dietu; kadi bualu bua yeye muine wakadi ne disuminyina dikole, wakadiluila kunudi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tuakutuma muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto udi ne butumbi buandi mu lumu luimpe butangadike munkatshi mua bena ekelesia yonso hohamue nʼandi; 
2Corinthians8:19 kembualu ebu nkayabu, kadi yeye wakadi musungudibue kabidi kudi bena ekelesia bua kuendakana nʼetu mu muanda wa ngasa eu utudi tukuatshila mudimu bua butumbi bua Mukelenge, ne bua kulesha kudilongolola kuetu;" 
2Corinthians8:20 tudi tuehuka ku bualu ebu bua muntu katubandi bua bungi bua bintu ebu bitudi tukuatshisha nʼabi bakuabo. 
2Corinthians8:21 Tudi tulongolola malu adi mimpe, kenku mesu kua Mukelenge nkayandi, kadi ku mesu kua bantu kabidi." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tuakatuma muanʼetu wa ma Kilisto nʼabo, utuakajadika ne, Udi ne disuminyina mu malu a bungi misangu ya bungi, kadi katataka udi utamba kusuminyina bualu bua ditekemena dinene didiye nʼadi kunudi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Bianukonkabo bua Tito, yeye adi muabanyanganyi nʼanyi, ne udi muena mudimu nʼanyi, bua bualu buenu; anyi bianukonkabo bualu bua bana betu ba mu Kilisto, bobo badi batumibue ba ekelesia, badi butumbi bua Kilisto." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nuleshe kujalama kua dinanga dienu ne kua ditumba dietu bua bualu buenu ku mesu kua ekelesia. 
2Corinthians9:1 Bualu bua kukuatshishangana kua basanto, tshiena ne bualu bua kunufundila." 
2Corinthians9:2 Bua ndi mumanye kudilongolola kuenu kunakatumbisha bua bualu buenu kudi ba mu Makedonia ne, Bena Akaya bakadianjila kulongolola kufila kuabo tshidimu tshia ku mpala; ne lukunukunu luenu luakasonsola mitshima ya bantu ba bungi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kadi nakanutumina bana betu ba mu Kilisto bua ditumba dietu bua bualu buenu kadivuishibu dia hatuhu mu muanda eu; bua nuenu nuikale balongolole bu munakamba; 
2Corinthians9:4 bua, bialua bakuabo ba mu Makedonia nʼanyi banusangane kanui balongolole, bualu ebu kabutufuishi tuetu bundu (tshi ngamba buenu mene)." 
2Corinthians9:5 Nunku nakela meshi ne, Bundi nʼabu mbua kusengelela bana betu bua bobo badianjila kulua kunudi, bua kusangisha bintu bia luse ku mpala binuakadianjila kulaya; bua bintu ebi bikale bu bintu bia luse mene, kabikadi bu bintu binyenga ku bukole." 
2Corinthians9:6 Kadi ndi nuambila bualu ebu ne, Udi ukuna maminu mabalê neahuole mabalê; ne udi ukuna maminu a bungi neahuole a bungi." 
2Corinthians9:7 Nunku muntu ne muntu afile bintu bu muakadisunguileye mu mutshima wandi; kafidi ne kanyinganyinga, anyi bu muenzesha ku bukole; bualu bua Nzambi udi musue muena kuha udi ufila ne disanka." 
2Corinthians9:8 Nzambi udi mumanye mua kukumbasha ngasa yonso kunudi; bua nuenu, bua misangu yonso nudi ne dikumbana dionso mu muanda wonso, nukumbane mu mudimu muimpe wonso;" 
2Corinthians9:9 bu muakafundabo ne, Yeye wakatangalasha bintu, wakaha bahele bintu, Buakane buandi budi bushala tshiendelele." 
2Corinthians9:10 Nzambi, utu waha mukunyi maminu ne bidia bia kudia, neanuhe maminu enu a kukuna, neanuvudishileu, neanukuamishile mamuma a buakane buenu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Nudi nuvuishibua babanshi mu tshintu tshionso bua kuha kuonso, kudi kuenzesha disakidila kudi Nzambi bua bualu buetu." 
2Corinthians9:12 Kukuatshilangana kua mudimu eu kakuena anu kûshila kua basanto bintu bidibo nʼabi bualu, kadi kudi kukumbana kabidi mu masakidila a bungi kudi Nzambi;" 
2Corinthians9:13 bualu bua kujalama kuenu kua mu mudimu eu, bobo badi batumbisha Nzambi bua ditumikila dia kujukula kuenu kua mu lumu luimpe lua Kilisto, ne bua bunene bua kuha kuenu kudibo ne kudi bonso;" 
2Corinthians9:14 bobo kabidi, ne disengelela bua bualu buenu, badi banujinga bikole bua ngasa mutambe bunene wa Nzambi udi munda muenu." 
2Corinthians9:15 Tuasakidila kudi Nzambi bua kuha kuandi kudi kakui mua kuambibua. 
2Corinthians10:1 Meme Paulo, ndi nusengelela bua kalolo ne lutulu bia Kilisto, meme hangikala ku mesu kuenu, ndi muhuekele munkatshi muenu, hangikala tshi nʼenu, ndi ne dikima kunudi;" 
2Corinthians10:2 bulelela, ndi nusengelela, bua meme, hangikala nʼenu, tshikadi ne bualu bua kunulesha dikima ne ditekemena dindi mbala bua kuikala nʼadi kudi bakuabo badi batubala bu bantu badi bendakana mu malu a mubidi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Bua hatudi tuendakana mu mubidi, katuena tusangana bu mudi nvita ya mubidi," 
2Corinthians10:4 bualu bua bintu bietu bia nvita kabiena bia mubidi, kadi bidi bikole ku mesu kua Nzambi bia kushimbula nʼabi ngumbu ya nvita;" 
2Corinthians10:5 bidi bishimbula meshi onso ne tshintu tshionso tshidi tshileha mulu tshidi tshibandishibua bua kuhumbisha nʼatshi lungenyi lua Nzambi, bidi bivuisha meshi onso mu buhika bua kutumikilau Kilisto;" 
2Corinthians10:6 tudi badilongolole bua kukengesha bena buhidia buonso, hûshibua ditumikila dienu." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nuenu nutu nuatangila bintu bidi ku mesu kuenu. Biaditekemena muntu ne, Ndi wa Kilisto, yeye ajingulule bualu ebu kabidi munda muandi ne, Bingikala wa Kilisto, tuetu kabidi tudi ba Kilisto." 
2Corinthians10:8 Binatamba kutumba tshituha bua bukokeshi buetu buakatuha Mukelenge bua kunudiundisha nʼabu, kembua kunushimbula nʼabu, tshiena nfuishibua bundu;" 
2Corinthians10:9 bua meme tshikadi bu udi unutshinyisha ne mikanda yanyi. 
2Corinthians10:10 Bualu bua batu bamba ne, Mikanda yandi idi ne bujitu ne idi ne bukole; kadi kumueneka kua mubidi wandi kudi kutekete, ne dî diandi didi dia hatuhu." 
2Corinthians10:11 Muntu au amanye bualu ebu ne, Bu mutudi mu mei a mu mikanda hatudi katuiku, netuikale nunku kabidi mu bienzedi hatuikala nʼenu." 
2Corinthians10:12 Katuena ne dikima bua kudibala anyi bua kudielekesha ne bantu aba bakuabo badi baditumbisha; kadi bobo nkayabo, badi bidikishangana ne badi belekeshangana, kabena ne lungenyi," 
2Corinthians10:13 Kadi katuena tuditumbisha ku mutu kua luelekeshi luetu, kadi netudielekeshe ku kuelekesha kua luidi luakatutekela Nzambi bu luidi, bua kufikalu tô ne kunudi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Katuena tutamba kuobokela, bu mutuakadi katui bafike kunudi; kadi tuetu tuakadianjila kufika tô ne kunudi ne lumu luimpe lua Kilisto." 
2Corinthians10:15 Katuakahita luelekeshi lua kutumba kuetu bua mudimu wa bakuabo; kadi tudi tutekemena ne, Bu mudi ditabusha dienu didiundisha, tuetu netutumbishibue munkatshi muenu bu mudi luidi luetu lua ku dikumbana dia mudimu wetu," 
2Corinthians10:16 bua tuetu kuambila bantu ba ku nseke idi ku mpala kuenu lumu luimpe; ne bua tuetu katutumbi mu mukalu wa muntu mukuabo bua mudimu nuimana kulongolola. 
2Corinthians10:17 Kadi muntu udi utumba, atumbile biandi mu Mukelenge." 
2Corinthians10:18 Kenyeye udi udianyisha udi witabushibua, kadi yeye udi Mukelenge wanyisha." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ndi musue bua nuenu mimanye mua kuikala nʼanyi lutulu mu kutshimbakana kukese; kadi bulelela, nudi nuikala nʼanyi lutulu." 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndi ne mukau bua bualu buenu bu mudi mukau wa Nzambi; nakanubangisha kudi mulume umue bua meme nmanye mua kunufila bu mukashi utshidi kamama kudi Kilisto. 
2Corinthians11:3 Kadi ndi ntshina ne, Bu muakadi nyoka udinga Eva ne budimu buandi, bumue meshi enu neahambuishibue ku dilamata diau ne butoke buau bidi kudi Kilisto." 
2Corinthians11:4 Bikala muntu ulualua wamba Yesu mukuabo, utudi katui bambe; anyi binuangata nyuma mukuabo, unudi kanui bangate diambedi, anyi lumu luimpe lukuabo lunudi kanui bitabushe diambedi; bidi bimpe bua nuenu kuikala nʼandi lutulu." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ndi ntshinka ne, Meme tshiena nshala kaba kakese ku nyima kua bapostolo badi batambe bonso bunene." 
2Corinthians11:6 Bingikala ne matuhakana mu kuamba kuanyi, tshiena nʼau mu lungenyi luanyi; bulelela, mu nshila yonso tuakanulesha bualu ebu mu malu onso." 
2Corinthians11:7 Meme nakenza bualu bubi hanakadihuekesha bua nuenu nubandishibue, bualu bua nakanuambila lumu luimpe lua Nzambi tshi ne difutu, anyi?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Nakatamba kuangata bintu bia ekelesia mikuabo, muangate difutu kudibo, bua meme kumanya mua kunukuatshisha." 
2Corinthians11:9 Ne hanakadi nʼenu nkengela bintu, tshiakadi bu bujitu hamʼbidi ba muntu; bualu bua bana betu ba ma Kilisto, hakafumabo ku Makedonia, bakankuatshisha bu muakadi dikenga dianyi; nakadilamununa mu malu onso bua meme tshikadi bu bujitu hamʼbidi henu; nendilamunune nunku kabidi." 
2Corinthians11:10 Bu mudi bushua bua Kilisto munda muanyi, kakuena muntu udi mua kunkanda mu bualu bundi ntumbila mu nseke ya Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Bualu kai? Bualu bua tshiena munusue, anyi? Nzambi udi mumanye." 
2Corinthians11:12 Kadi bualu bundi ngenza nembuenze kabidi, bua meme kuhumbisha bantu badi bakeba ha kutumbilaho; nunku mu malu adibo batumbila nebabasangane muomumue nʼetu." 
2Corinthians11:13 Bantu aba nunku badi bapostolo badingi, bena mudimu ba mashimi, badi badiandamuna bu bapostolo ba Kilisto." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ne kembualu bua kukema nasha; bualu bua Satana mene udi udiandamuna bu muanjelo wa munya. 
2Corinthians11:15 Nunku kembualu bua kuanyina bikala bakuatshishi bandi badiandamuna bu bakuatshishi ba malu makane; kunshikidilu kuabo nekuikale bu mudi bienzedi biabo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndi ngamba tshiakabidi ne, Muntu kambadi meme bu muena kutshimbakana; kadi binuenza nunku, nungitabushe bu muena kutshimbakana bua meme kabidi kumanya mua kuditumbisha kakese." 
2Corinthians11:17 Dî dindi ngamba, tshiena ndiamba bu dia Mukelenge mudingambile, kadi bu mu tshiakulakula, muditekemene mu kuditumbisha kuanyi," 
2Corinthians11:18 Bualu bua bantu ba bungi badi baditumbisha mu malu a mubidi, meme kabidi nenditumbishe." 
2Corinthians11:19 Bualu bua nuenu, bena lungenyi, nudi nusanka bua kulesha batshimbakanyi lutulu." 
2Corinthians11:20 Bualu bua nudi nulesha muntu lutulu, bianuvuisheye bahika, biadieye bintu bienu, bianukuateye lukole, biadibandisheye, bianukumeye ku mesu." 
2Corinthians11:21 Bundu budi bunkuata hangamba ne, Tuakadi batekete. Kadi mu bualu buonso budi muntu ne dikima, (ndi ngakula tshiakulakula) ndi ne dikima kabidi." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bobo badi Bena Ebelu, anyi? Meme ndi Muena Ebelu kabidi. Bobo badi Bena Isalele, anyi? Meme ndi Muena Isalele kabidi. Bobo badi tunkanunuina tua Abalahama, anyi? Meme ndi kankanunuina kandi kabidi." 
2Corinthians11:23 Bobo badi bena mudimu ba Kilisto, anyi? (Ndi ngakula bu muena kutshimbakana.) Meme ndi mubatambe; mu midimu mihite yabo bungi, mu nkanu misangu mitambe yabo bungi, mu mibundabunda mivule; nakadi hehi ne lufu misangu ya bungi." 
2Corinthians11:24 Misangu itanu nakangata mikumu kudi Bena Yuda makumi anai bumushe umue. 
2Corinthians11:25 Misangu isatu bakankuma milangala; musangu umue bakankuma mabue; misangu isatu nakamba kufua ne majita akadina mu mai; nakadi mu mai manene munya tô ne hakantshila butuku. 
2Corinthians11:26 Nakadi mu ngendu bihungu bia bungi; nakadi ne njû mu misulu, ne njû kudi banyengi, ne njû kudi bena tshisamba tshianyi, ne njû kudi bisamba bia bende, ne njû mu bimenga, ne njû mu tshihela, ne njû mu ma! manene, ne njû kudi bantu bakadinga ne, Tudi bana benu." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nakadi mu mudimu mukole ne mu ntatu, nakadi ne tshitabala misangu ya bungi; nakadi ne nsala ne nyota; nakajila bia kudia misangu ya bungi, mashika akantonda, nakadi ne butaka." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ha mutu ha malu au onso adi hamʼbidi, ku dituku ku dituku mutshima wanyi udi unema bujitu bua ntatu ya bena ekelesia bonso." 
2Corinthians11:29 Muntu kai udi mutekete, ne tshiena mutekete nʼandi? Muntu kai udi mulenduishibue, ne tshishi tshianyi katshi tshitema?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Bingikala ne bualu bua kuditumbisha, nenditumbishe bua malu a butekete buanyi." 
2Corinthians11:31 Nzambi, Tatu wa Mukelenge Yesu, nyeye udi mutumbishibue tô ne bikondo bionso, udi mumanye ne tshiena nshima." 
2Corinthians11:32 Mu Damaseke muloho wa mukelenge Aleta wakadi ulama musoko wa Damaseke bualu bua kunkuata; 
2Corinthians11:33 bakantuluila mu tshisaka hanshi ha disoso dia mu lumbu lua musoko, nakahanduka mu bianza biandi." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndi ne bualu bua kuditumbisha, kadi bualu ebu kabuena bunkuatshisha; kadi nenuambile bua bikena kumona ne kubuluibua kua malu a Mukelenge." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndi mumanye muntu mu Kilisto bidimu dikumi ne binai bimane kuhita (wakadi mu mubidi, tshiena mumanye; anyi kakadi mu mubidi, tshiena mumanye; Nzambi udi mumanye); muntu eu wakabandishibua tô ne mu diulu disatu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ndi mumanye muntu au (ne wakadi mu mubidi anyi kakadi mu mubidi, meme tshiena mumanye, kadi Nzambi udi mumanye)" 
2Corinthians12:4 ne, Wakabandishibua mu Paladiso, wakunvua mei adi bantu kabai bamanye mua kuamba, adi mikenshi ikanda muntu bua kuâmbeye." 
2Corinthians12:5 Bua muntu eu nunku nenditumbishe, kadi bua meme nkayanyi tshiena nditumbisha, anu mu matekete anyi." 
2Corinthians12:6 Binasua kuditumbisha, tshiena ntshimbakana; bualu bua nengambe anu mei malelela. Kadi ndi mbenga kuenza nunku bua muntu kambadi ku mutu kua malu anyi akatangileye anyi akunvueye kundi." 
2Corinthians12:7 Bua meme tshitambi kuanyishibua bua bunene bua kubuluibua kua malu kundi, nakahebua tshintu bu dieba mu mubidi wanyi bu muanjelo wa Satana bua kunkengeshakengesha, bua meme tshitambi kuanyishibua." 
2Corinthians12:8 Bua tshintu etshi nakalomba Mukelenge misangu isatu ne, Tshiumuke kundi." 
2Corinthians12:9 Ne yeye wakangambila ne, Ngasa wanyi udi ukukumbana, bua bukole buanyi budi bukumbashibua tshishiki mu butekete buebe. Nunku ndi ne disanka ha kuditumbisha mu matekete anyi, bua bukole bua Kilisto buikale munda muanyi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Nunku ndi ne disanka mu matekete ne mu bihendu ne mu malu adi angenzesha ku bukole ne mu makenga ne mu kanyinganyinga bua bualu bua Kilisto; bua hangikala mutekete, mpandi ne bukole." 
2Corinthians12:11 Nakulua mutshimbakanyi; nuenu nuakungenzeshaku ku bukole; nakadi ne bualu bua kuanyishibua kunudi, bua tshiakadi ku nyima kua bapostolo bakatamba bunene nasha kaba kakese: nasha meme bianyi ngikala tshianana." 
2Corinthians12:12 Bulelela, bimanyinu bia mupostolo biakuenjibua munkatshi muenu ne dinanukila dikole, ku bimanyinu, ne malu a kukema, ne malu menjibue ne bukole." 
2Corinthians12:13 Bakanuvuisha ku nyima kua ekelesia mikuabo mu malu kai? Anu mu bualu ebu, ne meme tshikadi bu bujitu hamʼbidi henu. Nundekelele bubi ebu." 
2Corinthians12:14 Monai musangu eu muisatu undi ndilongolola bua kulua kunudi; tshiena ngikala bujitu hamʼbidi henu, bualu bua tshiena nkeba bintu bienu, kadi ndi nukeba nuenu. Bana kabena ne bualu bua kubushila batatu ne bamamu bintu; kadi batatu ne bamamu badi babutshila bana bintu." 
2Corinthians12:15 Nengikale ne disanka dia bungi bua kunyanga bintu bianyi bionso ne bua kudinyanga bua mioyo yenu. Havula dinanga dianyi kunudi, dinanga dienu kundi didi dikeha, anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Budi nunku; tshiakanunemeshela bujitu; kadi bualu bua nakadi mudimuke nakanukuata ne budimu. 
2Corinthians12:17 Nakakeba kunutekela budimu kudi mukuabo wa banakanutumina, anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Nakasengelela Tito bua kuya, nakatuma muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto nʼandi, Tito wakakeba kunutekela budimu, anyi? Katuakendakana mu Nyuma muomumue, anyi? Katuakalondangana mu makasa, anyi?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Musangu mule eu nudi nuelangana meshi ne tudi tudibingisha kunudi. Ku mesu kua Nzambi tudi tuamba mu Kilisto. Kadi malu onso, bana betu bananga, adi bua kunudiundisha." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndi ntshina ne hanalua kunudi, bumue tshiena nusangana bu mundi musue kunusangana; ne nuenu kanuena nusangana bu munudi basue kunsangana; tshiena musue kusangana ditandangana ne mukau ne tshishi ne matahuluka ne bunsonge ne mikoso ne kudisua ne mitoyo;" 
2Corinthians12:21 bua hanalua kunudi tshiakabidi, Nzambi wanyi kantamunyi ku mpala kuenu, ne mutshima wanyi kunyingaladi bua bantu bangi bakenza malu mabi diambedi ne kabena banze kukudimuna mitshima yabo ku meshi mabi ne tshiendenda tshia malunda mabi ne masandi biakenzabo." 
2Corinthians13:1 Eu musangu muisatu undualua kunudi. Mukana mua bamanyi babidi anyi basatu dî dionso nedijadikibue. 
2Corinthians13:2 Nakadianjila kunuambila hanakadi nʼenu musangu muibidi, ne katataka kabidi hangikala tshi munkatshi muenu, ndi ndianjila kuambila bantu bakenza malu mabi diambedi ne bantu bonso bakuabo ne, Binalua tshiakabidi, tshiena mbafuila luse." 
2Corinthians13:3 Bualu bua nudi nukeba dijadikibua dia Kilisto udi wakula munda muanyi, udi kai mutekete kunudi kadi udi mukole munda muenu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Yeye wakashihibua ku mutshi mutshiamakane bua butekete bua mubidi, kadi udi ne muoyo bua bukole bua Nzambi. Tuetu tudi batekete nʼandi, kadi netuikale nʼandi ne muoyo bualu bua bukole bua Nzambi kunudi." 
2Corinthians13:5 Nuditete munda muenu ne nudi ne ditabusha anyi; nudijadike bienu. Kanuena badimanye ne Yesu Kilisto udi munda muenu, anyi? Udimu binuikala kanui babengibue." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kadi ndi ntekemena ne nenumanye ne tuetu katuena babengibue. 
2Corinthians13:7 Tudi tutendekena Nzambi bua nuenu kanuenji bualu bubi; kembua tuetu kumueneka bu bantu badibo bitabusha ne, Mbakane, kadi bua nuenu nuenze malu malengele; nasha tuetu bikala bu babengibue." 
2Corinthians13:8 Katuena bamanye mua kuhumbisha malu malelela, anu mua kuakuatshisha." 
2Corinthians13:9 Bualu bua tudi ne disanka hatuikala batekete ne hanuikala bakole; tudi tunulombela Nzambi bualu ebu kabidi, bua nuenu nuikale balengeshibue tshishiki." 
2Corinthians13:10 Bua bualu ebu ndi munufundile malu â hangikala tshi munkatshi muenu, bua meme tshinuenzeshi ne disu dikole hangikala nʼenu, bu mudi bukokeshi buakumpabo kudi Mukelenge bua kujadika ne kembua kushimbula." 
2Corinthians13:11 Tshiashadidi mpindiu, bana betu muoyo wenʼau. Nulengeshibue tshishiki, nusambibue, nuikale ne meshi amue, nuikalangane talala; ne Nzambi wa dinanga ne ditalala neikale nʼenu." 
2Corinthians13:12 Nuelangane muoyo ne dituangana dia mishiku dia tshijila. 
2Corinthians13:13 Basanto bonso badi banutumina muoyo. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ngasa wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ne dinanga dia Nzambi ne buobumue ne Nyuma Muimpe bikale ne buonso buenu. 
Galatians1:1 Paulo, mupostolo, tshi mufume kudi bantu, tshî mutumibue kudi muntu, kadi anu kudi Yesu Kilisto ne kudi Nzambi Tatu wakamubisha ku lufu," 
Galatians1:2 ne bana betu bonso ba ma Kilisto badi nʼanyi, kudi bena ekelesia ba mu Galatia:" 
Galatians1:3 Ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne kudi Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto," 
Galatians1:4 wakadifila bua malu mabi etu bua yeye atusungile munkatshi mua tshikondo etshi tshibi bu mudi disua dia Nzambi Tatu wetu; 
Galatians1:5 butumbi buikale kudiye tshiendelele. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ndi nkema bua nudi nulekela wakanubikila mu ngasa wa Kilisto lubilu nunku bua nuenu nuitabushe lumu lukuabo 
Galatians1:7 ludi kalui lumu luimpe. Kadi bakuabo badiku badi banutatshisha, badi bakeba kusesuisha lumu luimpe lua Kilisto." 
Galatians1:8 Kadi bikata tuetu anyi muanjelo wa mu diulu tunuambila lumu lukuabo ludi kalui lumu luimpe lutuakanuambila, ikale biandi ne mulau." 
Galatians1:9 Bu mutuakamba diambedi tudi tunuambilamu tshiakabidi ne, Bianuambila muntu lumu lukuabo ludi kalui lumu luimpe lunuakangata, ikale biandi ne mulau." 
Galatians1:10 Katataka ndi nkeba diakalengele kudi bantu anyi kudi Nzambi? Ndi nkeba mua kusankisha bantu, anyi? Bu meme ntshidi nkeba kusankisha bantu, tshiakadi kuikala muhika wa Kilisto." 
Galatians1:11 Bana betu, ndi numanyisha bua lumu luimpe lunakanuambila; kaluena lufuma kudi muntu." 
Galatians1:12 Bualu bua tshiakaluangata kudi muntu; kabakalunyisha; luakalua kundi mu dibuluibua dia Yesu Kilisto. 
Galatians1:13 Bualu bua nuakamana kunvua lumu lua bienzedi bianyi mu bualu bua Bena Yuda bu munakatamba kukengesha bena ekelesia wa Nzambi, bu munakababutula;" 
Galatians1:14 ne bu munakadi mpita ku mpala kua bena mulongo wanyi ba bungi ba mu tshisamba tshietu mu bualu bua Bena Yuda bualu bua lukunukunu lukole lunakadi nʼalu bua bilele bia bankambua betu. 
Galatians1:15 Kadi hakasua Nzambi nguakansungula munda mua baba wanyi ne nguakambikila ku ngasa wandi," 
Galatians1:16 kubulula Muana wandi munda muanyi bua meme kuambila ba mu bisamba bia bende lumu luimpe luandi; tshikondo atshi tshiakahunga dî ne bantu. 
Galatians1:17 Tshiakabanda ku Yelushalema kudi bantu bakadianjila kubuela mu bupostolo; kadi nakaya ku Alaba; nakahingana ku Damaseke kabidi. 
Galatians1:18 Hakashika bidimu bisatu, nakaya ku Yelushalema bua kumanyangana ne Kefa, nakashala nʼandi matuku dikumi ne atanu." 
Galatians1:19 Tshiakamona mukuabo wa bapostolo, anu Yakobo muanʼabo ne Mukelenge." 
Galatians1:20 Ku mesu kua Nzambi tshiena nshima bua malu andi munufundile. 
Galatians1:21 Hashishe nakalua ku nseke ya Sulia ne ya Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Kabakanza kumanya mpala wanyi kudi bena ekelesia ba mu Kilisto ba mu Yudaya; 
Galatians1:23 kadi bakadi anu bunvua ne, Yeyʼau wakadi utukengesha diambedi udi wambila bantu mpindiu bua ditabusha diakakebeye kubutula;" 
Galatians1:24 ne bakadi batumbisha Nzambi bua bualu buanyi. 
Galatians2:1 Hakashika bidimu dikumi ne binai, nakaya ku Yelushalema tshiakabidi ne Bânaba; tuakaya ne Tito kabidi." 
Galatians2:2 Nakabandaku bianyi bua bualu buakabuluibua kundi; nakalondela bakadi ne butumbi munkatshi mua bapostolo lumu luimpe lundi ngambila ba mu bisamba bia bende; kadi nakabalondelalu mu musokoko, bua meme tshikadi bu muntu utshidi welekesha lubilu, anyi wakadi welekesha lubilu hatuhu." 
Galatians2:3 Tito wakadi nʼanyi, yeye muena Gelika mene, kadi kabakamuenzesha bua kutengudibueye." 
Galatians2:4 Kadi bualu bua bakuabo bakadivuisha bu bana betu, bakadibuesha munkatshi muetu mu musokoko bua kutentekela budishikaminyi butudi nʼabu mu Kilisto Yesu; bakasua kutuvuisha bahika." 
Galatians2:5 Kadi katuakabakokela nasha tshituha tshimue tshia diba; bualu bua bushua bua lumu luimpe buikale nʼenu. 
Galatians2:6 Kadi bantu aba bakadi ne butumbi munkatshi muabo (ne bakadi banganyi diambedi kembualu kundi; Nzambi kena ubala mpala wa muntu) ndi ngamba ne, Bantu aba bakadi ne butumbi kabakanyisha bualu." 
Galatians2:7 Kadi hakamanyabo ne nakahebua lumu luimpe lua kudi badi kabai batengula, bu muakahebua Petelo lua kudi badi batengula;" 
Galatians2:8 (bualu bua yeye nguakenzesha Petelo mu mudimu wa bupostolo bua batengula, nguakangenzesha kabidi mu mudimu wa bupostolo kudi bisamba bia bende);" 
Galatians2:9 ne hakamonabo ngasa wakumpabo kudi Nzambi, Yakobo ne Kefa ne Yone bakadi bu makunshi mu ekelesia, bakatuha meme ne Bânaba tshianza tshia, bukole tshia buobumue buetu mu Kilisto, bua tuetu tuye kudi bisamba bia bende, ne bua bobo baye kudi batengula." 
Galatians2:10 Kadi bakasua kabidi tuetu tuvuluke bahele; bualu mene bunakadi ne disuminyina dia kuenza. 
Galatians2:11 Kadi hakalua Kefa ku Antiokia, nakabengangana nʼandi ku mei ku mesu kuandi bualu bua yeye wakadihishisha." 
Galatians2:12 Bualu bua diambedi bantu bakuabo kabai banze kulua, bafume kudi Yakobo, wakadi udia ne bantu ba mu bisamba bia bende; kadi hakaluabo, wakumuka kudibo, wakadilamununa kudibo; bualu bua wakatshina bakadi ba batengula." 
Galatians2:13 Ne Bena Yuda bakuabo bonso bakumuka nʼandi mu lubombo; ne Bânaba mene wakahambuishibua ku lubombo luabo. 
Galatians2:14 Kadi hanakatangila ne kabakenda bajalama bu mudi lumu luimpe lua bushua luamba, nakambila Kefa ku mesu kua buonso buabo ne, Wewe, Muena Yuda, biwenza bu mudi bantu ba mu bisamba bia bende benza, kui wenza bu mudi Bena Yuda benza, munyi mûdi musue kuenzesha bantu ba mu bisamba bia bende bua bobo benza bu mudi Bena Yuda benza?" 
Galatians2:15 Tuetu tuakaledibua Bena Yuda, katui bu bantu babi ba mu bisamba bia bende;" 
Galatians2:16 kadi ludi bamanye ne kakuena muntu wabingishibua bua kuenza kua mikenshi kadi anu ku ditabusha dia mu Yesu Kilisto; tuetu kabidi tuakitabusha Kilisto Yesu bua kubingishibua ku ditabusha dia mu Kilisto, kenku kuenza kua mikenshi, bualu bua kakuena muntu wabingishibua ku kuenza kua mikenshi." 
Galatians2:17 Kadi bikalabo batusangane bu bantu babi hatuakadi tukeba mua kubingishibua mu Kilisto, Kilisto udi muena mudimu wa bubi, anyi? Nasha kakese!" 
Galatians2:18 Bua bingibaka bintu tshiakabidi binakasasula diambedi, ndi ndijadika bu mushihi wa mikenshi." 
Galatians2:19 Bualu bua mikenshi nakamana kufua ku mikenshi, bua meme ngikale ne muoyo kudi Nzambi." 
Galatians2:20 Nakashihibua ku mutshi mutshiamakane ne Kilisto; nunku kememe kabidi udi ne muoyo, kadi Kilisto ngudi muoyo munda muanyi; ne muoyo undi nʼau mu mubidi katataka ndi nʼau mu ditabusha dia mu Muana wa Nzambi, wakannanga, wakadifila bua bualu buanyi." 
Galatians2:21 Tshiena nvuisha ngasa wa Nzambi ne, Ntshianana; bualu bua bialua buakane ku kutumikila kua mikenshi, nunku Kilisto wakafua tshianana." 
Galatians3:1 Nuenu Bena Galatia bahote, ku mesu kuenu kuakatekabo Yesu Kilisto mushihibue ku mutshi mutshiamakane hatoke, wakanuhambuisha nganyi?" 
Galatians3:2 Ndi musue kunukonka anu bualu bumue, Nuakangata Nyuma bua kuenza kua mikenshi anyi bua kunvua kua lumu luimpe ne ditabusha?" 
Galatians3:3 Ebu mbuhote buenu, anyi? Nuakuhanga ne Nyuma, mpindiu nudi nushikisha ne malu a mubidi, anyi?" 
Galatians3:4 Nuakakenga mu malu a bungi nunku tshianana, anyi? (Binuikala bakenge tshianana bulelela.)" 
Galatians3:5 Wakanuha Nyuma ne udi wenza malu a kukema munkatshi muenu, yeye udi wenza nunku bua kuenza kua mikenshi anyi bua kunvua kua lumu luimpe ne ditabusha?" 
Galatians3:6 Mbu muakitabusha Abalahama Nzambi, ne bakamubadila ditabusha edi bu buakane." 
Galatians3:7 Numanye bienu ne, Bantu badi ba ditabusha mbobo badi bana ba Abalahama." 
Galatians3:8 Bualu bua Mukanda wa Nzambi wakadianjila kumona ne, Nzambi neabingishe bantu ba bisamba bia bende ku ditabusha, wakadianjila kuambila Abalahama lumu luimpe ne, Bisamba bionso nebivudishibue disanka bua bualu buebe." 
Galatians3:9 Nunku badi ba ditabusha badi bavudishibua disanka ne Abalahama, muena ditabusha." 
Galatians3:10 Bonso badi beyemena kuenza kua mikenshi badi munshi mua mulau; bu muakafundabo ne, Muntu yonso udi kai ulonda malu onso adi mafunda mu mukanda wa mikenshi bua kuênza udi ne mulau." 
Galatians3:11 Nunku bualu ebu budi bumanyibua hatoke ne, Kakuena muntu udi ubingishibua bua mikenshi ku mesu kua Nzambi; bualu bua bakamba ne, Muntu muakane neikale ne muoyo ku ditabusha." 
Galatians3:12 Ne mikenshi kayena ku ditabusha, kadi, Wayenza neikale ne muoyo bua bualu buai." 
Galatians3:13 Kilisto wakatuhikula ku mulau wa mikenshi, wakadivuisha bu mulau bua bualu buetu; bu muakafundabo ne, Muntu yonso udi mukudika ku mutshi udi ne mulau;" 
Galatians3:14 bua disanka dia Abalahama dilue kudi bisamba bia bende mu Kilisto Yesu; bua tuetu kuangata mulayi wa Nyuma bua ditabusha. 
Galatians3:15 Bana betu, ndi ngakula bu mudi bantu bakula. Nasha tshihungidi tshikala anu hankatshi ha bantu, hamanabo kutshijadika, kakuena muntu udi utshivuisha tshia hatuhu, anyi udi utentekesha malu makuabo ha mutu hatshi." 
Galatians3:16 Milayi yakalayidibua Abalahama ne kankanunuina kandi; kayakalayidibua tunkanunuma tua bungi, kadi anu muntu umue, kankanunuina kebe, Kilisto mene." 
Galatians3:17 Ndi ngamba dî edi ne, Mikenshi, yakalua hakaleha bidimu nkama inai ne makumi asatu, kayena mimanye mua kumusha tshihungidi tshiakadianjila kujadikibua kudi Nzambi bua kuvuishai mulayi ne, Ntshianana." 
Galatians3:18 Bikala buhianyi bufume ku mikenshi, kabuena bufuma ku mulayi; kadi Nzambi wakabuha Abalahama bua mulayi." 
Galatians3:19 Nunku mikenshi Idi bua tshinyi? Mikenshi yakatentekeshibua ha mutu bualu bua malu mabi a bantu, tô ne hakalua kankanunuina ka Abalahama kakalayidilabo mulayi; wakalongolodibua kudi banjelo ku tshianza tshia mutuanganyi wa tshihungidi." 
Galatians3:20 Mutuanganyi kena mutuanganyi wa umue; kadi Nzambi udi umue. 
Galatians3:21 Mikenshi idi ifuilangana ne milayi ya Nzambi, anyi? Nasha kakese! Bu Nzambi mutuhe mikenshi yakamanya mua kutuhesha muoyo, bulelela, buakane buakadi kufuma ku mikenshi." 
Galatians3:22 Mukanda wa Nzambi wakinshidila malu onso munshi mua bubi, bua kuha bantu badi bitabusha mulayi ku ditabusha dia mu Yesu Kilisto." 
Galatians3:23 Diambedi ditabusha kadî dianze kulua, buonso buetu tuakadi balamibue munshi mua mikenshi, tuakadi binshidila ku ditabusha diakadi ha kubuluibua." 
Galatians3:24 Nunku mikenshi yakalua ndeshi wetu wa kutufikisha kudi Kilisto, bua tuetu tubingishibue ku ditabusha." 
Galatians3:25 Kadi bualu bua ditabusha diakumana kulua, katuena mu bulombodi bua ndeshi kabidi." 
Galatians3:26 Bua buonso buetu tudi bana ba Nzambi bua ditabusha dia mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Galatians3:27 Bualu bua nuenu bonso bakabatijibua mu Kilisto, nuakaluata Kilisto." 
Galatians3:28 Kakuena Muena Yuda anyi Muena Gelika; kakuena muhika anyi mudishikamine; kakuena mulume anyi mukashi; bualu bua buonso buenu nudi muntu umue mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Galatians3:29 Binuikala ba Kilisto, nunku nudi tunkanunuina tua Abalahama, nudi bahianyi bandi bu mudi mulayi wamba." 
Galatians4:1 Ndi ngamba ne, Hatshidi muhianyi muana mutekete, kena utahuluka kudi muhika, nasha bikaleye mukelenge wa bintu bionso;" 
Galatians4:2 kadi yeye udi ku nyima kua bakuatshishi ne balami tô ne halua dituku diakasungula tatu wandi. 
Galatians4:3 Nunku tuetu kabidi hatuakadi bana batekete, bakatuvuisha bahika ba mayisha a kumudilu a ha buloba." 
Galatians4:4 Kadi hakakumbana tshikondo, Nzambi wakatuma Muana wandi, muledibue kudi mukashi, muledibue munshi mua mikenshi," 
Galatians4:5 bua yeye amanye mua kuhikula badi munshi mua mikenshi, bua tuetu tuangate buhianyi bua bana ba Nzambi." 
Galatians4:6 Ne bualu bua nudi bana, Nzambi wakatuma Nyuma wa Muana wandi mu mitshima yetu, wela di diandi ne, Aba, Tatu." 
Galatians4:7 Nunku wewe kuena muhika kabidi, kadi udi muana mulela; ne biwikala muana mulela, nunku udi muhianyi bua bualu bua Nzambi." 
Galatians4:8 Kadi ku tshikondo atshi, bualu bua kanuakamanya Nzambi, nuakadi mu buhika bua bintu bidi kabi nzambi mu tshikadilu tshiabi;" 
Galatians4:9 kadi katataka, bualu bua nuakumana kumanya Nzambi ne nudi bamanyibue kudi Nzambi, munyi munudi basue kuhingana ku mayisha matekete a kumudilu ne a hatuhu a ha buloba bua kudivuisha bahika kabidi?" 
Galatians4:10 Nudi nuj idila matuku ne ngondo ne bikondo ne bidimu. 
Galatians4:11 Ndi ntshina bua bualu buenu ne, Bumue nakanuenzela mudimu hatuhu." 
Galatians4:12 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela bua nuenu nulue bu meme, bualu bua meme nakulua bu nuenu. Kanuakangenzela bibi;" 
Galatians4:13 nudi bamanye ne bualu bua butekete bua mubidi wanyi nakanuambila lumu luimpe musangu wa kumudilu. 
Galatians4:14 Kanuakampetula, kanuakampidia bualu bua butekete bua mubidi wanyi buakadi bu buteyi kunudi; kadi nuakangitabusha bu muanjelo wa Nzambi, bu Kilisto Yesu mene." 
Galatians4:15 Kudisankisha kuenu kuakuya hanyi? Ndi mumanyi wa bualu ne, Bu nuenu bamanye mua kuenza nunku, nuakadi kuntudila mesu enu bua kuampa." 
Galatians4:16 Nunku nakulua muena lukuna wenu bualu bua ndi nuambila bualu bulelela, anyi?" 
Galatians4:17 Badi banukeba ne lukunukunu, kembua kunuenzela bimpe, kadi badi basue kunusesuisha kutudi, bua nuenu nubakebe bobo." 
Galatians4:18 Kuikala ne lukunukunu mu malu makane bikondo bionso kudi kuimpe, hangikala nʼenu, ne hangikala tshi nʼenu." 
Galatians4:19 Bana banyi bakese, bandi mukuatshikile didinyenga dia ha kulela kabidi bua bualu buenu tô ne bamueneka Kilisto munda muenu," 
Galatians4:20 nakadi musue kuikala nʼenu katataka bua kukudimuna dî dianyi; bualu bua mutshima wanyi udi uhampakana bua bualu buenu. 
Galatians4:21 Nungambile bienu, nuenu badi basue kuikala munshi mua mikenshi, kanuena nunyua mikenshi, anyi?" 
Galatians4:22 Bualu bua bakafunda ne, Abalahama wakadi ne bana balume babidi, wakalela umue kudi mukashi muhika, ne mukuabo kudi mukashi, muena budishikaminyi." 
Galatians4:23 Muana wa mukashi muhika wakaledibua bu mudibo balela bana bonso, kadi muana wa mukashi, muena budishikaminyi, wakaledibua bua mulayi." 
Galatians4:24 Malu â nunku adi lusumuinu: bakashi aba badi bu bihungidi bibidi; umue wabo wa ku mukuna wa Sinai udi ulela bana bua kuikalabo bahika, yeye udi Haga." 
Galatians4:25 Haga eu udi mukuna wa Sinai wa mu Alaba udi mu mulongo umue ne Yelushalema wa katataka; bualu bua yeye udi mu buhika ne bana bandi. 
Galatians4:26 Kadi Yelushalema wa mu diulu udi muena budishikaminyi, udi baba wetu." 
Galatians4:27 Bua bakafunda ne, Mukashi wa nkumba udi kai mulele, usanke biebe; Ne mukashi udi kai ne didinyenga dia ha kulela, uhandishe dî diebe, udile biebe; Bualu bua bana ba mukashi muhidibue badi batambe bana ba mukashi wakashala ne mulume bungi." 
Galatians4:28 Tuetu, bana betu, tudi bana ba mulayi bu muakadi Isaka." 
Galatians4:29 Bu muakadi bualu hale, budi nunku katataka; yeye uvua muledibue bu mudibo balela bana bonso wakadi ukengesha uvua muledibue bu mudi kulela kua Nyuma." 
Galatians4:30 Kadi Mukanda wa Nzambi udi wamba tshinyi? Udi wamba ne, Ihata mukashi muhika ne muanʼandi mulume: bualu bua muana wa mukashi muhika kena mua kuhiana bintu ne muana wa mukashi, muena budishikaminyi." 
Galatians4:31 Nunku bana betu, katuena bana ba mukashi muhika, kadi tudi bana ba mukashi, muena budishikaminyi." 
Galatians5:1 Kilisto wakatuhikula bua tuetu tuikale ne budishikaminyi; nunku nudijadike, kanudibueshi munshi mua tshikokedi tshia buhika kabidi." 
Galatians5:2 Monai, meme Paulo ndi nuambila ne, Binuitabusha ditengula, Kilisto kena unukuatshisha." 
Galatians5:3 Ndi manyisha muntu yonso tshiakabidi udi witabusha ditengula ne yeye udi muena dibanza bua kuenzeye mikenshi yonso nkonkonko. 
Galatians5:4 Nudi batahuluke kudi Kilisto, nuenu badi bakeba kudibingisha ku mikenshi; nuakumuka mu ngasa," 
Galatians5:5 Tuetu, bualu bua Nyuma udi utukuatshisha, ku ditabusha tudi tuindila buakane butudi tutekemena," 
Galatians5:6 Bualu bua mu Kilisto Yesu, bikala muntu mutengula anyi bikaleye kai mutengula, kakuena bualu, kadi anu ditabusha didi dienza malu mu luse." 
Galatians5:7 Nuakadi nuenda bimpe; wakanuhumbisha nganyi bua nuenu kanutumikidi bualu bulelela? 
Galatians5:8 Meshi â kakafuma kudi Nzambi wakanubikila. 
Galatians5:9 Luevene lukese ludi lutuntumusha mutanda mujima. 
Galatians5:10 Meme ndi ne ditekemena edi kunudi mu Mukelenge ne, Kanuena nuikala ne meshi makuabo; kadi udi unutatshisha neadituadile dihila diandi, ne udi nganyi ne nganyi." 
Galatians5:11 Kadi meme, bana betu, bingikala ntshidi nuambila bualu bua ditengula, ntshidi nkengeshibua bua tshinyi? Nunku dilenduisha dia mutshi mutshiamakane diakumushibua." 
Galatians5:12 Nakadi kusua ne badi banutombuesha baditungule kabidi. 
Galatians5:13 Bualu bua nuenu, bana betu, nuakabikidibua bua budishikaminyi; kadi nudimuke ne budishikaminyi buenu kabulu tshia kusankisha nʼatshi mubidi, kadi bualu bua dinanga dienu nukuatshilangane mudimu." 
Galatians5:14 Bualu bua mikenshi yonso idi misangisha mu dî dimue, ndî edi ne, Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue." 
Galatians5:15 Kadi binuasumangana, binuadiangana, nudimuke ne kanubutudianganyi." 
Galatians5:16 Ndi nuambila ne, Endai mu Nyuma Muimpe, nunku kanuena nulonda lukuka lua mubidi." 
Galatians5:17 Bualu bua dijinga dia malu a mubidi didi difuilangana ne dijinga dia malu a Nyuma, ne dijinga dia malu a Nyuma didi difuilangana ne dijinga dia malu a mubidi; bua malu â adi mimanyinangane, bua nuenu kanuenji malu anudi basue kuenza." 
Galatians5:18 Kadi binuikala balombodibua kudi Nyuma, kanuena munshi mua mikenshi." 
Galatians5:19 Malu mabi adi mubidi wenza adi amueneka ne, Tshiendenda tshia malunda mabi, meshi mabi, masandi," 
Galatians5:20 ditendelela dia mpingu, kubaka kua manga, lukuna, kutandangana, mukau, tshishi, kutahuluka, mpata, diyoyo," 
Galatians5:21 mutshiaudi, bukuatshiki bua maluvu, manaya a bundu ne malu â onso; edi ndianjila kunudimusha bu munakamana kunudimusha diambedi ne, Bantu batu benza malu â kabena bahiana bukelenge bua Nzambi." 
Galatians5:22 Kadi mamuma a Nyuma adi dinanga, disanka, ditalala, lutulu, luse, buimpe, bunanukidi bua lulamatu," 
Galatians5:23 kudihuekesha, kudikanda; kakuena mukandu ku malu â." 
Galatians5:24 Badi mu Kilisto Yesu bakamana kushiha mubidi ne milou yau ne nkuka yau ku mutshi mutshiamakane. 
Galatians5:25 Bituikala ne muoyo bua Nyuma, tuende bietu bua Nyuma kabidi." 
Galatians5:26 Tulekele kuditumbishatumbisha hatuhu ne kufikishangana munda ne kuvuishangana mukau. 
Galatians6:1 Bana betu, bikala muntu mutulukile ku bualu bubi, nuenu badi ne Nyuma, numuhingishe kudi Nzambi ne mutshima wa kalolo; udimuke biebe, bua wewe buteyi bu." 
Galatians6:2 Nuambuishangane majitu enu, nunku nutumikile mikenshi ya Kilisto." 
Galatians6:3 Bikala muntu udiela meshi ne, Ndi muntu mimene, hatshidiye muntu wa tshianana, yeye udi udidinga." 
Galatians6:4 Kadi muntu ne muntu adijadikile mudimu wandi, nunku neamanye mua kuditumbisha bua bualu buandi, kembualu bua mukuabo."
