Galatians6:5 Bualu bua muntu ne muntu neadianjile bujitu buandi. 
Galatians6:6 Muntu udi uyishibua bualu bua Nzambi akuatshishe muyishi wandi ne bintu bimpe bionso. 
Galatians6:7 Kanudidingi; Nzambi kena usekibua; bualu bua tshintu tshionso tshidi muntu ukuna, ntshiotshi tshiahuoleye." 
Galatians6:8 Muntu udi ukunyina mubidi wandi bintu, neahuolele mubidi wandi bintu bibole; kadi muntu udi ukunyina Nyuma bintu, neahuole muoyo wa tshiendelele bua Nyuma." 
Galatians6:9 Katuhangi mu kuenza kua malu mimpe; bualu bua halua tshikondo tshia kuahuola netuahuole bituikala katui tubanga. 
Galatians6:10 Nunku hatudi bamanye mua kuenza, tuenzelai bantu bonso bimpe, kadi tutambe kuenzela bena diku dia bena kuitabusha bimpe." 
Galatians6:11 Monai maleta manene andi munufundile nʼau ne tshianza tshianyi tshine. 
Galatians6:12 Bonso badi basue didilesha dimpe mu malu a mubidi, badi banuenzesha bua kutengudibua; anu bua kababakengeshi bualu bua mutshi mutshiamakane wa Kilisto." 
Galatians6:13 Kadi bobo mene badi batengudibua kabena batumikila mikenshi; kadi badi basue nuenu nutengudibue, bua kutumbilabo ku malu a mu mibidi yenu." 
Galatians6:14 Kadi meme tshitumbidi ku muanda mukuabo; ntumbile bianyi anu bualu bua mutshi mutshiamakane wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto, kuakanshihelabo malu a ha buloba, ne kunakashihibua ku malu a ha buloba kabidi." 
Galatians6:15 Bualu bua bikala muntu mutengula, anyi bikaleye kai mutengula, kakuena bualu; kadi kuikala muntu muhia-muhia kudi bualu." 
Galatians6:16 Bonso badi basue kuenda bu mudi tshidikishilu etshi, ditalala ne luse bikale kudibo ne kudi Bena Isalele ba Nzambi." 
Galatians6:17 Nunku muntu kantatshishi kabidi; bualu bua ndi utuala bimanyinu bia Yesu, bibangu bangosha hamʼbidi hanyi." 
Galatians6:18 Bana betu, ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ikale ne nyuma wenu. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, mupostolo wa Kilisto Yesu, bua disua dia Nzambi, kudi basanto badi mu Efeso ne kudi badi mua kueyemenyibua mu Kilisto Yesu;" 
Ephesians1:2 ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
Ephesians1:3 Nzambi, Tatu wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto atumbishibue, wakatuvuidishila masanka onso a Nyuma mu miaba ya mu diulu mu Kilisto;" 
Ephesians1:4 bu muakatusunguleye munda muandi diambedi yeye kai muanze kufuka buloba, bua tuetu tuikale bantu ba tshijila badi kabai mua kubandibua ku mesu kuandi mu luse." 
Ephesians1:5 Wakadianjila kutusungula bua kuikala ne buhianyi kudiye bu bana bua Yesu Kilisto, bu mudi disanka dimpe dia disua diandi," 
Ephesians1:6 ku dianyisha dia butumbi bua ngasa wandi wakatuheye hatuhu mu Muana wandi Munanga. 
Ephesians1:7 Tudi ne kuhikudibua kuetu kudiye bua mashi andi, ne kubuikidibua kua malu mabi etu bu mudi bubanshi bua ngasa wandi," 
Ephesians1:8 wakakumbashileye kutudi mu meshi onso ne lungenyi. 
Ephesians1:9 Wakatumanyisha bualu busokoka bua mu disua diandi bu mudi disanka diandi dimpe diakasunguleye munda muandi," 
Ephesians1:10 tô, ne halua tshikondo tshia dikumbana dia bihungu, bua kusangisha bintu bionso mu Kilisto, ne bidi mu diulu ne bidi hanshi ha buloba." 
Ephesians1:11 Mu Kilisto Yesu mutuakavuishibua buhianyi, hatuakadianjila kusungudibua bu muvueye muhangidishe, nyeye udi wenzesha malu onso bu mudi kudijingulula kua disua diandi;" 
Ephesians1:12 bua tuetu tuikale banyishi ba butumbi buandi, tuetu mene, bakadianjila kuikala ne ditekemena mu Kilisto." 
Ephesians1:13 Nuenu kabidi, hanuakamana kunvua dî dia bushua kudiye, lumu luimpe lua luhandu luenu, hanuakamuitabusha kabidi, nuakuangata tshimanyishilu tshia Nyuma Muimpe mulayibue," 
Ephesians1:14 udi tshieya tshia buhianyi buetu, tô ne ku kuhikudibua kua bantu ba Nzambi muenʼabo, bua dianyisha dia butumbi buandi." 
Ephesians1:15 Bua muanda eu meme kabidi, hanakunvua lumu lua ditabusha dia mu Mukelenge Yesu didi munkatshi muenu, ne lua dinanga dinudi nulesha basanto bonso," 
Ephesians1:16 tshiena ndekela kusakidila Nzambi bua bualu buenu, ntu ngatela mena enu mu kutendelela kuanyi," 
Ephesians1:17 bua Nzambi wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, Tatu wa butumbi, anuhe nyuma wa meshi ne wa dibuluila mu dimumanya dienu;" 
Ephesians1:18 ne bua yeye anumunyikile mesu a mu mitshima yenu, bua nuenu kumanya didi ditekemena dia kunubikila kuandi, ne budi bubanshi bua butumbi bua buhianyi buandi mu basanto," 
Ephesians1:19 ne bua nuenu kumanya budi bunene buhite bua bukole buandi kutudi tuetu badi bamuitabusha. Wakatulesha bu mudi kuenzesha kua bukole buandi bunene 
Ephesians1:20 buakenzeye mu Kilisto hakamubisheye ku bafue ne hakamushikikeye ku tshianza tshiandi tshia bukole mu miaba ya mu diulu," 
Ephesians1:21 kule ku mutu kua bunfumu buonso ne bukokeshi buongo ne bukole buonso ne bukelenge buonso ne dina dionso diedibua, kenganu mu tshikondo etshi kadi mu tshikondo tshilualua kabidi." 
Ephesians1:22 Wakavuisha bintu bionso munshi mua makasa andi, wakamuha bua kuikaleye mutu wa malu onso a mu ekelesia," 
Ephesians1:23 udi mubidi wandi, tshiuwidi tshia udi ûsha bintu bionso tente." 
Ephesians2:1 Ne Nzambi wakanuvuisha ne muoyo hanuakadi bafue bua kushiha kuenu kua mikenshi ne bua malu mabi enu," 
Ephesians2:2 anuakendamu diambedi bu mudi tshikondo tshia buloba ebu, bu mudi mukelenge wa bukokeshi bua mu luhehele, wa nyuma udi wenzesha katataka munkatshi mua bana ba buhidia." 
Ephesians2:3 Tuetu kabidi tuakikala munkatshi muabo diambedi, tuakalonda nkuka ya mibidi yetu, tuakalonda malu akadi mibidi yetu ne meshi etu bisue, bakaledibua bena lukuna bu mudi bakuabo." 
Ephesians2:4 Kadi Nzambi, udi mubanshi mu luse, bualu bua dinanga diandi dinene diakatunangeye nʼadi," 
Ephesians2:5 hatuakadi bafue bualu bua kushiha kuetu kua mikenshi, wakatuvuisha ne muoyo hamue ne Kilisto (nuakusungidibua ku ngasa)," 
Ephesians2:6 wakatuisha nʼandi hamue, wakatushikika nʼandi hamue mu miaba ya mu diulu mu Kilisto Yesu;" 
Ephesians2:7 bua mu bikondo bilualua yeye aleshe bubanshi butambe bua ngasa wandi mu luse ludiye nʼalu kutudi mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Bualu bua nudi basungidibue ku ngasa bua ditabusha; ne diodi kadiena difuma kunudi, ndiha dia Nzambi;" 
Ephesians2:9 kadiena difuma ku midimu, bua muntu kaditumbishi," 
Ephesians2:10 Tuetu iudi mudimu wandi wakenzeye, tuakafukibua mu Kilisto Yesu bua tuetu tuenze midimu mimpe yakadianjila Nzambi kulongolola bua tuetu kuendamu." 
Ephesians2:11 Nunku nuvuluke ne diambedi nuenu, bantu ba bisamba bia bende mu kuledibua kuenu, badi babikidibua ne, Kabena batengula, kudi bantu badi babikidibua ne, Batengula ne ditengula dia mubidi dienza ne bianza;" 
Ephesians2:12 numiluke ne, Ku tshikondo atshi nuakadi kanui ne Kilisto, nuakadi bantu ba bende kudi tshisamba tshia Isalele, nuakadi benyi ku bihungidi bua mulayi wa Nzambi, kanui ne ditekemena, kanui no Nzambi mu buloba ebu." 
Ephesians2:13 Kadi katataka mu Kilisto Yesu nuenu bakadi kule diambedi nuakavuishibua ha buihi mu mashi a Kilisto. 
Ephesians2:14 Bualu bua yeye udi ditalala dietu, wakatuvuisha bubidi buetu bu muntu umue, wakashimbula lumbu lua hankatshinkatshi luakadi lutuhandulula" 
Ephesians2:15 hakamaneye njia ne lufu lua mubidi wandi, njia mene ya mu mikenshi yakadi ne mikandu ne mayisha; bua kufukeye ne bubidi buabo munda muandi muntu umue muhia-muhia; nunku wakabavuishila ditalala;" 
Ephesians2:16 bua yeye abalengeshishe bubidi buabo ne Nzambi mu mubidi umue bua mutshi wandi mutshiamakane, kuakashiheye nʼau njia." 
Ephesians2:17 Ne yeye wakalua, wakanuambila bakadi kule ne bakadi ha buihi lumu lua ditalala;" 
Ephesians2:18 bua bualu buandi bubidi buetu tudi ne ha kubuelela kudi Tatu mu Nyuma umue. 
Ephesians2:19 Nunku kanuena bantu ba bende ne benyi kabidi, kadi nudi bena kuabo ne basanto ne ba mu tshiota tshia Nzambi." 
Ephesians2:20 Tudi tuibakibua ha mutu ha bapostolo ne baprofete, bu bishimikidi bia nsubu; Kilisto Yesu nkayandi udi dibue dinene dia ku ditumba dia nsubu;" 
Ephesians2:21 bituha bionso bia nsubu bilungakasha bimpe bidi bidiundadiunda tô ne haluabi ntempelo wa tshijila mu Mukelenge; 
Ephesians2:22 munudi bibakibue hohamue kabidi, munda muandi, bua kuikala nsubu wa Nzambi mu Nyuma." 
Ephesians3:1 Bua muanda eu, meme Paulo, udi muena lukanu wa Kilisto Yesu bua bualu buenu, nuenu ba mu bisamba bia bende." 
Ephesians3:2 Bumue nuakunvua bua diabanyangana dia ngasa wa Nzambi wakumpabo bua bualu buenu; 
Ephesians3:3 ne bu muakambuluilabo bualu buakadi busokoka, bu munakadianjila kunufundila ne mei makese." 
Ephesians3:4 Nunku hanuâbala nudi mua kumanya dijingulula dianyi dia bualu bua Kilisto busokoka; 
Ephesians3:5 kabuakadi bumanyishibua bukua bantu mu bikondo bikuabo, kadi katataka buakabuluidibua bapostolo bandi ba tshijila ne baprofete mu Nyuma Muimpe;" 
Ephesians3:6 bualu ebu busokoka ne, Ba bisamba bia bende badi bahianyi nʼetu, ne badi bituha nʼetu bia mubidi umue, ne badi bangatshi nʼetu ba mulayi mu Kilisto Yesu bualu bua lumu luimpe," 
Ephesians3:7 luakunvuishabo muena mudimu walu bua diha dia ngasa wa Nzambi wakueleye bu mu dienzesha dia bukole buandi. 
Ephesians3:8 Kundi meme, udi mutambe basanto bonso kuhuekela, bakampa ngasa eu bua meme kuambila ba bisamba bia bende bua bubanshi bua Kilisto budibo kabai bamanye mua kubuidikisha;" 
Ephesians3:9 ne bua kumuenesha kumesu kua bantu bonso dilonga dia bualu buakadi busokoka tô bikondo bia bungi munda mua Nzambi wakafuka bintu bionso; 
Ephesians3:10 bua ekelesia amanyishe bakelenge ne bakokeshi badi mu miaba ya mu diulu meshi mavula a Nzambi; 
Ephesians3:11 bu mudi didisunguila diandi dia tshiendelele diakasunguleye mu Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu; 
Ephesians3:12 bua bualu buandi tudi ne dikima ne ha kubuelela kudiye ne ditekemena, bua ditabusha ditudi tumuitabushe nʼadi." 
Ephesians3:13 Nunku ndi ndomba ne, Mitshima yenu kaiteketshi bua makenga andi nʼau bua bualu buenu, adi butumbi buenu." 
Ephesians3:14 Bua muanda eu ndi ntua binu hanshi ku mpala kua Tatu," 
Ephesians3:15 ngudi tshiota tshionso tshia mu diulu ne tshia ba buloba tshidika dina diandi," 
Ephesians3:16 bua yeye anuhe bu mudi bubanshi bua butumbi buandi mua kukoleshibua munda muenu ne bukole kudi Nyuma wandi; 
Ephesians3:17 ne bua Kilisto ikale mu mitshima yenu bua ditabusha; bua muanda eu, ne nuenu, bamane kuela miji ne bashibue mu dinanga," 
Ephesians3:18 nuikale ne bukole bua kumanya nʼabu, hamue ne basanto bonso, mudi butshia ne bule ne bule bua mulu ne ndondo," 
Ephesians3:19 ne bua kumanya mudi dinanga dia Kilisto didi ditamba lungenyi lua bantu kudimanya, bua nuenu nûla tente ne tshiuwidi tshionso tshia Nzambi." 
Ephesians3:20 Kudi Nzambi, udi ne bukole bua kuenza malu matambe atudi katui bamanye mua kumulomba ne mua kuelangana meshi, bu mudi bukole budi butusonsola munda muetu," 
Ephesians3:21 butumbi buikale kudiye mu ekelesia ne mu Kilisto Yesu tô: bikondo ne bikondo tshiendelele. Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Nunku meme, amena lukanu wa Mukelenge, ndi nusengelela ne, Enda! bakanangane ne dibikila diakanubikilabo nʼadi," 
Ephesians4:2 mu kudihuekesha kuonso, mu kalolo, mu lutulu ne mu kuikalangana ne luse;" 
Ephesians4:3 nunanukile mua kulama buobumue buenu bua mu Nyuma Muimpe mu tshisuikidi tshia ditalala. 
Ephesians4:4 Mubidi udi umue ne Nyuma udi umue, bu munuakabikidibua kabidi mu ditekemena dimue dia dibikidibua dienu." 
Ephesians4:5 Mukelenge umue udiku, ditabusha dimue, dibatiza dimue," 
Ephesians4:6 Nzambi umue, Tatu wa bonso, udi ku mutu kua bonso, udi wenzesha bonso, udi munda mua bonso." 
Ephesians4:7 Muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muetu wakahebua ngasa bu mudi tshidikishilu tshia diha dia Kilisto. 
Ephesians4:8 Nunku Mukanda wa Nzambi udi wamba ne, Hakabandeye mu diulu, wakaya ne bakatambeye bukole mu buhika, Wakaha bantu maha abo" 
Ephesians4:9 (Ne bua dî edi ne, Wakabanda ma diulu, didi diamba tshinyi bikaladi kadî diamba ne, Wakadianjila kuhueka tô ne mu miaba ya munshi mua buloba?" 
Ephesians4:10 Yeye wakahueka udi muomumue ne yeye wakabanda kule ha mutu ha mûlu onso bua kûsheye bintu bionso tente). 
Ephesians4:11 Wakaha bakuabo bua kuikala bapostolo, ne bakuabo bua kuikala baprofete, ne bakuabo bua kuikala batangadiki, ne bakuabo bua kuikala bampasata, ne bakuabo bua kuikala bayishi;" 
Ephesians4:12 bua kulengeshabo basanto tshishiki bua bobo benze mudimu wa kukuatshisha bakuabo, bua kudiundishabo ekelesia udi mubidi wa Kilisto;" 
Ephesians4:13 tô ne hatuaheta buonso buetu buobumue bua ditabusha ne bua kumanya kua Muana wa Nzambi, tô ne hatuafika ku mulongo wa muntu mukole, tô ne ku luidi lua dikola didi mu tshiuwidi tshia Kilisto." 
Ephesians4:14 Wakenza nunku bua tuetu katuikadi bu bana kabidi badi batshikishibua eku ne eku ne badi batambakashibua ku luhehele luonso lua diyisha, ku majimbu a bantu, ku budimu budibo balonda mu mashimi abo;" 
Ephesians4:15 kadi bua tuetu, hatuamba mei malelela mu luse, tudiunde kudiye mu malu onso, udi mutu, Kilisto mene." 
Ephesians4:16 Bituha bionso bia mubidi bidi biakashangana ne bidi bilamakashangana kudiye bua dikuatshishangana dia manungu onso, bu mudi mudimu wa tshituha tshionso, bidi bidiundisha mubidi mujima, tô ne hatentamabi bu nsubu mu dinanga." 
Ephesians4:17 Nunku ndi nuambila dî edi, ndi numanyishadi kabidi mu Mukelenge ne, Kanuendi kabidi bu mudi bantu ba bisamba bia bende benda mu meshi abo a hatuhu;" 
Ephesians4:18 bakafikishibua mu meshi abo badi bavuishibua benyi ku muoyo wa Nzambi, bualu bua dihanga dia lungenyi munda muabo, bua dikoleshibua dia mitshima yabo." 
Ephesians4:19 Kabena bamanye mua kufua bundu kabidi, bakadifila ku masandi bua kuenzabo malu a bundu onso ne lukuka lukole." 
Ephesians4:20 Kadi nuenu kanuakayila ne Kilisto udi nunku; 
Ephesians4:21 binuikala bamunvuile ne binuikala bayishibue mu Kilisto bu mudi bushua bua mu Yesu; 
Ephesians4:22 numushe bienu muntu au wa kale, bu muakadi tshikadilu tshienu tshia diambedi, udi unyangukanyanguka bua nkuka idi imudinga." 
Ephesians4:23 Nuvuishibue bahia-bahia mu nyuma wa meshi enu. 
Ephesians4:24 Nudijadike muntu muhia-muhia wakafukibua mu tshifuanyikishi tshia Nzambi ne buakane ne tshijila bidi bifuma ku malu malelela. 
Ephesians4:25 Nunku nulekele mashimi, muntu ne muntu nuambilangane ne muena mutumba nʼenu mei malelela; bualu bua tuetu tudi bituha bia mubidi tunue ne bakuabo." 
Ephesians4:26 Nuikale ne tshishi kadi kanuenji bualu bubi; diba kadibueledi tshishi tshienu; 
Ephesians4:27 kanushidi diabolo muaba mu mitshima yenu. 
Ephesians4:28 Muntu wakuiba, alekele kuiba; kadi akuate mudimu, enze budi buimpe ne bianza biandi, bua yeye ikale ne tshia kuheye udi utshikengela." 
Ephesians4:29 Dî dibi kadihatuki mukana muenu; kadi ambai anu mei mimpe adi mua kudiundisha bantu bua kuvuidishila bantu badi baunvua disanka. 
Ephesians4:30 Kanunyingalashi Nyuma Muimpe wa Nzambi, nuakahebua tshimanyishilu kudiye munda muenu tshidiku tô ne halua dituku dia buhikudi." 
Ephesians4:31 Difika dia munda ne tshishi ne lukuna ne diyoyo ne dihendangana ne lukinu luonso biumushibue kunudi; 
Ephesians4:32 nuleshangane kalolo, nuikalangane ne mitshima ya luse, nulekelangane malu mabi enu bu muakanulekelela Nzambi malu mabi enu mu Kilisto." 
Ephesians5:1 Nunku mudihishe kuenza mudi Nzambi wenza, bu bana bandi bananga." 
Ephesians5:2 Nuende bienu mu luse bu muakanusua Kilisto, wakadifila bua bualu buetu bu mulambu ne tshintu tshishiha bua kuikaleye muhuya wa dihembu dimpe kudi Nzambi." 
Ephesians5:3 Tshiendenda tshia malunda mabi ne malu a bundu ne dikuma dia mutshima kabitedibu mene munkatshi muenu; ebu budi buimpe bua basanto benze. 
Ephesians5:4 Kanuikadi ne mei mabi ne tshiakulakula ne mmeku ya bundu bidi kabi biakane; kadi nusakidile Nzambi. 
Ephesians5:5 Nudi bamanye bienu bulelela ne, Kakuena muena masandi anyi muena mutshima mubi anyi muena lukuka lua biuma udi mutendeledi wa mpingu, udi ne buhianyi mu bukelenge bua Kilisto ne bua Nzambi." 
Ephesians5:6 Muntu kanudingi ne mei a hatuhu; bualu bua malu â tshishi tshia Nzambi tshilualua kudi bana ba buhidia. 
Ephesians5:7 Nunku kanuikadi batshiangatshi nʼabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Diambedi nuakadi midima, kadi katataka nudi munya mu Mukelenge; endai bienu bu bana ba munya" 
Ephesians5:9 (mamuma a munya adi malu mimpe onso ne malu makane ne malu malelela)," 
Ephesians5:10 nutete budi Mukelenge muanyishe. 
Ephesians5:11 Kanuikadi ne buobumue ne midimu mienza mu midima idi kayi ikuama mamuma mimpe; kadi nubatuishe bua mianda ei. 
Ephesians5:12 Bualu bua malu adibo benza mu musokoko adi atufuisha bundu bituâmba. 
Ephesians5:13 Malu onso, habatuishabo bua malu â, adi amueneshibua ku munya; bualu bua bualu buonso budi bumueneshibua budi bulua munya." 
Ephesians5:14 Bua bualu ebu Nzambi udi wamba ne, Tabala, wewe udi mulale tulu, Bika ku lufu, Ne Kilisto neakutemene." 
Ephesians5:15 Nunku nudimuke bienu bu munudi nuenda; kanuendi bu badi kabai ne meshi, kadi nuende bu bena meshi;" 
Ephesians5:16 nudisumbile tshikondo batshiditshiku tshia kuenzamu malu mimpe, bualu bua matuku adi mabi." 
Ephesians5:17 Nunku kanuikadi bu bahote, kadi nujingulule mudi disua dia Mukelenge." 
Ephesians5:18 Kanukuatshiki maluvu, mudi dinyanguka dia muoyo munda muau, kadi nûshibue tente ne Nyuma Muimpe." 
Ephesians5:19 Nusombeshangane ne misambu ya bena kuitabusha ba bale ne ya bena Kilisto ne ya Nyuma; nuimbile Mukelenge misambu, numutumbishe ne biombelu bia mitshima yenu." 
Ephesians5:20 Misangu yonso nusakidile Nzambi Tatu bua bintu bionso mu dina dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto. 
Ephesians5:21 Nukokelangane mu ditshina dia Kilisto. 
Ephesians5:22 Bakashi, nukokele babayenu bu munudi nukokela Mukelenge." 
Ephesians5:23 Bualu bua mulume udi ku mutu kua mukashi bu mudi Kilisto ku mutu kua ekelesia, yeye musungidi wa ekelesia, mubidi wandi mene." 
Ephesians5:24 Kadi bu mudi ekelesia ukokela Kilisto, nunku bakashi bakokele babayabo mu malu onso." 
Ephesians5:25 Balume, suai bakashi benu bu muakasua Kilisto ekelesia kabidi, wakadifila bua bualu buandi;" 
Ephesians5:26 bua yeye amujidile, mumane kumulengesha ne kuvua kua mai ne dî diandi;" 
Ephesians5:27 bua yeye aditekele ekelesia ku mpala kuandi bu wa butumbi, kai ne ditoba ne mufudi anyi tshintu tshikuabo tshia nunku; kadi bua ekelesia ikale wa tshijila ne kai muhishibue." 
Ephesians5:28 Nunku budi balume nʼabu mbua kusua bakashi babo mene bu mudibo basue mibidi yabo. Muntu udi unanga mukashi wandi udi udinanga; 
Ephesians5:29 bualu bua kakuena kuanza kuikala muntu udi ne mubidi wandi lukuna; kadi udi udisha mubidi wandi, udi ûlama, bu mudi Kilisto ulama ekelesia;" 
Ephesians5:30 bualu bua tuetu tudi bituha bia mubidi wandi. 
Ephesians5:31 Bua muanda eu muntu nealekele tatu wandi ne mamu wandi, nealamate mukashi wandi, bubidi buabo nebalue mubidi umue." 
Ephesians5:32 Bualu ebu busokoka budi bunene; kadi ndi ngamba bualu bua Kilisto ne ekelesia. 
Ephesians5:33 Kadi nuenu kabidi, mulume ne mulume, anange mukashi wandi bu mudiye udi nanga; ne mukashi anemeke bayandi." 
Ephesians6:1 Bana, tumikilai baledi benu mu Mukelenge; bua bualu ebu budi buakane." 
Ephesians6:2 Unemeke tatu webe ne mamu webe (eu udi mukenshi wa kumudilu udi ne mulayi)," 
Ephesians6:3 bua wewe wikale ne dikasa dimpe ne wikale ne muoyo musangu mule ha buloba. 
Ephesians6:4 Ne nuenu batatu, kanufuishi bana benu balela tshishi; nubadiundishe bimpe ne dihela ne didimusha bia Mukelenge." 
Ephesians6:5 Nuenu bahika, tumikilai dî dia badi banfumu benu ba mu malu a ha buloba ne kutshina ne kuzakala ne mutshima umue, bu munudi nutumikila Kilisto." 
Ephesians6:6 Kanuenji mudimu bu bahika ba mesu, badi bu basankishi ba bantu; kadi bu bahika ba Kilisto, nuenze bu mudi disua dia Nzambi ne mitshima yenu;" 
Ephesians6:7 nuenze mudimu ne disanka bu munudi nuenzela Mukelenge mudimu, kembu munudi nuenzela bantu." 
Ephesians6:8 Nudi bamanye bienu ne, Bualu buonso buimpe budi muntu ne muntu wenza, buobuo mene mbudiye wangata kabidi kudi Mukelenge, bikaleye muhika anyi mudishikamine." 
Ephesians6:9 Ne nuenu banfumu, nubenzele muomumue, nuhidie kubakanyina; mimanye ne, Mukelenge wabo ne wenu kabidi udi mu diulu, ne kakuena kansungunsungu kudiye." 
Ephesians6:10 Ku ndekelu, nudikoleshe mu Mukelenge ne mu bukole buandi bunene." 
Ephesians6:11 Luatai bintu bionso bia nvita bia Nzambi, bua nuenu numanye mua kuimana bakandamana ku mpala kua mateyi a diabolo." 
Ephesians6:12 Bualu bua diluangana dietu dia bibula kadiena dia kufuilangana ne munyinyi ne mashi, kadi ndia kufuilangana ne makelenge ne makokeshi ne banfumu ba midima ba buloba ebu, ne bisumbu bia nyuma mibi bidi mu miaba ya mu diulu." 
Ephesians6:13 Bua muanda eu angatai bintu bionso bia nvita bia Nzambi, bua nuenu numanye mua kudimanyika bimpe halua dituku dibi, ne, hanuashikisha kuenza malu onso, nudi mua kuimana." 
Ephesians6:14 Nunku imanai bienu, bamane kusuika bulelela mu bifuka bienu bu mukaba, bamane kuteka buakane bu tshibuikilu tshia ha tshiadi;" 
Ephesians6:15 bamane kubuesha makasa enu mu bisabata bia kudilongolola kua lumu luimpe lua ditalala. 
Ephesians6:16 Ha mutu ha bintu bionso nuambule ngabu wa ditabusha, unudi mua kuehela nʼandi miketa yonso ya Satana idi ne kahia kasuikaku." 
Ephesians6:17 Nuangate tshifulu tshia luhandu, ne muele wa Nyuma udi dî dia Nzambi;" 
Ephesians6:18 nutendelele Nzambi misangu yonso ne kulomba kuonso ne disengelela dionso mu Nyuma Mumpe; nuikale batabale mu dinanukila dionso ne disengelela bua basanto bonso," 
Ephesians6:19 ne bua bualu buanyi kabidi, bua meme kuheshibua mua kuakula hanabulula mukana muanyi ne bua meme kumanyisha bantu ne dikima bualu bua lumu luimpe busokoka." 
Ephesians6:20 Bua bualu ebu ndi muloho wa Nzambi mu nkanu, bua meme kuambila bantu bualu ne dikima bu mundi nʼabu bua kubambila." 
Ephesians6:21 Bua nuenu kabidi numanye malu andi nʼau ne mundi ngenza, Tukiko, muanʼetu munanga wa mu Kilisto, muena mudimu wa lulamatu mu Mukelenge, nennumanyishe malu onso;" 
Ephesians6:22 unakanutumina bua muanda eu mene, bua nuenu numanye bu mutudi emu, ne bua kusambeye mitshima yenu." 
Ephesians6:23 Ditalala dikale kudi bana betu ba mu Kilisto, ne dinanga disangisha ne ditabusha bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto." 
Ephesians6:24 Ngasa ikale ne bantu bonso badi bananga Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ne dinanga didi kadi mua kuhanga. 
Philippians1:1 Paulo ne Timote, bahika ba Kilisto Yesu, kudi basanto bonso ba mu Kilisto Yesu badi ku Filipoi, ne bakulu batangidi ne bulami;" 
Philippians1:2 ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
Philippians1:3 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi wanyi bua dinuvuluka dianyi dionso; 
Philippians1:4 ntu nganulombela Nzambi ne disanka misangu yonso mu disengelela dianyi dionso bua bualu buenu 
Philippians1:5 bualu bua buobumue buenu nʼanyi mu kutangalasha kua lumu luimpe ku dituku dia kumudilu dinuakalunvua tô ne katataka. 
Philippians1:6 Ndi mumanye bualu ebu mene ne, Yeye nguakabanga mudimu muimpe munda muenu neaushikishe tô ne halua dituku dia Yesu Kilisto;" 
Philippians1:7 bu mudibi bimpe bua meme kuikala ne meshi â munda muanyi bua bualu buenu, bualu bua ndi nʼenu mu mutshima wanyi; bualu bua mu nkanu yanyi ne mu kuvidila ne mu kujadika kua lumu luimpe, buonso buenu nudi bangatshi nʼanyi ba ngasa." 
Philippians1:8 Nzambi udi mumanyi wanyi bu mundi nujinga ne dinanga didi munda mua Kilisto Yesu. 
Philippians1:9 Ndi ndomba bualu ebu ne, Luse luenu lutambe kudiundadiunda mu dimanya ne mu dijingulula dia malu onso;" 
Philippians1:10 bua nuenu mimanye mua kujadika malu adi makane; ne bua nuenu nuikale ne mitshima mitoke, kanui balenduishi ba bakuabo, tô ne halua dituku dia Kilisto;" 
Philippians1:11 ne bua nuenu nûshibue tente ne mamuma a buakane adi afuma kudi Yesu Kilisto bua butumbi ne kutumbishibua bia Nzambi. 
Philippians1:12 Bana betu ba mu Kilisto, ndi musue nuenu mimanye ne, Malu akunkuata akuandamuka bua kudiundisha lumu luimpe;" 
Philippians1:13 nunku nkanu yanyi bua Kilisto yakamanyibua munkatshi mua masalayi onso a mu nsubu wa lukanu ne munkatshi mua bantu bonso bakuabo kabidi. 
Philippians1:14 Ne batambe bungi ba munkatshi mua bana betu ba mu Mukelenge bakakolesha mitshima yabo bualu bua nkanu yanyi, badi bamba dî dia Nzambi ne dikima ditambe, kabai batshina." 
Philippians1:15 Bulelela, bakuabo badi bamba Kilisto bualu bua mukau ne kutandangana; ne bakuabo kabidi badi bamuamba bualu bua disanka dimpe;" 
Philippians1:16 aba badi bamuamba bua luse, bamanye ne ndi mutekibue bua kuvidia kua lumu luimpe;" 
Philippians1:17 kadi bakuabo badi bamba Kilisto bua ditahuluka, kabai ne mitshima mitoke, bela meshi bua kunjudila makenga mu nkanu yanyi." 
Philippians1:18 Nunku ntshinyi? Anu bualu ebu ne, Mu tshiambilu tshionso, bikalatshi mu lubombo anyi mu bushua, Kilisto udi wambibua; ne mu bualu ebu ndi nsanka, E, bulelela, nensankemu kabidi." 
Philippians1:19 Bua ndi mumanye ne bualu ebu nebuandamuke bu luhandu luanyi bualu bua disengelela dienu ne bua dikumbasha dia Nyuma wa Yesu Kilisto. 
Philippians1:20 Mbu mudi dialamina dianyi dikole ne ditekemena dianyi ne, tshiena nfuishibua bundu nasha mu bualu bumue; kadi bu munakamana kuenza misangu yonso ne dikima dionso, nunku katataka Kilisto neatumbishibue mu mubidi wanyi, nasha buikala ku muoyo Bau, nasha buikala ku lufu luau." 
Philippians1:21 Bualu bua kudi meme eu kuikala ne muoyo nKilisto, ne kufua kudi kuhita mushinga muimpe." 
Philippians1:22 Bingikala ne bualu bua kuikala ne muoyo mu mubidi,—ne bikala bualu ebu mamuma a mudimu wanyi, tshiena mumanye bualu bunasungula." 
Philippians1:23 Kadi adi mujikila hankatshi ha malu â abidi: ndi njinga bua kumuka hanu bua kuikala ne Kilisto; bua bualu ebu budi butamba buimpe; 
Philippians1:24 kadi kushala mu mubidi mbualu bunudi nutamba kukengela. 
Philippians1:25 Bualu bua ndi ngitabushishibua bualu ebu, ndi mumanye ne nenshaleku mu mubidi, E, bulelela, nenshale nʼenu bonso bua kudiunda kuenu ne kusanka kuenu bia mu ditabusha;" 
Philippians1:26 bua ditumbisha dienu dikumbane mu Kilisto Yesu mu bualu buanyi bua dikala dianyi nʼenu tshiakabidi. 
Philippians1:27 Anu bualu ebu, bikadilu bienu bikale biakanangane ne lumu luimpe lua Kilisto; bua binalua kunumona anyi bingikala kukuabo, ngunvue bianyi lumu lua malu enu ne, Badi bajalama mu nyuma tunue, ne badi batshinta hohamue ne mutshima umue bua ditabusha dia lumu luimpe," 
Philippians1:28 ne kabena batshinyishibua nasha ku bualu bumue kudi bena lukuna. Bualu ebu budi tshileshilu tshia dibutuka diabo, kadi ntshia luhandu kunudi, ne luolu ludi lufuma kudi Nzambi;" 
Philippians1:29 bualu bua nuakahebua ngasa bua bualu bua Kilisto, kena anu bua kumuitabusha, kadi bua kukenga bua bualu buandi kabidi;" 
Philippians1:30 nudi ne diluangana diodiumue dinuakatangila munda muanyi, ne dinudi nunyua katataka ne didi munda muanyi." 
Philippians2:1 Nunku bikalaku ditendekena dia mu Kilisto, bikalaku disengelela dia mu dinanga, bikalaku buobumue bua Nyuma, bikalaku mitshima ya luse ne malu a dinanga," 
Philippians2:2 nunvudishile disanka dianyi, bua nuenu nuele meshi muomumue, nuikale bienu ne dinanga diodiumue ne mutshima muomumue ne meshi amue." 
Philippians2:3 Kanuenji muanda bua ditahuluka anyi bua kuditumbisha kua hatuhu; kadi mu mitshima mihuekela muntu ne muntu abale mukuabo bu muntu udi umutamba yeye buimpe. 
Philippians2:4 Muntu ne muntu katangidi malu andi nkayau, kadi muntu ne muntu atangile kabidi malu a bakuabo." 
Philippians2:5 Nuikale ne meshi â munda muenu akadi kabidi munda mua Kilisto Yesu. 
Philippians2:6 Yeye wakadi muikale ne Bunzambi mene, kadi kakabala buobumue buandi ne Nzambi bu tshintu tshia kulaminyina bikole;" 
Philippians2:7 kadi yeye wakadiumushila bimanyinu bia butumbi buandi, hakangateye mubidi wa muhika, hakalueye mu tshifuanyikishi tshia muntu." 
Philippians2:8 Ne hakamuenekeye mu tshifuanyikishi tshia muntu, yeye wakadihuekesha, wakalua mutumikidi tô ne ku lufu, ku lufu mene lua ha mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Philippians2:9 Ne bua bualu ebu Nzambi wakamubandisha kulu kulê, wakamuha dina didi ha mutu ha dina dionso;" 
Philippians2:10 ne bua mu dina dia Yesu binu bionso bitue hanshi, ne bia bintu bia mu diulu ne bintu bia ha buloba ne bintu bia munshi mua buloba," 
Philippians2:11 ne bua ndimi yonso yambe hatoke ne Yesu Kilisto udi Mukelenge, tô ne ku butumbi bua Nzambi Tatu." 
Philippians2:12 Nunku bananga banyi, bu munuakatumikila misangu yonso, kembua kuikala kuanyi munkatshi muenu nkayaku, kadi mpindiu nudi nutamba kuenza nunku handi tshîku, nudienzeshe bua kushikisha luhandu luenu ne ditshina ne dizakala," 
Philippians2:13 bualu bua Nzambi ngudi wenzesha munda muenu bua kusua ne bua kuenza kabidi bualu bua disua diandi dimpe. 
Philippians2:14 Nuenze malu onso kanui ne ditontolola ne dielangana dia mpata; 
Philippians2:15 bua nuenu nulue bantu badi kabai ne bualu ne badi ne mitshima mitoke, bu bana ba Nzambi badi kabai ne tshilema munkatshi mua bena tshikondo tshikonyangala ne tshia tshishiku; banudi numueneka munkatshi muabo du minda ya ha buloba," 
Philippians2:16 nuboluele dî dia muoyo; bua meme kuikala ne bua mua kutumbila nʼabu mu dituta dia Kilisto ne, Tshiakidikisha lubilu tshianana ne tshiakenza mudimu wanyi hatuhu." 
Philippians2:17 E, bulelela, binahongolodibua ha mulambu ne ha ditendelela dia ditabusha dienu, ndi nsanka bianyi, ne ndi nsanka ne buonso buenu;" 
Philippians2:18 muomumue nuenu nusanke bienu, nusanke nʼanyi kabidi." 
Philippians2:19 Ndi ntekemena mu Mukelenge Yesu bua kunutumina Timote tshituha tshihi bua meme kuikala ne busambi buimpe hanamanya malu enu. 
Philippians2:20 Bua tshiena ne mukuabo udi ne mutshima bu wandi wadielesha meshi bulelela bua malu enu. 
Philippians2:21 Bualu bua buonso buabo badi badikebela malu abo, kabena bakeba malu a Yesu Kilisto." 
Philippians2:22 Kadi nudi bamanye bujalami buandi ne, bu mudi muana ne tatu wandi, nunku yeye wakakuata nʼanyi mudimu wa mu lumu luimpe." 
Philippians2:23 Nunku ndi ntekemena kumutuma yeye ku tshikondo tshindi ntangila muyaya malu anyi. 
Philippians2:24 Kadi ndi ne ditekemena mu Mukelenge kabidi ne meme nkayanyi nendue tshituha tshihi. 
Philippians2:25 Kadi nakuelangana meshi ne, Bualu buakunkuata bua kunutumina Epafodito, muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto ne muena mudimu nʼanyi ne disalayi nʼanyi ne musheshe wenu ne mukuatshishi wanyi ne bintu bindi nkengela." 
Philippians2:26 Bualu bua yeye wakanujinga buonso buenu, ne wakabungama bikole bua nuenu nuakunsua lumu ne, Yeye udi usama." 
Philippians2:27 Ne bulelela, yeye wakadi usama, hehi ne lufu; kudi Nzambi wakamufua luse, kakamufuilalu yeye nkayandi kadi wakanfuilalu meme kabidi, bua meme tshikadi ne kanyinganyinga ha mutu ha kanyinganyinga." 
Philippians2:28 Nunku nakumutuma ne disuminyina ditambe, bua nuenu nusanke hanuamonangana nʼandi kabidi, ne bua meme ngikale ne kanyinganyinga kakehe." 
Philippians2:29 Nunku numusankidile mu Mukelenge ne disanka dionso; ne nutumbishe bantu badi nunku; 
Philippians2:30 bualu bua yeye wakalua ha buihi ne lufu bualu bua mudimu wa Kilisto, yeye wakahana muoyo wandi ku lufu bua kunkumbashila bintu biakadi bishala ku dikuatshisha dienu kundi." 
Philippians3:1 Tshiashadidi mpindiu, bana betu, nusanke mu Mukelenge. Kunufundila malu momumue kakuena kuntonda, kadi kudi kunukuatshisha nuenu." 
Philippians3:2 Nudimuke kudi mbua, nudimuke kudi benji babi ba mudimu, nudimuke kudi baditahi ba mubidi." 
Philippians3:3 Bualu bua tuetu tudi batengula badi batendelela ku Nyuma wa Nzambi ne badi batumbila mu Kilisto Yesu, ne badi kabai ne dieyemena dia malu a mubidi," 
Philippians3:4 nasha meme nkayanyi ngeyemena malu mene a mubidi. Bikala muntu mukuabo wela meshi bua kuikala ne dieyemena dia malu a mubidi, meme ndi mua kumutamba kuikala nʼadi." 
Philippians3:5 Bakantengula dituta dia muanda mukulu; nakadi Muena Isalele, wa tshisamba tshia Benyamina, Muena Ebelu wa Bena Ebelu; mu bualu bua mikenshi nakadi Mufalese;" 
Philippians3:6 mu bualu bua lukunukunu nakadi nkengesha bena ekelesia; ne mu bualu bua buakane bua mu mikenshi, nakalua muntu udi kai ne bualu." 
Philippians3:7 Kadi malu akadi a mushinga muimpe kundi, nguou au nakabala bu tshintu tshijimina bua Kilisto." 
Philippians3:8 E, bulelela mene, ndi mbala bintu bionso bu tshintu tshijimina bualu bua bulengele butambe bua kumanya kua Kilisto Yesu, Mukelenge wanyi; unakajimishila bintu bionso bua bualu buandi, ne ndi mbibala bu bintu bia kuela ku diala bua meme mpete Kilisto," 
Philippians3:9 ne bua kunsanganabo munda muandi, tshi ne buakane buanyi budi bufume ku mikenshi, kadi ngikale ne buobu abu budi bua ditabusha dia mu Kilisto, buakane mene budi bufuma kudi Nzambi hangitabusha." 
Philippians3:10 Mbua meme kumumanya yeye, ne bukole bua dibika diandi ku lufu, ne buobumue nʼandi mu makenga andi, muikale mufuanyikishibue nʼandi mu lufu luandi;" 
Philippians3:11 binamanya mua kufika ku dibika dia munkatshi mua bafue. 
Philippians3:12 Kembua nakamana kuheta buala ebu, anyi bua nakumana kuakashibua; kadi ndi ntshinta bikole, binamanya mua kukuata bualu buakunkuatshilabo kabidi kudi Kilisto Yesu bualu buabu." 
Philippians3:13 Bana betu, tshiena ndibala bu muntu wakamana kubukuata; kadi ndi ngenza bualu bumue: Handi mpua muoyo bua malu a ku nyima, handi ndobelela ku malu adi ku mpala," 
Philippians3:14 ndi ntshinta bua kufika ku ndekelu wa nshila bua kuangata bukenshi bua dibikila dia mulu dia Nzambi mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Philippians3:15 Nunku buonso buetu bakamana kukola mu bualu bua Nzambi tuikale ne meshi momumue; ne binuikala ne meshi makuabo mu bualu bukuabo, Nzambi neanubuluile bualu ebu kabidi;" 
Philippians3:16 kadi kutuakamana kufika, tuende bietu mu nshila muomumue." 
Philippians3:17 Bana betu, nulue bienu bangidikishi banyi hohamue; nutangile bantu badi benda nunku bu munudi nʼetu bu tshidikishilu." 
Philippians3:18 Bualu bua ba bungi badi benda, banakanuambila malu abo misangu ya bungi, ne bandi nuambila katataka ne binsonshi ku mesu ne, Badi bena lukuna lua mutshi mutshiamakane wa Kilisto;" 
Philippians3:19 kunshikidilu kuabo didi dibutuka, nzambi wabo ndifu diabo, butumbi buabo budi mu bundu buabo; badi belangana meshi a malu a ha buloba." 
Philippians3:20 Bualu bua kuetu mene kudi mu diulu, kutudi tuindila kabidi Musungidi, Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto;" 
Philippians3:21 yeye neakudimune mibidi ya buhuekele buetu bua kufuananganai ne mubidi wandi wa butumbi, bu mudi kuenza kuandi kudiye mumanye mua kuvuisha nʼaku bintu bionso ku nyima kuandi." 
Philippians4:1 Nunku bana betu bananga ne bajingibua, disanka dianyi ne tshifulu tshianyi tshia butumbi, nuimane bajalame mu Mukelenge, bananga banyi." 
Philippians4:2 Ndi nsengelela Ewodia ne ndi nsengelela Suntuke bua kuikalabo ne meshi amue mu Mukelenge. 
Philippians4:3 E, ndi ndomba wewe kabidi, muenu nʼanyi ku mutshi wa tshikokedi wa bushua, bua wewe ukuatshishangane ne bakashi aba, bualu bua bobo bakenza nʼanyi mudimu wa lumu luimpe, ne Kulemento kabidi ne bakuabo benji nʼanyi ba mudimu, badi ne mena abo mafunda mu mukanda wa muoyo." 
Philippians4:4 Nusanke mu Mukelenge misangu yonso, nengambe tshiakabidi ne, Nusanke." 
Philippians4:5 Buhole buenu bumanyishibue kudi bantu bonso. Mukelenge udi ha buihi. 
Philippians4:6 Lekelai kudiatshisha ku bualu bumue; kadi mu malu onso ku ditendelela ne ku disengelela numanyishe Nzambi bua milombu yenu ne disakidila. 
Philippians4:7 Ne ditalala dia Nzambi didi ditamba dijingulula dionso dia bantu, nedilame mitshima yenu ne meshi enu mu Kilisto Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Bana betu, tshiashadidi mpindiu, ne, Malu onso adi malelela, ne malu onso adi a buneme, ne malu onso adi makane, ne malu onso adi a butoke bua mutshima, ne malu onso adi malengele a dinanga, ne malu onso adi ne lumu luimpe; bikalaku buimpe ne bikalaku butumbi, nuelangane meshi a malu â." 
Philippians4:9 Malu â kabidi anuakayila ne anuakangata ne anuakunvua ne anuakatangila kundi, nuikale nuenze malu â; ne Nzambi wa ditalala neikale nʼenu." 
Philippians4:10 Nakusanka bikole mu Mukelenge bua mpindiu, musangu walehi, nuakasangisha meshi enu a bualu buanyi; bulelela, nuakadi nuela meshi a bualu buanyi, kadi kanuakadi ne tshikondo tshimpe." 
Philippians4:11 Tshiena ngakula bua dikengela dia bintu; bualu bua nakuyila mua kuikala ne mutshima muhole mu malu onso andi nʼau. 
Philippians4:12 Ndi mumanye mua kuhuekeshibua, ndi mumanye mua kuikala ne bintu bitamba; mu bualu buonso ne mu mianda yonso nakumana kuyila bualu busokoka bua kuikala ne difu diukute, ne mua kuikala ne nsala, ne mua kuikala ne bintu bitambe bungi, ne bua kuikala ne bintu bitambe kukeha." 
Philippians4:13 Ndi mumanye mua kuenza malu onso mu Mukelenge udi unkolesha. 
Philippians4:14 Kadi nuenu nuakenza bimpe hanuakadi nʼanyi ne buobumue mu dikenga dianyi. 
Philippians4:15 Nuenu mene, Bena Filipoi, nudi bamanye kabidi ne, Ku tshibangidilu tshia kuamba kuanyi kua lumu luimpe, hanakumuka ku Makedonia, kakuakadi ekelesia mukuabo wakadi ne buobumue nʼanyi mu bualu bua kuha ne kuangata kua bintu, anu nuenu nkayenu." 
Philippians4:16 Bualu bua hanakadi mu Tesalonike, nuakantumina bintu binakadi nʼabi bualu misangu ne misangu." 
Philippians4:17 Kembua ndi nkeba kuha kuenu, kadi ndi nkeba mamuma adi avulangana ku dibadibua dienu." 
Philippians4:18 Kadi ndi ne bintu bionso ne bitamba; nakukuta bualu bua nakangata bintu kudi Epafodito biakafuma kunudi, muhuya wa dihembu dimpe, mulambu muitabushibue, udi usankisha Nzambi." 
Philippians4:19 Ne Nzambi wanyi neanukumbashile bintu bionso binudi nʼabi bualu bu mudi bubanshi buandi bua mu butumbi mu Kilisto Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Butumbi buikale kudi Nzambi wetu Tatu ku bikondo ne ku bikondo. Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Nuele basanto bonso ba mu Kilisto Yesu muoyo. Bana betu ba mu Kilisto badi nʼanyi badi banuela muoyo. 
Philippians4:22 Basanto bonso badi banuela muoyo, ne ba mu nsubu wa Kaisa badi batamba kusua kunuela muoyo." 
Philippians4:23 Ngasa wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ikale ne nyuma wenu. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, mupostolo wa Kilisto Yesu bua disua dia Nzambi, ne Timote, muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto," 
Colossians1:2 kudi badi mu Kolosai, basanto ne bana betu bananukidi ba mu Kilisto. Ngasa ikale kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu." 
Colossians1:3 Tudi tusakidila Nzambi, Tatu wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, tudi tunulombela Nzambi misangu yonso." 
Colossians1:4 Tuakulua lumu lua ditabusha dienu dia mu Kilisto Yesu ne bua dinanga dinudi nʼadi kudi basanto bonso," 
Colossians1:5 bualu bua ditekemena didi dinutekedibue mu diulu, dinuakadianjila kunyua lumu luadi mu di dia bushua dia lumu luimpe" 
Colossians1:6 ludi lulua kunudi. Mbu mudilu mu buloba buonso kabidi lukuama mamuma ne ludiundadiunda bu mudilu luenza munda muenu kabidi, katshia ku dituku dinuakunvua ne dinuakamanya ngasa wa Nzambi mu bushua." 
Colossians1:7 Ebu mbu munuakamanya kudi Epafa, muhika nʼetu munanga, udi biandi muena mudimu munanukidi wa Kilisto bua bualu buetu." 
Colossians1:8 Yeye kabidi wakatulesha dinanga dienu dia mu Nyuma Muimpe. 
Colossians1:9 Bua muanda eu, tuetu kabidi, katshia ku dituku dituakunvua lumu etu, katuena tulekela kutendelela Nzambi bua bualu buenu, ne kumulomba bua nuenu nûshibue tente ne kumanya kua disua diandi mu meshi onso ne dijingulula bia mu Nyuma;" 
Colossians1:10 ne bua nuenu nuende mu bienzedi bidi biakanangane ne Mukelenge ku dimusankisha dionso, ne bua nuenu nukuame mamuma mu mudimu wonso muimpe, ne bua nuenu nudiundadiunde mu kumanya kuenu kua Nzambi;" 
Colossians1:11 ne bua nuenu mikoleshibue ne bukole buonso, bu mudi bukole bua butumbi buandi, tô ne ku dinanukila dionso ne ku lutulu lusangisha ne disanka." 
Colossians1:12 Nusakidile Tatu, wakatuvuisha bantu badi mua kuikala babanyanganyi ba buhianyi bua basanto bua mu munya." 
Colossians1:13 Nyeye wakatuhandisha ku bukokeshi bua mîdima, wakatubuesha mu bukelenge bua Muana wa dinanga diandi," 
Colossians1:14 utudi ne kuhikudibua kuetu munda muandi, nkujimisha kua mibi yetu." 
Colossians1:15 Yeye udi tshifuanyikishi tshia Nzambi udi kai mua kumuenebua, muanʼa bute wa bifukibua bionso;" 
Colossians1:16 bualu bua munda muandi muakafukibua bintu bionso bia mu diulu ne bia ha buloba, ne bintu bidi bimuenebua ne bintu bidi kabi bimuenebua, ne bidi nkuasa ya butumbi anyi makelenge anyi manfumu anyi makokeshi; bintu bionso biakafukibua ku bukole buandi ne bua bualu buandi." 
Colossians1:17 Ne yeye udi ku mpala kua bintu bionso ne bintu bionso bidi bikuatakasha munda muandi. 
Colossians1:18 Ne yeye udi mutu wa mubidi, ngekelesia mene: udi biandi tshibangidilu, muanʼa bute wa munkatshi mua bafue, bua yeye ikale ku mpala mu malu onso." 
Colossians1:19 Bualu bua Tatu wakasanka bua tshiuwidi tshionso tshia Bunzambi tshikale munda muandi; 
Colossians1:20 ne bua kulengeshisheye bintu bionso kudiye bua bualu buandi, yeye mumane kuvuisha ditalala ku mashi a ku mutshi wandi mutshiamakane; bua bualu buandi bua kulengeshisheye bintu bionso kudiye, ne bidi ha buloba ne bidi mu diulu." 
Colossians1:21 Ne nuenu, bakadi diambedimbedi ba bende ne bena lukuna nʼandi mu meshi enu bua bienzedi bienu bibi," 
Colossians1:22 katataka yeye wakulengeshangana nʼenu mu mubidi wandi wa ha buloba bualu bua lufu luandi, bua kunuteka ku mesu kuandi bu bantu ba tshijila, badi kabai ne tshilema ne badi kabai mua kubandibua ku mpala kuandi;" 
Colossians1:23 binuananukila mu ditabusha, bajadikibua ne bashindikibue bikole, ne kanui basesuishibue ku ditekemena dia lumu luimpe lunuakunvua, luakambibua munkatshi mua bifukibua bionso munshi mua diulu; lunakavuishibua, meme Paulo, muena mudimu walu." 
Colossians1:24 Mpindiu ndi nsanka mu makenga andi nʼau bua bualu buenu, ne ku luanyi luseke ndi nkumbasha mu muhidi wanyi makenga a Kilisto atshidi mashale bua mubidi wandi, ekelesia mene." 
Colossians1:25 Nakavuishibua muena mudimu wa ekelesia bu mudi bulami bua kudi Nzambi buakampeye bua bualu buenu, bua meme kukumbasha dî dia Nzambi mu kuamba kuanyi;" 
Colossians1:26 didi bualu buakadi busokoka tô bidimu ne bikondo, kadi katataka buakumueneshibua kudi basanto bandi," 
Colossians1:27 kudibo kuakasua Nzambi kubamanyisha budi bubanshi hua butumbi hua hualu ebu busokoka munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, budi Kilisto munda muenu, ditekemena dia butumbi." 
Colossians1:28 Nyeye utudi tuamba, tudimusha muntu yonso ne tuyisha muntu yonso mu meshi onso, bua tuetu tumanye mua kumuenesha muntu yonso muakane tshishiki mu Kilisto." 
Colossians1:29 Bua bualu ebu kabidi ndi ngenza mudimu bikole, ndi ntshinta bikole bu mudi kuenzesha kuandi kudi kuenza munda muanyi mu bukole." 
Colossians2:1 Bualu bua ndi musue nuenu mimanye bunene bua bukole bundi ntshinta nʼabu bua bualu buenu, ne bua badi mu Laodikiya, ne bua bonso badi kabai banze kuntangila ku mesu;" 
Colossians2:2 bua mitshima yabo isambibue, bobo basuikakasha ku luse tô ne ku bubanshi buonso bua kumanya kujalama kua dijingulula diabo, bua bobo bamanye bimpe bualu bua Nzambi buakadi busokoka, nKilisto mene." 
Colossians2:3 Munda muandi mudi musokoka bibutshidibue bionso bia meshi ne bia lungenyi. 
Colossians2:4 Ndi ngamba bualu ebu bua muntu kanudingi ne mei a kunubomba nʼau. 
Colossians2:5 Bua bingikala tshi nʼenu mu mubidi wanyi, ntshidi nʼenu mu nyuma wanyi; ndi nsanka, ndi mona kudilongolola kuenu ne kutantamana kua ditabusha dienu dia mu Kilisto." 
Colossians2:6 Nunku, bu munuakitabusha Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge, nuikale nuende mu Kilisto;" 
Colossians2:7 nuikale ne miji yenu miedibue munda muandi, nuikale nuashibue munda muandi, ne nuikale nujadikibue mu ditabusha dienu, bu munuakayishibua; nukumbane mu disakidila." 
Colossians2:8 Nudimuke bua muntu kikadiku udi mua kununyanga ne nkindi yandi ne lubombo lua hatuhu, bu mudi bilele biamba kudi bantu, bu mudi mayisha a kumudilu a ha buloba, ne kembu mudi Kilisto mutuyiske." 
Colossians2:9 Bualu bua munda mua Kilisto nkayandi mudi muikale tshiuwidi tshijima tshia Bunzambi mu tshikadilu tshia mubidi. 
Colossians2:10 Ne nuenu nudi nûshibua tente munda muandi udi mutu wa makelenge onso ne makokeshi onso," 
Colossians2:11 unuakatengudibua munda muandi kabidi ne ditengula didi kadî dienjibua ne bianza mu diumusha dia malu a mubidi wa ha buloba, mu ditengula dia mu Kilisto." 
Colossians2:12 Nuakajikibua nʼandi mu dibatiza, munuakabishibua nʼandi munda muadi kabidi, bualu bua ditabusha dienu dia mu kuenza kua Nzambi wakamubisha munkatshi mua bafue." 
Colossians2:13 Nuenu kabidi, hanuakadi bafue bualu bua mibi yenu, ne hanuakadi kanui ne ditengula dia mibidi yenu, Nzambi wakunuvuisha muoyo hohamue nʼandi, yeye mumane kutubuikidila mibi yetu yonso;" 
Colossians2:14 hakakuhuleye dibanda diakatufundilabo bua mikenshi, diakadi dituhisha, wakadiumusha munkatshi muetu, wakadikumina diodio ne milonda ku mutshi mutshiamakane." 
Colossians2:15 Hakadiumushileye makelenge ne makokeshi, wakamuenesha hatoke to, wakâkoka bu muatambi ku mutshi wandi mutshiamakane." 
Colossians2:16 Nunku muntu kanulumbuluishi bualu bua bia kudia, anyi bua bia kunua, anyi bua dituku dia disanka dia bidia, anyi bua dituku diabala ngondo, anyi bua dituku dia Lumingu lua Bayuda;" 
Colossians2:17 malu â adi mundidimbi wa malu alualua, kadi mubidi wau udi wa Kilisto." 
Colossians2:18 Muntu kanunyengi bukenshi buenu bualu bua kudihuekesha kuandi kudiye udisunguila, ne kukukuila kuandi kua banjelo, ne dilamata diandi dia mu bikena kumona, mûshibue hatuhu ku meshi andi a mubidi," 
Colossians2:19 udi kai ulamata Mutu, kudi mubidi wonso, mukoleshibue ne musuikakasha ku manungu ne mijilu, udiundaku ne kudiunda kua kudi Nzambi." 
Colossians2:20 Binuikala bafue ne Kilisto ku mayisha a kumudilu a ha buloba, ntshinyi tshinudi nuditekela ku nyima kua mikenshi ei bu munutshidi ne mioyo yenu mu buloba: ne," 
Colossians2:21 Kukuatshi, kulabudi, kulengi;" 
Colossians2:22 (bintu ebi bionso nebijimine ne mudimu wabi) bu mudi mikenshi ne mayisha bia bantu? 
Colossians2:23 Bulelela, malu â adi ne tshileshilu tshia meshi mu ditendelela dia ku disua dia bantu, ne mu kudihuekesha ne mu kudikengesha kua mubidi; kadi kêna ne buimpe bua kukanda disankisha dia mubidi." 
Colossians3:1 Nunku binuikala babishibue hohamue ne Kilisto ku lufu, nukebe malu a mu diulu, mudi Kilisto, mushikame ku tshianza tshikole tshia Nzambi." 
Colossians3:2 Nuteke meshi enu ku malu a mu diulu, kanuateki ku malu a ha buloba." 
Colossians3:3 Bualu bua nuakafua, ne muoyo wenu udi musokoka ne Kilisto mu Nzambi." 
Colossians3:4 Hamueneshibua Kilisto udi muoyo wetu, hashishe nuenu kabidi nenumueneshibue nʼandi mu butumbi." 
Colossians3:5 Nunku nufuishe bituha bia mibidi yenu ya ha buloba: masandi, malu a bukoya, nkuka ya mubidi, disamina dibi dia mutshima, ne dikuma dia mutshima ku bintu didi kutendelela kua mpingu mene;" 
Colossians3:6 bua malu â tshishi tshia Nzambi tshidi tshilua kudi bana ba buhidia; 
Colossians3:7 anuakendamu kabidi diambedi hanuakikala ne muoyo munkatshi mua malu â. 
Colossians3:8 Kadi katataka nudiumushile bienu kabidi malu â onso: lukuna, tshishi, lukinu, bihendu, mei a bundu mukana muenu." 
Colossians3:9 Kanushimianganyi, bualu bua nuakamana kuvula muntu mukulukulu ne bienzedi biandi," 
Colossians3:10 nuakaluata muntu muhia-muhia udi uvuishibua muhia-muhia mu dimanya dilelela, bu mudi tshifuanyikishi tshia Mumufuki." 
Colossians3:11 Nunku kakuena mua kuikala Muena Gelika ne Muena Yuda, Muena ditengula ne udi kai muena ditengula, musenshi, Muena Sekutia, muhika ne mudishikamine; kadi Kilisto udi malu onso ne udi mu malu onso." 
Colossians3:12 Nunku, bu munudi bantu basungula kudi Nzambi, ba tshijila ne bananga, luatai mutshima wa luse, ne wa dikuatshisha, ne wa kudihuekesha, ne wa kalolo, ne wa lutulu." 
Colossians3:13 Nuleshangane lutulu, nulekelelangane mibi yenu, hikala muntu ne mukuabo tshilumbu; bu muakanubuikidila Mukelenge mibi yenu; nuenu nuenze muomumue kabidi." 
Colossians3:14 Ha mutu ha malu â onso nuluate dinanga, didi tshisuikidi tshia malu onso a buakane buonso." 
Colossians3:15 Ne ditalala dia Kilisto dinukokeshe mu mitshima yenu; dinuakabikidibuamu kabidi mu mubidi umue; ne nuikale nusakidile Nzambi. 
Colossians3:16 Dî dia Kilisto dikale munda muenu ne bubanshi buadi; mu meshi onso nuyishangane ne nudimushangane ne misambu ya bena kuitabusha ba kale ne ya bena Kilisto ne ya Nyuma; nuimbile Nzambi misambu ne ngasa mu mitshima yenu. 
Colossians3:17 Ne malu onso anudi nuenza, ne mu mei ne mu bienzedi, enzai onso mu dina dia Mukelenge Yesu; nusakidile Nzambi Tatu bua bualu buandi." 
Colossians3:18 Nuenu bakashi, nukokele babayenu, ke budi buakane mu Mukelenge." 
Colossians3:19 Nuenu balume, suai bakashi benu, ne lekelai kuikala ne mitshima ya luonji kudibo." 
Colossians3:20 Nuenu bana, nutumikile baledi benu mu malu onso, bua bualu ebu budi buanyishibua mu Mukelenge." 
Colossians3:21 Nuenu batatu, kanufikishi munda mua bana benu, bua mitshima yabo kaibungami." 
Colossians3:22 Nuenu bahika, mu malu onso nutumikile badi banfumu benu ba mu malu a ha buloba; kanuenji mudimu bu bahika ba mesu, bu basankishi ba bantu; kadi nunyeme ne mitshima mitoke nutshine Mukelenge." 
Colossians3:23 Malu onso anudi nuenza, nuenze ne mitshima yenu bu munudi nuenzela Mukelenge; kembu munudi nuenzela bantu;" 
Colossians3:24 bualu bua nudi bamanye ne, Netuangate difutu dia buhianyi kudi Mukelenge. Nudi nukuatshila Mukelenge Kilisto mudimu." 
Colossians3:25 Bualu bua muntu udi wenza bualu bubi neangate kabidi bualu bubi buakenzeye bu difutu diandi; ne kakuena kansungunsungu kudi Nzambi. 
Colossians4:1 Nuenu banfumu, nuenzele bahika benu malu adi makane ne adi kâi ne kansungunsungu; bualu bua nudi bamanye ne nuenu kabidi nudi ne Mukelenge mu diulu." 
Colossians4:2 Nunanukile mu ditendelela dienu nutabalamu ne disakidila; 
Colossians4:3 nutulombele kabidi mu tshikondo tshiotshimue bua Nzambi atunzuluile tshibi tshia dî bua tuetu kuamba bualu busokoka bua Kilisto, buakunsuikilabo mu nkanu kabidi," 
Colossians4:4 bua meme kubumanyisha bantu, bu mundi nʼabu mbua kubambila." 
Colossians4:5 Nuende mu meshi ku mesu kua bantu badi kabai munkatshi mua bena ditabusha; nudisumbile tshikondo hatshiditshiku tshia kuenza bimpe. 
Colossians4:6 Mei enu ikale ne ngasa misangu yonso, matue bu lueho, bua nuenu mimanye mua kuandamuna muntu ne muntu dî." 
Colossians4:7 Tukiko, muanʼetu munanga wa mu Kilisto, muena mudimu wa lulamatu ne muhika nʼanyi mu Mukelenge, neanumanyishe malu anyi onso;" 
Colossians4:8 unakatuma kunudi bua bualu ebu mene, bua nuenu kumanya malu etu ne bua yeye asambe mitshima yenu." 
Colossians4:9 Nakatuma Onesimo ngandi, udi muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto wa lulamatu ne munanga, udi muena kuenu. Nebanumanyishe malu onso a kunoko." 
Colossians4:10 Alistâko, muena lukanu nʼanyi, udi unuela muoyo, ne Mâko, muanʼabo ne Bânaba (nuakamana kuangata mikenshi ya bualu buandi; bialueye kunudi, numuitabushe)" 
Colossians4:11 ne Yesu, udibo babikila ne Yusto, badi ku luseke lua batengula; anu bobo nkayabo badi benzeshanganyi nʼanyi ba mudimu bua bukelenge bua Nzambi, bobo mene bakuikala basambi kundi." 
Colossians4:12 Epafa, udi umue wenu ne muhika wa Kilisto Yesu, udi unutumina muoyo, udi utshinta bikole misangu yonso bua bualu buenu mu mitendelelu yandi, bua nuenu mijalame bakane tshishiki, ne bamanyishibue bimpe mu disua dionso dia Nzambi." 
Colossians4:13 Bualu bua ndi mumanyi wa bualu buandi ne, Yeye udi utamba kuikala ne mudimu wa bungi bua bualu buenu ne bua badi mu Laodikiya ne bua badi mu Hielapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, nganga buka munanga, ne Dema badi banutumina muoyo." 
Colossians4:15 Nuele muoyo kudi bana betu ba mu Kilisto ba mu Laodikiya, ne kudi Numpa ne bena ekelesia ba mu nsubu wandi." 
Colossians4:16 Ne hamanabo kubala mukanda eu munkatshi muenu, nûbadishe bena ekelesia ba mu Laodikiya kabidi; ne nuenu kabidi nubale mukanda wanyi udi ufuma ku Laodikiya." 
Colossians4:17 Nuambile Âkipo kabidi ne, Udimuke bua mudimu uwakangata mu Mukelenge, bua wewe ûshikishe." 
Colossians4:18 Diela dia muoyo dia kudi meme Paulo difunda ne tshianza tshianyi. Neuluke nkanu yanyi. Ngasa ikale nʼenu. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo ne Siluano ne Timote kudi ekelesia wa bena Tesalonike wa mu Nzambi Tatu ne wa mu Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. Ngasa ne ditalala bikale nʼenu. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tudi tusakidila Nzambi misangu yonso bua buonso buenu tutela mena enu mu milombu yetu," 
1Thessalonians1:3 katui tulekela kuvuluka mudimu wenu wa ditabusha ne mudimu wenu mukole wa dinanga ne dinanukila dienu dia mu ditekemena dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, ku mesu kua Nzambi udi kabidi Tatu wetu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Bana betu banangibue kudi Nzambi, tudi bamanye kusungudibua kuenu;" 
1Thessalonians1:5 bualu bua lumu luimpe lutudi tuamba kaluakalua kunudi anu mu dî nkayadi, kadi luakalua mu bukole ne mu Nyuma Muimpe ne mu kumanya kujalama; bu munudi bamanye mushindu wa bantu utuakadivuisha munkatshi muenu bua bualu buenu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ne nuenu nuakalua bidikishi betu ne ba Mukelenge; nuakitabusha di mu dikenga dikole hohamue ne disanka dia mu Nyuma Muimpe; 
1Thessalonians1:7 bua bualu ebu nuakalua tshidikishilu kudi bonso badi bitabusha mu Makedonia ne mu Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bua dî dia Mukelenge diakambibua kunudi diakunvuibua, kenganu mu Makedonia ne mu Akaya, kadi mu miaba yonso ditabusha dinudi nʼadi kudi Nzambi diakamuangalaka; nunku tuetu katuena ne bualu bua kuamba d! kabidi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Bua bobo nkayabo batu bamba bua bualu buetu, bu muakadi tshibueledi tshietu kunudi, ne bu munuakakudimuka kudi Nzambi hanuakalekela mpingu bua kukuatshila Nzambi wa muoyo ne wa bushua mudimu," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ne bua kuindila Muana wandi ulualua mu diulu; wakabisheye munkatshi mua bafue, Yesu mene, udi utuhandisha ku tshishi tshilualua." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Bua nuenu mene, bana betu, nudi bamanye bua dibuela dietu kunudi ne kadiakulua dia hatuhu;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 kadi hatuakadianjila kukenga, ne hakatuenzelabo bibi ku Filipoi, bu munudi bamanye, tuakakolesha mitshima mu Nzambi wetu bua kunuambila lumu luimpe lua Nzambi mu kuluangana kua bungi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Bua dinusengelela dietu kadiena dia mashimi anyi dia bukoya bua mutshima anyi dia lubombo; 
1Thessalonians2:4 kadi bu muakatujadikabo kudi Nzambi bila kutekeye lumu luimpe mu bianza bietu, ke mutudi tuamba; kembu mutudi tusankisha bantu, kadi bu mutudi tusankisha Nzambi udi uteta mitshima yetu ne idi mimpe." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Bualu bua kabakatusangana nasha tshikondo tshimue ne mei a tshianyishanyisha, bu munudi bamanye, anyi ne tshia kubuikila nʼatshi lukuka; Nzambi udi mumanyi wa bualu ebu;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 anyi bakebi ba butumbi kudi bantu, nasha kunudi nasha kudi bantu bakuabo; nasha tuetu tuakadi mua kuikala bujitu kunudi bu bapostolo ba Kilisto." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Kadi tuakikala bu bana batekete munkatshi muenu, bu mudi ndeshi ukuongoluela bana bandi balela." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Nunku muomumue, bualu bua tuakatamba kumusua, tuakadi ne disanka dimpe bua kunuha, kendumu luimpe lua Nzambi nkayalu, kadi mioyo yetu kabidi, bualu bua nuakalua banangibue kutudi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Bualu bua nudi nuvuluka, bana betu, mudimu wetu mukole ne lutatu luetu; butuku ne munya tuakenza mudimu bua katudivuishi bujitu hamʼbidi ha nasha umue wenu; nunku Nakanuambila lumu luimpe lua Nzambi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Nuenu nudi bamanyi ne Nzambi udi mumanyi kabidi bu mutuakanuenzela nuenu badi bitabusha malu a tshijila ne adi makane ne adi kâi mua kubandibua; 
1Thessalonians2:11 bu munudi bamanye mutuakanuenzela muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muenu, bu mudi tatu wenza ne bana bandi balela, hatuakanusengelela, hatuakanukolesha mitshima, hatuakanuambila dî," 
1Thessalonians2:12 bua nuenu nuende bakanangane ne Nzambi, udi unubikila bua nuenu kubuela mu bukelenge buandi ne mu butumbi buandi." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Bua muanda eu kabidi katuena tulekela kusakidila Nzambi ne, Hanuakangata dî dinuakunvua kutudi, dia Nzambi mene, nuakaditabusha, kembu dî dia bantu, kadi bu mudidi bushua, dî dia Nzambi mene, didi dienzesha munda muenu badi bitabusha." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Bualu bua nuenu, bana betu, nuakalua bidikishi ba bena ekelesia ya Nzambi ya mu Yudaya mu Kilisto Yesu; bualu bua nuenu kabidi nuakakenga makenga muomumue kudi bena tshisamba tshienu, bu muakâkenga ba mu Yudaya kudi Bena Yuda." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Bobo bakashiha Mukelenge Yesu ne baprofete, bakatuihata tuetu kabidi, kabena basankisha Nzambi, ne badi banyoka bantu bonso;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 badi batukanda bua tuetu katuakudi ne ba bisamba bia bende bua bobo basungidibue; nunku bobo badi bakumbasha mibi yabo misangu yonso; kadi hashishe tshishi tshiakafika kudibo. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Kadi tuetu, bana betu, hatuakalekelangana nʼenu musangu muibi, tuakalua bu bana ba nshîa mu mubidi kadi kemu mutshima; tuakatamba kukeba kumonangana nʼenu ku mesu ne dijinga dikole." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Bualu bua tuakasua kulua kunudi kudi meme Paulo misangu ne misangu, kadi Satana wakatuhumbisha." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Bua ditekemena dietu didi tshinyi, anyi disanka dietu, anyi tshifulu tshia butumbi? Kabiena nuenu nkayenu, anyi, ku mpala kua Mukelenge wetu Yesu ku dilua diandi?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Bualu bua nuenu nudi butumbi buetu ne disanka dietu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Nunku hatuakadi katui mua kudikanda kabidi, Nakamona ne, Mbimpe batushîe ku nyima ha nkayetu ku Atena;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 ne Nakatuma Timote, muanʼetu wa ma Kilisto ne muenu mudimu wa Nzambi mu lumu luimpe lua Kilisto, bua kunujadikeye ne bua kunusambeye mu bualu bua ditabusha dienu;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 bua muntu katekeshibu mu makenga â; bua nuenu nkayenu nudi bamanye ne Ndi tutekibua ku makenga â. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Bulelela, hatuakadi nʼenu, tuakadianjila kunuambila ne, Tudi tuamba kuikala ne makenga; mbu muakaluau, ne nudi bamanye bualu ebu." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Bua muanda eu meme kabidi, hanakadi tshi mua kudikanda, nakatuma Timote bua meme kumanya mudi ditabusha dienu; bua bumue muteyi wakanuteya, ne mudimu wetu mukole wakalua hatuhu." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kadi mpindiu hakalua Timote kutudi mufume kunudi, ne hakatuambileye lumu lutusankisha lua ditabusha dienu ne lua dinanga dienu, ne hakatuambileye ne nudi ne dituvuluka dimpe misangu yonso, ne nudi nujinga bua kutumona, bu mutudi tujinga bua kunumona nuenu kabidi;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 bua bualu ebu, bana betu, tuakasambibua bua bualu buenu mu makenga etu onso ne mu ntatu yetu bualu bua ditabusha dienu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 bualu bua katataka tudi ne muoyo, binuashala bajalame mu Mukelenge." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Bua tudi bamanye mua kuhingishila Nzambi kabidi disakidila kai bua bualu buenu, bua disanka dionso ditudi tusanka nʼadi bua bualu buenu ku mpala kua Nzambi wetu?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Butuku ne munya tudi tutamba kulomba Nzambi bikole bua tuetu kunumona ku mesu, ne bua tuetu kukumbasha malu anudi nuhanga kuikala nʼau mu ditabusha dienu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Nzambi muine udi kabidi Tatu wetu, ne Mukelenge wetu Yesu, atulongoluele nshila wetu wa kufika kunudi;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 ne Mukelenge anudiundishe ne anukumbashe mu dinanga dinudi nʼadi munkatshi muenu muntu ne muntu, ne kudi bantu bonso, bu mutudi nʼadi kabidi kunudi;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 bua yeye ajadike mitshima yenu kayi ne bualu mu malu a tshijila ku mpala kua Nzambi udi kabidi Tatu wetu, ku dilua dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ne basanto bandi bonso." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Nunku bana betu, tshiashadidi mpindiu, tudi tunulomba ne tudi tunusengelela mu Mukelenge Yesu ne, Bu munuakangata diyisha kutudi dinulesha bu munudi ne bua kuenda ne bua kusankisha Nzambi, mbu munudi nuenda kabidi,—bua nuenu mitambe kukumbanakumbana ma malu â." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Bualu bua nudi bamanye mei â atuakanudimusha nʼau mu Mukelenge Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Bua bualu ebu budi disua dia Nzambi, tshijila tshienu mene, bua nuenu nudikande ku masandi;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muenu amanye mua kukubeye mubidi wandi mu tshijila ne mu kunemeka; 
1Thessalonians4:5 kikadi nʼau mu nkuka ya disamina dibi dia mutshima, bu mudi ba bisamba bia bende benza badi kabai bamanye Nzambi." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ndi ngamba bua muntu kasambuki mikalu ne kenzedi muanʼabo wa mu Kilisto bibi mu bualu ebu; bualu bua Mukelenge udi musombuedi mu malu â onso, bu mutuakadianjila kunudimusha kabidi ne mutuakanumanyisha." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Bualu bua Nzambi kakatubikila bua kuikala ne bukoya bua mutshima, kadi wakatubikidila mu malu a tshijila." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Nunku wahetula kena uhetula muntu kadi udi uhetula Nzambi udi unuha Nyuma Muimpe wandi. 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kadi bualu bua dinangangana dia bana babo ba mu Kilisto, kanuedi ne bualu bua muntu anufundile dî; bualu bua nuenu nudi bayishibue kudi Nzambi bua kunangangana." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Bulelela, nudi nuenzela bana benu bonso nunku badi mu buloba buonso bua Makedonia. Kadi tudi tunusengelela, bana betu, bua nuenu mitambe kukumbanakumbana ma malu â;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 ne bua nuenu nukebe bikole bua kuikala talala, ne bua kuenza malu enu nkayau, ne bua kuenza mudimu ne bianza bienu bu mutuakanuambila;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 nuenze nunku bua nuenu nuende ne bimuenenu biakane ku mesu kua bantu badi kabai bena ditabusha nʼetu; ne bua kanuikadi ne dikengela dia tshintu. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Bana betu, katuena basue nuenu nuhange kumanya bualu bua badi balala tulu mu lufu, bua nuenu kanunyingalashi mitshima yenu, bu mudi bakuabo benza badi kabai ne ditekemena." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Bualu bua bituitabusha ne Yesu wakafua, ne wakabika ku lufu kabidi, muomumue Nzambi nealue ne bantu aba nʼandi kabidi bakalala tulu ma lufu bualu bua Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Bua tudi tunuambila bualu ebu ku dî dia Mukelenge ne, Tuetu, batshidi ne muoyo, ne badibo bashîe tô ne ku dilua dia Mukelenge, katuena tudianjila kuya ku mpala kua badi balala tulu ma lufu." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Bualu bua Mukelenge muine neahueke mu diulu wela dî dikole, ne dî dia muanjelo mutambe bakuabo bunene, ne dî dia mpungi wa Nzambi; ne bantu bafue mu Kilisto nebabike diambedi;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 ne hasnishe tuetu batshidi ne muoyo badibo bashîa netuangatshibue nʼabo hohamue mu matutu, bua kusangila ne Mukelenge mu luhehele; nunku netuikale ne Mukelenge tshiendelele." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Bua mianda ei nusambangane ne mei â. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kadi bana betu, bua bikondo ne bidimu kanuena ne bualu bua muanda wabi ufundibue kunudi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bualu bua nuenu nkayenu nudi bamanye bimpe ne, Dituku dia Mukelenge dilualua bu mudi muibi ulua butuku." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Hatshidibo bamba ne, Tudi ne ditalala, katui ne bualu; ahu dibutuka dia tshintuluntulu dilualua kudibo, bu mudi kanyinganyinga kalua kudi mukashi udi ne difu; ne bobo kabena bahanduka nasha kakese." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kadi nuenu bana betu, kanuena mu midima bua dituku adi dinukuate bu muibi;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 bua buonso buenu nudi bana ba munya ne bana ba dituku, katuena ba butuku anyi ba midima." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Nunku katuladi tulu bu mudi bakuabo benza; kadi tutabale, tuikale ne meshi mahole." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Bua badi balala tulu badi balala tulu butuku; ne badi bakuatshika maluvu badi bakuatshika butuku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kadi tuetu, bualu bua tudi ba dituku, tuikale ne meshi mahole; tuluate tshibuikilu tshia ha tshiadi tshia ditabusha ne tshia dinanga, tuluate ditekemena dia luhandu bu tshifulu ku mutu." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Bualu bua Nzambi kakatusungula bua kutulekela tshishi, kadi bua tuetu kuheta luhandu bualu bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto," 
1Thessalonians5:10 wakatufuka, bua tuetu, nasha batabale nasha balale tulu, tuikale ne muoyo hohamue nʼandi." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nunku nusambangane, nudiundishangane muntu ne muntu, bu munudi nuenza kabidi." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Kadi tudi tunulomba, bana betu, bua nuenu mimanye badi benza mudimu munkatshi muenu ne badi ku mutu kuenu mu Mukelenge ne badi banudimusha;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 bua nuenu nubabale bu banudi nutamba kutumbisha mu dinanga bua mudimu wabo. Nuikalangane ne ditalala munkatshi muenu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Bana betu, tudi tunusengelela ne, Nudimushe batshimbakanyi, nukoleshe badi ne mitshima yamba kuhanga, nukuatshishe badi batekete, nuikale ne lutulu kudi bantu bonso." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Numone ne muntu kahingishidi mukuabo bubi ku bubi buandi; kadi misangu yonso nulondelangane malu adi mimpe muntu ne muntu, ne kudi bonso." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Nusanke misangu yonso; 
1Thessalonians5:17 nuikale nutendelelatendelele; 
1Thessalonians5:18 mu malu onso nusakidile Nzambi, bua edi ndisua dia Nzambi mu Kilisto Yesu bua bualu buenu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Kanujimi Nyuma Muimpe. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Kanuhetudi mayisha a baprofete. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Nujingulule malu onso; nulamate malu adi mimpe; 
1Thessalonians5:22 nuehuke ku malu mabi a mushindu wonso. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Nzambi wa ditalala nkayandi anujidile tshishiki; ne nyuma yenu ne misûke yenu ne mibidi yenu ilamibue mu buakane buonso, kanui ne kudiu, mu dilu? dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Yeye udi unubikila udi mua kueyemenyibua, yeye kabidi nênze buala budiye munubikidile." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bana betu, nundombele Nzambi." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Nuele bana betu bonso ba mu Kilisto muoyo ne kutuangana kua mishiku kua tshijila. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndi nutshihisha mu Mukelenge bua babadile bana betu bonso ba mu Kilisto mutanda eu. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ikale nʼenu. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo ne Siluano ne Timote kudi ekelesia wa bena Tesalonike wa mu Nzambi Tatu wetu ne mu Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Bana betu, butudi nʼabu mbua kusakidila Nzambi misangu yonso bua bualu buenu, bu mudibu buakane, bua ditabusha dienu didi ditamba kudiunda, ne dinanga dia buonso buenu muntu ne muntu dinudi nunangangana nʼadi didi divulangana;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 bua muanda eu tuetu tudi tutumbila bua bualu buenu mu ekelesia ya Nzambi bualu bua ditantamana dienu ne bua ditabusha dienu mu makenga enu onso ne mu matata onso anudi nuikala nʼau. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Malu â adi tshimanyinu tshia dilumbulula diakane dia Nzambi; bua nuenu nubadibue bakanangane ne bukelenge bua Nzambi bunudi nukengela bualu buabu kabidi; 
2Thessalonians1:6 bikalahu buakane bua Nzambi kuhingisha makenga kudi badi banukengesha; 
2Thessalonians1:7 ne bua kunuheye nuenu badi bakengeshibua dikisha hohamue nʼetu, ku dibuluibua dia Mukelenge Yesu halueye mu diulu ne banjelo ba bukole buandi mu kahia kadi kakenka." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Neadisombuele kudi bantu badi kabai bamanye Nzambi ne kudi badi kabai batumikila lumu luimpe lua Mukelenge wetu Yesu; 
2Thessalonians1:9 bobo aba nebahete dikenga, dibutuka dia tshiendelele mene, dia ku mesu kua Mukelenge ne ku butumbi bua bukole buandi," 
2Thessalonians1:10 halueye bua kutumbishibua mu basanto bandi, ne bua kukemibua mu dituku diadia kudi bantu bonso bamane kumuitabusha (bualu bua bumanyishi buetu kunudi buakitabushibua)." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Bua bualu ebu tudi tunulombela kabidi misangu yonso bua Nzambi wetu anubale bakanangane ne dibikidibua dienu, ne bua yeye akumbashe ne bukole buandi disua dienu dionso dia buimpe ne mudimu wenu wa ditabusha;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 bua dina dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu ditumbishibue munda muenu, ne nuenu nutumbishibue munda muandi, bu mudi ngasa wa Nzambi wetu ne wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Bana betu, tudi tunusengelela bua dilua dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ne bua kusangishibua kuetu kudiye;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 bua nuenu kanuzakashibu lubilu mu meshi enu, ne kanutshinyishibu, nasha bua nyuma nasha bua dî nasha bua mukanda udibo badingila ne ngua kutudi ne, Dituku dia Mukelenge dikadi aha." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Muntu kanudingi muanda wonso; bua dituku adi kadiena dilua anu bialua ditombokela dia Nzambi diambedi, ne anu biabuluibua muntu wa buhidia, muana wa dibutuka mene." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Yeye ngudi udimanyika ne udi udibandisha ku mpala kua bionso bidi bidikibua ne, Nzambi, anyi bionso bidi bantu batendelela; nunku yeye udi ushikama mu ntempelo wa Nzambi udilesha kudi bantu ne, Meme ndi Nzambi." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Kanuena nuvuluka ne nakadi nuambila malu â hanakatshidi munkatshi muenu, anyi?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Katataka nudi bamanye bualu budi bumukanda bua yeye abuluibue mu tshikondo tshiandi tshine. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Bua bualu busokoka bua buhidia butshidi buenza mudimu wabu, kadi mukuabo udiku udi mmukanda katataka tô ne humushibueye." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Hashishe muntu wa buhidia neabuluibue, udi Mukelenge Yesu ulua kushiha ne muhuya wa mukana muandi, neamuvuishe bu tshintu tshia tshianana ku dimueneka dia kulua kuandi." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Kulua kuandi kudi bu mudi kuenzesha kua Satana, ne bukole buonso, ne bimanyinu, ne malu a kukema a mashimi," 
2Thessalonians2:10 ne kudinga kuonso kua malu mabi kudi batshidi bajimina mu lufu; bualu bua kabakitabusha dinanga dia bualu bulelela bua bobo basungidibue. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Bua bualu ebu Nzambi udi ubatumina dienzesha dia dihambuka, bua bobo bitabushe mashimi;" 
2Thessalonians2:12 bua bonso balumbuluishibue badi kabai bitabusha malu a bushua, kadi badi ne disanka mu malu mabi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kadi butudi nʼabu mbua kusakidila Nzambi misangu yonso bua bualu buenu, bana betu banangibua kudi Mukelenge, bualu bua Nzambi wakadianjila kunusungula ku tshibangidilu bua kunuha luhandu mu kujidila kua Nyuma Muimpe ne mu kuitabusha kua malu a bushua;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 wakanubikilamu bua lumu luimpe lutuakunuambila, bua nuenu nuhete butumbi bua Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Nunku bana betu, nudijadike bimpe, nulamate ku bilele biamba kudi bantu biakanuyishabo, nasha ku mei etu nasha ku mukanda wetu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto muine ne Nzambi Tatu wetu, wakatunanga ne wakatuha busambi bua tshiendelele ne ditekemena dimpe bua ngasa," 
2Thessalonians2:17 anusambe mitshima yenu, aijadike mu mudimu muimpe wonso ne mu dî dimpe dionso." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Tshiashadidi mpindiu, bana betu, nutulombele Nzambi, bua dî dia Mukelenge diendakane ne ditumbishibue, bu mudidi munkatshi muenu kabidi;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 ne bua tuetu tuhanduke mu bianza bia bena tshinyangu ne bantu babi; bualu bua bonso kabena ne ditabusha. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kadi Mukelenge udi mua kueyemenyibua, yeye neanujadike, neanulame ku bubi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Tudi ne ditekemena mu Mukelenge bua bualu buenu ne, Nudi nuenza, ne nenuenze malu atudi tunuelela mikenshi." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ne Mukelenge alombole mitshima yenu mu dinanga dia Nzambi ne mu dinanukila diakadi Kilisto nʼadi. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Bana betu, tudi Umuelela mukenshi mu dina dia Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto bua nuenu nudilamune kudi muanʼenu yonso wa mu Kilisto udi wenda utshimbakana, ne udi kai wenda bu mudi bilele biambibua kutudi binuakangata." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Bua nuenu bine nudi bamanye bu munudi ne bualu bua kuidikisha, bua katuakenda tutshimbakana munkatshi muenu;" 
2Thessalonians3:8 ne katuakadia bidia bia muntu mukuabo hatuhu, kadi mu mudimu mukole ne mu lutatu, tuakenza mudimu ne bianza bufuku ne munya, bua katuikadi bujitu hamʼbidi ha umue wenu." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Kembua katui ne bukokeshi bua kunulomba dikuatshisha, kadi bua kudivuisha tshifuanyikishi kunudi bua nuenu kutuidikisha." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Bua hatuakadi munkatshi muenu mene, tuakanuelela mukenshi eu ne, Bikala muntu kai witabusha kuenza mudimu, kadi biandi tshintu." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Bua tudi tunvua lumu lua banga badi benda batshimbakana munkatshi muenu, kabai benza mudimu nasha kakese, kadi badi bena bienzenza." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Tudi tuelela bantu aba ba nunku mukenshi ne tudi tubasengelela mu Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto ne, Benze mudimu wabo talala, ne badidile bidia biabo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Kadi nuenu, bana betu, kabiteketshi mu kuenza kua malu mimpe." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Bikala muntu mukuabo kai utumikila dî dietu dia ku mukanda eu, mimanye muntu au bua kanubuelakanyi nʼandi, bua ku-fuishibueye bundu ku mesu." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ne kanumubadi bu muena lukuna, kadi numudimushe bu muanʼenu wa mu Kilisto." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Mukelenge wa ditalala anuhe ditalala misangu yonso mu mianda yonso. Mukelenge ikale ne buonso buenu. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Diela dia muoyo dia kudi meme Paulo difunda ne tshianza tshianyi, ntshimanyinu mu mukanda wonso; nunku mundi nfunda." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ikale ne buonso buenu. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, mupostolo wa Kilisto Yesu bu mudi mukenshi wa Nzambi Musungidi wetu, ne wa Kilisto Yesu ditekemena dietu," 
1Timothy1:2 kudi Timote, muanʼanyi wa bushua mu ditabusha: Ngasa, luse, ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne kudi Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu." 
1Timothy1:3 Bu munakakusengelela bua wewe kushala mu Efeso, hanakadi nya ku Makedonia, bua wewe kuelela bakuabo mukenshi ne, Kanuyishi bantu diyisha dikuabo," 
1Timothy1:4 ne kanulamatshi ku nsumuinu ya tshianana, anyi ku mena a hankambua malongolola adi kâl ne ndekelu; malu â adi avuisha dikonkangana, kêna avuisha kudiunda kua mudimu wa Nzambi kudi ditabusha: udi nkusengelela muomumue katataka." 
1Timothy1:5 Kadi tshidi mukenshi eu ukeba kuheta ndinanga dia mu mutshima mutoke ne dia mu muoyomukese muimpe ne dia mu ditabusha didi kadi ne lubombo. 
1Timothy1:6 Ku malu â bantu bakuabo bamane kuhambuka bakasesuka bua kulonda biakulakula; 
1Timothy1:7 badi basue kuikala bayishi ba mikenshi ya Nzambi, kadi kabena bajingulula tshidibo bamba anyi tshidibo bakeba kujadika ne, Ntshilelela." 
1Timothy1:8 Kadi tudi bamanye ne, Mikenshi idi mimpe bikala muntu wilonda ne kutumikila." 
1Timothy1:9 Tudi bamanye ne, Mikenshi kayena mielela muntu muakane, kadi idi mielela badi kabai baitabusha ne bena buhidia ne badi kabai banemekela Nzambi ne badi babi ne badi kabai ba tshijila ne bahendi ha Nzambi ne bashihi ba batatu ne bamamu ne bashihianganyi" 
1Timothy1:10 ne bena masandi, balume badi benzelangana malu a bundu, banyengi ba bantu, bena mashimi, bena mitshihu ya mashimi, anyi bikalaku tshinga tshintu tshidi tshifuilangana ne diyisha dimpe;" 
1Timothy1:11 bu mudi lumu luimpe lua butumbi bua Nzambi udibo batumbisha, luakatekibua mu bianza bianyi." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndi musakidile Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu mene, wakampa bukole bualu bua yeye wakambala bu muntu udi mua kueyemenyibua, wakanteka ku mudimu wandi;" 
1Timothy1:13 diambedi nakadi muhendi wa Nzambi ne mukengeshi wa bantu bandi ne muena luonji kudibo; kadi nakafuidibua luse bualu bua nakabienza mu buhidia buanyi tshi mumanye: 
1Timothy1:14 ne ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu wakatamba kuvulangana diatshimue ne ditabusha ne dinanga dia mu Kilisto Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Dî edi didi mua kueyemenyibua ndidi bonso bamanye mua kuitabusha ne, Kilisto Yesu wakaluila ha buloba bua kusungileye bantu babi, bandi ku mpala kuabo ku bubi." 
1Timothy1:16 Kadi bua bualu ebu nakafuidibua luse, bua munda muanyi bu muntu mubi muhite bakuabo, Yesu Kilisto amueneshe lutulu luandi luonso, bu tshileshilu kudi bantu balua kumuitabusha tô ne ku muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
1Timothy1:17 Kudi Mukelenge wa kashidi, udi kai mua kufua, udi kai mua kumuenebua ku mesu, Nzambi umue, buneme ne butumbi bikale kudiye ku bikondo ne ku bikondo. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ndi nkutekela mukenshi eu, muanʼanyi Timote, bu mudi mei a baprofete akadianjilabo kuamba bua bualu buebe, bua wewe uluangane nvita mimpe ne dikuatshisha diau." 
1Timothy1:19 Ulamate ditabusha ne muoyo-mukese muimpe; bakuabo bakumusha malu â kudibo, bakanyanguka mu ditabusha diabo bu mudi majua matshibuke mu mai." 
1Timothy1:20 Munkatshi muabo mudi Humenayo ne Alesandelo; banakafila kudi Satana, bua bayishibue ne, Kanuhendi Nzambi." 
1Timothy2:1 Nunku ku mpala kua malu onso, ndi nkusengelela bua milombu ne mitendelelu ne mitendekenu ne masakidila bikale bienzele bantu bonso." 
1Timothy2:2 Ulombele banfumu bonso ne badi ne bukokeshi, bua tuetu tuikale ne muoyo muhola holâ ne mutalala talalâ mu buimpe buonso ne mu buneme buonso." 
1Timothy2:3 Bualu ebu budi buimpe ne mbudi Nzambi Musungidi wetu witabusha," 
1Timothy2:4 udi musue bantu bonso basungidibue, bafike ku dimanya dia malu malelela." 
1Timothy2:5 Bualu bua Nzambi udi umue, ne mutuanganyi umue udiku hankatshi ha Nzambi ne bantu, nyeye muntu mene, Kilisto Yesu;" 
1Timothy2:6 wakadifila bu tshintu tshia kuhikula nʼatshi bantu bonso; bumanyishi bua muanda eu budi ne bua kumanyishibua mu bikondo biabu mene. 
1Timothy2:7 Bua bualu ebu nakatekibua muambi ne mupostolo (ndi ngamba dî dilelela, tshiena nshima nasha) muyishi wa ba bisamba bia bende mu ditabusha ne mu malu malelela." 
1Timothy2:8 Nunku ndi musue balume batendelele Nzambi mu miaba yonso, babishe bianza bia tshijila, kabai ne tshishi ne dielangana dia mpata." 
1Timothy2:9 Muomumue bakashi kabidi badilengeshe ne bilulu bidi bibakanyina; bikale ne kalolo ne buhuekele; kabaluki nsuki yabo bihia; kabaluatshi ngolo ne mabue ne bilulu bia mushinga muhite bungi; 
1Timothy2:10 kadi badilengeshe ne bienzedi bimpe, bu mudi buakane bua bakashi badi bamba ne, Tudi tutshina Nzambi." 
1Timothy2:11 Mukashi ayile ne ditalala ne dikokela dionso. 
1Timothy2:12 Kadi tshiena ngitabusha mukashi ayishe, anyi ikale ne bukokeshi ku mutu kua muteme; kadi ikale biandi talala." 
1Timothy2:13 Bualu bua Adama wakafukibua diambedi, ne hashishe Eva;" 
1Timothy2:14 ne Adama kakateyibua, kadi mukashi hakamaneye kuteyibua, wakahona mu bubi." 
1Timothy2:15 Kadi yeye neasungidibue mu kulela kuandi kua bana, bikala bakashi bananukila mu ditabusha ne mu dinanga ne mu malu a tshijila adi ne buhuekele." 
1Timothy3:1 Dî edi didi mua kueyemenyibua ne, Biasua muntu kuangata mudimu wa mukulu-mutangidi, yeye udi usua mudimu muimpe." 
1Timothy3:2 Nunku budi mukulu-mutangidi nʼabu mbua kuikala kai ne bilumbu; ikale biandi muena mukashi umue; ikale biandi muena meshi mahola ne buhuekele; amanye mua kulongolola malu andi bimpe; ikale musankididi wa benyi; ikale muakane wa kuyisha bakuabo. 
1Timothy3:3 Kikadi ne diyoyo bua malulu; kikadi mukumianganyi ne bakuabo; kadi ikale muena buhele; kasu biandi mayoyo; kateki mutshima wandi ku biuma. 
1Timothy3:4 Akokeshe ba mu nsubu wandi bimpe, ikale ne bana bamukokela bimpe ne buneme buongo." 
1Timothy3:5 Kadi bikala muntu kai mumanye mua kukokesha ba mu nsubu wandi, nealame ekelesia wa Nzambi munyi?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kikadi biandi muntu muhia-muhia mu bualu bua Nzambi; anyi hadisueye, neahone mu dilumbuluishibua dia diabolo." 
1Timothy3:7 Bualu bukuabo, budiye nʼabu mbua kuikala ne lumu luimpe kudi badi kabai munkatshi mua bena ditabusha; bua kahonyi biandi mu malu adi avuisha bihendu ne mu buteyi bua diabolo." 
1Timothy3:8 Muomumue balami ba bintu bikale ne kanemu; kabikadi ne mei abidi; kabadidi ku maluvu a bungi; kabakumi mitshima yabo ku biuma bidi bifume ku nshila mibi; 
1Timothy3:9 balame bualu busokoka bua ditabusha mu muoyo-mukese mutoke. 
1Timothy3:10 Badianjile kubateta bobo aba kabidi, hashishe benze mudimu wa balami, bikalabo kabai mua kubandibua." 
1Timothy3:11 Muomumue bakashi bikale ne kanemu, kabikadi bena bunsonge; bikale ne meshi mahole ne mua kueyemenyibua mu malu onso." 
1Timothy3:12 Balami ba bintu bikale bena mukashi umue, bakokeshe bana babo ne ba mu nsubu yabo bimpe," 
1Timothy3:13 bualu bua bobo bakenza mudimu bimpe bu balami badi badiangatshila muaba mubandila ne dikima dikole mu ditabusha dia mu Kilisto Yesu. Butumbi bua Kilisto mu ekelesia 
1Timothy3:14 Ndi nkufundila malu â handi ntekemena bua kulua kûdi tshituha tshihi; 
1Timothy3:15 kadi binashala musangu mule, udi nkufundila mukanda eu bua wewe umanye bu mudibo ne bua kuenza mu nsubu wa Nzambi, udi muaba wa tshijila wa ekelesia wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo, udi bu dikunshi ne tshishindamenu bia malu malelela." 
1Timothy3:16 Ne kakuena mpata ya bunene bua bualu busokoka bua buimpe bua Nzambi: Nyeye wakamueneshibua mu mubidi wa muntu, Wakabingishibua mu nyuma, Wakamuenebua kudi banjelo, Wakambibua munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, Wakitabushibua ha buloba, Wakangatshibua mulu ne butumbi." 
1Timothy4:1 Kadi Nyuma udi wamba batoke ne, Halua bikondo bia kunshikidilu ha buihi, bantu bakuabo nebalekele ditabusha diabo, balamata ku nyuma idi ihambuisha ne ku mayisha a bademon;" 
1Timothy4:2 bualu bua lubombo lua bantu badi bamba mei a mashimi, badi boshibua mu muoyo-mukese wabo ne tshiamu tshibia ne kadilu." 
1Timothy4:3 Bobo badi bakanda bantu dibaka, badi babelela mukenshi ne, Jilai bia kudia bikuabo, biakafuka Nzambi bua bantu badi ne ditabusha ne badi bamanye bualu bulelela badie ne kusakidila."
