1Timothy4:4 Bifukibua bionso bia Nzambi bidi bimpe, ne bantu kabena ne bua kubimasha bikalabo babitabusha ne kusakidila;" 
1Timothy4:5 bualu bua biobi bidi bijidibua ne dî dia Nzambi ne kutendelela. 
1Timothy4:6 Biwavuluisha bana benu ba mu Kilisto malu â, wewe newikale muena mudimu muimpe wa Kilisto Yesu, mudiundisha mu mei a ditabusha ne mu diyisha dimpe diwakulonda tô ne katataka." 
1Timothy4:7 Kadi uhidie nsumuinu ya malu a hatuhu a bakashi bakulukashi. Udienzeshe bua kuheta malu a buimpe bua Nzambi. 
1Timothy4:8 Bualu bua dikolesha dia mubidi didi ne mushinga muimpe kakese; kadi buimpe bua Nzambi budi ne mushinga muimpe mu malu onso, budi ne mulayi wa muoyo wa mpindiu ne wa muoyo ukadi ha kulua." 
1Timothy4:9 Di edi didi mua kueyemenyibua ndidi bonso bamanye mua kuitabusha. 
1Timothy4:10 Bua bualu ebu tudi tuenza mudimu mukole ne tudi tutshinta, bua tuakutekemena Nzambi udi ne muoyo, udi Musungidi wa bantu bonso, kadi mutambe kuikala Musungidi wa badi bamuitabusha." 
1Timothy4:11 Elela bantu mukenshi bua malu â, ubayisheu." 
1Timothy4:12 Muntu kakulenguludi bua bunsongalume buebe; kadi wikale tshileshilu kudi bena ditabusha mu mei ne mu tshikadilu tshiebe ne mu dinanga ne mu ditabusha ne mu butoke bua mutshima. 
1Timothy4:13 Tô ne hanalua, ulamate ku dibala dia Mukanda wa Nzambi, ku disengelela, ne ku diyisha." 
1Timothy4:14 Kulekedi kulama tshihedi tshidi munda muebe, tshiakakuhebua ku mei a baprofete ne hakatentekesha bakulu bianza ha mutu hebe." 
1Timothy4:15 Unanukile kuikala mu malu â, udiele ne mutshima webe wonso kudiu, bua kudiunda kuebe kumueneke kudi bonso." 
1Timothy4:16 Wikale mudimuke ku malu ebe ne ku diyisha diebe. Unanukile kushala mu malu â; bua bawenza nunku, neudisungile wewe ne bobo kabidi badi bunvue mei ebe." 
1Timothy5:1 Kubedi muntu mununu, kadi umutendekene bu tatu webe mukuledi; usengelele bansongalume bu bena mulongo webe;" 
1Timothy5:2 usengelele bakashi banunu bu bamamu bakuidi; usengelele bansongakashi bu bana benu ba tatu umue mu butoke buonso bua mutshima. 
1Timothy5:3 Unemeke bakashi ba mu lufuila badi ne lufuila lua bushua. 
1Timothy5:4 Kadi bikala mukashi wa mu lufuila ne bana bandi balela anyi bikilu bandi, bobo badianjile kuyila mua kunemeka ba mu diku diabo ne mua kuhingishila baledi babo bintu bia kubakuatshisha nʼabi; bua bualu ebu mbudi Nzambi witabusha." 
1Timothy5:5 Mukashi udi ne lufuila lua bushua ne udi ha nkayandi, udi utekemena Nzambi, ne udi unanukila mu kusengelela ne mu kulomba kuandi butuku ne munya" 
1Timothy5:6 Kadi yeye wa mu lufuila udi ukeba anu bua kudisankisha udi mufue hatshidiye ne muoyo. 
1Timothy5:7 Ubelele mukenshi bua malu â kabidi, bua kabikadi ne bilumbu." 
1Timothy5:8 Kadi bikala muntu kai usubula badi bandi ne ba mu nsubu muandi mene, yeye wakadiula ditabusha diandi ne udi mutambe muntu udi uhidia kuitabusha bubi." 
1Timothy5:9 Kabafuidi mukashi wa mu lufuila mu mulongo wa ba mu lufuila bikaleye kai muanze kufika ku bidimu makumi asambombo, yeye mumane kuikala mukashi wa anu muntu umue;" 
1Timothy5:10 udi ne lumu luimpe lua bienzedi biandi bimpe, bikaleye mudiundishe bana bandi, bikaleye musangele benyi, bikaleye mume makasa a basanto, bikaleye mukuatshishe bena makenga, bikaleye munanukile kulonda midimu mimpe yonso." 
1Timothy5:11 Kadi uhidie kuteka bansongakashi ba mu lufuila mu mulongo eu; bualu bua hamanabo kusamina muoyo kudi balume, nebabenge mudimu wa Kilisto, nebasue kuya ku dibaka kabidi;" 
1Timothy5:12 nunku badi ne dihila bualu bua bakahidia mutshihu wabo wa diambedi. 
1Timothy5:13 Bunga bualu, badi bayila kabidi mua kuikala bafuba, bendakana ku nsubu ne ku nsubu; ne kabena bayila mua kuikala anu ne bufuba nkayabu, kadi mua kuikala bena mukoso ne bena bienzenza, bakula mei adi kâi mimpe bua kuakula." 
1Timothy5:14 Nunku ndi musue bansongakashi ba mu lufuila baye ku dibaka, balele bana, bakokeshe ba mu nsubu yabo, kabaheshi muhumbishi kaba ka kubendeye bena ekelesia;" 
1Timothy5:15 bualu bua bakuabo bakumana kuhambuishibua bua kulonda Satana. 
1Timothy5:16 Mukashi muena ditabusha bikaleye ne ba mu lufuila badi bamueyemena, yeye abakuatshishe, ne katekedi ekelesia bujitu ebu; bua ekelesia akuatshishe ba mu lufuila lua bushua." 
1Timothy5:17 Bakulu badi bakokesha bimpe babadibue habo bakanangane ne bua kunemeshibua tshiakabidi, kadi batambe kunemeka bobo badi benza mudimu mukole wa kuamba ne wa kuyisha dt dia Nzambi." 
1Timothy5:18 Bua Mukanda wa Nzambi udi wamba ne, Kusuiki nkata ku mishiku ya ngombe udi udiata ntete bua kuishihula; ne, Muena mudimu udi muakanyine bua kuangateye difutu diandi." 
1Timothy5:19 Kuitabushi babande mukulu, anu biamubandabo mukana mua bamanyi babidi anyi basatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Bobo badi benza bualu bubi, ubabele ku mesu kua bonso, bila bakuabo badi bashale bikale ne ditshina." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndi akolesha buabo, ebu bikole ku mesu kua Nzambi ne kua Kilisto Yesu ne kua banjelo bandi basungula, bua wewe kutumikila malu â kui mudianjile kukosa bualu munda muebe ne kui ne kansungunsungu." 
1Timothy5:22 Kutentekeshi bianza lubilu ha mutu ha muntu; kuikadi ne buobumue ne bantu bakuabo mu malu mabi abo; ulame butoke bua mutshima webe. 
1Timothy5:23 Lekela kuikala munu wa anu mai nkayau; kadi unue tuluvu tukese bua kuondaha munda muebe ne bua matekete audi nʼau misangu ya bungi. 
1Timothy5:24 Mibi ya bantu bakuabo idi imueneka hatoke, idi iya ku mpala kuabo tô ne ku dihila; ne mibi ya bakuabo kabidi idi ibalonda ku nyima." 
1Timothy5:25 Muomumue kabidi, bienzedi bimpe bidiku bidi bimueneka hatoke, ne bidi kabi nunku kabiena mua kusokokibua." 
1Timothy6:1 Bonso badi bahika munshi mua mutshi wa tshikokedi babale banfumu babo ne mbakanyine buneme buonso; bua dina dia Nzambi ne diyisha dia buala buandi kabihendibu. 
1Timothy6:2 Ne bobo badi ne banfumu bena kuitabusha kababahetudi, bualu bua badi bana babo ba ma Kilisto; kadi, kudi kutamba buimpe, babakuatshile mudimu, bualu bua badi banulubuluila bintu badi bena kuitabusha ne badi banangibua. Uyishe bantu malu â, ubasengelela nʼau." 
1Timothy6:3 Biayisha muntu diyisha dikuabo dia bualu bua Nzambi, ne bikaleye kai witabusha mei adi malenge, nga Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto mene, ne kai witabusha diyisha dia bu mudi buimpe bua Nzambi;" 
1Timothy6:4 yeye udi mûshibue ne diambu, kai mumanye muanda, kadi udi usama muoyo bua kukonkangana ne bua kuelangana mpata, kudi kufuma mutshiaudi ne matandu ne bihendu ne blesheshi bibi," 
1Timothy6:5 ne kutandangana kua bantu badi ne meshi abo moneka, ne bualu bulelela bumushibua munda muabo, badi batshinka ne, Buimpe bua Nzambi ntshihetelu tshia luhetu." 
1Timothy6:6 Kadi luhetu ludi lutamba bulengele ludi buimpe bua Nzambi busangisha ne mutshima muhole; 
1Timothy6:7 bua katuakalua ne tshintu ha buloba ebu, ne katuena bamanye mua kumukahu ne tshintu;" 
1Timothy6:8 hadi hatuikala ne bia kudia ne bia kuluata, netuikale ne mitshima mihole ne bintu ebi." 
1Timothy6:9 Kadi bobo badi basue kuikala babanshi badi bahona mu kutetshibua kua munda ne mu buteyi ne mu nkuka ya bungi Idi mihote ne idi ibanyanga, bu yoyo mene idi inyisha bantu mu dibashihesha ne mu dibutuka." 
1Timothy6:10 Bualu bua lukuka lua biuma ludi muji wa malu mabi a mishindu yonso; bidi bantu bakuabo badikebela ne bakasesuishibua mu nshila wa ditabusha, bakadisunsula mubidi wonso ne tunyinganyinga tua bungi." 
1Timothy6:11 Kadi wewe, muntu wa Nzambi, nyema malu â; londa malu makane ne a buimpe bua Nzambi ne ditabusha ne dinanga ne ditantamana ne kalolo." 
1Timothy6:12 Uluangane nvita mimpe ya ditabusha, ulamate ku muoyo wa tshiendelele, kuwakabikidibua ne kuwakitabushila Yesu ne dijukula dimpe ku mesu kua bamanyi ba bungi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndi nkuambila bikole ku mesu kua Nzambi udi uhesha bintu bionso muoyo, ne kua Kilisto Yesu wakajukula bualu buandi bimpe ku mesu kua Pontio Pilato;" 
1Timothy6:14 bua wewe utumikile mukenshi eu kui ne katoba, kui ne bilumbu tô ne ku dimueneka dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto," 
1Timothy6:15 didiye ulua kulesha mu bikondo biadi mene. Yeye udi Muena Bukole umuehele mutumbishibue, udi biandi Mukelenge wa bakelenge ne Nfumu wa banfumu;" 
1Timothy6:16 anu yeye udi kai mua kufua, udi wikala mu munya udi bantu kabai bamanye mua kufika kudiu, udi muntu kai muanze kuimona, ne udiye kai mumanye mua kumona kabidi; yeye ikale biandi ne buneme ne bukole bua tshiendelele. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Udimushe bantu badi babanshi mu tshikondo tshia mpindiu, bua bobo kabadisu, kabateki ditekemena diabo kudi bubanshi budi mua kujimina tshituha tshihi; kadi batekemena Nzambi, udi utuha bintu bionso bivula bua tuetu kusanka nʼabi." 
1Timothy6:18 Bobo benzele bakuabo bimpe, bikale ne bubanshi bua bienzedi bimpe; badilongolole bua kuhangana bintu; basue kuikala ne bakuabo luse;" 
1Timothy6:19 badibutshile bidi bitekibua bimpe bua matuku alualua, bua bobo balamate muoyo udi muoyo wa bushua mene." 
1Timothy6:20 Wewe Timote, ulame tshiakakuhebua; ehuka ku biakulakula bia hatuhu ne ku mpata ya bantu badi ne lungenyi ludibo batuhakana ne, Ndulelela;" 
1Timothy6:21 bakuabo hakitabushabo lungenyi elu, bakahambuka bualu bua ditabusha. Ngasa ikale nʼenu." 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, mupostolo wa Kilisto Yesu, bua disua dia Nzambi, bu mudi mulayi wa muoyo wa mu Kilisto Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kudi Timote, muanʼanyi munanga: Ngasa, luse, ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne kudi Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi, undi nkuatshila mudimu mu muoyo-mukese mutoke, bu muakenza bankambua banyi, mundi nkuvuluka tshi ne ndekelu mu kulomba kuanyi, butuku ne munya" 
2Timothy1:4 njinga kukutangila, nvuluka binsonshi biebe, bua meme kûshibua ne disanka." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndi nvuluka ditabusha didi munda muebe didi kadi ne lubombo, diakadianjila kuikala munda mua kaku webe Loi ne mua mamu webe Eunike; ndi ngitabushishibua ne didi munda muebe kabidi." 
2Timothy1:6 Bua bualu ebu adi musue kukuvuluisha bua wewe usonsole tshihedi tshia Nzambi, tshidi munda muebe bua kukutentekesha kua bianza bianyi." 
2Timothy1:7 Bua Nzambi kakatuha nyuma wa buowa; kadi wakatuha nyuma wa bukole ne wa dinanga ne wa kudikanda. 
2Timothy1:8 Nunku kufuishibu bundu ku mesu bua bumanyishi bua Mukelenge wetu, anyi bua bualu buanyi, meme muena lukanu wandi; kadi ukenge nʼanyi bua lumu luimpe bu mudi bukole bua Nzambi;" 
2Timothy1:9 wakatusungila, wakatubikila ne dibikila dia tshijila, kembu mudi midimu yetu mimpe, kadi bu mudi disungula diandi mene ne ngasa, wakatuheye mu Kilisto Yesu diambedi bikondo bia tshiendelele kabi bianze kuikalaku." 
2Timothy1:10 Kadi katataka wakamueneshibua bualu bua dimueneka dia Musungidi wetu Kilisto Yesu, wakajimisha lufu, wakamuenesha muoyo wa tshiendelele ne udi kawi mua kunyanguka mu munya, bualu bua lumu luimpe," 
2Timothy1:11 luakantekabo musambi ne mupostolo ne muyishi bualu bualu. 
2Timothy1:12 Bua muanda eu ndi nkenga makenga â kabidi, kadi bundu kabuena bunkuata ku mesu; bua ndi mumumanye yeye unakuitabusha, ne nakuitabushishibua ne yeye udi ne bukole bua kulama tshintu tshianyi tshiteka tô ne dituku diadia." 
2Timothy1:13 Ulamate tshidikishilu tshia mei malenge awakuamua kundi mu ditabusha ne mu dinanga dia mu Kilisto Yesu. 
2Timothy1:14 Tshiotshi tshimpe tshîakatekibua utshilame bimpe ne dikuatshisha dia Nyuma Muimpe udi muikale munda muetu. 
2Timothy1:15 Udi mumanye bualu ebu ne, Bantu bonso ba mu Asia bakumuka kundi; Fugelo ne Hêmogene badi munkatshi muabo." 
2Timothy1:16 Mukelenge afue ba mu nsubu wa Onesifolo luse, bualu bua yeye wakasangasha muoyo wanyi misangu ya bungi, ne kakafua bundu bua lukanu luanyi;" 
2Timothy1:17 kadi hakadiye mu Lomo, wakankeba ne disuminyina, wakanmona" 
2Timothy1:18 (Mukelenge amuhe mua kuheteye luse kudi Mukelenge dituku diadia); ne bua bungi bua bintu biakankuatshisheye nʼabi ku Efeso, wewe udi mumanye bimpe." 
2Timothy2:1 Nunku wewe muanʼanyi, ukoleshibue mu ngasa wa mu Kilisto Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Malu awakunvua kundi munkatshi mua bamanyi ba bungi, malu â wafile kudi bantu badi mua kueyemenyibua, balua kukumbana mua kuyisha bakuabo kabidi." 
2Timothy2:3 Ukenge nʼanyi bu mudi disalayi dimpe dia Kilisto Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Kakuena disalayi didi dijingila ne malu a muoyo wa ha buloba henzadi mudimu wadi, bua kusankishadi wakadibuesha mu busalayi." 
2Timothy2:5 Ne bikala muntu widikisha bualu mu manaya kabidi, kabena bamuasa tshifulu tshia buhitshi bikaleye kai muidikishe mu bualu bu mudi mikenshi ya manaya yamba." 
2Timothy2:6 Tshidime udi wenza mudimu mukole wa mu budimi ngudi ne bua kudia bia mu budimi ku mpala kua bakuabo. 
2Timothy2:7 Welangane meshi a malu andi nkuambila; bua Mukelenge neakuhe dijingulula mu malu onso. 
2Timothy2:8 Uvuluke Yesu Kilisto, mubishibue ku lufu, kankanunuina ka Davidi, bu mudi lumu luimpe lunakakuambila," 
2Timothy2:9 ne bua muanda walu ndi nkengeshibua makenga mabi a kudi bantu bu muenji wa bibi, tô ne mu nkanu minsuika; kadi dî dia Nzambi kadiena disuika." 
2Timothy2:10 Nunku ndi nkankamana mu malu makole onso bua muanda wa bantu basungula, bua bobo bangate luhandu lua mu Kilisto Yesu ne butumbi bua tshiendelele." 
2Timothy2:11 Dî edi didi mua kueyemenyibua ne, Bituikala bamane kufua nʼandi, netuikale ne muoyo hohamue ngandi." 
2Timothy2:12 Bituikala tuditantamika, netukokeshe nʼandi kabidi; bituamuvila, yeye neatuvile kabidi;" 
2Timothy2:13 bituikala katui bena lulamatu, yeye udi ushala muena lulamatu, yeye kena mumanye mua kudivila." 
2Timothy2:14 Uvuluishe bantu malu â, ubambila bikole ku mesu kua Mukelenge bua bobo kabatandanganyi bualu bua mei adi kâi ne mudimu ne adi ahambuisha bantu badi baunvua." 
2Timothy2:15 Unanukile bua kudifila mujalame, bu muena mudimu udi kai ne bua kufua bundu, uludikile bantu nshila mululame mu dî dia Nzambi dia bushua." 
2Timothy2:16 Kadi ehuka ku biakulakula bia hatuhu; bualu bua benʼabi nebatambe kudiunda mu malu adi kâi anemekela Nzambi; 
2Timothy2:17 ne mei abo neavulangane bu mputu wa lubangu; Humenayo ne Fileto badi munkatshi muabo; 
2Timothy2:18 bobo bakamana kuhambuka mu nshila wa mei malelela, bamba ne, Kubika kua bantu ku lufu kuakumana kulua, ne badi banyanga ditabusha dia bakuabo." 
2Timothy2:19 Kadi bishimikidi bikole biakateka Nzambi bidi bijalama, bidi ne tshimanyishilu etshi ne, Mukelenge udi mumanye badi bandi; ne, Muntu yonso udi utela dina dia Mukelenge ûmuke biandi ku malu mabi." 
2Timothy2:20 Mu nsubu munene kamuena anu bitekelu bia ngolo ne bia argent, kadi mudi bia mitshi ne bia buloba kabidi; bikuabo biteka bua buneme ne bikuabo biteka kabi bua buneme." 
2Timothy2:21 Nunku biumusha muntu malu mabi â munda muandi, yeye neikale bu tshitekelu tshiteka bua buneme, tshia tshijila, tshikumbane mudimu wa mukelenge, tshilongolola bua mudimu muimpe wonso." 
2Timothy2:22 Kadi unyeme nkuka ya bansongalume; londa ku nyima kua buakane, ditabusha, dinanga, ditalala, hohamue ne badi babikila dinu dia Mukelenge ne mitshima mitoke." 
2Timothy2:23 Kadi uhidie dikonkangana dia malu mahote ne a badi kabai bayishibua, Umanye ne adi alela matandu." 
2Timothy2:24 Muhika wa Mukelenge kena ne bua kutandangana, kadi ikale biandi ne kalolo kudi bantu bonso, ikale muakane mua kuyisha bantu, ikale ne lutulu;" 
2Timothy2:25 adimushe badi badimanyika bu baluisha ne mutshima wandi muhuekele; ne bumue Nzambi neakudimune mitshima yabo ku dimanya dia bualu bulelela; 
2Timothy2:26 ne bobo nebahingane ku meshi mahole, bamane kudiluhula mu mateyi a diabolo, bakadi bakuatshibua kudiye bua kuenza bu mu disua diandi." 
2Timothy3:1 Kadi umanye bualu ebu ne, Halua matuku a kunshikidilu, malu makole nealue." 
2Timothy3:2 Bantu nebikale badisui, banangi ba biuma, baditumbishi, badileshi, bahendi ba Nzambi, kabai batumikila mei a baledi babo, kabai ne kusakidila, kabai ne tshijila," 
2Timothy3:3 kabai banangi ba bana babo, bashihi ba bihungidi, bena bunsonge, kabai mua kudikanda, bena luonji, kabai basue malu mimpe," 
2Timothy3:4 nebikale batungidianganyi, bena lukuluku, bûshibui ne diamba, banangi ba masanka, kabai banangi ba Nzambi;" 
2Timothy3:5 nebikale ne tshimuenekelu tshia buimpe bua Nzambi, kadi bamane kudiula bukole buabu; umuke biebe kudi bantu aba kabidi." 
2Timothy3:6 Bua munkatshi mua bantu aba mudi badi babombelela mu nsubu bua babueshe bakashi bahote mu buhika badi bûle tente ne malu mabi, badi bahambuishibua ku mibi ya mishindu yonso;" 
2Timothy3:7 badi bayilayila misangu yonso, kadi tshiendelele kabena bamanye mua kufika ku dimanya dia bualu bulelela." 
2Timothy3:8 Bu mudi Yane ne Yambele bakatantamena Mose, nunku bobo kabidi badi batantamena bualu bulelela; mbantu mene badi ne meshi abo moneka, kabai bajadikibua mu ditabusha diabo." 
2Timothy3:9 Kadi bobo kabena mua kuhita ku mpala; bualu bua buhote buabo nebumueneke ku mesu kua bonso, bu muakamueneka buhote bua bantu aba bakuabo." 
2Timothy3:10 Kadi wewe wakalonda diyisha dianyi, bienzedi bianyi, bualu bunakahangidisha, ditabusha dianyi, lutulu luanyi, dinanga dianyi, kutantamana kuanyi," 
2Timothy3:11 makengeshibua anyi ne makenga anyi; ne wakalonda malu akankuata ku Antiokia ne ku Ikonio ne ku Luseta, ne makengesha anakakenga ne mutshima wa dikima; ne Mukelenge wakampandisha munkatshi mua buonso buau." 
2Timothy3:12 Ne bantu bonso badi basue kuikala bena kanemu mu Kilisto Yesu nebakengeshibue. 
2Timothy3:13 Kadi bantu babi ne badingi ba bakuabo nebadiundadiunde mu malu mabi abo matuku onso, badingangana, badingila." 
2Timothy3:14 Kadi wewe wikale mu malu awakayila ne awakeyemena ne, Nga bushua; umanya biebe bantu bakakuyishau;" 
2Timothy3:15 ku buana buebe wewe wakamanya Mukanda wa Nzambi, udi mumanye mua kukuvuisha muena meshi tô ne ku luhandu luakulua bua ditabusha dia mu Kilisto Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Dî dionso dia mu Mukanda wa Nzambi didi difume munda mua Nzambi bu muhuya wandi, ne didi ne mudimu muimpe wa kuyisha bantu, ne wa kubabela, ne wa kubadimusha, ne wa kubalongesha mu buakane bua Nzambi;" 
2Timothy3:17 bua muntu wa Nzambi ikale mukumbashibue, mulongolola tshishiki bua midimu yonso mimpe." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndi nkuambila bikole ku mesu kua Nzambi ne kua Kilisto Yesu, ulualua kulumbuluisha badi ne muoyo ne badi bafue, bua dimueneka diandi ne bua bukelenge buandi:" 
2Timothy4:2 Ambila bantu dî dia Nzambi mene; nanukila kubambila misangu miakane ne misangu idi kayi miakane; ubakande ku malu abo, ubabele, ubasengelele ne lutulu luonso ne diyisha." 
2Timothy4:3 Bualu bua tshikondo netshilue hikalabo kabai bunvua diyisha dilenge ne lutulu; kadi bualu bua matshu abo adi asasakana, bobo nebadikebele bayishi ba bungi bu mudi disamina dibi dia mitshima yabo;" 
2Timothy4:4 nebumushe matshu abo ku malu malelela, nebasesukile ku nsumuinu." 
2Timothy4:5 Kadi wikale ne meshi mahole mu malu onso, witabushe makenga, wenze mudimu wa butangadiki, ukumbashe mudimu webe wa Nzambi." 
2Timothy4:6 Bualu bila ntshidi mpongolodibua bu mulambu wa bia kunua, ne tshikondo tshia tshimuangi tshianyi tshiafiki." 
2Timothy4:7 Nakuluangana nvita mimpe, nakushikisha tshidikishilu tshia lubilu, nakulamata ditabusha;" 
2Timothy4:8 tshidi ku mpala mpindiu ntshifulu tshia butumbi tshia buakane bua Nzambi tshintekela, tshialua Mukelenge mulumbuludi muakane kumpa ditutu diadia; kena utshîmpa anu meme, kadi neashihe bonso kabidi badi basue dimueneka diandi." 
2Timothy4:9 Wendeshe lukasa bua kulua kundi; 
2Timothy4:10 bualu bua Dema wakandekela mumane kusua malu a ha buloba, wakaya ku Tesalonike; Kulesekene wakaya ku Galatia; Tito wakaya ku Dalamatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Anu Luka nkayandi udi nʼanyi. Wangata Mâko, ulue nʼandi, bua yeye udi mukumbane mua kunkuatshisha mu mudimu wa Nzambi." 
2Timothy4:12 Nakatuma Tukiko ku Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Tshikutu, tshinakashîa ku Toa mu bianza bia Kâpo, ulue nʼatshi hawalua, ne mikanda kabidi, tshitambe mbiseba bidi ne mei mafundahu." 
2Timothy4:14 Alesandelo, mutudi wa tshiamu tshikunze, wakatamba kungenzela bibi; Mukelenge neamufute bu mudi midimu yandi;" 
2Timothy4:15 wewe kabidi wikale mudimuke kudiye, bualu bua yeye wakatantamena mei etu bikole." 
2Timothy4:16 Ku kudividila kuanyi kua kumudilu kakuakadi muntu wakimana nʼanyi hamue, kadi bonso bakandekela; bualu ebu kabubadibu kudibo." 
2Timothy4:17 Kadî Mukelenge wakimana nʼanyi, wakankolesha; bua dî dia Nzambi dimanyishibue kuonso bua bualu buanyi, ne bua bonso ba bisamba bia bende badiunvue; nakabandishibua mukana mua nyama wa ntambue." 
2Timothy4:18 Mukelenge neampandishe ku midimu yabo yonso idi mibi, neansungile tô ne ku bukelenge buandi bua mu diulu; butumbi buikale kudiye ku bikondo ne ku bikondo. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Ela Pisikila ne Akula ne ba mu nsubu wa Onesifolo muoyo. 
2Timothy4:20 Elasto wakashala ku Kolinto; kadi nakashîa Tofimo ku Melita ne disama. 
2Timothy4:21 Wendeshe mua kulua kundi tshidimu tshia mashika katshi tshianze kulua. Eubulo ne Pude ne Lino ne Kulaudio ne bana betu bonso ba mu Kilisto badi bakutumina muoyo. 
2Timothy4:22 Mukelenge ikale ne nyuma webe. Ngasa ikale nʼenu. 
Titus1:1 Meme Paulo, udi muhika wa Nzambi ne mupostolo wa Yesu Kilisto, bualu bua kuitabushisha bantu bakasungulabo kudi Nzambi, ne bua dimanya dia tshishiki dia bualu bulelela bua mu buimpe bua Nzambi," 
Titus1:2 mu ditekemena dia muoyo wa tshiendelele, udi Nzambi, udi kai mua kudinga, mulaye diambedi bikondo bia tshiendelele kabi bianze kuikalaku." 
Titus1:3 Kadi mu bikondo biandi mene yeye wakamuenesha dî diandi mu kuamba kua di kuakafidibua kundi bu mudi mukenshi wa Nzambi Musungidi wetu. 
Titus1:4 Mukanda eu udi mufundila Tito, muana wanyi wa bushua mu ditabusha dimue dia bonso. Ngasa ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu ne bia kudi Kilisto Yesu, Musungidi wetu, bikale nʼebe." 
Titus1:5 Bua bualu ebu nakakushîa mu Kulete, bua wewe kulongolola malu akadi mashale, ne bua wewe kusunguisha bakulu ku musoko ne ku musoko bu munakakuambila;" 
Titus1:6 bikalaku muntu udi kai mua kubandibua, udi ne mukashi umue, udi ne bana bandi badi bena ditabusha, badi kabai babandibua bua dinyanguka dia muoyo anyi bua huhidia." 
Titus1:7 Bualu bua budi mukulu-mutangidi nʼabu mbua kuikala kai mua kubandibua, bu mudi mulami muteka kudi Nzambi; kikadi biandi muena tshitshu; kukuatshi tshishi lubilu; kikadi muena diyoyo bua malulu; kikadi mukumianganyi ne bakuabo; kikadi ne lukuka lua biuma." 
Titus1:8 Kadi ikale biandi musankididi wa benyi; anange malu mimpe; ikale ne meshi mahole; enzele bantu bonso biakane; ikale muntu wa tshijila; adikande biandi; 
Titus1:9 alamate dî didi mua kueyemenyibua didi bu mudi diyisha dia Nzambi, bua yeye amanye mua kusengelela bantu ne diyisha dilenge, ne mua kutuisha bena mpata." 
Titus1:10 Bualu bua bena buhidia ba bungi ne bena biakulakula, ne bena mashimi badiku; mba munkatshi mua bena ditengula badi batambe kuikala nunku;" 
Titus1:11 budibo nʼabu mbua kubuikidishibua mishiku yabo; bobo badi bona ditabusha dia bena nsubu mijima, bayisha bantu malu adibo kabai ne bualu bua kubayisha, hua kuhetabo biuma bibihe." 
Titus1:12 Umue wabo, muprofete wabo mene, wakamba ne, Bena Kulete badi bena mashimi misangu yonso, mbu nyama mibi, mbafuba ba lumpukusu." 
Titus1:13 Bumanyishi ebu mbulelela. Bua muanda eu ubabele bikole, bua bobo bikale balenge mu ditabusha;" 
Titus1:14 kabitabushi nsumuinu ya Bena Yuda ne mikenshi ya bantu badi bumuka ku bualu bulelela. 
Titus1:15 Bintu bionso bidi biakane kudi bantu badi ne mitshima mitoke; kadi kudi badi babike, badi kabai ne ditabusha, kakuena tshintu tshidi tshiakane; kadi meshi abo ne muoyo-mukese wabo mbioneka." 
Titus1:16 Bobo badi bamba ne, Tudi bamanye Nzambi; kadi badi bamudiula ne bienzedi biabo; mbena tshinyangu, mbena buhidia, babengibue kadi Nzambi bua kuenza mudimu muimpe wonso." 
Titus2:1 Kadi wewe wambe malu adi makanangane ne diyisha dilenge; 
Titus2:2 ne balume bakulumpe bikale ne meshi mahole; bikale ne kanemu; bikale ne meshi mahuekele; bikale balenge mu ditabusha ne mu dinanga ne mu ditantamana. 
Titus2:3 Muomumue bakashi bakulumpe bikale ne mitshima ya kanemu; kabikadi bena tshibandabanda anyi bahika ba maluvu; bikale bayishi ba malu adi mimpe; 
Titus2:4 bua bobo balengeshe bansongakashi bua kunangabo babayabo ne bana bakalelabo; 
Titus2:5 bua kuikala ne meshi mahuekele; bua kuikala kabai ne meshi a tshiendenda; bua kusala mudimu wa mu nsubu yabo; bua kuikala bimpe; kukokela babayabo, bualu bua dî dia Nzambi kadihendibu." 
Titus2:6 Muomumue usengelele bansongalume bua kuikalabo ne meshi mahuekele. 
Titus2:7 Wewe udileshe kudibo bu tshifuanyikishi mu midimu mimpe yonso; mu diyisha diebe kaikadi muoneke, wikale mudiholeshe," 
Titus2:8 wikale ne mei malenge adi kâi mua kuhishibua; bua yeye udi ku luseke lua batuhumbishi afuishibue bundu, kai ne mua kuamba dî dibi bualu buetu." 
Titus2:9 Usengelele bahika bua bobo bikale bakokele banfumu babo, ne babasankishe mu malu onso; kabikadi ne mpata;" 
Titus2:10 kabibi; kadi bikale ne lulamatu luimpe mu malu onso; bua bobo batumbishe diyisha dia Nzambi, Musungidi wetu, mu malu onso." 
Titus2:11 Hualu bua ngasa wa Nzambi wakamueneka, mutuadile bantu bonso luhandu;" 
Titus2:12 utuyisha ne, Hatuahidia malu adi kâi a Nzambi ne nkuka ya ha buloba, tuikale ne meshi mahuekele ne makane ne a Nzambi hatutshidi ha buloba ebu," 
Titus2:13 hatudi tuindila ditekemena dietu dia disanka, ne dimueneka dia butumbi bua Nzambi munene ne Musungidi wetu, Yesu Kilisto." 
Titus2:14 Yeye wakadifila bua bualu buetu, bua kutuhikula ku malu mabi onso, ne bua kudilengeshila bantu badi mua kuikala bandi bine, bikala ne lukunukunu lua kuenza midimu mimpe." 
Titus2:15 Wewe wambile bantu malu â onso, ubasengelele, ubabele ne bukokeshi buonso. Muntu kakuhetudi." 
Titus3:1 Ubavuluishe bua kukokelabo banfumu ne bakokeshi, batumikile dî diabo, bikale balongolodibue bua mudimu muimpe wonso;" 
Titus3:2 kabakudi mei mabi bua muntu; kabikadi ne kutandangana: bikale ne buhole, baleshe bantu bonso kalolo konso." 
Titus3:3 Bualu bua tuetu tuakadi bahote diambedi, tuakadi ne buhidia, tuakadi badingishibua, tuakadi tulonda nkuka ne masanka bia mishindu ya bungi; tuakadi tuikala ne lukinu ne mukau; tuakadi tukinyibua, tuakadi tukinangana." 
Titus3:4 Kadi hakamueneka buimpe bua Nzambi, Musungidi wetu, ne dinanga diandi kudi bantu bonso;" 
Titus3:5 kembua midimu ya mu buakane ituakenza nkayetu, kadi bu mudi luse luandi wakatusungila, bualu bua diuvua dia kuedibua kua tshiakabidi ne bua mitshima mihia-mihia yakatuhabo kudi Nyuma Muimpe," 
Titus3:6 wakatuitshikishila Nyuma Muimpe muvula bua Yesu Kilisto Musungidi wetu; 
Titus3:7 bua hatuabingishibua bua ngasa wandi, tuetu tumanye mua kuvuishibua bahianyi bu mudi ditekemena dia muoyo wa tshiendelele." 
Titus3:8 Dî edi didi mua kueyemenyibua; ne bua malu â ndi musue wewe kuâmba, mumanye ne, Nga bushua, hua bantu bakumana kuitabusha Nzambi bananukile mu midimu mimpe. Malu â adi mimpe ne adi avuishila bantu mushinga muimpe;" 
Titus3:9 kadi ehuka ku kuebeshangana kua malu mahote, ne ku mena a bankambua malongolola, ne ku kutandangana, ne ku kufuilangana bua mikenshi; malu â kena mamanye mua kuvuishila muntu mushinga muimpe, adi hatuhu." 
Titus3:10 Muntu udi muedi wa mukoso, hawamudimusha musangu umue anyi misangu ibidi, umuhidie;" 
Titus3:11 mumanye biebe ne muntu wa mushindu eu wakahambuka mu nshila muimpe ne udi wenza malu mabi, muikale biandi mudihishe." 
Titus3:12 Hanatuma Âtema anyi Tukiko kûdi, ndi musue wewe wambuluishe bua kulua kundi ku Nikopoli; bua nakudisunguila bua kushalaku tshidimu tshia mashika." 
Titus3:13 Utume Zena, mumanyi wa mikenshi, ne Apolo ku mpala ku luendu luabo lubilu; bua kabahangi tshintu tshimue tshidibo nʼatshi bualu." 
Titus3:14 Bantu betu bayile kabidi mua kunanukila mu midimu mimpe bua kuhetabo bintu bidibo nʼabi bualu; bua kabikadi bu bantu badi kabai bakuama mamuma. 
Titus3:15 Bonso badi neanyi badi bakuela muoyo. Ela bonso badi batunanga mu ditabusha muoyo. Ngasa ikale ne buonso buenu. 
Philemon1:1 Paulo, umena lukanu wa Kilisto Yesu, ne Timote muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto, kudi Filemona munangibue ne muenu mudimu nʼetu," 
Philemon1:2 ne kudi Apia, muanʼetu mukashi wa mu Kilisto, ne kudi Âkipo, disalayi nʼetu dia Yesu, ne kudi ekelesia wa mu nsubu wandi:" 
Philemon1:3 Ngasa ikale nʼenu ne ditalala bia kudi Nzambi Tatu wetu ne kudi Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto. 
Philemon1:4 Ndi nsakidila Nzambi misangu yonso, ntela dina diebe mu milombu yanyi;" 
Philemon1:5 bualu bua nakunua lumu lua dinanga diebe, ne lua ditabusha diudi nʼadi mu Mukelenge Yesu ne kudi basanto bonso;" 
Philemon1:6 bua buobumue buetu nʼebe mu ditabusha buenzeshe dimanya dilelela dia malu mimpe onso adi munda muenu, bualu bua Kilisto," 
Philemon1:7 Bua nakadi ne disanka dinene ne busambi bua dinanga diebe, bualu ba mitshima ya basanto yakakankauashibua bua bualu buebe, muanʼetm." 
Philemon1:8 Nunku, nasha meme ngikala ne dikima dia mu Kilisto bua kukuelela mukenshi wa bualu budi bukuakanyina," 
Philemon1:9 kedi udi ntamba kusua kukusengelela bualu bua dinanga; udi wamba bualu ebu mmeme Paulo, muetu mununu, ne katataka muena lukanu kabidi wa Kilisto Yesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndi nkusengelela bua muanʼanyi wa mu Kilisto Onesimo unakuela mu lukanu luanyi. 
Philemon1:11 Diambedi yeye wakadi bu tshintu tshidi katshi tshilubuluka kûdi, kadi katataka udi bu tshintu tshidi tshilubuluka kûdi wewe ne kundi meme kabidi;" 
Philemon1:12 nakamuhingisha kûdi, yeye muine, udi bu mutshima wanyi mene." 
Philemon1:13 Nakasua yeye ashale kundi, bua yeye angenzelenzele mudimu bua bualu buebe mu lukanu mundi bua lumu luimpe;" 
Philemon1:14 kadi tshiakasua kuenza bualu tshi muanze kumanya mûdi wela meshi, bua buimpe buebe kabuikadi bua ku bukole, kadi bua mu disua diebe." 
Philemon1:15 Bumue bua bualu ebu mbuakamumushilabo kûdi tshituha, bua wewe wikale nʼandi tshiendelele;" 
Philemon1:16 kembu muhika, kadi muhite muhika buimpe, muanʼenu munanga wa mu Kilisto, munangibue kundi tshishiki, kadi mutambe kunangibua kûdi, ne mu mubidi ne mu Mukelenge." 
Philemon1:17 Nunku biwambala bu mukuatshishanganyi nʼebe, umuitabushe bu mûdi ungitabusha meme." 
Philemon1:18 Kadi bikaleye mukuenzele bibi, anyi muikale nʼebe dibanza, udibale bu dianyi;" 
Philemon1:19 meme Paulo nakufunda dî edi ne tshianza tshianyi: nenkufute; bua tshikuambidi bu mûdi wewe muine nʼanyi dibanza, muoyo webe mene." 
Philemon1:20 Bulelela, muanʼetu, mpeteku disanka dikumbana kûdi mu Mukelenge; ukankamasha mutshima wanyi mu Kilisto." 
Philemon1:21 Bualu bua adi ntekemena ditumikila diebe, nakukufundila nunku, adi mumanye ne wewe newenze malu matambe andi nkuambila." 
Philemon1:22 Kadi bualu bukuabo, undongoluele muaba wa kulala kabidi, ndi ntekemena bua kufikishibua kunudi bualu bua kulomba kuenu." 
Philemon1:23 Epafa, udi muenu lukanu nʼanyi mu Kilisto Yesu, udi nkutumina muoyo;" 
Philemon1:24 ne Mâko ne Alistâko ne Dema ne Luka, benji nʼanyi ba mumudi badi bakutumina muoyo kabidi." 
Philemon1:25 Ngasa wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto ikale ne nyuma wenu. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Nzambi, mumane kuambila batatu mei andi kudi baprofete bandi kale mu bituha bia bungi ne mu biambidi bia bungi," 
Hebrews1:2 kunshikidilu kua matuku â wakatuambila bietu dî kudi Muana wakatekeye muhianyi wa bintu bionso, wakafukeye nʼandi buloba kabidi." 
Hebrews1:3 Yeye udi dinkenka dikole dia butumbi bua Tatu ne tshifuanyikishi mene tshia Bunzambi buandi, ne udi wimanyika bintu bionso ku dî dia bukole buandi; hakamaneye kuhetela bantu diuvua dia ku malu mabi abo, wakashikama ku tshianza tshia bukole tshia Mutambe Bunene wa mulu." 
Hebrews1:4 Bua malu au onso Yesu wakulua mutambi wa banjelo buimpe, bualu bua wakahiana dina didi ditamba mena abo kutumba." 
Hebrews1:5 Bualu bua Nzambi wakambila mukuabo kai wa banjelo bandi ne, Wewe udi Muana wanyi, Lelu eu nakukulela? Ne kabidi: Nengikale Tatu kudiye, Ne yeye neikale Muana kundi?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ne kabidi, hakalueye ne muanʼa bute ha buloba, yeye udi wamba ne, Banjelo bonso ba Nzambi bamutendelele." 
Hebrews1:7 Yeye udi wamba bua banjelo ne, Udi ufuisha banjelo bandi mpehele, Ne bakuatshishi bandi ba mudimu ndimi ya kahia." 
Hebrews1:8 Kadi bua Muana yeye adi wamba ne, Nzambi, nkuasa webe wa bukelenge udiku tô bikondo ne bikondo, Ne dikombo dia buakane ndikombo dia bukelenge buebe." 
Hebrews1:9 Wewe wakusua malu makane ne udi ne malu mabi tshishi; Bua bualu ebu Nzambi, Nzambi webe mene, Wakuela manyi a disanka ba mutu hebe Ne diela dia manyi ditamba diakeleye bakuebe." 
Hebrews1:10 Wakuamba kabidi ne, Wewe, Mukelenge, wakajadika bishimikidi bia buloba ku tshibangidilu, Ne bintu bia mu diulu bidi bienzedi bia bianza biebe." 
Hebrews1:11 Bintu ebi nebijimine, kadi wewe udi ushala tshiendelele; Ne bionso nebikulukashe bu tshivualu;" 
Hebrews1:12 Ne wewe neubange bu tshilamba tshia kudibuikila, Bu tshibalu, ne nebikudimuke; Kadi wewe udi muomumue, Ne bidimu biebe kabiena bishika." 
Hebrews1:13 Ne kudi mukuabo kai wa banjelo bandi wakuambeye munga musangu ne, Shikama biebe ku tshianza tshianyi tshia bukole, Tô ne hanuvuisha bena lukuna bebe Bu ditanda dia munshi mua makasa ebe?" 
Hebrews1:14 Banjelo bonso kabena nyuma mukuatshishi mitumibue bua kukuatshilabo badi bamba kuhiana luhandu mudimu, anyi?" 
Hebrews2:1 Bua bualu ebu butudi nʼabu mbua kutamba kudimuka ku malu atuakunvua bua bumue katulu kuhambuka. 
Hebrews2:2 Bua bikala dî diakambibua kudi banjelo diakajadikibua, ne bikala bualu buonso bua dihambuka ne buhidia buonso biakahetela benji babi difutu diakanangane ne bubi," 
Hebrews2:3 tuetu mene netuhanduke munyi, bituahetula luhandu bunene nunku, luakadianjila kuambibua kudi Mukelenge, luakajadika bua kutudi kudi bakalunvua kudiye?" 
Hebrews2:4 Nzambi kabidi wakamanyishangana nʼabo ne ku bimanyinu ne ku malu a kukema ne ku bienzedi bia bukole bia bungi ne ku bihedi bia Nyuma Muimpe biakababanyinabo, bu mudi disua diandi." 
Hebrews2:5 Yeye kakateka buloba bua bantu bulualua, butudi tuamba bualu buabu, munshi mua banjelo." 
Hebrews2:6 Kadi mukuabo wakatumanyisha mu muaba mukuabo, wamba ne, Muntu udi tshinyi, bua wewe udi umuvuluka, Anyi muana wa muntu, bua wewe udi umulama?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wakamukehesha kakese kudi banjelo, Wakamuasa tshifulu tshia butumbi ne buneme, Ne wakamuteka ku mutu kua midimu ya bianza biebe," 
Hebrews2:8 Wakateka bintu bionso munshi mua makasa andi. Bualu bua mu dimutekela dia bintu bionso munshi muandi, kakashîa tshintu tshimue tshidi katshî tshitekibila munshi muandi. Kadi katataka katuena banze kutangila bintu bionso bitekibua munshi muandi." 
Hebrews2:9 Kadi tudi tumutangila yeye wakakeheshibua kakese kudi Banjelo, Yesu mene, bualu bua dikenga dia lufu muashibue tshifulu tshia butumbi ne buneme, bua ku ngasa wa Nzambi alabuile muntu yonso lufu." 
Hebrews2:10 Bua bualu buakadi buakane kudiye, bua bualu buandi bintu bionso bidiku, ne bintu bionso bidi bifukibua ku bukole buandi, hakalomboleye bana ba bungi ku butumbi, bua kuvuisha kapitene ka luhandu luabo mu buakane buonso ku makenga." 
Hebrews2:11 Bualu bua yeye udi ujidila ne bobo badi bajidibua kabidi, bonso badi ba Tatu umue: bua bualu ebu kena ufua bundu bua kubabikila ne, Bana betu," 
Hebrews2:12 wamba ne, Nengambile bana betu dina diebe, Munkatshi mua bena ekelesia nengimbe misambu ya kukutumbisha nʼai." 
Hebrews2:13 Ne udi wamba kabidi ne, Meme nengikale mu eyemena. Ne udi wamba kabidi ne, Ke meme eu ne bana bakumpabo kudi Nzambi." 
Hebrews2:14 Bualu bua bana bakuabanyangana mubidi ne mashi, yeye muine kabidi wakadiangatshila bintu binʼebe muomumue; bua ku lufu luandi yeye amuvuishe tshianana udi ne bukole bua lufu, ndiabolo mene;" 
Hebrews2:15 ne bua yeye ahikule bonso aba bakadi bakuatshibue mu buhika matuku onso a muoyo wabo bua ditshina diabo dia lufu. 
Hebrews2:16 Bua bulelela, kena ukuatshisha banjelo, kadi udi ukuatshisha tunkanuniuna tua Abalahama." 
Hebrews2:17 Nunku buakadiye nʼabu mbua kufuanyishibua bu bana babo mu malu onso, bua yeye alue muakuidi munene wa luse ne wa kueyemenyibua mu malu adi a Nzambi, bua kufileye milambu ya kubuikidila nʼai bantu mibi yabo." 
Hebrews2:18 Bualu bua yeye nkayandi wakakenga hakateyibueye, yeye udi mumanye mua kukuatshisha badi bateyibua." 
Hebrews3:1 Nunku, bana betu ba tshijila, babanyanganyi ba dibikila dia mu diulu, nuelangane meshi bua Mupostolo ne Muakuidi Munene wa dijukula dia ditabusha dietu, Yesu mene;" 
Hebrews3:2 wakadi wa kueyemenyibua kudi wakamuteka mu mudimu, bu muakadi Mose kabidi mu nsubu mua Nzambi muonso." 
Hebrews3:3 Bualu bua yeye wakubadibua muakanangane ne butumbi butambe bua Mose, bualu bua wakibaka nsubu udi ne butumbi butambe butumbi bua nsubu." 
Hebrews3:4 Bualu bua nsubu yonso udi muibakibue kudi mukuabo, kadi wakibaka bintu bionso nNzambi." 
Hebrews3:5 Bulelela, Mose wakadi wa kueyemenyibua mu nsubu wa Nzambi muonso bu muena mudimu, bua kuikaleye tshimanyishilu tshia malu akadi amba kuambibua ka nyima;" 
Hebrews3:6 kadi Kilisto wakadi wa kueyemenyibua bu Muana ku mutu kua nsubu wa Nzambi; tuetu tudi nsubu wandi, bitualamata ku dikima dietu ne ku kutumbila kua ditekemena dietu bikole tô ne kunshikidilu." 
Hebrews3:7 Bua bualu ebu, bu mudi Nyuma Muimpe wamba ne, Lelu eu, binunvua dî diandi," 
Hebrews3:8 Kanukoleshi mitshima yenu, bu muakenzabo mu dinfikisha dia munda, Bu muakadi dituku dia ditetshibua diabo mu tshihela," 
Hebrews3:9 Kuakantetaku batatu benu bua kumanya mudi bujalame buanyi, Ne bakamona midimu yanyi bidimu makumi anai." 
Hebrews3:10 Ka nakadi ne ba mu tshikondo etshi tshishi Ne nakamba ne, Badi bahambuka mu mitshima yabo misangu yonso, Ne kabakamanya nshila yanyi;" 
Hebrews3:11 Bu munakaditshiha mu tshishi tshianyi ne, Kabena babuela mu dikisha dianyi." 
Hebrews3:12 Bana betu, nudimuke bua bumue kakulu kuikala umue wenu udi ne mutshima mubi wa buhidia munda muandi, mu dilekela diandi dia Nzambi wa muoyo;" 
Hebrews3:13 kadi nukoleshangane mitshima yenu ku dituku ku dituku hatshidibi bikidibua ne, Lelu, bua mukuabo wenu kakoleshibu ku kudinga kua bubi." 
Hebrews3:14 Bua tuetu tuakulua babanyanganyi ne Kilisto, bitualamata ku tshibangidilu tshia dieyemena dietu tô ne kunshikidilu;" 
Hebrews3:15 hambabo ne, Lelu, binunvua dî diandi, Kanukoleshi mitshima yenu, bu muakenzabo mu dinfikisha dia munda." 
Hebrews3:16 Bua banganyi, hakunvuabo dî dia Nzambi, bakafikisha munda muandi? Kabobo bonso bakaluhuka mu Ejipitu ne Mose kabakenza nunku, anyi?" 
Hebrews3:17 Ne yeye wakadi ne banganyi tshishi bidimu makumi anai? Katshiakadi kudi bantu aba bakenza bibi, bena mibidi yabo yakahona hanshi mu tshihela, anyi?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ne yeye wakaditshiha kudi banganyi ne, Kanuena nubuela mu dikisha dianyi, anu kudi bantu aba bakadi ne buhidia, nasha?" 
Hebrews3:19 Ne tudi tutangila ne, Bobo kabakamanya mua kubuelamu bualu bua buhidia buabo." 
Hebrews4:1 Nunku, tutshine bietu, bakavua bamane kutushila mulayi wa tuetu kubuela mu dikisha diandi, bumue umue wenu kalu kumueneka bu mudiye kai mufikeku." 
Hebrews4:2 Bulelela, tuakadi ne lumu luimpe luambibue kutudi bu muakadibo nʼalu lubambila kabidi; kadi dî diakunvuabo kadiakabakuatshisha, bualu bua kadiakusangishibua ku ditabusha ne bantu bakadiunvua." 
Hebrews4:3 Bualu bua tuetu bakitabusha tudi tubuela mu dikisha, bu muakuambeye ne, Bu munakaditshihisha mu tshishi tshianyi ne, Bobo kabena babuela mu dikisha dianyi, nasha midimu yandi mishikishibue ku tshibangidilu tshia buloba." 
Hebrews4:4 Bua yeye wakuamba mu muaba mukuabo buala bua dituku dia muanda mutekete nunku ne, Nzambi wakikisha kabidi dituku dia muanda mutekete ku midimu yandi yonso," 
Hebrews4:5 ne mu muaba au kabidi ne, Kabena babuela mu dikisha dianyi." 
Hebrews4:6 Nunku kutshidi kushala bua bakuabo babuelemu, ne bua bantu bakadi ne lumu luimpe luambibua kudibo diambedi kabakabuelamu bua buhidia buabo," 
Hebrews4:7 yeye udi Usungula dituku dikuabo ne, Lelu, Wamba mu Misambu ya Davidi musangu mumane kuleha mule nunku (bu muakambibua diambedi) ne, Lelu binunvua dî diandi, Kanukoleshi mitshima yenu." 
Hebrews4:8 Bualu bua bu Yoshua mubahe dikisha, kakadi kuamba ku nyima bua dituku dikuabo." 
Hebrews4:9 Nunku kudi kushala dikisha dia Lumingu dia bantu ba Nzambi. 
Hebrews4:10 Bualu bua wakamana kubuela mu dikisha diandi, yeye muine wakikisha kabidi ku midimu yandi bu muakikisha Nzambi ku midima yandi yeye." 
Hebrews4:11 Nunku tutshintai bietu bua kubuela mu dikisha adi, bua muntu kahonyi mu kulonda kua tshifuanyikishi tshiotshimue tshia buhidia." 
Hebrews4:12 Bualu bua dî dia Nzambi didi ne muoyo ne bukole, didi dihita muele wonso musakisha nseke ibidi kutua, didi ditubula tô ne ku dihandulula dia muoyo ne nyuma, ne dia manungu ne buongo bua mikuha, didi dijingulula lukasa meshi ne mata adi mutshima musue kuenza." 
Hebrews4:13 Ne kakuena tshintu tshifukibua tshidi katshi tshimueneshibua ku mesu kuandi, kadi bintu bionso bidi butaka ne bibuluka ku mesu kua utudi nʼandi ne bualu." 
Hebrews4:14 Bualu bua tuetu tudi ne muakuidi munene wakuhita mulu onso, Yesu Muana wa Nzambi mene, tulamate dijukula dia ditabusha dietu." 
Hebrews4:15 Bualu bua katuena ne muakuidi mimene udi kai mumanye mua kukenga nʼetu mu matekete etu, kadi tudi ne umue wakuteyibua mu mata onso muomumue atudi tuteyibua nʼau, kai ne bubi." 
Hebrews4:16 Nunku, tusemene ne dikima hehi ne nkuasa wa butumbi wa ngasa, bua tuetu tuhete luse ne bua tusangane ngasa bua kutukuatshisha mu tshikondo tshia dikengela dietu." 
Hebrews5:1 Bualu bua muakuidi mimene yonso, muangatshibue munkatshi mua bantu, udi ubueshibua mu mudimu bua kukuatshisha bantu mu malu a kudi Nzambi bua yeye afile bintu bihebua ne milambu mishiha bua mibi," 
Hebrews5:2 udi mumanye mua kuikala ne lutulu kudi bahote ne kudi bahambuki, bualu bua yeye muine udi musuikibue ku butekete;" 
Hebrews5:3 ne bua bualu ebu yeye udi ne bualu bua kufila milambu bua mibi yandi kabidi muomumue ne ya bantu. 
Hebrews5:4 Muntu kena udiangatshila buneme ebu nkayandi, kadi udi ubuangata hakabikidibueye kudi Nzambi bu muakabikidibua Alona kabidi." 
Hebrews5:5 Nunku, Kilisto kabidi, kakaditumbisha bua kuvuishibua muakuidi munene, kadi wakamutumbisha nyeye wakamuambila ne, Wewe udi Muana wanyi, Nakukulela lelu eu;" 
Hebrews5:6 bu mudiye wamba kabidi mu muaba mukuabo ne, Wewe udi muakuidi tshiendelele Wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke." 
Hebrews5:7 Nyeye mu matuku a mubidi wandi wa ha buloba, hakatendeleleye ne mitendelelu ne misengelelu misangisha ne muadi mukole ne binsonshi kudi yeye wakadi ne bukole bua kumusungila ku lufu, ne hakamunvuilabo bua ditshina diandi dia Nzambi;" 
Hebrews5:8 nasha yeye muikale Muana, wakayila ditumikila ku malu akakengeye nʼau." 
Hebrews5:9 Hakavuishibueye ne buakane buonso, yeye wakalua muenzeshi wa luhandu lua tshiendelele kudi bonso badi bamutumikila;" 
Hebrews5:10 wakidikibua kudi Nzambi muakuidi mimene wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke. 
Hebrews5:11 Bua bualu buandi tudi ne malu a bungi a kuamba ne malu makole ha kunujinguluila, bualu bua nuenu nuakulua ne mahaha." 
Hebrews5:12 Bualu bua musangu wakamana kuleha unuakadi kuikala bayishi, kadi nudi ne bualu kabidi bua bakuabo banuyishe nuenu mayisha a kumudilu a tshibangidilu tshia mei mamba kudi Nzambi; ne nuakulua bu badi ne mabele bualu, kanuena bu badi ne bia kudia bikole bualu." 
Hebrews5:13 Bualu bua muntu yonso udi wamua mabele kena muanze kujalama mu dî dia buakane, bualu bua utshidi muana mukese." 
Hebrews5:14 Bia kudia bikole bidi bua bantu bakole, bia bobo mene badi ne meshi abo mibidila a kujingulula nʼau tshidi tshimpe ne tshidi tshibi, bualu bua bakalonda malu makane." 
Hebrews6:1 Nunku, tushîe diyisha dia malu a tshibangidilu a Kilisto ku nyima, tuyai tô ne ku buakane bua tshishiki; katuteki tshiakabidi bishimikidi bia kukudimuna kua mutshima ku midimu mifue, ne bia ditabusha dia kudi Nzambi," 
Hebrews6:2 ne bia diyisha dia kubatiza, ne bia ditentekesha dia bianza, ne bia dibika dia bafue, ne bia dilumbuluisha dia tshiendelele." 
Hebrews6:3 Netuenze bualu ebu, bitabusha Nzambi." 
Hebrews6:4 Bua muanda wa bantu aba bakatokeshibua mu munya wa Nzambi musangu umue tshiendelele ne bakalabula diha dia mu diulu, bakavuishibua babanyanganyi ba Nyuma Muimpe," 
Hebrews6:5 bakambula dî dimpe dia Nzambi ne makole a tshikondo tshilualua," 
Hebrews6:6 ne hashishe bakalekela malu â, kubahingasha tshiakabidi kudi dikudimuna dia mutshima kakuena mua kuenjibua tshiendelele, bualu bua badi badishihela kabidi Muana wa Nzambi ku mutshi mutshiamakane, ne badi bamufuisha bundu ku mesu kua bantu." 
Hebrews6:7 Bualu bua buloba buakamana kumina nvula wakaloka ha mutu habu misangu ya bungi ne budi bumenesha midioko idi ikuatshisha bantu badibo babudimina, budi buangata disanka kudi Nzambi;" 
Hebrews6:8 kadi bikala buloba bumenesha meba ne nyinyʼa tshisonga, budi buhidibua ne budi hehi ne mulau; kunshikidilu kuabu nkuhia." 
Hebrews6:9 Kadi, bananga betu, tudi tuitabushishibua malu mahite buimpe bua bualu buenu, malu adi alondangana ne luhandu, nasha tuetu tuamba nunku." 
Hebrews6:10 Bualu bua Nzambi kena uhanga buakane bua kuhueye muoyo wa mudimu wenu ne wa dinanga dinuakalesha bua dina diandi, hanuakakuatshila basanto mudimu ne hanutshidi nubakuatshishau." 
Hebrews6:11 Tudi basue muntu ne muntu wa munkatshi muenu aleshe disuminyina diodiumue bua kuheta tshiuwidi tshia ditekemena tô ne kunshikidilu; 
Hebrews6:12 bua kanulu bienu bahungidi, kadi nulue bidikishi ba badi bahiana milayi bua ditabusha ne lutulu." 
Hebrews6:13 Hakalaya Nzambi Abalahama mulayi wandi, hualu bua yeye kakadi ne mukuabo mumuhite bunene bua kuditshiheye kudiye, wakaditshiha mu dina diandi yeye," 
Hebrews6:14 wamba ne, Bulelela, hanasankisha, nenkusankishe wewe; hanavudisha, nenkuvudishe wewe." 
Hebrews6:15 Nunku, bualu bua yeye wakananukila kuikala ne lutulu, wakaheta mulayi." 
Hebrews6:16 Bua bantu badi baditshiha kudi udi mubahite bunene, ne mu matandu abo onso mutshihu wabo udi ujadika bualu tshiendelele." 
Hebrews6:17 Nunku, Nzambi, hakasueye kutamba kulesha bahianyi ha milayi disua diandi didi kadi mua kukudimuka, wakateka kuditshiha kuandi hankatshi habo;" 
Hebrews6:18 bua ku malu abidi adi kâi mua kukudimuka, adi Nzambi kai mumanye mua kushimamu, tuikale ne ditantamika dikole dia mutshima, tuetu mene bakanyema bua kulamata ditekemena diakatekabo ku mpala kuetu." 
Hebrews6:19 Nditekemena ditudi nʼadi bu luongo lua muoyo wetu, didi dikuata bikole, didi dishindama, didi dibuela tô ne munda mua muaba udi ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika," 
Hebrews6:20 kuakabuela Yesu bu mudianjidi bua bualu buetu, mumane kulua muakuidi mimene tshiendelele wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke." 
Hebrews7:1 Bualu bua Melekisedeke eu, mukelenge wa Salema, muakuidi wa Nzambi Mutambe Bunene wa mu diulu, wakasangakana ne Abalahama hakadiye uhingana ku kushiha kuandi kua bakelenge, ne wakamusankisha." 
Hebrews7:2 Kudiye kabidi, Abalahama wakabanyangana nʼandi tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionso (diambedi muikale mukudimuna dina ne, Mukelenge wa buakane; hashishe kabidi, udi biandi Mukelenge wa Salema, kuamba ne, Mukelenge wa ditalala;" 
Hebrews7:3 kai tatu, kai mamu, kai bankambua, kai tshibangidilu tshia matuku anyi nshikidilu wa muoyo, kadi muvuishibue bu Muana wa Nzambi) udi muikale muakuidi tshiendelele." 
Hebrews7:4 Nuelangane meshi bu muakadi bunene bua muntu eu, wakadi Abalahama, nkambua wetu, muhe tshia dikumi tshia mu bintu bitambe buimpe biakanyengeye mu nvita." 
Hebrews7:5 Ne bobo mene ba ku bana ba Lewi badi bangata mudimu wa muakuidi badi ne mukenshi wa kuangatabo bia dikumi kudi bantu bu mudi mikenshi nuambe, kudi bana babo mene, nasha bobo bine bafume ku tshimono tshia Abalahama;" 
Hebrews7:6 kadi yeye udi kai ne bankambua bandi babadibua kudi Bena Lewi, wakangata tshia dikumi tshia bintu kudi Abalahama, ne wakasankisha udi ne milayi." 
Hebrews7:7 Kadi kakuena mpata bua udi utamba bukese udi usankishibua kudi udi umutamba bunene. 
Hebrews7:8 Kunoko badi bafua badi bangata bia dikumi, kadi kuakua umue udi ubiangata udibo batuambila ne, Utshidi ne muoyo." 
Hebrews7:9 Ne, bua kuamba nunku, Lewi mene udi wangata bia dikumi, wakabifila mu difila dia Abalahama;" 
Hebrews7:10 bualu bua wakatshidi mu tshimono tshia tatu wandi, hakamusangana Melekisedeke." 
Hebrews7:11 Nunku, bu buakane bujalame buikaleku bua buakuidi bua Bena Lewi (bua munshi muabu bantu bakuangata mikenshi) munyi muakadibo kukengela bua muakuidi mukuabo abike wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke, ne kabadibu wa ku mulongo wa Alona?" 
Hebrews7:12 Bualu bua bakakudimuka buakuidi, buakadiku mbua kukudimuna mikenshi kabidi." 
Hebrews7:13 Bua yeye muena malu â adibo bamba, udi muena tshisamba tshikuabo, kuditshi kakuakadi muntu wakukuata mudimu wa ku tshioshelu." 
Hebrews7:14 Bualu budi bumanyishibua ne, Mukelenge wetu wakuledibua mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, tshisamba tshivua Mose kai muambile bua bakuidi." 
Hebrews7:15 Ne budi butamba kumanyishibua ne, Bikala munga muakuidi ubika mufuanangane ne Melekisedeke," 
Hebrews7:16 wakavuishabo muakuidi, kembua mikenshi ya bantu ba ha buloba, kadi bua bukole bua muoyo udi kawi ujimina;" 
Hebrews7:17 bualu bua badi bamba ne, Wewe udi muakuidi tshiendelele, Wa ku mulongo wa Melekisedeke." 
Hebrews7:18 Bualu bua diumusha dia mukenshi wa diambedi didiku bua butekete buau ne bua dihanga diau dia kutukuatshisha," 
Hebrews7:19 (bua mikenshi kayakavuisha tshintu tshimue tshiakane tshishiki), ne dibueshibua ha muaba wau dia ditekemena ditamba buimpe didiku, ditudi tusemena nʼadi ha buihi ne Nzambi." 
Hebrews7:20 Ne bualu bua buakuidi kabuenaku kabui ne kuditshiha," 
Hebrews7:21 bulelela, Bena Lewi bakavuishibua bakuidi kabai ne kuditshiha; kadi Yesu wakavuishibua muakuidi ne kuditshiha kudi Yeye udi wamba bua bualu buandi ne, Mukelenge wakaditshiha, ne kena ukudimuna dî diandi, ne, Wewe udi muakuidi tshiendelele;" 
Hebrews7:22 nunku bua malu â kabidi, Yesu wakulua tshieya tshia dihungila didi ditamba buimpe." 
Hebrews7:23 Ne bobo mene bakuvuishibua bakuidi ba bungi, bualu bua lufu ludi lubahumbisha bua kushalabo mu mudimu;" 
Hebrews7:24 kadi yeye, bualu bua udi ushala tshiendelele, udi ne buakuidi budi kabui bushintuluka." 
Hebrews7:25 Nunku yeye udi ne bukole bua kusungila ne luhandu lujima badi basemena ha buihi ne Nzambi bua bualu buandi, yeye muikale ne muoyo tshiendelele bualu bua kubakuila." 
Hebrews7:26 Bua muakuidi munene wa nunku wakadi mutukumbane, wa tshijila, kai ne bubi, kai mubiha, mutahuluke kudi bantu babi, muvuishibue ha mutu ha mulu;" 
Hebrews7:27 udi kai ne bualu, bu muakadi nʼabu bakuidi banene aba, bua kufila milambu ku dituku ne ku dituku, diambedi bua mibi yandi yeye, hashishe bua mibi ya bantu; bua yeye wakenza bualu ebu musangu umue tshiendelele hakadifileye." 
Hebrews7:28 Bua mikenshi idi iteka bantu mu buakuidi bunene, bobo bikale ne butekete; kadi dî dia kuditshiha, diakadi ku nyima kua mikenshi, didi diteka Muana, udi mufuishibue muakane mujalame tshiendelele." 
Hebrews8:1 Mu malu atudi tuamba ebu mbualu butamba bunene, Tudi ne muakuidi wa nunku wakashikama ku tshianza tshikole tshia nkuasa wa butumbi wa Mutambe Bunene wa mulu," 
Hebrews8:2 udi muena mudimu wa muaba mutambe tshijila ne wa tshitendelelu tshilelela tshiakashimikabo kudi Nzambi, katshiakashimikibua kudi muntu." 
Hebrews8:3 Bua muakuidi munene yonso udi musungudibue bua kufileye bintu bihebua ne milambu mishiha; nunku budi muakuidi munene eu nʼabu mbua kuikala ne bintu bia kufileye. 
Hebrews8:4 Nunku, bu yeye muikale ha buloba, yeye kakadi kuikala muakuidi, nasha wa mushindu wonso; bualu bua bakuabo badiku badi bafila milambu bu mudi mikenshi yamba;" 
Hebrews8:5 badi benza mudimu wabo mu bintu bidi tshidikishilu ne mundidimbi bia bintu bia mu diulu; bu muakadi Mose mudimushibue hakambeye kuasa tshitendelelu, Nzambi wakamuambila ne, Tangila bua wewe wenza bintu bionso bu mudi tshidikishilu tshinakukulesha mu mukuna." 
Hebrews8:6 Kadi mpindiu Kilisto wakuheta mudimu udi utamba butumbi, mûhete nunku bualu bua yeye udi mubatuanganyi wa tshihungidi tshidi tshitamba buimpe, tshiakahungabo ha milayi mitambe buimpe." 
Hebrews8:7 Bualu bua bu tshihungidi tshia kumudia tshikale tshijalame katshi ne bualu, kabakadi kukeba muaba wa kuhunga tshibidi." 
Hebrews8:8 Bualu bua Nzambi wakabadiula, udi wamba ne, Mukelenge udi wamba ne, Mona matuku adi alua Andi njadika tshihungidi tshihia-tshihia ne nsubu wa Isalele ne nsubu wa Yuda kabidi." 
Hebrews8:9 Katshiena bu tshihungidi tshinakahunga ne batatu babo Mu dituku dinakabakuata ku tshianza bua kuluhuka nʼabo mu buloba bua Ejipitu; Bualu bua kabakashala mu tshihungidi tshianyi, Ne tshiakabatshuka, Mukelenge udi wamba." 
Hebrews8:10 Bualu bua etshi ntshihungidi tshindualua kuhunga ne nsubu wa Isalele, Ku nyima kua matuku â, Mukelenge udi wamba, Nenteke mikenshi yanyi mu meshi abo, Nenyifunde kabidi ha mitshima yabo; Nengikale Nzambi wabo, Ne bobo nebikale bantu banyi." 
Hebrews8:11 Ne kabena bayîshangana muntu ne muntu ne mukuandi, Ne muntu ne muntu ne muanʼabo, bamba ne, Umanye biebe Mukelenge; Bua bonso nebanmanye, Kudi udi mutambe kuhuekela tô ne kudi udi mutambe bunene munkatshi muabo." 
Hebrews8:12 Bualu bua nengikale nʼabo luse mu malu mabi abo, Tshiena nvuluka mibi yabo kabidi." 
Hebrews8:13 Mu kuamba kuandi ne, Tshihia-tshihia, wakavuisha tshihungidi tshia kunfudilu ne, Ntshikulukulu. Kadi tshintu tshidi tshilua tshia hale ne tshidi tshikulukasha tshidi ha buihi ne kujimina." 
Hebrews9:1 Tshihungidi tshia kumudilu mene tshiakadi ne mikenshi ya kulonda mu kutendelela kuabo ne tshitendelelu tshiatshi, tshiakadi tshitendelela tshia ha buloba ebu." 
Hebrews9:2 Bua tshitendelelu tshiakadi tshilongolola; mu muaba watshi wa kumudilu muakadi tshitekelu tshia muinda ne mesa ne mitanda ya mampa yakatekabohu; muaba udibo babikila ne, Wa Tshijila." 
Hebrews9:3 Ne ku nyima kua tshilulu tshikudika tshibidi kuakadi muaba wa mu tshitendelelu udibo babikila ne, Muaba mutambe tshijila;" 
Hebrews9:4 wakadi ne tshioshelu tshia mananashi tshia ngolo, ne mushete wa tshihungidi mulamika ne ngolo ku nseke yonso; munda muau muakadi tshifuadi tshia ngolo tshitekelamu mana, ne mulangala wa Alona wakela ntonga, ne mabue akadi ne mei a tshihungidi mafundahu;" 
Hebrews9:5 ne ha mutu hau bakeluba ba butumbi bavuisha dileshi ha mutu ha muaba wa kubuikidila mibi; bua bintu ebi kakuena bualu bua kuamba katataka mudi tshintu ne tshintu. 
Hebrews9:6 Hakadi bintu ebi bilongolola nunku, bakuidi badi babuela misangu yonso mu muaba wa kumudilu, benza mudimu wabo;" 
Hebrews9:7 kadi muakuidi munene udi ubuela mu muaba muibidi, yeye nkayandi, musangu umue ku tshidimu ku tshidimu; kena ubuela kai ne mashi adiye ufila bua bualu buandi ne bua matuhakana a bantu." 
Hebrews9:8 Nyuma Muimpe udi ulesha bualu ebu hatoke ne, Nshila wa ku muaba mutambe wa tshijila kena muanze kuleshibua hatshidi tshitendelelu tshia kumudilu ne mudimu." 
Hebrews9:9 Etshi ntshifuanyikishi tshia ku tshikondo etshi, tshidibo balonda hafilabo bintu bihebua ne milambu mishiha bidi kabi bimanye mua kuyuisha mutendeledi muakane mujalame, mu malu a muoyo-mukese;" 
Hebrews9:10 bualu bua bidi anu mikenshi ya ba ha buloba, mu malu a bia kudia ne bia kunua ne bia kuvua kua mishindu ne mishindu, yakatekabo tô ne ku tshikondo tshia kubilongolola." 
Hebrews9:11 Kadi Kilisto, mumane kulua muakuidi munene wa mu bintu bimpe bilualua, bualu bua tshitendelelu tshitamba bunene ne buakane, katshî tshiasa ne bianza, tshidi bu kuamba ne, Katshiena tshia bifukibua ebi," 
Hebrews9:12 kembua mashi a mbushi ne a bana ba ngombe, kadi bua mashi andi mene, wakabuela mu muaba mutambe tshijila musangu umue tshiendelele, mumane kuangatshila bantu dihikula dia tshiendelele." 
Hebrews9:13 Bua bikala mashi a mbushi ne a balume ba ngombe, ne butue bua muana wa ngombe mukashi bumiamina ha bantu bakunyanguka, bibajidile tô ne ku dilengesha dia mubidi wa ha buloba," 
Hebrews9:14 mashi a Kilisto, wakadifila kudi Nzambi kai ne ditoba, bua Nyuma wa Tshiendelele, neatambe misangu bungi munyi kulengesha muoyomukese webe ku midimu mifue bua kukuatshila Nzambi udi ne muoyo mudimu?" 
Hebrews9:15 Bua bualu ebu yeye udi mutuanganyi wa tshihungidi tshihia-tshihia, bua lufu lumane kulua bua dihikula diabo dia ku malu masambuka mikenshi adi munshi mua tshihungidi tshia kumudilu, babo bakubutidibua badi mua kuangata mulabi wa buhianyi bua tshiendelele." 
Hebrews9:16 Bua hikalaku tshihungidi, budibo nʼabu mbua kulesha lufu lua mutshihungi." 
Hebrews9:17 Bualu bua tshihungidi tshidi ne bukole bikalaku lufu lua muenʼatshi; katshiena ne bukole mu matuku atshidi mutshihungi ne muoyo. 
Hebrews9:18 Nunku, tshihungidi tshia kumudia ka tshiakujadikibua katshî ne mashi." 
Hebrews9:19 Bualu bua hakambilabo bantu bonso mukenshi wonso kudi Mose, bu mudi mikenshi yamba, wakangata mashi a bana ba ngombe ne a mbushi bohamue ne mai ne miosa mikunze ne hisopa, ne wakamiamina mukanda muine, ne bantu bonso," 
Hebrews9:20 wamba ne, Au adi mashi a tshihungidi tshiakanuelela Nzambi mukenshi bualu buatshi." 
Hebrews9:21 Wakamiamina tshitendelelu kabidi ne mashi muomumue, ne bintu bionso biakakuatabo nʼabi mudimu wa kutendelela." 
Hebrews9:22 Ndi mua kuamba ne, Bintu bionso bidi bilengeshibua ne mashi, bu mudi mikenshi yamba, anu bikese bishala, ne bikalaku kakui kumatshisha kua mashi hanshi, kakuena kubuikidila kua mibi nasha." 
Hebrews9:23 Nunku, buakadibo nʼabo mbua kulengesha bifuanyikishi bia bintu bia mu diulu ne bintu abi binakutela; kadi bintu mene bia mu diulu biakalengeshibua ne milambu mihite ei buimpe." 
Hebrews9:24 Bualu bua Kilisto kakabuela mu muaba wa tshijila muasa ne bianza, mufuanangane ne muaba mulelela; kadi wakabuela mu diulu muine, bua kumuenekeye mpindiu ku mpala kua Nzambi bua bualu buetu;" 
Hebrews9:25 ne kena ne bualu bua kudifila ku musangu ne ku musangu, bu mudi muakuidi munene ubuela mu muaba mutambe tshijila ku tshidimu ku tshidimu ne mashi adi kâi andi;" 
Hebrews9:26 anyi buakadiye nʼabu mbua kukenga ku musangu ne ku musangu katshia buloba buajadikibua; kadi katataka musangu umue kunshikidilu kua bikondo, wakumueneshibua bua kujimisheye bubi ku kudifila kuandi bu mulambu." 
Hebrews9:27 Bualu bua budi busunguila bantu bua kufuabo musangu umue, ne ku nyima kua hualu ebu kulumbulula kudiku;" 
Hebrews9:28 nunku, Kilisto kabidi, hakafidibueye musangu umue hua kutualeye mibi ya bantu ba bungi, neamueneke musangu muibidi mutahuluke ku bubi, kudi bantu badi bamuindila tô ne ku luhandu luabo." 
Hebrews10:1 Bualu bua mikenshi ya Mose mikale ne mindidimbi ya bintu bimpe bilualua, kayi mikale tshifuanyikishi mene tshia bintu ebi, tshiendelele kayena mua kuvuisha badi basemena ba buibi ne Nzambi bakane tshishiki ne milambu ya muomumue ya ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, idibo bafila misangu yonso." 
Hebrews10:2 Bu milambu ai mibavuishe bakane tshishiki, kabakadi kulekela kuifila, anyi? Bualu bua batendeledi balengeshibue musangu umue kabakadi ne dimuma dia mibi kabidi." 
Hebrews10:3 Kadi mu milambu yaya mudi tshivulukidi tshia mibi ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. 
Hebrews10:4 Bua mashi a ngombe ne a mbushi kêna mua kumusha mibi. 
Hebrews10:5 Nunku, halueye ba buloba, Kilisto udi wamba ne, Kuakasua nyama mishiha ne bintu bifila, Kadi wakalongoluela mubidi," 
Hebrews10:6 Kuakusanka mu milambu ya kuosha mijima ne ya kubuikidila nʼal bubi; 
Hebrews10:7 Hashishe nakamba ne, Mana, na kulua, (Mu makanda muvunga udi ufundibua bua bualu buanyi), Bua kuenza disua diebe, Nzambi." 
Hebrews10:8 Hambeye ku mutu aku ne, Kuakasua nyama mishiha ne bintu bifila ne milambu ya kuosha mijima, anyi ya kubuikidila nʼai bubi, ne kuakasankamu (bintu ebi bidi bifidibua bu mudi mikenshi yamba)," 
Hebrews10:9 hashishe yeye wakuamba ne, Nakulua bua kuenza bu mu disua diebe. Udi umusha bualu bua kumudilu bua kujadika buibidi." 
Hebrews10:10 Mu disua edi tuetu tuakujidikibua bualu bua kufila kua mubidi wa Yesu Kilisto musangu umue tshiendelele. 
Hebrews10:11 Muakuidi yonso udi wimana bulelela ku dituku ku dituku wenza mudimu wandi ne ufila ku musangu ku musangu milambu ya muomumue, yoyo mene idi kayi mua kumusha mibi tshiendelele;" 
Hebrews10:12 kadi yeye hakafueye mulambu umue bua mibi tshiendelele, wakashikama ku tshianza tshikole tshia Nzambi;" 
Hebrews10:13 ku musangu eu windila tô ne haluabo kuvuisha badi nʼandi lukuna ditanda dia munshi mua makasa andi. 
Hebrews10:14 Bualu bua ku mulambu umue yeye wakuvuisha bantu badi bajidibua bakane tshishiki tshiendelele. 
Hebrews10:15 Nyuma Muimpe udi utumanyisha bualu ebu kabidi, bua hakamaneye kuamha ne," 
Hebrews10:16 Etshi ntshihungidi tshinahunga nʼabo; Ku nyima kua matuku â, Mukelenge udi wamba, Nenteke mikenshi yanyi mu mitshima yabo, Nenyifunde ha meshi abo kabidi, hashishe udi wamba ne," 
Hebrews10:17 Tshiena nvuluka kabidi mibi yabo ne malu mabi abo. 
Hebrews10:18 Kadi bikalaku kumusha kua mibi, kakuena kabidi kufila kua milambu bua bubi." 
Hebrews10:19 Nunku, bana betu, bualu bua tudi ne dikima dia kubuela mu muaba wa tshijila bua mashi a Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 mu nshila wakatujidileye, nshila muhia-muhia ne wa muoyo, kuhita tshilulu tshikudika, kutshiamba ne, Mubidi wandi;" 
Hebrews10:21 ne bualu bua tudi ne muakuidi mutambe ku mutu kua nsubu wa Nzambi; 
Hebrews10:22 tusemene bietu ha buihi nʼandi ne mutshima mulelela mu dimanya dijalame dia ditabusha, ne mitshima yetu mimiamina bua kulengesha kua muoyo-mukese mubi, ne mibidi yetu miuvue ne mai mimpe." 
Hebrews10:23 Tulamate dijukula dia ditekemena dietu bua kaditshimbakanyi, bualu bua wakatuha mulayi udi wa kueyemenyibua." 
Hebrews10:24 Tudielelangane meshi muntu ne muntu bua kuenzeshangana ku dinanga ne ku dienza dia bienzedi bimpe," 
Hebrews10:25 katui tulekela bietu disangisha dietu bamue, bu mudi tshilele tshia bakuabo, kadi tukoleshangana mitshima, tutamba kuenza nunku bualu bua nudi numona dituku dia Mukelenge disemena ha buihi." 
Hebrews10:26 Bua bituenza malu mabi bua disungula dia mutshima hatuakamana kuangata dimanya dia bushua, kakuena kushala kabidi munga mulambu bua kubuikidila nʼau mibi," 
Hebrews10:27 kadi kudi kushala kuindila kukuabo kua dilumbulula kudi kukuatshisha buowa, ne kahia kakole nekoshe bahitshi bandi." 
Hebrews10:28 Muntu wakuhetula mikenshi ya Mose udi ufua, kai mufuidibue luse, ku dî dia bamanyi babidi anyi basatu;" 
Hebrews10:29 nudi nuela meshi ne muntu neabadibue muakanyine dikenga ditambe misangu bungi munyi, nyeye wakudiata Muana wa Nzambi munshi mua makasa andi, ne wakubala mashi a tshihungidi akadiye ujidibua nʼau bu tshintu tshia tshianana ne wakuhenda Nyuma wa ngasa?" 
Hebrews10:30 Bua tudi bamumanye yeye wakamba ne, Kusombuela mbualu buanyi, nempingishile bantu difutu diabo, wakamba kabidi ne, Mukelenge nealumbuluishe bantu bandi." 
Hebrews10:31 Mbualu bua buowa bua kuhona mu bianza bia Nzambi udi ne muoyo. 
Hebrews10:32 Kadi nuvuluke matuku a diambedi munkatshi muau munuakatantamana mu diluangana dikole dia mu makenga, hanuakamana kutokeshibua mu munya;" 
Hebrews10:33 tshituha tshia makenga mbualu bua nuakavuishibua bu tshintu tshia kutangilatangilabo bua bihendu ne makenga; ne tshituha tshikuabo bualu bua nuakalua babanyanganyi ne bantu bakadi benjibua nunku. 
Hebrews10:34 Bualu bua nuakafuila bakadi mu lukanu luse, ne nuakitabusha ne disanka dihaula dia bintu bienu, bualu bua nudi bamanye ne, Tudi ne tshintu tshitamba buimpe ne tshidi tshishala tshiendelele." 
Hebrews10:35 Nunku, kanuimashi dikima dienu, didi dinuhingishila difutu dinene." 
Hebrews10:36 Bualu bua nudi ne bualu bua kuikala ne didikankamika bua, hanuenza bu mu disua dia Nzambi, nudi mua kuangata mulayi." 
Hebrews10:37 Bualu bua haleba musangu muihi. Yeye udi ulua nealue, kena unenga." 
Hebrews10:38 Kadi muakane wanyi neikale ne muoyo bua ditabusha; Ne blalukeye tshia nyima, muoyo wanyi kawena usanka mu bualu buandi." 
Hebrews10:39 Kadi tuetu katuena ba munkatshi mua badi baluka tshia nyima tô ne ku dibutuka, kadi tudi munkatshi mua badi ne ditabusha tô ne ku diheta dia muoyo." 
Hebrews11:1 Ditabusha didi dimanya dia malu atudi tutekemena ne didi dijadika dia malu atudi katui bamone. 
Hebrews11:2 Bua muanda wadi bakulu bakadi ne bualu buabo buambibua. 
Hebrews11:3 Bua ditabusha tudi tujingulula ne buloba buakalongolodibua ku dî dia Nzambi, bua nunku bitudi tumona ku mesu kabiakufukibua ku bintu bidi bimueneka ku mesu." 
Hebrews11:4 Bua ditabusha Ebele wakafila kudi Nzambi mulambu muhite wa Kana buimpe, bua bualu buau yeye wakadi ne bualu buandi buambibua ne, Yeye wakadi muakane, Nzambi wamba bua kuha kuandi, ne bua bualu buaku yeye mufue utshidi wakula." 
Hebrews11:5 Bua ditabusha Hanoka wakumushibua ha buloba, wakatekibua ma diulu bua yeye katangidi lufu, ne kabakamusangana bualu bua Nzambi wakamuteka ma diulu; bualu bua ku mpala kua diumushibua diandi wakadi ne bualu buandi buambibua ne, Yeye wakasankisha Nzambi." 
Hebrews11:6 Ne bikalaku kakui ditabusha, muntu kena mua kumusankisha; bualu bua muntu udi ulua kudi Nzambi budiye nʼabu mbua kuitabusha ne, Yeye udiku, ne udi mufutshi wa badi bamukeba." 
Hebrews11:7 Bua ditabusha Noa, hakadiye mudimushibue bua malu akadi kâi manze kumuenebua, muenzeshibue ku dishina dia Nzambi, wakalongolola bualu bua kusungila nʼabu ba mu nsubu muandi; bua bualu ebu wakahisha ba ha buloba, wakalua muhianyi wa buakane budi bua ku ditabusha." 
Hebrews11:8 Bua ditabusha Abalahama, hakabikidibueye wakatumikila bua kuyeye ku muaba wakadiye wamba kuangata bu buhianyi; wakaluhuka, kai mumanye kuakadiye uya." 
Hebrews11:9 Bua ditabusha wakashikama mu buloba bua mulayi; bu adi ma buloba bua bende, wakashikama biandi mu nsubu wa bilulu, ne Isaka ne Yakoba, bahianyi nʼandi ba mulayi muomumue;" 
Hebrews11:10 bualu bua wakatekemena musoko udi ne bishimikidi, mulongolodi wau ne muibaki wau nNzambi." 
Hebrews11:11 Bua ditabusha Sala muine kabidi wakangata bukole bua kuimiteye difu bidimu bia lulelu bimane kuhita, bualu bua wakabala wakamulaya dî edi ne, Udi wa kueyemenyibua." 
Hebrews11:12 Nunku kabidi, kudi muntu umue, ne yeye bu mufile mene, bana bakaledibua bu mitoto ya mu diulu mu bungi buabo, ne bu nsenga ya ku muelelu wa mai manene idibo kabai bamanye mua kubala." 
Hebrews11:13 Bantu aba bonso bakafua mu ditabusha kabai banze kuangata biakabalayabo, kadi bamane kubitangila ne kubinemekela ha bule, ne bamane kuitabusha ne, Tudi benyi ne bena luendu ha buloba ebu." 
Hebrews11:14 Bua badi bamba malu a nunku badi balesha ne badi bakeba muaba udi wabo mene. 
Hebrews11:15 Bu bobo bele meshi bua muaba wakumukabo, bakadi kuikala ne tshikondo tshia kuhinganaku," 
Hebrews11:16 kadi katataka badi bajinga muaba mutambe buimpe, udi muaba mene wa mu diulu; nunku Nzambi kena ufua bundu bua bualu buabo bua kumubikilabo Nzambi wabo, bualu bua wakabalongoluela musoko." 
Hebrews11:17 Bua ditabusha Abalahama, hakamutetabo, wakafila Isaka bu mulambu; yeye wakamana kuitabusha milayi ne disanka, wakadi ufila muanʼandi umuehele mulela;" 
Hebrews11:18 nyeye wakambibua bualu buandi ne, Nebabikile tunkanunuina tuebe mu Isaka;" 
Hebrews11:19 wakamanya ne, Nzambi udi ne bukole bua kumubisha munkatshi mua bafue mene, kuakamuangateye kabidi mu tshifuanyikishi." 
Hebrews11:20 Bua ditabusha Isaka wakasankisha Yakoba ne Esau bua malu adi kâi manze kulua. 
Hebrews11:21 Bua ditabusha Yakoba, hakadiye wamba kufua, wakasankisha muana ne muana ba Yosefe ne wakatendelela mueyemene ha dikombo diandi." 
Hebrews11:22 Bua ditabusha Yosefe, hakalua lufu luandi ha buihi, wakamba bua dihatuka dia bana ba Isalele, wakela mukenshi kabidi bua bualu bua mifuba yandi." 
Hebrews11:23 Bua ditabusha Mose, hakaledibueye, wakasokikibua kudi baledi bandi ngondo isatu, bualu bua bakamutangila muana mulengele ne kabakatshina mukenshi wa mukelenge." 
Hebrews11:24 Bua ditabusha Mose, hakakoleye, wakahidia kubikidibua muana wa muana mukashi wa Palô;" 
Hebrews11:25 musungula kukengeshibua hamue ne bantu ba Nzambi ku mpala kua masanka a malu mabi a tshituha tshihi; 
Hebrews11:26 ubala bihendu bidi bua Kilisto bu bubanshi bunene buhita bibutshidibue bia mu Ejipitu, bualu bua wakatangila tô ne ku dihingishila dia difutu." 
Hebrews11:27 Bua ditabusha wakumuka mu Ejipitu kai utshina tshishi tshia mukelenge; bua yeye wakatantamana bu muakadiye utangila yeye udi kai umueneka ku mesu. 
Hebrews11:28 Bua ditabusha yeye wakuenza kuhita kua Yehowa, ne kumiamina kua mashi, bua mushihi wa banʼa bute kabalengi." 
Hebrews11:29 Bua ditabusha bakahita mu Mai Manene Makunze bu mudi ha buloba bume; hakateta Bena Ejipitu kuenza nunku, bakaminyibua mu mai." 
Hebrews11:30 Bua ditabusha ngumbu ya Yeleko yakashimbuka hakamanabo kuinyunguluka matuku muanda mutekete. 
Hebrews11:31 Bua ditabusha Lahaba, mukashi wa masandi, kakashihibua ne bakadi ne buhidia, bualu bua wakabuesha batentekedi mu nsubu ne ditalala." 
Hebrews11:32 Nengambe tshinyi kabidi? Bua musangu neunkebe ha kulonda bua Gideona, Balaka, Shimishona, Yefeta, Davidi, ne Samuele ne bua baprofete." 
Hebrews11:33 Bua ditabusha diabo bobo bakatekesha makelenge, bakenza malu makane, bakaheta milayi, bakabuikila mukana mua nyama ya ntambue;" 
Hebrews11:34 bakajima bakole bua kahia, bakahanduka ku ditua dia muele wa nvita, mu butekete bakandamuka bakole, bakalua bakole mu nvita, bakihata bisumbu bia bena nvita ha bende." 
Hebrews11:35 Bakashi bakangata hafue babo ku dibisha dia ku lufu; bakuabo bakashihibua ne mikumu, kabai bitabusha luhandu; bua bamanye mua kuangata dibisha dia ku lufu didi ditamba buimpe." 
Hebrews11:36 Bakuabo bakangata diteta dia tuseku ne mikumu, ne dia nkanu ne nsubu ya nkanu ha mutu." 
Hebrews11:37 Bakakumibua mabue, bakakoshibua hankatshi ne nsele, bakateyibua, bakashihibua ne muele wa nvita, bakendakana baluate biseba bia mikoko ne biseba bia mbushi, bakengela bintu, bakengeshibua, benjibue bibi," 
Hebrews11:38 (bakadi ba ha buloba kabai babakanyine) bendakana mu bihela ne mu mikuna ne mu nyongola ne mu mena a mu buloba. 
Hebrews11:39 Ne bantu aba bonso, bamane kuikala ne bualu buabo buambibua bua ditabusha diabo, kabakangata mulayi;" 
Hebrews11:40 Nzambi wakalongolola tshintu tshitamba buimpe bua bualu buetu, bua bobo kabavuishibu bakane tshishiki kabai nʼetu." 
Hebrews12:1 Nunku, tuetu kabidi, bualu bua tudi tunyungulukibua ne tshisumbu tshinene nunku tshia bamanyi, tumushai bujitu buonso, ne malu mabi adi bualu butekete bua kutulenduisha, tuidikishe ne kutantamana tshidikishilu tshietu tshia lubilu tshidi tshitekibua ku mpala kuetu," 
Hebrews12:2 batangila kudi Yesu, mubandi ne mushikishi wa ditabusha dietu, yeye, bua disanka diakatekibua ku mpala kuandi, wakakankamana hakakengeye ka mutshi mutshiamakane, wakalengulula bundu, ne wakushikama ku tshianza tshikole tshia nkuasa wa butumbi wa Nzambi." 
Hebrews12:3 Bua nuelangane meshi bua yeye wakukankamana mu ditontolola dia nunku dia bantu babi diakamutontololabo nʼadi, bua nuenu kanuhungidi, hikala batekete mu mitshima yenu." 
Hebrews12:4 Nuenu kanuena banze kudimanyika mu nvita tô ne hahatuka mashi hanudi nuluangana ne malu mabi," 
Hebrews12:5 ne nuakuhua muoyo bua disengelela, didi diyikilangana nʼenu bu bana balume ne, Muanʼanyi, kumonyi dikengesha dia Mukelenge bu bualu butekete, Ne kuikadi ne mutshima mutekete hakubeleye;" 
Hebrews12:6 Bualu bua Mukelenge udi ukengesha udiye munange, Udi ututa muana mulume yonso udiye witabusha." 
Hebrews12:7 Nudi nudikankamika bua dikenga, Nzambi udi unuenzela bu bana bandi balela; bua muana kai udiku udi tatu wandi kai ukengesha?" 
Hebrews12:8 Binuikala kanui ne dikenga, didi bonso bavuishibue badiangatshi, nunku nudi bana ba masandi, kanuena bana balela." 
Hebrews12:9 Buala bukuabo kabidi, tuakadi ne batatu ba mibidi yetu bua kutukengesha, ne tuakabanemeka; nunku katuena mua kutamba kukokela Tatu wa nyuma yetu, kuikala ne muoyo, anyi?" 
Hebrews12:10 Bulelela, bobo bakatukengesha matuku makese, bu muakuelabo meshi ne, Mbimpe; kadi yeye wakatukengesha bua kutukuatshisha, hua tuetu tuikale bangatshi ba tshijila tshiandi." 
Hebrews12:11 Makenga onso, hatshidiuku, kêna amueneka kutudi bu disanka, kadi adi anu bu kanyinganyinga; kadi ku nyima adi akuamisha bantu badi benzeshibua kudiu mamuma a ditalala, mamuma a buakane mene." 
Hebrews12:12 Nunku, nukoleshe bianza biakateketa ne binu bidi ne kaneke;" 
Hebrews12:13 nulongoluele makasa enu nshila milulame, bua mulema kakueyiboki, kadi asangale biandi." 
Hebrews12:14 Nukebe kuheta ditalala ne bantu bonso, ne kujidibua kudi muntu kai nʼaku kena mumanye mua kutangila Mukelenge." 
Hebrews12:15 Nutangile bimpe bua muntu kikadiku udi uhanga ngasa wa Nzambi, ne bua muji wa bululu mutoloka kaunutatshishi, ne bua bualu buau bantu ba bungi neboneke;" 
Hebrews12:16 ne bua kakuikadi muena masandi anyi muena tshikama bu Esau, wakahana bintu bia buanʼa bute ku katuha ka bia kudia." 
Hebrews12:17 Bua nudi bamanye ne ku nyima hakasueye kuhiana disanka, bakamuhidia; bua kakasangana kaba ka kukudimuna nʼaku mutshima wa tatu wandi, nasha yeye munanukile kukukeba ne binsonshi ku mesu." 
Hebrews12:18 Bua kanuakulua ku mukana udibo bamanye mua kulenga tshianza, wakatema kahia, anyi ku bufike ne ku midima ne ku tshihehele tshikole," 
Hebrews12:19 ne ku dî dia mpungi ne ku tshiona tshia mei makole. Hakunvua bantu mei â, bakasengelela bua kabambidi dî dikuabo." 
Hebrews12:20 Bualu bua bobo kabakadi batuala mukenshi wakabelelabo ne, Biadiata nyama mene mukuna, nebamushihe ne mabue;" 
Hebrews12:21 bumueneki ebu buakatamba kuikala ne buowa tô ne bakamba Mose ne, Ndi ntamba kutshina ne kuzakala." 
Hebrews12:22 Kadi nuenu nuakulua ku mukuna wa Siona ne ku musoko wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo, Yelushalema wa mu diulu, ne ku misumba ya banjelo idi kayi mua kubadibua," 
Hebrews12:23 ne ku disangisha dinene ne ekelesia bia banʼa bute badi ne mena abo mafunda mu diulu, ne kudi Nzambi, Mulumbuludi wa bonso, ne ku nyuma ya bantu bakane bakvuishabo bakane tshishiki," 
Hebrews12:24 ne kudi Yesu, mutuanganyi wa tshihungidi tshihia-tshihia, ne ku mashi adibo bamiamina adi atamba mashi a Ebele kuakula bimpe." 
Hebrews12:25 Nudimuke bua nuenu kanubidi udi wakula nʼenu. Bikalabo kabai bahanduke, hakahidiabo wakabadimusha ha buloba, kudi kutamba kumueneka ne tuetu katuena tuhanduka, badi bumuka kudi udi utudimusha mu diulu." 
Hebrews12:26 Dî diandi diakazakasha buloba tshikondo atshi, kadi katataka wakutulaya wamba ne, Musangu umue mukuabo kabidi meme nenzakashe, kembuloba nkayabu, kadi diulu kabidi." 
Hebrews12:27 Dî edi, Musangu umue mukuabo, didi ditulesha diumusha dia bintu bidi bizakashibua bu bintu bienjibua, bua bintu bidi kabi bizakashibua bishale." 
Hebrews12:28 Nunku, bualu bua tuetu tudi tuangata bukelenge budi kabui bumanye mua kuzakashibua, tuikale bietu ne disakidila, ditudi bamanye mua kukuatshila Nzambi udi unsankisha mudimu ne kunemekela ne ditshina;" 
Hebrews12:29 bualu bua Nzambi wetu udi kahia kadi kashidisha. 
Hebrews13:1 Dinangangana dia bana babo ba ma Kilisto dikaleku. 
Hebrews13:2 Kanuhu muoyo bua kulesha benyi luse, bua bualu ebu bakuabo bakasangila banjelo, kabai babamanye." 
Hebrews13:3 Nuvuluke badi mu nkanu, bu munudi basuika nʼabo; nuvuluke badibo benzela bibi, bua nuenu nutshidi mu mibidi." 
Hebrews13:4 Dibaka dikale dinemekibua munkatshi mua bantu bonso, bulalu kabunyanguki; Nzambi nealumbuluishe bena masandi bajike ne bena masandi babake." 
Hebrews13:5 Mioyo yenu kaikadi ne lukuka lua biuma, nuikale ne disanka ne bintu binudi nʼabi, bualu bua Nzambi muine wakuamba ne, Tshiena nkulekela, nasha kakese, tshiena nkushîa tshianana." 
Hebrews13:6 Nunku, tudi tuamba ne dikima ne, Mukelenge udi mukuatshishi wanyi; tshiena ntshina; Muntu neangenzele tshinyi?" 
Hebrews13:7 Nuvuluke bantu bakanukokesha, bakanuambila dî dia Nzambi; nuela meshi a nshikidilu wa tshikadilu tshimpe tshia mioyo yabo, nuidikishe ditabusha diabo." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kilisto udi muomumue makelela ne lelu ne tshiendelele. 
Hebrews13:9 Kanusesuishibu ku mayisha a bungi ne a bende; budi buimpe bua mutshima ujadikibue ku ngasa, kenku bia kudia biakadi kabi bikuatshisha bakadi benda nʼabi." 
Hebrews13:10 Tudi ne tshioshelu, tshidi badi bakuata mudimu mu tshitendelelu kabai bamanye mua kudiaku." 
Hebrews13:11 Bualu bua mibidi ya nyama, miena mashi adi muakuidi mimene ulua nʼau mu muaba wa tshijila bu mulambu wa kubuikidila nʼau mibi ya bantu idi yoshibua ku butshika kua tshitudilu." 
Hebrews13:12 Nunku, Yesu kabidi, bua kujidileye bantu ne mashi andi, wakakenga ha bule ha tshibi tshia musoko." 
Hebrews13:13 Nunku, tuye bietu kudiye kukala kua tshitudilu, batuala bihendu bia bualu buandi." 
Hebrews13:14 Bua katuena ne musoko kunoku udi wikalaku tshiendelele, kadi tudi tukeba musoko ulualua." 
Hebrews13:15 Nunku bua bualu buandi, tufilafile kudi Nzambi mulambu wa kumutumbisha nʼau, udi biau mamuma a mishiku idi ijukula ditabusha dia dina diandi." 
Hebrews13:16 Kadi kanuhu muoyo bua kuenzelangana bimpe ne bua kukuatshishangana; bua Nzambi udi usanka ne milambu ya nunku. 
Hebrews13:17 Nutumikile badi banukokesha, nubakokele; bua bobo badi bikale ne tshitabala bua mioyo yenu, bu bantu balua kubadila Nzambi bintu; bua bobo benze bualu ebu ne disanka, kabai ne manunganyi, bua bualu ebu kabuena bamukuatshisha." 
Hebrews13:18 Nutulombele Nzambi; bua tudi tuitabushishibua ne tudi ne mioyomikese mimpe, tudi basue kuenda bimpe mu malu onso." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndi nusengelela bua nuenu kutamba kuenza bualu ebu, bua meme mpingishibue kunudi lubilu." 
Hebrews13:20 Nzambi wa ditalala wakabisha mulami munene wa mikoko munkatshi mua bafue kabidi ku mashi a dihungila dia tshiendelele, Mukelenge wetu Yesu mene," 
Hebrews13:21 anuvuishe bakane tshishiki mu bualu buimpe buonso bua kuenza bu mu disua diandi, wenza munda muetu bualu budi buimpe ku mesu kuandi bita Yesu Kilisto; butumbi buikale kudiye ku bikondo ne ku bikondo. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Bana betu, ndi nusengelela bua kunvua dî edi dia disengelela ne lutulu; bualu bua nakunufundila mei makese." 
Hebrews13:23 Numanye bienu ne muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto Timote wakulekedibua mu lukanu; ne bialueye lubilu, nendue nʼandi kunumona." 
Hebrews13:24 Nuele bonso badi banukokesha muoyo, ne basanto bonso kabidi. Ba mu Italia badi banutumina muoyo." 
Hebrews13:25 Ngasa ikale ne buonso buenu. Amen. 
James1:1 Yakobo, muhika wa Nzambi ne wa Mukelenge Yesu Kilisto, kudi ba bisamba dikumi ne bibidi badi bena tshimuangi, ndi nuela muoyo." 
James1:2 Bana betu, nububale bu disanka dionso hanuahona mu mateta a mishindu ya bungi;" 
James1:3 bualu bua nudi bamanye ne diteta dia ditabusha dienu didi dienzesha ditantamana. 
James1:4 Ditantamana dikale ne mudimu wadi muimpe tshishiki, bua nuenu nuikale bakane tshishiki, bakumbane mu malu onso, kanui nuhanga mu bualu bumue." 
James1:5 Kadi biahanga mukuabo wenu meshi, âlombe kudi Nzambi udi uha bonso ne mutshima mutoke kai ubatobolola; neamuhebue." 
James1:6 Kadi alombe biandi ne ditabusha, kai ne mpata; bualu bua udi wela mpata udi ufuana divuala dia mai manene diendeshibua kudi luhehele ne diedibua mulu." 
James1:7 Bua muntu au kedi meshi ne, Nengangate tshintu kudi Mukelenge;" 
James1:8 mmuntu wa mitshima Ibidi udi utatakana mu nshila yandi yonso. 
James1:9 Muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto udi muhuekele atumbile mu dibandishibua diandi; 
James1:10 ne mubanshi atumbile mu dihuekeshihua diandi; bualu bua yeye neajimine bu tshilongo tshia mu tshisuku. 
James1:11 Bualu bua diba didi dibanda hohamue ne luhehele lua luiya lukole ne bidi bifubisha bisosa; ne tshilongo tshiabi tshidi tshimata hanshi ne bulengele bua mu mpala muatshi budi bujimina; muomumue kabidi, muntu mubanshi neajimisbibue mu nshila yandi." 
James1:12 Muntu udi utantamana mu mateyi udi ne disanka; bualu bua hakamanabo kumujadika, neangate tshifulu tshia butumbi tshia muoyo tshiakalaya Mukelenge badi bamunanga." 
James1:13 Muntu kambi biandi bamuteyabo ne, Ndi muteyibue kudi Nzambi; bualu bua Nzambi kena mumanye mua kuteyibua ne malu mabi, ne yeye muine kena uteya muntu;" 
James1:14 kudi muntu yonso udi uteyibua kudi lukuka luandi bamukokalu ne hamulobeshalu. 
James1:15 Hashishe lukuka, himitalu, ludi lulela bubi: ne bubi, hakolabu budi bulela lufu." 
James1:16 Bana betu bananga, kanudingibu." 
James1:17 Kuha kuonso kuimpe ne diha dionso diakane tshishiki bidi bifuma mu diulu, bahueka hanshi bilua kudi Tatu wa munya, kudi kakui ne dikudimuka anyi mundidimbi wa tshintu tshidi tshinyunguluka." 
James1:18 Bua mu disua diandi yeye wakatufuka ne dî dia bulelela, bua tuetu tuikale mamuma makuabo a kumudilu a bifukibua biandi." 
James1:19 Bana betu bananga, mimanye bienu bualu ebu. Muntu yonso unvue biandi lubilu, atukishe kai muanze kuakula, kakuatshi tshishi lubilu;" 
James1:20 bualu bua tshishi tshia muntu katshiena tshienza malu makane a Nzambi. 
James1:21 Nunku umushai bukoya buonso ne divulangana dia malu mabi, nuitabushe dî ne kalolo didi dikunyibua munda muenu, didi dimanye mua kusungila mioyo yenu."
