James1:22 Kadi nuikale benji ba di, kanuikadi anu bunvui badi, bua nunku nudi nudidinga." 
James1:23 Bualu bua bikala muntu munvui wa dî, kai muenji wadi, yeye udi bu muntu udi utangila mpala wandi mene mu ludimuenu;" 
James1:24 bua yeye udi uditangila, udi uya biandi, udi uhua muoyo lukasa bua mushindu wakadiye." 
James1:25 Kadi udi utangilatangila mikenshi miakane tshishiki ya budishikaminyi, ne udi ushalamu, kai muikale munvui udi uhua muoyo, kadi muikale muenji wa mudimu udi uwenza, muntu eu neikale ne disanka mu kuenza kuandi." 
James1:26 Biela muntu meshi ne, Ndi ndonda malu a Nzambi, hadiye kai ukanda ludimi luandi, kadi udi udinga mutshima wandi, bualu bua Nzambi bua muntu eu budi tshianana." 
James1:27 Bualu bua Nzambi bua bushua ne budi kabui bunyanguka ku mesu kua Nzambi Tatu budi nunku, bua kuya kutangila bana ba nshîa ne bakashi ba mu lufuila mu dikenga diabo, ne bua kudilama kai ne ditoba dia ku malu a ha buloba." 
James2:1 Bana betu, kanuikadi ne ditabusha dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, Mukelenge wa butumbi, ne kansungunsungu kudi bantu." 
James2:2 Bua biabuela muntu mu disangisha dienu ne tukanu tua ngolo ku minu yandi muluate bilulu bimpe; ne biabuela muntu muhele kabidi muluate bilulu bibi; 
James2:3 binuatangila anu kudi muntu udi muluate bilulu bimpe, nuamba ne, Shikama biebe aha mu muaba muimpe; ne binuambila muntu muhele ne, Imanyina biebe aku, anyi, Shikama hanshi hehi ne tshitekelu tshianyi tshia makasa;" 
James2:4 kanuakutahulukangana munkatshi muenu, ne kanuakulua balumbuludi badi ne meshi mabi, anyi?" 
James2:5 Unvuai, bana betu bananga; Nzambi kakasungula bahele ba mu bintu bia ha buloba bua kuikalabo babanshi mu ditabusha ne bahianyi ba bukelenge buakalayeye badi bamunanga, anyi?" 
James2:6 Kadi nuenu nuakuhetula muntu muhele. Bantu babanshi kabena banuenzesha ku bukole, bobo bine kabena banukoka ku bilumbuluidi, anyi?" 
James2:7 Bobo kabena bahenda dina dia butumbi didibo banuidika, anyi?" 
James2:8 Kadi binuenza mukenshi wa butumbi, udi mufunda mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Sua mukuenu bu mûdi mudisue, nudi nuenza bimpe;" 
James2:9 kadi binuikala ne kansungunsungu kudi bantu, nudi nuenza bualu bubi, nuakuhishibua bu bashihi ba mikenshi kudi mikenshi nkayai." 
James2:10 Bua muntu yonso udi utumikila mikenshi ei mijima, bialendukeye ku mukenshi umue, wakulua mushihi wa mikemu yonso." 
James2:11 Bualu bua nyeye wakuamba ne, Kuendi masandi, wakuamba kabidi ne, Kushihi muntu. Nunku biwikala kui muende masandi, kadi biwashiha muntu, wewe wakulua mushihi wa mikenshi yonso." 
James2:12 Nuikale nuambe ne nuikale nuenze bu bantu badi bamba kulumbuluishibua kudi mukenshi wa budishikaminyi. 
James2:13 Bualu bua dilumbulula kadiena ne luse kudi muntu udi kai muleshe bakuabo luse; luse ludi lutamba dilumbulula kutumba. 
James2:14 Bana betu, dikuatshisha kai didi kudi muatu, biambeye ne, Ndi ne ditabusha, kadi yeye kena ne kuenza? Ditabusha adi didi dimanye mua kumusungila, anyi?" 
James2:15 Bikala muanʼetu mulume wa mu Kilisto anyi muanʼetu mukashi butaka ne bakengela bia kudia bia buatshia-buatshia," 
James2:16 biabambila umue wenu ne, Yai bienu talala, nuote kahia, nûkute; kadi nuenu kanui nubaha bintu bidi mibidi yabo ikengela; dikuatshisha kai didiku?" 
James2:17 Nunku ditabusha kabidi, bikaladi kadi ne kuenza, didi didifuila." 
James2:18 Bulelela, mukuabo neambe ne, Wewe udi ne ditabusha, ne meme ndi ne kuenza; undeshe ditabusha diebe ditahuluka ku kuenza ne meme nenkuleshe ditabusha dianyi ku kuenza kuanyi." 
James2:19 Wewe udi witabusha ne, Nzambi udi umue; udi wenza bimpe; bademon badi bitabusha kabidi, badi bazakala." 
James2:20 Kadi wewe, muntu wa hatuhu, udi musue kumanya ne, Ditabusha ditahuluka ku kuenza didi diatuka, anyi?" 
James2:21 Tatu wetu Abalahama kakabingishibua ku kuenza kuandi hakafileye muana wandi Isaka ku tshioshelu, anyi?" 
James2:22 Wewe udi utangila ne, Ditabusha diakenza mudimu hohamue ne kuenza kuandi: ne ditabusha diandi diakavuishibua diakane tshishiki ku kuenza kuandi." 
James2:23 Ne dî dia mu Makanda wa Nzambi diakashikishibua ne, Abalahama wakitabusha Nzambi ne bakamubadila ditabusha diandi bu buakane buandi; bakamuidika, Mulunda wa Nzambi." 
James2:24 Nudi nutangila ne, Muntu udi ubingishibua ku kuenza kuandi, kena ubingishibua anu ku ditabusha." 
James2:25 Muomumue kabidi, Lahaba, mukashi wa masandi, kakabingishibua ku kuenza kuandi, bualu bua yeye wakangata bamisheshe, wakabatuma mu nshila mukuabo, anyi?" 
James2:26 Bu mudi mubidi mutahuluka ku nyuma wau udi mufue, nunku kabidi, ditabusha didi ditahuluka ku kuenza didi difue." 
James3:1 Bana betu, kanulu bayishi ba bungi, bualu bua nudi bamanye ne, Netuangate dihila ditamba bunene." 
James3:2 Bualu bua buonso buetu tudi tulenduka mu malu a bungi. Bikala mukuabo kai ulenduka ku dî diandi eu udi muntu muakane tshishiki, udi mumanye mua kukanda mubidi wandi wonso." 
James3:3 Bituabuesha nkanu ya kuendesha nʼai tubalu mukana muatu, bua tuotu tututumikile, tudi tutshungulula mibidi yatu yonso." 
James3:4 Tangilai matu kabidi, nasha wowo manene be, adi endeshibua ku bihehele bikole, kadi adi atshunguludibua ku tshidimba tshitamba bukese, kuonso kudi mutshima wa muena yenda musue." 
James3:5 Nunku ludimi ludi tshituha tshikese, ludi lufunafuna malu manene. Tangilai mudi kahia kakese katemesha nkunyi ya bungi be!" 
James3:6 Ne ludimi ludi kahia; ludimi ludi buloba bujima bua malu mabi munkatshi mua bituha bietu bia mibidi; ludi lunyanga mubidi wonso ludi lutemesha matuku onso a muoyo kahia, iudi lutemeshibua ne kahia ka ku Ngena." 
James3:7 Bualu bua mushindu wonso wa nyama ne wa nyunyu ne wa bintu bidi bidikoka hanshi ne wa bintu bia mu mai manene bidi bibidishibua hanu, biakumana kuibidishibua hanu kudi bantu;" 
James3:8 kadi kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kuibidisha ludimi hanu aha; ludi tshintu tshidibo kabai mua kukanda, ludi lûle tente ne lulengu lua lufu." 
James3:9 Tudi tutumbisha nʼalu Mukelenge ne Tatu; tudi tuela nʼalu bantu bakafukibua ne tshifuanyikishi tshia Nzambi mulau. 
James3:10 Ditumbisha ne mulau bidi bihatuka mukana mumue. Bana betu, kambimpe malu â ikaleku." 
James3:11 Mushimi wa mai udi uhatula mai mimpe ne mai a bululu mu mushiku umue, anyi?" 
James3:12 Bana betu, mutshi wa nfigi udi mumanye mua kukuama oleve, anyi? Muonshi wa tumuma udi mamanye mua kukuama nfigi, anyi? Nunku mai a lueho kêna mamanye mua kuhatula mai mimpe." 
James3:13 Muntu kai udi ne meshi ne lungenyi munkatshi muenu? Ku muoyo wandi muimpe aleshe bantu bienzedi biandi mu kalolo kadi ne meshi. 
James3:14 Kadi binuikala ne mukau wa luonji ne difuilangana mu mitshima yenu, kanuditumbishi ne kanudingi ku malu malelela." 
James3:15 Lungenyi elu kenduoluo ludi lufuma mu diulu, kadi ludi lua ha buloba, iudi lua mutshima wa ha buloba, ludi lua bademon." 
James3:16 Bualu bua hadi mukau ne difuilangana hadi diyoyo ne malu mabi onso. 
James3:17 Kadi meshi adi afuma mu diulu diambedi adi mimpe, hashishe adi ditalala, adi buhote, budi bualu butekete bua kuasengelela, adi mûle tente ne luse ne mamuma mimpe, kêna ne mpata, kêna ne lubombo." 
James3:18 Mamuma a buakane adi akunyibua mu ditalala kudi bantu badi benzesha ditalala. 
James4:1 Nvita ne difuilangana bia munkatshi muenu biakulua kudi kunyi? Kabiena bilua ku nkuka idi iluangana mu bituha bia mibidi yenu, anyi?" 
James4:2 Nudi ne lukuka lua bintu, ne kanuena nʼabi; nudi nushihangana; nudi nukuma mitshima ku bintu bia bakuabo, kamuena mua kubiangata; nudi nufuilangane, nudi nuluangana nvita; kamuena ne bintu, bualu bua kamuena nubilonde." 
James4:3 Nudi nulomba ne kamuena nuangata bintu, bualu bua nudi nabilomba bibi, anu bualu bua kubimuangalasha ku masanka enu." 
James4:4 Nuenu, bena masandi. Kanuena bamanye ne, Bulunda bua malu a ha buloba budi ne Nzambi lukuna, anyi? Nunku muntu yonso wasua kuikala mulunda wa malu a ha buloba, udi udivuisha nmona lukuna kudi Nzambi." 
James4:5 Nudi nuela meshi ne, Mukanda wa Nzambi udi wamba hatuhu ne, Nyuma wakatutekeleye munda muetu udi ujinga tô ne ku mukau, anyi?" 
James4:6 Kadi yeye udi utuha ngasa muhite. Nunku Makanda wa Nzambi udi wamba ne, Nzambi udi uhidia badi badisue, kadi udi uha badi badihuekesha ngasa." 
James4:7 Nunku nudikokeshe kudi Nzambi; kadi nukandamene diabolo ne yeye neanunyeme. 
James4:8 Semenai ha buihi ne Nzambi ne yeye neasemene ha buihi ntemu. Nulengeshe bianza bienu, nuenu bantu babi, nutokeshe mitshima yenu, nuenu bena mitshima ibidi." 
James4:9 Nunyingalashe mitshima yenu, nujinge, nudile muadi; kuseka kuenu kuandamuke kanyinganyinga, ne disanka dienu diandamuke majie." 
James4:10 Nudihuekeshe ku mesu kua Mukelenge, ne yeye neanubandishe." 
James4:11 Kanusonguelanganyi, bana betu. Muntu udi usonguela muanʼabo wa ma Kilisto, anyi udi ulumbuluisha muanʼabo wa mu Kilisto, yeye udi usonguela mikenshi, udi ulumbuluisha mikenshi, kadi biwalumbuluisha mikenshi, wewe kuena muenji wa mikenshi kadi udi mulumbuluishi wai." 
James4:12 Anu umue udi muedi wa mikenshi ne mulumbuluisha nyeye udi ne bukole bua kue sungila ne bua kushiha. Kadi wewudi nganyi bua wewe udi ulumbuluisha mukuenu? 
James4:13 Ahu nuenu badi bamba ne, Lelu anyi makelela netuye ku musoko mukuabo, netuikaleku tshidimu tshijima, netuendulule mushinga, netuhete bintu;" 
James4:14 kadi kanuena bamanye malu kai neikaleku makelela. Muoyo wenu udi tshinyi? Nudi bu dibungi, didiku tshituha tshihi, hashishe didi dijimine." 
James4:15 Nuakadi kuamba ne, Biasua Mukelenge, netuikale ne muoyo, netuenze kabidi bualu ebu anyi bualu abu." 
James4:16 Biadi katataka nudi nuditumbisha mu kufunafuna kuenu; kuditumbisha kuonso kua nunku kudi kubi. 
James4:17 Nunku muntu udi mumanye mua kuenza bualu buimpe ne udi kai ubuenza, bualu ebu budi bubi kudiye." 
James5:1 Ahu nuenu, bantu babanshi, nudile bienu, nuele mbila bualu bua makenga akadi ba kulua kunudi." 
James5:2 Bubanshi buenu buakoneka, bivualu bienu biakudibua kudi bishi." 
James5:3 Ngolo yenu ne argent yenu yakukuatshibua mamoma; mamoma ai neikale tshimanyishilu kunudi, neadie mibidi yenu bu kahia. Nuakudibutshila bintu mu matuku a kunshikidilu." 
James5:4 Monai, difutu dia bena mudimu bakanunowela madimi enu, dinutshidi nushala nʼadi ku buibi, didi diela dî dikole; ne muadi wa bahuodi wakubuela mu matshu a Mukelenge wa Misumba Yonso." 
James5:5 Nuakushikama mu buneme ha buloba, nuakudisankisha ne masanka enu; nuakudiundisha mitshima yenu ilue manyi a bungi bua dituku didibo bashiha." 
James5:6 Nuakuhisha, nuakushiha muntu muakane; yeye kena ufuilangana nʼenu." 
James5:7 Nunku, bana betu, nuikale ne lutulu tô ne halua Mukelenge. Monai tshidime udi windila mamuma a mushinga mukole a ha buloba, muikale ne lutulu bua bualu buau tô ne halokelau nvula ya diambedi ne yalua ku nyima." 
James5:8 Nuikale ne lutulu kabidi, nujadike mitshima yenu, bualu bua dimueneka dia Mukelenge diakulua ha buihi." 
James5:9 Bana betu, kanutontolodianganyi, bua nuenu kanulumbuluishibu; tangilai, mulumbuluishi udi muimane ku mpala kua tshibi." 
James5:10 Bana betu, nutangile baprofete bakamba mu dina dia Mukelenge bu tshimanyinu tshia ditantamana dia mu makenga ne tshia lutulu." 
James5:11 Monai, tudi tuidika bantu bakadikankamika ne, Badi ne disanka; nuakunyua lumu lua kudikankamika kua Yobo, nuakutangila bu muakumuenzela Mukelenge kunshikidilu, ne bu mudi Mukelenge mûle tente ne luse ne dinanga." 
James5:12 Ku mpala kua malu onso, bana betu, kanuditshihi nasha kudi diulu, nasha kudi buloba, nasha ne mutshihu mukuabo; kadi E wenu ikale E ne Nasha wenu ikale Nasha, bua nuenu kanudibueshi mu dihila." 
James5:13 Muntu udi ne dikenga munkatshi muenu, anyi? Alombe biandi Nzambi. Muntu udi ne disanka, anyi? Imbe biandi misambu." 
James5:14 Muntu udi ne disama munkatshi muenu, anyi? Abikile biandi bakulu ba ekelesia; bobo bamulombele Nzambi, bamuele manyi mu dina dia Mukelenge;" 
James5:15 ne kulomba kudi ne ditabusha neasungile muena disama, ne Mukelenge neamubishe; ne bikaleye muenze bualu bubi, Nzambi neamubuikidile bubi buandi." 
James5:16 Nunku nutondelangane mibi yenu, nulombelangane Nzambi, bua nuenu mikoleshibue. Disengelela dia muntu muakane didi ne bukole bua bungi mu kuenza kuadi." 
James5:17 Eliya wakadi muntu wa mutshima muomumue nʼetu, ne yeye wakalomba Nzambi ne kulomba kukole bua nvula kailoki; ne nvula kayakaloka ha buloba tô bidimu bisatu ne ngondo isambombo." 
James5:18 Yeye wakalomba Nzambi kabidi; ne diulu diakatuma nvula ne buloba buakamenesha mamuma abu. 
James5:19 Bana betu, hikala mukuabo wa munkatshi muenu uhambuka mu nshila wa bushua, ne mukuabo umuandamuna;" 
James5:20 amanye biandi ne, Muntu udi wandamuna muntu mubi ku dihambuka dia mu nshila wandi, yeye neasungile muoyo wa muntu ku lufu, neabuikile malu mabi a bungi." 
1Peter1:1 Petelo, mupostolo wa Yesu Kilisto, kudi bantu basungudibue kudi Nzambi, badi benyi bena tshimuangi, ba mu Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia ne mu Bitunia," 
1Peter1:2 badi basungudibue bu mudi budianjidi kumanya bua Nzambi Tatu mu kujidibua kua Nyuma Muimpe, bua kuikalabo ne ditumikila ne kumiamina kua mashi a Yesu Kilisto; ngasa kunudi ne ditalala bivulangane." 
1Peter1:3 Batumbishe Nzambi udi kabidi Tatu wa Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, nyeye wakatulela tshiakabidi bu mudi luse luandi lunene, bua kutuheye ditekemena didi ne muoyo bua dibika dia Yesu Kilisto dia ku bafue;" 
1Peter1:4 bua tuikale ne buhianyi budi kabui bubola, budi kabui bunyanguka, budi kabui bufubidila, buakutekibua mu diulu bua bualu buenu," 
1Peter1:5 nuenu mbadi balamibua ku bukole bua Nzambi bua ditabusha tô ne ku luhandu tulongolola bubuluibua mu tshikondo tshia kunshikidilu. 
1Peter1:6 Bua muanda eu nudi nutamba kusanka, nasha bikalaku bualu bua nuenu kunyingalashibua tshituha tshihi mu mateta a mishindu ya bungi;" 
1Peter1:7 bualu bua kuteta kua ditabusha dienu, nasha ditetshibua ne kahia, didi ditamba ngolo udi ujimina mushinga mukole, nekusanganyibue ne butumbi ne dinemekibua ne buneme halua dibuluibua dia Yesu Kilisto." 
1Peter1:8 Yeye, unuakadi kanui batangile ku mesu, nyeye unudi nunanga; kadi nudi numuitabusha, kanui numutangila katataka, ne nudi nusanka bikole ne disanka didi hadi mua kuambibua ne didi diûle tente ne butumbi;" 
1Peter1:9 nudi nuangata nshikidilu wa ditabusha dienu, nduhandu lua mioyo yenu." 
1Peter1:10 Bua luhandu elu baprofete bakakeba ne bakalukesha bikole, bamba bua ngasa wakadi ha kulua kunudi;" 
1Peter1:11 bakebakeba tshikondo kai ne mushindu kai wa tshikondo tshiakabalesha Nyuma wa Kilisto wakadi munda muabo, hakadianjileye kubambila bua makenga a Kilisto ne bua butumbi buakadi ha kualonda." 
1Peter1:12 Buakabuluibua kudibo, ne kabakadikuatshila, bobo bine, malu â mudimu, kudi bakanakuatshilau nuenu mudimu, malu mene akanumanyishabo katataka kudi bantu bakanuambila lumu luimpe mu Nyuma Muimpe wakanutuminabo mufume mu diulu; malu adi banjelo basue kutangilatangila." 
1Peter1:13 Nunku nuele bimono bia meshi enu mikaya, nuikale talala, nujadike ditekemena dienu tshishiki mu ngasa udibo balua nʼandi kunudi ku dibuluibua dia Yesu Kilisto." 
1Peter1:14 Nuikale bana batumikidi, kanudifuanyikishi bu munuakadi mu nkuka yenu ya diambedi, mu buhote buenu;" 
1Peter1:15 bu mudi yeye wakanubikila udi wa tshijila, nunku nuenu kabidi nulue ba tshijila mu malu onso a muoyo wenu;" 
1Peter1:16 bualu bua dî didi difundibua ne, Nuenu nenuikale ba tshijila, bualu bua meme ndi wa tshijila." 
1Peter1:17 Binuamubikila bu Tatu udi ulumbuluisha muntu yonso bu mudi bienzedi biandi kai ne kansungunsungu, nuhitshishe tshikondo tshia buenyi buenu mu ditshina." 
1Peter1:18 Bualu bua nudi bamanye ne, Tuakahikudibua, kenku bintu bidi bijimina, ku argent anyi ku ngolo, mu malu a hatuhu a muoyo wenu akanushilabo kudi batatuʼenu;" 
1Peter1:19 kadi nuakahikudibua ku mashi a mushinga mukole, bu a muana wa mukoko kai ne tshilema ne kai ne ditoba, ku mashi a Kilisto mene;" 
1Peter1:20 wakadianjila kumanyibua bulelela ku mpala kua tshibangidilu tshia buloba, kadi wakamueneshibua kunshikidilu kua bikondo bua bualu buenu." 
1Peter1:21 Bua bualu buandi nudi bena kuitabusha ba Nzambi wakamubisha ku bafue, wakamuha butumbi; bua ditabusha dienu ne ditekemena dienu bikale mu Nzambi." 
1Peter1:22 Bualu bua nuenu nuakulengesha mitshima yenu mu kutumikila kuenu kua malu a bushua bua kuikala ne dinanga dia bana benu ba mu Kilisto didi kadî ne lubombo, nunku nunangangane mu mitshima yenu bikole;" 
1Peter1:23 bualu bua nuakaledibua tshiakabidi, kenku bintu bidi bijimina, kadi ku bintu bidi kabi bijimina, ku dî dia Nzambi udi ne muoyo ne udiku tshiendelele." 
1Peter1:24 Bualu bua bakafunda ne, Ba ha buloba bonso badi bu bisosa, Ne butumbi buabo buonso budi bu tshilongo tshia bisosa. Bisosa bidi bifubidila, Ne tshilongo tshidi tshimata hanshi;" 
1Peter1:25 Kadi dî dia Mukelenge didiku tshiendelele. Edi udi dia lumu luimpe diakanuambilabo. 
1Peter2:1 Nunku hanumusha malu mabi onso, ne kudinga kuonso, ne lubombo, ne mukau, ne njianu yonso;" 
1Peter2:2 bu bana balela katataka, nujinge mabele a meshi adi kâi ne kudinga, bua nuenu nudiundeku tô ne ku luhandu;" 
1Peter2:3 binuikala balabule ne Mukelenge udi muimpe; 
1Peter2:4 nulue kudiye ndibue didi ne muoyo, diakahidiabo kudi bantu, kadi didi disungula kudi Nzambi, ndia mushinga mukole;" 
1Peter2:5 nunku nuenu kabidi, bu mabue adi ne muoyo, nuakashibua nsubu wa Nyuma, bua kuikala bakuidi ba tshijila; bua nuenu kufila milambu idi ya nyuma mitabushibue kudi Nzambi bualu bua Yesu Kilisto." 
1Peter2:6 Bualu bua dî didi mu Mukanda wa Nzambi ne, Tangilai, udi nteka mu Siona dibue dinene dia mu ditumba dia nsubu, disungula ne dia mushinga mukole; Weyemena kudidi kena ufuishibua bundu." 
1Peter2:7 Nunku mushinga mukole wadi udi kunudi badi bamuitabusha; kadi kudi badi kabai bamuitabusha, udi dibue diakahidiabo kudi bibaki ba nsubu, diodio diakavuishibua mutu wa ditumba;" 
1Peter2:8 ne dibue dia kukumabo dikasa, ne mutunda wa dibue wa kubalenduisha: bobo badi balenduka ku dî dia Nzambi bualu bua buhidia buabo; bakatekibua ku bualu ebu kabidi." 
1Peter2:9 Kadi nuenu nudi tshisamba tshisungudibua, ne bakuidi ba bukelenge, ne tshisamba tshia tshijila, bantu badi bikale ba Nzambi muine, bua nuenu nuambe bua buimpe bua Nzambi wakanubikila bua kunuhatula mu mîdima bua kunubuesha mu munya wandi wa dikema." 
1Peter2:10 Mu tshikondo tshia diambedi kanuakadi bantu, kadi katataka nudi bantu ba Nzambi; kanuakafuidibua luse, kadi katataka nuakufuidibua luse." 
1Peter2:11 Bananga, udi nutendekena bu benyi ne bena luendu ba ha buloba ne, Nuehuke ku nkuka ya mibidi idi iluangana ne mioyo yenu;" 
1Peter2:12 nuikale ne bienzedi bienu bimpe munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende, bualu bua, mu mianda idibo banusonguela nuenu bu benji ba malu mabi, bobo batumbishe Nzambi mu dituku dialueye, bua midimu yenu mimpe idibo bamona." 
1Peter2:13 Nudikokesha ku bukokeshi buonso bua bantu bualu bua Mukelenge; nasha kudi nfumu munene udi ku mutu; 
1Peter2:14 nasha kudi bangovena bu batumibua kudiye bua kudisombuela kudi benji ba malu mabi, ne bua kutumbisha benji ba malu mimpe." 
1Peter2:15 Bualu bua disua dia Nzambi didi nunku, bua nuenu nuhuishe buhote bua bantu batshimbakane ku kuenza kuenu kua malu mimpe;" 
1Peter2:16 bu badishikamine, kadi kembu badi bangata budishikaminyi buabo bu tshibuikilu tshia malu mabi; kadi mikale bu bahika ba Nzambi." 
1Peter2:17 Nunemeke bantu bonso. Nunange bana benu ba ma Kilisto. Nutshine Nzambi. Nunemeke nfumu munene. 
1Peter2:18 Bena mudimu, nudikokeshe kudi bakelenge benu ne ditshina dionso; kenganu kudi badi bimpe ne badi ne buhole, kadi kudi badi ne tshinyangu kabidi." 
1Peter2:19 Bua muanda eu udi wa kusakidila, bikala muntu udikankamika mu kanyinganyinga bualu bua muoyo-mukese wandi kudi Nzambi hakengeye kai ne bualu." 
1Peter2:20 Butumbi budi hanyi binuadikankamika hanuenza bualu bubi ne badi banukuma? Kadi binuadikankamika hanuenza bualu buimpe ne nudi mikenga, bualu ebu budi bua kusakidila ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
1Peter2:21 Bua nuakabikidibua bua muanda eu, bualu bua Kilisto wakakenga bua bualu buenu, wakanushila tshileshilu bua nuenu numulonde mu makasa andi." 
1Peter2:22 Yeye kakenza bualu bubi, kabakamusangana ne didinga mukana muandi;" 
1Peter2:23 hakamuhendabo, yeye kakabahenda kabidi; hakakengeye, yeye kakabakanyina, kadi wakadifila mu bianza bia udi ulumbulula biakane." 
1Peter2:24 Yeye muine wakututuadila malu mabi etu mu mubidi wandi ku mutshi mutshiamakane, bua tuetu, bamane kufua ku malu mabi, tuikale ne muoyo wa ku buakane; kunuakuondahibua ku mibundabunda yandi." 
1Peter2:25 Bualu bua nuakadi nuhambuka bu mikoko, kadi katataka nuakuhingana kudi Mulami ne Mutangidi wa mioyo yenu." 
1Peter3:1 Muomumue, nuenu bakashi, nukokele babayenu; nunku bikala bakuabo kabai bitabusha dî dia Nzambi, nebahetebue mu bualu bua Nzambi kabai ne dî dia Nzambi, ku bienzedi bia bakashi babo:" 
1Peter3:2 hatangilabo bienzedi bienu bilengele bidi ne ditshina. 
1Peter3:3 Didilengesha diabo kadikadi dia hamʼbidi dia kuluka kua nsuki, anyi dia kuela kua bilenge bia ngolo, anyi dia kuluata kua bivualu;" 
1Peter3:4 kadi dikale dia muntu musokoma wa mu mutshima, mu bivualu bidi kabi binyanguka bia mutshima wa kalolo ne ditalala, bidi bia mushinga mukole ku mesu kua Nzambi." 
1Peter3:5 Muomumue kabidi, bakashi ba tshijila ba kale bakadi batekemena Nzambi, bakadi badilengesha, bakadi bakokela babayabo;" 
1Peter3:6 bu muakatumikila Sala Abalahama, mumubikile Mukelenge; unuakulua bana bandi katataka, binuenza bimpe, ne binuikala kanui nutshinyishibua ku buowa buonso." 
1Peter3:7 Nuenu balume muomumue, nuikale ne bakashi benu bu mudi lungenyi luimpe, bu mudibo banutambe mubidi butekete, bu mudibo bahianyi nʼenu ba ngasa wa muoyo; bua kutendelela kuenu kakuhumbishibu." 
1Peter3:8 Di dia kundekelu ne, Nuikale buonso buenu ne mutshima umue, nusambangane, nunangangane bu bana babo ba mu Kilisto, nuikale ne mitshima ya luse ne mitshima mihuekela;" 
1Peter3:9 kanushintakashi bubi ku bubi anyi tshihendu ku tshihendu; kadi nushintakashangane nʼabo disanka; bua nuakabikidibua bua muanda eu, bua nuenu kuhiana disanka." 
1Peter3:10 Bualu bua, Wasua kunanga muoyo ne kumona matuku mimpe, Akande ludimi luandi ku bubi ne mishiku yandi bua kaidingi." 
1Peter3:11 Adimuke biandi ku malu mabi. Enze malu mimpe; Akebe biandi ditalala, adiunde." 
1Peter3:12 Bualu bua mesu a Mukelenge adi kudi bakane, Ne matshu andi adi buashi ku milombu yabo; Kadi mpala wa Mukelenge udi mutangisha kudi benji ba malu mabi." 
1Peter3:13 Ne nganyi wanuenzela bibi, binuaya bena lukunukunu ba malu mimpe?" 
1Peter3:14 Kadi binuakenga bualu bua buakane, nudi ne disanka; kanutshinyi kutshinyisha kuabo, kanulubakashibu mitshima yenu;" 
1Peter3:15 kadi nujidile Kilisto mu mitshima yenu bu Mukelenge; nuikale badilongolola misangu yonso, bua kukudimuna dî kudi muntu yonso udi unukonka bua muanda wa ditekemena didi munda muenu; kadi nuenze nunka ne kalolo ne dishina." 
1Peter3:16 Nuikale ne muoyomukese muimpe, bua, mu bualu budibo banusonguela, bobo badi bahenda bienzedi bienu bimpe binudi nʼabi mu Kilisto bafuishibue bundu." 
1Peter3:17 Bua budi butambe buimpe, bikaladi disua dia Nzambi, bua mena nukenge bu benji ba malu mimpe, ne kanukengi bu benji ba malu mabi." 
1Peter3:18 Bualu bua Kilisto wakafua musangu umue bua malu mabi, muntu muakane wakafuila bantu babi, bua kulua nʼetu kudi Nzambi; wakashihibua mubidi wandi, kadi wakavuishibua muoyo mu nyuma wandi;" 
1Peter3:19 muakayeye mu nyuma wandi kabidi, ne wakambila nyuma ya ba mu nsubu wa lukanu wa lufu bualu bua Nzambi." 
1Peter3:20 Bantu aba bakadi ne buhidia diambedi, hakadi lutulu lua Nzambi luindila mu matuku a Noa, hakadi kuatu bunene bilongolodibua, muakasungidibua bantu banya-banya, bantu muanda mukulu mene, mu mai:" 
1Peter3:21 mai â kabidi adi tshifuanyikishi tshia adi atusungila katataka, nkubatiza mene, kembua diuvua dia manyanu a mubidi, kadi bua dikeba dia muoyo-mukese muimpe kudi Nzambi, bua dibika dia Yesu Kilisto ku lufu;" 
1Peter3:22 udi ku tshianza tshia bukole tshia Nzambi, mumane kubuela mu diulu; banjelo ne makokeshi ne makole biakavuishibua ku nyima kuandi." 
1Peter4:1 Nunku, bualu bua Kilisto wakakenga mu mubidi, nuenu nudiluatshishe ne meshi momumue; bua wakakenga mu mubidi wakumana kulekela malu mabi," 
1Peter4:2 bua nuenu kanuikadi ne muoyo kabidi mu nkuka ya bantu matuku enu atshidi mashale mu mubidi, kadi nuikale ne muoyo bu mudi disua dia Nzambi." 
1Peter4:3 Bualu bua matuku mahite akakumbana bua nuenu nulonde disua dia bisamba bia bende, ne bua nuenu nuende mu tshienzenza tshia masandi, mu nkuka, mu kukuatshika kua malulu, mu manaya a bundu, mu tshingu tshia banu ba malulu, ne mu kutendelela kua mpingu mibi." 
1Peter4:4 Mu malu â badi bakema bualu bua nuenu kanuena nuenda nʼabo tô ne ku dihitshibua diodiumue dia malu manyanguka, badi banuhenda;" 
1Peter4:5 bobo nebababadile malu abo kudiye udi udilongolola bua kulumbuluisha badi ne muoyo ne badi bafue. 
1Peter4:6 Bua muanda eu kabidi bakambila bafue mene lumu luimpe, bua bobo balumbuluishibue bu mudibo balumbuluisha bantu badi ne mibidi, kadi bua kuikalabo ne muoyo mu nyuma bu mudi Nzambi musue." 
1Peter4:7 Kadi kunshikidilu kua malu onso kudi ha buihi; nunku nuikale ne meshi majalama, ne nuikale bahole mu mitendelelu;" 
1Peter4:8 ku mutu kua malu onso nuikalangane ne dinanga dikole munkatshi muenu, bualu bua dinanga didi dibuikila malu mabi a bungi;" 
1Peter4:9 nusankidilangane ne benyi kanui ne kutontolola; 
1Peter4:10 bu muakangata muntu ne muntu tshihedi, nukuatshishangane nkatshi munkatshi muenu, bu balami bimpe ba ngasa muvulangane wa Nzambi." 
1Peter4:11 Biakula muntu, akule mei bu mudiu mamba kudi Nzambi; biakuata muntu mudimu, enze bu mudi bukole buakamuha Nzambi; enze biandi bua Nzambi atumbishibue mu malu onso bua Yesu Kilisto; kudiye kuikale butumbi ne bukokeshi tô ne ku bikondo bia bikondo. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Bananga, kanukemi bua dikenga didi bu kahia munkatshi muenu diakaluila kunudi bu diteta, bu bualu buhia-buhia buakanukuata;" 
1Peter4:13 kadi bualu bua nudi babanyanganyi ba makenga a Kilisto, nusanke; bua nuenu nusanke kabidi ne disanka dinene ku dibuluibua dia butumbi buandi." 
1Peter4:14 Bianuhendabo bua dina dia Kilisto, nudi ne disanka; bualu bua Nyuma wa butumbi ne Nyuma wa Nzambi udi unuikila hamʼbidi henu." 
1Peter4:15 Kadi umue wenu kakengeshibu bu mushihianganyi, anyi bu muibi, anyi bu muenji wa malu mabi, anyi bu mudibueshi wa mu malu a bantu bakuabo;" 
1Peter4:16 kadi biakenga muntu bu umena Kilisto, kikadi biandi ne bundu, kadi atumbisha biandi Nzambi bua dina edi." 
1Peter4:17 Bualu bua tshikondo tshia dilumbuluisha kubangadi ku ba mu nsubu wa Nzambi tshiakulua, ne biadianjiladi kubanga kutudi, kunshikidilu kua badi kabai batumikila lumu luimpe lua Nzambi nekuikale tshinyi?" 
1Peter4:18 Ne biasungidibua muntu muakane anu ne bualu bukole, muntu udi kai wa Nzambi ne udi mubi neamueneke kudi kunyi?" 
1Peter4:19 Nunku bantu badi bakenga bu mu disua dia Nzambi bafile mioyo yabo mu kuenza kua malu mimpe kudi Mufuki udi wa kueyemenyibua. 
1Peter5:1 Nunku ndi nsengelela bakulu badi munkatshi muenu, ndi bianyi mukulu nʼabo, ne mumanyi wa makenga a Kilisto, ne muangatshi wa butumbi budi buamba kubuluibua, ne," 
1Peter5:2 Nulame tshisumbu tshia mikoko ya Nzambi tshidi munkatshi muenu, nubalame, kanui benzeshibue ku bukole, kadi ne mitshima ya disanka bu mu disua dia Nzambi; kambualu bua kukeba biuma, kadi nuikale ne mutshima mulongolola bimpe;" 
1Peter5:3 kanuikadi bu bakokeshi ba badi ku nyima kuenu, kadi nudivuishe bifuanyikishi bimpe kudi mikoko." 
1Peter5:4 Ne hamueneshibue Mulami Munene, nenuangate tshifulu tshia butumbi tshidi katshi tshifubidila." 
1Peter5:5 Muomumue, nuenu bansongalume, nukokele bakulumpe. E, buonso buenu nudiluatshishe ne buhuekele, bua kukuatshishangana; bualu bua Nzambi udi uhidia badi badisue, kadi udi uha badi badihuekesha ngasa." 
1Peter5:6 Nunku nudihuekeshe kunshi kua tshianza tshikole tshia Nzambi, bua yeye anubandishe mu tshikondo tshiasunguleye;" 
1Peter5:7 nuteke ntatu yenu yonso kudiye, bualu bua yeye udi unulubulula." 
1Peter5:8 Nuikale bahote, nutabale; umena lukuna wenu, diabolo mene, udi wendakana bu nyama wa ntambue udi ukungula, ukeba bantu ba kudieye;" 
1Peter5:9 numutantamene bajalame mu ditabusha dienu; bualu bua nudi bamanye ne makenga momumue adi makumbashibue mu bana benu ba mu Kilisto badi ha buloba ebu. 
1Peter5:10 Ne Nzambi wa ngasa yonso, wakanubikila mu butumbi buandi bua tshiendelele bua mu Kilisto, hanuamana kukenga musangu muihi, yeye muine neanuakashe tshishiki, neanujadike, neanukoleshe." 
1Peter5:11 Bukokeshi buikale kudiye tô ne ku bikondo bia bikondo. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Nakunufundila mei makese mu bianza bia Siluano, undi mbala bu muanʼetu wa mu Kilisto udi mua kueyemenyibua, bua kunusengelela ne bua kunumanyisha ne, Eu udi ngasa mulelela wa Nzambi; nujalamemu bikole." 
1Peter5:13 Wa mu Babulona, musungula nʼenu, udi unuela muoyo, ne muanʼanyi Mâko udi unuela muoyo kabidi." 
1Peter5:14 Nuelangane muoyo ne kutuangana kua mishiku kua dinanga. Ditalala dikale kudi buonso buena badi mu Kilisto. 
2Peter1:1 Simona Petelo, muhika ne mupostolo wa Yesu Kilisto kudi bantu bakuangata ditabusha dia mushinga mukole muomumue ne ditudi nʼadi mu buakane bua Nzambi wetu ne bua Musungidi Yesu Kilisto." 
2Peter1:2 Ngasa ikale kunudi ne ditalala divulangana mu dimanya dijalama dia Nzambi ne dia Yesu, Mukelenge wetu." 
2Peter1:3 Mbu mudi bukole bua bunzambi buandi, buakatuha bintu bionso bidi bua muoyo ne bua buimpe bua Nzambi, bualu bua kumanya kuetu kua yeye wakambikila bua butumbi buandi buine ne bua buimpe buandi." 
2Peter1:4 Mu malu â yeye wakutuha milayi yandi ya mushinga mukole ne mitambe bunene; bua ku milayi ei nuenu nulue babanyanganyi nʼandi ba muoyo wa bunzambi, bamane kuhanduka ku malu mabole adi mu buloba bualu bua nkuka mibi." 
2Peter1:5 Ne bua bualu ebu, nuenu mene, hanuavudisha disuminyina dionso, ku ditabusha dienu utentekashe buimpe; ne ku buimpe buenu nutentekashe lungenyi;" 
2Peter1:6 ne ku lungenyi luenu nutentekashe didikanda; ne ku didikanda dienu nutentekashe didikankamika; ne ku didikankamika dienu nutentekashe buimpe bua Nzambi; 
2Peter1:7 ne ku buimpe bua Nzambi buenu nutentekashe dinangangana dia bana benu; ne ku dinangangana dienu dia bana benu nutentekashe luse. 
2Peter1:8 Bikala malu â ngenu ne biavulanganau, adi anuvuisha kanui batuke ne kanui nuhanga mamuma tô ne ku dinanga dijalama dia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto." 
2Peter1:9 Kadi muntu udi kai ne malu â udi mufofo, utangila anu bidi ha buihi, muikale ne tshihua muoyo bua dilengesha dia ku malu mabi andi a diambedi." 
2Peter1:10 Nunku, bana betu, mitambe kunanukila bua kujadika dibikidibua dienu ne disungula dienu; bua binuenza malu â, kanuena nulenduka tshiendelele;" 
2Peter1:11 bua nunku nebatambe kunukumbashila ha kubuelela mu bukelenge bua tshiendelele bua Mukelenge wetu, udi kabidi Musungidi Yesu Kilisto." 
2Peter1:12 Nunku nengikale mudilongolole misangu yonso bua kunuvuluisha malu â, nasha nuenu bamanye, ne nasha nuenu bajalame mu malu malelela anudi nʼau." 
2Peter1:13 Ne ndi ngela meshi ne, Bidi bimpe, hantshidi mu nsubu eu wa mubidi bua meme kutabuluisha mitshima yenu ku dinuvuluisha dianyi;" 
2Peter1:14 mumanye bianyi ne diumusha dia nsubu wanyi eu wa mubidi dilualua lubilu bu muakandesha Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto. 
2Peter1:15 E, nenanukile bua nuenu mimanye mua kuvuluka malu â misangu yonso hangikala mumane kufua." 
2Peter1:16 Bualu bua tuetu katuakalonda nsumuinu yakambabo ku budimu bua bantu hatuakanumanyisha bua bukole ne bua dilua bia Mukelenge wetu Yesu Kilisto, kadi tuetu tuakadi bamonyi ba butumbi buandi ku mesu etu." 
2Peter1:17 Bualu bua yeye wakangata buneme ne butumbi kudi Nzambi Tatu hakalua dî dia nunku kudiye munkatshi mua Butumbi bua Buneme ne, Eu udi Muana wanyi munanga, disanka dianyi dionso didi kudiye;" 
2Peter1:18 ne tuetu tuakunvua di edi difuma mu diulu hatuakadi nʼandi ku mukuna au wa tshijila. 
2Peter1:19 Ne tudi ne di diakamba baprofete ditamba kujadikibua; nunku nudi nuenza bimpe binuadimuka bienu, bu mudibu kudi muinda udi utema mu muaba wa midima, tô ne hatshia butuku ne habanda mutoto wa nkesha mu mitshima yenu;" 
2Peter1:20 numanye bualu ebu diambedi ne, Kakuena diyisha dia baprofete dia mu Mukanda wa Nzambi didi difuma ku dijingulula dia muntu." 
2Peter1:21 Bualu bua kakuena diyisha dia baprofete diakanza kulua ku disua dia muntu; badi bantu bakamba dî dia kudi Nzambi benzesha kudi Nyuma Muimpe. 
2Peter2:1 Kadi baprofete ba mashimi bakabika munkatshi mua bantu kabidi, bu mudi bayishi ba mashimi balua kubika munkatshi muenu, nebalue mu musokoko ne malu manutahulule ku dibutuke, bavila Mukelenge wakabahikula, badivuishila dibutuka dia lukasa." 
2Peter2:2 Bantu ba bungi nebalonde bienzenza biabo bia masandi; bua bualu buabo nshila wa bushua neahendibue. 
2Peter2:3 Bualu bua lukuka lua biuma bobo nebendulule nʼenu mushinga ne mei a mashimi; dihila diabo diakabahishabo nʼadi kale kadiena dishanguluka, ne dibutuke diabo kadiena dilala tulu." 
2Peter2:4 Bualu bua bikala Nzambi kai muengeleke banjelo hakenzabo bibi, kadi yeye wakabela mu Ngena ne wakabafila mu nyongola ya mîdima, bua balamibuemu tô ne ku dilumbuluisha diabo;" 
2Peter2:5 ne bikalaye kai muengeleke ba ha buloba ba kale, kadi wakalama Noa, muambi wa malu mimpe ne bantu bakuabo muanda mutekete hakatumeye mai manene ha buloba bua bantu babi;" 
2Peter2:6 ne hakandamusheye misoko ya Sodoma ne Amola butue bua kahia, wakaihisha ne dibutuka, wakaivuisha bu tshifuanyikishi kudi bantu balualua kuhidia Nzambi;" 
2Peter2:7 ne wakahandisha Lota, muntu muakane hakadiye mutatshishibue ku bienzedi bia bundu bia bashihi ba mikenshi;" 
2Peter2:8 (bualu bua muntu eu muakane mushikame munkatshi muabo, mu dimona diandi ne mu diunvua diandi wakadi unyingalasha mutshima wandi muakane ku dituku ku dituku ne bienzedi bia bantombueshi);" 
2Peter2:9 Mukelenge udi mumanye mua kuhandisha bantu bandi bimpe mu mateyi abo, ne mua kulama bantu babi mu dikenga tô ne halua dituku dia kulumbulula;" 
2Peter2:10 yeye udi utamba kukengesha bantu badi balonda malu a mubidi mu lukuka ludi lubabihisha, ne badi bahetula bukokeshi. Badi bena dikamakama ne badisu, kabena bazakala hakahendabo badi ne butumbi;" 
2Peter2:11 kadi banjelo, badi babahita bunene ne bukole, kabena balua ne dihisha didi dibahenda ku mpala kua Mukelenge." 
2Peter2:12 Kadi bayishi aba, bu badi kabai ne meshi, baledibua bu nyama mene, bua kuikuatabo ne bua kuishihabo, badi bahendi mu malu adibo kabai bamanye, mu dijimisha diabo nebajimishibue bulelela," 
2Peter2:13 badi bakengeshibua bu difutu dia kuenza kua malu mabi abo; bantu badi babala kutamba kudia kuabo ne kunua kuabo kua mu munya bu disanka; badi matobe ne bilema, batamba kudia ne kunua ku bidia bia dinanga hadiabo nʼenu;" 
2Peter2:14 badi ne mesu mûle tente ne masandi, ne adi kâi mamanye mua kulekela malu mabi; badi balekesha badi ne mitshima mitekete; badi ne mitshima yabo mibidila mu lukuka; badi bana badi ne mulau." 
2Peter2:15 Hakalekelabo nshila mululame, bakahambuka, bamane kulonda nshila wa Belama, muana wa Beo, wakasua difutu dia bienzedi bibi;" 
2Peter2:16 kadi yeye wakadi mubedibue bua malu mabi andi; mpundu wakadi kamama wakakula mukana bu muatu, kakakanda buhote bua muprofete." 
2Peter2:17 Aba badi mishimi kayi ne mai; badi bu dibungi dihata kudi tshihehele tshikole; kudibo babatekela bufike bua mîdima. 
2Peter2:18 Bualu bua hadibo bakula mei manene a diambu, ku bienzedi biabo bia masandi, badi balobesha bakuabo mu nkuka ya mubidi, mbobo badi bamba kuhanduka kudi badi balonda dihambuka;" 
2Peter2:19 badi babalaya budishikaminyi, hadi bobo bine bahika ba malu mabole; bualu bua muntu udi mubuesha mu buhika kudi tshidiye mutambibue buhole." 
2Peter2:20 Bualu bua, hakamanabo kuhanduka mu malu a ha buloba, kumanya kuabo kua Mukelenge ne Musungidi, Yesu Kilisto, biakuatshibuabo mu malu â kabidi ne biatambibuabo bukole, tshikadilu tshiabo tshia kunshikidilu tshidi tshitamba tshia kumudilu bubi." 
2Peter2:21 Biakadi bitamba buimpe bua bobo kabai banze kumanya nshila wa buakane, ne hakamumanyabo, bua bobo kuela nyima ku mukenshi wa tshijila wakabelelabo." 
2Peter2:22 Bualu buakulua kudibo bu mudi lusumuinu lulelela luamba ne, Mbua muhingane ku bilushi biandi kabidi, ne ngulube mumane kuowa wakahingana kudibonda mu bitahikidi." 
2Peter3:1 Bananga, eu mukanda muibidi katataka undi nufundila; mu bubidi buai udi ntabulusha mitshima yenu miakane bua kunufuisha" 
2Peter3:2 bua nuenu kuvuluka mei akambibua diambedi kudi baprofete ba tshijila, ne mukenshi wa Mukelenge ne Musungidi wakanuambileye kudi bapostolo benu;" 
2Peter3:3 mimanye bienu bualu ebu ku mpala ne, Halua kunshikidilu kua matuku, baseki nebalue ne tuseku tuabo, benda bu mudi nkuka yabo mene," 
2Peter3:4 bamba kabidi ne, Mulayi wa dilua diandi udi hanyi? Bualu bua katshia batatu balala tulu, malu onso adi ashala momumue bu muakadiu ku tshibangidilu tshia bufuki." 
2Peter3:5 Bua bobo badi basue kuhua muoyo bua bualu ebu ne, Diulu diakadiku kale, ne buloba huakakuatakashibua bua mu mai bufume mu mai bua dî dia Nzambi;" 
2Peter3:6 bualu bua mai â, buloba abu buakadiku mu tshikondo atshi buakabuikidibua ne mai, buakajimina." 
2Peter3:7 Kadi bua dî diodiumue diulu didiku katataka ne buloba kabidi biakabutshidibua bua kuhia ne kahia bilamibue tô ne ku dituku dia dilumbulula ne dia dibutuka dia bantu badi babenga Nzambi. 
2Peter3:8 Kadi bananga, kanuhu muoyo bua bualu ebu bumue ne, Dituku dimue kudi Mukelenge didi bu bidimu tshinunu, ne bidimu tshinunu bidi bu dituku dimue." 
2Peter3:9 Mukelenge kena ushanguluka bua kushikisheye milayi yandi, bu mudi bakuabo babala dishanguluka; kadi udi nʼenu lutulu, kena musue umue wenu ajimine, kadi udi musue bonso balue kukudimuna mitshima yabo." 
2Peter3:10 Kadi dituku dia Mukelenge dilualua bu mudi muibi; mu dituku adi diulu nedijimine ne diyoyo dinene, ne bintu bia mu diulu nebifingutuke ne kahia kakole, ne buloba ne bintu bidimu nebihie." 
2Peter3:11 Bualu bua bintu ebi bionso bidi bijimina nunku, bunudi nʼabu mbua kuikala bantu ba mushindu kai mu bienzedi bia tshijila ne bia Nzambi," 
2Peter3:12 hanudi nutekemena ne hanudi nuendeshe lukasa dilua dia dituku dia Nzambi? Bua bualu buadi diulu diakukuata kahia nedijimine ne bintu bidimu nebienguluke ne kahia kakole. 
2Peter3:13 Kadi bu mudi mulayi wandi tudi tutekemena diulu dihia-dihia ne buloba buhia-buhia mudi buakane buikalemu. 
2Peter3:14 Nunku, bananga, bualu bua nudi nutekemena malu â, nanukilai bua banusangane mu ditalala kanui ne katobe, kanui ne kadiu kudiye." 
2Peter3:15 Numanye ne, Lutulu lua Mukelenge wetu nduhandu; bu mudi muanʼetu munanga Paulo kabidi, bua lungenyi luakamuhabo, wakanufundila;" 
2Peter3:16 bu mudiye wenza kabidi mu mikanda yandi yonso wambamu bua malu â, munda muai mudi manga malu adi makole ha kuajingulula, adi bantu badi kabai bayishibue ne ba mitshima mitekete bakonyangasha mei, bu mudibo benzela mei makuabo mu Mukanda wa Nzambi, bua dibutuka diabo." 
2Peter3:17 Nunku, nuenu bananga, bualu bua nudi nudianjila kumanya malu â, dimukai bua, hanuahambuishibua ku mashimi a bantu babi, kanulamuki ku dijadikibua dienu dine." 
2Peter3:18 Kadi nudiunde mu ngasa ne mu dimanya bia Mukelenge wetu ne Musungidi Yesu Kilisto. Butumbi buikale kudiye katataka tô ne ku dituku dia tshiendelele. Amen. 
1John1:1 Malu akadiku ku tshibangidilu, atuakunvua, atuakutangila ne mesu etu, atuakamona, abale nga bianza bietu, bua Di dia muoyo"

1John1:4 Tudi tunufundila malu â bua disanka dietu divulangane.

1John1:6 Bituamba ne, Tudi ne buobumue nʼandi, hatutshidi tuenda mu midima, tudi tushima, ne katuena tuenza bualu bulelela;"

1John1:7 kadi bituenda mu munya, bu mudiye mu munya, tudi tuikalangana ne buobumue, ne mashi a Yesu, Muanʼandi, adi atulengesha ku mibi yonso."

1John1:8 Bituamba ne, Katuena ne mibi, tudi tudidinga, ne bushua kabuena munda muetu."

1John1:9 Bituatonda mibi yetu, yeye udi wa kueyemenyibua ne udi ne buakane bua kubuikidila mibi yetu, ne bua kutulengesha ku malu mabi onso." 
1John1:9 Bituatonda mibi yetu, yeye udi wa kueyemenyibua ne udi ne buakane bua kubuikidila mibi yetu, ne bua kutulengesha ku malu mabi onso." 
1John1:10 Bituamba ne, Katuakuenza bibi, tudi tumuvuisha ne, Muena mashimi, ne dî diandi kadiena munda muetu."

1John2:1 Bana banyi bakese, ndi nufundila malu â bua nuenu kanuenji bibi. Bienza muntu mukuabo bibi, tudi ne Muakuidi kudi Tatu, Yesu Kilisto udi muakane;"

1John2:5 Kadi muntu utu walama dî diandi, bulelela, dinanga dia Nzambi diakumana kukumbana munda muandi tshishiki. Mu bualu ebu tudi bamanye ne, Tudi munda muandi;" 
1John2:5 Kadi muntu utu walama dî diandi, bulelela, dinanga dia Nzambi diakumana kukumbana munda muandi tshishiki. Mu bualu ebu tudi bamanye ne, Tudi munda muandi;" 
1John2:6 yeye udi wamba ne, Ndi muikale munda muandi, budiye nʼabu mbua kuenda bu muakendeye mene."

1John2:7 Bananga, tshiena nufundila mukenshi muhia-muhia, kadi mukenshi mukulukulu unuakadi nʼau ku tshibangidilu, mukenshi eu mukulukulu udi dî dinuakunvua." 
1John2:7 Bananga, tshiena nufundila mukenshi muhia-muhia, kadi mukenshi mukulukulu unuakadi nʼau ku tshibangidilu, mukenshi eu mukulukulu udi dî dinuakunvua." 
1John2:8 Ndi nufundila mukenshi muhia-muhia kabidi, budi bualu bulelela munda muandi ne munda muenu; bualu bua butuku butshiatshia, ne munya mulelela wakumana kutema." 
1John2:8 Ndi nufundila mukenshi muhia-muhia kabidi, budi bualu bulelela munda muandi ne munda muenu; bualu bua butuku butshiatshia, ne munya mulelela wakumana kutema." 
1John2:9 Yeye udi wamba ne, Ndi mu munya, hatshidiye ne muanʼabo lukuna, yeye utshidi mu midima tô ne katataka." 
1John2:9 Yeye udi wamba ne, Ndi mu munya, hatshidiye ne muanʼabo lukuna, yeye utshidi mu midima tô ne katataka." 
1John2:10 Yeye udi musue muanʼabo udi muikale mu munya, ne tshilenduishi katshiena munda muandi." 
1John2:10 Yeye udi musue muanʼabo udi muikale mu munya, ne tshilenduishi katshiena munda muandi." 
1John2:11 Kadi muntu udi ne muanʼabo lukuna, yeye utshidi mu midima, udi wenda mu midima, kena mumanye kudiye uya, bualu bua midima yakufofomesha mesu andi." 
1John2:11 Kadi muntu udi ne muanʼabo lukuna, yeye utshidi mu midima, udi wenda mu midima, kena mumanye kudiye uya, bualu bua midima yakufofomesha mesu andi."

1John2:19 Bobo bakumuka munkatshi muetu, kadi kabakadi betu mene; bu bobo bikale betu, bakadi kuikala nʼetu; kadi bakumuka bua bobo bamueneshibue ne, Buonso buabo kabakadi betu mene."
